src: In a statement in The Washington Times, the executive director of 21st Century Democrats, Mark Lotwis, called the lawsuit "frivolous" and said: "we're going to defend our organization's integrity".
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan dalam The Washington Times, pengarah eksekutif 21st Century Democrats, Mark Lotwis, menggelar tuntutan mahkamah itu "remeh" dan berkata: "kita akan mempertahankan integriti organisasi kami."

src: Landmark Education spokeswoman Deborah Beroset said that the Landmark Forum "is in no way religious in nature and any claim to the contrary is simply absurd," and stated: "While we are not a party to this lawsuit and have no firsthand knowledge of it, we can only assume that we are being used as a legal and political football to further the plaintiff's own financial interests."
ref: Jurucakap Landmark Education Deborah Beroset berkata bahawa Forum Landmark "adalah sama sekali tiada unsur agama dan apa-apa tuntutan yang bertentangan adalah tidak masuk akal sama sekali," dan menyatakan: "Walaupun kami bukan pihak terlibat dalam tuntutan mahkamah ini dan tidak mempunyai maklumat langsung mengenainya, kita hanya boleh menganggap bahawa kita sedang digunakan sebagai bola sepak perundangan dan politik untuk kepentingan kewangan plaintif."

src: The New York lawsuit was filed April 14, and is still in early filing stages.
ref: Tuntutan mahkamah telah difailkan pada 14 April di New York, dan masih dalam peringkat pemfailan awal.

src: A conference with the federal court judge in the case has been scheduled for June 17.
ref: Satu persidangan dengan hakim mahkamah persekutuan dalam kes itu telah dijadualkan pada 17 Jun.

src: The Washington, D.C. suit began in November 2007, and entered mediation this past March.
ref: Tuntutan mahkamah yang difailkan di Washington, D.C. bermula pada November 2007, dan memasuki timbang tara bulan Mac lalu.

src: As of April 15 the parties in the case were due back to court on July 11 to update the court on the mediation process.
ref: Sehingga 15 April pihak-pihak dalam kes itu sepatutnya kembali ke mahkamah pada 11 Julai untuk mengemaskini mahkamah mengenai proses timbang tara.

src: Landmark Education is descended from Erhard Seminars Training, also called "est", which was founded by Werner Erhard.
ref: Landmark Education berasal dari Latihan Seminar Erhard, juga dikenali sebagai "est," yang diasaskan oleh Werner Erhard.

src: est began in 1971, and Erhard's company Werner Erhard and Associates repackaged the course as "The Forum" in 1985.
ref: Est bermula pada tahun 1971, dan syarikat Erhard Werner Erhard and Associates telah mempakej semula kursus tersebut sebagai "The Forum" pada tahun 1985.

src: Associates of Erhard bought the license to his "technology" and incorporated Landmark Education in California in 1991.
ref: Associates of Erhard membeli lesen untuk "teknologi"nya dan memperbadankan Landmark Education di California pada tahun 1991.

src: This is not the first time employees have sued claiming mandatory attendance at "Forum" workshops violated their civil rights.
ref: Ini bukan kali pertama pekerja menyaman dengan mendakwa kehadiran wajib di bengkel-bengkel "Forum" yang telah melanggar hak-hak sivil mereka.

src: In a lawsuit filed in December 1988 in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, eight employees of DeKalb Farmers Market in Decatur, Georgia sued their employer claiming their religious freedom and civil rights were violated when they were allegedly coerced into attending "Forum" training sessions.
ref: Dalam tuntutan mahkamah yang difailkan pada Disember 1988 di Mahkamah Daerah bagi Daerah Utara Georgia Amerika Syarikat, lapan pekerja DeKalb Farmers Market di Decatur, Georgia menyaman majikan mereka mengtakan bahawa kebebasan agama dan hak-hak sivil mereka telah dicabuli apabila mereka dipaksa menghadiri sesi-sesi latihan "Forum."

src: Many of these training programs, particularly at large corporations, claim to be purely psychological, aimed at improving productivity and morale and loyalty.
ref: Kebanyakan program-program latihan ini, terutamanya di syarikat-syarikat besar, mendakwa ia semata-matanya berbentuk psikologi, yang bertujuan untuk meningkatkan produktiviti dan semangat dan kesetiaan.

src: But in fact they are religious, said University of Denver religious studies professor Carl Raschke in a statement to The Wall Street Journal.
ref: Tetapi sebenarnya mereka adalah berbentuk agama, kata profesor pengajian agama Universiti Denver Carl Raschke dalam satu kenyataan kepada The Wall Street Journal.

src: The DeKalb Farmers Market employees were represented by lawyers for the American Civil Liberties Union.
ref: Pekerja-pekerja DeKalb Farmers Market diwakili oleh peguam-peguam bagi Kesatuan Kebebasan Sivil Amerika.

src: Consulting Technologies Inc., an affiliate of Transformational Technologies Inc., was named as a party in the lawsuit.
ref: Consulting Technologies Inc., sebuah anak syarikat bagi Transformational Technologies Inc., telah dinamakan sebagai pihak dalam tuntutan mahkamah.

src: Transformational Technologies was founded by Werner Erhard, and was not named as a party in the suit.
ref: Transformational Technologies telah diasaskan oleh Werner Erhard, dan tidak dinamakan sebagai pihak dalam saman itu.

src: The "Forum" course that the employees claimed they were mandated to attend was developed by Werner Erhard and Associates.
ref: Kursus "Forum" yang pekerja-pekerja mendakwa bahawa mereka diwajibkan menghadiri diperbangunkan oleh Werner Erhard dan Associates.

src: Employees said that they were fired or pressured to quit after they objected to the Forum courses.
ref: Pekerja berkata bahawa mereka telah dipecat atau ditekan untuk berhenti selepas mereka menentang kursus-kursus Forum.

src: The workers claimed that the Forum course contradicted with their religious beliefs.
ref: Pekerja-pekerja mendakwa kursus Forum bercanggah dengan kepercayaan agama mereka.

src: The plaintiffs in the suit included adherents of varying religious backgrounds, including Christianity and Hinduism.
ref: Plaintif dalam saman itu termasuk penganut agama pelbagai latar belakang, termasuk agama Kristian dan Hindu.

src: "It's like brainwashing," said Dong Shik Kim, one of the plaintiffs in the case.
ref: "Ia seperti mencuci otak," kata Dong Shik Kim, salah seorang plaintif dalam kes itu.

src: The plaintiffs said they lost their jobs after objecting to a "new age quasi-religious cult" which they said was developed by Werner Erhard.
ref: Plaintif-plaintif berkata mereka kehilangan pekerjaan mereka selepas membantah "pemujaan seakan-akan agama zaman baru" di mana mereka berkata ia dibangunkan oleh Werner Erhard.

src: The DeKalb Farmers Market denied the allegations, and an attorney for the company Edward D. Buckley III told The Wall Street Journal that employees were encouraged, not coerced, to attend the training sessions.
ref: DeKalb Farmers Market menafikan dakwaan itu, dan seorang peguam untuk syarikat Edward D. Buckley III memberitahu The Wall Street Journal bahawa pekerja digalakkan, bukan dipaksa, untuk menghadiri sesi-sesi latihan.

src: According to The Wall Street Journal, The Forum said it would not sanction workers being coerced to attend its training sessions.
ref: Menurut The Wall Street Journal, The Forum berkata ia tidak akan membenarkan pekerja yang dipaksa untuk menghadiri sesi-sesi latihannya.

src: The parties in the DeKalb Farmers Market religious discrimination case came to a settlement in May 1989, and the case was dismissed with prejudice in June.
ref: Pihak-pihak dalam kes diskriminasi agama DeKalb Farmers Market mencapai penyelesaian pada bulan Mei 1989, dan kes tersebut telah dibuang dengan prejudis pada bulan Jun.

src: The terms of the out-of-court settlement were not made public, but the employees' attorney Amy Totenberg told The Wall Street Journal that the case "has made employers come to grips with the legitimate boundaries of employee training".
ref: Syarat-syarat penyelesaian di luar mahkamah tidak didedahkan kepada umum, tetapi peguam pekerja-pekerja itu Amy Totenberg memberitahu The Wall Street Journal bahawa kes itu "telah menyebabkan majikan berhadapan dengan sempadan sah berkenaan latihan pekerja."

src: According to Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, employers must "reasonably accommodate" their employees' religious beliefs unless this creates "undue hardship".
ref: Menurut Tajuk VII Akta Hak Sivil 1964, majikan perlu "menyesuaikan diri dengan munasabah" berkenaan kepercayaan agama pekerja mereka kecuali ini mewujudkan "kesusahan yang tidak wajar."

src: In September 1988, the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission issued a policy-guidance notice which stated that New Age courses should be handled under Title VII of the Act.
ref: Pada bulan September 1988, Suruhanjaya Peluang Pekerjaan Sama mengeluarkan notis dasar-panduan yang menyatakan bahawa kursus-kursus New Age hendaklah dikendalikan di bawah Tajuk VII Akta tersebut.

src: According to the Commission, employers must provide "reasonable accommodation" if an employee challenges a training course, unless this causes "undue hardship" for the company.
ref: Menurut Suruhanjaya itu, majikan perlu menyediakan "penyesuaian munasabah" jika seorang pekerja mencabar kursus latihan, melainkan jika ini menyebabkan "kesusahan yang tidak wajar" bagi syarikat.

src: In October 2006, Landmark Education took legal action against Google, YouTube, the Internet Archive and a website owner in Queensland, Australia in attempts to remove criticism of its products from the Internet.
ref: Pada Oktober 2006, Landmark Education telah mengambil tindakan undang-undang terhadap Google, YouTube, Arkib Internet dan seorang pemilik laman web di Queensland, Australia dalam percubaan untuk menghapuskan kritikan produknya dari Internet.

src: The company sought a subpoena under the Digital Millennium Copyright Act in an attempt to discover the identity of an anonymous critic who uploaded a 2004 French documentary of the Landmark Forum to the Internet.
ref: Syarikat itu meminta sepina di bawah Akta Hak Cipta Milenium Digital dalam usaha mencari identiti seorang pengkritik tanpa nama yang memuat naikkan satu dokumentari Forum Landmark di Perancis pada tahun 2004 ke Internet.

src: The Electronic Frontier Foundation represented the anonymous critic and the Internet Archive, and Landmark withdrew its subpoena in November 2006 in exchange for a promise from the anonymous critic not to repost the video.
ref: Yayasan Elektronic Frontier diwakili pengkritik tanpa nama dan Arkib Internet, dan Landmark menarik balik sepina itu pada November 2006 dalam pertukaran untuk janji dari pengkritik tanpa nama itu agar tidak memuat naik semula video tersebut.

src: Landmark Education itself has come under scrutiny for its controversial labor practices.
ref: Landmark Education sendiri telah dikawal rapi disebabkan amalan buruhnya yang berkontroversi.

src: The company has been investigated by the United States Department of Labor in separate investigations originating out of California, Colorado, and Texas.
ref: Syarikat ini telah disiasat oleh Jabatan Buruh Amerika Syarikat dalam siasatan berasingan yang bermula dari California, Colorado, dan Texas.

src: Investigations focused on the heavy reliance of unpaid labor in the company's workforce, which Landmark Education calls "assistants" and deems volunteers.
ref: Siasatan tertumpu kepada pergantungan sepenuhnya buruh yang tidak dibayar gaji dalam tenaga kerja syarikat, yang Landmark Education namakan sebagai "pembantu" dan dianggap sukarelawan.

src: Labor based out of Colorado found that activities performed by Landmark Education's "assistants" include: "office, clerical, telephone solicitation and enrollment, as well as greeting customers, setting up chairs, handling microphones during the seminars and making coffee."
ref: Buruh yang berpusat di luar Colorado mendapati bahawa aktiviti yang dijalankan oleh "pembantu" Landmark Education termasuk: "pejabat, perkeranian, permintaan telefon dan pendaftaran, dan juga menyambut pelanggan, menyediakan kerusi, pengendalian mikrofon semasa seminar dan membuat kopi."

src: "Additionally, a number of volunteers actually teach the courses and provide testimonials during and after the courses."
ref: "Selain itu, beberapa sukarelawan sebenarnya mengajar kursus dan menyediakan perakuan semasa dan selepas kursus."

src: The Colorado investigation's 1996 report found that "No records are kept of any hours worked by any employees."
ref: Laporan Siasatan Colorado 1996 mendapati bahawa "Tidak ada simpanan rekod sebarangan waktu bekerja mana-mana pekerja."

src: According to a 1998 article in Metro Silicon Valley: "In the end the Department of Labor dropped the issue, leaving Landmark trumpeting about its volunteers' choice in the matter."
ref: Menurut satu artikel 1998 dalam Metro Silicon Valley: "Akhirnya Jabatan Buruh menggugurkan isu itu, membiarkan Landmark meghebah-hebahkan pilihan sukarelawannya dalam perkara itu."

src: Metro Silicon Valley reported that Landmark Education at the time employed 451 paid staff, and also utilized the services of 7,500 volunteers.
ref: Metro Silicon Valley melaporkan bahawa Landmark Education pada masa itu mengupah 451 kakitangan yang dibayar, dan juga menggunakan perkhidmatan 7,500 sukarelawan.

src: After an investigation into Landmark Education's labor practices by the U.S. Dept.Labor's offices out of California, the company was deemed to have overtime violations.
ref: Selepas siasatan terhadap amalan buruh Landmark Education oleh pejabat buruh Amerika Syarikat ke atas pejabat-pejabat di luar California, syarikat itu dianggap mempunyai pelanggaran kerja lebih masa.

src: According to the Department of Labor's 2004 report on the investigation, back wages of $187,569.01 were found due to 45 employees.
ref: Menurut laporan Jabatan Tenaga Kerja 2004 ke atas siasatan tersebut, upah tertangguh sebanyak $187,569.01 telah didapati tertangguh untuk 45 pekerja.

src: Labor in Texas which concluded in 2005 stated: "Minimum wage violation found."
ref: Buruh di Texas yang membuat kesimpulan pada tahun 2005 menyatakan: "Pelanggaran gaji minimum dijumpai."

src: "Volunteers (Assistants) are not paid any wages for hours worked while performing the major duties of the firm."
ref: "Sukarelawan (Pembantu) tidak dibayar gaji selama berjam-jam bekerja semasa menjalankan tugas-tugas utama firma itu."

src: "The assistants set up rooms, call registrants, collect fees, keep stats of classroom data/participants, file, they also are answering phones, training and leading seminars."
ref: "Para pembantu menyiapkan bilik, menelefon peserta, mengutip yuran, menyimpan statistik data bilik darjah/peserta, fail, mereka juga menjawab telefon, menjalankan latihan dan mengetuai seminar-seminar."

src: Landmark Education agreed to pay back wages for the overtime violation, but did not comply with the overtime violation found by the U.S. Dept.
ref: Landmark Education bersetuju untuk membayar balik gaji tertangguh akibat pelanggaran kerja lebih masa, tetapi tidak mematuhi pelanggaran kerja lebih masa yang dijumpai oleh Jabatan Amerika Syarikat.

src: Landmark Education denied that the "assistants" are employees, though the Department of Labor report concluded: "Interviews reveal that the employees are taking payments, registering clients, billing, training, recruiting, setting up locations, cleaning, and other duties that would have to be performed by staff if the assistants did not perform them."
ref: Landmark Education menafikan bahawa "pembantu" adalah pekerja, walaupun Jabatan Buruh laporan menyimpulkan: "Temubual mendedahkan bahawa pekerja mengambil bayaran, mencatatkan pelanggan, menyediakan bil, latihan, merekrut, menyediakan lokasi, pembersihan, dan tugas-tugas lain yang perlu dilaksanakan oleh kakitangan jika pembantu tidak melaksanakan mereka."

src: According to the 2004 investigative report by Pièces à Conviction in the "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" program, Landmark Education was investigated by the French government in 1995.
ref: Menurut laporan siasatan 2004 oleh Pièces à Conviction dalam program "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous," Landmark Education telah disiasat oleh kerajaan Perancis pada tahun 1995.

src: In the "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" program volunteers were filmed through a hidden camera and shown performing duties for Landmark Education in France including manning phones, recruitment and financial work for the company, and one volunteer was shown cleaning a toilet.
ref: Dalam "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" sukarelawan program telah difilemkan melalui kamera tersembunyi dan menunjukkan mereka menjalankan tugas untuk Landmark Education di Perancis termasuk pengendalian telefon, pengambilan dan kerja kewangan bagi syarikat itu, dan seorang sukarelawan telah ditayangkan membersih tandas.

src: Le Nouvel Observateur reported that after "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" aired in France, labor inspectors investigated Landmark Education's use of unpaid volunteers.
ref: Le Nouvel Observateur melaporkan bahawa selepas "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" disiarkan di Perancis, pemeriksa buruh menyiasat penggunaan sukarelawan Landmark Education yang tidak dibayar.

src: According to Le Nouvel Observateur, one month after the labor investigation took place the French branch of the company had disbanded.
ref: Menurut Le Nouvel Observateur, satu bulan selepas siasatan buruh berlaku cawangan Perancis syarikat itu telah dibubarkan.

src: A former "Introduction Leader" to the Landmark Forum, Lars Bergwik, has recently posted a series of videos to YouTube critical of the company and its practices.
ref: Seorang bekas "Pengenalan Pemimpin" kepada Forum Landmark, Lars Bergwik, baru-baru ini memuat naik satu siri video ke YouTube menunjukkan mengkritik syarikat dan amalan-amalannya.

src: Bergwik appeared on a 2004 investigative journalism program on Sweden's Channel 4, Kalla Fakta (Cold Facts).
ref: Bergwik muncul dalam program kewartawanan penyiasatan 2004 di Sweden Channel 4, Kalla Fakta (Fakta Dingin).

src: According to Bergwik, after the Kalla Fakta program on Landmark Education aired, "Landmark left Sweden".
ref: Menurut Bergwik, selepas program Kalla Fakta di Landmark Education disiarkan, "Landmark meninggalkan Sweden."

src: Two people were killed and two others were seriously injured yesterday when a boulder collapsed onto a house in the German town of Stein an der Traun, south-east of Munich.
ref: Dua orang terbunuh dan dua lagi cedera parah kelmarin apabila batu besar runtuh ke atas sebuah rumah di bandar Stein an der Traun di Jerman, selatan-timur Munich.

src: A family of four were said to have been watching television together in the lounge when a large lump of rock, about 50 tons, broke off from a 50 foot cliff above the house.
ref: Sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai empat anggota dikatakan sedang menonton televisyen bersama-sama di ruang tamu apabila ketulan batu besar itu, kira-kira 50 tan, terpisah dari tebing 50 kaki di atas rumah.

src: The boulder fell from about 15 metres above the residence and landed on top of the house, crushing it.
ref: Batu besar yang jatuh kira-kira 15 meter dari atas kediaman dan mendarat di atas rumah, menghancurkan rumah itu.

src: The cause of the rock fall is unknown, but police have said that there had been no prior signs that the cliff was unstable.
ref: Punca kejatuhan batu itu tidak diketahui, tetapi polis telah berkata bahawa tiada sebarang tanda-tanda sebelum ini bahawa tebing itu tidak stabil.

src: The accident, which happened at approximately 1940 local time, killed a 45-year-old father and his 18-year-old daughter.
ref: Kemalangan itu, yang berlaku pada kira-kira 1940 waktu tempatan, membunuh seorang bapa yang berusia 45 tahun dan anak perempuannya yang berusia 18 tahun.

src: A 40-year-old mother and her 16-year-old son were seriously injured and were taken to hospital for treatment, after a rescue operation that lasted into the early hours of the following morning.
ref: Seorang ibu berusia 40 tahun dan anak lelakinya yang berusia 16 tahun itu cedera parah dan dibawa ke hospital untuk mendapat rawatan, selepas operasi menyelamat yang berterusan sehingga awal pagi berikutnya.

src: The task involved up to 250 rescue personnel, some with sniffer dogs.
ref: Tugas ini melibatkan seramai 250 anggota penyelamat, dengan beberapa ekor anjing penghidu.

src: An official from the international humanitarian movement the Red Cross said "[w]e made contact with them early on and kept talking with them through the night as we pulled away at the debris."
ref: Seorang pegawai dari gerakan kemanusiaan antarabangsa Palang Merah berkata "[K]ami berkomunikasi dengan mereka sejak awal lagi dan terus bercakap dengan mereka sepanjang malam sehingga kami tinggalkan runtuhan itu."

src: Joachim Herrmann, the Bavarian Interior Minister, spoke of his thoughts about the incident.
ref: Joachim Herrmann, Menteri Dalam Negeri Bavaria, bercakap mengenai pandangannya mengenai kejadian itu.

src: I have never seen anything like this, he was quoted as saying.
ref: Saya tidak pernah melihat apa-apa seperti ini, beliau dipetik seperti berkata.

src: The European Space Agency (ESA) reported on Friday that the Wilkins Shelf, an enormous Antarctic ice shelf half the size of Scotland, could break away from the continent very soon.
ref: Agensi Angkasa Lepas Eropah (ESA) melapor pada hari Jumaat bahawa Wilkins Shelf, bongkah batu besar Antartik yang bersaiz separuh daripada Scotland, akan terpisah dari benua itu tidak lama lagi.

src: According to reports, only a thin strip of ice connects it to the Charcot Island, and cracks are expanding rapidly.
ref: Menurut laporan, hanya jalur nipis ais menyambungkan ia dengan Pulau Charcot, dan kesan retakan berkembang dengan pesat.

src: This is the largest shelf of ice so far to have disintegrated in the Antarctic.
ref: Ini merupakan bongkas ais terbesar setakat ini yang terpisah dari Antartik.

src: In February 2008, the shelf lost 425 square kilometres (164 square miles) of ice, followed by a loss of another 62 square miles in May 2008.
ref: Pada Februari 2008, bongkah itu kehilangan 425 kilometer persegi (164 batu persegi) ais, diikuti kehilangan sebanyak 62 batu persegi pada bulan Mei 2008.

src: During the last year the ice shelf has lost about 1800 square kilometers (694 square miles), or about 14 percent of its size, said Angelika Humbert from the Institute of Geophysics at University of Münster in Germany.
ref: Sepanjang tahun lepas bongkas ais itu kehilangan 1800 kilometer persegi (694 batu persegi), atau lebih kurang 14 peratus dari saiznya, kata Angelika Humbert dari Institut Geofizik dari Universiti Münster di Jerman.

src: Scientists say that the shelf, if it detaches from the mainland, won't cause an increase in sea levels, as it is already floating.
ref: Ahli-ahli saintis menyatakan bahawa, jika bongkah itu terpisah dari tanah besar, tidak akan mengakibatkan kenaikan paras air, kerana ia sudah terapung.

src: Most scientists believe that the incident is further evidence of global warming.
ref: Kebanyakan saintis percaya bahawa insiden itu merupakan bukti lanjutan pemanasan global.

src: Average temperatures in the Antarctic peninsula have increased by about 2.5 degrees Celsius (3.8 degrees Fahrenheit) in the past fifty years.
ref: Purata suhu di semenanjung Antartik telah meningkat sebanyak 2.5 darjah Celcius (3.8 darjah Fahrenheit) sepanjang lima puluh tahun lalu.

src: King Abdullah of Saudi Arabia has announced women will be allowed to vote in the country and run for municipal elections there.
ref: Raja Abdullah dari Arab Saudi telah mengumumkan wanita akan dibenarkan untuk mengundi di negara itu dan bertanding dalam pilihan raya perbandaran di sana.

src: Abdullah made this announcement at the start of a new Shura Council term.
ref: Abdullah membuat pengumuman ini pada permulaan penggal Majlis Syura baru.

src: In a speech, the king said "we refuse to marginalise women in society in all roles that comply with sharia" and so made the decision "to involve women in the Shura Council as members, starting from next term".
ref: Dalam ucapan, raja berkata "kita tidak mahu meminggirkan wanita dalam masyarakat bagi semua peranan yang mematuhi syariah" dan seterusnya membuat keputusan itu "untuk melibatkan wanita dalam Majlis Shura sebagai ahli, bermula dari tempoh yang akan datang."

src: Abdullah clarified that female adults "will be able to run as candidates in the municipal election and will even have a right to vote."
ref: Abdullah menjelaskan bahawa perempuan dewasa "akan dapat bertanding sebagai calon pada pilihan raya perbandaran dan juga akan mempunyai hak untuk mengundi."

src: Such changes are to be put in place "according to Islamic principles," he said.
ref: Perubahan itu hendaklah dilaksanakan "mengikut prinsip-prinsip Islam," katanya.

src: Muslim women, he continued, "must not be marginalised in opinion or advice".
ref: Wanita Muslim, tambahnya, "tidak harus dipinggirkan dalam pendapat atau nasihat."

src: Activists have sought women's right to vote in Saudi Arabia for years.
ref: Aktivis-aktivis telah berusaha meminta hak wanita untuk mengundi di Arab Saudi selama bertahun-tahun.

src: As it stands, women in Saudi Arabia cannot drive, nor travel without male permission, based on Sunni Islam principles.
ref: Seperti sedia ada, wanita di Arab Saudi tidak boleh memandu, ataupun bersiar-siar tanpa kebenaran lelaki, berdasarkan prinsip-prinsip Sunni Islam.

src: Apple Inc. today has introduced the much-anticipated iPhone at the Macworld Conference in San Francisco.
ref: Apple Inc hari ini telah memperkenalkan iPhone yang ditunggu-tunggu pada Persidangan Macworld di San Francisco.

src: The iPhone is claimed to be "a revolutionary mobile phone" as stated on the Apple website.
ref: IPhone didakwa sebagai "revolusi telefon bimbit" seperti yang dinyatakan di laman web Apple.

src: The device appears to be running a mobile version of the Apple operating system Mac OSX.
ref: Peranti nampaknya berfungsi atas versi mudah alih sistem operasi Apple Mac OSX.

src: It is approximately the same size as a 5th generation iPod, it has a 3.5-inch LCD touchscreen display that is used to access all features of the phone including number dial, as well as making phone calls.
ref: Ia kira-kira saiz yang sama sebagai generasi ke-5 iPod, ia mempunyai paparan LCD skrin sentuh 3.5 inci yang digunakan untuk mengakses semua ciri-ciri telefon termasuk dail nombor, serta membuat panggilan telefon.

src: The iPhone plays music, movies, displays pictures and is able to connect to a wireless network.
ref: IPhone memainkan muzik, filem, memaparkan gambar dan mampu untuk menyambung kepada rangkaian tanpa wayar.

src: Apple CEO Steve Jobs unveiled the device by walking onto the stage and taking the iPhone out of his jeans pocket.
ref: Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Apple Steve Jobs mengumumkan peranti tersebut dengan berjalan ke pentas dan mengeluarkan iPhone daripada poket seluar jeansnya.

src: During his 2 hour speech he stated that "Today Apple is going to reinvent the phone, We are going to make history today".
ref: Dalam ucapan selama 2 jam dia menyatakan bahawa "Hari ini Apple akan mencipta semula telefon, Kami akan mencipta sejarah hari ini."

src: Today Apple also released their Media Center device - Apple TV.
ref: Hari ini Apple juga mengeluarkan peranti Media Center mereka - Apple TV.

src: It will directly compete with Microsoft's Media Center operating system.
ref: Ia secara langsung akan bersaing dengan Media Center sistem operasi Microsoft.

src: Apple has taken a different approach to the media center market; rather than storing content (such as movies, music and photos) on the device, Apple TV connects to a computer (Mac and Windows) over a wirless network connection and plays all content stored on that computer.
ref: Apple telah mengambil pendekatan yang berbeza untuk pasaran pusat media; daripada menyimpan kandungan (seperti filem, muzik dan gambar) pada peranti, Apple TV menghubungkan ke komputer (Mac dan Windows) melalui sambungan rangkaian tanpa wayar dan memainkan semua kandungan yang disimpan dalam komputer itu.

src: This makes it substantially easier for users to organize their media content.
ref: Ini menjadikannya lebih mudah bagi sebahagian besar pengguna untuk menyusun kandungan media mereka.

src: Thirty-four Indonesian fisherman have been jailed in Broome in northern Western Australia (WA) for illegal fishing offences.
ref: Tiga puluh empat nelayan Indonesia telah dipenjara di Broome di utara Australia Barat (WA) atas kesalahan penangkapan ikan secara haram.

src: Seven of the 34 have been jailed in Australia before for previous fishing offences.
ref: Tujuh daripada 34 telah dipenjara di Australia sebelum ini atas kesalahan menangkap ikan.

src: Their vessels were found hiding in mangroves off the Kimberley coast.
ref: Kapal-kapal mereka didapati bersembunyi di hutan bakau di pantai Kimberley.

src: The fisherman were found in possession of nearly two tonnes of trochus shell, a shell valued for fashioning into high quality buttons, beads and trinkets.
ref: Nelayan tersebut dijumpai memiliki hampir dua tan cengkerang kon sfera, cengkerang yang bernilai untuk fesyen menghasilkan butang berkualiti tinggi, manik dan perhiasan.

src: The WA Fisheries Department says the jail terms reflect the seriousness with which the offence is being viewed.
ref: Jabatan Perikanan WA berkata terma hukuman penjara mencerminkan betapa seriusnya kesalahan itu dilihat.

src: Department officer Chris Mitchell says the fishermen had traversed 200 miles of Commonwealth waters and were inside the three nautical mile state limit when they were caught.
ref: Pegawai jabatan Chris Mitchell berkata nelayan telah merentasi 200 batu perairan Komanwel dan berada dalam had negeri tiga batu nautika apabila mereka ditangkap.

src: He says their actions are a serious breach of fisheries laws.
ref: Beliau berkata tindakan mereka adalah pelanggaran serius undang-undang perikanan.

src: "In the early days, the courts would have given a good behaviour bond for a first offender", he said.
ref: "Pada peringkat awal, mahkamah selalunya akan memberikan bon berkelakuan baik ke atas pesalah kali pertama," beliau berkata.

src: That was more specifically for the traditional sail-powered vessels, not these motorised vessels that are coming down and because these are in state waters it is far more serious.
ref: Itu lebih khusus untuk kapal berkuasa-layar tradisional, bukan kapal-kapal bermotor yang datang dan kerana ini berada dalam perairan negeri ia adalah jauh lebih serius.

src: On Thursday, skippers of 11 Indonesian fishing boats were fined by a Perth court.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, kapten daripada 11 bot nelayan Indonesia telah dikenakan denda oleh mahkamah Perth.

src: Three of the men, who had previous convictions, were fined $15,000 each, with 100 days to pay.
ref: Tiga daripada lelaki-lelaki itu, yang mempunyai rekod jenayah terdahulu, telah didenda $15,000 setiap satu, dengan 100 hari untuk dibayar.

src: The remaining eight were fined $9000 each and given 60 days to pay.
ref: Lapan yang lain telah didenda $9000 setiap satu dan diberi 60 hari untuk dibayar.

src: The captains were fined between $9,000 and $15,000 for fishing and taking trochus shell from Australian waters off the north-west coast last month.
ref: Kapten-kapten tersebut didenda sekitar $9,000 dan $15,000 kerana memukat dan mengambil cengkerang kon sfera dari pengairan Australia di luar pantai barat laut bulan lalu.

src: Three of the captains have been caught fishing in Australian waters before between 1997 and 2004.
ref: Tiga daripada kapten-kapten itu telah ditangkap memukat di perairan Australia sebelumnya antara 1997 dan 2004.

src: Legal Aid lawyer David McKenzie, says the fishermen were very poor and it was highly unlikely they would be able to pay the fines.
ref: Peguam Bantuan Guaman Daud McKenzie, berkata nelayan tersebut sangat miskin dan berkemungkinan besar mereka tidak akan dapat membayar denda.

src: The magistrate ordered that they spend between 60 and 100 days in jail in Western Australia if the fines were not paid.
ref: Majistret mengarahkan mereka menghabiskan antara 60 dan 100 hari dalam penjara di Australia Barat jika denda tidak dibayar.

src: The independent and nonpartisan US congressional watchdog, the Government Accountability Office (GAO) called the Food and Drug Administration's decision not to allow over-the-counter (OTC) sales of an Emergency Contraceptive pill, "unusual".
ref: Pemerhati bebas dan bukan partisan Amerika Syarikat, Pejabat Akauntabiliti Kerajaan (GAO) memanggil keputusan Pentadbiran Makanan dan Ubat-ubatan untuk tidak membenarkan penjualan di atas kaunter (OTC) pil Kecemasan Pnecegah Kehamilan, "luar biasa."

src: Emergency Contraceptive Pills or ECPs ("morning-after" or "next-day" pills ) are used to prevent an unintended pregnancy, following unprotected sexual intercourse.
ref: Pil kecemasan Pencegah Kehamilan atau ECPs ("selepas pagi" atau "esok hari" pil) digunakan untuk mencegah kehamilan yang tidak diingini, berikutan hubungan seks tanpa perlindungan.

src: They are objectionable for abortion opponents who consider their use to be a form of abortion, though scientific studies (including those by the FDA) classify them as contraceptives.
ref: Mereka membantah golongan pengguguran yang menganggap penggunaan pil itu untuk menjadi satu bentuk pengguguran, walaupun kajian saintifik (termasuk oleh FDA) mengklasifikasikan mereka sebagai pencegah kehamilan.

src: The pill, called Plan B is manufactured by Barr Laboratories and had been approved earlier by the FDA as a prescription drug.
ref: Pil, yang disebut Pelan B dihasilkan oleh Makmal Barr dan telah diluluskan sebelum ini oleh FDA sebagai ubat preskripsi.

src: Barr Laboratories requested that the drug be approved for OTC sale for adults and prescription-only sale for minors.
ref: Makmal Barr meminta ubat itu diluluskan untuk jualan OTC untuk orang dewasa dan penjualan preskripsi hanya untuk golongan bawah umur.

src: The decision to not approve went against the advice given by the FDA's Joint Advisory Committee and its Review staff and led to a GAO investigation into the decision making process.
ref: Keputusan untuk tidak diluluskan bertentangan dengan nasihat yang diberikan oleh Jawatankuasa Penasihat Bersama FDA dan Ulasan kakitangan dan membawa kepada siasatan GAO ke dalam proses membuat keputusan.

src: The investigation was requested by 30 House members and 17 Senators.
ref: Siasatan telah diminta oleh 30 ahli Dewan Rakyat dan 17 Ahli Dewan Negara.

src: The GAO found several anomalies in the decision making process.
ref: The GAO mendapati beberapa kejanggalan dalam proses membuat keputusan.

src: The rationale used by Dr. Steven Galson, the acting director of the Centre for Drug Evaluation and Research for rejecting the application was novel and did not follow usual FDA practices.
ref: Rasional yang digunakan oleh Dr. Steven Galson, pengarah bagi Pusat Penilaian Dadah dan Penyelidikan untuk menolak permohonan itu adalah baru dan tidak mengikuti amalan biasa FDA.

src: The decision was not signed off by the director of the office responsible for the application and the director of the Office of New Drugs, as they disagreed with the "reject" decision.
ref: Keputusan itu tidak ditandatangani oleh pengarah pejabat yang bertanggungjawab bagi permohonan dan pengarah Pejabat Dadah Baru, kerana mereka tidak bersetuju dengan keputusan "ditolak."

src: The GAO also found that the FDA's high-level management more involved in reviewing this decision than in other change-to-OTC applications.
ref: GAO juga mendapati bahawa pengurusan peringkat tinggi FDA lebih terlibat dalam mengkaji semula keputusan ini daripada dalam aplikasi perubahan ke OTC.

src: The Plan B decision was the only one of 67 proposed prescription to OTC changes to be disapproved, even after advisory committees approved the changes.
ref: Keputusan Pelan B adalah hanya satu daripada 67 cadangan preskripsi kepada perubahan OTC yang tidak diluluskan, walaupun selepas jawatankuasa penasihat meluluskan perubahan.

src: FDA review staff told the investigators that they were told early in the review process that the decision would be made by high-level management.
ref: Kakitangan kajian FDA memberitahu penyiasat bahawa mereka diberitahu awal dalam proses kajian semula itu bahawa keputusan akan dibuat oleh pihak pengurusan peringkat tertinggi.

src: E-mail and other documents involving the then-FDA Commissioner Mark McClellan were found to have been destroyed "routinely".
ref: E-mel dan dokumen-dokumen lain yang melibatkan Pesuruhjaya FDA-terdahulu Mark McClellan didapati telah musnah "secara rutin."

src: The FDA has disagreed with the GAO's finding that the high-level management was more involved in processing this application and that the rationale offered was novel, despite acknowledging that the adolescent cognitive ability rationale was unprecedented in FDA practice.
ref: FDA tidak bersetuju dengan penemuan GAO bahawa pengurusan peringkat tertinggi adalah lebih terlibat dalam memproses permohonan ini dan rasional yang ditawarkan adalah novel, walaupun mengakui bahawa keupayaan rasional remaja kognitif itu belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya dalam amalan FDA.

src: The accounts as to whether the decision to reject was taken prior to the reviews being completed offered to the investigators were conflicting.
ref: Hasil perakuan sama ada keputusan untuk menolak diambil kira sebelum ulasan disiapkan ditawarkan kepada para penyiasat telah bercanggah.

src: The acting director cited concerns about the potential behavioral implications for younger adolescents from OTC marketing of Plan-B, given their supposed lower cognitive ability, and that it was not valid to extrapolate data from older to younger audiences.
ref: Pemangku pengarah menyatakan kebimbangan mengenai implikasi tingkah laku yang berpotensi untuk remaja yang lebih muda daripada pemasaran OTC Pelan-B, memandangkan keupayaan kognitif lebih rendah mereka sepatutnya, dan ia adalah tidak sah untuk membuat anggaran data dari lebih tua kepada penonton muda.

src: However, the FDA had not considered similar "potential behavioral implications" for younger users for other OTC-switches and had previously considered it appropriate to extrapolate data from older to younger audiences.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, FDA tidak menganggap "implikasi tingkah laku yang berpotensi" yang serupa untuk pengguna lebih muda untuk suis-OTC yang lain dan sebelum ini menganggap ia sesuai untuk membuat anggaran data dari lebih tua kepada penonton muda.

src: The last two journalists reported killed at the turn of the year were Syrians; just at a time when protests and violence in the country are escalating, and the Arab League begins its initial assessment of the situation.
ref: Kedua-dua wartawan lepas dilaporkan terbunuh pada awal tahun ini adalah orang-orang Syria; hanya ketika protes dan keganasan di negara ini semakin meningkat, dan Liga Arab memulakan penilaian awal ke atas keadaan tersebut.

src: Shot on December 30, and the first journalist to die in 2012, was veteran journalist Shukri Ratib Abu Burghol.
ref: Ditembak pada 30 Disember, dan wartawan pertama yang mati pada tahun 2012, adalah wartawan veteran Shukri Ratib Abu Burghol.

src: The senior journalist was shot in the face after arriving home from work at a radio station in Darayya, on the southern outskirts of the capital city Damascus.
ref: Wartawan kanan itu ditembak di muka selepas pulang dari kerja di sebuah stesen radio di Darayya, di pinggir selatan ibu kota Damsyik.

src: According to Reporters Without Borders, he died three days after the shooting at Al Mouwsat Hospital.
ref: Menurut Reporters Without Borders, beliau meninggal dunia tiga hari selepas ditembak di Hospital Al Mouwsat.

src: Burghol, 56, was a journalist for about 21 years, working for the newspaper Al-Thawra (The Revolution) whilst also hosting a weekly show for Radio Damascus.
ref: Burghol, 56, adalah seorang wartawan lebih kurang 21 tahun, bekerja untuk akhbar Al-Thawra (Revolusi) sementara turut menganjurkan pertunjukan mingguan untuk Radio Damsyik.

src: A source told the Xinhua news agency Burghol had received threats.
ref: Satu sumber memberitahu agensi berita Xinhua Burghol telah menerima ancaman.

src: Basil Al-Sayed became the last journalist to die in 2011, shot on December 29 by a sniper in the city of Homs.
ref: Basil Al-Sayed menjadi wartawan terakhir yang mati pada tahun 2011, ditembak pada 29 Disember oleh penembak hendap di bandar Homs.

src: The Arab League has confirmed that the Syrian government have been seen using snipers against protesters elsewhere in Daraa.
ref: Liga Arab telah mengesahkan bahawa kerajaan Syria telah dilihat menggunakan penembak hendap terhadap penunjuk perasaan di tempat lain di Daraa.

src: The shooting of Al-Sayed took place in the Bab Amr section of Homs.
ref: Pembunuhan Al-Sayed berlaku di bahagian Bab Amr di Homs.

src: The city has been one of the hot spots for protests against Bashar al-Assad's government during 2011.
ref: Bandar ini telah menjadi salah satu tempat panas untuk memprotes terhadap kerajaan Bashar al-Assad, pada 2011.

src: In the last week of the year, the Bab Amr neighbourhood was attacked by the Syrian military and experienced heavy violence.
ref: Pada minggu terakhir tahun ini, kejiranan Bab Amr telah diserang oleh tentera Syria dan mengalami keganasan berat.

src: The 24-year-old camera operator was a citizen journalist who uploaded his videos to video-sharing sites to spread information about the protests.
ref: Pengendali kamera berusia 24 tahun itu adalah seorang wartawan warganegara yang memuat naik video ke laman perkongsian video untuk menyebarkan maklumat mengenai protes-protes tersebut.

src: Photojournalists and camera operators have been some of the the most at-risk during the Arab uprisings in Tunisia and Libya.
ref: Jurugambar wartawan dan pengendali kamera mendapat risiko paling tinggi semasa kebangkitan Arab di Tunisia dan Libya.

src: Ferzat Jarban — the first known journalist to be killed in Syria — was a freelance camera operator, arrested on November 19 whilst filming protests in Al-Qusayr, Homs Governorate.
ref: Ferzat Jarban - wartawan pertama yang diketahui dibunuh di Syria - adalah pengendali kamera bebas, ditangkap pada 19 November ketika penggambaran protes di Al-Qusayr, Homs Governorate.

src: Currently information is hard to verify and reliable independent sources are largely banned or restricted inside Syria.
ref: Pada masa ini maklumat adalah sukar untuk disahkan dan sumber bebas yang boleh dipercayai sebahagian besarnya diharamkan atau disekat di dalam Syria.

src: Foreign journalists have been barred from the country, and from covering the protests.
ref: Wartawan asing telah dihalang daripada memasuki negara ini, dan membuat liputan protes.

src: At the end of 2011 Arab League observers had sent out observers to different cities in Syria to monitor the situation, whilst one of its advisers called for the organization to retreat after Al-Assad's government reneged on agreements to halt the crackdown.
ref: Pada akhir tahun 2011 pemerhati Liga Arab telah menghantar pemerhati ke bandar-bandar lain di Syria untuk memantau keadaan, manakala salah seorang penasihat yang menyeru organisasi untuk berundur selepas kerajaan Al-Assad mengingkari perjanjian untuk menghentikan tindakan keras.

src: According to Navi Pillay, High Commissioner for Human Rights at the United Nations, more than 5,000 people have been killed during the Syrian uprising, a figure that includes around 300 children.
ref: Menurut Navi Pillay, Pesuruhjaya Tinggi Hak Asasi Manusia di Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, lebih daripada 5,000 orang terbunuh semasa pemberontakan Syria, satu jumlah termasuk kira-kira 300 kanak-kanak.

src: Three journalists are now known to have been killed in Syria.
ref: Tiga wartawan kini diketahui telah terbunuh di Syria.

src: In December, the Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) addressed an open letter to Syrian President Al-Assad calling for the release of all journalists in detention; the CPJ documented 29 cases of journalists being detained in 2011.
ref: Pada bulan Disember, Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan (CPJ) yang menyerahkan surat terbuka kepada Presiden Syria Al-Assad meminta pembebasan semua wartawan dalam tahanan; CPJ mendokumenkan 29 kes wartawan ditahan pada tahun 2011.

src: The CPJ reported that 45 journalists were killed worldwide in 2011, whereas — using differing criteria — Reporters Without Borders state that 66 journalists around the world died in 2011, and assert that, by almost every indicator, violence and censorship against international journalists was worse in 2011, up 16% on their 2010 figures.
ref: CPJ melaporkan bahawa 45 wartawan terbunuh di seluruh dunia pada tahun 2011, manakala - menggunakan kriteria yang berbeza - Reporters Without Borders menyatakan bahawa 66 wartawan di seluruh dunia meninggal dunia pada tahun 2011, dan menegaskan bahawa, dengan hampir setiap penunjuk, keganasan dan penapisan terhadap wartawan antarabangsa adalah lebih teruk di 2011, meningkat 16% daripada jumlah 2010.

src: A gunman opened fire at a hunting shop in the Russian city of yesterday, leaving six people dead.
ref: Seorang lelaki bersenjata melepaskan tembakan di sebuah kedai memburu di bandar Rusia semalam, menyebabkan enam orang mati.

src: Two of the victims were young girls aged 14 and 16.
ref: Dua daripada mangsa-mangsa adalah budak perempuan berumur 14 dan 16.

src: The Moscow Investigative Committee identify the main suspect as former convict Sergei Pomazun.
ref: Jawatankuasa Siasatan Moscow telah mengenalpasti suspek utama sebagai bekas banduan Sergei Pomazun.

src: Authorities said the man, believed to have used a hunting rifle, killed three salespeople and two bystanders, and injured another woman who died of head wounds shortly after the incident.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata, lelaki itu dipercayai menggunakan senapang memburu, membunuh tiga jurujual dan dua pemerhati, dan mencederakan seorang lagi wanita yang meninggal dunia akibat luka kepala sejurus selepas kejadian itu.

src: The man left the scene in a BMW, later abandoning the vehicle.
ref: Lelaki itu meninggalkan tempat kejadian dengan sebuah BMW, kemudian meninggalkan kereta tersebut.

src: Local authorities have said the search involves around 1200 police; InSerbia reports a team of 50 troops have also been dispatched to assist with the manhunt.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tempatan berkata pencarian melibatkan lebih kurang 1200 polis, di Serbia laporan mengatakan sepasukan 50 tentera telah dihantar untuk membantu dalam pemburuan itu.

src: Police also warned civilians the suspect may have a gas pistol and a semi-automatic rifle.
ref: Polis juga memberi amaran kepada orang awam bahawa suspek mungkin mempunyai pistol gas dan senapang semi-automatik.

src: Regional police spokesperson Alexei Pomorov told AFP, "We do not know whether it was a conflict because there's no one we can ask: everyone's dead".
ref: Jurucakap polis tempatan Alexei Pomorov memberitahu AFP, "Kita tidak tahu sama ada ia adalah konflik kerana tidak ada seorang pun yang boleh kita soal: semua orang sudah mati."

src: Police cordoned off the suspect's residence and found an empty weapons-storage safe.
ref: Polis mengepung kediaman suspek dan mendapati tempat simpanan senjata yang kosong.

src: Conservative Party leader David Cameron was last night a victim of crime following the theft of his bicycle.
ref: Pemimpin Parti Konservatif, David Cameron pada malam tadi merupakan mangsa jenayah berikutan kecurian basikal.

src: The Leader of the Opposition in the United Kingdom was out shopping in West London when the incident happened at around 6:30 last night.
ref: Ketua Pembangkang itu di United Kingdom telah keluar membeli-belah di Barat London ketika kejadian itu berlaku pada kira-kira 6:30 malam tadi.

src: He was said to have chained the bike to a short bollard while he picked up some groceries in Tesco on Portobello Road.
ref: Beliau dikatakan telah merantai basikal pada tombol pendek semasa dia membeli beberapa barangan runcit di Tesco di Portobello Road.

src: When he came out, the bike along with its chain had vanished.
ref: Ketika beliau keluar, basikal berserta dengan rantai telah hilang.

src: He stated that he "would very much like it back" and that to him "it was absolutely priceless".
ref: Beliau menyatakan bahawa dia "berharap akan dapat semula" dan bagi beliau "ia adalah sangat tidak ternilai."

src: He is also said to have reported the theft on the Scotland Yard online reporting website, but was pessimistic about it being returned.
ref: Beliau juga menambah telah melaporkan kecurian itu dalam laporan laman web Scotland Yard, tetapi agak pesimis untuk ia dikembalikan.

src: The thieves are said to be a group of teenagers.
ref: Pencuri dikatakan adalah sekumpulan remaja.

src: Around 19,000 bicycles are reported stolen every year in London alone.
ref: Lebih kurang 19,000 basikal dilaporkan dicuri setiap tahun di London.

src: Cameron's spokesperson said he had owned the bike for five years, and used it regularly to cycle to work.
ref: Jurucakap Cameron berkata beliau telah memiliki basikal tersebut selama lima tahun, dan selalu menggunakannya ke tempat kerja.

src: She stated he was "pretty hacked off" by the theft.
ref: Dia berkata beliau "agak terperanjat" dengan kecurian itu.

src: Police have found the body of a man they had been hunting in Cumbria, United Kingdom for a series of shootings.
ref: Polis menemui mayat seorang lelaki yang diburu di Cumbria, United Kingdom atas beberapa siri tembakan.

src: Police later confirmed that twelve people had been killed with a further thirteen injured, three critically.
ref: Polis kemudian mengesahkan bahawa dua belas orang telah dibunuh dengan tiga belas lagi cedera, tiga dalam kritikal.

src: Shots were fired in Whitehaven, Seascale and Egremont, with a total of thirty different crime scenes.
ref: Das-das tembakan dilepaskan di Whitehaven, Seascale dan Egremont, dengan sejumlah tiga puluh kejadian jenayah yang berbeza.

src: The Sellafield nuclear reprocessing plant was locked down for the first time in its history.
ref: Kilang pemprosesan semula nuklear Sellafield telah ditutup buat kali pertama dalam sejarahnya.

src: The prime suspect was named as 52 year old local man Derrick Bird, a taxi driver.
ref: Suspek utama dikenali sebagai lelaki tempatan berusia 52 tahun Derrick Bird, seorang pemandu teksi.

src: The first of Bird's victims was a fellow taxi driver shot in Whitehaven at about 10.30 local time, with the following victims being shot at random as Bird drove down the west coast.
ref: Mangsa pertama Bird adalah rakan pemandu teksi yang ditembak di Whitehaven pada kira-kira jam 10:30 waktu tempatan, dengan mangsa-mangsa berikut ditembak secara rawak apabila Bird memandu ke pantai barat.

src: Originally driving a Citroën Picasso, he was later said to be on foot when he crashed his vehicle.
ref: Pada asalnya memandu Citroen Picasso, beliau kemudiannya dikatakan berjalan kaki selepas kenderaannya terhempas.

src: Members of the public were advised by police to stay indoors, and for those who saw him not to approach him, but to call them.
ref: Orang ramai dinasihatkan oleh pihak polis untuk berada dalam rumah, dan bagi mereka yang terlihatnya supaya tidak mendekatinya, tetapi untuk menelefon mereka.

src: The manhunt covered the Boot or Scafell Pike area, and at 14:04 BST (13:04 UTC) the Deputy Chief Constable of Cumbria reported that a body believed to be Bird was found in a wood near Boot with a firearm, and that he had turned the weapon on himself.
ref: Pemburuan yang meliputi kawasan Boot atau Scafell Pike, dan pada 14:04 BST (13:04 UTC) Timbalan Ketua Konstabel Cumbria melaporkan bahawa satu mayat dipercayai adalah Bird ditemui dalam hutan berhampiran Boot dengan senjata api, dan dipercayai bahawa dia telah menembak dirinya.

src: The affected area is popular with walkers and hikers, and currently, many schools across England are on half term, meaning the pupils have no classes.
ref: Kawasan yang terjejas adalah popular dengan pejalan kaki dan pendaki, dan pada masa ini, banyak sekolah di England kini separuh semester, bermakna murid tidak mempunyai kelas.

src: British news network BBC News spoke to several eye-witnesses in relation to the incidents, from each of the areas, including Peter Watson of Whitehaven.
ref: Rangkaian berita Britain BBC bercakap dengan beberapa saksi berhubung kejadian, dari setiap kawasan, termasuk Peter Watson dari Whitehaven.

src: When I first got here it must have just happened.
ref: Apabila saya mula-mula sampai di sini ia semestinya baru sahaja berlaku.

src: There was a man lying on the ground with police stood over him and a jacket on him, he reported.
ref: Ada seorang lelaki terbaring di atas tanah dengan polis berdiri berdekatan dan jaket di atasnya, beliau melaporkan.

src: Home Secretary Theresa May is due to make a statement on the incident to the House of Commons tomorrow.
ref: Setiausaha Dalam Negeri Theresa Mei akan membuat kenyataan mengenai kejadian itu di Dewan Rakyat esok.

src: The 2010 United Nations Climate Change Conference negotiations continued this week in Bonn, Germany.
ref: Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu 2010 meneruskan rundingan pada minggu ini di Bonn, Jerman.

src: The 4,500 attendees include government delegates from 182 governments, representatives from business and industry, environmental organizations and research institutions.
ref: 4,500 yang hadir termasuk delegasi kerajaan dari 182 kerajaan, wakil-wakil daripada perniagaan dan industri, pertubuhan alam sekitar dan institusi penyelidikan.

src: Luis Alfonso de Alba, Mexico's special representative for climate change, told Reuters, "Mexico does not want to raise false expectations but we certainly are ambitious".
ref: Luis Alfonso de Alba, wakil khas Mexico untuk perubahan iklim, memberitahu Reuters, "Mexico tidak mahu meningkatkan harapan palsu tetapi kita bercita-cita tinggi."

src: He criticised the outgoing head of the U.N.'s climate secretariat, Yvo de Boer, and the European Union's climate commissioner Connie Hedegaard for their scepticism.
ref: Dia mengkritik ketua sekretariat iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu yang akan tamat tempoh, Yvo de Boer, dan Kesatuan Eropah pesuruhjaya iklim Connie Hedegaard atas keraguan mereka.

src: Negotiating under the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change , the next negotiating session is scheduled to take place in August, followed by another, final one-week intersessional meeting, before Cancún.
ref: Rundingan di bawah Rangka Kerja Konvensyen Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu mengenai Perubahan Iklim, sesi rundingan seterusnya dijadual berlangsung pada bulan Ogos, diikuti oleh yang lain, mesyuarat satu minggu terakhir, sebelum Cancún.

src: The talks were designed to discuss issues that were not resolved at the 2009 United Nations Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen.
ref: Rundingan telah direka untuk membincangkan isu-isu yang tidak dapat diselesaikan di Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu 2009 di Copenhagen.

src: The two working groups are the Ad Hoc Working Group on Long-Term Cooperative Action and the Ad Hoc Working Group on Further Commitments for Annex .
ref: Kedua-dua kumpulan kerja adalah Kumpulan Kerja Ad Hoc pada Koperasi Tindakan Jangka Panjang dan Kumpulan Kerja Ad Hoc bagi Komitmen Lanjutan untuk Annex.

src: These groups were specifically designed to negotiate a long-term response to climate change.
ref: Kumpulan-kumpulan ini telah direka khusus untuk berunding tindak balas jangka panjang kepada perubahan iklim.

src: The AWG-LCA is the negotiating group tasked to deliver a new "COP16 negotiative text" ahead of the June negotiating session.
ref: AWG-LCA adalah kumpulan rundingan ditugaskan untuk menyampaikan "teks yang boleh dirunding COP16" yang baru menjelang sesi rundingan Jun.

src: The AWG-KP is to focus on emissions reduction commitments for the 37 industrialised countries that have ratified the Kyoto Protocol for the period beyond 2012.
ref: AWG-KP memberi tumpuan kepada komitmen pengurangan pelepasan untuk 37 negara-negara perindustrian yang telah mengesahkan Protokol Kyoto bagi tempoh selepas tahun 2012.

src: There are also two UNFCCC standing committees meetings, the Subsidiary Body for Scientific and Technological Advice and the Subsidiary Body for Implementation .
ref: Terdapat juga dua mesyuarat UNFCCC jawatankuasa semasa, Badan Subsidiari untuk Saintifik dan Teknologi dan Badan Subsidiari bagi Pelaksanaan.

src: The conference is officially referred to as the 16th session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC) and the 6th session of the Conference of the Parties serving as the meeting of the Parties to the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: Persidangan itu secara rasmi disebut sebagai sesi ke-16 Persidangan Para Pihak kepada Konvensyen Rangka Kerja Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu mengenai Perubahan Iklim (UNFCCC) dan sesi ke-6 Persidangan Para Pihak yang berfungsi sebagai mesyuarat Pihak-Pihak kepada Protokol Kyoto.

src: Authorities in western Kenya have arrested 19 suspects in connection with a spree of recent mob killings.
ref: Pihak berkuasa di barat Kenya telah memberkas 19 suspek yang mempunyai kaitan dengan pembunuhan beramai-ramai.

src: Earlier this week 11 elderly people had been burned on suspicion of witchcraft.
ref: Awal minggu ini 11 warga tua telah dibakar yang disyaki mempunyai ilmu sihir.

src: The 8 female and 3 male victims were aged 80 to 96 according to BBC News.
ref: 8 mangsa wanita dan 3 mangsa lelaki berumur 80 hingga 96 berdasarkan Berita BBC.

src: Belief in witchcraft is widespread in the Kisii District of Nyanza Province and attacks against purported witches had happened before, but this week's attacks targeted an unusually large number of people.
ref: Kepercayan pada ilmu sihir telah berkembang luas di Daerah Kisii Wilayah Nyanza dan serangan ke atas ahli-ahli sihir pernah berlaku, tetapi serangan minggu ini disasarkan pada sejumlah besar orang.

src: Police launched an investigation into the incident and have deployed additional personnel to guard the area to prevent revenge attacks.
ref: Polis telah melancarkan sisasatan ke atas insiden ini dan menghantar anggota tambahan untuk mengawal kawasan tersebut daripada serangan balas dendam.

src: Approximately 300 young men were reportedly responsible for the attacks.
ref: Dianggarkan 300 lelaki muda dilaporkan bertanggungjawab ke atas serangan-serangan tersebut.

src: According to deputy police spokesman Charles Owino, those who can be proven to have had direct involvement in the killings would be charged with murder.
ref: Menurut jurucakap timbalan polis Charles Owino, mereka yang didapati dengan bukti terlibat secara langsung dengan pembunuhan-pembunuhan tersebut boleh diambil tindakan atas tuduhan membunuh.

src: The Council of Australian Governments (COAG) will meet in Canberra today for its first meeting of 2006.
ref: Majlis Kerajaan-Kerajaan Australia (COAG) akan bertemu di Canberra hari ini untuk mesyuarat pertama bagi 2006.

src: Members of COAG are the Prime Minister, State Premiers, Australian Capital and Northern Territory Chief Ministers, and the President of the Australian Local Government Association.
ref: Ahli-ahli COAG terdiri daripada Perdana Menteri, Tetuan Utama Negeri, Ketua-Ketua Menteri bagi Ibu Negara dan Kawasan Utara Australia, dan Presiden Persatuan Kerajaan Tempatan Australia.

src: On the agenda is a wide range of issues such as health, economic reform, regulation, and education.
ref: Dalam agenda terdapat pelbagai isu seperti kesihatan, pembaharuan ekonomi, undang-undang, dan pendidikan.

src: The state leaders (all of whom are members of the Australian Labor Party), met last night to develop a strategy for dealing with John Howard, Australia's Prime Minister.
ref: Pemimpin-pemimpin negeri (yang kesemuanya anggota Parti Buruh Australia), bertemu semalam untuk membangunkan satu strategi untuk menangani John Howard, Perdana Menteri Australia.

src: A1 Team New Zealand has won the feature race at the A1 Grand Prix in Shanghai, China today, followed by A1 Team Great Britain and A1 Team Germany.
ref: Pasukan A1 New Zealand telah memenangi perlumbaan litar di Grand Prix A1 Shanghai, China hari ini, diikiuti pasukan A1 Great Britain dan pasukan A1 Jerman.

src: The third place win for Germany has secured the 2006/2007 championship.
ref: Kemenangan tempat ketiga untuk Jerman telah mengesahkan kejuaraan 2006/2007.

src: In qualifying for the sprint race, Great Britain's driver Robbie Kerr managed to secure the pole position with the fastest lap time recorded this weekend.
ref: Dalam kelayakan untuk perlumbaan pecut, pemandu Great Britain Robbie Kerr berjaya mendapat petak pertama dengan masa terpantas dicatatkan pada hujung minggu ini.

src: New Zealand's driver, Jonny Reid, started in second position, narrowly missing out on what would have been his third pole position of the season.
ref: Pemandu New Zealand, Jonny Reid, bermula di petak kedua, hanya terlepas sedikit di mana dia boleh mendapat petak pertama untuk kali ketiga musim ini.

src: Third and fourth place starters are the United States and Germany respectively.
ref: Permulaan di petak ketiga dan keempat masing-masing adalah Amerika Syarikat dan Jerman.

src: Great Britain managed to win the sprint race, thus securing a first place start in the feature race.
ref: Great Britain berjaya memenangi perlumbaan pecut, seterusnya mendapat tempat pertama di perlumbaan litar.

src: During the entire sprint race, Great Britain were the leaders, with a "comfortable" lead, always maintaining their position in front of New Zealand.
ref: Semasa sepanjang perlumbaan pecut, Great Britain merupakan pendahulu, dengan pendahuluan "selesa," sentiasa mengekalkan posisi di hadapan New Zealand.

src: During the feature race Jonny Reid, driving New Zealand's Black Beauty car, passed Great Britain on lap number 16 of the 50-lap race.
ref: Semasa perlumbaan litar Jonny Reid, memandu kereta Black Beauty New Zealand, memintas Great Britain di pusingan ke-16 daripada perlumbaan 50 pusingan.

src: After five hours of meeting, the presidents Hugo Chávez from Venezuela and Alvaro Uribe from Colombia put a end to the diplomatic tension that had completed two months.
ref: Selepas lima jam bermesyuarat, presiden-presiden Hugo Chavez dari Venezuela dan Alvaro Uribe dari Colombia telah menamatkan ketegangan diplomatik yang berlangsung selama dua bulan.

src: The crisis started with the alleged irregular arrest (according to Venezuela) of the FARC guerrilla Rodrigo Granda by Colombian authorities.
ref: Krisis bermula dengan tuduhan penangkapan tidak teratur (mengikut Venezuela) gerila FARC Rodrigo Granda oleh pihak berkuasa Colombia.

src: President Chavez said: "We have decided to turn the page so we can fix the things that were misadjusted, clarify the things that could be clouded and work together in the construction for the common people".
ref: Presiden Chavez berkata: "Kita membuat keputusan untuk memulakan lembaran baru agar kita dapat membetulkan perkara yang telah disalahsusun, mengesahkan perkara-perkara yang tidak pasti dan bekerjasama dalam pembangunan untuk orang awam."

src: The meeting was scheduled for early this month, however it was postponed due to a disease of the Colombian president.
ref: Mesyuarat tersebut telah dijadualkan pada awal bulan ini, walau bagaimanapun ia telah ditunda disebabkan penyakit dihidapi presiden Colombia.

src: The encounter served both to finish the harshness between the two countries and to resume bilateral agreements and the activity in the border which were paralyzed as a result of the crisis.
ref: Pertemuan antara dua pihak menamatkan kekerasan antara dua negara dan meneruskan perjanjian dua hala dan aktiviti di sempadan yang telah cacat akibat krisis tersebut.

src: Uribe admitted that the Colombian armed conflict is a problem which must be solved by his country despite the disturbances caused by subversive groups in the neighboring countries to Colombia.
ref: Uribe mengaku konflik senjata Colombia adalah masalah yang perlu diselesaikan oleh negara beliau walaupun terdapat gangguan daripada kumpulan-kumpulan subversif di negara-negara jiran Colombia.

src: As a result of the meeting, the presidents will organize a binational high level commission in the next weeks.
ref: Hasil daripada mesyuarat tersebut, presiden-presiden akan mengadakan suruhanjaya tertinggi dwi-kebangsaan dalam beberapa minggu lagi.

src: The commission will evaluate the crisis's consequences, reinforce the integration between both countries and coordinate the future of the antiterrorist fight.
ref: Suruhanjaya itu akan menilai kesan-kesan krisis, mengukuhkan integrasi antara kedua negara dan menyelaras masa depan perjuangan anti pengganas.

src: The fight against terrorism will be done by security organisms of both countries by means of a rigorous legal adjustment in the actions which implies to cooperate so that the sovereignty is not affected and the sovereignty is respected, according to Uribe.
ref: Perjuangan menentang keganasan akan dilaksanakan oleh organisasi keselamatan kedua negara melalui pelarasan undang-undang lebih ketat yang membawa kepada kerjasama agar kedaulatan tidak terjejas dan kedaulatan itu dihormati, menurut Uribe.

src: A collision between Christian band MercyMe's tour bus and a car has killed two passengers in the car and the 18-year-old driver's unborn baby.
ref: Pelanggaran antara bas jelajah kumpulan muzik Christian MercyMe's dan sebuah kereta mengakibatkan kematian dua penumpang dalam kereta dan bayi dalam kandungan milik pemandu berumur 18 tahun.

src: The woman is in critical condition following the crash, which occurred in Fort Wayne, northeastern Indiana.
ref: Wanita itu dalam keadaan kritikal berikutan kemalangan, yang berlaku di Fort Wayne, timur laut Indiana.

src: The bus was headed to Six Flags St. Louis in Missouri for the band to play to a sold-out crowd.
ref: Bas tersebut menuju ke Six Flags St. Louis di Missouri untuk kumpulan ini membuat persembahan yang tiketnya habis dijual.

src: At 1:15 a.m. Saturday, according to witnesses, the bus was going through a green light when the car made a turn in front of it.
ref: Pada 1:15 pagi Sabtu, menurut saksi, bas tersebut melalui lampu hijau apabila kereta tersebut membuat pusingan di hadapan bas.

src: No-one on the bus was injured, and the band rescheduled the show for September as a result of the incident.
ref: Tiada yang tercedera dalam bas, dan kumpulan tersebut menjadual kembali persembahan ke September disebabkan insiden tersebut.

src: A photograph of the damaged bus was posted on the band's website, depicting moderate crumpling to the front area of the vehicle.
ref: Sekeping gambar berkenaan kerosakan bas telah dipaparkan di laman web kumpulan tersebut, menunjukkan kerosakan kemek sederhana di bahagian hadapan kenderaan.

src: For the Chesapeake Bay, the largest estuary in the United States, a first-time-ever “water quality forecast” was issued Monday for the upcoming summer season by the Chesapeake Bay Program.
ref: Bagi Teluk Chesapeake, muara yang terbesar di Amerika Syarikat, yang pertama kalinya "ramalan kualiti air" telah dikeluarkan Isnin untuk musim panas yang akan datang oleh Program Teluk Chesapeake.

src: The eastern mid-Atlantic region’s heavy spring rainfalls are predicted to increase nutrient levels in bay waters, leading to oxygen eating algae blooms and leaving deep water dead zones.
ref: Hujan lebat pada musim bunga di rantau timur pertengahan Atlantik diramalkan untuk meningkatkan tahap nutrien di perairan teluk, yang membawa kepada bunga alga yang memakan oksigen dan meninggalkan zon mati air dalam.

src: Project leader William Dennison, of the University of Maryland Center for Environmental Studies said, “The forecast indicates that recent weather conditions and heavy pollutant loads could lead to a bad summer for the Bay.”
ref: Ketua projek William Dennison, Universiti Maryland Pusat Pengajian Alam Sekitar berkata, "Ramalan itu menunjukkan bahawa keadaan cuaca yang baru-baru ini dan beban-beban pencemar berat boleh membawa kepada musim panas buruk bagi Teluk itu."

src: The prediction is for this to be the fourth-worst season for dissolved oxygen in two decades.
ref: Ramalan untuk ini menjadi musim keempat paling teruk bagi oksigen terlarut dalam dua dekad.

src: The Chesapeake Bay Program launched the new forecast to build on a base of environmental data gathered over the last two decades as water quality concerns have grown.
ref: Program Teluk Chesapeake melancarkan ramalan baru untuk membina pangkalan data alam sekitar terkumpul sejak dua dekad yang lalu setelah kebimbangan meningkat terhadap kualiti air.

src: The forecast is meant to be a proactive tool that provides resource managers with information that can be used to guide policies for the bay’s protection and restoration.
ref: Ramalan bertujuan untuk menjadi alat proaktif yang menyediakan maklumat kepada pengurus-pengurus sumber yang boleh digunakan untuk memberi panduan mengenai dasar untuk perlindungan dan pemulihan teluk.

src: Cars, fertilizer, human and animal wastes, industrial and agricultural pollutants all play a part.
ref: Kereta, baja, bahan buangan manusia dan haiwan, industri dan bahan cemar pertanian semua memainkan peranan.

src: "This means that we need to do a lot more to reduce phosphorus and nitrogen pollution from getting into the bay, said Beth McGee, of the Chesapeake Bay Foundation.
ref: "Ini bermakna kita perlu melakukan banyak lagi untuk mengurangkan pencemaran fosforus dan nitrogen dari memasuki ke teluk, kata Bet McGee, daripada Yayasan Teluk Chesapeake.

src: "The biggest source of pollution in the bay is agriculture, and we've got to find a way to provide farmers with more resources to manage the land better."
ref: "Sumber terbesar pencemaran di teluk adalah pertanian, dan kita perlu mencari jalan untuk menyediakan petani dengan lebih banyak sumber untuk menguruskan tanah dengan lebih baik."

src: Nutrient rich pollutants composed mainly of nitrogen and phosphorous come from far away places carried by rivers, and nearby the bay from farm and metropolitan runoff.
ref: Bahan pencemar yang kaya nutrien terdiri daripada nitrogen dan fosforus datang dari tempat jauh yang dibawa melalui sungai-sungai, dan berdekatan teluk dari ladang dan aliran metropolitan.

src: They collect in the huge bay and meet tidal flows from the ocean.
ref: Mereka terkumpul di teluk yang besar dan bertemu di aliran pasang surut dari laut.

src: Algae feed off the nutrients, and they are either consumed by aquatic life or sink at the end of their life cycle.
ref: Alga makan melalui nutrien, dan mereka sama ada dimakan oleh hidupan akuatik atau tenggelam di akhir kitaran hidup mereka.

src: With such an abundant food source, algae blooms can cover large surfaces of water and choke off sunlight to underwater plants.
ref: Dengan sumber makanan yang banyak, bunga alga boleh meliputi permukaan air yang besar dan menghalang cahaya matahari untuk tumbuh-tumbuhan dalam air.

src: Later when the plants die, the process of their decomposition on the bottom consumes oxygen to a state where the water becomes anoxic, and unable to support life.
ref: Kemudian apabila tumbuhan mati, proses penguraian mereka berlaku di bahagian bawah menggunakan oksigen bertukar kepada keadaan di mana air itu menjadi anoksik, dan tidak dapat menyokong kehidupan.

src: As notorious as weather forecasters are for often being wrong, it should come as no surprise if this first forecasting step by the federally funded program misses its mark.
ref: Seperti yang diketahui bahawa peramal cuaca selalu silap, ia tidak seharusnya mengejutkan jika langkah ramalan pertama ini yang programnya dibiayai kerajaan persekutuan terlepas sasaran.

src: Forces such as heavy storms or hurricanes, which churn water, would have an effect.
ref: Kuasa seperti ribut kuat atau angin taufan, yang menggodak air, akan mempunyai kesan.

src: Excessive wind and unexpected precipitation, or nutrient level jumps, would also contribute.
ref: Angin yang berlebihan dan hujan yang tidak dijangka, atau tahap nutrien mendadak, akan turut menyumbang.

src: 25 people were killed today and 33 were injured when a large explosion ripped through a karaoke bar in Tianshifu, Liaoning Province, China.
ref: 25 orang terbunuh hari ini dan 33 cedera apabila satu letupan yang besar berlaku di bar karaoke di Tianshifu, Wilayah Liaoning, China.

src: The state-run Xinhua news agency says the cause of the disaster is under investigation.
ref: Agensi berita negeri Xinhua berkata punca bencana itu sedang disiasat.

src: Four people are reported to be in a serious condition.
ref: Empat orang dilaporkan berada dalam keadaan serius.

src: Originally, Xinhua reported only five fatalities, but as rescue workers continued to move away debris, the full extent of the death toll was discovered.
ref: Pada asalnya, Xinhua melaporkan hanya lima kematian, tetapi apabila pekerja penyelamat terus mengetepikan runtuhan, jumlah sebenar angka kematian telah ditemui.

src: Xinhua has also reported that several employees at the bar, as well as the wife of the owner, were being questioned.
ref: Xinhua juga telah melaporkan bahawa beberapa pekerja di bar, dan juga isteri kepada pemilik, telah disoal siasat.

src: According to a philly.com article authored by The Associated Press, Xinhua failed to state whether this was as witnesses or as suspects in any potential criminal activity, but the Shanghai Daily said that Xinhua had reported the people had been detained as suspects.
ref: Menurut satu artikel philly.com dikarang oleh The Associated Press, Xinhua gagal menyatakan sama ada ini merupakan saksi atau sebagai suspek dalam kemungkinan aktiviti jenayah, tetapi Shanghai Daily berkata Xinhua melaporkan orang tersebut telah ditahan sebagai suspek.

src: The owner himself, Mr. Qu, was killed in the blast.
ref: Pemilik sendiri, Encik Qu, terbunuh dalam letupan itu.

src: Investigators say they are currently unsure if the blast was purely accidental, or if foul play was involved, as all efforts were initially focused on attempting to locate survivors.
ref: Penyiasat berkata, mereka kini tidak pasti sama ada letupan itu adalah sememangnya tidak disengajakan, atau jika unsur jenayah terlibat, kerana semua usaha telah tertumpu kepada usaha untuk mencari mangsa yang terselamat.

src: The two-storey building, which also housed a bathhouse, was completely leveled by the blast.
ref: Bangunan dua tingkat, yang juga menempatkan rumah mandi, telah sepenuhnya dimusnahkan oleh letupan.

src: In addition, several cars were buried under the debris and windows in nearby buildings were shattered by the pressure wave.
ref: Selain itu, beberapa kereta telah terkubur di bawah runtuhan itu dan tingkap di bangunan berdekatan telah dipecahkan akibat gelombang tekanan.

src: A power cut in the area was also caused by the blast due to damage to the local electricity network.
ref: Kuasa elektrik di kawasan itu juga terputus disebabkan oleh letupan yang merosakkan rangkaian elektrik tempatan.

src: 77-year-old local resident Chen Xiaohong, who lives 50 metres from ground zero, described the explosion: "I was watching my grandson finishing his lessons.
ref: Penduduk tempatan berusia 77 tahun Chen Xiaohong, yang tinggal 50 meter dari tanah sifar, menyifatkan letupan itu: "Saya tengah melihat cucu saya menamatkan pelajarannya.

src: Suddenly, we heard a big bang, then the door burst open from effects of a powerful shock wave and the lights went out...
ref: Tiba-tiba, kami mendengar letupan besar, kemudian pintu terbuka akibat kesan gelombang yang kuat dan lampu pun terpadam...

src: Meng Xianling, who runs a seafood stall located down a narrow lane opposite the site of the accident building, commented that "I was afraid the parlor's boiler would explode.
ref: Meng Xianling, yang menguruskan sebuah gerai makanan laut yang terletak di lorong yang sempit bertentangan dengan tapak bangunan kemalangan itu, mengulas bahawa "Saya takut tempat dandang itu akan meletup.

src: China has been the location of many disasters in both public and private places, such as fires and explosions.
ref: China telah menjadi lokasi banyak bencana di kedua-dua tempat awam dan persendirian, seperti kebakaran dan letupan.

src: Earlier this year, an unsafe arrangement with a two-ton steel ladle resulted in the Qinghe Special Steel Corporation disaster, in which molten steel was accidentally poured into a room full of workers, killing 32.
ref: Pada awal tahun ini, perletakkan yang tidak selamat dengan dua tan senduk keluli mengakibatkan bencana Qinghe Special Steel Corporation, di mana keluli lebur tidak sengaja dituangkan ke dalam bilik yang penuh dengan pekerja, membunuh 32.

src: The majority of China's accidents stem from a combination of lax safety regulations and negligence, and accidents continue regularly despite promises by the government to prevent them.
ref: Majoriti kemalangan China berpunca dari gabungan peraturan keselamatan yang longgar dan kecuaian, dan kemalangan terus berlaku secara tetap walaupun kerajaan berjanji untuk menangani mereka.

src: US Supreme Court Justice John Paul Stevens has given federal prosecutors until next Friday to respond to the request of former Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich and his brother Robert to delay their corruption trial.
ref: Hakim John Paul Stevens Mahkamah Agung Amerika Syarikat telah memberikan masa sehingga hari Jumaat depan kepada pendakwa-pendakwa persekutuan untuk bertindak balas kepada permintaan bekas gabenor Illinois Rod Blagojevich dan adik-beradiknya Robert untuk menangguhkan perbicaraan kes rasuah mereka.

src: The trial is set to begin on June 3, and many of the charges they face are based on a federal honest-services law.
ref: Perbicaraan itu ditentukan untuk bermula pada 3 Jun, dan kebanyakan dari tuduhan-tuduhan yang mereka hadapi adalah berdasarkan undang-undang perkhidmatan beramanah persekutuan.

src: The Blagojevich brothers challenge the constitutionality of this law and believe the trial should be delayed until the high court is expected to decide the issue next month.
ref: Adik-beradik Blagojevich mencabar kejituan perlembagaan undang-undang ini dan percaya perbicaraan itu perlu ditangguhkan sehingga mahkamah tinggi dijangka untuk memutuskan isu itu bulan depan.

src: The request had already been denied by District Judge James Zagel and the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals.
ref: Permintaan itu telah pun dinafikan oleh Hakim Daerah James Zagel dan Mahkamah Rangkaian Rayuan Ketujuh.

src: Stevens, who handles appeals from the Seventh Circuit, had three options: reject the request for a delay of trial, grant it, or allow the federal government to respond.
ref: Stevens, yang mengendalikan rayuan daripada Rangkaian Ketujuh, mempunyai tiga pilihan: menolak permintaan untuk penangguhan perbicaraan, memberikan kebenaran, atau membenarkan kerajaan persekutuan untuk bertindak balas.

src: We believe that means he sees this as not frivolous, and he’s going to decide it on the merits, said Michael Ettinger, Robert's attorney.
