ref: Kami percaya ini bermakna beliau melihat perkara ini sebagai tidak remeh, dan beliau akan membuat keputusan berdasarkan merit, kata Michael Ettinger, peguam Robert.

src: Prosecutors added new charges, including bribery, against the brothers in case the Supreme Court finds the honest-services law unconstitutional.
ref: Pendakwa menambah dakwaan baru, termasuk rasuah, terhadap adik-beradik itu sekiranya Mahkamah Agung mendapati undang-undang perkhidmatan beramanah tidak mengikut perlembagaan.

src: They believe the June 3 start date should not be held back.
ref: Mereka fikir tarikh permulaan 3 Jun tidak perlu ditangguhkan.

src: The United Nations (UN) suspended all of its operations in Gaza from yesterday, after the bombing of a convoy of UN aid trucks which killed one Palestinian driver, and wounded three others.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (UN) menggantung semua operasi di Gaza dari semalam, selepas pengeboman konvoi lori bantuan UN yang mengorbankan seorang pemandu Palestin, dan mencederakan tiga yang lain.

src: Thursday was the second day of attacks on UN targets after three UN schools housing refugees were bombed on Tuesday, killing over 50 civilians.
ref: Khamis merupakan hari kedua serangan ke atas sasaran UN selepas tiga sekolah UN yang didiami pelarian telah dibom pada hari Selasa, membunuh lebih 50 orang awam.

src: "UNRWA decided to suspend all its operations in the Gaza Strip because of the increasing hostile actions against its premises and personnel", Adnan Abu Hasna, a Gaza-based spokesman for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA), said yesterday.
ref: "UNRWA memutuskan untuk menggantung semua operasinya di Semenanjung Gaza kerana aksi bermusuhan yang semakin meningkat terhadap premis dan kakitangannya," Adnan Abu Hasna, jurucakap yang berpangkalan di Gaza untuk Bantuan dan Agensi Kerja dan Bantuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (UNRWA), berkata semalam.

src: Richard Miron, spokesman for the UN said that the Israeli military had been notified in advance of the coordinates of the relief trucks saying, "This underlines the fundamental insecurity inside Gaza at a time when we are trying to address the dire humanitarian needs of the population there."
ref: Richard Miron, jurucakap UN memberitahu bahawa tentera Israel telah diberitahu terlebih dahulu tentang koordinat lori bantuan berkata, "Ini menggariskan asas tidak selamat dalam Gaza pada ketika kami cuba menangani keperluan kemanusiaan yang terdesak di kalangan penduduk di sana."

src: The bombing of the UN trucks was the last straw for the UN, already angered after Israeli tanks fired on a UN school housing refugees killing 50 including an entire family of seven young children.
ref: Pengeboman lori-lori UN merupakan amaran terakhir bagi UN, telah menimbulkan kemarahan selepas kereta kebal Israel melepaskan tembakan pada sekolah UN yang didiami pelarian membunuh 50 orang termasuk sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai tujuh kanak-kanak.

src: The UN said that they had given Israel the GPS coordinates of their schools, and demanded accountability for the attacks.
ref: PBB berkata bahawa mereka telah memberikan koordinat GPS sekolah mereka kepada Israel, dan menuntut kebertanggungjawaban terhadap serangan-serangan itu.

src: More schools were attacked including the al-Fakhora School killing 40 people, many of them women and children.
ref: Lebih banyak sekolah telah diserang termasuk Sekolah al-Fakhora yang telah membunuh 40 orang, kebanyakannya wanita dan kanak-kanak.

src: Hours before the attack on the al-Fakhora School was an attack on Asma Elementary School which killed three Palestinian cousins.
ref: Beberapa jam sebelum serangan ke atas Sekolah al-Fakhora berlaku serangan ke atas Sekolah Rendah Asma yang mengorbankan tiga sepupu Palestin.

src: The cousin's father said the bodies were so mangled he couldn't tell the bodies apart, "We came to the school when the Israelis warned us to leave," he said.
ref: Ayah sepupu itu berkata badan-badan mereka begitu remuk sehingganya tidak dapat membezakan badan-badan mereka, "Kami datang ke sekolah apabila Israel memberi amaran kepada kita untuk pergi," katanya.

src: A relative came and told me one of my sons was killed.
ref: Seorang saudara datang dan memberitahu saya salah seorang anak lelaki saya telah dibunuh.

src: The International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC) said on yesterday that they were trying for four days to get their ambulances to a Gaza neighborhood before being allowed to by Israeli military forces.
ref: Jawatankuasa Antarabangsa Palang Merah (ICRC) berkata semalam bahawa mereka telah cuba selama empat hari untuk memandu ambulans mereka ke kawasan jiran tetangga Gaza sebelum dibenarkan oleh pasukan tentera Israel.

src: After getting there, they said, they found four starving children sitting next to the bodies of their dead mothers.
ref: Selepas sampai di sana, mereka berkata, mereka menemui empat orang kanak-kanak kelaparan duduk di sebelah mayat ibu-ibu mereka yang sudah mati.

src: "This is a shocking incident", said Pierre Wettach, ICRC chief for Israel and the occupied Palestinian territories.
ref: "Ini adalah kejadian yang mengejutkan," kata Pierre Wettach, Ketua ICRC untuk Israel dan wilayah kuasa Palestin.

src: The Israeli military must have been aware of the situation but did not assist the wounded.
ref: Tentera Israel mesti telah menyedari keadaan itu tetapi tidak membantu mangsa yang cedera.

src: Neither did they make it possible for us or the Palestinian Red Crescent to assist the wounded.
ref: Mereka juga tidak membolehkan kami atau Bulan Sabit Merah Palestin membantu mangsa yang cedera.

src: Israel granted a three-hour ceasefire yesterday that they gave for aid workers to enter areas that they had closed off.
ref: Israel membenarkan gencatan senjata selama tiga jam semalam untuk pekerja bantuan untuk memasuki kawasan-kawasan yang mereka telah tutup.

src: 50 bodies were recovered during the ceasefire, raising the death toll to 763, including more than 200 children, since air raids first began on December 27.
ref: 50 mayat ditemui dalam gencatan senjata itu, menjadikan jumlah kematian kepada 763, termasuk lebih daripada 200 kanak-kanak, sejak serangan udara pertama yang bermula pada 27 Disember.

src: Eight Israeli soldiers and three civilians have died in the same period.
ref: Lapan orang tentera Israel dan tiga orang awam terbunuh dalam tempoh yang sama.

src: Israeli forces also shot a Palestinian man in the West Bank during a protest against Israel's actions in Gaza.
ref: Tentera Israel juga menembak seorang lelaki Palestin di Tebing Barat dalam protes terhadap tindakan Israel di Gaza.

src: Yesterday, a Palestinian man was killed by Israeli forces after a confrontation in the West Bank Jewish settlement of Ma'ale Adumim near Jerusalem.
ref: Semalam, seorang lelaki Palestin telah dibunuh oleh tentera Israel selepas konfrontasi di penempatan Yahudi di Tebing Barat Ma'ale Adumim berhampiran Jerusalem.

src: 66 passengers and the crew of a New York to San Francisco UAL flight got an unwanted stop in the "Windy City," Chicago, on Tuesday, following a bomb scare.
ref: 66 penumpang dan anak kapal penerbangan UAL New York ke San Francisco terpaksa berhenti di "Windy City," Chicago, pada hari Selasa, berikutan ugutan bom.

src: United Air Lines spokesman Jeff Green said a flight attendant was alerted by a passenger to another passenger's suspicious materials and wires.
ref: Jurucakap United Air Lines Jeff Green berkata seorang pramugari telah dimaklumkan oleh seorang penumpang atas barangan dan wayar penumpang lain yang mencurigakan.

src: The crew decided to divert the flight to O’Hare, empty the plane, and allow the bomb squad to inspect for safety.
ref: Anak-anak kapal mengambil keputusan untuk melencongkan penerbangan ke O'Hare, mengosongkan pesawat, dan membenarkan skuad bom untuk membuat pemeriksaan keselamatan.

src: They discovered vials of herbal liquids, some wires, and an MP3 player.
ref: Mereka menemui tiub cecair herba, beberapa wayar, dan sebuah pemain MP3.

src: The passenger and music player were reunited, everybody re-boarded the aircraft, and with three hours lost, the flight took off for San Francisco.
ref: Penumpang itu mendapat pemain muziknya semula, semua orang menaiki semula pesawat, dan dengan kehilangan tiga jam, penerbangan itu berlepas ke San Francisco.

src: Today, it was announced that Syd Barrett, the founding member of British rock band Pink Floyd died from a complication with diabetes.
ref: Hari ini, telah diumumkan bahawa Syd Barrett, ahli pengasas Pink Floyd kumpulan rock British telah meninggal dunia akibat komplikasi kencing manis.

src: According to a Pink Floyd spokeswoman, he died days earlier (July 7) but the announcement was withheld.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Pink Floyd, beliau meninggal beberapa hari terdahulu (7 Julai) tetapi pengumuman telah ditangguh.

src: There will be a private family funeral in the next few days," said his brother Alan Barrett.
ref: Akan terdapat upacara pengebumian tertutup untuk ahli keluarga beberepa hari akan datang," kata adik beliau Alan Barrett.

src: The band are naturally very upset and sad to learn of Syd Barrett’s death.
ref: Kumpulan itu sudah tentunya sangat susah hati dan sedih apabila mengetahui kematian Syd Barrett.

src: Syd was the guiding light of the early band line-up and leaves a legacy which continues to inspire, noted a statement issued by Pink Floyd.
ref: Syd merupakan pemacu arah di awal penubuhan kumpulan dan meninggalkan legasi yang terus mengilhamkan, dalam kenyataan oleh Pink Floyd.

src: During 1967-1968, Syd Barrett was considered to be the main member and songwriter of Pink Floyd.
ref: Pada tahun 1967-1968, Syd Barrett dianggap sebagai ahli utama dan penulis lagu untuk Pink Floyd.

src: However, due to mental illness, he was forced to leave the band after recording only one album, The Piper at the Gates of Dawn.
ref: Tetapi, disebabkan sakit mental, beliau terpaksa meninggalkan kumpulan itu selepas rakaman hanya satu album, The Piper at the Gates of Down.

src: Pink Floyd recorded Wish You Were Here as a tribute following Barrett's leave.
ref: Pink Floyd merakam Wish You Were Here sebagai tanda penghormatan di atas pemergian Barrett.

src: The album features Shine On You Crazy Diamond, with lyrics explicitly about Barrett's rise to fame and subsequent dissolution.
ref: Album yang bertemakan Shine On You Crazy Diamond, dengan liriknya yang jelas berkenaan peningkatan kemasyuran Barrett dan kehilangannya seterusnya.

src: An accident involving two school buses, a tractor trailer and an sport utility vehicle has left at least two people dead and fifty more injured about 40 miles outside of St. Louis, Missouri according to reports.
ref: Sebuah kemalangan melibatkan dua buah bas sekolah, treler traktor dan kenderaan utiliti sukan telah menyebabkan sekurang-kurangnya dua orang terkorban dan lebih lima puluh orang cedera di lebih kurang 40 batu di luar St. Louis, Missouri mengikut laporan yang dibuat.

src: The school buses were carrying students from St. James High School and were en route to the Six Flags St. Louis amusement park, approximately 10 miles (16.1 kilometres) from the scene of the accident.
ref: Bas sekolah yang membawa para pelajar dari Sekolah Menengah St. James dan dalam perjalanan ke taman tema Six Flags St. Louis, lebih kurang 10 batu (16.1 kilometer) dari tempat kemalangan.

src: Wikileaks has obtained and released a list of all 3,863 websites that are being censored by Danish Internet Service Providers as of February 2008.
ref: Wikileaks telah mendapatkan dan mengeluarkan senarai semua 3,863 laman web yang ditapis oleh Perkhidmatan Pembekal Internet Danish pada Februari 2008.

src: The system is used to filter out child pornography, although Wikileaks points out it "can be used to censor anything" and claims "most sites on the list are still censored (i.e must be on the current list), even though many have clearly changed owners or were possibly even wrongly placed on the list."
ref: Sistem yang digunakan untuk menapis keluar pornografi kanak-kanak walaupun Wikileaks menunjukkan "boleh digunakan untuk menapis apa-apa sahaja" dan mendakwa "sebahagian besar senarai itu masih ditapis (i. e mesti dalam senarai terbaru), walaupun banyak yang jelas telah berubah milik atau berkemungkinan diletakkan di tempat yang salah dalam senarai."

src: We discussed the unusual leak with them, and the results are published here.
ref: Kami berbincang kebocoran luar biasa tersebut dengan mereka, dan keputusannya disiarkan di sini.

src: We asked if Wikileaks was worried about the criminal implications of linking to so much illegal content, but they were not.
ref: Kami bertanya adakah Wikileaks bimbang mengenai implikasi jenayah yang menghubungkan kandungan yang menyalahi undang-undang, tetapi mereka tidak.

src: They said that it was "politically untenable" to prosecute them, pointing out that Wikileaks is hosted in many different countries across the globe.
ref: Mereka berkata ia merupakan "politik yang tidak dapat dipertahankan" untuk mendakwa mereka, menujukkan Wikileaks menjadi tuan rumah kepada banyak negara di seluruh dunia.

src: We asked them if they were "concerned about the possibility of censorship in the UK, Denmark, Finland etc.?"
ref: Kami bertanya adakah mereka "ambil kisah akan kemungkinan penapisan di UK, Denmark, Finland dll.?"

src: "No," Wikileaks told us "We welcome it."
ref: "Tidak," Wikileaks berkata kepada kami "Kami mengalu-alukan itu."

src: Wikinews wondered if this was because of the Streisand effect, but Wikileaks said it was "because it will demonstrate how censorship systems are abused."
ref: Wikinews tertanya-tanya adakah ini kerana kesan Streisand, tetapi Wikileaks mengatakan bahawa ia adalah "kerana ia akan menunjukkan bagaimana sistem penapisan telah dicemari."

src: Wikinews asked Wikileaks why they didn't simply post a list of the sites which they felt were legal and add that all the others contained child porn, but Wikileaks felt "that would not be a fair representation of the material we obtained."
ref: Wikinews bertanya mengapa Wikileaks tidak sahaja mengeluarkan senarai laman yang mereka rasakan sah dan menambahkan yang lain yang mengandungi video lucah kanak-kanak, tetapi Wikileaks merasakan "ia bukanlah suatu tinadakan yang adil terhadap bahan-bahan yang kami miliki."

src: After seeking clarification, Wikinews was told "the question is not what we need to be told.
ref: Selepas mencari klarifikasi, Wikinews telah diberitahu "persoalannya bukanlah apa yang patut kami beritahu.

src: The question is what we need not to be told and who decides.
ref: Persoalannya adalah apa yang tidak perlu kami diberitahu dan siapa yang menentukan.

src: Wikinews then asked why they didn't leave the full list available, but mark which sites they felt should not be censored.
ref: Wikinews kemudian bertanya mengapa mereka tidak meninggalkan senarai penuh diperolehi, tetapi menanda laman mana yang mereka rasakan tidak perlu ditapiskan.

src: We have better things to do, was the response given.
ref: Kami mempunyai benda yang lebih baik untuk dilakukan, itu maklum balas yang diberikan.

src: It is not so easy to set up merchant accounts."
ref: Bukanlah senang untuk menyediakan akaun perniagaan."

src: And what would due process be?
ref: Dan apakah proses cukup matang?

src: Due process would involve sending a letter to the owner of the merchant account with the accusation and giving them a right to be heard and an appeal process.
ref: Proses cukup matang akan melibatkan penghantaran surat kepada pemilik akaun perniagaan dengan tuduhan dan memberi mereka hak untuk didengar dan proses rayuan.

src: The banks are politically a lot more powerful than the internet industry so this hasn't happened."
ref: Bank-bank adalah secara politiknya lebih berkuasa daripada industri internet jadi ini tidak pernah terjadi."

src: And should funds in these accounts be seized straight away, or simply frozen until a judge or similar clears their release?
ref: Dan sepatutnya dana dalam akaun-akaun ini terus dirampas, atau mudahnya dibekukan hingga hakim atau yang setaraf dengannya membebasan mereka?

src: "If the accounts are in-jurisdiction, they should be frozen and released or not at the end of the process.
ref: "Jika akaun-akaun dalam bidang kuasa, mereka sepatutnya dibekukan dan dimbebaskan atau tidak dibebaskannya di akhir proses.

src: There are plenty of existing mechanisms to do this for drug trafficking, for example."
ref: Banyak mekanisma yang ada untuk melakukan pengedaran dadah ini, contohnya."

src: Wikileaks then added "As an analogy, one might argue that everyone should have a loaded gun in the house to protect themselves against home invasions.
ref: Wikileaks kemudian menambah "Sebagai satu analogi, seseorang mungkin mempertikaikan bahawa semua orang sepatutnya memiliki pistol di rumah utuk mempertahankan diri mereka daripada pencerobohan rumah.

src: This seems perfectly reasonable; however experience has shown that once the gun is in the house, it will find other targets."
ref: Ini kelihatan sangat munasabah; walau bagaimanapun pengalaman menunjukkan bahawa apabila pistol berada di rumah, ia akan mencari sasaran lain."

src: Members of Australia's Health Services Union (HSU) will go on strike in Victoria next week in a dispute over stalled wage and career structure negotiations.
ref: Ahli-ahli Kesatuan Servis Kesihatan Australia (HSU) akan menunjuk perasaan di Victoria minggu hadapan dalam pertikaian ke atas penangguhan gaji dan perbincangan struktur kareer.

src: Over 5000 physiotherapists, speech pathologists and radiation therapists will walk off the job next week, effectively closing the state's 68 largest health services.
ref: Lebih 5000 ahli fisioterapi, patologi percakapan dan terapi radiasi akan meninggalkan kerja mereka minggu hadapan, berkesan menutup 68 servis kesihatan negara.

src: The strike will force the closure of intensive care units and emergency departments across the state.
ref: Mogok akan memaksa penutupan unit-unit penjagaan rapi dan jabatan kecemasan seluruh negeri.

src: National secretary of the HSU, Kathy Jackson said admissions would be crippled, while intensive care patients would have to be evacuated to New South Wales, Tasmania and South Australia as hospitals will not be able to perform tests or administer treatment.
ref: Setiausaha negara HSU, Kathy Jackson berkata kemasukan akan lumpuh, sementara pesakit di penjagaan rapi akan dipindahkan ke New South Wales, Tasmania dan Australia Selatan akibat hospital tidak mampu menjalankan ujian atau rawatan pentadbiran.

src: When an ambulance shows up you can't admit a patient without an X-ray being available, you can't intubate them and you can't operate on them, she said.
ref: Apabila ambulan tiba kamu tidak boleh menerima pesakit tanpa X-ray sedia ada, kamu tidak boleh memasukkan tiub kepada mereka dan kamu tidak boleh membedah mereka, kata beliau.

src: If something goes wrong in an ICU you need to be able to X-ray, use nuclear medicine or any diagnostic procedure, said Ms Jackson.
ref: Jika sesuatu masalah berlaku di ICU kamu perlu boleh melakukan X-ray, menggunakan ubatan nuklear atau prosedur diagnostik, kata Puan Jackson.

src: Ms Jackson said the HSU offered arbitration last year, but the state government refused.
ref: Puan Jackson berkata HSU menawarkan timbang tara tahun lepas, tetapi kerajaan negeri menolak.

src: They're not interested in settling disputes, they hope that we are just going to go away.
ref: Mereka tidak berminat dalam menyelesaikan pertikaian itu, mereka berharap kita akan teruskan dengan begitu.

src: We're not going away, we've gone back and balloted the whole public health workforce in Victoria, those ballots were successful, 97 percent approval rating, she said.
ref: Kita tidak akan pergi, kita telah berpatah balik dan pengundian melibatkan semua perkerja kesihatan awam di Victoria, pengundian itu berjaya, 97 peratus bersetuju, kata beliau.

src: The HSU is urging the government to commence serious negotiations to resolve the dispute before industrial action commenced.
ref: HSU menggesa kerajaan untuk memulakan perbincangan serius untuk menyelesaikan pertikaian sebelum tindakan industri bermula.

src: The government has offered the union a 3.25 per cent pay increase, in line with other public sector workers but the union has demanded more, but stopped short of specifying a figure.
ref: Kerajaan telah menawarkan kesatuan kenaikan sebanyak 3.25 peratus, sejajar dengan pekerja sektor kerajaan yang lain tetapi kesatuan telah menuntut lebih, tetapi berhenti daripada menyatakan angka yang jelas.

src: Victorian Premier John Brumby said the claim would be settled according to the government's wages policy.
ref: Perdana Victoria John Brumby berkata bahawa tuntutan itu akan selesai berdasarkan polisi gaji kerajaan.

src: The Government is always willing and wanting to sit down and negotiate with the relevant organisations .
ref: Kerajaan sentiasa sanggup dan mahu untuk duduk dan berbincang dengan organisasi yang berkaitan.

src: we have a wages policy based around an increase of 3.25 per cent and, above that, productivity offset, he told parliament.
ref: Kami mempunyai polisi gaji berdasarkan kenaikan 3.25 peratus, dan lebih dari itu, rujukan produktiviti, kata beliau kepada parlimen.

src: The union claims it is also arguing against a lack of career structure, which has caused many professionals to leave the health service.
ref: Kesatuan menuntut ia juga berhujah menentang kekurangan dalam stuktur kareer, yang mana telah menyebabkan banyak professional meninggalkan servis kesihatan.

src: Ms Jackson said wages and career structures in Victoria were behind other states.
ref: Puan Jackson berkata gaji dan struktur kareer di Victoria adalah dibelakang berbanding negeri-negeri lain.

src: Victorian Opposition Leader Ted Baillieu said he was not in support of the proposed strike and called on the government to meet with unions.
ref: Ketua Pembangkang Victoria Ted Baillieu berkata dia tidak menyokong tindakan mogok dan memanggil kerajaan untuk bertemu dengan kesatuan.

src: There could not be a more serious threat to our health system than has been announced today.
ref: Tidak ada ancaman yang lebih serius kepada sistem kesihatan lebih daripada apa yang diumumkan hari ini.

src: We now have to do whatever is possible to stop this strike from proceeding, he said.
ref: Sekarang kita perlu lakukan apa yang kita mampu untuk menghentikan mogok ini daripada berterusan, kata beliau.

src: The opposition leader will meet with the union at 11:30 AM today.
ref: Ketua pembangkang akan bertemu dengan kesatuan pada 11:30 AM hari ini.

src: Victorian Hospitals Industry Association industrial relations services manager Simon Chant said hospitals were looking at the possible impact and warned that patients may have to be evacuated interstate if the strike goes ahead.
ref: Pengurus perkhidmatan perindustrian Persatuan Industri Hospital-hospital Victoria Simon Chant berkata hospital-hospital melihat akan kesan berkemungkinan dan memberi amaran bahawa pesakit mungkin terpaksa dipindahkan ke negeri lain jika mogok berterusan.

src: The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard has conducted a missile test exercise, in which nine missiles of three different types were launched simultaneously.
ref: Pengawal Revolusi Islam Iran telah menjalankan latihan ujian peluru berpandu, di mana sembilan peluru berpandu daripada tiga jenis yang berbeza telah dilancarkan secara serentak.

src: The exercise, known as Great Prophet III was conducted early this morning from an undisclosed location near to the Strait of Hormuz.
ref: Latihan itu, yang dikenali sebagai Great Prophet III dijalankan awal pagi tadi dari lokasi yang tidak didedahkan berhampiran Selat Hormuz.

src: One of the missiles launched was an upgraded version of the Shahab-3, capable of reaching Eastern European countries like Bulgaria and Greece as well and Middle Eastern countries such as Israel, Egypt and the Arabian Peninsula.
ref: Salah satu peluru berpandu yang dilancarkan adalah versi yang dinaik taraf daripada Shahab-3, mampu sampai ke negara-negara Eropah Timur seperti Bulgaria dan Greece dan negara-negara Timur Tengah seperti Israel, Mesir dan Semenanjung Arab.

src: Eight shorter range Zelzal and Fateh missiles were also launched.
ref: Lapan peluru berpandu jarak dekat Zelzal dan Fateh juga dilancarkan.

src: The Iranians have been under international pressure to withraw from their plans of achieving nuclear proficiency, but have rejected putting a hold on their programme and have also been moving forward with their rocketry programme.
ref: Iran berada di bawah tekanan antarabangsa untuk membatalkan rancangan mereka untuk mencapai penguasaan nuklear, tetapi telah menolak daripada menangguhkan rancangan mereka dan juga telah meneruskan rancangan roket mereka.

src: The test is believed to have been a reaction to Israeli and American military exercises, which the Iranian government believed to be training for an attack on facilities related to the Iranian nuclear development programme.
ref: Ujian ini dipercayai merupakan reaksi kepada latihan ketenteraan Israel dan Amerika, dimana kerajaan Iran percaya mereka berlatih untuk serangan ke atas kemudahan yang berkaitan dengan program pembangunan nuklear Iran.

src: In addition to these tests, Iran's first indigenous satellite launch attempt, which will place the Omid spacecraft into low Earth orbit, is expected immanently.
ref: Selain ujian ini, cubaan pelancaran satelit pertama buatan Iran, yang akan menempatkan kapal angkasa Omid ke dalam orbit rendah Bumi, dijangka tidak lama lagi.

src: A successful satellite launch would demonstrate that Iran's missiles have global reach.
ref: Kejayaan pelancaran satelit ini akan menunjukkan bahawa peluru berpandu Iran mempunyai capaian global.

src: The tests have been widely criticised by the international community.
ref: Ujian ini telah dikritik hebat oleh masyarakat antarabangsa.

src: The British government stated that it "underlines the need for Iran to comply with its international obligations on the nuclear issue", and that the test was "unwelcome".
ref: Kerajaan British menyatakan bahawa ia "menggariskan keperluan bagi Iran untuk mematuhi obligasi antarabangsa terhadap isu nuklear," dan bahawa ujian itu adalah "tidak dialu-lukan."

src: The French ministry of defence suggested that "these missile tests can only reinforce the concerns of the international community", and the German government described the exercise as "regrettable".
ref: Kementerian pertahanan Perancis mencadangkan bahawa "ujian peluru berpandu ini hanya akan mengukuhkan kebimbangan masyarakat antarabangsa," dan kerajaan Jerman menyifatkan latihan itu sebagai "amat dikesali."

src: The United States government claims that the test was "evidence that the missile threat is not an imaginary one".
ref: Kerajaan Amerika Syarikat mendakwa bahawa ujian itu adalah "bukti bahawa ancaman peluru berpandu bukan satu khayalan."

src: American presidential candidate John McCain suggested that it justified US proposals to construct a missile defence system in Eastern Europe, whilst his opponent Barack Obama described Iran's missile programme as a "great threat".
ref: Calon presiden Amerika John McCain mencadangkan bahawa cadangan Amerika Syarikat untuk membina sistem pertahanan peluru berpandu di Eropah Timur adalah wajar, manakala lawannya Barack Obama menyifatkan program peluru berpandu Iran sebagai "ancaman besar."

src: Russia, however called for diplomacy, stating that they believe Iran to be "ready for negotiations", and Israel's Prime Minister issued a statement saying that he had "no desire for conflict or hostilities with Iran".
ref: Rusia, bagaimanapun menggesa diplomasi, yang menyatakan bahawa mereka percaya Iran "sedia untuk rundingan," dan Perdana Menteri Israel mengeluarkan kenyataan yang mengatakan bahawa beliau "tiada keinginan untuk mempunyai konflik atau permusuhan dengan Iran."

src: The eruption of volcano Tungurahua on August 16 destroyed several small villages in the Ecuadorian Andes.
ref: Letusan gunung berapi Tungurahua pada 16 Ogos memusnahkan beberapa kampung kecil di Andes Ecuador.

src: At least 6 people have been killed and about 4000 residents of the affected area have been evacuated.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 6 orang terbunuh dan kira-kira 4000 penduduk di kawasan yang terjejas telah dipindahkan.

src: The 5,023 m high volcano spat lava, stones and ash for several hours on Wednesday night.
ref: Gunung berapi dengan ketinggian 5,023 m itu meludahkan lava, batu dan abu untuk beberapa jam pada malam Rabu.

src: A 10km high ash cloud spread over an area of 740 by 180 km.
ref: Awan berdebu setinggi 10km tersebar di kawasan seluas 740 kali 180 km.

src: Towns like Ambato or Riobamba, 30 km away from the volcano have been covered with up to 5cm of ash.
ref: Bandar-bandar seperti Ambato atau Riobamba, 30 km dari gunung berapi tersebut telah ditutup dengan lebih daripada 5cm abu.

src: Pyroclastic flows descending on the northwestern slopes of the volcano left a path of destruction behind.
ref: Aliran piroklastik menuruni lereng barat laut gunung berapi meninggalkan kebinasaan.

src: At least seven small villages and hamlets have been completely destroyed.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh buah kampung kecil dan dusun telah musnah sama sekali.

src: The Institute for Geophysics has lost an important part of its equipment installed on the slopes of Tungurahua, limiting their capability to monitor the volcanic activity.
ref: Institut Geofizik telah kehilangan bahagian penting peralatan yang dipasang di lereng Tungurahua, menghadkan keupayaan mereka untuk memantau aktiviti gunung berapi.

src: On Thursday, air traffic in the whole country was limited due to ash layers on several airports.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, trafik udara di seluruh negara adalah terhad kerana lapisan abu di beberapa lapangan terbang.

src: On Thursday the provinces of Chimborazo, Tungurahua, Cotopaxi and Bolivar have been declared a disaster area.
ref: Pada hari Khamis wilayah Chimborazo, Tungurahua, Cotopaxi dan Bolivar telah diisytiharkan sebagai kawasan bencana.

src: Losses in agriculture due to the ash cover are estimated at $150 Million.
ref: Kerugian dalam bidang pertanian disebabkan ditutupi abu dianggarkan $150 Juta.

src: On Friday, volcanic activity decreased to a calm that remained into Saturday evening, but the Ecuadorian Institute for Geophysics warns that a further eruption may be imminent.
ref: Pada Jumaat, aktiviti gunung berapi berkurang menjadi tenang yang kekal hingga ke petang Sabtu, tetapi Institut Geofizik Ecuador memberi amaran bahawa satu letusan lagi mungkin akan berlaku.

src: In 1999, after a long period of rest, the volcano started an eruptive process that continues to this day.
ref: Pada 1999, setelah lama berehat, gunung berapi memulakan proses letusan yang berterusan sehingga hari ini.

src: In May 2006 it increased dramatically culminating in violent eruptions on July 14 and August 16.
ref: Pada Mei 2006, ia meningkat secara mendadak membawa kepada letusan ganas pada 14 Julai dan 16 Ogos.

src: The first case of Avian Flu in Iraq was announced today by the country's Health Minister, Abdel Mutalib Mohammed.
ref: Kes pertama selesema burung di Iraq telah diumumkan hari ini oleh Menteri Kesihatan negara itu, Abdel Mutalib Mohammed.

src: The preliminary result was reportedly from a United States military laboratory in Cairo; the World Health Organisation are expected to seek confirmation of this from a UK laboratory.
ref: Keputusan awal dilaporkan dari makmal tentera Amerika Syarikat di Kaherah; Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia dijangka akan mendapatkan pengesahan ini dari makmal UK.

src: The victim was Shangen Abdul Qader, a 15-year-old girl from the northern Kurdish village of Raniya.
ref: Mangsa adalah Shangen Abdul Qader, seorang gadis berusia 15 tahun dari kampung Kurdish utara Raniya.

src: The death of the girl's uncle is also believed to be under investigation due to him having symptoms that may indicate flu.
ref: Kematian bapa saudara gadis itu juga dipercayai berada di bawah siasatan kerana dia mempunyai tanda-tanda yang mungkin menunjukkan selesema.

src: The area of Iraq where the suspected deaths occurred borders Turkey where there have been 12 confirmed cases of which four resulted in death.
ref: Kawasan di Iraq di mana kematian disyaki berlaku bersempadan dengan Turki di mana telah disahkan terdapat 12 kes dan empat daripadanya mengakibatkan kematian.

src: Turkey's last reported victim, Fatma Ozcan, was also aged 15.
ref: Mangsa terakhir Turki yang dilaporkan, Fatma Ozcan, juga berusia 15 tahun.

src: Chemical Ali, as he was known, received a death sentence on January 17, 2010, for ordering the 1988 gas attack on the town of Halabja in northern Iraq; 5,000 people are thought to have died in the assault on the Kurdish area.
ref: Lelaki yang dikenali sebagai Chemical Ali menerima hukuman mati pada 17 Januari 2010, kerana mengarahkan serangan gas di bandar Halabja di utara Iraq pada 1988;5,000 orang dianggarkan terbunuh dalam serangan di kawasan Kurdish tersebut.

src: Majid, 68, had also received the death sentence at earlier trials for his part in attacks on Kurds in 1988, for suppressing a revolt by Shia Muslims, and for killing Shia Muslims in Baghdad in 1999.
ref: Majid, 68, juga telah menerima hukuman mati di perbicaraan sebelum ini untuk peranan beliau dalam serangan ke atas Kurdis pada tahun 1988, demi menghentikan pemberontakan oleh umat Islam Syiah, dan pembunuhan umat Islam Syiah di Baghdad pada 1999.

src: He was regarded as one of the most brutal figures in Saddam Hussein's regime, ordering killings of opponents, as well as mass deportations.
ref: Beliau dianggap sebagai salah seorang tokoh paling kejam ketika pemerintahan Saddam Hussein, mengarahkan pembunuhan pihak musuh, serta pengusiran besar-besaran.

src: He was captured after the fall of Saddam in 2003.
ref: Beliau telah ditangkap selepas kekalahan Saddam pada 2003.

src: According to the government spokesman, "[t]he execution happened without any violations, shouting or cries of joy."
ref: Menurut jurucakap kerajaan, "Pelaksanaan berlaku tanpa sebarang isu, orang menjerit atau menangis kerana kegembiraan."

src: The Iraqi state television, al-Iraqiya, broadcast images that it says are of the hanging.
ref: Televisyen negeri Iraq, al-Iraqiya, menyiarkan imej yang menggambarkan hukuman gantung tersebut.

src: A multi-center US study of 748 patients, who were to undergo treatment for coronary artery disease, has found that prayer by Christian, Muslim, Jewish, and Buddhist groups had no measurable effects on the medical health of the study subjects.
ref: Satu kajian Pusat Berbilang Kajian AS dengan 748 pesakit, yang menjalani rawatan bagi penyakit arteri koronari, telah mendapati bahawa doa oleh agama Kristian, Islam, Yahudi, dan Buddha tidak memberi kesan yang boleh diukur kepada kajian dalam subjek perubatan kesihatan.

src: The prayers were conducted by established congregations and were held away from the hospitals.
ref: Sebuah pertubuhan agama telah membuat sembahyang tersebut jauh dari hospital.

src: The study, published in the 16 July 2005 issue of The Lancet, found that the likelihood of an adverse cardiovascular event in hospital, re-admission or death within six months was unaffected by prayer.
ref: Penyelidikan tersebut, yang diterbitkan dalam The Lancet terbitan 16 Julai 2005, mendapati bahawa kemungkinan sesuatu keadaan buruk kardiovaskular terjadi, kemasukan semula atau kematian di hospital dalam tempoh enam bulan adalah tidak terjejas oleh doa.

src: None of the patients were told that they were prayed for, and none of the prayer groups knew who they prayed for.
ref: Tiada pesakit diberitahu bahawa mereka telah didoakan, dan tiada satu pun dari kumpulan doa tahu siapa yang mereka doakan.

src: The study also examined the effects of "music, imagery, and touch (MIT) therapy" before heart surgery.
ref: Kajian ini juga mengkaji kesan "terapi muzik, imej, dan sentuhan (MIT)" sebelum pembedahan jantung.

src: Practitioners qualified to Level 1 Healing Touch taught the patient relaxation techniques and played soothing music before applying 21 Healing Touch hand positions, over a 40 minute session.
ref: Pengamal yang berkelayakan untuk Tahap 1 Sentuhan Pemulihan mengajar teknik-teknik bersantai kepada pesakit dan bermain muzik yang menenangkan sebelum memulakan Sentuhan Pemulihan 21 lokasi, sepanjang sesi 40 minit.

src: There was no significant change in the combined chance of an adverse cardiovascular event in hospital, re-admission or death within six months.
ref: Tiada perubahan ketara dalam semua perubahan buruk kardiovaskular, kemasukan semula atau kematian di hospital dalam tempoh enam bulan.

src: However, while the set of patients was evenly split, only 7 patients who received MIT therapy died, and 20 patients who did not receive it died.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kumpulan pesakit telah dipecahkan sama rata, hanya 7 pesakit yang menerima terapi MIT meninggal dunia, dan 20 pesakit yang tidak menerima ia meninggal dunia.

src: The result is not highly significant due to the low overall number of people who died.
ref: Hasilnya tidak jelas kerana jumlah keseluruhan orang yang meninggal dunia rendah.

src: A number of studies has recently examined the possible effects of prayer, with mixed results.
ref: Beberapa kajian dibuat baru-baru ini untuk mengkaji kemungkinan kesan doa, dengan hasil yang berbeza.

src: While some religious groups have hailed studies which found positive results , skeptics have challenged the very notion of scientifically examining prayer , and have described past studies as flawed or even fraudulent.
ref: Sementara beberapa kumpulan agama yang telah menobatkan kajian yang mendapati hasil yang positif, meragui dan mencabar tanggapan kajian secara saintifik untuk memeriksa doa, dan telah menyatakan yang kajian lepas mempunyai kecacatan atau hanya penipuan.

src: The mechanisms through which distant intercessory prayer might convey healing benefit are unknown, the authors of the study explain.
ref: Mekanisme di mana doa dari jauh mungkin menyampaikan faedah penyembuhan yang tidak diketahui, jelas penulis kajian tersebut.

src: One hypothesis they propose for such effects are "non-local features of consciousness based theoretically around observations in quantum physics."
ref: Salah satu hipotesis mereka mencadangkan untuk kesan-kesan tersebut adalah "ciri-ciri bukan kesedaran sendiri dan berdasarkan teori pemerhatian dalam fizik kuantum."

src: Dutch financial institution ING Group reported today in its quarterly results an impairment charge of €194 million euros (approximately US$285.6 million).
ref: Institusi kewangan Belanda, Kumpulan ING hari ini melaporkan keputusan nilai caj suku tahunan merosot sebanyak €194 juta euro (kira-kira US$285.6 juta).

src: However, as a result of selling an equity stake in rival ABN AMRO, the net profit of €2.48 billion, was 18% higher than last year.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, hasil daripada menjual ekuiti dalam saingan ABN AMRO, keuntungan bersih sebanyak €2.48 juta, adalah 18% lebih tinggi berbanding tahun lepas.

src: The impairment charge is a result of risky investments, including RBMS (mortgage) investments backed by subprime loans and Alt-A loans, which are made to borrowers with a slightly better credit profile than those in the subprime category, as well as from collateral debt obligations (CDOs).
ref: Kemerosotan nilai caj adalah berpunca daripada pelaburan berisiko, termasuk Pelaburan RBMS (gadai janji) yang disokong oleh pinjaman sub prima dan pinjaman Alt-A, yang dibuat kepada peminjam dengan profil kredit yang sedikit lebih baik daripada dalam kategori sub prima, selain daripada hutang cagaran kewajipan (CDO).

src: The new book Game of Shadows: Barry Bonds, BALCO, and the Steroids Scandal that Rocked Professional Sports, by Mark Fainaru-Wada and Lance Williams of The San Francisco Chronicle, is being released today.
ref: Buku terbaru Game of Shadow: Barry Bonds, BALCO, dan Streroids Scandal oleh Sukan Professional Rocked, oleh Mark Fainaru-Wada dan The San Francisco Chronicle oleh Lance Williams, telah dilancarkan hari ini.

src: The authors not only implicate professional baseball celebrity Barry Bonds in the use of performance-enhancing drugs, but also say Gary Sheffield received human growth hormone and testosterone from Greg Anderson, Bonds's personal trainer.
ref: Penulis bukan sahaja mengaplikasikan pemain besbol profesional terkenal Barry Bonds dalam penggunaan dadah unutk meningkatkan prestasi, tetapi juga menyatakan Gary Sheffield menerima hormon pertumbuhan manusia dan testosteron dari Greg Anderson, pelatih peribadi Bonds.

src: The book goes on to claim that Jason Giambi also took performance-enhancing drugs from Anderson.
ref: Buku itu mngungkap kisah bahawa Jason Giambi juga mengambil penggunaan dadah untuk meningkatkan prestasi dari Anderson.

src: Bonds continues to insist that he did not realize his trainer was giving him steriods.
ref: Bonds menyambung untuk berkeras bahawa beliau tidak sedar pelatihnya memberikan steroid kepadanya.

src: He claimed in his grand jury testimony that he thought he was receiving flaxseed oil and an arthritis salve.
ref: Beliau juga menuntut juri testimoni besar bahawa beliau hanya menerima minyak fleaxseed dan arthritis salve.

src: Sheffield's response to the claims was quite simple: when asked if the allegations made against him were true, his response was "Nope."
ref: Sheffield menjawab untuk menuntut yang agak mudah: bila ditanya jika dakwaan dibuat terhadap beliau benar, respon beliau ialah "bukan."

src: Despite the book's accusations of Sheffield and Giambi, it centers around Bonds and the founder of the Bay Area Laboratory Co-Operative or BALCO, Victor Conte Jr.
ref: Walaupun tuduhan di dalam buku Sheffield dan Giambi, ia tertumpu sekitar Bonds dan pengasas Makmal Ko-Operatif Kawasan teluk atau BALCO, Victor Conte Jr.

src: Conte is currently serving four months in prison for distribution of steriods and money laundering.
ref: Conte sekarang sedang berkhidmat di dalam penjara selama empat bulan kerana mengedarkan dadah jenis streroid dan pelaburan wang haram.

src: It appears that the steroid controversy concerning Bonds will only intensify as he continues to march on towards the career home runs record, one of baseball's most sacred records.
ref: Ia timbul bahawa steriod itu mengundang kontrovasi berkenaan Bonds yang hanya akan memperhebatkan dimana beliau menyambung untuk bergerak kehadapan terhadap kerjaya rekod home run, salah satu rekod yang paling menggerunkan dalam besbol.

src: A sixteen-year-old girl, Darlene Etienne, was pulled out from underneath the rubble of a collapsed school in Haiti yesterday, fifteen days after a magnitude 7.0 earthquake struck the country, devastating most buildings in the capital, Port-au-Prince.
ref: Seorang gadis berusia enam belas tahun, Darlene Etienne, telah ditarik keluar dari bawah runtuhan di sekolah di Haiti semalam, lima belas hari selepas gempa bumi besar berukuran 7.0 skala magnitud melanda negara itu, menghancurkan kebanyakan bangunan di ibu kota, Port-au-Prince.

src: Etienne had been studying at school in the capital when the tremors starｔed, collapsing the building.
ref: Etienneyang sedang belajar di sekolah di ibu kota itu semasa gegaran berlaku, meruntuhkan bangunan tersebut.

src: She had apparently survived by drinking water from a bathroom, and the Al Jazeera news agency reports rescuers had heard her mumbling something about having some Coca-Cola.
ref: Beliau dilaporkan selamat dengan minum air dari bilik mandi, dan agensi berita Al Jazeera melaporkan pasukan penyelamat mendengar beliau mengomel tentang sesuatu seperti mahukan air Coca-Cola.

src: When pulled from the rubble, she was reportedly dehydrated, but happy.
ref: Apabila ditarik keluar dari runtuhan terbabit, beliau dilaporkan kehausan, tetapi gembira.

src: Etienne was taken to a French-run field hospital, and later to a hospital ship moored off the Haitian coast for further treatment.
ref: Etienne dihantar ke Hospital padang lari French, dan kemudian ke hospital kapal berlabuh di luar pelabuhan Haitian unutk rawatan lanjut.

src: She just said 'Thank you', she's very weak, which suggests that she's been there for 15 days, said the head of the rescue team that recovered the girl, Samuel Bernes, noting that she was located "in a pocket, surrounded by concrete".
ref: Beliau cuma menyebut 'Terima kasih', beliau sangat lemah, yang mana beliau telah terperangkap disana selama 15 hari, kata ketua pasukan penyelamat yang memulihkan budak itu, Samuel Bernes, menyedari yang budak itu terletak "di dalam poket, dikelilingi oleh konkrit."

src: She couldn't really talk to us or say how long she'd been there but I think she'd been there since the earthquake.
ref: Beliau tidak berapa boleh bercerita bagaimana beliau boleh bertahan lama disitu tetapi saya rasa beliau berada disitu sejak dari gempa bumi berlaku.

src: I don't think she could have survived even a few more hours, rescuer Claude Fuilla told the Associated Press.
ref: Saya tidak pasti sama ada beliau mampu atau tidak bertahan beberapa jam lagi, kata penyelamat Claude Fuilla kepada Akhbar Berkaitan.

src: I don't know how she happened to resist that long, said another rescue worker, JP Malaganne, as quoted by the BBC.
ref: Saya tidak tahu bagaimana beliau mampu bertahan selama itu, kata salah seorang penyelamat, JP Malaganne, seperti yang dipetik dari BBC.

src: It all happened very quickly, but rescue teams managed to get her out and she was covered in layers of dust and concrete, said Jonah Hull, a correspondent for Al Jazeera, describing the rescue effort as being "a delicate process".
ref: Ianya berlaku dengan begitu cepat, tetapi pasukan penyelamat berjaya membawanya keluar dan beliau dselubungi oleh habuk dan konkrit, kata Jonah Hull, wartawan untuk Al Jazeera, menggambarkan usaha menyelamat itu sebagai "proses yang rumit."

src: Five days ago, the Haitian government officially ended its search for living people under the rubble; upwards of 130 people have been rescued from underneath the remains of collapsed buildings.
ref: Lima hari lepas, kerajaan Haiti secara rasminya mengakhiri usaha mencari mangsa terselamat dibawah runtuhan; dengan menyelamatkan 130 orang dari bawah timbunan bangunan yang runtuh itu.

src: Italian Prime Minister Silvio Berlusconi's government received a vote of confidence from the Italian Senate Thursday, after it earned the confidence of the House yesterday.
ref: Kerajaan Perdana Menteri Itali Silvio Berlusconi menerima undian percaya dari Senat Itali pada Khamis, selepas menerima kepercayaan dari Parlimen semalam.

src: The Senate's tally was 170 pros, 117 cons and no abstentions.
ref: Perkiraan Senat adalah 170 pro, 117 menentang dan berkecuali.

src: Berlusconi declared these votes of confidence as demonstrating the strength and coherence of his coalition.
ref: Berlusconi mengumumkan yang undi kepercayaan ini menunjukkan kekuatan dan kepaduan pakatannya.

src: He also declared that he wanted a change in the electoral law so that a bipartisan political system would arise, and that he wants to form a majority government after the next election.
ref: Dia juga mengumumkan yang dia mahukan perubahan dalam undang-undang pilihan raya agar sistem politik dua parti akan wujud, dan dia mahu membentuk kerajaan majoriti selepas pilihan raya seterusnya.

src: In a Tuesday media event, Verizon Wireless announced it had reached an agreement with Apple Inc. and would begin selling a CDMA version of the iPhone 4 beginning early February.
ref: Pada acara media pada Selasa, Verizon Wireless mengumumkan ia telah mencapai persetujuan dengan Apple Inc. dan akan mula menjual iPhone 4 versi CDMA bermula awal Februari.

src: The move means the end of rival company AT&T's status as the only official US carrier of the iPhone, a status it held since the first iPhone debuted in 2007.
ref: Langkah itu bermakna pengakhir kepada status syarikat saingan AT&T sebagai satu-satunya pembekal rasmi US kepada iPhone, status yang dipegang sejak iPhone pertama pada 2007.

src: The press conference, held in New York City, was hosted by Verizon's president, Lowell McAdam, Apple's chief operating officer, Tim Cook, and Verizon Wireless' chief executive officer, Dan Mead.
ref: Sidang media, diadakan dibandar New York, dihoskan oleh presiden Verizon, Lowell MsAdam, ketua pegawai operasi Apple, Tim Cook, dan ketua pegawai eksekutif Verizon Wireless, Dan Mead.

src: Neither Verizon Communications CEO Ivan Seidenberg nor Apple CEO Steve Jobs attended the conference.
ref: CEO Verizon Communication Ivan Seidenberg dan CEO Apple Steve Jobs kedua-duanya tidak menghadiri sidang tersebut.

src: During the event, McAdam said, "If the press writes something long enough and hard enough, it eventually comes true."
ref: Semasa acara tersebut, McAdam berkata, "Jika pihak media menulis sesuatu yang cukup panjang dan cukup susah, ia akhirnya akan jadi kenyataan."

src: "We're bringing the fruit of our labor with a giant partner, and that's Apple."
ref: "Kami membawa hasil kerja kami dengan pasangan gergasi, dan ia adalah Apple."

src: Such a partnership had been rumored for years, and the amount of speculation grew over the past few months.
ref: Perkongsiaan tersebut telah menjadi khabar angin beberapa tahun, dan jumlah spekulasi bertambah sejak beberapa bulan lepas.

src: iPhone 4 pre-orders for current Verizon users begin February 3, and a public release is scheduled for February 10.
ref: Pra-pesanan iPhone 4 untuk pengguna Verizon masa kini bermula 3 Februari, dan pelancaran awam dijaudalkan pada 10 Februari.

src: The "Verizon iPhone," as it has been dubbed for months, has been altered from the original iPhone 4 so it can utilize Verizon's 3G CDMA (code division multiple access) network.
ref: "IPhone Verizon," seperti yang telah digelar berbulan, telah diubah suai dari iPhone 4 asal supaya ia boleh menggunakan jaringan CDMA (pembahagian kod pelbagai akses) 3G Verizon.

src: This means, however, that Verizon iPhone users will not be able to use the company's 4G LTE (long term evolution) network, and will thus be unable to make calls and access the Internet at the same time.
ref: Ini bermaksud, bagaimanapun, pengguna iPhone Verizon tersebut tidak dapat menggunakan jaringan 4G LTE (evolusi jangka panjang) syarikat tersebut, dan dengan itu tidak dapat membuat panggilan dan akses Internet pada masa yang sama.

src: Cook told the audience that the LTE hardware was not ready yet, saying, "The first generation LTE chip sets force some design compromises, some of which we would not make."
ref: Cook memberitahu hadirin yang perkakas LTE masih belum sedia, mengatakan, "Generasi pertama cip LTE mengakibatkan tekanan kompromi sesetengah reka bentuk, yang mana sebahagiannya kami tidak akan lakukan."

src: "Secondly—and most importantly—Verizon Wireless customers have told us they want the iPhone now."
ref: "Keduanya-dan paling penting-pelanggan Verizon Wireless telah memberitahu kami mereka ingin iPhone tersebut sekarang."

src: However, Verizon's iPhone 4 allows the user to create a personal Wi-Fi hotspot, which means up to five other wireless devices can connect to the Internet through the phone.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, iPhone 4 Verizon membolehkan pengguna mencipta Wi-Fi hotspot persendirian, yang bermaksud sehingga lima peralatan tanpa wayar lain boleh berhubung dengan Internet melalui telefon tersebut.

src: Pricing was announced as US$199 for a 16 GB version and US$299 for a 32 GB version, both requiring two-year contracts—the same cost for an AT&T iPhone 4.
ref: Harga diumumkan ialas US$199 untuk versi 16 GB dan US$299 untuk versi 32 GB, keduanya memerlukan dua tahun kontrak-kos yang sama untuk iPhone 4 AT&T.

src: However, Verizon said it would not mention the cost of data plans at this time, with Mead saying, "We talked about the device pricing, but we're not going to talk about the pricing for the network for that connectivity."
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, Verizon berkata ia tidak akan menyatakan kos pelan data buat masa ini, dengan Mead mengatakan, "Kami berbincang tentang harga perkakas, tetapi kami tidak berbincang tentang harga untuk jaringan sambungan tesebut."

src: Four members of a filmcrew have been arrested on suspicion of assault after squirting water at movie star Tom Cruise at the London premiere of the War of the Worlds on Sunday evening.
ref: Empat ahli dari krew filem telah ditangkap diatas kecurigaan serangan selepas memancutkan air ke bintang filem Tom Cruise diperasmian War of the Worlds di London pada petang Ahad.

src: The crew were freelancers filming a new comedy show for Channel 4.
ref: Krew bebas tersebut sedang menggambarkan pertunjukan komedi baru untuk Channel 4.

src: Channel 4 has no production facilities itself; all television programmes are commissioned from independent companies .
ref: Channel 4 tidak mempunyai fasiliti pengeluaran sendiri; semua program tv adalah komisi dari syarikat bebas.

src: Cruise had been on a walkabout meeting and greeting fans, and was being interviewed by the crew under the impression that it was a serious interview, when they used a fake microphone to squirt him in the face.
ref: Cruise sedang dalam laluan menemui dan bersapa dengan peminat, dan ditemubual krew tersebut dibawah gambaran ia adalah inteview yang serius, apabila mereka menggunakan mikrofon palsu untuk memancutkan ke mukanya.

src: He took hold of the culprit, grasping his wrist, asking him why he did it.
ref: Dia memegang pelakunya, mencengkam peregelangan tangannya, menanyakan dia mengapa dia melakukannya.

src: "Why would you do that? What's so funny about that? It's ridiculous."
ref: "Mengapa kamu melakukannya? Apa yang lucu tentangnya? Ia tidak masuk akal."

src: "I'm here giving you an interview, answering your questions and you do something nasty."
ref: "Saya disini memberi anda temubual, menjawab soalan anda dan anda lakukan sesuatu yang menjelekkan."

src: Security guards then took the filmcrew away, before they were arrested and bailed by the police.
ref: Pengawal keselamatan kemudian membawa mereka pergi, sebelum mereka ditangkap dan dijamin oleh polis.

src: Scotland Yard have said, "We will see whether to pursue the charges, or see whether the victim wants to pursue it."
ref: Scotland Yard telah berkata, "Kami akan melihat sama ada untuk meneruskan dakwaan, atau melihat sama ada mangsa mahu meneruskannya."

src: Tom Cruise resumed meeting fans and signing autographs, spending an hour in Leicester Square.
ref: Tom Cruise meneruskan menemui peminat dan menandatangani autograf, meluangkan satu jam di Leicester Square.

src: They said that they defend the investigation of corruption schemes, however they said that the Lula government is the victim of a destabilization campaign.
ref: Mereka berkata bahawa mereka mempertahankan siasatan skim rasuah, namun mereka berkata kerajaan Lula adalah mangsa kempen pentidakstabilan.

src: They blame the President of the United States George W. Bush for the crisis.
ref: Mereka menyalahkan Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush atas krisis itu.

src: They say that the government of Lula is victim of a coup attempt by Bush supporters.
ref: Mereka mengatakan bahawa kerajaan Lula adalah mangsa cubaan rampasan kuasa oleh penyokong Bush.

src: Other parliamentarians, even some of the Workers' Party, didn't agree with the coup argument.
ref: Ahli-ahli parlimen yang lain, malahan beberapa Parti Pekerja, tidak bersetuju dengan hujah rampasan kuasa.

src: Some senators said that only the Wokers' Party itself initiated the crisis.
ref: Sesetengah senator berkata bahawa hanya Parti Wokers sendiri yang memulakan krisis itu.

src: The Dover, Pennsylvania school board became the first to mandate inclusion of Intelligent Design in a public school biology curriculum.
ref: Lembaga sekolah Dover, Pennsylvania menjadi sekolah pertama untuk memberi mandat kemasukan Rekaanbentuk Pintar dalam kurikulum biologi sekolah awam.

src: For this year's November 8 election, Republicans fielded a pro-Intelligent Design slate of candidates including some returning candidates who had previously voted to include a statement about Intelligent Design in the biology curriculum.
ref: Untuk pilihan raya November 8 tahun ini, Parti Republik meletakkan sekumpulan calon Rekabentuk pro-Pintar termasuk beberapa calon kemasukan semula yang sebelum ini mengundi untuk memasukkan satu kenyataan mengenai Rekaan Pintar dalam kurikulum biologi.

src: A mixed slate of Democrat and Republican candidates came forward as an alternative group of school board candidates, the Dover CARES coalition.
ref: Satu kumpulan calon campuran Demokrat dan Republikan bersukarela sebagai calon lembaga sekolah pakatan Dover CARES, satu kumpulan alternatif.

src: They proposed to remove Intelligent Design from the biology curriculum but allow discussion of Intelligent Design in courses dealing with philosophy and comparative religion.
ref: Mereka mencadangkan untuk mengeluarkan Rekabentuk Intelligent dari kurikulum biologi tetapi membenarkan perbincangan Rekabentuk Pintar dalam kursus-kursus yang berkaitan dengan falsafah dan perbandingan agama.

src: All eight open school board seats were won by Dover CARES coalition candidates.
ref: Semua lapan kerusi lembaga sekolah terbuka telah dimenangi oleh Dover CARES calon pakatan.

src: Two candidates who had previously voted as school board members to include intelligent design in the public school science curriculum received the fewest votes in Tuesday's election.
ref: Dua calon yang sebelum ini telah dipilih sebagai ahli lembaga sekolah untuk memasukkan rekabentuk pintar dalam kurikulum sains sekolah awam menerima undi paling sedikit pada pilihan raya semalam.

src: One of the newly elected board members is Bryan Rehm, a parent of a Dover school student.
ref: Salah satu daripada ahli-ahli lembaga yang baru dilantik adalah Bryan Rehm, ibu bapa seorang pelajar sekolah Dover.

src: Rehm, along with ten other parents, initiated a law suit against the school board for its decision to insert Intelligent Design into the science curriculum.
ref: Rehm, bersama-sama dengan sepuluh ibu bapa lain, mengajukan satu saman undang-undang terhadap lembaga sekolah atas keputusan memasukkan Rekabentuk Intelligent ke dalam kurikulum sains itu.

src: In October 2004, the Dover school board decided that Intelligent Design is a scientific theory that should be mentioned in biology classes that include discussion of biological evolution as part of the course content.
ref: Pada bulan Oktober 2004, lembaga sekolah Dover memutuskan bahawa Rekabentuk Pintar adalah satu teori saintifik yang perlu disebut dalam kelas biologi yang merangkumi perbincangan mengenai evolusi biologi sebagai sebahagian daripada kandungan kursus.

src: The board mandated that a statement should be read in those classes stating "Intelligent Design is an explanation of the origin of life," and "The school leaves the discussion of the Origins of Life to individual students and their families."
ref: Lembaga yang memberi mandat bahawa satu kenyataan perlu dibaca dalam kelas-kelas yang menyatakan "Rekabentuk Pintar adalah penjelasan asal-usul kehidupan," dan "Sekolah ini melepaskan perbincangan Asal Usul Kehidupan kepada pelajar individu dan keluarga mereka."

src: The school board's statement on Intelligent Design directs students to the book Of Pandas and People as a source of information "for students who might be interested in gaining an understanding of what Intelligent Design actually involves."
ref: Kenyataan lembaga sekolah itu mengenai Rekabentuk Pintar mengarahkan pelajar kepada buku Tentang Beruang Panda dan Orang sebagai satu sumber maklumat "untuk pelajar-pelajar yang mungkin berminat untuk memperolehi pemahaman tentang apa Rekabentuk Pintar melibatkan sebenarnya."

src: This book is published by the Foundation for Thought and Ethics, a non-profit organization founded for the purpose of "promoting and publishing textbooks presenting a Christian perspective."
ref: Buku ini diterbitkan oleh Yayasan untuk Pemikiran dan Etika, sebuah pertubuhan bukan mencari keuntungan yang ditubuhkan untuk tujuan "mempromosi dan menerbit buku teks yang menyampaikan perspektif Kristian."

src: Parents of some Dover public school students filed a lawsuit against the school board, charging that including the school board's statement on Intelligent Design was an attempt to introduce religion into the science curriculum.
ref: Ibu bapa sesetengah pelajar sekolah awam Dover memfailkan saman terhadap lembaga sekolah, pendakwaan termasuk kenyataan lembaga sekolah atas Rekabentuk Pintar adalah satu usaha untuk memperkenalkan agama dalam kurikulum sains.

src: The book Of Pandas and People says, "Intelligent design means that various forms of life began abruptly through an intelligent agency."
ref: Buku Tentang Beruang Panda dan Orang berkata, "rekabentuk pintar bermakna pelbagai bentuk kehidupan bermula tiba-tiba melalui sebuah agensi pintar."

src: The original complaint in the law suit against the school board claimed that "Intelligent design is a non-scientific argument or assertion."
ref: Aduan asal dalam saman undang-undang terhadap lembaga sekolah itu yang mendakwa bahawa "reka bentuk pintar adalah satu hujah bukan saintifik ataupun dakwaan."

src: The US District Court Judge John Jones, who heard the non-jury case, hopes to make his ruling by the end of the year.
ref: Hakim Mahkamah Daerah Amerika Syarikat John Jones, yang mendengar kes bukan juri, berharap untuk membuat keputusannya pada akhir tahun ini.

src: The evidence phase of the trial ended on November 4, 2005.
ref: Fasa bukti perbicaraan itu berakhir pada 4 November 2005.

src: A local Dover newspaper, the York Daily Record, editorialized that Dover voters should take trial testimony into account during the general election when they could cast votes for school board members along with other elective offices.
ref: Sebuah akhbar tempatan Dover, York Rekod Harian, berpendapat bahawa pengundi Dover perlu mengambil kira bukti perbicaraan semasa pilihan raya umum apabila mereka boleh mengundi untuk ahli-ahli lembaga sekolah bersama-sama dengan pejabat elektif lain.

src: Biology teachers in the Dover schools have refused to read the school board's statement on Intelligent Design to students because the Pennsylvania state code for education states that "The professional educator may not knowingly and intentionally misrepresent subject matter."
ref: Guru biologi di sekolah Dover telah menolak untuk membaca kenyataan lembaga sekolah atas Rekabentuk Pintar kepada pelajar kerana kod negeri Pennsylvania untuk pendidikan menyatakan bahawa "Pendidik profesional tidak boleh secara sengaja dan sedanya menyampaikan satu perkara."

src: In a letter to their administrator, the teachers stated their view that "Intelligent design is not science."
ref: Dalam surat kepada pentadbir mereka, guru-guru menyatakan pandangan mereka bahawa "rekabentuk pintar bukan sains."

src: School administrators have been reading the school board's Intelligent Design statement to students in Dover public schools.
ref: Pentadbir sekolah pernah membaca kenyataan Rekabentuk Pintar lembaga sekolah kepada pelajar-pelajar di sekolah-sekolah awam Dover.

src: In a free trade zone in Antalya, Turkey, 80 women workers of FMC Novamed are in strike for almost a year now, since September 26th, 2006.
ref: Di zon perdagangan bebas di Antalya, Turki, 80 pekerja wanita FMC Novamed sedang mogok selama hampir setahun sehingga sekarang, sejak 26 September, 2006.

src: They allege not only low wages but also severe abuses on FMC's part.
ref: Mereka mendakwa bukan sahaja kerana gaji yang rendah tetapi juga penderaan teruk oleh pihak FMC itu.

src: Novamed, founded in 2001, is a factory managed by Turkish capitalists and located in the free trade zone in Antalya, Turkey.
ref: Novamed, yang diasaskan pada tahun 2001, adalah sebuah kilang yang diuruskan oleh kapitalis Turki dan terletak di zon perdagangan bebas di Antalya, Turki.

src: It is owned by Fresenius Medical Care (FMC), which is an international corporation with its headquarters in Germany.
ref: Ia dimiliki oleh Jagaan Perubatan Fresenius (FMC), yang merupakan sebuah syarikat antarabangsa yang beribu pejabat di Jerman.

src: With factories in 12 countries and a total of 100,000 workers, FMC is a monopoly in the market of dialysis products.
ref: Dengan kilang-kilang di 12 negara dan seramai 100,000 pekerja, FMC adalah monopoli dalam pasaran produk dialisis.

src: NASA has completed a major test of a 20-meter square solar sail, marking a "crucial milestone" in space propulsion technology.
ref: NASA telah menyiapkan satu ujian besar mengenai satu layar solar 20-meter persegi, menandakan satu "peristiwa penting" dalam teknologi angkasa pendorongan.

src: It is not the first to test solar sails, as the Japanese have deployed two solar sails in space.
ref: Ini bukan kali pertama untuk menguji layar solar, kerana Jepun telah menggunakan dua layar solar di angkasa lepas.

src: The Planetary Society is planning on launching a solar sail possibly by June 21.
ref: Persatuan Planetary sedang merancang untuk melancarkan satu layar solar mungkin sebelum 21 Jun.

src: Shot into orbit by a converted intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM), the Cosmos 1 would be launched from a submerged Russian submarine from within the Barents Sea.
ref: Pelancaran ke orbit oleh peluru berpandu balistik benua bertukar (ICBM), Cosmos 1 akan dilancarkan dari kapal selam Rusia yang tenggelam dari dalam Laut Barents.

src: The spacecraft, powered by the sail, will have no destination.
ref: Kapal angkasa itu, dikuasakan oleh layar, tidak akan mempunyai destinasi.

src: The purpose is simply to test the propulsion system that uses the pressure from solar light particles to move the ship outward from a starting orbit around the earth at 500 miles.
ref: Tujuannya adalah semata-mata untuk menguji sistem pendorongan yang menggunakan tekanan daripada zarah cahaya solar untuk menggerakkan kapal itu keluar dari orbit yang mengelilingi bumi pada 500 batu.

src: The propulsion technology is currently believed to be the most efficient available for interstellar space travel.
ref: Teknologi pendorongan ini kini dipercayai adalah yang paling berkesan yang boleh didapati untuk perjalanan angkasa antara bintang.

src: Theoretically a craft propelled by the pressure of a constant light source, such as a purpose-built laser, could achieve speeds approaching the speed of light.
ref: Secara teorinya sebuah pesawat digerakkan oleh tekanan sumber cahaya yang tetap, seperti laser yang dibina khas, boleh mencapai kelajuan menghampiri kelajuan cahaya.

src: This is due to the efficiencies of the spacecraft not having to carry its own fuel.
ref: Ini adalah disebabkan kecekapan kapal angkasa itu yang tidak perlu membawa bahan api sendiri.

src: Approaching the speed of light would, however, require a long period of constant acceleration.
ref: Menghampiri kelajuan cahaya akan, bagaimanapun, memerlukan tempoh masa yang panjang untuk pecutan malar.

src: Such high speed will be impossible for the current test vehicles and any launched in the foreseeable future, as they rely on the light from the Sun, which rapidly becomes weaker with increasing distance.
ref: Kelajuan tinggi seperti ini akan menjadi mustahil untuk kenderaan ujian sekarang dan sebarangan yang dilancarkan pada masa akan datang, kerana mereka bergantung kepada cahaya dari Matahari, yang cepat menjadi lemah dengan jarak semakin meningkat.

src: According to the National Geographic News, "NASA, the European Space Agency, Japan, and Russia all have developed solar sails, but none has yet tried to prove that the sails can propel a spacecraft under controlled flight."
ref: Menurut Berita Nasional Geographic, "NASA, Agensi Angkasa Eropah, Jepun, dan Rusia semua telah membina layar-layar solar, tetapi tiada satu pun yang pernah cuba untuk membuktikan bahawa layar itu boleh menggerakkan kapal angkasa di bawah penerbangan terkawal."

src: The Supreme Court of Japan ruled on Wednesday that a condition imposed by an Act for acquiring Japanese nationality is unconstitutional, and confirmed the nationality of the plaintiffs.
ref: Mahkamah Agung Jepun memberi perintah pada hari Rabu bahawa syarat yang dikenakan oleh suatu Akta untuk memperoleh kewarganegaraan Jepun adalah tidak berdasarkan perlembagaan, dan mengesahkan kewarganegaraan plaintif itu.

src: Each of the ten plaintiffs is a child who was born to a Filipino mother and later acknowledged by a Japanese father.
ref: Setiap satu daripada sepuluh plaintif adalah seorang kanak-kanak yang dilahirkan oleh seorang ibu Filipina dan kemudian diakui oleh seorang ayah Jepun.

src: They filed claims for Japanese nationality between 2003 and 2005, but the government turned down because the parents were not legally married in each case.
ref: Mereka memfailkan tuntutan untuk kewarganegaraan Jepun antara tahun 2003 dan 2005, tetapi kerajaan menolaknya kerana ibu bapa tidak berkahwin secara sah dalam setiap kes.

src: According to Japan's Act on nationality, a non-Japanese child (under 20) who was after its birth legitimated by marriage and acknowledgment can acquire Japanese nationality by filing notification, with some requirements which the plaintiffs had already fulfilled.
ref: Mengikut Akta Jepun berkenaan kewarganegaraan, seorang kanak-kanak bukan Jepun (umur di bawah 20) yang selepas kelahirannya disahkan taraf melalui perkahwinan dan pengakuan boleh memperoleh kewarganegaraan Jepun dengan memfailkan pemberitahuan, dengan beberapa syarat-syarat yang telah dipenuhi plaintif.

src: The Supreme Court ruled on Wednesday that the condition 'legitimated by marriage' results in unreasonable distinctions to violate Article 14 of the Constitution of Japan, which guarantees equality under the law.
ref: Mahkamah Agung memutuskan pada hari Rabu bahawa syarat 'pengesahan taraf melalui perkahwinan'menyebabkan perbezaan yang tidak munasabah untuk melanggar Artikel 14 Perlembagaan Jepun, yang menjamin persamaan di sisi undang-undang.

src: The Supreme Court left effective the rest of this provision and accepted the plaintiffs' claims for Japanese nationality.
ref: Mahkamah Agung menggunakan frasa akta ini dengan berkesan dan terima tuntutan plaintif untuk mendapatkan kewarganegaraan Jepun.

src: The judgment pointed out recent changes in people's notions in Japan as to family life or parent-child relationship, and also referred to two conventions which Japan has ratified.
ref: Penghakiman itu menegaskan perubahan dalam tanggapan rakyat Jepun baru-baru ini berkenaan kehidupan keluarga atau hubungan ibu bapa dan anak, dan juga merujuk kepada dua konvensyen yang Jepun telah disahkan.

src: There are estimated to be tens of thousands of children in similar situations in Japan and a considerable number overseas.
ref: Dianggarkan terdapat puluhan ribu kanak-kanak dalam situasi yang sama di Jepun dan sejumlah besar di luar negara.

src: Chief Cabinet Secretary Nobutaka Machimura on Wednesday made a comment about the judgment at a press conference.
ref: Ketua Setiausaha Kabinet Nobutaka Machimura membuat komen pada hari Rabu tentang penghakiman itu dalam satu sidang akhbar.

src: Machimura said, "This judgment, saying violation of Constitution, weighs so much."
ref: Machimura berkata, "Penghakiman ini, mengatakan pencabulan Perlembagaan, memberi kesan yang begitu kuat."

src: "As a government, we should take it gravely, and we want to examine its content in detail and consider how to react."
ref: "Sebagai sebuah kerajaan, kita perlu menelitinya dengan serius, dan kami mahu memeriksa kandungannya secara terperinci dan mempertimbangkan bagaimana untuk bertindak balas."

src: He added, "I have an impression, just hearing of it, that it's a reasonable judgment."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Saya mempunyai satu tanggapan, hanya mendengarnya, bahawa ia adalah pertimbangan yang wajar."

src: "Equality under the law is an important point of view."
ref: "Kesaksamaan di sisi undang-undang adalah satu pandangan penting."

src: :(a) while it's within the scope of the Legislation of the Diet how conditions are set for acquiring / losing Japanese nationality (Article 10), a distinction without rational reasons brought by such a condition may be unconstitutional (Article 14: Paragraph 1).
ref: :(a) semasa ia dalam skop Perundangan Diet bagaimana caranya syarat-syarat yang ditetapkan untuk memperoleh / kehilangan kewarganegaraan Jepun (Perkara 10), suatu perbezaan tanpa sebab-sebab rasional yang disebabkan keadaan seperti ini mungkin tidak mengikut perlembagaan (Perkara 14: Ayat 1).

src: :(b) being legitimated by the parents' marriage or not is a thing the child can not change by its will or endeavor.
ref: :(b) yang disahkan taraf melalui perkahwinan ibu bapa atau tidak adalah sesuatu yang tidak boleh dikawal oleh hasrat atau usahan kanak-kanak itu.

src: :(c) the purpose of legislation of this provision is rational, because that is considered to demand the child's tight connection with Japan's society.
ref: :(c) tujuan frasa undang-undang ini adalah rasional, kerana itu yang dianggap menuntut hubungan rapat kanak-kanak itu dengan masyarakat Jepun.

src: :(d) after this provision was added in 1984, both notions and actual situations of people in Japan have been becoming of variety, as to family life or parent-child relationship.
ref: :(d) selepas frasa ini ditambah pada tahun 1984, kedua-dua tanggapan dan situasi sebenar orang di Jepun telah bertukar dan menjadi pelbagai, terhadap kehidupan keluarga atau hubungan ibu bapa dan anak.

src: :(e) the child's tight connection with Japan's society can not be measured instantly by whether the parents have got legally married.
ref: :(e) hubungan rapat kanak-kanak itu dengan masyarakat Jepun tidak boleh diukur serta-merta berdasarkan sama ada ibu bapa telah berkahwin secara sah atau tidak.

src: :(g) this provision results in distinctions not only as to legitimacy but also as to two other factors: any non-Japanese child without legitimacy acknowledged before its birth by a Japanese father, and any child without legitimacy born to a Japanese mother, can acquire Japanese nationality provided by this Act.
ref: :(g) frasa ini mewujudkan perbezaan bukan sahaja dalam kesahihan undang-undang tetapi juga dua faktor lain: mana-mana kanak-kanak bukan Jepun yang tanpa kesahihan undang-undang yang diakui sebelum kelahirannya oleh ayah Jepun, dan mana-mana kanak-kanak tanpa kesahihan undang-undang yang dilahirkan oleh seorang ibu Jepun, boleh memperoleh kewarganegaraan Jepun yang diperuntukkan oleh Akta ini.

src: These distinctions have no rational relation with the purpose of legislation.
ref: Perbezaan-perbezaan ini tidak mempunyai hubungan yang rasional dengan tujuan perundangan.

src: :(h) another provision in this Act states a child in this situation may be naturalized with fewer conditions, but it doesn't justify the relation between the purpose and the distinctions, because naturalization is within discretion of the Minister of Justice.
ref: :(h) frasa lain dalam Akta ini menyatakan seorang kanak-kanak dalam keadaan ini boleh memperolehi kerakyatan dengan kurang syarat, tetapi ia tidak menjustifikasikan hubungan antara tujuan dan perbezaan, kerana penaturalisasian adalah dalam budi bicara Menteri Kehakiman.

src: One judge in the majority, who supported the conclusion, shared a view with the five dissenting: the distinction as to legitimacy is caused by non-existence of due legislation.
ref: Seorang hakim dalam majoriti, yang menyokong kesimpulan itu, berkongsi pandangan dengan lima orang yang menentang: perbezaan tentang kesahihan undang-undang yang disebabkan oleh ketidakwujudan undang-undang yang sewajarnya.

src: This judge concluded that the Judiciary can remedy the lack, because it doesn't betray the will of the Legislation of the Diet as to this Act.
ref: Hakim ini membuat kesimpulan bahawa Badan Kehakiman boleh membetulkan kepincangan, kerana ia tidak berpesong dari kehendak Perundangan Diet untuk Akta ini.

src: Two dissenting judges of the five concluded that these distinctions are unconstitutional, but correction of it depends, in principle, on legislative measures by the Diet.
ref: Dua daripada lima hakim yang menentang berkesimpulan bahawa perbezaan-perbezaan ini adalah tidak menurut perlembagaan, tetapi pembetulannya bergantung, pada dasarnya, atas langkah-langkah perundangan oleh Diet.

src: The other opinion of three dissenting judges is contrary to the major opinion.
ref: Pendapat lain daripada tiga hakim yang menentang bertentangan dengan pendapat majoriti.

src: They argued, for example, :the distinction as to legitimacy is not unconstitutional and is within the range of choice of legislative measures.
ref: Mereka berbalah, sebagai contoh, : perbezaan tentang kesahihan undang-undang tidak mengikut perlembagaan dan adalah di dalam pilihan langkah-langkah perundangan.

src: :even if it's unconstitutional, the plaintiffs' appeals are to be dismissed, following the viewpoint in the other dissenting opinion.
ref: :Walaupun sekiranya ia tidak mengikut perlembagaan, rayuan plaintif hendaklah ditolak, berikut pandangan mereka yang menentang.

src: :it's dubious whether or how people in Japan have been making changes as in (d).
ref: :Ia meragukan sama ada atau bagaimana orang di Jepun membuat perubahan seperti dalam (d).

src: :it's rational to offer Japanese nationality in two other situations as in (g).
ref: :Adalah rasional untuk menawarkan kewarganegaraan Jepun dalam dua keadaan lain seperti dalam (g).

src: :easy naturalization as in (h) to offer Japanese nationality is rational both as a measure and in practice.
ref: :Penaturalisasian mudah seperti dalam (h) untuk menawarkan kewarganegaraan Jepun adalah rasional sebagai langkah mahupun amalan.

src: :foreign countries' movement as in (f) is not to be instantly reflected in judgment on constitutionality; they are different from Japan, with a large number of international marriages and expansion of regional unification like EU.
ref: :pergerakan negara-negara asing sebagaimana dalam (f) tidak boleh digambarkan serta-merta dalam penghakimam perlembagaan; mereka adalah berbeza daripada Jepun, dengan sejumlah besar perkahwinan antarabangsa dan pengembangan penyatuan serantau seperti EU.

src: A military weapons storage facility in al-Masalmyiah, just north of Aleppo, Syria has exploded, killing at least 15 Syrian soldiers and injuring at least 50 others.
ref: Satu fasiliti simpanan senjata tentera di al-Masalmyiah, di utara Aleppo, Syria telah meletup, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 15 askar Syria dan mencederakan sekurang-kurangnya 50 orang lain.

src: The explosion occurred on the grounds of a military academy's infantry school where weapons and ammunition are stored.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku atas halaman sekolah akademi ketenteraan pasukan tentera berjalan kaki di mana senjata dan amunisi disimpan.

src: The blast, which occurred at 4:30 a.m. EEST (UTC+3) is believed to have been caused by excessive summer temperatures, but other reports suggest that a gas leak may have sparked the blast.
ref: Letupan yang berlaku pada 4:30 pagi EEST (UTC+3) dipercayai telah disebabkan oleh suhu musim panas yang keterlaluan, tetapi laporan lain menunjukkan bahawa kebocoran gas mungkin telah mencetuskan letupan itu.
