src: Firefighters report several deaths and injuries, but also said that the fires caused by the blast have been extinguished.
ref: Anggota bomba melaporkan beberapa kematian dan kecederaan, tetapi berkata bahawa api yang disebabkan oleh letupan itu telah padam.

src: Tens of thousands of Syrians took to the streets Friday in cities across the country protesting for freedom.
ref: Berpuluh-puluh ribu orang Syria berdemonstrasi atas jalan pada hari Jumaat di bandar-bandar seluruh negara untuk memprotes untuk kebebasan.

src: Syria's official news agency (SANA) reported, "scattered groups of citizens came out to the streets in several areas of the provinces after Friday prayers and chanted slogans calling for freedom without the intervention of security forces."
ref: Agensi berita rasmi Syria (SANA) melaporkan, "kumpulan rakyat yang bertaburan keluar ke jalan di beberapa kawasan wilayah selepas solat Jumaat dan melaungkan slogan menyeru kebebasan tanpa campur tangan pasukan keselamatan."

src: However, protests in Damascus reportedly turned violent as security forces were said to disperse the crowds with batons and tear gas to prevent protesters reaching the capital's main square.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, protes di Damsyik dilaporkan menjadi ganas kerana pasukan keselamatan dikatakan cuba menyuraikan orang ramai dengan baton dan gas pemedih mata untuk menghalang penunjuk perasaan sampai ke dataran utama di ibu negara.

src: "I counted 15 mukhabarat [secret police] busloads," a source reported to Reuters news agency.
ref: "Saya kira 15 mukhabarat [polis rahsia] bilangan penunggang bas," kata sumber yang dilaporkan kepada agensi berita Reuters.

src: "They went into the alleyways just north of the square chasing protesters and yelling 'you pimps, you infiltrators, you want freedom? we will give it to you'."
ref: "Mereka masuk ke dalam lorong-lorong di utara dataran mengejar penunjuk perasaan dan menjerit 'kamu bapa ayam, kamu penyusup, kamu mahukan kebebasan? Kami akan baginya kepada kamu'."

src: Protests in Syria have intensified since mid-March after families of political prisoners held rallies in Damascus and people in Daraa protested against the arrests of more than a dozen children for anti-regime graffiti.
ref: Protes di Syria makin menjadi-jadi sejak pertengahan bulan Mac selepas keluarga tahanan politik mengadakan perhimpunan di Damsyik dan penduduk di Daraa membantah penangkapan lebih daripada sedozen kanak-kanak kerana grafiti anti-rejim.

src: The protests continued as Syria’s President, Bashar al-Assad failed to lift the emergency law the country has operated under since his Arab Socialist Ba’ath Party came to power in 1963.
ref: Protes berterusan kerana Presiden Syria, Bashar al-Assad gagal untuk menegakkan undang-undang darurat negara itu yang telah beroperasi sejak Arab Sosialis Parti Ba'ath beliau mula berkuasa pada tahun 1963.

src: The Assad government has met protests with a mixture of minor concessions and force.
ref: Kerajaan Assad telah bertembung dengan protes dengan campuran konsesi kecil dan paksaan.

src: After a meeting of NATO foreign ministers in Berlin, US Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said, "The Syrian government did not meet the legitimate demands of the Syrian people."
ref: Selepas satu mesyuarat menteri-menteri luar negeri NATO di Berlin, Setiausaha Negara Amerika Syarikat Hillary Clinton berkata, "Kerajaan Syria tidak memenuhi tuntutan sah rakyat Syria."

src: "It is time for the Syrian government to stop its crack down on these people and begin to meet their aspirations."
ref: "Sudah tiba masanya bagi kerajaan Syria untuk menghentikan tindakan keras terhadap rakyatnya dan mula memenuhi aspirasi mereka."

src: The delegation asked for a deadline for their demands to be met.
ref: Delegasi itu meminta satu tarikh akhir supaya tuntutan mereka dipenuhi.

src: Al Jazeera correspondent Rula Amin said, "It seems from the people in Daraa that the government is seriously trying to contain [the situation in] Daraa because that is where it all started."
ref: Wartawan Al Jazeera Rula Amin berkata, "Dari penduduk di Daraa nampaknya kerajaan cuba menangani [keadaan di] Daraa secara serius kerana itu adalah di mana ia bermula."

src: "If they manage to calm the situation in Daraa, the government believes it will be able to contain the situation throughout Syria."
ref: "Jika mereka berjaya menenangkan keadaan di Daraa, kerajaan percaya ia akan boleh mengawal keadaan di seluruh Syria."

src: A Kam Air plane from Afghanistan, traveling in China's Xinjiang region was not hijacked and did not receive a bomb threat, according to Afghan officials.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Kam Air dari Afghanistan, berjalan di lingkungan kawasan Xinjiang China tidak dirampas dan tidak menerima ancaman bom, menurut pegawai Afghanistan.

src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
ref: Sebelum ini agensi berita China Xinhua melaporkan sebuah pesawat akan dirampas.

src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
ref: Kemudian laporan itu menyatakan pesawat itu menerima ancaman bom dan telah diubah arah kembali ke Afghanistan, mendarat di Kandahar.

src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
ref: Laporan awal mengatakan pesawat itu telah diubah arah kembali ke Afghanistan selepas pendaratan cemas di Ürümqi tidak diberi kebenaran.

src: The plane was traveling to China and had been ordered to turn around after the proper paperwork was not in place.
ref: Pesawat itu dalam perjalanan ke China dan telah diperintahkan untuk bertukar arah selepas kertas kerja yang sepatutnya tidak dapat ditunjukkan.

src: Upon its return, the plane landed in Kabul after it encountered high winds.
ref: Dalam perjalanan pulang, pesawat itu mendarat di Kabul selepas ia bertemu dengan angin kencang.

src: It is not known how many people were on board the plane, but no injuries are reported.
ref: Adalah tidak diketahui berapa ramai orang yang berada di atas kapal terbang itu, tetapi tiada kecederaan dilaporkan.

src: A NATO official denied there was an emergency landing due to a threat and says the Chinese media reports are untrue.
ref: Seorang pegawai NATO menafikan terdapat pendaratan cemas disebabkan sesuatu ancaman dan berkata laporan media Cina adalah tidak benar.

src: The Xinjiang region was the scene of a violent uprising by its Uyghur population last month.
ref: Kawasan Xinjiang adalah tempat pembangunan pemberontakan ganas oleh penduduk Uyghur pada bulan lepas.

src: Sharansky’s resignation as Minister of Diaspora Affairs and Jerusalem was accepted by Prime Minister Ariel Sharon at Sunday’s cabinet meeting.
ref: Peletakan jawatan Sharansky sebagai Menteri Diaspora dan Yerusalem telah diterima oleh Perdana Menteri Ariel Sharon dalam mesyuarat kabinet Ahad ini.

src: "The only aim of the current government is the implementation of the disengagement plan, and therefore it is wrong, even immoral, for me to remain a part of this government."
ref: "Satu-satunya tujuan kerajaan sekarang adalah pelaksanaan pelan pengunduran, dan oleh itu ia adalah salah, malah tidak bermoral, bagi saya untuk kekal menjadi sebahagian daripada kerajaan ini."

src: Sharansky said that although he was always against what he calls the "so-called disengagement plan," he decided to leave the government once the battle against the withdrawal was no longer able to be waged from within the government.
ref: Sharansky berkata walaupun beliau sentiasa menentang apa yang dia gelar "apa yang dinamakan pelan pengunduran," dia membuat keputusan untuk meninggalkan kerajaan sekiranya pelawanan menentang penarikan balik itu tidak dapat lagi dilancarkan dari dalam kerajaan.

src: "Our main battle now is public opinion, because the struggle in the government is finished," he said.
ref: "Perjuangan utama kami sekarang ialah pendapat umum, kerana tempuhan dalam kerajaan sudah diselesaikan," katanya.

src: Although he hopes to take the struggle to the people, the former minister hopes his move will pave the way for other politicians to follow their consciences.
ref: Walaupun beliau berharap untuk menempuh untuk rakyat, bekas Menteri itu berharap langkah beliau akan membuka jalan untuk ahli-ahli politik lain untuk mengikuti hati nurani mereka.

src: "I don’t know how effective my quitting will be," Sharansky said, "but I hope it will encourage other politicians and ministers to at least vote according to what they believe and what they think."
ref: "Saya tidak tahu bagaimana berkesannya perletakan jawatan saya," kata Sharansky, "tetapi saya berharap ia akan menggalakkan ahli-ahli politik dan menteri-menteri lain untuk sekurang-kurangnya undi mengikut apa yang mereka percaya dan apa yang mereka fikir."

src: The former prisoner of Zion (who served time in a Soviet prison for wanting to emigrate to Israel) says his main objection to the plan to withdraw from Gaza and northern Samaria is the fact that the withdrawal is not contingent on the creation of democracy within the Palestinian Authority.
ref: Bekas banduan Zion (yang dipenjarakan di penjara Soviet kerana ingin berhijrah ke Israel) berkata bantahan utama beliau atas rancangan untuk menarik diri dari Gaza dan utara Samaria adalah kerana pengunduran itu tidak bergantung pada penciptaan demokrasi dalam Kuasa Palestin.

src: "I have promoted the spread of democracy as the only answer for thirty years."
ref: "Saya telah menngajukan demokrasi sebagai satu-satunya jawapan selama tiga puluh tahun."

src: "And now, at the time when an American president declares these principles and promotes them, an Israeli PM comes along and does the exact opposite."
ref: "Dan sekarang, pada masa apabila seorang presiden Amerika mengisytiharkan prinsip-prinsip ini dan menyokong mereka, seorang PM Israel datang dan buat perkara yang bertentangan."

src: Although he has in the past supported withdrawal from parts of the land of Israel, Sharansky says the current plan goes too far.
ref: Walaupun dahulu beliau telah menyokong pengunduran dari bahagian-bahagian tanah Israel, Sharansky berkata pelan sekarang keterlaluan.

src: "We cannot control another people and we will need serious compromise, but that compromise does not include giving another people the ability to destroy us…as if we run from Gaza, Gaza will not run after us."
ref: "Kita tidak boleh mengawal orang lain dan kita perlu kompromi yang serius, tetapi kompromi itu tidak termasuk membiarkan orang lain berkeupayaan memusnahkan kita...seolah-olah kita yang lari dari Gaza, Gaza tidak akan mengejari kami."

src: "I had many opportunities to present my point of view to the Prime Minister, both publicly and privately," Sharansky said.
ref: "Saya mempunyai banyak peluang untuk mengemukakan pandangan saya kepada Perdana Menteri, secara umum dan peribadi," kata Sharansky.

src: "I told him we will not have ten years – we will not even have ten days free from pressure, because we are legitimizing one-sided withdrawals from Jewish areas – each withdrawal will only invite more pressure."
ref: "Saya memberitahunya kita tidak akan mempunyai sepuluh tahun - kita tiada sepuluh hari pun yang bebas dari tekanan, kerana kita mengesahkan pengeluaran dari kawasan Yahudi yang merupakan berat sebelah - setiap pengunduran hanya akan mengundang lebih banyak tekanan."

src: "We are speaking about three generations of Jews that were sent on the important mission by the Israeli government and made an empty desert into a blossoming garden."
ref: "Kami berbincang mengenai tiga generasi Yahudi yang telah dihantar atas misi penting oleh kerajaan Israel dan menjadikan gurun pasir kosong kepada taman mekar."

src: "Now we will just destroy all these beautiful communities, with their unique agriculture and incredible Judaism - for what?" Sharansky asks.
ref: "Sekarang kami hanya akan memusnahkan segala masyarakat yang indah, dengan pertanian yang unik dan prinsip Yahudi yang unik - untuk apa?" Sharansky bertanya.

src: The German city of Munich has delayed the start of its planed migration to Linux till 2006.
ref: Bandar Jerman Munich telah menangguh permulaan pertukaran terancang kepada Linux hingga 2006.

src: The migration was originally due to start this year, three years after the decision to migrate to Linux was made.
ref: Pertukaran itu pada asalnya dijadualkan bermula tahun ini, tiga tahun selepas keputusan untuk berhijrah ke Linux dibuat.

src: Peter Hofmann, the project leader of the migration said the delay was because the "pilot was more important than we first thought and should last longer."
ref: Peter Hofmann, ketua projek migrasi tersebut berkata kelewatan adalah kerana "perintis adalah lebih penting daripada yang kita fikir dahulu dan harus berkekal lebih lama."

src: Once the pilot is completed all the departments will eventually be migrated to Linux and OpenOffice.org.
ref: Apabila perintis itu dilengkapi semua jabatan akhirnya akan bertukar ke Linux dan OpenOffice.org.

src: On May 28, 2003 Germany's third-largest city, voted to move to open source software.
ref: Pada 28 Mei, 2003 bandar ketiga terbesar Jerman, mengundi untuk bertukar ke perisian sumber terbuka.

src: Munich made the decision to switch after Microsoft discontinued support for their current OS, Windows NT 4.
ref: Munich membuat keputusan untuk menukar selepas sokongan Microsoft dihentikan untuk OS semasa mereka, Windows NT 4.

src: While Suse was very involved in the early phases, Debian was ultimately selected to replace Windows on 14,000 desktops.
ref: Walaupun Suse sangat terlibat dalam fasa awal, Debian akhirnya dipilih untuk menggantikan Windows di kalangan 14,000 komputer meja.

src: The migration is estimated to cost between 30 and 34 million euros, once complete would affect approximately 16,000 users.
ref: Pertukaran tersebut dianggar berbelanja antara 30 dan 34 juta euro, sekiranya lengkap akan mempengaruhi kira-kira 16,000 pengguna.

src: The first department to migrate to Linux and OpenOffice.org will be the office of the Lord Mayor planed for the middle of 2006, though not all of the department's computers will be immediately migrated.
ref: Jabatan pertama yang akan berpindah kepada Linux dan OpenOffice.org adalah pejabat Datuk Bandar yang dirancang bagi pertengahan tahun 2006, walaupun bukan semua komputer jabatan itu akan segera ditukarkan.

src: Peter Hofmann said "Some departments will start with OpenOffice on Windows, others will start with OpenOffice on Linux".
ref: Peter Hofmann berkata "Beberapa jabatan akan bermula dengan OpenOffice pada Windows, yang lain akan bermula dengan OpenOffice pada Linux."

src: The President of the Hellenic Republic, Carolos Papoulias, attended the inauguration ceremony of the Greek Orthodox Church of the Annunciation in Alexandria, Egypt.
ref: Presiden Republik Hellenic, Carolos Papoulias, menghadiri majlis perasmian gereja Yunani Ortodoks untuk upacara "Annunciation" di Alexandria, Mesir.

src: The ceremony was blessed by the Ecumenical Patriarch of Constantinople, Bartholomew.
ref: Majlis ini diberkati oleh Ketua Constantinople untuk seluruh gereja Kristian, Bartholomew.

src: Also attending, in addition to the Greek President, were two ministers of the Greek government, a former Prime Minister of Greece, many Greek businessmen and the Orthodox bishops of Africa.
ref: Turut hadir, selain daripada Presiden Yunani, dua menteri kerajaan Yunani, bekas Perdana Menteri Yunani, banyak ahli perniagaan Yunani dan biskop-biskop Ortodoks Afrika.

src: The development of the Church of the Annunciation in Alexandria has been financed by the Onassis Foundation.
ref: Pembangunan Gereja Annunciation di Alexandria telah dibiayai oleh Yayasan Onassis.

src: Tomorrow, President Papoulias will meet unofficially in Cairo with President Hosni Mubarak of Egypt.
ref: Esok, Presiden Papoulias akan bertemu secara tidak rasmi dengan Presiden Hosni Mubarak dari Mesir di Kaherah.

src: The United Nations has confirmed that its convoy in Syria was bombed this afternoon while a human rights group reported a Syrian military attack on civilians at a nearby funeral in the Syrian town of Khan Sheikhoun in Idlib province today.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah mengesahkan bahawa konvoinya di Syria telah dibom petang ini manakala sekumpulan hak asasi manusia melaporkan serangan tentera Syria ke atas orang awam di majlis pengebumian yang berhampiran di bandar Syria Khan Sheikhoun di wilayah Idlib hari ini.

src: Just prior to the bombing of the UN convoy at around 1400 Eastern European Time (UTC+2), the Syrian military is said to have attacked a funeral procession and reportedly 20 people were killed in that incident.
ref: Sejurus sebelum pengeboman konvoi PBB itu pada kira-kira 1400 Waktu Eropah Timur (UTC + 2), tentera Syria dikatakan telah menyerang perarakan pengebumian dan dilaporkan 20 orang terbunuh dalam kejadian itu.

src: The attack on civilians by the Syrian military was reported by the Syrian Observatory for Human Rights.
ref: Serangan terhadap orang awam oleh tentera Syria dilaporkan oleh Balai Cerap Syria bagi Hak Asasi Manusia.

src: According to Martin Nesirky, who is the UN spokesperson for Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon, an IED bomb struck its four-vehicle convoy.
ref: Menurut Martin Nesirky, jurucakap PBB untuk Setiausaha Agung Ban Ki-moon, satu bom IED melanda konvoi yang berempat kenderaan itu.

src: UN personnel had to be left behind after the blast but no UN staff were injured.
ref: Kakitangan PBB terpaksa ditinggalkan selepas letupan itu tetapi tiada kakitangan PBB cedera.

src: Later, the UN sent a patrol to pick up personnel left behind.
ref: Kemudian, PBB menghantar pasukan peronda untuk mengambil kakitangan yang ditinggalkan.

src: A video uploaded to the video sharing website YouTube reportedly shows the UN convoy being targeted and bombed.
ref: Satu video yang dimuat naik ke laman web perkongsian video YouTube dilaporkan menunjukkan konvoi PBB yang menjadi sasaran dan dibom.

src: About a dozen civilians can be seen surrounding the lead car of the convoy talking to UN observers.
ref: Kira-kira sedozen orang awam boleh dilihat mengelilingi kereta pendahuluan konvoi yang bercakap dengan pemerhati PBB.

src: Several seconds later, a bomb explodes near what appears to be the lead car of the convoy severely damaging the front end of the vehicle and injuring several civilians.
ref: Beberapa saat kemudian, satu bom meletup berhampiran kereta yang nampaknya kereta pendahuluan konvoi dan merosakkan bahagian hadapan kenderaan dengan teruk dan mencederakan beberapa orang awam.

src: The lead car, still operating, begins to leave the area.
ref: Kereta pendahuluan itu, masih beroperasi, mula meninggalkan kawasan itu.

src: According to reports, several civilians were injured and or killed in the attack.
ref: Menurut laporan, beberapa orang awam cedera dan atau terbunuh dalam serangan itu.

src: The UN has reportedly stated that none of their observers were injured.
ref: PBB telah dilaporkan menyatakan bahawa tiada pemerhati mereka yang cedera.

src: "We went to observe and after a while shooting occurred; We are safe with the Free Army and we are waiting for a [U.N.] group to pick us up," said UN observers to Reuters.
ref: "Kami pergi untuk memerhati dan sejurus selepas itu tembak-menembak berlaku; Kami selamat dengan Tentera Bebas dan kami menunggu satu [PBB] kumpulan untuk menjemput kami," kata pemerhati PBB kepada Reuters.

src: According to reports, the UN is seeking "to remove the observers from the area."
ref: Menurut laporan-laporan itu, PBB sedang berikhtiar "untuk memindahkan pemerhati-pemerhati dari kawasan itu."

src: It is not yet known who was responsible for the attack on the UN convoy.
ref: Masih tidak diketahui siapa yang bertanggungjawab atas serangan ke atas konvoi PBB.

src: Governor Tim Pawlenty of Minnesota signed a bill into law on Thursday that requires the state to generate a significant amount of its energy needs from renewable sources.
ref: Gabenor Tim Pawlenty Minnesota menandatangani rang undang-undang untuk menjadi undang-undang pada hari Khamis yang menghendaki negeri itu menjana sejumlah besar keperluan tenaga daripada sumber boleh diperbaharui.

src: The amount of power generated by wind turbines in the state stands now at 895 megawatts.
ref: Jumlah kuasa yang dihasilkan oleh turbin angin di negeri itu sekarang adalah 895 megawatt.

src: An additional 5,000 megawatts of energy from renewable sources will need to be added to Minnesota's electricity resources, which is roughly eight times more than the amount that currently comes from renewables.
ref: Tambahan 5,000 megawatt tenaga daripada sumber boleh diperbaharui akan perlu ditambah ke sumber elektrik Minnesota, yang lebih kurang lapan kali lebih daripada jumlah daripada tenaga boleh diperbaharui pada masa ini.

src: The bill signed by the Governor requires energy companies to provide 25 percent of power from renewable sources by 2025.
ref: Rang undang-undang yang ditandatangani oleh Gabenor mewajibkan syarikat-syarikat tenaga menyediakan 25 peratus kuasa daripada sumber yang boleh diperbaharui menjelang tahun 2025.

src: Xcel Energy, which supplies approximately half of the electricity in the state, is required to provide 30 percent from renewable sources by 2020.
ref: Xcel Energy, yang membekalkan kira-kira separuh daripada tenaga elektrik di negeri itu, dikehendaki menyediakan 30 peratus daripada sumber yang boleh diperbaharui menjelang tahun 2020.

src: Wikinews held an exclusive interview with American author and filmmaker Peter John Ross.
ref: Wikinews mengadakan wawancara eksklusif dengan pengarang Amerika dan pembuat filem Peter John Ross.

src: The head of Sonnyboo Productions, an independent film studio based in Columbus, Ohio, he has made numerous short films as well as co-directed a feature, the World War II B-movie Horrors of War.
ref: Ketua Sonnyboo Productions, sebuah studio filem individu yang berpangkalan di Columbus, Ohio, beliau telah memghasilkan banyak filem pendek dan juga mengarahkan satu rencana filem, Perang Dunia II B- filem Kengerian Perang.

src: He has also written a book on filmmaking, Tales from the Front Line of Indie Filmmaking.
ref: Beliau juga telah menulis sebuah buku mengenai pembikinan filem, Dongeng Barisan Hadapan Pembikinan Filem Individu.

src: He says that it "combines helpful articles for beginning filmmakers with narrative tales based on my experiences raising money for features and the crazy personalities that invade the world of microbudget filmmaking."
ref: Beliau mengatakan bahawa ia "menggabungkan artikel-artikel yang berguna untuk pembikin filem baru dengan cerita-cerita berdasarkan pengalaman saya mengumpul wang untuk rencana-rencana filem dan personaliti gila yang menyerbu dunia pembikinan filem microbudget."

src: When asked why he makes movies, Ross replied, "There is no greater thrill than sitting in a room full of strangers watching the stories unfold with flickering pictures and sound."
ref: Apabila ditanya mengapa dia membuat filem, Ross menjawab, "Tidak ada keseronokan yang lebih besar daripada duduk di dalam bilik yang penuh dengan orang yang tidak dikenali menonton cerita terungkap dengan kelipan gambar dan bunyi."

src: "I live for the moments when I can sit there and watch the movies with people I don't know and really feel how they react to what I wrote or directed or edited."
ref: "Saya hidup untuk saat-saat itu apabila saya boleh duduk di sana dan menonton filem dengan orang yang saya tidak kenal dan benar-benar rasa bagaimana mereka bertindak balas terhadap apa yang saya tulis atau arah atau sunting."

src: The remaining three members of the Bali Nine have been sentenced to life in prison by a Denpasar court.
ref: Baki tiga ahli Bali Nine telah dijatuhkan hukuman penjara seumur hidup oleh mahkamah Denpasar.

src: Matthew Norman, 19, Si Yi Chen, 20, and Tan Duc Thanh Nguyen, aged 27 were found guilty of exporting narcotics.
ref: Matthew Norman, 19, Si Yi Chen, 20, dan Tan Duc Thanh Nguyen, berumur 27 didapati bersalah kerana mengeksport bahan narkotik.

src: The court found that the heroin they had been caught with was the same as that found strapped to the bodies of the four others arrested at Denpasar airport.
ref: Mahkamah itu mendapati heroin yang ditangkapi bersama mereka adalah sama seperti yang ditemui diikat pada badan empat orang yang lain ditangkap di lapangan terbang Denpasar.

src: The Australian Federal Police have been criticised for allowing the Bali Nine to travel to Indonesia, where it was known they could face the death penalty.
ref: Polis Persekutuan Australia telah dikritik kerana membenarkan Bali Nine pergi ke Indonesia, tempat yang diketahui mereka berkemungkinan menghadapi hukuman mati.

src: All nine have now been found guilty and sentenced, with seven receiving life in prison, and the two ringleaders being sentenced to death yesterday.
ref: Kesemua sembilan orang kini telah didapati bersalah dan dihukum, dengan tujuh orang menerima penjara seumur hidup, dan kedua-dua ketua kumpulan dijatuhkan hukuman mati semalam.

src: The first leg of the round of sixteen in the UEFA Cup occurred earlier today, with all eight games being played.
ref: Kaki pertama pusingan enam belas dalam Piala UEFA berlaku awal hari ini, dengan kesemua lapan perlawanan yang dimainkan.

src: Spain boasted the most teams in the competition with four (Espanyol, Celta de Vigo, Sevilla, and Osasuna), while England (Tottenham, Newcastle), Portugal (Braga, Benfica), Germany (Bayer Leverkusen, Werder Bremen) and France (Lens, PSG) each had two teams still in the Cup.
ref: Sepanyol bermegah dengan pasukan yang paling banyak bersaing dengan empat (Espanyol, Celta de Vigo, Sevilla dan Osasuna), manakala England (Tottenham, Newcastle), Portugal (Braga, Benfica), Jerman (Bayer Leverkusen, Werder Bremen) dan Perancis (Lens, PSG) masing-masing mempunyai dua pasukan yang masih dalam Piala itu.

src: Other represented countries were Israel (Maccabi Haifa), Scotland (Rangers), Ukraine (Shakhtar Donetsk), and Netherlands (AZ Alkmaar).
ref: Negara-negara wakilan lain ialah Israel (Maccabi Haifa), Scotland (Rangers), Ukraine (Shakhtar Donetsk), dan Belanda (AZ Alkmaar).

src: In a televised Pentagon press briefing Tuesday, U.S. Secretary of Defense Donald Rumsfeld stood by a press release from the Pentagon on Monday that reported explosives and bombs crossed into Iraq from across the Iranian border.
ref: Dalam sidang akhbar dengan televisyen Pentagon pada hari Selasa, Setiausaha Pertahanan Amerika Donald Rumsfeld berhadapan dengan kenyataan akhbar dari Pentagon pada hari Isnin yang melaporkan bahan letupan dan bom yang menyeberang Iraq dari sempadan Iran.

src: It is true that weapons, clearly, unambiguously from Iran have been found in Iraq, Rumsfeld said today.
ref: Memang benar bahawa senjata, dengan jelas sekali dari Iran telah ditemui di Iraq, Rumsfeld, hari ini.

src: Evidence reportedly indicated the quality and sophistication of the weapons was such that they may have been manufactured in Iran, but Rumsfeld was unable or unwilling to describe the weapons further.
ref: Bukti dilaporkan menunjukkan kualiti dan kecanggihan senjata adalah seperti yang mungkin telah dihasilkan di Iran, tetapi Rumsfeld tidak boleh atau tidak ingin menggambarkan senjata itu dengan lanjut.

src: Timing of the Pentagon release coincides with the controversy over Iran restarting its nuclear facilities.
ref: Masa siaran lapor Pentagon serentak dengan kontroversi Iran yang memulakan semula kemudahan nuklearnya.

src: Rumsfeld, with the Chairman of the Joint Chief of Staffs, Richard Myers, said the jihadist effort in Iraq was aimed at inciting civil war, since they realize they cannot directly defeat the coalition.
ref: Rumsfeld, dengan Pengerusi Ketua Staf Bersama, Richard Myers, berkata usaha jihad di Iraq bertujuan menghasut perang saudara, kerana mereka menyedari bahawa mereka tidak boleh secara langsung mengalahkan persatuan itu.

src: Speaking on the issue of border crossings of troops and munitions from Syria and Iran, Rumsfeld implied that those nations don't want progress in to be made in Iraq.
ref: Bercakap mengenai isu sempadan tentera dan bahan api dari Syria dan Iran, Rumsfeld membayangkan bahawa negara-negara itu tidak mahu kemajuan dilakukan di Iraq.

src: The two cited progress by the Iraqi government in working toward the August 15 deadline for drafting a new constitution.
ref: Kedua-dua kemajuan yang dinamakan oleh kerajaan Iraq dalam bekerja ke arah tarikh akhir 15 Ogos untuk merangka perlembagaan baru.

src: In a nod to the possibility that the deadline will be missed, it was said that the constitution could be amended, and that voting on ratification would occur in October of this year, with a general election to follow in December.
ref: Dalam persetujuan kepada kemungkinan bahawa tarikh akhir akan terlepas, adalah dikatakan, perlembagaan boleh dipinda, dan undian atas pengesahan akan berlaku pada bulan Oktober tahun ini, dengan pilihan raya umum berikutan pada bulan Disember.

src: Myers referred to a shift in the Sunni participation in the process, saying, "All indications are that the Sunni leadership in Iraq has made a fundamental decision that they want to be part of the process."
ref: Myers merujuk kepada anjakan dalam penyertaan Sunni dalam proses itu, katanya: "Semua tanda-tanda menunjukkan kepimpinan Sunni di Iraq telah membuat keputusan asas yang mereka mahu menjadi sebahagian daripada proses tersebut."

src: They reasserted previous President Bush statements that there is no clear time-table for an Iraqi withdrawal because it depends on the situation at the time.
ref: Mereka menegaskan sekali lagi kenyataan Presiden Bush sebelum ini bahawa tidak ada jadual waktu yang jelas untuk pengunduran Iraq kerana ia bergantung kepada keadaan pada masa itu.

src: The drawdowns that will occur eventually will obviously be based on those conditions.
ref: Surutan bilangan angkatan tentera yang akan berlaku akhirnya jelas akan secara jelasnya berdasarkan syarat-syarat itu.

src: Further questions by reporters intending to pin down a clear withdrawal time-line were rebuffed.
ref: Soalan-soalan lebih lanjut oleh pemberita-pemberita yang berhasrat untuk menyalahkan waktu pengunduran telah ditolak.

src: Myers said, "You have economic progress that has to be made; you have political progress that has to be made."
ref: Myers berkata, "Anda mempunyai kemajuan ekonomi yang perlu dibuat; Anda mempunyai kemajuan politik yang perlu dibuat."

src: He added that "173,000 Iraqi security forces" are in place in the country, but along with work on the country's infrastructure, much remains to be done with the training and equipping of their security forces.
ref: Beliau menambah bahawa "173,000 pasukan keselamatan Iraq" berada di negara ini, tetapi bekerja bersama-sama dengan infrastruktur negara itu, masih banyak lagi yang perlu dilakukan atas latihan dan pelengkapan pasukan keselamatan mereka.

src: These are figures from a nationwide telephone survey of 1200 individuals conducted by Zogby International from Friday, May 12 through Tuesday, May 16, 2006.
ref: Ini adalah angka dari kaji selidik telefon 1200 individu di seluruh negara yang dilakukan oleh Zogby International dari Jumaat, Mei 12 sehingga Selasa, Mei 16, 2006.

src: The results have a margin of sampling error of +/- 2.9.
ref: Keputusan itu mempunyai margin pensampelan kesilapan +/- 2.9.

src: The poll was commissioned by 911truth.org, a single issue website aimed at pinning the blame of 9/11 on the Bush administration.
ref: Pungutan suara telah dijawatkuasakan oleh 911truth.org, sebuah laman web isu tunggal yang bertujuan untuk menyalahkan kejadian 9/11 atas pentadbiran Bush.

src: The results of this Zogby poll were released last Monday (22 May), but went largely unreported by the mass media, possibly due to bias within the source.
ref: Keputusan pungutan suara Zogby ini telah dibebaskan Isnin lepas (22 Mei), tetapi sebahagian besarnya tidak dilaporkan oleh media masa, mungkin disebabkan oleh berat sebelah dalam sumber itu.

src: Yesterday the Health Ministry claimed that China issued a national ban on smoking in all indoor public spaces.
ref: Semalam Kementerian Kesihatan menyatakan bahawa China mengeluarkan larangan merokok kebangsaan di semua kawasan dalaman awam.

src: The ban is included in the government's 12th Five-Year Plan.
ref: Larangan itu adalah termasuk dalam 12 Rancangan Lima Tahun kerajaan.

src: Also banned is smoking in outdoor public areas where pedestrians pass.
ref: Juga diharamkan adalah merokok di tempat terbuka awam di mana pejalan kaki berlalu.

src: China, with a third of the world's smoking population at 300 million smokers, is the largest cigarette market in the world.
ref: China, dengan satu pertiga daripada penduduk merokok di dunia daripada 300 juta perokok, adalah pasaran rokok terbesar di dunia.

src: Each week approximately 70 percent of non-smoking adults are exposed to second-hand smoke.
ref: Setiap minggu kira-kira 70 peratus orang dewasa yang tidak merokok terdedah kepada asap rokok.

src: According the the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, tobacco-related illnesses kill over one million people annually.
ref: Menurut Pusat Kawalan dan Pencegahan Penyakit China, penyakit yang dikaitkan dengan tembakau membunuh lebih daripada satu juta orang setiap tahun.

src: The World Health Organisation says Chinese smoking-related deaths account for one fifth of deaths from smoking world-wide.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia berkata kematian yang dikaitkan dengan rokok Cina merangkumi satu perlima daripada kematian dari seluruh dunia merokok.

src: The number of deaths are predicted to rise to 3.5 million deaths a year by 2030 if no steps are taken, states a report co-authored by Zhao Ping, deputy director general of the Chinese Cancer Foundation.
ref: Bilangan kematian diramalkan meningkat kepada 3.5 juta kematian setahun menjelang 2030 jika tiada langkah diambil, dinyatakan dalam satu laporan yang dikarang bersama oleh Zhao Ping, Timbalan Ketua Pengarah Kanser Yayasan Cina.

src: Further, there is a spike of new smokers in China as increasingly women, young people and the poor become smokers.
ref: Di samping itu, terdapat permintaan yang mendadak di kalangan perokok baru di China kerana wanita, anak-anak muda dan golongan miskin menjadi perokok.

src: The posting of logos is being required to alert people not to smoke.
ref: Penyiaran logo adalah dikehendaki untuk memberi amaran kepada orang ramai supaya jangan merokok.

src: Vending machines selling cigarettes in public places will be banned as will cigarette advertisements and sponsorships.
ref: Mesin layan diri yang menjual rokok di tempat-tempat awam akan diharamkan sejajar dengan iklan dan penajaan rokok.

src: The new regulations include educational measures to inform people about the dangers of tobacco.
ref: Peraturan-peraturan baru termasuk langkah-langkah pendidikan untuk memberitahu rakyat mengenai bahaya tembakau.

src: A police station of the Spanish Guardia Civil was attacked today Friday by a car bomb in the Basque city of Durango, injuring two policemen.
ref: Sebuah balai polis Spanish Guardia Civil telah diserang hari ini, Jumaat, oleh sebuah kereta yang mempunyai bom di bandar Basque, Durango, mencederakan dua pegawai polis.

src: It is believed to be the first serious attack of the separatist group ETA since it unilaterally ended a cease-fire in June.
ref: Ia dipercayai merupakan serangan pertama yang serius daripada kumpulan pemisah ETA sejak satu pihak menamatkan gencatan senjata api pada Jun.

src: The blast caused serious damage to the police barracks in Durango, shattering windows and damaging police cars parked outside.
ref: Letupan itu menyebabkan kerosakan teruk terhadap berek polis di Durango, memecahkan tingkap dan merosakkan kereta polis yang diletakkan diluar.

src: Police sources believe the bomb, estimated to contain between 80 and 100 kilograms of explosives, was detonated remotely by one of the two attackers who fled in another vehicle.
ref: Sumber polis mempercayai bom itu, dianggarkan mengandungi diantara 80 hingga 100 kilogram bahan letupan, dietupkan dari jauh oleh seorang daripada dua penyerang yang melarikan diri dengan kenderaan lain.

src: Another car exploded about one hour later in the town of Amorebieta, possibly the one used by the activists to flee.
ref: Sebuah kereta lain meletup kira-kira sejam kemudian di bandar Amorebieta, berkemungkinan kereta yang digunakan oleh aktivis itu untuk melarikan diri.

src: ETA detonated two small explosive devices on July 25 along the route that the Tour of France used when the race dipped into northern Spain for a few hours.
ref: ETA meletupkan dua alat letupan kecil pada 25 Julai sepanjang perjalanan yang digunakan oleh Tour de France semasa perlumbaan itu memasuki bahagian utara Spain untuk beberapa jam.

src: ETA called the cease-fire in March 2006, but grew frustrated with a lack of government concessions in ensuing peace talks, and set off a huge bomb in a parking area at Madrid's airport on December 30, killing two people.
ref: ETA membuat gencatan senjata api pada Mac 2006, tetapi menghasilkan kekecewaan kerana kurangnya kata sepakat dalam perbincangan keamanan yang berlaku kemudiannya, dan meletakkan bom besar di sebuah kawasan meletakkan kereta di lapangan terbang Madrid pada 30 Disember, mengorbankan dua orang.

src: It insisted then that the truce was still in effect, but finally declared it formally over in June, and Spanish security forces have been on alert ever since.
ref: Sebelum ini ia berkeras bahawa kedamaian sementara masih dirasai, tetapi akhirnya menyatakan ia dengan rasminya berakhir pada Jun, dan badan keselamatan Spain berada dalam keadaan bersiap sedia sejak itu.

src: Elections in Zimbabwe began with both the ruling and opposition parties predicting victory.
ref: Pilihanraya di Zimbabwe bermula dengan kedua-dua pihak pemerintah dan pihak pembangkang menjangkakan menang.

src: Current president Robert Mugabe predicts a "mountainous victory" for his party, the Zimbabwe African National Union - Patriotic Front (Zanu-PF).
ref: Presiden semasa Robert Mugabe menjangkakan "kemenagan menggunung" untuk partinya, Zimbabwe African National Union - Patriotic Front (Zanu-PF).

src: The main opposition — Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) claims the election is being rigged, and despite being allowed to freely campaign, the government's intimidation of voters and moves to hurt opposition supporters will prevent the MDC win.
ref: Pembangkang utama- Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) mendakwa pilihanraya telah dimanipulasi, dan meskipun dibenarkan untuk bebas berkempen, ugutan pihak kerajaan terhadap pengundi dan gerakan untuk menyakiti penyokong pihak pembangkang akan menghalang MDC untuk menang.

src: The government recently withheld food aid from those supporting the MDC, according to a United Nations report.
ref: Pihak kerajaan baru-baru ini menahan bantuan makanan untuk mereka yang menyokong MDC, menurut laporan Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu.

src: The UN further reports the government dismissed election officials and poll workers suspected of supporting MDC.
ref: UN kemudiannya melaporkan pihak kerajaan memberhentikan pegawai pilihanraya dan pekerja pengundian yang disyaki menyokong DMC.

src: Last week, a Catholic archbishop in Zimbabwe urged followers to start a non-violent, popular uprising against Mugabe, and rallies have been common in recent days.
ref: Minggu lepas, seorang ketua biskop katolik di Zimbabwe menggesa para pengikut untuk memulakan pemberontakan tanpa keganasan menentang Mugabe, dan perhimpunan sudah menjadi kebiasaan di kebelakangan ini.

src: The previous elections, which the MDC almost won, were marred by violence and similar allegations of vote-rigging.
ref: Pilihanraya lepas, dimana MDC hampir menang, dicemari oleh keganasan dan dakwaan selari dengan undian tipu.

src: More than 5.7 million Zimbabweans are registered to vote, and can cast their ballots at one of the more than 8,000 polling stations.
ref: Lebih dari 5.7 juta rakyat Zimbabwe mendaftar untuk mengundi, dan layak untuk membuang undi di salah sebuah dari 8,000 tempat mengudi.

src: On Sunday, a group of 80 people from Beijing and Shanghai landed at Heathrow to become the first Chinese to arrive in the United Kingdom on tourist visas.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, sekumpulan 80 orang dari Beijing dan Shanghai mendarat di Heathrow untuk menjadi warga Cina pertama yang tiba di United Kingdom menggunakan visa pelancong.

src: After protracted negotiations last year, the UK was granted "Approved Destination Status" (ADS) by the People's Republic of China in January 2005.
ref: Selepas rundingan berlarutan tahun lepas, UK telah diberikan "Status Destinasi Diluluskan" (SDD) oleh Republik Rakyat China pada Januari 2005.

src: The agreement will also allow travel companies to establish offices in China to promote tourism to the UK.
ref: Perjanjian itu juga akan membolehkan syarikat-syarikat pelancongan untuk menubuhkan pejabat di China untuk menggalakkan pelancongan ke UK.

src: Before the signing of the agreement, China allowed only students and people on business trips to visit the country.
ref: Sebelum majlis menandatangani perjanjian itu, China hanya membenarkan pelajar-pelajar dan orang-orang di perjalanan perniagaan untuk melawat negara itu.

src: It is estimated that 135,000 people visited the UK last year — just 0.6% of China's external tourism market.
ref: Dianggarkan 135,000 orang melawat UK tahun lepas - hanya 0.6% daripada pasaran pelancongan luar China.

src: The 80 tourists are expected to visit London, Oxfordshire, Stratford-upon-Avon and Scotland, where they will meet the First Minister, Jack McConnell, in Edinburgh Castle.
ref: 80 pelancong dijangka melawat London, Oxfordshire, Stratford-upon-Avon dan Scotland, di mana mereka akan berjumpa dengan Menteri Pertama, Jack McConnell, di Edinburgh Castle.

src: The Duke of York is expected to greet the tourists at the Tower of London later today.
ref: The Duke of York dijangka menyambut pelancong-pelancong di Menara London lewat hari ini.

src: Other destinations will include Liverpool (twinned with Shanghai) and Manchester's Old Trafford stadium, where the football team Manchester United play.
ref: Destinasi lain termasuk Liverpool (berkembar dengan Shanghai) dan stadium Old Trafford Manchester, di mana pasukan bola sepak Manchester United bermain.

src: They have a large following in China and are currently on a Far East tour.
ref: Mereka mempunyai pengikut yang ramai di China dan kini dalam lawatan ke Timur Jauh.

src: They are to play Beijing Hyundai in a friendly match tomorrow.
ref: Mereka akan bertemu Beijing Hyundai dalam perlawanan persahabatan esok.

src: The visit comes after the London attacks earlier this month provoked fears by the British tourist industry of a reduction in tourism to the UK.
ref: Lawatan itu datang selepas serangan London awal bulan ini menimbulkan kebimbangan oleh industri pelancongan British terhadap pengurangan dalam pelancongan ke UK.

src: The UK tourist industry hopes that by 2020, Chinese tourism to the UK will bring £500 million pounds (about $878 million US dollars) annually to the UK economy.
ref: Industri pelancongan UK berharap bahawa pada tahun 2020, pelancongan China ke UK akan membawa £500 juta pound (kira-kira $878 juta dolar Amerika Syarikat) setahun kepada ekonomi UK.

src: Radonski promised a shift towards more of a business-friendly stance: "Those who want progress, jobs, well-managed companies, somewhere we can develop small and medium businesses…everyone who wants that kind of country, come and join my bus for progress".
ref: Radonski menjanjikan peralihan ke arah lebih kepada pendirian mesra perniagaan: "Mereka yang mahu kemajuan, pekerjaan, syarikat-syarikat yang diuruskan dengan berjaya, di suatu tempat kita boleh membangunkan perniagaan kecil dan sederhana...setiap orang yang mahu jenis negara yang macam itu, datang dan sertai bas saya untuk kemajuan."

src: Brett McKenzie is running for the Green Party of Ontario in the Ontario provincial election, in the London North Centre riding.
ref: Brett McKenzie sedang mengambil bahagian untuk Parti Hijau Ontario dalam pilihan raya wilayah Ontario, di London North Centre riding.

src: Wikinews' Nick Moreau interviewed him regarding his values, his experience, and his campaign.
ref: Wikinews Nick Moreau menemuramah beliau mengenai nilai-nilai, pengalaman, dan kempen beliau.

src: Abdelbaset al-Megrahi has been buried in the town of Janzur, west of the Libyan capital Tripoli.
ref: Abdelbaset al-Megrahi telah dikebumikan di bandar Janzur, barat Libya Tripoli.

src: He was the only individual convicted in association with the Lockerbie bombing of 1988.
ref: Beliau adalah satu-satunya individu yang disabitkan dalam persatuan dengan pengeboman Lockerbie tahun 1988.

src: The bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 from London to New York resulted in 270 fatalities, including all 259 of the airplane's occupants and eleven individuals on the ground.
ref: Pengeboman Pesawat Pan Am 103 dari London ke New York menyebabkan 270 kematian, termasuk semua 259 penghuni pesawat dan sebelas individu di atas tanah.

src: 189 of those who died in the incident were US citizens.
ref: 189 orang yang meninggal dunia dalam kejadian itu adalah rakyat Amerika Syarikat.

src: The death toll for this terrorist incident is larger than that for any other which has occurred in the United Kingdom thus far.
ref: Angka kematian kejadian pengganas ini adalah lebih besar daripada kejadian pengganas bagi apa-apa lain yang telah berlaku di United Kingdom setakat ini.

src: Five years later, senior judges in Scotland were to review his case, but he dropped the appeal.
ref: Lima tahun kemudian, hakim-hakim kanan di Scotland mengkaji semula kes itu, tetapi dia membatalkan rayuan itu.

src: Due to suffering from prostate cancer, he was granted a compassionate release from Scottish prison two days later.
ref: Oleh kerana menghidap kanser prostat, dia telah diberikan pelepasan belas kasihan dari penjara Scotland dua hari kemudian.

src: Current UK Prime Minister David Cameron commented on his belief that al-Megrahi "should never have been released from prison" and said his death was an occasion "to remember the 270 people who lost their lives in what was an appalling terrorist act".
ref: Perdana Menteri UK semasa David Cameron mengulas mengenai keyakinannya bahawa al-Megrahi "tidak sepatutnya dibebaskan dari penjara" dan berkata kematiannya adalah kesempatan "untuk mengingati 270 orang yang kehilangan nyawa mereka dalam apa adalah satu tindakan pengganas mengerikan."

src: According to Alex Salmond, First Minister of Scotland, the investigation into the Lockerbie bombing is ongoing.
ref: Menurut Alex Salmond, Menteri Pertama Scotland, siasatan pengeboman Lockerbie sedang dijalankan.

src: Prosecutors, he said, had always thought there were others besides al-Megrahi involved in the attack.
ref: Pendakwa, katanya, telah sentiasa fikir ada orang lain selain al-Megrahi terlibat dalam serangan itu.

src: US citizen Susan Cohen, the mother of one of those killed in the Lockerbie bombing, thought of al-Megrahi as "a mass murderer" who "deserved to die", adding to CNN: "I feel no pity around him".
ref: Warganegara Amerika Syarikat Susan Cohen, ibu kepada salah seorang daripada mereka yang terbunuh dalam pengeboman Lockerbie, menganggap al-Megrahi sebagai "pembunuh besar-besaran" yang "berhak untuk mati," menambah kepada CNN: "Saya berasa tiada simpati di sekelilingnya."

src: "My daughter [Theodora], at age 20, died a brutal, horrible death."
ref: "Anak perempuan saya [Theodora], ketika berusia 20 tahun, meninggal dunia yang kejam, kematian mengerikan."

src: However, UK citizen Jim Swire, father of another victim of the bombing, believes al-Megrahi was not guilty.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, warga UK Jim Swire, bapa mangsa lain daripada pengeboman, percaya al-Megrahi tidak bersalah.

src: He described al-Megrahi's death as "a sad time", telling the BBC he was "satisfied for some years that this man was nothing to do with the murder of my daughter".
ref: Dia menyifatkan kematian al-Megrahi sebagai "masa yang sedih," memberitahu BBC beliau "berpuas hati untuk beberapa tahun bahawa orang ini tiada kaitan dengan pembunuhan anak perempuan saya."

src: According to a report released by the South African Broadcasting Corporation (SABC), a warrant has been issued by the South African National Prosecuting Authority (NPA), which operates separately from the police, for the arrest of Jackie Selebi national commissioner of the South African police and president of Interpol.
ref: Menurut laporan yang dikeluarkan oleh Perbadanan Penyiaran Afrika Selatan (PPAS), waran telah dikeluarkan oleh Pihak Berkuasa Pendakwaraya Kebangsaan Afrika Selatan (PBPKAS), yang beroperasi secara berasingan daripada pihak polis, bagi penangkapan Jackie Selebi pesuruhjaya kebangsaan polis Afrika Selatan dan presiden Interpol.

src: Recent media coverage of the murder of Brett Kebble have raised questions of the close friendship between Jackie Selebi and Glenn Agliotti.
ref: Liputan media baru-baru ini bagi pembunuhan Brett Kebble telah menimbulkan persoalan terhadap persahabatan yang erat antara Jackie Selebi dan Glenn Agliotti.

src: Agliotti was later arrested in connection with the murder of Brett Kebble.
ref: Agliotti kemudiannya ditahan yang dikaitan dengan pembunuhan Brett Kebble.

src: Agliotti is alleged to have strong links with organized crime and racketeering.
ref: Agliotti didakwa mempunyai hubungan yang kukuh dengan jenayah terancang dan penipuan.

src: Venus Williams triumphed over Marion Bartoli of France 6-4, 6-1 yesterday to win the Women's Singles event at the 2007 Wimbledon Championships.
ref: Venus Williams menang atas Marion Bartoli dari Perancis 6-4, 6-1 semalam untuk memenangi acara perseorangan wanita pada 2007 Kejohanan Wimbledon.

src: For the first time, an American and Frenchwoman were matched up to compete for the British women's singles title.
ref: Buat kali pertama, wanita Perancis dan Amerika telah dipadankan untuk bersaing untuk gelaran perseorangan wanita British.

src: A Wimbledon champion in 2000, 2001 and 2005, Williams was not the favorite to win the title again this year.
ref: Juara Wimbledon pada tahun 2000, 2001 dan 2005, Williams tidak menjadi pilihan untuk memenangi gelaran sekali lagi tahun ini.

src: Currently ranked 23rd in the world, she entered the tournament in the shadow of her sister, Serena Williams.
ref: Kini menduduki tempat ke-23 di dunia, dia memasuki kejohanan di bayangan kakaknya, Serena Williams.

src: At the beginning of the tennis season, Serena stated her own determination to reclaim the No. 1 ranking.
ref: Pada awal musim tenis, Serena dinyatakan penentuan sendiri untuk menuntut semula ranking No. 1.

src: Serena showed better than Venus at the French Open by reaching the quarter finals, and won the Australian Open in January (Venus dropped out due to an injury).
ref: Serena menunjukkan lebih baik daripada Venus di Terbuka Perancis dengan layak ke peringkat suku akhir, dan memenangi Terbuka Australia pada bulan Januari (Venus tercicir akibat kecederaan).

src: In spite of her initial strength, Serena's hopes to dominate the tournament were cut short when she lost to No. 1 seeded Justine Henin in the quarterfinals.
ref: Walaupun kekuatan awal beliau, harapan Serena untuk menguasai kejohanan itu dipotong pendek apabila dia tewas kepada pemain pilihan No. 1 Justine Henin pada suku akhir.

src: Bartoli, the eighteenth seed for this year's championships, had never progressed past the fourth round of any Grand Slam event.
ref: Bartoli, pilihan kelapan belas untuk kejohanan tahun ini, tidak pernah berkembang melepasi pusingan keempat mana-mana acara Grand Slam.

src: However, she progressed to the final by defeating third seed Jelena Janković in the fourth round and Justine Henin in the semifinals in one of the major upsets of Wimbledon history.
ref: Bagaimanapun, beliau mara ke perlawanan akhir dengan mengalahkan pemain pilihan ketiga, Jelena Jankovic pada pusingan keempat dan Justine Henin pada separuh akhir dalam salah satu gangguan utama dalam sejarah Wimbledon.

src: As Henin lost to Bartoli in the semifinals, Venus Williams was poised to become the lowest seeded player in recorded history to win the Wimbledon singles title.
ref: Sebagai Henin kalah kepada Bartoli di separuh akhir, Venus Williams telah bersedia untuk menjadi pemain yang paling rendah pemain pilihan dalam catatan sejarah untuk memenangi kejuaraan Wimbledon.

src: With powerhouse serves and an aggressive ground strokes battle, she did just that.
ref: Dengan kuasa berfungsi dan tanah agresif sebatan pertempuran, dia berbuat demikian.

src: Williams comfortably knocked out Bartoli in two straight sets, with match point accidentally striking Bartoli in the wrist.
ref: Williams selesa menyingkirkan Bartoli dalam dua set lurus, dengan perlawanan titik sengaja menarik Bartoli di pergelangan tangan.

src: Venus was reunited with the Venus Rosewater Dish on Centre Court during the trophy ceremony.
ref: Venus telah bersatu semula dengan Dish Venus Rosewater di Centre Court semasa majlis trofi.

src: Another first, the All England Club is paying men's and women's singles champions equal prize money.
ref: Satu lagi yang pertama, All England Club adalah membayar juara perseorangan lelaki dan wanita sama hadiah wang.

src: Venus was paid $1.407 million, to which she replied "Thank you, All England Club - we're playing under equal terms."
ref: Venus telah dibayar $1.407 juta, yang dia menjawab "Terima kasih, All England Club - Kami bermain di bawah terma yang sama."

src: The men's final takes place later today with first seed and defending champion Roger Federer taking on second seed Rafael Nadal in a repeat of last year's final.
ref: Akhir lelaki berlaku lewat hari ini dengan pilihan utama dan juara bertahan Roger Federer mengambil pilihan kedua, Rafael Nadal dalam ulangan perlawanan akhir tahun lalu.

src: The Congressional Hispanic Caucus has blocked voting on legislation that would allow employers to rehire foreign seasonal workers.
ref: Kongres Hispanik Kaukus telah menyekat mengundi pada undang-undang yang akan membolehkan majikan untuk mengambil semula pekerja asing bermusim.

src: This year, the U.S. government will only issue 33,000 visas for winter workers and 33,000 for summer workers.
ref: Pada tahun ini, kerajaan Amerika Syarikat hanya mengeluarkan 33,000 visa pekerja musim sejuk dan 33,000 untuk pekerja musim panas.

src: This comes as a stark comparison to 2007, when 120,000 foreign workers entered the U.S. with H-2B visas.
ref: Ini datang sebagai perbandingan sekali dengan tahun 2007, apabila 120,000 pekerja asing memasuki Amerika Syarikat dengan visa H-2B.

src: Currently, the reduction in visas is having profounds effects on both Mexico and U.S.
ref: Pada masa ini, pengurangan dalam visa memberi kesan yang mendalam keatas kedua-dua Mexico dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: In Tlapacoyan, a Mexican town which in the last 30 years has exported a large seasonal workforce, using H-2B visas, to work in U.S. circuses and carnivals, the effects are already a stark reality.
ref: Di Tlapacoyan, sebuah bandar Mexico yang pada 30 tahun yang lalu telah mengeksport tenaga kerja bermusim yang besar, menggunakan visa H-2B, untuk bekerja di sarkas Amerika Syarikat dan karnival, kesan itu sudah menjadi realiti.

src: The local economy has been paralyzed, and unemployment has reached dramatic highs.
ref: Ekonomi tempatan telah lumpuh, dan pengangguran telah mencapai paras tertinggi dramatik.

src: The lack of money being pumped into the local economy has caused many businesses to close, and the construction of the town's new church has come to a screeching halt.
ref: Kekurangan wang dipam ke dalam ekonomi tempatan telah menyebabkan banyak perniagaan ditutup, dan pembinaan gereja baru di bandar ini telah terhenti.

src: Additionally, residents like Pablo Juarez Mendoza, who last year made $450 working in Texan livestock shows, are having difficulties finding local work.
ref: Selain itu, penduduk seperti Pablo Juarez Mendoza, yang tahun lepas yang dibuat $450 bekerja di rancangan ternakan Texan, yang menghadapi masalah mencari pekerjaan tempatan.

src: Those that do, are only making an average of $50 per week.
ref: Mereka yang berbuat demikian, hanya membuat purata $50 seminggu.

src: U.S. businesses are getting ready to face their own set of economical obstacles caused by the lack of cheap labor.
ref: Perniagaan Amerika Syarikat bersiap sedia untuk menghadapi set mereka sendiri halangan ekonomi yang disebabkan oleh kekurangan tenaga buruh yang murah.

src: Many employers are finding creative ways to cut costs, including scaling back operations.
ref: Ramai majikan yang mencari cara-cara kreatif untuk mengurangkan kos, termasuk penskalaan kembali beroperasi.

src: In Cape Cod, for example, the local chamber of commerce reports that town employers will only receive 15 of the 5,000 visas requested.
ref: Di Cape Cod, sebagai contoh, ruang tempatan perdagangan melaporkan bahawa majikan bandar hanya akan menerima 15 daripada 5,000 visa diminta.

src: In response, local Cape Cod business owner, Williman Zammer, has called the situation "a major crisis," and states that what the Hispanic Caucus is doing is "ruthless."
ref: Sebagai tindak balas, pemilik perniagaan Cape Cod tempatan, Williman Zammer, menyeru keadaan "krisis besar," dan menyatakan bahawa apa yang Hispanik Kaukus lakukan adalah "kejam."

src: Opponents of the change state that recent legislation blocking is part of the Caucus' efforts to push for comprehensive immigration reform, not seen in the U.S. since the early 1980s.
ref: Penentang nyatakan perubahan bahawa undang-undang menyekat baru-baru ini adalah sebahagian daripada usaha Kaukus 'untuk mendesak reformasi imigresen menyeluruh, tidak dilihat di Amerika Syarikat sejak awal 1980-an.

src: Hispanic Caucus Chairman, Rep. Joe Baca, D-California, hopes that policymakers will place attention not only on helping small businesses, but also on what to do with 12 million illegal immigrants currently residing in the U.S., and improving border security.
ref: Pengerusi Hispanik Kaukus, Rep. Joe Baca, D-California, berharap dasar akan meletakkan perhatian bukan sahaja kepada membantu perniagaan kecil, tetapi juga kepada apa yang perlu dilakukan dengan 12 juta pendatang tanpa izin kini menetap di Amerika Syarikat, dan meningkatkan keselamatan sempadan.

src: The issue of immigration has become a polarizing subject in the U.S., and one that has been an intrinsic part of the fabric that makes up the American society.
ref: Isu imigresen telah menjadi subjek polarisasi di Amerika Syarikat, dan satu yang telah menjadi aspek penting dalam kain yang membentuk masyarakat Amerika.

src: Since 2006, the U.S. accepts more legal immigrants as permanent residents than any other country in the world.
ref: Sejak tahun 2006, Amerika Syarikat menerima lebih pendatang undang-undang sebagai penduduk tetap berbanding negara-negara lain di dunia.

src: That same year, a NBC/Wall Street Journal poll revealed that the U.S. public was equally divided on the whether immigration helps or hurts the country.
ref: Pada tahun yang sama, satu tinjauan NBC/Wall Street Journal mendedahkan bahawa rakyat Amerika telah sama-sama bersetuju mengenai sama ada imigresen membantu atau menyakitkan negara ini.

src: Forty-four percent said it helped, forty-five percent said it hurt.
ref: Empat puluh empat peratus mengatakan ia membantu, empat puluh lima peratus berkata ia menyakitkan.

src: However, a recent Pew Research Center study suggests that the issue will remain at the forefront of the American political agenda for many years to come.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kajian terkini Pusat Penyelidikan Pew menunjukkan bahawa isu ini akan kekal di barisan hadapan dalam agenda politik Amerika untuk beberapa tahun akan datang.

src: The study revealed that by 2050, one in five Americans will be foreign-born, and the overall U.S. population will double to 438 million.
ref: Kajian ini mendedahkan bahawa pada tahun 2050, satu dalam lima rakyat Amerika akan lahir di luar negara, dan penduduk Amerika Syarikat secara keseluruhan akan berganda kepada 438 juta.

src: The U.S Latino population will account for 30% of the population, while Asians will account for 9%.
ref: Amerika Syarikat penduduk Latino akan menyumbang 30% daripada penduduk, manakala penduduk Asia akan menyumbang kepada 9%.

src: Thus, what we see unfolding is a U.S. where minorities will become the majority, and drastic cultural and societal changes seem almost certain.
ref: Oleh itu, apa yang kita lihat berlaku ialah minoriti di Amerika Syarikat akan menjadi majoriti, dan perubahan budaya drastik dan masyarakat seolah-olah hampir pasti.

src: The study seems to also hint that this growth is in many ways connected to legislation passed by Congress in 1965, that abolished a quota system that had nearly ended immigration from non-European countries since the 1920s, and consequently caused an immigration surge.
ref: Kajian ini seolah-olah juga petunjuk bahawa pertumbuhan ini adalah dalam pelbagai cara berhubung dengan undang-undang yang diluluskan oleh Kongres pada tahun 1965, yang dihapuskan sistem kuota yang telah hampir berakhir imigresen daripada negara-negara bukan Eropah sejak tahun 1920-an, dan seterusnya menyebabkan lonjakan imigresen.

src: The United Nations and French peacekeeping forces say they will not leave the Ivory Coast despite orders from incumbent president Laurent Gbagbo to leave the country.
ref: Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan tentera pengaman Perancis mengatakan mereka tidak akan meninggalkan Ivory Coast walaupun arahan daripada presiden penyandang Laurent Gbagbo untuk meninggalkan negara ini.

src: Secretary General of the UN Ban Ki-moon said in a statement that the UN in the Ivory Coast will "fulfill its mandate and will continue to monitor and document any human rights violations, incitement to hatred and violence, or attacks on U.N. peacekeepers."
ref: Setiausaha Agung UN Ban Ki-moon berkata dalam satu kenyataan bahawa UN bahawa Ivory Coast akan "memenuhi mandat dan akan terus memantau dan mendokumenkan sebarang pelanggaran hak asasi manusia, hasutan kepada kebencian dan keganasan, atau serangan ke atas pasukan pengaman UN."

src: He also called the orders for all peacekeeping troops to leave the nation irrelevant and without effect, adding that the UN does not believe Gbagbo is the legal president.
ref: Beliau juga memanggil pesanan untuk semua tentera pengaman untuk meninggalkan negara ini tidak relevan dan tanpa kesan, sambil menambah bahawa UN tidak percaya Gbagbo adalah presiden undang-undang.

src: "The president-elect is Ouattara and he hasn't asked us to leave," added the UN.
ref: "Presiden-umat pilihan adalah Ouattara dan dia tidak meminta kami untuk meninggalkan," kata UN.

src: In the United Kingdom, the music video for this Christmas' remake of the charity single Do They Know It's Christmas? was launched simultaneously today (Thursday) on several UK and Irish television channels including BBC One, BBC Two, RTE 1, ITV1, Channel 4, and Sky One.
ref: Di United Kingdom, video muzik untuk pembuatan semula ini Krismas single amal Adakah Mereka Tahu Ia Krismas? telah dilancarkan secara serentak hari ini (Khamis) di beberapa saluran televisyen UK dan Ireland termasuk BBC One, BBC Two, RTE 1, ITV1, Channel 4, dan Sky One.

src: The song was originally recorded in 1984 by several of the biggest artists of the time including Bono, Bob Geldof, Paul McCartney and George Michael.
ref: Lagu ini pada asalnya direkodkan pada tahun 1984 oleh beberapa artis hebat pada masa itu termasuk Bono, Bob Geldof, Paul McCartney dan George Michael.

src: This year, in celebration of 20 years since the first single, the song has been remade by over 50 of today's best selling artists, including Coldplay frontman Chris Martin, Robbie Williams, Bono, Justin Hawkins of The Darkness and Dido.
ref: Tahun ini, untuk meraikan 20 tahun sejak single pertama, lagu ini telah dibuat semula oleh lebih 50 daripada jualan terbaik artis hari ini, termasuk orang depan Coldplay Chris Martin, Robbie Williams, Bono, Justin Hawkins dari The Darkness dan Dido.

src: The song, which is in aid of charity, is already tipped to be the Christmas No. 1 in the UK and Ireland.
ref: Lagu itu, yang berada dalam bantuan kebajikan, sudah disebut-sebut sebagai Krismas No. 1 di UK dan Ireland.

src: The song will also be launched as a charity mobile phone ringtone to raise funds for Sudan's troubled Darfur region.
ref: Lagu ini juga akan dilancarkan sebagai nada dering telefon bimbit amal untuk mengumpul dana bagi rantau Darfur bermasalah Sudan.

src: Mycokemusic.com said it was going to put the track on its website from Thursday with all profits to be donated to charity.
ref: Mycokemusic.com berkata ia akan meletakkan trek di laman webnya dari hari Khamis dengan semua keuntungan akan disumbangkan kepada badan amal.

src: The single will be available to buy in shops from the 29 November.
ref: Single ini boleh didapati untuk membeli di kedai-kedai dari 29 November.

src: Pakistani armed forces say they have captured the town of Kotkai on Saturday, the hometown of Taliban Chief Hakimullah Mehsud and one of his top officers, Qari Hussain.
ref: Angkatan tentera Pakistan berkata, mereka telah menangkap bandar Kotkai pada hari Sabtu, kampung halaman Taliban Ketua Hakimullah Mehsud dan salah seorang daripada pegawai atasan beliau, Qari Hussain.

src: This comes after a week-long battle was launched on Monday, in part of an operation to curb the influence of the Taliban in South Waziristan.
ref: Ini datang selepas pertempuran selama seminggu yang telah dilancarkan pada hari Isnin, dalam sebahagian daripada operasi untuk membendung pengaruh Taliban di Waziristan Selatan.

src: The operation began the previous Saturday when Pakistani forces approached from three separate areas of South Waziristan.
ref: Operasi itu bermula hari Sabtu sebelumnya apabila tentera Pakistan didekati dari tiga kawasan berasingan di Selatan Waziristan.

src: Pakistan plans to trap Taliban within the area while approaching the towns of Makeen and Ladha, both of which are major Taliban strongholds.
ref: Pakistan merancang untuk memerangkap Taliban dalam kawasan sambil mengadap ke arah bandar-bandar Makeen dan Ladha, kedua-duanya adalah kubu kuat utama Taliban.

src: Major General Athar Abbas, the chief spokesman for the military, said at a news briefing that "we have complete control of Kotkai, a stronghold of the terrorists, where most of the houses had been converted into strong bunkers."
ref: Mejar Jeneral Athar Abbas, ketua jurucakap kepada tentera, berkata pada taklimat berita bahawa "kita mempunyai kawalan penuh terhadap Kotkai, kubu kuat pengganas, di mana kebanyakan rumah telah ditukar menjadi kubu kuat."

src: So far, Pakistani officials have reported that 163 militants have been killed, while the military sustained 23 casualties.
ref: Setakat ini, pegawai Pakistan telah melaporkan bahawa 163 militan terbunuh, manakala 23 tenteranya mengalami kemalangan jiwa.

src: The entire area has been closed off, but there have been recent acts of violence which have officials worried.
ref: Seluruh kawasan telah ditutup, tetapi baru-baru ini terdapat perbuatan keganasan yang menyebabkan pegawai-pegawai bimbang.

src: In recent weeks, Pakistan has seen attacks on police centers, military headquarters and a UN building.
ref: Dalam beberapa minggu kebelakangan ini, Pakistan telah menyaksikan serangan ke atas pusat-pusat polis, ibu pejabat tentera dan sebuah bangunan UN.

src: There have also been five attacks on an Islamic university in Islamabad, the capital.
ref: Terdapat juga lima serangan ke atas sebuah universiti Islam di Islamabad, ibu negara.

src: It has been reported that over 21,000 civilian families, an estimated 153,000 individuals, have fled South Waziristan, and have taken refuge in the North-West Frontier Province.
ref: Ia telah dilaporkan bahawa lebih 21,000 keluarga orang awam, kira-kira 153,000 individu, telah melarikan diri ke Selatan Waziristan, dan telah mengambil perlindungan di North-West Frontier Province.

src: According to an original Reuters report, Venezuela's President Hugo Chavez is moving his Bolivarian Revolution forward by nationalizing more private companies and clamping down against his opponents.
ref: Menurut laporan asal Reuters, Presiden Venezuela Hugo Chavez menggerakkan Revolusi Bolivarian ke hadapan dengan memiliknegarakan lebih banyak syarikat swasta dan pengapit menurunkan kepada lawannya.

src: Some oil service companies were nationalized earlier this month along with other sectors like banking, cement and steel.
ref: Beberapa syarikat perkhidmatan minyak telah dinegarakan awal bulan ini bersama-sama dengan sektor-sektor lain seperti perbankan, simen dan keluli.

src: Cited by Reuters, Chavez said on Saturday "We are proceeding and will continue to proceed with nationalizations of strategic sectors."
ref: Dipetik oleh Reuters, Chavez berkata pada hari Sabtu "Kami meneruskan perjalanan dan akan terus meneruskan nationalizations sektor strategik."

src: According to The Financial Post, expropriation of oil service companies follows their dispute with Petróleos de Venezuela (PDVSA), the State-owned oil company.
ref: Menurut The Financial Post, rampasan syarikat-syarikat perkhidmatan minyak berikut pertikaian mereka dengan Petroleos de Venezuela (PDVSA), syarikat minyak milik negara itu.

src: Past election victories since 1997 have strengthened Chavez's control and popularity (with more than 60% approval rating).
ref: Kemenangan pilihan raya lalu sejak 1997 telah mengukuhkan kawalan Chavez dan populariti (dengan lebih daripada 60% penarafan kelulusan).

src: He won a February referendum amending the constitution and letting him stay in power until he is not re-elected.
ref: Beliau memenangi referendum Februari yang meminda perlembagaan dan membiarkan dia terus berkuasa sehingga dia tidak dilantik semula.

src: Chavez, cited by Reuters, told party activists in April "I've said it before and I repeat, we must keep up the offensive, bulldozing the counter-revolution."
ref: Chavez, yang dipetik oleh Reuters, kepada aktivis parti pada bulan April "Saya telah katakan sebelum ini dan saya ulangi, kita mesti bersaing serangan, meratakan balas revolusi."

src: But the financial crisis, especially the low oil prices for the last months, has crippled his social revolution.
ref: Tetapi krisis kewangan, terutama harga minyak yang rendah untuk bulan-bulan yang lalu, telah melumpuhkan revolusi sosial.

src: During the last years, Chavez relied on high oil prices to push his social agenda.
ref: Pada tahun-tahun lalu, Chavez bergantung kepada harga minyak yang tinggi untuk menolak agenda sosialnya.

src: With the shortening of cash, Chavez cannot use oil revenues anymore to finance his budget.
ref: Dengan memendekkan tunai, Chavez tidak boleh menggunakan hasil minyak lagi untuk membiayai belanjawan.

src: This wave of expropriation and the conflicts with oil service companies seems to reflect a desperate move to tackle the crisis, despite Chavez's words that the country is "well-equipped to weather the global recession."
ref: Gelombang rampasan dan konflik dengan syarikat-syarikat perkhidmatan minyak seolah-olah menggambarkan tindakan terdesak untuk menangani krisis itu, walaupun kata-kata Chavez bahawa negara ini adalah "yang lengkap untuk mengharungi kemelesetan global."

src: Australian Prime Minister John Howard has announced that leaders of APEC nations have agreed on "aspirational goals" on climate change.
ref: Perdana Menteri Australia, John Howard telah mengumumkan bahawa pemimpin negara APEC bersetuju mengenai "matlamat aspirasi" tentang perubahan iklim.

src: The agreement, which Prime Minister Howard calls the Sydney declaration focuses on reducing energy intensity (the amount of energy used to produce a dollar of gross domestic product), reforestation and technology sharing.
ref: Perjanjian itu, yang Perdana Menteri Howard memanggil akuan Sydney memberi tumpuan kepada mengurangkan intensiti tenaga (jumlah tenaga yang digunakan untuk menghasilkan satu dolar daripada keluaran dalam negara kasar), penanaman semula hutan dan perkongsian teknologi.

src: Despite Australia, the United States and China being non-signatories to the United Nations' Kyoto protocol on greenhouse gas reductions which is set to expire in 2012, the APEC accord calls for "We call for a post-2012 international climate change arrangement ... that strengthens, broadens and deepens the current arrangement and leads to reduced global emissions of greenhouse gases," according to the draft declaration.
ref: Walaupun Australia, Amerika Syarikat dan China yang bukan penandatangan-ke Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu Kyoto protokol pada pengurangan gas rumah hijau yang akan tamat pada tahun 2012, perjanjian APEC memerlukan "Kami memanggil antarabangsa susunan perubahan iklim pasca 2012...yang menguatkan, meluaskan dan mendalami perkiraan semasa dan membawa kepada mengurangkan pelepasan global gas rumah hijau," menurut draf deklarasi.

src: The declaration as agreed upon will be released on Sunday.
ref: Pengisytiharan seperti yang dipersetujui akan dikeluarkan pada hari ini.

src: The draft agreement recognised that action was required to "slow, stop and reverse" greenhouse gas emissions; that nations should vow to reduce energy intensity by 25 percent by 2030; that forest cover in the region should be increased by 50 million acres by 2020; and that APEC nations will work with other nations to find a solution to climate change.
ref: Draf perjanjian mengiktiraf tindakan yang diperlukan untuk "perlahan, berhenti dan membalikkan" pelepasan gas rumah hijau; bahawa negara-negara perlu bersumpah untuk mengurangkan intensiti tenaga sebanyak 25 peratus pada tahun 2030;, litupan hutan di rantau ini perlu ditambah sebanyak 50 juta ekar pada tahun 2020; dan bahawa negara-negara APEC akan bekerjasama dengan negara-negara lain untuk mencari penyelesaian kepada perubahan iklim.

src: The declaration is non-binding and is simply a statement of goals to which the nations will try to achieve.
ref: Perisytiharan itu adalah tidak terikat dan hanya kenyataan matlamat yang bangsa-bangsa akan cuba untuk dicapai.

src: Host nation Australia has been criticised by China, Indonesia, Japan and Malaysia for putting climate change on the agenda at the APEC summit, saying they would prefer dialogue on climate change to occur under a United Nationa framework.
ref: Tuan rumah Australia telah dikritik oleh China, Indonesia, Jepun dan Malaysia kerana meletakkan perubahan iklim ke atas agenda pada sidang kemuncak APEC, berkata mereka lebih suka dialog mengenai perubahan iklim berlaku di bawah rangka kerja United Nationa.

src: Indonesia's Foreign Minister Hassan Wirayuda said "the APEC meeting does not replace the appropriate forum to deal with climate change."
ref: Menteri Luar Indonesia Hassan Wirayuda berkata "Mesyuarat APEC tidak menggantikan forum yang sesuai untuk menangani perubahan iklim."

src: Mr Wiraydua said that despite Indonesia not being entirely satisfied with the declaration they would "live with it".
ref: Mr Wiraydua berkata walaupun Indonesia yang bukan sepenuhnya berpuas hati dengan perisytiharan itu mereka akan "hidup bersamanya."

src: Environmental group Greenpeace has rejected the APEC statement because it doesn't set firm targets and includes the use of nuclear energy as a replacement for fossil fuels.
ref: Kumpulan alam sekitar Greenpeace telah menolak kenyataan APEC kerana ia tidak menetapkan sasaran yang tegas dan termasuk penggunaan tenaga nuklear sebagai pengganti bahan api fosil.

src: There were 8 games played in the National Hockey League on February 14, 2008, including the #2 Dallas Stars taking on the Phoenix Coyotes, and the Minnesota Wild and Vancouver Canucks fighting for playoff contention in the Northwest division.
ref: Terdapat 8 permainan dimainkan dalam Liga Hoki Kebangsaan pada 14 Februari 2008, termasuk #2 Dallas Star berhadapan dengan Coyotes Phoenix, dan Minnesota Wild dan Vancouver Canucks berjuang untuk perlawanan penentuan untuk pertandingan di bahagian Barat Laut.

src: Dozens of people have been killed as a result of flooding in Plateau State, located in the central part of Nigeria.
ref: Berpuluh-puluh orang terbunuh akibat banjir di Plateau State, yang terletak di bahagian tengah Nigeria.

src: The flooding occurred as the result of a large amount of rainfall close to Jos, a city in the north of the state, causing overflow of a dam.
ref: Banjir itu berlaku diakibatkan oleh jumlah hujan yang besar berhampiran dengan Jos, sebuah bandar di utara negeri ini, dan menyebabkan limpahan empangan.

src: The Red Cross has reported the recovery of 35 corpses, while BBC News Online has placed the death toll at a minimum of 39.
ref: Palang Merah melaporkan 35 mayat dijumpai, manakala BBC News Online telah meletakkan angka kematian pada angka sekurang-kurangnya 39.

src: A spokesperson for the Red Cross said approximately two hundred houses had been sunk or wrecked.
ref: Jurucakap Palang Merah berkata kira-kira dua ratus buah rumah telah tenggelam atau rosak.

src: A significant number of the affected houses had been built of mud.
ref: Sebilangan besar rumah-rumah yang terlibat telah dibanjiri lumpur.

src: Manasie Phampe, leader of the Red Cross of the state, explained: "Rainwater and water from the Lamingo dam which overflowed swept across several neighbourhoods in the city".
ref: Manasie Phampe, pemimpin Palang Merah di negeri ini, menjelaskan: "Air hujan dan air dari empangan Lamingo yang melimpah melanda beberapa kawasan di bandar."

src: The death toll is anticipated to increase by authorities, with 35 reported missing.
ref: Angka kematian dijangka meningkat oleh pihak berkuasa, dengan 35 dilaporkan hilang.

src: "We are still searching for more bodies as many people have been declared missing," Phampe added.
ref: "Kami masih mencari lebih banyak mayat kerana ramai orang telah diisytiharkan hilang," tambah Phampe.

src: At least 57 people are now known to have died when a boat designed similar to a traditional dhow capsized one mile of the coast of Bahrain in the Persian Gulf.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 57 orang kini diketahui telah terbunuh apabila sebuah bot yang direka serupa dengan dhow tradisional karam satu batu dari pantai Bahrain di Teluk Parsi.

src: Seventeen were Indian and a further 13 of the dead are British; people of another six nationalities are also known to have died.
ref: Tujuh belas mangsa adalah warga India dan lagi 13 si mati adalah warga British; rakyat dari enam negara yang lain juga diketahui telah meninggal dunia.

src: The passengers were mostly foreigners from the Nass-Murray and Roberts construction company, and were enjoying an evening dinner cruise in celebration of their completion of part of the Bahrain World Trade Centre towers.
ref: Penumpang kebanyakannya warga asing dari Nass-Murray dan syarikat pembinaan Roberts, dan telah menikmati makan malam di pelayaran malam untuk meraikan penyempurnaan mereka untuk sebahagian pembinaan menara Perdagangan Dunia Bahrain.

src: Most who died were dining on the lower deck, and were trapped below.
