ref: Kebanyakan mati ketika memakan malam di dek bawah, dan telah terperangkap di bawah.

src: Over 130 people were onboard the boat at the time, although some say the boat was only licensed to carry 120.
ref: Lebih 130 orang berada di atas bot pada masa itu, walaupun ada yang mengatakan bot itu hanya dilesenkan untuk membawa 120 orang.

src: The boat capsized in calm seas soon after it left, trapping many below.
ref: Bot karam di laut tenang tidak lama selepas ia bertolak, memerangkap ramai orang di bawah.

src: Helicopters from the US Navy searched for 13 missing persons until Friday morning, when the search was called off.
ref: Helikopter dari Tentera Laut US mencari 13 orang yang hilang sehingga pagi Jumaat, apabila pencarian itu dibatalkan.

src: The dhow had been modified to have an extra, higher deck making the vessel less stable.
ref: Dhow tersebut telah diubahsuai untuk mempunyai dek tambahan, yang lebih tinggi menjadikan kapal itu kurang stabil.

src: The exact cause is unknown - suggestions from eyewitnesses include the boat suddenly turning left, being hit by a wave, and many of the passengers moving to one side of the boat together.
ref: Punca sebenar tidak diketahui - cadangan daripada saksi termasuk bot tiba-tiba membelok ke kiri, dipukul ombak, dan ramai penumpang bergerak ke sebelah perahu bersama-sama.

src: The Bahrain Interior Ministry is to investigate the accident and establish if the boat was seaworthy.
ref: Kementerian Dalam Negeri Bahrain akan menyiasat kemalangan itu dan menentukan sama ada bot itu layak belayar.

src: Irish Taoiseach Bertie Ahern and British Prime Minister Tony Blair have unveiled a new roadmap for the Northern Ireland devolution process.
ref: Perdana Menteri Ireland Bertie Ahern dan Perdana Menteri Britain Tony Blair telah memperkenalkan satu hala tuju baru bagi proses penurunan kuasa Utara Ireland.

src: The roadmap sets a target date for a new Northern Ireland Executive to be set up.
ref: Hala tuju tersebut menetapkan satu tarikh sasaran supaya Eksekutif baru Utara Ireland ditubuhkan.

src: The roadmap, known as the Saint Andrews Agreement, came after three days of intense talks in St. Andrews, Scotland.
ref: Hala tuju tersebut, dikenali sebagai Perjanjian Saint Andrews, diperkenalkan selepas perdebatan sengit selama tiga hari di Saint Andrews, Scotland.

src: The agreement gives dates for the steps to devolution culminating on March 26, 2007 when the Executive is to be fully up and running.
ref: Perjanjian tersebut menetapkan tarikh bagi langkah penurunan kuasa mencapai klimaks pada 26 Mac 2007 iaitu apabila Eksekutif ditubuhkan dan beroperasi.

src: The first deadline is on November 10, 2006 during which time both parties must accept the agreement and for the first time in the history of the party, the Democratic Unionist Party will cast a vote for their rivals, Sinn Fein.
ref: Tarikh akhir pertama adalah pada 10 November 2006 iaitu semasa kedua-dua parti hendaklah bersetuju dengan perjanjian dan buat pertama kalinya dalam sejarah Parti Union Demokratik mengundi bagi lawan mereka, Sinn Fein.

src: The second deadline is on November 27, 2006 in which the Northern Ireland Assembly, would gather to elect the first minister and deputy first minister of the Executive.
ref: Tarikh akhir kedua adalah pada 27 November 2006 iaitu apabila Perhimpunan Utara Ireland berkumpul untuk memilih menteri pertama dan timbalan menteri pertama bagi Eksekutif itu.

src: The first minister is speculated by many to be Ian Paisley, the leader of the Democratic Unionist Party.
ref: Menteri pertama yang dispekulasikan oleh orang ramai ialah Ian Paisley, ketua Parti Union Demokrasi.

src: The deputy first minister is speculated to be Martin McGuinness, the deputy leader of Sinn Fein.
ref: Timbalan Menteri pertama yang dispekulasikan ialah Martin McGuinness iaitu timbalan ketua Sinn fein.

src: One of the key issues is Sinn Fein's recognition of the Police Service of Northern Island, which replaced the controverisal Royal Ulster Constabulary.
ref: Salah satu isu utama ialah pengiktirafan Sinn Fein terhadap Perkhidmatan Polis Kepulauan Utara, menggantikan Pasukan Konstabel Royal Ulster yang penuh dengan kontroversi.

src: In a reassurance to unionists, the governments said they will not transfer duties over to the executive till 2008.
ref: Sebagai jaminan kepada ahli kesatuan, pihak kerajaan berkata mereka tidak akan memindahkan tugas kepada pihak eksekutif sehingga 2008.

src: Sinn Fein demanded an immediate transfer of power, possibly to a Sinn Fein minister.
ref: Sinn Fein menuntut peralihan kuasa dengan segera, mungkin kepada salah seorang menteri Sinn Fein.

src: "You can't have a democratic society unless the police are given full support," Blair said.
ref: "Masyarakat berdemokrasi tidak akan terbentuk selagi kerjasama sepenuhnya tidak diberikan kepada pihak polis," kata Blair.

src: After the election of ministers, three steps will take place.
ref: Selepas pilihanraya menteri-menteri, tiga langkah akan diambil.

src: The Democratic Unionists will be given time to observe Sinn Fein and see if they are accepting policing.
ref: Kesatuan Demokratik akan diberi masa untuk memerhatikan Sinn Fein sekiranya mereka menerima kuasa polis.

src: Also, in January, the Independent Monitoring Commission will give another report on the status of the Provisional Irish Republican Army revocation of violence.
ref: Juga, pada bulan Januari, Suruhanjaya Pemantauan Bebas akan memberi satu lagi laporan mengenai status pembatalan keganasan Tentera Republic Irish Sementara.

src: Finally in March, an electoral endorsement of the Saint Andrews Agreement will take place be it either through election or referendum.
ref: Akhirnya pada bulan Mac, pengendorsan pilihanraya Perjanjian Saint Andrews akan dilaksanakan samada melalui pilihanraya ataupun referandum.

src: Most of the participants at the summit favored a referendum, except for Ian Paisley, according to an anoynoums source who wished not be identified as he no authorization to release details publicly.
ref: Kebanyakan peserta di sidang kemuncak itu menyokong referendum, kecuali Ian Paisley, menurut sumber tidak bernama yang tidak mahu identitinya diketahui ramai kerana dia tiada berkebenaran untuk melepaskan maklumat kepada kepada orang ramai.

src: The last two final steps take place in March 2007.
ref: Dua langkah terakhir diambil pada Mac 2007.

src: On March 14, the nomination of the Executive will take place.
ref: Pada 14hb Mac, pencalonan Eksekutif akan dijalankan.

src: Finally, if all goes well, the Northern Ireland Executive power-sharing government and full devolved Northern Ireland Assembly would be revived and take power on March 26, 2007.
ref: Akhirnya, sekiranya segalanya berjalan lancar, kerajaan Eksekutif Utara Ireland yang berkongsi kuasa dan Perhimpunan Utara Ireland yang telah diturunkan kuasa akan diperbaharui dan diambil alih pada 26 Mac 2007.

src: However, if the parties fail to set up the Executive or fail to agree "at any stage", the Assembly will be dissolved and direct rule from London will continue with input from the Republic of Ireland.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, sekiranya parti-parti gagal menubuhkan Eksekutif atau gagal bersetuju pada "mana-mana peringkat", Perhimpunan Utara Ireland akan dibubarkan dan pemerintahan secara langsung dari London akan diteruskan dengan masukan daripada Republik Ireland.

src: Tony Blair said the essential parts of the agreement are that all parties accept policing and the courts and have a clear agreement on power-sharing.
ref: Tony Blair berkata bahawa bahagian-bahagian penting dalam perjanjian itu ialah kesemua parti bersetuju akan kuasa polis dan mahkamah mempunyai persetujuan jelas terhadap perkongsian kuasa.

src: "So those are the two essential parts of it," Mr Blair said.
ref: "Bahawasanya itulah dua bahagian penting perjanjian itu," kata Blair.

src: Ian Paisley, the notorious hardliner evangelist who has made his political career out of saying no to comprehensive reforms, eschewed his trademark fire-brand rhetoric offered a welcome and said that the province is "at a crossroads."
ref: Ian Paisley, seorang mubaligh Kristian yang terkenal kerana tidak bersetuju dengan dasar-dasar partinya yang melibatkan diri dalam politik menolak pembaharuan secara menyeluruh, menjauhkan diri daripada tanda retorik yang berjenamakan api, memberikan sambutan dan berkata wilayah itu"sedang berada di simpang jalan."

src: Paisley said of Ulster, "a place where there is a road to democracy and where there is a road to anarchy."
ref: Paisley berkata tentang Ulster, "Ia adalah satu tempat dimana terdapat jalan ke arah demokrasi dan jalan ke arah anarki."

src: Further adding, "I trust that we will see in the coming days the vast majority of people taking the road to democracy."
ref: Tambahan lagi, "Saya percaya bahawa pada masa hadapan, sebahagian besar rakyat akan memilih jalan ke arah demokrasi."

src: Blair also added, "We've been through different parts of this process many times over the past few years but I think this is a sound basis to proceed."
ref: Tambah Blair, "Kita sudah melalui pelbagai bahagian sepanjang proses ini dengan banyak kali selama beberapa tahun, tetapi saya yakin ia merupakan asas yang kukuh untuk meneruskan langkah ini."

src: He also said on the possible election of Paisley and McGuinness to their minister positions, "I do not think anybody will find it easy to sit in an executive with people who they are deeply opposed to, or indeed hostile to."
ref: Beliau juga turut memberi komen terhadap kemungkinan pilihanraya Paisley dan McGuinness untuk mendapat jawatan menteri, "Saya tidak yakin bahawa sesiapapun rasa ini adalah suatu perkara yang mudah untuk menjawat dalam eksekutif bersama orang yang bercanggah dengan mereka, ataupun sesungguhnya bermusuhan."

src: Referring to Sinn Fein, Paisley stated "We will meet the requirements. "
ref: Merujuk kepada Sinn Fein, Paisley berkata, "Kami akan memenuhi keperluannya."

src: "But the IRA-Sinn Fein has got to meet those requirements."
ref: "Tetapi IRA-Sinn Fein hendaklah memenuhi keperluannya juga."

src: "And when they do, we will really be on the way to peace in Northern Ireland."
ref: "Dan apabila mereka sudah memenuhi keperluannya, kita akan menuju ke arah pencapaian keamanan di Utara Ireland."

src: Paisley left St. Andrews quickly after attending the press conference in order to be with his family for his fiftieth wedding anniversary.
ref: Paisley meninggalkan St. Andrews sejurus selepas menghadiri sidang akhbar supaya dapat bersama-sama dengan keluarga beliau untuk ulang tahun perkahwinan beliau yang kelima puluh.

src: Sinn Fein leader, Gerry Adams offered a guarded welcome of the plans and stated "requires thoughtful consideration and consultation."
ref: Ketua Sinn Fein, Gerry Adams menawarkan kata alu-aluan yang berhati-hati mengenai rancangan tersebut dann berkata "ini memerlukan pertimbangan dan perundingan."

src: However, he stated the restoration of power-sharing was an "an enormous prize. "
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, dia berkata bahawa pemulihan perkongsian kuasa merupakan "hadiah yang lumayan."

src: "Common sense, political realism and the interests of all sections of our people demand that we achieve this."
ref: "Kesedaran sivik, kesedaran berpolitik dan minat semua orang dalam masyarakat mendorong supaya kami mencapai ini."

src: Sir Reg Empey, the leader of the Ulster Unionist Party said that the agreement was "Belfast for slower learners."
ref: Tuan Reg Empey, ketua Parti Persatuan Ulster berkata bahawa perjanjian tersebut merupakan "Belfast bagi pelajar lembap."

src: He added "Sinn Fein will sign up to the PSNI being the only force of law and order and Ian Paisley, or a colleague, will share the joint office of first and deputy first minister with Martin McGuinness in a mandatory coalition."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Sinn Fein akan mendaftar ke PSNI, menjadi satu-satunya kuasa undang-undang dan perintah dan Ian Paisley atau rakan sekerja akan berkongsi pejabat dengan Menteri Pertama dan Timbalan Menteri Pertama bersama Martin McGuinness dalam gabungan mandatori."

src: Leader of the more moderate nationalist Social Democratic and Labour Party, Mark Durkan stated that welcome progress had been made in devolution and that his party would continue working towards this.
ref: Ketua parti yang lebih nasionalis sederhana iaitu Parti Demokrasi Sosial dan Buruh, Mark Durkan berkata bahawa langkah permulaan telah diambil dalam penurunan kuasa dan parti beliau akan terus berusaha ke arah ini.

src: The leader of the cross-community non-sectarian Alliance Party of Northern Ireland, David Ford said of the summit that the outcome of the summit was a mix of "of challenges and opportunities".
ref: Ketua Parti Perikatan Utara Ireland yang mendapat sokongan daripada kedua-dua komuniti utama dan bukan sektarian, David Ford berkata mengenai sidang puncak bahawa hasil daripada sidang puncak itut merupakan campuran "cabaran dan peluang."

src: He added, "Despite all that remains to be done, there is now at least a sense of hope for a shared future."
ref: Beliau bertambah, "Walaupun masih ada banyak lagi langkah yang perlu diambil, masih lagi wujudnya harapan untuk masa depan bersama."

src: Direct rule from London has been in place since the Assembly and Executive dissolved in 2002 over allegations of IRA spying ring.
ref: Arahan secara langsung dari London telah dilaksanakan sejak Perhimpunan dan Eksekutif telah dibubarkan pada tahun 2002 atas dakwaan rangkaian pengintip IRA.

src: Going into the third scheduled day of competition at the IPC Alpine World Championships in La Molina, Spain yesterday, the United States para-alpine team has delivered with a gold medal won by Laurie Stephens in the women's sitting downhill, a silver medal won by men's sit skier Stephen Lawler in the downhill, and bronze medal won by Laurie Stephens in the women's sitting Super-G.
ref: Memasuki hari ketiga perlawanan seperti yang dijadualkan di IPC Alpine Kejohanan Duni di La Molina, Spain semalam, kumpulan para-alpine USA telah mendapatkan pingat emas yang dimenangi oleh Laurie Stephen dalam acara downhill duduk wanita, pingat gangsa dimenangi oleh pemain ski duduk lelaki Stephen Lawler dalam acara downhill, dan pingat gangsa dimenangi oleh Laurie Stephens dalam acara Super-G duduk wanita.

src: The United States finished two days of competition fifth overall in the medal count, tied with Russia.
ref: Amerika Syarikat menamatkan dua hari perlawanan dengan tempat kelima keseluruhan dalam pungutan pingat, seri dengan Rusia.

src: Other Team USA performances in the downhill included a fourth place finish by visually impaired woman skier Danelle Umstead and guide Robert Umstead, a fifth place finish by Christopher Devlin-Young in the men's sitting group, an eighth place finish by Ralph Green in the men's standing group, an eighth place finish by women's standing skier Allison Jones, a ninth place finish by visually impaired Mark Bathum and guide Sean Ramsden, a tenth place finish by Tyler Walker in the men's sitting, and a thirteenth place finish by Heath Calhoun in the men's sitting.
ref: Pencapaian kumpulan USA lain dalam acara downhill termasuk tempat keempat ditamatkan oleh pemain ski wanita cacat penglihatan Danelle Umstead dan pengajar Robert Umstead, tempat kelima ditamatkan oleh Christopher Devlin-Young dalam acara duduk lelaki berkumpulan, tempat kelapan ditamatkan oleh Ralph Green dalam acara berdiri lelaki berkumpulan, tempat kelepat ditamatkan oleh pemain ski berdiri wanita Allison Jones, tempat kesembilan ditamatkan oleh Mark Bathum yang cacat penglihatan dan pengajar Sean Ramsden, tempat kesepuluh ditamatkan oleh Tyler Walker dalam acara duduk lelaki, dan tempat ketiga belas ditamatkan oleh Heath Calhoun dalam acara duduk lelaki.

src: In the Super-G event on Thursday, Jones finished fourth in the women's standing group, Devlin-Young finished fifth, Stephani Victor finished fourth in the women's sitting group, Umstead and Umstead finished fifth in their group, Bathum and Ramsden finished seventh in their group, Walker finished twelfth in his group, Green finished sixteenth in the men's standing, Jonathan Lujan finished nineteenth in the men's standing, Stephen Lawler finished twentieth in the men's sitting, Heath Calhoun finished twenty-third in men's sitting, and Andrew Earl Kurka finished twenty-fifth in the men's sitting group.
ref: Dalam acara Super-G pada hari Khamis, Jones menamatkan di tempat keempat dalam acara berdiri wanita berkumpulan, Devlin-Young menamatkan di tempat kelima, Stephani Victor di tempat keempat dalam acara duduk wanita berkumpulan, Umstead dan Umstead menamatkan di tempat kelima dalam kumpulan mereka, Bathum dan Ramsden menamatkan di tempat ketujuh dalam kumpulan mereka, Walker menakan di tempat kedua belas dalam kumpulannya, Green menamatkan di tempat keenam belas dalam acara berdiri lelaki. Jonathan Lujan menamatkan di tempat kesembilan belas dalam acara berdiri lelaki, Stephen Lawler menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh dalam acara duduk lelaki, Heath Calhoun menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh tiga dalam acara duduk lelaki, dan Andrew Earl Kurka menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh lima dalam acara duduk lelaki berkumpulan.

src: A few members of Team USA had difficulties, and were not able to start or finish their races.
ref: Sebahagian ahli kumpulan USA mengalami kesukaran, dan tidak mampu untuk memulakan atau menyelesaikan perlumbaan mereka.

src: In the downhill and Super-G event, 2010 Winter Paralympics medalist Alana Nichols did not start.
ref: Paralimpik medalis 2010 Alana Nichols tidak memulakan perlumbaan di acara turun bukit dan Super-G.

src: LW12-2 women's sit-skier Victor also did not start in the downhill event.
ref: LW12-2 pemain ski-duduk wanita Victor juga tidak memulakan acara downhill.

src: Visually-impaired B3 classified skier Bathum chatted with his guide, Sean Ramsden, immediately following both his races.
ref: Pemain ski Bathum yang cacat penglihatan klasifikasi B3 memberitahu pengajar beliau, Sean Ramsden, sejurus selepas kedua-dua perlumbaan.

src: While he was unhappy with his downhill run, Bathum was happy with and had fun during his seventh place run in the Super-G event where he finished with a factored time of 1:13.51, only 3.02 seconds slower than the winning time set by Spanish skier Jon Santacana.
ref: Sementara beliau kecewa dengan acara turun bukit, Bathum gembira dan berseronok dengan tempat ketujuh dalam acara Super-G dimana beliau menamatkan dengan masa 1:13.51, dengan hanya 3.02 saat lebih perlahan daripada set masa pemenang oleh pemain ski Sepanyol Jon Santacana.

src: United States skiers were scheduled to compete yesterday in the Slalom discipline but the competition was cancelled due to high winds.
ref: Pemain ski Amerika Syarikat dijadualkan untuk bertanding semalam di disiplin Slalom tetapi pertandingan tersebut dibatalkan berikutan angin kencang.

src: Several members of Team USA had a pizza party after the slalom cancellation.
ref: Sebahagian ahli daripada kumpulan USA mengadakan parti piza selepas pembatalan slalom.

src: Friday's scheduled event had been rescheduled as a result of predicted snow and high winds during the day.
ref: Acara Jumaat yang ditetapkan telah dijadualkan semula berikutan salji yang diramalkan turun dan angin kencang pada siang hari.

src: No snow arrived until late in the afternoon, where there was limited accumulation.
ref: Tiada salji turun sehingga lewat petang, dimana terdapatnya pengumpulan terhad.

src: Some of the younger members of Team USA took advantage of the night off on Thursday to go bowling before a busy training day Friday.
ref: Beberapa ahli yang lebih muda dari Kumpulan USA mengambil peluang cuti yang diberikan pada malam Khamis dengan bermain bowling sebelum bermulanya latihan sibuk pada hari Jumaat.

src: In other United States Paralympic news, Sir Philip Craven, the President of the International Paralympic Committee, told a Wikinews reporter the country will have live television coverage of the 2016 Summer Paralympics in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
ref: Dalam berita Paralimpik Amerika Syarikat lain, Tuan Philip Craven, Presiden bagi Jawatankuasa Paralimpik Antarabangsa, menyatakan kepada wartawan Wikinews bahawa negara akan mengadakan liputan telivisyen secara langsung bagi Paralimpik Musim Panas 2016 di Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

src: When a member of Team USA competing in La Molina was asked if they heard confirmation of this, they were unable to confirm.
ref: Apabila salah seorang ahli Kumpulan USA bertanding di La Molina ditanya mengeai pengesahan tentang perkara ini, dia tidak dapat mengesahkan.

src: They did highlight the lack of United States media coverage was frustrating for fans wanting to follow the Games in London.
ref: Mereka turut menyatakan kekurangan liputan media Amerika Syarikat adalah mengecewakan peminat yang ingin mengikuti perlawanan di London.

src: According to the skier, many people he knew could only follow the Games by searching for video on sites like YouTube.
ref: Menurut pemain ski, kebanyakan orang yang dikenali beliau hanya boleh mengikuti perlawanan tersebut dengan mencari video melalui jaringan seperti YouTube.

src: Plastic surgeon to the stars Dr. Frank Ryan has died in a car accident at age 50.
ref: Pakar bedah plastik kepada bintang terkenal Dr. Frank Ryan telah meninggal dalam satu kemalangan kereta pada umur 50 tahun.

src: It is reported that the Jeep Ryan was driving crashed over the side of the Pacific Coast Highway and landed on rocks.
ref: Dilaporkan bahawa jip yang dipandu Ryan terbabas di tepi Lebuhraya Pantai Pasifik dan melanggar batu.

src: Lifeguards were first on the scene and unsuccessfully tried to rescue Ryan.
ref: Pasukan penyelamat merupakan yang pertama tiba di tempat kejadian dan percubaan menyelamatkan Ryan tidak berhasil.

src: It is thought that no other vehicle was involved in the incident.
ref: Dikatakan tiada kenderaan lain yang terlibat dalam kemalangan tersebut.

src: Dr. Ryan, a celebrity in his own right, performed plastic surgery on several stars including Janice Dickinson, Gene Simmons, Shauna Sand and Adrianne Curry.
ref: Dr. Ryan, dengan kehendak selebriti tersebut, telah menjalankan pembedahan plastik terhadap beberapa bintang terkenal termasuk Janice Dickinson, Gene Simmons, Shauna Sand dan Adrianne Curry.

src: He appeared on several television shows and became one of the first people to perform plastic surgery on television in 1995.
ref: Beliau muncul dalam beberapa rancangan televisyen dan menjadi salah satu dari orang yang pertama untuk menjalankan pembedahan plastik di televisyen pada 1995.

src: A representative for Janice Dickinson released a statement about the death of Ryan.
ref: Wakil kepada Janice Dickinson mengeluarkan satu kenyataan berhubung kematian Ryan.

src: She said "Janice is deeply, deeply anguished! She is stunned and wants the world to know what a genius Dr. Ryan was."
ref: "Janice begitu, begitu sedih! Beliau begitu terkejut dan inginkan dunia mengetahui betapa pintarnya Dr. Ryan" dia berkata.

src: Ryan was traveling with his pet dog at the time of the crash; the dog was found seriously injured in the ocean and was transported to a local veterinarian.
ref: Ryan dalam perjalanan bersama anjing peliharaan beliau semasa kejadian; anjing tersebut dijumpai dalam keadaan cedera parah di laut dan dibawa ke doktor haiwan tempatan.

src: Eleven protesters, including five members of Congress, were arrested on charges of disorderly conduct and unlawful assembly.
ref: Sebelas orang penunjuk perasaan, termasuk lima orang ahli Kongres telah ditahan atas tuduhan perbuatan melanggar peraturan dan perhimpunan haram.

src: "The Sudanese government has shown total disregard for the wishes of the global, civilized community."
ref: "Kerajaan Sudan telah menunjukkan sikap tidak menghiraukan kehendak global, komuniti bertamadun."

src: " I have no optimism as to the actions of the Sudanese government," Lantos said.
ref: "Saya tiada keyakinan terhadap tindakan kerajaan Sudan," kata Lantos.

src: Democratic House members James McGovern and John Olver of Massachusetts, Sheila Jackson Lee of Texas, and Jim Moran of Virginia were among the others arrested and released after paying $50 fines after being arrested in front of the Sudanese embassy.
ref: Ahli Dewan Demokratik James McGovern dan John Olver daripada Massachusetts, Sheila Jackson Lee daripada Texas, dan Jim Moran daripada Virginia antara mereka yang ditahan dan dilepaskan selepas membayar denda $50 selepas ditangkap di depan kedutaan Sudan.

src: Olver said, "We must hold the Sudanese government accountable for the attacks they have supported on their own citizens in Darfur."
ref: Olver berkata, "Kita harus mmbuatkan kerajaan Sudan untuk memegang tanggungjawab dalam serangan yang disokong oleh mereka ke atas rakyat mereka sendiri di Darfur."

src: Meanwhile, President Bush met with Darfur advocates this Friday in support of rallies all over the US this weekend against the ongoing genocide in western Sudan.
ref: Sementara itu, Presiden Bush telah menemui penyokong-penyokong Darfur Jumaat ini dalam sokongan perhimpunan di seluruh Amerika Syarikat hujung minggu ini menentang pembasmian kaum yang sedang berterusan di barat Sudan.

src: There will be rallies across our country to send a message to the Sudanese government that the genocide must stop.
ref: Perhimpunan akan dijalankan di seluruh negara ini bagi menghantar mesej kepada kerajaan Sudan bahawa pembasmian kaum harus dihentikan.

src: "I want the Sudanese government to understand the United States of America is serious about solving this problem," Bush said.
ref: "Saya mahu kerajaan Sudan untuk memahami bahawa Amaerika Syarikat serius dalam menyelesaikan masalah ini," Bush berkata.

src: Barack Obama, the junior senator from Illinois and 2008 US presidential candidate has swept all three of today's Democratic contests, two caucuses in Nebraska and Washington and the primary in Louisiana.
ref: Barrack Obama, senat junior daripada Illinois dan calon presiden AS 2008 telah menyapu bersih kesemua tiga pertandingan Demokratik hari ini, dua kaukus di Nebraska dan Washington dan kaukus utama di Louisiana.

src: Obama also won the tiny United States territory of the United States Virgin Islands.
ref: Obama juga memenangi wilayah kecil Amerika Syarikat, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Syarikat.

src: Obama won nearly 30% more over opponent Hillary Clinton in the Nebraska caucuses.
ref: Obama telah memenangi 30% melebihi lawan Hillary Clinton di Nebraska kaukus.

src: Obama also had a major lead over Clinton in the Washington caucuses by a 2-1 margin.
ref: Obama juga mendahului Clinton di Washington kaukus dengan jurang sebanyak 2-1.

src: Commentators have noted that Obama seems to perform well in caucus states.
ref: Pengulas mencatatkan bahawa Obama kelihatan menunjukkan prestasi yang baik di negeri kaukus.

src: Louisiana's Democratic primary was also won by Obama in a large margin, winning nearly 53% of the vote over Clinton's 39%.
ref: Demokratik utama Lousiana secara margin yang besar turut dimenangi oleh Obama, memenangi hampir 53% dari keseluruhan undi mengalahkan Clinton, 39%.

src: The state, which is still suffering from the effects of Hurricane Katrina three years later could play a large role in the election this year.
ref: Negeri tersebut, yang masih mengalami kesan Taufan Katrina tiga tahun kemudian boleh memainkan peranan yang besar dalam pilihan raya kali ini.

src: Despite these wins it is still a close race between the two Democratic candidates, with Obama showing a lead in pledged delegates, and Hillary Clinton showing a narrow lead when super delegates are taken into account.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, kemenangan ini masih menunjukkan persaingan sengit antara dua calon Demokratik, dengan Obama yang mendahului dalam delegasi mesyuarat, dan Hillary Clinton yang menunjukkan saingan rapat apabila super delegasi diambil kira.

src: Each candidate needs to win the support of 2,025 delegates to secure the nomination.
ref: Setiap calon harus memenangi sokongan 2,025 delegasi untuk memastikan pencalonan.

src: After the voting and caucusing ended yesterday both candidates gave a speech at the Democratic Party's Jefferson and Jackson Dinner in Virginia- Clinton giving her standard stump speech and refusing to talk about what had happened during the day; Obama repeating many of the things he had said earlier in his "Yes We Can" speech, this time with detailed policy proposals as well as "hope-mongering".
ref: Selepas pengundian dan bercaucus tamat semalam kedua-dua calon memberikan ucapan di Parti Demokratik Jefferson dan Jackson Dinner di Virginia- Clinton memberi ucapan sedia ada dan menolak untuk berbicara mengenai apa yang telah berlaku di siang harinya; Obama mengulangi beberapa perkara yang disebutkan dalam ucapan terdahulu "Ya Kita Boleh," kali ini dengan cadangan polisi yang lebih jelas dan juga "hopemonger."

src: The two candidates were in Maine today doing last minute campaigning before tomorrow's Democratic caucuses there and are also preparing for the "Potomac primary" which will involve the nation's capital of Washington, D.C. and the bordering states of Maryland and Virginia to be held on February 12.
ref: Kedua-dua calon di Maine hari ini melaksanakan kempen saat akhir sebelum kaukus Demokratik keesokannya dan turut bersiap-sedia untuk "Potomac utama" yang akan melibatkan ibu negara Washington, D.C. dan negara-negara sempadan Maryland dan Virginia yang akan dijalankan pada 12 Februari.

src: India's first lunar mission, the Chandrayaan-1 (meaning 'moon craft' in Sanskrit), reached its destined lunar orbit on Wednesday.
ref: Misi lunar pertama India, Chandrayaan-1 (yang bermaksud 'kraf bulan'dalam bahasa Sanskrit), mencapai destinasi orbit lunarnya pada hari Rabu.

src: It is now in a circular orbit 102 kilometres from the Moon.
ref: Ia kini berada di orbit bulatan 102 kilometer dari Bulan.

src: It will stay in this orbit for two years and conduct various experiments to gain a better understanding of the Moon.
ref: Ia akan kekal di orbit ini selama dua tahun dan menjalankan pelbagai eksperimen untuk mendapatkan pemahaman yang lebih baik tentang Bulan.

src: According to Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) officials, the Moon Impact Probe (MIP), with an Indian flag painted on it, will be dropped late tonight.
ref: Menurut pegawai Pertubuhan Penyelidikan Angkasa Lepas India (ISRO), Moon Impact Probe (MIP) tersebut, dengan sebuah bendera India dilukis di atasnya, akan dilepaskan lewat malam ini.

src: The MIP has a mass of 29 kg and it will take 20 minutes to reach the moon's surface.
ref: MIP itu mempunyai jisim 29 kg dan ia akan mengambil masa 20 minit untuk sampai ke permukaan bulan.

src: Two explosions were heard in the city of La Paz, Bolivia on Tuesday night, March 22 and in the early morning Wednesday, March 23.
ref: Dua letupan kedengaran di bandar La Paz, Bolivia pada malam Selasa, 22 Mac dan pada awal pagi Rabu 23 Mac.

src: The first occurred at the Linares Motel, at 21:50 (01:50 UTC), and left two people dead and four injured.
ref: Merupakan yang pertama berlaku di Linares Motel, pada 21:50 (01:50 UTC), dan meninggalkan dua orang terbunuh dan empat cedera.

src: The second explosion occurred at 01:45 (05:45 UTC) at the Hotel Riosinhio II, less than a block from the La Paz bus terminal, injuring two people.
ref: Letupan kedua berlaku pada 01:45 (05:45 UTC) di Hotel Riosinhio II, kurang daripada satu blok dari terminal bas La Paz, mencederakan dua orang.

src: Hours later, two suspects in the crime were arrested by the police in the city of El Alto.
ref: Beberapa jam kemudian, kedua-dua suspek dalam jenayah itu telah ditahan oleh pihak polis di bandar El Alto.

src: They were American Claudio Lestat, approximately 30 years old (25 according to some sources) and his partner, Uruguayan Alda Ribeiros, of 35 years (40 according to other sources).
ref: Mereka adalah warga Amerika Claudio Lestat, berusia lebih kurang 30 tahun (25 menurut beberapa sumber) dan pasangannya, warga Uruguay Alda Ribeiros, 35 tahun (40 menurut sumber-sumber lain).

src: Dynamite was used in both explosions, according to government attorney Jorge Gutiérrez.
ref: Dinamit telah digunakan dalam kedua-dua letupan, menurut wakil kerajaan Jorge Gutiérrez.

src: President Evo Morales indicated that the promoters of the incidents were "industrialists" and "oligarchists" who, "using external agents", claimed to halt the reforms that have been happening in Bolivia.
ref: Presiden Evo Morales menunjukkan bahawa penganjur kejadian adalah "usahawan" dan "oligarchists" yang, "menggunakan agen luar," mendakwa untuk menghentikan pembaharuan yang telah berlaku di Bolivia.

src: He also suggested that the United States could be behind the incidents: "Is there an effort against terrorism from the government of the United States, or did they send North Americans to commit terrorism in Bolivia?" Despite the accusations, the United States embassy in La Paz announced its cooperation.
ref: Beliau juga mencadangkan bahawa Amerika Syarikat mungkin menjadi dalang kejadian: "Adakah terdapat usaha menentang keganasan dari kerajaan Amerika Syarikat, atau mereka menghantar rakyat Amerika Utara untuk melakukan keganasan di Bolivia?" Meskipun tuduhan yang diberikan, kedutaan Amerika Syarikat di La Paz mengumumkan kerjasamanya.

src: However, authorities have not ruled out religious motives, because Lestat is a self-proclaimed "minister of pagan rites".
ref: Bagaimanapun, pihak berkuasa tidak menolak kemungkinan motif agama, kerana Lestat mendakwa dirinya adalah "menteri upacara pagan."

src: Police also announced that the Chilean consulate in the Bolivian capital was also a target, to be attacked on Saturday the 25th.
ref: Polis turut mengumumkan bahawa konsulat Chile di ibu negara Bolivia juga menjadi sasaran, akan diserang pada hari Sabtu 25 haribulan.

src: The People's Republic of China (PRC) in recent years has begun an effort to reform its judicial system and make trials more fair and accountable, according to its state-run People's Daily.
ref: Republik Rakyat China (PRC) pada tahun-tahun kebelakangan ini telah memulakan usaha untuk mengubah sistem kehakiman dan membuat perbicaraan lebih adil dan bertanggungjawab, mengikut yang People's Daily dikendalikan oleh kerajaan negeri.

src: Those efforts came to a head today with the official May 1 start of jury duty by more than 27,000 newly qualified jurors.
ref: Usaha-usaha tersebut sampai ke kemuncaknya hari ini dengan rasminya 1 Mei menjadi permulaan tugas juri untuk lebih daripada 27,000 juri baru yang berkelayakan.

src: According to People's Daily, "It is the first time in Chinese history that the people's juries are appointed in a uniformed way by the people's congresses at all levels."
ref: Menurut People's Daily, "Ia adalah kali pertama dalam sejarah China yang juri rakyat dilantik dengan cara yang seragam oleh kongres rakyat di semua peringkat."

src: Two jurors and a judge will be sitting on each three-person panel, and decide both criminal and civil cases.
ref: Dua juri dan hakim akan duduk pada setiap tiga orang panel, dan memutuskan kedua-dua kes jenayah dan sivil.

src: The juries will be available when requested by litigants and also in cases "with considerable social repercussions", which appears to mean major cases.
ref: Juri akan disediakan apabila diminta oleh pihak yang berperkara dan juga dalam kes-kes "dengan kesan sosial yang besar," yang kelihatan membawa maksud kes-kes utama.

src: The jurors are not chosen for each trial but will serve a five-year term in the jury pool working on different cases from time to time.
ref: Juri tidak dipilih untuk setiap perbicaraan tetapi akan berkhidmat bagi tempoh lima tahun di dalam kumpulan juri mengerjakan kes yang berbeza dari semasa ke semasa.

src: Jurors have been provided for in the Chinese Constitution since 1954, but their role in the system was not well-defined by law until now.
ref: Juri telah diperuntukkan dalam Perlembagaan China sejak tahun 1954, tetapi peranan mereka dalam sistem itu tidak jelas oleh undang-undang sehingga kini.

src: The changes to the jury system are part of a long-term planned reform of China's judicial system that was announced in 1999 by China's top judge, Xiao Yang.
ref: Perubahan kepada sistem juri adalah sebahagian daripada pembaharuan jangka panjang yang dirancang sistem kehakiman China yang diumumkan pada tahun 1999 oleh hakim China, Xiao Yang.

src: In addition to jury reforms, the plan addressed trial procedures and court structure and supervision.
ref: Selain pembaharuan juri, rancangan itu ditujukan kepada prosedur perbicaraan dan struktur mahkamah dan pengawasan.

src: The goal was to "perfect the socialist judicial system with Chinese characteristics...in accordance with the Constitution and laws, and [without] judicial independence and supremacy, which exist in many Western countries," according to Xiao Yang as reported by the People's Daily in 1999.
ref: Matlamatnya adalah untuk "menyempurnakan sistem kehakiman sosialis dengan ciri-ciri Cina...mengikut Perlembagaan dan undang-undang, dan [tanpa] kebebasan kehakiman dan keluhuran, yang wujud di negara-negara Barat," menurut Xiao Yang seperti yang dilaporkan oleh People's Daily pada tahun 1999.

src: "Court reform represents a major part of China's reform of the judicial system and political restructuring."
ref: "Reformasi Mahkamah mewakili sebahagian besar daripada reformasi sistem kehakiman China dan penyusunan semula politik."

src: The essence of judicial reform is judicial fairness, which is crucial to the country's rule of law," Xiao Yang said back then.
ref: Intipati pembaharuan kehakiman adalah keadilan kehakiman, yang sangat penting kepada undang-undang peraturan negara itu," kata Xiao Yang ketika itu.

src: In August 2004, the 10th National People's Congress (NPC) Standing Committee approved a "resolution on improving the people's jury system", which took effect today.
ref: Pada bulan Ogos 2004, Kongres Kebangsaan (NPC) Jawatankuasa Tetap Rakyat ke-10 meluluskan "ketetapan untuk meningkatkan sistem juri rakyat," yang berkuat kuasa hari ini.

src: The system specifies that either by recommendation of local work units or by self-application, potential jurors can take qualifying examinations and be presented to standing committees of the NPC for appointment as jurors.
ref: Sistem ini menyatakan bahawa sama ada dengan pengesyoran unit kerja tempatan atau oleh permohonan sendiri, juri yang berpotensi boleh mengambil peperiksaan kelayakan dan akan dibentangkan kepada jawatankuasa tetap NPC untuk dilantik sebagai juri.

src: The first batch of 1,342 jurors were tested in Beijing under the new law on April 23, 2005.
ref: Kumpulan pertama seramai 1,342 juri telah diuji di Beijing di bawah undang-undang baru pada 23 April 2005.

src: Those who were certified to begin service on May 1 are said to "participate in all hearing activities of people's courts according to the law, enjoying the same rights as do the judges except that for a presiding judge after their assumption of the post," according to the People's Daily.
ref: Mereka yang telah disahkan untuk memulakan perkhidmatan pada 1 Mei dikatakan "mengambil bahagian dalam semua aktiviti sidang dengar mahkamah rakyat mengikut undang-undang, menikmati hak yang sama seperti yang dilakukan oleh para hakim kecuali bagi seorang hakim yang bersidang selepas andaian mereka terhadap jawatan itu," menurut kepada People's Daily.

src: This is an important move to upgrade and strengthen the system of people's jurors, Xiao Long of Beijing People's Court said to China Daily on April 24.
ref: Ini adalah satu langkah yang penting untuk meningkatkan dan memantapkan lagi sistem juri rakyat, Xiao Long dari Mahkamah Beijing Rakyat berkata kepada China Daily pada 24 April.

src: The implementation of the NPC's decision will add more transparency and justness to the country's judicial system, he added.
ref: Pelaksanaan keputusan NPC akan menambah lebih banyak ketelusan dan keadilan kepada sistem kehakiman di negara ini, katanya.

src: China has one of the world's largest prison systems with over 1 million prisoners, similar to Russia.
ref: China mempunyai salah satu sistem penjara terbesar di dunia dengan lebih 1 juta tahanan, sama dengan Rusia.

src: It has received criticism over the years from the U.S. State Department and others for its arbitrariness and its treatment of political prisoners.
ref: Ia selama ini telah menerima kritikan daripada Jabatan Negara U.S. dan lain-lain diatas kesinambungan dan layanannya terhadap tahanan politik.

src: The United States, however, is the world's largest jailer, with a staggering 2 million prison inmates, out of 9 million total around the entire globe.
ref: Amerika Syarikat, bagaimanapun, merupakan penjara terbesar di dunia, dengan jumlah mengejutkan seramai 2 juta penghuni penjara, daripada 9 juta jumlah seluruh seluruh dunia.

src: The newly formed Icelandic coalition interim government will take office today, according to a coalition leader.
ref: Pakatan kerajaan sementara Iceland yang baru ditubuhkan akan memegang jawatan hari ini, menurut pemimpin gabungan.

src: On January 27, it was announced that the nation's coalition government had collapsed and dissolved following a banking financial crisis.
ref: Pada 27 Januari, telah diumumkan bahawa kerajaan campuran di negara itu telah runtuh dan dibubarkan berikutan krisis kewangan perbankan.

src: In October of 2008, Iceland's banking sector collapsed and was largely nationalised.
ref: Pada Oktober 2008, sektor perbankan Iceland runtuh dan sebahagian besarnya dimiliknegarakan.

src: Iceland's interest rate is now 18%, with GDP expected to fall 9.6% this year.
ref: Kadar faedah Iceland kini adalah 18%, dengan GDP dijangka turun 9.6% tahun ini.

src: Just before the announcement of the government taking office, nearly 1,500 people were protesting outside the parliament building over the collapsed government and the recent financial crisis, but protesters seemed happy about the change.
ref: Sebelum pengumuman tentang kerajaan memegang jawatan, hampir 1,500 orang telah membantah di luar bangunan Parlimen di atas keruntuhan kerajaan dan krisis kewangan baru-baru ini, tetapi penunjuk perasaan seolah-olah gembira dengan perubahan itu.

src: Therefore "today is a celebration," said protest organizer Hordur Torfason to the crowd who were cheering about hearing the news.
ref: Oleh itu "hari ini adalah sambutan," kata penganjur protes Hordur Torfason kepada orang ramai yang bersorak mendengar berita itu.

src: The new minority coalition will consist of Jóhanna's Social Democratic Alliance and the Left-Green Movement with backing from the Progressive Party.
ref: Gabungan minoriti baru akan terdiri daripada Perikatan Demokratik Sosial Johanna dan Pergerakan Left-Green dengan sokongan daripada Parti Progresif.

src: He criticizes her appointment because he believes she will not help the economic crisis, resulting in more government spending.
ref: Beliau mengkritik pelantikannya kerana beliau percaya dia tidak akan membantu krisis ekonomi, menyebabkan lebih banyak perbelanjaan kerajaan.

src: The quick appointment of the new government also means an early election, which is scheduled to take place on April 25.
ref: Pelantikan segera kerajaan baru juga bermakna pilihan raya awal, yang dijadualkan berlangsung pada 25 April.

src: Israel's Central Election Committee voted yesterday to disqualify two Arab political parties from running in the country's general elections scheduled for February 10th.
ref: Jawatankuasa Pemilihan Pusat Israel semalam telah mengundi untuk membatalkan dua parti politik Arab dari bertanding dalam pilihan raya umum di negara ini yang dijadualkan pada 10 Februari.

src: Tibi condemned the ruling saying, "It was a political trial led by a group of fascists and racists who are willing to see the Knesset without Arabs and want to see the country without Arabs."
ref: Tibi mengutuk keputusan itu berkata, "Ia adalah satu percubaan politik yang diketuai oleh sekumpulan fasis dan rasis yang sanggup melihat Knesset tanpa orang-orang Arab dan mahu melihat negara ini tanpa orang-orang Arab."

src: Arabs constitute one fifth of the population in Israel but only have twelve of 120 parliamentary seats.
ref: Orang Arab merupakan satu perlima daripada penduduk di Israel tetapi hanya mempunyai dua belas daripada 120 kerusi Parlimen.

src: Other parties associated with the Arab-Israeli minority, such as Hadash, are not affected by the committee's decision.
ref: Pihak-pihak lain yang berkaitan dengan minoriti Arab-Israel, seperti Hadash, tidak terjejas dengan keputusan jawatankuasa itu.

src: Israel's High Court of Justice reversed a similar attempt to ban Balad in 2003, and has until Friday to rule on yesterday's votes.
ref: Mahkamah Tinggi Keadilan Israel menterbalikkan usaha sama untuk mengharamkan Balad pada tahun 2003, dan mempunyai masa sehingga Jumaat untuk membuat keputusan mengenai undi semalam.

src: Alabama Gov. Bob Riley beat back a Republican primary challenge from Roy Moore, the former judge who tried to put up a Ten Commandments monument in his courthouse.
ref: Gabenor Alabama Bob Riley menewaskan cabaran utama Republikan dari Roy Moore, bekas hakim yang cuba untuk meletakkan monumen Sepuluh Rukun di mahkamah beliau.

src: In the weeks leading to Alabama's gubernatorial primaries, polls showed Riley had pulled ahead of Moore, the former state chief justice who became a hero to the religious right in 2003 when he was ousted over his refusal to remove a 5,300-pound Ten Commandments monument from the state judicial building.
ref: Pada minggu-minggu sebelum pemilihan gabenor-gabenor utama Alabama, undian menunjukkan Riley mengatashi Moore, bekas ketua hakim negeri yang menjadi wira untuk hak agama pada tahun 2003 apabila beliau digulingkan atas keengganan beliau untuk mengeluarkan monumen Sepuluh Rukun yang bernilai 5,300 paun dari bangunan kehakiman negeri tersebut.

src: Moore conceded in his hometown of Gadsden, telling supporters, "God's will has been done."
ref: Moore menyerah kalah di kampung halamannya di Gadsden, memberitahu penyokongnya, "kehendak Tuhan telah dilaksanakan."

src: Gale force winds ripped through Sydney and the South Coast of New South Wales late on Saturday night, causing widespread damage and extensive power outages, with up to 30,000 homes going without electricity at one point.
ref: Angin ribut kencang merebak di Sydney dan Pantai Selatan New South Wales pada lewat malam Sabtu, menyebabkan kerosakan dan gangguan kuasa elektrik, sehingga 30,000 rumah ketiadaan elektrik pada satu masa.

src: The strong winds caused trees to be uprooted, in one instance crashing down upon an unsuspecting motorist, killing a man in his 60's and severely injuring his wife.
ref: Angin kuat telah menyebabkan pokok-pokok tumbang, dan salah satunya tumbang di atas seorang pemandu kereta yang tidak dikenali, membunuh seorang lelaki berusia 60 dan mencederakan isterinya dengan teruk.

src: The State Emergency Service (SES) has responded to over 800 calls for help to repair damage caused by the storms, however the storms have subsided somewhat and flood warnings around Bega and Moruya have been withdrawn.
ref: Perkhidmatan Kecemasan Negeri (SES) telah bertindak balas kepada lebih daripada 800 panggilan untuk bantuan bagi membaiki kerosakan yang disebabkan oleh ribut itu, bagaimanapun ribut telah beransur reda dan amaran banjir di sekitar Bega dan Moruya telah ditarik balik.

src: The United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is deploying its new Homeland Security Information Network - Secret (HSIN-Secret) in all 50 state Emergency Operations Centers as well as 18 additional state and local law enforcement sites.
ref: Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri Amerika Syarikat (DHS) akan menggerakkan Rahsia - Rangkaian Informasi Keselamatan Dalam Negeri (HSIN-Secret) di semua 50 negeri Pusat Operasi Kecemasan serta tambahan 18 laman penguatkuasaan undang-undang negeri dan tempatan.

src: The secret network is a component of the HSIN, which is the primary conduit for DHS to share information on terrorist threats, suspicious activity and incident management with state, local, tribal and private-sector officials.
ref: Rangkaian rahsia itu adalah satu komponen HSIN, yang merupakan saluran utama untuk DHS bagi berkongsi maklumat mengenai ancaman pengganas, aktiviti yang mencurigakan dan pengurusan insiden dengan pegawai-pegawai negeri, tempatan, puak dan sektor swasta.

src: Development on this $350 million system by Northrop Grumman Corporation was begun in March of 2004 with basic operation achieved in just 4 months.
ref: Pembangunan sistem yang bernilai $350 juta ini diusahakan oleh Northrop Grumman Corporation, bermula pada bulan Mac 2004 dengan operasi asas dicapai hanya dalam masa 4 bulan.

src: "The Homeland is more secure when each hometown is more secure," said Secretary of Homeland Security Tom Ridge in DHS's February 24, 2004 press release that launched the program.
ref: "Negeri ini akan lebih selamat apabila setiap kampung halaman menjadi lebih selamat," kata Setiausaha Keselamatan Dalam Negeri, Tom Ridge pada dalam sidang akhbar DHS 24 Februari 2004 yang melancarkan program ini.

src: Future program expansion will include the county level, communication at the classified SECRET level, and the involvement of the private sector.
ref: Program masa depan akan termasuk perluasan ke peringkat daerah, komunikasi di peringkat pengelasan RAHSIA dan penglibatan sektor swasta.

src: With the "Secret" component in place, classified information can now be disseminated to authorized individuals at all levels of government and business throughout the country almost instantly.
ref: Dengan komponen "Rahsia" ditempatkan, maklumat yang telah dikelaskan kini boleh disebarkan kepada individu yang diberi kuasa di semua peringkat kerajaan dan urusan di seluruh negara dengan serta-merta.

src: HSIN lets most government agencies as well as many private companies doing business with the government share information on the whereabouts and suspicious activities of anyone that comes to their attention.
ref: HSIN membolehkan agensi-agensi kerajaan serta syarikat-syarikat swasta yang berurusan dengan kerajaan dapat berkongsi maklumat mengenai tempat dan aktiviti yang mencurigakan oleh sesiapa sahaja yang menarik perhatian mereka.

src: Internal policies and the judgement of the system's users provide privacy and civil rights protections, while who can access the system is determined by DHS.
ref: Polisi dalaman dan penghakiman kepada pengguna sistem itu menyediakan privasi dan hak-hak perlindungan sivil, manakala individu yang boleh mengakses sistem ini ditentukan oleh DHS.

src: A passenger train carrying at least 250 people, many of whom were children, derailed in Serbia-Montenegro and drove into a ravine Tuesday afternoon.
ref: Sebuah kereta api penumpang yang membawa sekurang-kurangnya 250 orang, kebanyakannya kanak-kanak, tergelincir di landasan Serbia-Montenegro dan terjunam ke dalam gaung petang Selasa.

src: Close to 200 have been injured and the death toll has risen to 44.
ref: Hampir 200 orang telah tercedera dan jumlah kematian meningkat kepada 44.

src: Most of the passengers were schoolchildren returning from a ski trip.
ref: Sebahagian besar penumpang adalah kanak-kanak sekolah pulang dari lawatan ski.

src: "The accident occurred because of a failure of the train's braking system," said Interior Minister Jusuf Kalomperovic.
ref: "Kemalangan itu berlaku kerana kegagalan sistem brek kereta api," kata Menteri Dalam Negeri, Jusuf Kalamperovic.

src: At about 4 p.m. the four-car train derailed near Bioče, a small village nearly 15 kilometers northeast of Podgorica as it was emerging from a tunnel above the Moraca River.
ref: Pada kira-kira 4 p.m. sebuah kereta api empat gerabak tergelincir berhampiran Bioče, sebuah perkampungan kecil 15 kilometer dari timur laut Podgorica semasa ia muncul dari terowong di atas Sungai Moraca.

src: "The train simply went wild, out of control," said one injured passenger.
ref: "Kereta api itu hanya bergerak dengan rawak, hilang kawalan," kata seorang penumpang yang cedera.

src: "I was fine because I was in a back compartment, those in the front got the worst of it."
ref: "Saya didenda kerana saya berada di bahagian belakang, mereka yang di hadapan menerima yang paling teruk sekali."

src: "It was horrible, I saw many dead and wounded around me," said another passenger from Hungary, Karman Chofu.
ref: "Ia adalah sangat dahsyat, saya melihat banyak orang mati dan cedera di sekeliling saya," kata penumpang lain dari Hungary, Karman Chofu.

src: "I had fallen asleep when a loud noise woke me," said Stanislava Bukovic, 60, another injured passenger.
ref: "Saya tertidur apabila bunyi yang kuat mengejutkan saya," kata Stanislava Bukovic, 60, penumpang lain yang tercedera.

src: Miodrag Djurovic, the head of the main Podgorica hospital, stated that another five passengers had died overnight.
ref: Miodrag Djurovic, ketua hospital utama Podgorica, menyatakan bahawa lima orang penumpang lain telah meninggal dunia malam semalam.

src: Djurovic also said at least 198 people, 90 of them children, have been treated at the hospital.
ref: Djurovic juga berkata bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 198 orang, di mana 90 orang daripadanya kanak-kanak, telah dirawat di hospital.

src: "The children's hospital admitted 90 children, 34 of them are still there, six have undergone surgery," Djurovic said.
ref: "Hospital kanak-kanak tersebut telah menerima masuk 90 kanak-kanak, dimana 34 daripadanya masih disana and enam orang telah menjalani pembedahan," kata Djurovic.

src: Earlier Deputy Prime Minister Miroslav Ivanisevic told the media that the death toll stood at 30 and the amount injured at 135, but said those figures could rise as rescuers continue to reach victims.
ref: Sebelum ini Timbalan Perdana Menteri, Miroslav Ivanisevic memberitahu media bahawa jumlah kematian adalah sebanyak 30 dan jumlah yang cedera di 135, tetapi berkata angka-angka boleh meningkat kerana penyelamat terus mencari mangsa.

src: Ivanisevic described the wreck "as the worst rail accident in the history of Montenegro," Ivanisevic also said.
ref: Ivanisevic menerangkan bangkai kapal itu "sebagai kemalangan kereta api yang paling teruk dalam sejarah Montenegro," kata Ivanisevic.

src: President Filip Vujanovic and Prime Minister, Milo Djukanovic also rushed to the site.
ref: Presiden Filip Vujanovic dan Perdana Menteri, Milo Djukanovic juga bergegas ke tempat kejadian ini.

src: "A terrible tragedy happened at Bioče and everything is being done to reduce the number of casualties as much as possible," Vujanovic told reporters.
ref: "Sebuah tragedi dahsyat telah berlaku di Bioče dan segala yang dilakukan adalah untuk mengurangkan bilangan mangsa sebanyak mungkin," beritahu Vujanovic kepada pemberita.

src: Because of the accident, Montenegro's transport minister, Andrija Lompar, and National Railways chief Ranko Medenica resigned.
ref: Disebabkan kemalangan itu, Menteri Pengangkutan Montenegro, Andrija Lompar, dan Ketua Jabatan Kereta api Kebangsaan, Ranko Medenica meletak jawatan.

src: The driver of the train has been arrested because of suspicion of negligence.
ref: Pemandu kereta api itu telah ditangkap kerana disyaki kecuaian.

src: The train was heading from the northeastern town of Bijelo Polje to the Montenegrin coastal city of Bar.
ref: Kereta api menuju dari bandar timur laut Bijelo Polje ke bandar pesisiran pantai Montenegrin di Bar.

src: The Houston Astros have fired manager Phil Garner and general manager Tim Purpura less than two years after leading the team to its first World Series appearance (2005).
ref: Houston Astros telah memecat pengurus Phil Garner dan pengurus besar Tim Purpura dalam masa kurang daripada dua tahun selepas mengetuai pasukan untuk penampilan pertama Siri Dunia (2005).

src: Bench coach Cecil Cooper was appointed interim manager and team president Tal Smith will serve as interim general manager.
ref: Jurulatih simpanan, Cecil Cooper telah dilantik pengurus sementara dan presiden pasukan, Tal Smith akan berkhidmat sebagai Pengurus Besar sementara.

src: "I felt this was the time for a change," owner Drayton McLane said.
ref: "Saya rasa ini adalah masa untuk perubahan," kata pemilik, Drayton McLane.

src: Garner took over the Astros in the middle of the 2004 season after Jimy Williams was fired.
ref: Garner mengambil alih Pasukan Astros di tengah-tengah musim 2004 selepas Jimmy Williams dipecat.

src: The Astros went 48-26 in the second half and won 36 of their last 46 games to win the NL wild card, then defeated Atlanta in the first round of the playoffs before losing to St. Louis in Game 7 of the NL Championship Series.
ref: Pasukan Astros dari 48-26 pada separuh kedua dan memenangi 36 terakhir 46 perlawanan untuk menang kad liar NL, kemudian mengalahkan Atlanta pada pusingan pertama pertandingan sebelum tewas kepada St. Louis dalam Permainan ke-7 Kejohanan Siri NL.

src: He has a 985-1,054 career record as a major league manager, including 277-252 with the Astros.
ref: Beliau mempunyai rekod 985-1,054 kerjaya sebagai pengurus liga utama, termasuk 277-252 dengan Pasukan Astros.

src: Purpura joined the organization in 1994 and directed player development and the Astros' six minor league affiliates before taking over from Gerry Hunsicker as GM before the 2005 season.
ref: Purpura menyertai organisasi pada tahun 1994 dan mengarahkan pembangunan pemain dengan enam sekutu liga kecil Astros sebelum mengambil alih daripada Gerry Hunsicker sebagai GM sebelum musim 2005.

src: The Astros are currently in fifth place in the National League Central with a record of 58-73.
ref: The Astros kini di tempat kelima dalam Liga Utama Nasional dengan rekod 58-73.

src: The New Zealand government has now introduced graphic health warnings on cigarette packs.
ref: Kerajaan New Zealand telah memperkenalkan gambar amaran kesihatan pada pek rokok.

src: The new warnings, which replace the text warnings, will show images of gangrenous toes, rotting gums and teeth and diseased lungs and will also include the quit smoking Quitline number.
ref: Amaran baru, yang menggantikan amaran teks, akan menunjukkan imej jari kaki berkelemayuh, gusi reput, gigi dan paru-paru berpenyakit dan juga termasuk nombor telefon program berhenti merokok, Quitline.

src: The new warnings will cover 30% of the front side and 90% of the back.
ref: Amaran baru akan meliputi 30% daripada bahagian depan dan 90% daripada bahagian belakang.

src: The new warnings will come into effect January 2007 but the manufacturers will not have to produce the new warnings until February 27, 2008 and retailers have till August 2008 to clear all their old stock.
ref: Amaran baru akan berkuat kuasa Januari 2007 tetapi pengeluar tidak wajib untuk mengeluarkan amaran baru sehingga 27 Feb 2008 dan peniaga mempunyai masa hingga Ogos 2008 untuk membersihkan semua stok lama mereka.

src: Damien O'Conner, associate minister of health and ex-smoker, said: "Pictures were more effective than written warnings."
ref: Damien O'Conner, ahli sekutu menteri kesihatan dan bekas perokok, berkata: "Gambar lebih berkesan daripada amaran-amaran bertulis."

src: Actually seeing what it does to you is probably more acute than just reading the words on a cigarette packet.
ref: Sebenarnya melihat apa yang ia lakukan terhadap anda mungkin lebih berkesan daripada hanya membaca perkataan pada paket rokok.

src: The approach is designed to shock people into realising smoking kills and causes serious illness.
ref: Pendekatan ini direka untuk mengejutkan orang tentang bahaya merokok dan ia menyebabkan penyakit yang serius.

src: "Using powerful imagery to remind people of the real and horrific effects of smoking will act to deter smokers and discourage New Zealand's young from starting the habit in the first place."
ref: "Dengan menggunakan imej yang kuat untuk mengingatkan orang ramai mengenai kesan sebenar dan kedahsyatan merokok akan bertindak untuk menghalang perokok dan tidak menggalakkan pemuda New Zealand daripada memulakan tabiat merokok dari mula."

src: Other countries which also show graphic warnings include Australia and Canada; they say that the warnings are effective.
ref: Negara-negara lain yang juga menunjukkan amaran grafik termasuk Australia dan Kanada; mereka berkata bahawa amaran berkesan.

src: Chris Laurenson, Health Ministry team leader national drug policy, said that international evidence was strong.
ref: Chris Laurenson, ketua pasukan Kementerian Kesihatan polisi dadah kebangsaan, berkata bahawa bukti antarabangsa adalah kukuh.

src: "That was confirmed by research in New Zealand which supported the effectiveness of pictorial labelling."
ref: "Itu telah disahkan oleh penyelidikan di New Zealand yang menyokong keberkesanan pelabelan bergambar."

src: Altogether there will be fourteen images, of which seven will be released first, with rest following.
ref: Kesemuanya terdapat empat belas imej, di mana tujuh akan dikeluarkan dahulu dan akan dikuti oleh bakinya.

src: Mr O'Connor said: "The images were horrific; but they are what happen to people who smoke in this country."
ref: Encik O'Connor berkata: "Imej-imej adalah ngeri; tetapi ia adalah apa yang berlaku kepada orang-orang yang merokok di negara ini."

src: However, according to Mr O'Conner, one company had used removable sticker that were later removed due to consultation.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, menurut Encik O'Conner, satu syarikat telah menggunakan pelekat boleh tanggal yang kemudiannya dikeluarkan selepas perundingan.

src: The industries will not be reimbursed for any cost that may occur.
ref: Industri tidak akan dibayar balik untuk apa-apa kos yang mungkin berlaku.

src: "They understand what it might mean if they don't and I'm confident that they will," Mr O'Connor said.
ref: "Mereka memahami apa maknanya jika mereka tidak dan saya yakin mereka akan," kata Encik O'Connor.

src: "They have already been implemented in other countries and the NZ tobacco industry has the technology to print the new packets within weeks," Becky Freeman, the Action on Smoking and Health director said.
ref: "Ia telah dilaksanakan di negara-negara lain dan industri tembakau NZ mempunyai teknologi untuk mencetak paket baru dalam beberapa minggu," kata Becky Freeman, Pengarah Tindakan Terhadap Perokok dan Kesihatan.

src: World Heath Organization rules make New Zealand obliged to increase the warning sizes on packets.
ref: Peraturan Pertubuhan Kesihatan Dunia membuat New Zealand wajib untuk meningkatkan saiz amaran pada paket.

src: Pirates have seized control of the Sirius Star, a Saudi-owned oil tanker off the coast of Kenya and are steering her towards Somalia, reports the US Navy.
ref: Lanun telah merampas kawalan Sirius Star, sebuah kapal tangki minyak milik Arab Saudi di luar pantai Kenya dan kemudian mengemudinya ke arah Somalia, lapor Tentera Laut US.

src: The ship was captured roughly 830 kilometers south-east of Mombasa and is reportedly heading towards the Somali port of Eyl.
ref: Kapal itu dirampas kira-kira 830 kilometer di tenggara Mombasa dan dilaporkan menuju ke pelabuhan Somalia di Eyl.

src: The oil tanker was carrying over 2 million barrels of oil at the time of her capture, and was on her way to the United States via Cape Town.
ref: Kapal tangki minyak tersebut membawa lebih 2 juta tong minyak pada masa ia dirampas, dan sedang dalam perjalanan ke Amerika Syarikat melalui Cape Town.

src: Reuters claimed that news of the attack raised crude oil prices around the world.
ref: Reuters mendakwa berita serangan itu menaikkan harga minyak mentah di seluruh dunia.

src: Vela International Marine, the ship's owner, has said the Sirius Star is fully loaded.
ref: Vela Marin Antarabangsa, pemilik kapal, telah mengatakan Sirius Star telah diisi penuh.

src: The US Navy reports that all 25 crew from the United Kingdom, Croatia, the Philippines, Poland, and Saudi Arabia are 'safe'.
ref: Tentera Laut US melaporkan bahawa kesemua 25 anak kapal yang berasal dari United Kingdom, Croatia, Filipina, Poland, dan Arab Saudi adalah 'selamat'.

src: The area off the East coast of Africa has seen a significant amount of piracy.
ref: Kawasan di luar pantai timur Afrika telah menyaksikan sejumlah besar masalah lanun.

src: In 2007, one-third of the world's piracy incidents occurred in this region.
ref: Pada tahun 2007, satu pertiga daripada kes pelanunan seluruh dunia berlaku di rantau ini.

src: Hijacking off the coast of Somalia has become increasingly common over the last decade.
ref: Rampasan di luar pantai Somalia telah menjadi semakin biasa sejak sedekad yang lalu.

src: Over the last year multiple countries have expressed concern or committed their navies to dealing with Somali pirates.
ref: Sepanjang tahun lepas, beberapa negara telah melahirkan kebimbangan atau mengarahkan tentera laut mereka untuk berurusan dengan lanun Somalia.

src: Most recently, South Korea has announced intentions to send one of its destroyers after five South Koreans were kidnapped in a Japanese cargo ship hijacking.
ref: Baru-baru ini, Korea Selatan telah mengumumkan niat untuk menghantar salah satu kapal pemusnah selepas lima rakyat Korea Selatan telah diculik dalam sebuah rampasan kapal kargo Jepun.

src: The Sirius Star is the largest ship captured by pirates in the area to date.
ref: Sirius Star adalah kapal terbesar ditangkap oleh lanun di kawasan itu setakat ini.

src: This also sets a record for the farthest from the shore that pirates have struck.
ref: Ini juga menetapkan satu rekod bagi rampasan yang paling jauh dari pantai yang lanun tersebut lakukan.

src: California governor Arnold Schwarzenegger announced his support for Arizona Senator John McCain's presidential bid Thursday morning.
ref: Gabenor California Arnold Schwarzenegger mengumumkan sokongannya untuk penamaan president Senator Arizona John McCain Khamis pagi.

src: Schwarzenegger called McCain "a great American hero and an extraordinary leader" and praised him for his ability to cross party lines.
ref: Schwarzenegger memanggil McCain "hero hebat Amerika dan pemimpin luarbiasa" dan memujinya untuk kebolehannya melangkaui garisan parti.

src: "I think Senator McCain has proven over and over again that he is reaching across the aisle to get things done," Schwarzenegger said.
ref: "Saya fikir Senator McCain telah berulang kali membuktikan yang dia bertolak ansur dengan parti lawan untuk mendapatkan sesuatu," kata Schwarzenegger.

src: Also present was former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani, who recently dropped out of the race and pledged to support McCain.
ref: Turut hadir ialah bekas datuk bandar New York Rudy Giuliani, yang baru-baru ini digugurkan dari bertanding dan berikrar akan menyokong McCain.

src: "This is a man who is moving us into our future," Giuliani said.
ref: "Ini ialah lelaki yang sedang menggerakkan kita ke masa depan kita," kata Giulani.

src: "He understands how to do it and also understands how to keep us safe in a time of peril."
ref: "Dia faham bagaimana untuk melakukannya dan juga faham bagaimana untuk menjaga keselamatan kita di dalam waktu berisiko."

src: Schwarzenegger said he also admires Giuliani and only decided to endorse McCain after Giuliani had dropped out.
ref: Schwarzenegger berkata dia juga mengagumi Giuliani dan hanya memutuskan untuk menyokong McCain selepas Giuliani keluar.

src: "Both of them are friends of mine and this is why I really didn't want to endorse anybody," Schwarzenegger said.
ref: "Kedua-dua mereka adalah kawan saya dan sebab itulah saya benar-benar tidak mahu menyokong orang lain," kata Schwarzenegger.

src: McCain used this as an opportunity to discuss his views on greenhouse gas emissions and environmental technology, which have come under criticism from others in the Republican Party.
ref: McCain menggunakan ini sebagai peluang untuknya membincangkan pandangannya mengenai pelepasan gas rumah hijau dan teknologi alam sekitar, yang mana telah dikritikan oleh yang lain dari Parti Republik.

src: "We don't have to have increased costs to Americans," McCain said.
ref: "Kita tidak perlu untuk menambahkan kos kepada warga Amerika," kata McCain.

src: "In fact, with the development of green technologies, we can have reduced costs to the American consumer with the development of new technologies."
ref: "Sebagai fakta, dengan pembangunan teknologi hijau, kita akan dapat mengurangkan kos kepada pengguna Amerika dengan pembangunan teknologi baru."

src: California is one of the 24 states whose primary will be held on February 5, also known as Super Tuesday.
ref: California adalah satu dari 24 negeri yang undian pertama akan diadakan pada 5 Februari, juga dikenali sebagai Super Selasa.

src: Nearly 15% of the delegates needed to receive the Republican nomination will come from California.
ref: Hampir 15% dari perwakilan perlu menerima pencalonan Rebuklik datang dari California.

src: Democrats Hillary Clinton and Barack Obama were also campaigning in the state on Thursday.
ref: Ahli Demokratik Hillary Clinton dan Barack Obama juga turut berkempen di negeri tersebut pada Khamis.

src: Two people were killed in a magnitude 5.9 earthquake in Turkey shortly before midnight local time on Thursday.
ref: Dua orang terbunuh dalam gempabumi bermagnitud 5.9 di Turki sebaik sahaja selepas tengah malam waktu tempatan pada Khamis.

src: Officials said two people were killed;
ref: Pegawai mengatakan yang dua orang terbunuh;

src: one was thought to have suffered a heart attack and the other died after jumping from a window in panic.
ref: Seorang disangkakan menderita serangan jantung dan seorang lagi mati selepas melompat keluar dari tingkap dalam kepanikan.

src: Emergency services dispatched search and rescue crews and gave out blankets, food and water.
ref: Khidmat kecemasan menghantar anggota mencari dan menyelamat dan mengedarkan selimt, makanan dan air.

src: Officials said a wastewater dam had not been damaged by the earthquake, and it posed "no risk."
ref: Pegawai berkata yang loji air kumbahan tidak dirosakan oleh gempa bumi tersebut, dan ia menandakan "tiada risiko."

src: The earthquake was felt as far away as the Aegean province of İzmir, the northwestern provinces of Bursa and İstanbul, and even the city of Edirne, not far from the Bulgarian and Greek and borders, because the depth was very shallow.
ref: Gempa bumi itu dirasakan sejauh wilayah Aegean Izmir, wilayah di barat laut Bursa dan Istanbul, dan juga bandar Erdine, tidak jauh dari Bulgaria dan Greek dan sempadan-sempadan, kerana kedalaman yang sangat cetek.

src: More than 18,000 people died following two earthquakes with a magnitude of more than 7.0 in northwestern Turkey in 1999.
ref: Lebih dari 18,000 orang mati berikutan dua gempabumi dengan magnitud lebih dari 7.0 di barat laut Turki pada 1999.

src: Mosaic Fashions, a UK clothing firm, is set to make history as it becomes the first foreign company to list on the Iceland Stock Exchange (ISE).
ref: Mosaic Fashion, sebuah firma pakaian UK, akan membuat sejarah apabila ia menjadi syarikat asing pertama tersenarai dalam Bursa Saham Iceland (ISE).

src: Mosaic, which owns the clothing brands Oasis, Karen Millen, Coast and Whistles, operates 600 stores and is majority owned by retail investment group Baugur.
ref: Mosaic, yang memiliki jenama pakaian Oasis, Karen Millen, Coast dan Whistles, mengendalikan 600 kedai dan majoritinya dimiliki oleh kumpulan pelaburan runcit Baugur.

src: Mosaic employs approximately 5,400 staff throughout the UK and Ireland.
ref: Mosaic mengambil kerja lebih kurang 5,400 pekerja seluruh UK dan Ireland.

src: The exchange was founded in 1985 and has since grown to encompass 34 firms with a combined value of over US$21bn (€16.3bn; GBP11.1bn).
ref: Pertukaran tersebut diasakan pada 1985 dan sejak itu telah berkembang merangkumi 34 firma dengan gabungan nilai melebihi US$21bn (€16.3bn; GBP11.1bn).

src: A red tide continues along South Padre Island and into Mexico, according to officials with the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department.
ref: Air pasang merah berterusan disepanjang Pulau South Padre dan ke Mexico, menurut pegawai-pegawai dari Jabatan Taman dan Hidupan Liar Texas.

src: Effects include stinging eyes, respiratory difficulties, and dead marine life.
ref: Kesan termasuk pedih mata, kesukaran bernafas, dan kematian hidupan liar.

src: Red tide is caused by a higher than normal concentration of Karenia brevis, a naturally-occurring single-celled marine organism.
ref: Air pasang merah ini diakibatkan oleh kepekatan Karenia brevis yang lebih tinggi dari biasa, organisma laut bersel tunggal yang berlaku semula jadi.

src: Natural factors can intersect to produce ideal conditions, allowing this algae to increase in number dramatically.
ref: Faktor semula jadi boleh bersilang untuk menghasilkan keadaan ideal, membenarkan alga ini meningkat dalam jumlah yang dramatik.

src: The algae produces a neurotoxin that can disable nerves in both humans and fish.
ref: Alga tersebut menghasilkan neurotoksin yang boleh melumpuhkan saraf kedua-dua manusia dan ikan.

src: Fish often die because of the high concentrations of the toxin in the waters.
ref: Ikan biasanya mati akibat kepekatan toksin yang tinggi didalam air.

src: Humans can be affected by breathing affected water taken into the air by wind and waves.
ref: Manusia boleh terjejas dengan menghirup nafas dari mengandungi air yang terjejas dibawa ke udara oleh angin dan ombak.

src: Also, South Padre officials are investigating a paralyzed cat and deceased coyote who may have consumed fish killed by the red tide.
ref: Juga, pegawai South Padre sedang menyiasat kucing yang lumpuh dan anjing hutan yang mati yang mungkin memakan ikan dibunuh oleh air pasang merah.

src: This bloom has lingered almost three weeks, and affects waters parallel to South Padre Island for about 25 miles, and may extend as far as 10 miles along Mexico beaches.
ref: Perkembangan ini telah berterusan lebih kurang tiga minggu, dan menjejaskan air selari dengan Pulau South Padre untuk lebih kurang 25 batu, dan mungkin berlanjutan sejauh 10 batu sepanjang pantai Mexico.

src: Financial analysts say Google is planning an e-wallet service that could eventually compete with eBay's payment service PayPal.
ref: Penganalisis kewangan mengatakan Google merancang perkhidmatan e-dompet yang mungkin akhirnya dapat bertanding dengan PayPal, perkhidmatan pembayaran eBay.

src: The rumor is a first sign of Google's expected expansion of revenue sources to capitalize on its advertising customer base and search-engine traffic.
ref: Khabar angin itu merupakan penanda pertama berkenaan ramalan pertambahan sumber pendapatan Google dengan cara mengambil kesempatan terhadap pengiklanan berasaskan pelanggan dan trafik enjin cariannya.

src: What form that expansion will take has been a hotly debated subject for the company whose stock valuation momentarily made it the world's biggest media company on June 7, 2005.
ref: Bentuk apakah yang pertambahan tersebut akan ambil telah menjadi topik perdebatan hangat untuk syarikat tersebut dimana penilaian stok seketika menjadikannya syarikat media terbesar dunia pada 7 Jun, 2005.

src: Even Microsoft has been mentioned as a possible future competitor.
ref: Sehinggakan Microsoft telah disebut sebagai pesaing berkemungkinan masa depan.

src: Ebay's stock valuation dipped more than 2% on the news.
ref: Nilai stok Ebay jatuh lebih dari 2% pada berita tersebut.

src: But one business analyst saw potential benefit for Paypal , depending on exactly how the "Google Wallet" takes shape.
ref: Tetapi seorang penganalisis perniagaan melihat potensi keuntungan untuk Paypal, bergantung sepenuhnya kepada bagaimana "Dompet Google" berbentuk.

src: The uncertainty underlined the lack of substantive information behind the rumor.
ref: Ketidakpastian menggarisi kekurangan maklumat sebenar dibelakang khabar angin tersebut.

src: According to the New York Times, the CEO of a major online merchant, who spoke on the condition of anonymity, was approached by Google to take part in this service.
ref: Menurut New York Times, CEO kepada perniagaan utama dalam talian, yang bercakap diatas syarat tidak disiarkan nama, telah didekati Google untuk mengambil bahagian dalam perkhidmatan ini.

src: China looks to launch it's second manned space mission in October, two years after it's first flight, a newspaper reported Friday.
ref: China berharap untuk melancarkan misi angkasa yang dipandu manusia yang keduanya pada bulan Oktober, dua tahun selepas penerbangan pertamanyanya, lapor sebuah akhbar semalam.

src: The government planned to launch a two-man crew into orbit in September or October on a five to six day flight.
ref: Kerajaan itu merancang untuk menghantar dua anak kapal lelaki ke orbit pada bulan September atau Oktober dalam satu penerbangan selama lima hingga enam hari.

src: The Shenzhou VI capsule will "preferably be launched in early October," said Sun Weigang the director of the Space Department of the China Aerospace Science and Technology Corp, said in the report in the China Daily newspaper.
ref: Kapsul Shenzhou VI akan "sebaik-baiknya dilancar pada awal Oktober," kata Sun Weigang pengarah Jabatan Angkasa Perbadanan Sains Angkasa Lepas dan Teknologi China, berkata dalam satu laporan dalam akhbar Harian China.

src: Chinese officials say to they plan to land an unmanned probe on the moon by 2010 and operate a space station.
ref: Pegawai dari China berkata mereka merancang untuk mendaratkan sebuah prob tanpa manusia di bulan pada tahun 2010 dan mengendalikan sebuah stesen angkasa.

src: Iraqi Brigadier General Qassim Atta al-Mussawi reported that Operation Law and Order (Arabic: Fardh Al-Qanoon) has been successful in curbing violence in the capital.
ref: Briged Jeneral Iraq Qassim Atta al-Mussawi melaporkan bahawa Undang-undang Operasi dan Perintah (Bahasa Arab: Al-Fardhu Qanoon) telah berjaya membendung keganasan di ibu negara.

src: Coalition forces have swept through various Baghdad neighborhoods in the past few months.
ref: Tentera persekutuan telah bergegas ke beberapa kawasan Baghdad dalam beberapa bulan yang lalu.

src: Atta, a spokesperson for the operation cited comparative statistics for the four-week periods of mid-January to mid-February versus mid-February to mid-March: * Civilian killing: 1440 to 265 * Roadside bombings: 163 to 102 * Carbombs: 56 to 36 * Mortar attacks: 204 to 109 * Assassination incidents: 519 to 22 * Kidnappings: 98 to 10
ref: Atta, seorang jurucakap untuk operasi itu yang menamakan statistik perbandingan bagi tempoh empat minggu dari pertengahan Januari hingga pertengahan Februari berbanding dengan pertengahan Februari hingga pertengahan Mac: *pembunuhan Orang Awam: 1440 kepada 265 * pengeboman Tepi Jalam: 163 kepada 102 * Pengeboman kereta: 56 kepada 36 * serangan Meriam : 204 kepada 109 * insiden Pembunuhan orang ternama: 519 kepada 22 * Penculikan: 98 kepada 10

src: It is not clear what these numbers are based on, and independent estimates of the death toll are much higher.
ref: Adalah tidak jelas angka-angka ini berdasarkan apa, dan anggaran bebas mengenai jumlah kematian adalah jauh lebih tinggi.

src: According to data compiled by Iraq Body Count (IBC), a volunteer project that maintains a database of civilian deaths in Iraq from media reports, at least 393 people died in and around Baghdad between February 15 and March 11.
