src: The Republican primary ballot application cost was $35,000, versus $2,500 for the Democratic application.
ref: Kos permohonan undi utama Republikan adalah $ 35,000, berbanding $ 2,500 untuk permohonan Demokrat.

src: On the 3rd day of the 2007 World Deaf Swimming Championships, the Men 1500m Freestyle, Women 800m Freestyle, 50m Breaststroke, 200m Freestyle, 4x100m Medley Relay Groups finales took place during the afternoon and evening.
ref: Pada hari ke-3 untuk Kejohanan Renang Dunia untuk orang Pekak 2007, perenang lelaki 1500m Gaya Bebas, perenang wanita 800m gaya bebas, 50m Dada, 200m gaya bebas, 4x100m Medley Relay Kumpulan peringkat akhir akan bermula pada waktu petang dan malam.

src: Belarus deaf swimmer Natalia Deeva not only broke old "women 50m breaststroke record" established by her teammate Aksana Petrushenka on June 19, 2006 with 35.28 seconds at 50m Breaststroke heat session within 34.97 seconds, but also broke her record again at final session within 34.91 seconds.
ref: Perenang pekak Belarus Natalia Deeva bukan sahaja memecahkan rekod lama "wanita 50m kuak dada" yang dicatatkan oleh rakan sepasukan beliau Aksana Petrushenka pada 19 Jun 2006 dengan 35.28 saat untuk 50m sesi saringan Dada dalam 34.97 saat, tetapi juga memecahkan rekod sekali lagi pada sesi akhir dalam tempoh 34.91 saat.

src: Besides of individual record, Natalia Deeva and Aksana Petrushenka also participated Women 4x100m Medley Relay Group Final, not only won the 1st place, but also broke former record established by Russian National Team on January 10, 2005 with 4 minute and 39.63 seconds at that group final within 4 minute and 38 seconds.
ref: Selain rekod individu, Natalia Deeva dan Aksana Petrushenka juga mengambil bahagian wanita 4x100m Medley Relay Kumpulan Peringkat Akhir, bukan sahaja memenangi tempat pertama, tetapi juga memecahkan rekod lama yang dicatatkan oleh Pasukan Kebangsaan Rusia pada 10 Januari 2005 dengan 4 minit dan 39.63 saat pada kumpulan yang akhir dalam tempoh 4 minit dan 38 saat.

src: With the three-times new world records written, that's exactly a "New Record Day" for Belarus.
ref: Dengan rekod dunia tiga kali baru ditulis, ia betul-betul "Hari Rekod Baru" untuk Belarus.

src: Even though heats and finales were still in process, but due to a torrential rain in Taiwan, the Award Ceremony of 3rd Matchday has been postponed to next matchday.
ref: Walaupun peringkat saringan dan akhir masih dalam proses, tetapi disebabkan oleh hujan lebat di Taiwan, Majlis Anugerah untuk perlawanan hari 3 telah ditunda ke hari perlawanan yang akan datang.

src: Adam is a robot developed by Welsh Aberystwyth University researchers which combines artificial intelligence (AI), robotics and automation to independently conduct and analyse biological laboratory research.
ref: Adam adalah sebuah robot yang diperbuat oleh penyelidik Universiti Aberystwyth di Wales yang menggabungkan kecerdasan buatan (AI), robotik dan automasi untuk menjalankan dan menganalisis kajian makmal biologi secara bebas.

src: "What's new and exciting about Adam is [it is] the first time we've managed to show that a computer can not only think up new scientific ideas, but experimentally test them and decide whether they're true," said Ross King, a computer science professor and lead researcher at Aberystwyth University, "Adam makes up its own mind what to do.
ref: "Apa yang baru dan menarik tentang Adam adalah [ia] kali pertama kami berjaya menunjukkan bahawa komputer bukan sahaja boleh fikirkan idea-idea saintifik baru, menguji mereka melalui eksperimen dan membuat keputusan sama ada mereka betul," kata Ross King, seorang profesor sains komputer dan penyelidik di Universiti Aberystwyth, "Adam membuat keputusan sendiri apa yang perlu dilakukan."

src: He says that for other lab experiments the hardware is already in place, the only step needed is to change the software.
ref: Dia berkata untuk eksperimen makmal lain perkakasan telah sedia ada, satu-satunya langkah yang diperlukan adalah untuk menukar perisian.

src: The artificial intelligence alone spans three computers which holds the databases and analytical software to enable Adam to think.
ref: Kecerdasan buatan sahaja menjangkau tiga komputer yang memegang pangkalan data dan perisian analisis untuk membolehkan Adam untuk berfikir.

src: For the yeast experiment, Adam was loaded with databases which hold known information relating to yeasts and organisms.
ref: Untuk eksperimen yis, Adam telah dimuatkan dengan data yang menyimpan maklumat yang diketahui berkaitan dengan yis dan organisma.

src: Adam compared all fields in the database to find the areas of missing information from which he devised 20 hypotheses.
ref: Adam membandingkan semua bidang di dalam pangkalan data untuk mencari bidang maklumat yang hilang dan dia telah mencipta 20 hipotesis.

src: Adam's AI is connected to robotic arms, sensors, incubators and cameras which enable Adam to start over 1,000 individual experiments every day and follow their progress over a week.
ref: Kecerdasan buatan Adam dihubungkan dengan tangan robotik, sensor, inkubator dan kamera yang membolehkan Adam memulakan 1000 eksperimen individu setiap hari dan mengikuti perkembangan mereka lebih daripada satu minggu.

src: A part of the process is that Adam's AI can cycle and analyze the results of the experiments as well doing routine repetitious lab work.
ref: Sebahagian daripada proses ini adalah bahawa kecerdasan buatan Adam boleh berkitar dan menganalisis keputusan eksperimen dan juga melakukan rutin kerja makmal yang berulang kali.

src: Following Adam's testing, King's team manually tested three of Adam's hypotheses and found that the robot's conclusions were correct, and each was a breakthrough to the scientific community.
ref: Berikutan ujian Adam, pasukan King menguji tiga hipotesis Adam secara manual dan mendapati bahawa kesimpulan robot adalah betul, dan setiapnya merupakan satu kejayaan kepada masyarakat saintifik.

src: William Melek, an assistant professor of mechanical engineering at Ontario's University of Waterloo, has noted that to set up the AI needed for subsequent experiments involving new biological variables and criteria, the human expertise would be time consuming to customize it.
ref: William Melek, penolong profesor kejuruteraan mekanikal di Waterloo Universiti di Ontario, telah menyatakan bahawa untuk menubuhkan Kecerdasan Buatan yang diperlukan untuk eksperimen berikutnya yang melibatkan pemboleh ubah biologi dan kriteria yang baru, kepakaran manusia akan memakan masa untuk menyesuaikannya.

src: The usefulness would be limited therefore to the allotment of human input needed to set up Adam.
ref: Kegunaannya akan terhad kepada penguntukan input manusia yang diperlukan untuk membina Adam.

src: David Waltz of Columbia University and Bruce Buchanan of the University of Pittsburgh say that "For the foreseeable future, the prospect of using automated systems as assistants holds vast promise as these assistants are becoming not only faster but much broader in their capabilities -- more knowledgeable, more creative, and more self-reflective,"
ref: David Waltz dari Universiti Columbia dan Bruce Buchanan dari Pittsburgh Universiti mengatakan bahawa "Untuk masa akan datang, prospek menggunakan sistem automatik sebagai pembantu mempunyai potensi luas kerana pembantu ini menjadi bukan sahaja lebih cepat tetapi lebih luas dalam keupayaan mereka - lebih berpengetahuan, lebih kreatif, dan lebih merenung perlakuan diri,"

src: They note the potential of such lab assistants which may more efficiently process the research data.
ref: Mereka mendapati potensi pembantu makmal begitu mungkin memproses data penyelidikan dengan lebih cekap.

src: It was reported that Adam cost about $1million in production costs and this was weighed against the costs of hiring lab techs.
ref: Dilaporkan bahawa Adam menelan kos kira-kira $1 juta dalam kos pengeluaran dan ini dipertimbangkan dengan kos mengupah juruteknik makmal.

src: King said, We made many mistakes and learned from Adam.
ref: King berkata, Kami membuat banyak kesilapan dan belajar dari Adam.

src: Eve is the second AI computer under development by Professor King's research team.
ref: Eve adalah komputer Kercerdasan Buatan kedua di bawah pembangunan oleh pasukan penyelidikan Profesor King.

src: Eve's artificial intelligence will be enhanced to analyze compounds needed for medicinal drugs which may treat killer diseases such as malaria.
ref: Kecerdasan buatan Eve akan dipertingkatkan untuk menganalisis sebatian yang diperlukan untuk ubat ubatan yang boleh merawat penyakit pembunuh seperti malaria.

src: Customers of Vodafone 3G in New Zealand are now able to watch live video news bulletins on their mobiles.
ref: Pelanggan Vodafone 3G di New Zealand kini boleh menonton buletin berita video secara langsung dengan telefon bimbit mereka.

src: This service, offered in corporation with the Prime channel, part of the Sky News network, replaces a service just offering news clips.
ref: Perkhidmatan ini, yang ditawarkan dalam kerjasama dengan saluran Prime, sebahagian daripada rangkaian Sky News, menggantikan perkhidmatan dengan hanya menawarkan klip berita.

src: To access the live bulletin, a 3G handset is required and the phone needs to be in a 3G coverage area.
ref: Untuk mengakses buletin secara langsung, telefon bimbit 3G diperlukan dan telefon perlu berada di dalam kawasan liputan 3G.

src: At 5:30PM the Sky News streamed channel will automatically broadcast Prime's 'First at 5.30' show until 6PM.
ref: Pada pukul 5:30 PM Berita Sky saluran akan distrim secara automatik akan menyiarkan rancangan Prime 'First at 5.30'sehingga 6PM.

src: To watch the 'live!' mobile tv channels, customers must either pay a flat fee of $2.99 a week for unlimited access, or pay 99 cents for a one-off session lasting fifteen minutes.
ref: Untuk menonton saluran tv mudah alih 'siaran langsung', pelanggan mestilah sama ada membayar yuran sama rata $2.99 seminggu untuk akses tanpa had, atau membayar 99 sen untuk sesi sekaligus yang bertahan selama lima belas minit.

src: The militant Islamist group Taliban attacked a hotel in Kabul, Afghanistan last night.
ref: Militan kumpulan Islam Taliban menyerang sebuah hotel di Kabul, Afghanistan semalam.

src: Seven people, including a U.S. citizen and a journalist from the Norwegian newspaper Dagbladet were killed.
ref: Tujuh orang, termasuk seorang warganegara Amerika dan seorang wartawan dari akhbar Dagbladet Norway terbunuh.

src: Norwegian Minister of Foreign Affairs Jonas Gahr Støre is staying at the hotel, but was unharmed.
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Norway Jonas Gahr Store yang menginap di hotel itu, tidak mengalami sebarang kecederaan.

src: The terrorists attacked the five-star Serena hotel with AK-47 assault rifles, suicide vests, and grenades.
ref: Pengganas menyerang hotel lima bintang Serena dengan senapang serangan AK-47, jaket bunuh diri, dan bom tangan.

src: The likely target was Mr. Gahr Støre and a Norwegian delegation, who evacuated into the cellar.
ref: Sasaran mungkin adalah Encik Gahr Store dan delegasi Norway, yang dipindahkan ke dalam ruangan bawah tanah.

src: U.S. military forced rushed to the scene, and managed to kill at least one of the attackers.
ref: Tentera Amerika Syarikat terpaksa bergegas ke tempat kejadian, dan berjaya membunuh sekurang-kurangnya salah seorang daripada penyerang.

src: Taliban spokesman Zabiullah Mujahid claimed responsibility shortly after the attack.
ref: Jurucakap Taliban Zabiullah Mujahid mendakwa bertanggungjawab sejurus selepas serangan itu.

src: White House press secretary Dana Perino described the attackers as “deliberate, patient people who will murder innocents”, and said that the attack “underscores the reason we have to stay on the offense against the extremists in places like Kabul but also in other places around the world.”
ref: Setiausaha Akhbar Rumah Putih Dana Perino menyifatkan penyerang sebagai "orang berhati-hati, sabar yang akan membunuh orang yang tidak bersalah," dan berkata bahawa serangan itu "menegaskan sebab kami terpaksa tetap menyinggung perasaan golongan pelampau di tempat-tempat seperti Kabul tetapi juga di tempat-tempat lain di seluruh dunia."

src: The Iraqi government has demanded the immediate withdrawal of Turkish troops, saying the five-day incursion is threatening their otherwise friendly relations.
ref: Kerajaan Iraq telah meminta pengunduran segera tentera Turki, mengatakan serangan selama lima hari mengancam hubungan mereka.

src: Iraq's council of ministers says the Turkish military is violating Iraqi sovereignty by conducting the incursion into Kurdish areas of northern Iraq.
ref: Menteri majlis Iraq berkata tentera Turki mencabul kedaulatan Iraq dengan menjalankan pencerobohan ke kawasan Kurdistan di utara Iraq.

src: Ali al-Dabbagh, the spokesman for the Iraqi government, says the government rejects the unilateral Turkish incursion because it is a threat to their good neighborly relations.
ref: Ali al-Dabbagh, jurucakap kerajaan Iraq, berkata kerajaan Turki menolak pencerobohan satu pihak kerana ia adalah satu ancaman kepada hubungan kejiranan baik mereka.

src: The Turkish military crossed into Iraq to chase out Kurdish rebels from the Kurdistan Workers Party.
ref: Tentera Turki menyeberang ke Iraq untuk menghalau pemberontak Kurdistan dari Parti Pekerja Kurdistan.

src: The rebels want autonomy for Kurds in Turkey and have used bases inside Iraq to launch attacks on Turkish forces.
ref: Pemberontak mahu autonomi bagi orang Kurdistan di Turki dan telah menggunakan asas dalam Iraq untuk melancarkan serangan ke atas tentera Turki.

src: Al-Dabbagh acknowledged the threat posed to Turkey by the rebels and said the government stands ready for dialogue.
ref: Al-Dabbagh mengakui ancaman ke atas Turki oleh pemberontak dan berkata kerajaan bersedia untuk berdialog.

src: About 20 percent of Turkish citizens are Kurds and in the southeast, bordering Iraq, they make up the majority.
ref: Kira-kira 20 peratus daripada rakyat Turki adalah orang Kurdistan dan di bahagian tenggara, yang bersempadan dengan Iraq, mereka adalah majoriti.

src: But Kurds in Turkey say their culture and language are oppressed.
ref: Tetapi orang Kurdistan di Turki mengatakan budaya dan bahasa mereka tertindas.

src: Mahmoud al-Mashhadani, president of the Iraqi Parliament, says they have asked Turkey to resolve the situation peacefully.
ref: Mahmoud al-Mashhadani, Presiden Parlimen Iraq, berkata mereka meminta Turki untuk menyelesaikannya dengan aman.

src: He says the Turks should hold a referendum in south Turkey to give the Kurds the rights they want.
ref: Beliau berkata orang Turki perlu mengadakan referendum di selatan Turki untuk memberikan orang Kurdistan hak-hak yang mereka mahu.

src: Iraq's Shiite parliament ministers issued a statement rejecting the Turkish military operation and supporting calls for their immediate withdrawal.
ref: Menteri Syiah parlimen Iraq mengeluarkan kenyataan menolak operasi ketenteraan Turki dan menyokong saranan untuk pengunduran mereka dengan segera.

src: Elsewhere, a suicide bomber detonated in a bus near the northern city of Mosul, killing at least nine and wounding several others.
ref: Di tempat lain, seorang pengebom berani mati meletup dalam bas berhampiran bandar utara Mosul, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya sembilan orang dan mencederakan beberapa yang lain.

src: Meanwhile, millions of Shiites in Iraq gathered in the southern Iraqi city of Karbala for Arbaeen, a major Shiite commemoration.
ref: Sementara itu, berjuta-juta Syiah di Iraq berkumpul di bandar Iraq selatan Karbala untuk Arbain, peringatan Syiah utama.

src: Iraqi TV showed huge crowds of Shiites walking in procession, beating drums, and whipping and hitting themselves in ritual prostration.
ref: TV Iraq menunjukkan orang ramai Syiah berjalan dalam perarakan, memukul gendang, dan menyebat dan memukul diri mereka dalam sujud.

src: More than 60 Shiite pilgrims were killed while making their way to Karbala this week, most of them from a Sunday suicide bombing.
ref: Lebih daripada 60 jemaah Syiah terbunuh semasa berjalan ke Karbala minggu ini, sebahagian besar daripada mereka akibat pengeboman bunuh diri pada hari Ahad.

src: A massive earthquake, registering 7.0 on the moment magnitude scale, struck Haiti yesterday, destroying many buildings, disrupting communications, and burying an unknown number of people underneath rubble.
ref: Gempa bumi besar, yang mencatatkan 7.0 pada skala magnitud momen, melanda Haiti semalam, memusnahkan banyak bangunan, mengganggu komunikasi, dan menanam orang yang tidak diketahui jumlahnya di bawah runtuhan.

src: Thousands of people are feared to have been killed by the tremors, which were felt as far away as Venezuela.
ref: Beribu-ribu orang dikhuatiri telah terbunuh oleh gegaran yang dirasai sejauh Venezuela.

src: Witnesses say bodies were lining the streets of the capital, Port-au-Prince, after the quake struck on Tuesday afternoon, sending a cloud of dust from falling buildings into the sky.
ref: Saksi berkata mayat melapisi jalan-jalan di ibu negara, Port-au-Prince, selepas gempa bumi itu melanda pada petang Selasa, menghantar awan debu dari bangunan runtuh ke langit.

src: The quake was centered about sixteen kilometers from the capital, and struck at a depth of just ten kilometers, exacerbating the damage.
ref: Gempa bumi itu berpusat kira-kira enam belas kilometer dari ibu negara, dan melanda pada kedalaman hanya sebanyak sepuluh kilometer, memburukkan lagi kerosakan.

src: At least 27 aftershocks were also recorded, the strongest of which came in at 5.5 and 5.9 magnitude.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 27 gegaran susulan juga telah dicatatkan, yang paling kuat yang datang pada magnitud 5.5 dan 5.9.

src: A tsunami alert was initially issued following the tremor, but it was retracted shortly afterwards.
ref: Satu amaran tsunami pada mulanya dikeluarkan berikutan gegaran, tetapi ia ditarik balik tidak lama selepas itu.

src: Buildings across the capital have collapsed, including the presidential palace and the headquarters of the United Nations peacekeeping mission in Haiti.
ref: Bangunan di seluruh ibu negara telah runtuh, termasuk istana presiden dan ibu pejabat misi pengaman Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu di Haiti.

src: However, the president, René Préval, and his wife reportedly survived the collapse of the building.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, presiden, René Préval, dan isterinya dilaporkan terselamat daripada keruntuhan bangunan.

src: The country's envoy to the United States believed damage costs could reach billions of dollars.
ref: Duta negara itu untuk Amerika Syarikat percaya kos kerosakan boleh mencecah berbilion-bilion dolar.

src: UN peacekeeping chief Alain Le Roy said many people were in the UN building when it went down and they remain unaccounted for.
ref: Ketua pengaman UN Alain Le Roy berkata, ramai orang berada dalam bangunan UN ketika ia terhempas dan mereka belum diambil kira.

src: A Brazilian military official later said four Brazilian soldiers who were part of the UN mission were killed.
ref: Seorang pegawai tentera Brazil kemudian berkata empat tentera Brazil yang merupakan sebahagian daripada misi UN terbunuh.

src: The Notre Dame of the Assumption Cathedral in Port-au-Prince was also destroyed, killing Joseph Serge Miot, the Archbishop of Port-au-Prince.
ref: Katedral Notre Dame of the Assumption di Port-au-Prince turut musnah, membunuh Joseph Serge Miot, Ketua Biskop Port-au-Prince.

src: In a statement released yesterday, the UN remarked that "[f]or the moment, a large number of personnel remain unaccounted for."
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan yang dikeluarkan hari ini, UN mengatakan bahawa "buat masa ini, sebilangan besar anggota belum diambil kira."

src: India's has labelled honour killings a "slur on the nation," and warned the death penalty will await those found guilty of the crime.
ref: India telah melabelkan pembunuhan maruah satu "penghinaan kepada negara," dan memberi amaran bahawa hukuman mati akan menunggu mereka yang didapati bersalah atas jenayah itu.

src: An independent study says each year an estimated 900 people are murdered in India for bringing dishonour to their families, usually by falling in love and marrying outside their caste or within their sub-caste.
ref: Satu kajian bebas berkata setiap tahun kira-kira 900 orang dibunuh di India kerana membawa keaiban kepada keluarga mereka, biasanya dengan jatuh cinta dan berkahwin di luar kasta mereka atau dalam sub-kasta mereka.

src: Honour killings, accepted as a cultural tradition in some parts of India, are normally punished with life imprisonment.
ref: Pembunuhan maruah, diterima sebagai tradisi budaya di beberapa kawasan di India, biasanya dihukum penjara seumur hidup.

src: But Justices Markandey Katju and Gyan Sudha Misra have now called for a tougher stance, directing courts throughout India to use capital punishment in their sentencing.
ref: Tetapi Hakim Markandey Katju dan Gyan Sudha Misra kini telah dipanggil untuk pendirian yang lebih sukar, mengarah mahkamah di seluruh India untuk menggunakan hukuman mati dalam menjatuhkan hukuman mereka.

src: "It is time to stamp out these barbaric, feudal practices which are a slur on the nation.
ref: "Sudah tiba masanya untuk menghapuskan amalan kejam, dan feudal ini yang merupakan penghinaan kepada negara.

src: This is necessary as a deterrent for such outrageous, uncivilised behaviour.
ref: Ini adalah perlu sebagai penghalang yang tingkah laku keterlaluan, dan kejam itu.

src: All persons who are planning to perpetrate honour killings should know that gallows await them," Justice Katju said.
ref: Semua orang yang merancang untuk melakukan pembunuhan maruah perlu tahu bahawa tali gantung menanti mereka," kata Hakim Katju.

src: The crack-down came yesterday, as the Supreme Court dismissed an appeal to lessen the life imprisonment of Bhagwan Dass.
ref: Tindakan keras itu berlaku semalam, semasa Mahkamah Agung menolak rayuan untuk mengurangkan hukuman penjara seumur hidup Bhagwan Dass.

src: The man strangled his married daughter to death with wire after discovering she was in an incestuous affair.
ref: Lelaki itu mencekik anak perempuan yang sudah berkahwin sehingga mati dengan wayar selepas mendapati dia dalam hubungan sumbang.

src: The Supreme Court also condemned the traditional village councils who endorse these honour killings and order them to be carried out.
ref: Mahkamah Agung juga mengutuk majlis-majlis kampung tradisional yang menyokong pembunuhan maruah ini dan memerintahnya supaya dijalankan.

src: A compound in the common daisy-like plant feverfew kills human leukemia stem cells and could form the basis for newer, more effective drugs for the disease.
ref: Satu sebatian dalam tumbuhan daun sedar biasa yang rupanya seperti bunga daisi boleh membunuh sel-sel stem leukemia manusia dan boleh menjadi asas untuk ubat yang lebih baru, lebih berkesan untuk penyakit ini.

src: American researchers at the University of Rochester Medical Center in New York say that it could take months to develop a useable drug from the compound, parthenolide.
ref: Penyelidik Amerika di Pusat Perubatan Universiti Rochester di New York mengatakan bahawa ia mungkin mengambil masa berbulan-bulan untuk meghasilkan ubat yang boleh digunakan daripada kawasan, parthenolide.

src: However, they are working to do so with chemists at the University of Kentucky who have identified a water-soluble molecule with the same properties.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, mereka sedang berusaha untuk berkerjasama dengan ahli kimia di Universiti Kentucky yang telah mengenal pasti molekul larut air dengan sifat yang sama.

src: The US National Cancer Institute has also accepted the work into its rapid access program, which aims to speed experimental drugs into human clinical trials.
ref: Institut Kanser Kebangsaan jAmerika Syarikat juga telah menerima kajian itu dalam program akses pantas, yang bertujuan untuk mempercepatkan proses ubat eksperimen ke dalam ujian klinikal manusia.

src: "This research is a very important step in setting the stage for future development of a new therapy for leukemia," says Rochester researcher Craig Jordan.
ref: "Kajian ini merupakan satu langkah yang sangat penting dalam menetapkan peringkat untuk pembangunan terapi baru masa depan untuk leukemia," kata penyelidik Rochester Craig Jordan.

src: "We have proof that we can kill leukemia stem cells with this type of agent, and that is good news."
ref: "Kami mempunyai bukti bahawa kita boleh membunuh sel-sel stem leukemia dengan ejen jenis ini, dan itu adalah berita yang baik."

src: Parthenolide appears to target the roots of myeloid leukemia, stem cells, while current treatments including the relatively new drug Gleevec don't.
ref: Parthenolide kelihatan menyasarkan akar leukemia mieloid, sel-sel stem, manakala rawatan semasa termasuklah dadah yang agak baru Gleevec tidak berupaya sedemikian.

src: So, "You're pulling the weed without getting to the root," says Jordan.
ref: Jadi, "Kamu mencabut rumpai tanpa membuangkan akarnya," kata Jordan.

src: Used for centuries to fight fevers, inflammation and arthritis, feverfew earned interest from the Rochester researchers after other scientists showed that it could prevent skin cancer in animal models.
ref: Digunakan selama berabad-abad lamanya untuk melawan demam, keradangan dan artritis, daun sedar menarik perhatian penyelidik Rochester selepas ahli-ahli sains lain menunjukkan bahawa ia boleh mencegah kanser kulit dalam model haiwan.

src: So the researchers investigated how a concentrated form of the plant component parthenolide would affect leukemia cells and normal cells.
ref: Jadi penyelidik mengkaji bagaimana caranya kepekatan komponen tumbuhan parthenolide boleh mempengaruhi sel-sel leukemia dan sel-sel normal.

src: Comparing the impact of parthenolide to the common chemotherapy drug cytarabine, they found that parthenolide selectively killed leukemia cells while sparing normal cells better.
ref: Perbandingan kesan parthenolide dengan ubat kemoterapi biasa cytarabine, mereka mendapati bahawa parthenolide membunuh sel-sel leukemia secara terpilih sambil mengekalkan sel-sel normal yang lebih baik.

src: While the findings suggest that parthenolide is a good starting point for new drugs, people with leukemia aren't being encouraged to take high doses of feverfew as they could not take enough of the remedy to halt the disease.
ref: Walaupun penemuan itu menunjukkan bahawa parthenolide adalah titik permulaan yang baik untuk ubat-ubatan baru, orang berpenyakit leukemia tidak digalakkan untuk mengambil dos daun sedar yang tinggi kerana mereka tidak mungkin boleh makan ubat itu secukup mungkin untuk menghentikan penyakit itu.

src: Robert Mugabe, president of the Republic of Zimbabwe bitterly slated opposition and the United Kingdom, Zimbabwe's former colonial ruler, in a speech he made earlier today.
ref: Robert Mugabe, Presiden Republik Zimbabwe mengkritik keras pembangkang dan United Kingdom, bekas pemerintah kolonial Zimbabwe, dalam ucapan beliau yang dibuat awal hari ini.

src: This is his first speech after the recent disputed elections in which Morgan Tsvangirai's Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) won the parliamentary voting.
ref: Ini adalah ucapan pertama beliau selepas pilihan raya baru-baru ini yang dipertikaikan di mana Gerakan Morgan Tsvangirai untuk Perubahan Demokratik (MDC) memenangi pemilihan parlimen.

src: However announcement of an overall victory for the MDC has come to a standstill as results from 23 out of the 210 constituencies are still being recounted.
ref: Namun pengumuman kemenangan keseluruhan bagi MDC telah terhenti kerana keputusan 23 daripada 210 kawasan pilihan raya masih dikira semula.

src: Mr. Mugabe asked his 15,000 strong audience to "maintain utmost vigilance in the face of vicious British machinations and the machinations of our other detractors, who are allies of Britain" while speaking at the Gwanzura Stadium in Zimbabwe's capital city of Harare.
ref: Encik Mugabe meminta 15,000 pengikut setianya untuk "mengekalkan kewaspadaan penuh dalam menghadapi komplot yang British ganas dan komplot pengkritik yang lain, yang merupakan rakan Britain" semasa berucap di Stadium Gwanzura di ibu negara Zimbabwe, Harare.

src: The audience wore shirts adorned with Mugabe portraits and waved banners reading "Defending our land from imperialists" and "Zimbabwe has no place for sell-outs" in support of Zanu-PF policies.
ref: Penyokong-penyokong memakai baju dihiasi dengan potret Mugabe dan melambai sepanduk bertulis "Mempertahankan tanah kami dari imperialis" dan "Zimbabwe bukan untuk pembelotan" dalam menyokong dasar Zanu-PF.

src: "Down with the British" was chanted, Mr. Mugabe saying the British are "like thieves fronting their lackeys among us, which they pay to confuse our people".
ref: "Jatuhkan British" telah dilaungkan, Encik Mugabe berkata British adalah "seperti pencuri menunjukkan penurut mereka di kalangan kita, yang mereka bayar untuk mengelirukan orang kita."

src: "We, not the British, established democracy based on one person, one vote - democracy which rejected racial or gender discrimination and upheld human rights and religious freedom," he said in response to the international criticism he has lately received, especially from Gordon Brown.
ref: "Kami, bukan orang Britain, demokrasi ditubuhkan berdasarkan satu orang, satu undi - demokrasi yang menolak diskriminasi kaum atau jantina dan mengekalkan hak asasi manusia dan kebebasan beragama," katanya sebagai reaksi kepada kritikan antarabangsa akhir-akhir ini yang beliau telah terima, terutamanya dari Gordon Brown.

src: The speech was made in a celebration of 28 years since the day of Zimbabwean independence, which Mr. Mugabe called the day on which his nation "finally shook off the chains of British racist settler colonialism".
ref: Ucapan itu dibuat dalam upacara sambutan 28 tahun sejak hari kemerdekaan Zimbabwe, yang Encik Mugabe memanggil hari itu di mana kaumnya "akhirnya bebas daripada belenggu penjajahan peneroka British yang bersifat perkauman."

src: With fifty days left to until the start of the 2012 Summer Paralympics, the Australian Paralympic Committee earlier today announced the 35-member final swimming Paralympic squad bound for the London Games.
ref: Dengan lima puluh hari lagi sehingga permulaan Sukan Paralimpik Musim Panas 2012, Jawatankuasa Paralimpik Australia awal hari ini mengumumkan skuad renang Paralimpik muktamad yang beranggota 35 orang yang akan menyertai Sukan di London.

src: New South Wales swimmers are well represented with Michael Anderson of Repton, Tim Antalfy of Georges Hall, Michael Auprince of Peakhurst, Blake Cochrane of Scarborough, Taylor Corry of Anna Bay, Maddison Elliott of Gillieston Heights, Jacqueline Freney of Skinners Head, Amanda Fowler of Blaxland, Mitchell Kilduff of Carlton, Kara Leo of Penrith, Matthew Levy of Northbridge, Andrew Pasterfield of Castle Hill, Katrina Porter of Newtown, Aaron Rhind of Yass, Sarah Rose of Pymble, Sean Russo of Revesby, Teigan Van Roosmalen of Bateau Bay, Reagan Wickens of Grays Point and Annabelle Williams of Cheltenham being named.
ref: Perenang New South Wales yang dinamakan diwakili oleh Michael Anderson dari Repton, Tim Antalfy dari Georges Hall, Michael Auprince dari Peakhurst, Blake Cochrane dari Scarborough, Taylor Corry dari Anna Bay, Maddison Elliott dari Gillieston Heights, Jacqueline Freney dari Skinners Head, Amanda Fowler dari Blaxland, Mitchell Kilduff Carlton, Kara Leo dari Penrith, Matthew Levy dari Northbridge, Andrew Pasterfield dari Castle Hill, Katrina Porter dari Newtown, Aaron Rhind dari Yass, Sarah Rose dari Pymble, Sean Russo dari Revesby, Teigan Van Roosmalen dari Bateau Bay, Reagan Wickens dari Grays Point dan Annabelle Williams dari Cheltenham.

src: Five Queensland swimmers have earned spots to London, including Kayla Clarke of Silkstone, Daniel Fox of Cleveland, Brenden Hall of Petrie, Grant Patterson of Cairns and Rick Pendleton of Sippy Downs.
ref: Lima perenang Queensland telah mendapat pengesahan akan ke London, termasuk Kayla Clarke dari Silkstone, Daniel Fox dari Cleveland, Brenden Hall dari Petrie, Grant Patterson dari Cairns dan Rick Pendleton dari Sippy Downs.

src: Only four Victorians booked a trip to London, including Matthew Haanappel of Croydon Hills, Tanya Huebner of Hampton, Ahmed Kelly of North Melbourne and Prue Watt of Hawthorn East.
ref: Hanya empat orang Victoria akan pergi ke London, termasuk Matthew Haanappel dari Croydon Hills, Tanya Huebner dari Hampton, Ahmed Kelly dari North Melbourne dan Prue Watt dari Hawthorn East.

src: South Australia qualified three swimmers, including Matthew Cowdrey of Seaton, Jay Dohnt of Ferrydon Park and Esther Overton of Enfield.
ref: Australia Selatan mempunyai tiga perenang yang berkelayakan, termasuk Matthew Cowdrey dari Seaton, Jay Dohnt dari Ferrydon Park dan Ester Overton dari Enfield.

src: Western Australia and the Australian Capital Territory are each sending two swimmers, with Katherine Downie of Quinns Rocks and Jeremy McClure of Mount Pleasant representing Western Australia and Ellie Cole of Bruce and Richard Eliason of Flynn representing the Australian Capital Territory.
ref: Australia Barat dan Wilayah Ibu Negara Australia masing-masing akan menghantar dua perenang, dengan Katherine Downie dari Quinns Rocks dan Jeremy McClure dari Mount Pleasant mewakili Australia Barat dan Ellie Cole dari Bruce dan Richard Eliason dari Flynn mewakili Wilayah Ibu Negara Australia.

src: Tasmania and the Northern Territory did not qualify any swimmers.
ref: Tasmania dan Wilayah Utara tidak ada perenang yang berkelayakan.

src: The team will travel to London for a training camp on August 10 ahead of the August 29 start of the Games.
ref: Pasukan itu akan pergi ke London untuk kem latihan pada 10 Ogos sebelum 29 Ogos tarikh bermulanya Sukan itu.

src: The anonymous individual responsible for suggesting, 14 hours before police discovered the body, that WWE wrestler Chris Benoit's wife was dead is saying his/her comment was a "terrible coincidence."
ref: Individu bertanggungjawab yang namanya tidak diketahui menunjukkan, 14 jam sebelum polis menemui mayat itu, bahawa isteri WWE gusti Chris Benoit telah mati dan dia mengatakan komennya adalah "kebetulan yang amat dahsyat."

src: In a post made at 12:26 AM EDT Friday morning to the talk page of a Wikinews article headlined as the "Death of Nancy Benoit rumour posted on Wikipedia hours prior to body being found", the user admitted to writing that Nancy Benoit was dead at the Wikipedia article page for Benoit came from information that was garnered from "rumors and speculation online."
ref: Dalam kenyataan yang dibuat pada 12:26 EDT pagi Jumaat untuk halaman perbualan sebuah artikel Wikinews bertajuk "Khabar angin kematian Nancy Benoit yang dinyatakan atas Wikipedia berjam-jam sebelum mayatnya dijumpai," pengguna yang mengakui menulis yang Nancy Benoit telah mati di halaman artikel Wikipedia untuk Benoit mendapat maklumat melalui "khabar angin dan spekulasi dalam talian."

src: The IP Address of the individual making the apology was identical to that of the one who posted the Nancy Benoit rumor, a strong confirmation of the admission's authenticity.
ref: Alamat IP individu yang memohon maaf itu adalah sama dengan orang yang mencatatkan khabar angin Nancy Benoit, pengesahan yang kuat terhadap kebenaran pengakuan itu.

src: The lengthy apology was not signed, with the individual claiming, "I am just an everyday individual who posted a wrongful remark at the time that received so much attention because it turned out to actually happen."
ref: Permohonan maaf yang panjang lebar itu tidak ditandatangani, dengan individu itu mengatakan, "Saya hanya seorang individu biasa yang mencatatkan kenyataan yang salah pada masa yang menerima begitu banyak perhatian kerana ia ternyata benar-benar berlaku."

src: Wikinews originally broke the story about the suspicious edit after receiving a tip from Wikipedia administrators.
ref: Wikinews asalnya menggemparkan peristiwa tentang pengeditan yang mencurigakan itu selepas menerima ramalan daripada pentadbir Wikipedia.

src: The fact the edit originated from a computer in Stamford, Connecticut (the site of WWE headquarters) appears to be another coincidence.
ref: Hakikat pengeditan itu berasal daripada komputer di Stamford, Connecticut (kawasan ibu pejabat WWE) nampaknya adalah satu lagi kebetulan.

src: The anonymous editor left a lengthy apology to the Wikimedia community, explaining, "I hope this puts an end to this speculation that someone knew about the tragedy before it was discovered."
ref: Editor yang namanya tidak diketahui memaparkan permohonan maaf yang panjang lebar kepada komuniti Wikimedia, dengan menjelaskan, "Saya harap ini mengakhiri spekulasi ini bahawa seseorang mengetahui tentang tragedi itu sebelum ia ditemui."

src: Wikinews is continuing to follow the story, but the anonymous user has declined an interview.
ref: Wikinews terus mengikuti kisah ini, tetapi pengguna yang namanya tidak diketahui telah menolak satu permintaan temu bual.

src: Ferrari driver Felipe Massa won the pole on the FIA Formula-1 2007 Malaysian Grand Prix on Sepang International Circuit.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari Felipe Massa memenangi petak pertama dalam FIA Formula-1 2007 Grand Prix Malaysia di Litar Antarabangsa Sepang.

src: McLaren-Mercedes driver Fernando Alonso stayed in the lead for the most part of the third qualifying session, but was closely pursued by his rivals from Ferrari and by his teammate Lewis Hamilton who, after the fantastic debut in the previous race, surely has ambitions for the World Champion title.
ref: Pemandu McLaren-Mercedes Fernando Alonso kekal mendahului untuk sebahagian besar sesi kelayakan ketiga, tetapi dikejar rapat oleh saingannya dari Ferrari dan rakan sepasukannya Lewis Hamilton yang, selepas kemunculan pertama yang hebat di perlumbaan sebelum ini, pasti mempunyai cita-cita untuk gelaran Juara Dunia.

src: A new interesting feature of the F1 cars was presented by Bridgestone, the tyre supplier.
ref: Satu ciri baru kereta F1 yang menarik telah diperlihatkan oleh Bridgestone, pembekal tayar.

src: All tyres of softer compound will be marked by a white stria along the tyre groove starting from this race onwards.
ref: Semua tayar yang menggunakan bahan yang lebuh lembut akan ditandai garis putih di sepanjang alur tayar bermula dari perlumbaan ini dan seterusnya.

src: As intended, this will help audience to distinguish the tyres, it will be more helpful than the previous white heavy dot on the outer side of the tyre.
ref: Sebagaimana dikehendaki, ini akan membantu penonton untuk membezakan tayar, ia akan menjadi lebih berguna berbanding titik putih besar sebelumnya di bahagian luar tayar.

src: The two Australian mine-workers, who were trapped for 14 days underground in a collapsed mine, have signed a media deal reportedly worth AUD$2 million for their story of survival.
ref: Kedua-dua pekerja lombong Australia, yang terperangkap selama 14 hari di bawah tanah di sebuah lombong runtuh, telah menandatangani perjanjian media yang dilaporkan bernilai AUD$2 juta bagi cerita mereka yang terselamat.

src: Local media reports that the lucrative deal, announced by the Nine Network, is believed to be the "highest ever paid to secure news talent".
ref: Media tempatan melapor bahawa perjanjian yang menguntungkan itu, yang diumumkan oleh Rangkaian Sembilan, dipercayai adalah yang "tertinggi yang pernah dibayar untuk mendapatkan berita."

src: A planned TV special will be the outcome of a deal secured by Publishing and Broadcasting Limited (PBL), which owns the Nine Network.
ref: Satu rancangan TV khas yang dirancang akan terhasil berikutan perjanjian yang diperolehi oleh Penerbitan dan Penyiaran Berhad (PBL), yang memiliki Rangkaian Sembilan.

src: Miners Todd Russell and Brant Webb were entombed nearly a kilometre underground following a cave-in on April 25 at the Beaconsfield Gold Mine in Tasmania.
ref: Pelombong Todd Russell dan Brant Webb telah terkebumi hampir satu kilometer di bawah tanah berikutan runtuhan lombong pada 25 April di Beaconsfield Gold Mine di Tasmania.

src: A third miner, Larry Knight, was killed in the rock-fall.
ref: Pelombong ketiga, Larry Knight, terbunuh dalam runtuhan batu.

src: The two survivors trapped in a wire cage, survived by drinking water seeping through rocks until rescuers managed to dig a small tunnel to deliver fresh food and water.
ref: Kedua-dua mangsa yang terperangkap di dalam sebuah sangkar dawai, hidup dengan memimum air meresap melalui batu sehingga penyelamat berjaya menggali terowong kecil untuk menghantar makanan segar dan air.

src: Their tale has captured the attention of the nation, with media corporations fighting for exclusive rights to the miners' story.
ref: Kisah mereka telah menarik perhatian seluruh negara, dengan syarikat-syarikat media bersaing untuk mendapatkan hak eksklusif cerita pelombong-pelombong itu.

src: The Nine Network's chief executive Eddie McGuire said under the PBL deal, Woman's Day, the Australian Women's Weekly and the Bulletin magazines would also have access to the men.
ref: Ketua eksekutif Rangkaian Sembilan Eddie McGuire berkata di bawah perjanjian PBL, majalah-majalah Hari Wanita, Mingguan Wanita Australia dan Buletin juga akan mempunyai akses kepada lelaki-lelaki itu.

src: The Nine Network has announced it would broadcast a two-hour special with entitled "The Great Escape."
ref: Rangkaian Sembilan telah mengumumkan ia akan menyiarkan rancangan khas dua jam dengan bertajukkan "Pelarian Yang Hebat."

src: Another deal is expected to be brokered with U.S. media.
ref: Perjanjian lain dijangka akan diatur dengan media A.S.

src: Mr McGuire said the deal would not restrict the pair from selling their story to CNN, the US Today Show and Good Morning America, who have all reportedly made contact with Mr Russell and Mr Webb this week.
ref: Encik McGuire berkata perjanjian itu tidak akan menyekat pasangan itu daripada menjual cerita mereka kepada CNN, Persembahan Amerika Syarikat Hari Ini dan Selamat Pagi Amerika, yang semua dilaporkan menghubungi Encik Russell dan Encik Webb minggu ini.

src: Under the PBL deal, Woman's Day, the Australian Women's Weekly and the Bulletin magazines would also have access to the men, Mr McGuire said.
ref: Di bawah perjanjian PBL, majalah-majalah Hari Wanita, Mingguan Wanita Australia dan Buletin akan juga mempunyai akses kepada lelaki-lelaki itu, kata Encik McGuire.

src: Nine says it also wants the footage and photographs taken by the miners during their ordeal.
ref: Rangkaian Sembilan berkata, ia juga mahu rakaman dan gambar-gambar yang diambil oleh pelombong dalam pengalaman pahit mereka.

src: The footage remains in the hands of the mining company.
ref: Rakaman ini masih berada di tangan syarikat perlombongan.

src: The men, who were rescued on May 9, have not spoken publicly about the time they spent trapped underground.
ref: Lelai-lelaki itu, yang telah diselamatkan pada 9 Mei, masih belum bercakap secara terbuka tentang waktu mereka habiskan terperangkap di bawah tanah.

src: Redwood City, California - The jury in the Scott Peterson trial suggest that Peterson receive the death penalty.
ref: Bandar Redwood, California - Juri dalam perbicaraan Scott Peterson mencadangkan bahawa Peterson menerima hukuman mati.

src: Peterson was found guilty of murdering his pregnant wife Laci and their unborn child.
ref: Peterson telah didapati bersalah membunuh isterinya yang sedang hamil Laci dan anak dalam kandungan mereka.

src: The official sentence will be announced on February 25th, 2005.
ref: Hukuman rasmi akan diumumkan pada 25 Februari, 2005.

src: The Netherlands lost to the Russia national football team in a quarter-final match of UEFA Euro 2008.
ref: Belanda kalah kepada pasukan bola sepak kebangsaan Rusia dalam perlawanan suku akhir UEFA Euro 2008.

src: Roman Pavlyuchenko opened the scoring in main play, a goal that was matched by Ruud van Nistelrooy after only 30 minutes.
ref: Roman Pavlyuchenko membuka jaringan dalam permainan utama, gol yang disamakan oleh Ruud van Nistelrooy selepas hanya 30 minit.

src: Then it was a hardy play-off for both teams, especially the Dutch, but Torbinsky and Arshavin scored goals, effectively put an end to the match.
ref: Kemudian ia adalah permainan semula yang tahan lasak untuk kedua-dua pasukan, terutamanya pasukan Belanda, tetapi Torbinsky dan Arshavin menjaringkan gol, menamatkan perlawanan dengan berkesan.

src: Now it will be the first major semi final for Russia since the break up of the USSR.
ref: Kini ia akan menjadi permainan utama separuh akhir yang pertama untuk Rusia sejak perpisahan daripada USSR.

src: India have beaten England by nine runs in the second One-Day International of the series at the County Ground, Bristol, England.
ref: India menewaskan England dengan sembilan larian dalam siri kedua One-Day International di Daerah Ground, Bristol, England.

src: India, having won the toss and elected to bat first, raced to 113 runs after the first twenty overs.
ref: India, setelah memenangi lambungan dan dipilih untuk pukulan pertama, berlumba mencapai 113 runs selepas dua puluh over yang pertama.

src: Sourav Ganguly was caught off the bowling of Andrew Flintoff, who finished the innings as the top performing England bowler, taking 5-56.
ref: Sourav Ganguly telah ditangkap di luar bowling Andrew Flintoff, yang menghabiskan inning sebagai pembaling England yang paling hebat, mengambil 5-56.

src: Sachin Tendulkar fell just short of a century, being caught behind on 99 runs.
ref: Sachin Tendulkar kalah dengan kurang daripada seratus larian, di belakang dengan 99 larian.

src: Tendulkar was surprised at the decision, and television replays were inconclusive as to whether the ball had hit his glove or not.
ref: Tendulkar terkejut dengan keputusan itu, dan ulang tayang televisyen tidak membawa sebarang keputusan sama ada bola telah memukul sarung tangannya atau tidak.

src: Yuvraj Singh and Rahul Dravid added 63 runs before Singh was dismissed for 49.
ref: Yuvraj Singh dan Rahul Dravid menambah 63 larian sebelum Singh disingkir dengan 49 mata.

src: Dravid finished on 92 not out, helping India to an imposing total of 329-7 after fifty overs.
ref: Dravid selesai pada mata 92 tidak keluar, membantu India mencapai jumlah 329-7 yang mengagumkan selepas lima puluh over.

src: In reply England started quickly, recording 75 runs off the first ten overs.
ref: Sebagai balasan England bermula dengan cepat, merekodkan 75 larian pada sepuluh over yang pertama.

src: However Munaf Patel took two wickets in two balls to dismiss both the England opening batsmen.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun Munaf Patel mengambil dua wiket dalam dua bola untuk menyingkirkan kedua-dua pemukul pembuka England.

src: The England wickets fell regularly after that, with Kevin Pietersen and Paul Collingwood bowled by Piyush Chalwa for 25 and 27 runs respectively.
ref: Wiket England mundur secara teratur selepas itu, dengan Kevin Pietersen dan Paul Collingwood bowl oleh Piyush Chalwa untuk 25 dan 27 larian masing-masing.

src: Andrew Flintoff was dismissed for just nine runs, and despite 64 runs from Ian Bell, England needed 90 runs from the last eight overs with just three wickets remaining.
ref: Andrew Flintoff pernah disingkir hanya kerana sembilan larian, dan walaupun terdapat 64 larian daripada Ian Bell, England memerlukan 90 larian dari lapan over yang lepas dengan hanya tiga wiket yang terakhir.

src: Dimitri Mascarenhas hit 52 runs, including five sixes, and Stuart Broad hit 20 runs off the final over, but it came too late and England fell ten runs short of the 330 run target.
ref: Dimitri Mascarenhas memukul 52 larian, termasuk lima sixes, dan Stuart Broad mencecah 20 larian pada over terakhir, tetapi sudah terlambat dan England kekurangan sepuluh larian daripada sasaran 330 larian.

src: The third match will be played at Edgbaston, Birmingham, on August 27.
ref: Perlawanan ketiga akan diadakan di Edgbaston, Birmingham, pada 27 Ogos.

src: On November 13, Torontoians will be heading to the polls to vote for their ward's councillor and for mayor.
ref: Pada 13 November, rakyat Toronto akan menuju ke pemilihan untuk membuang undi untuk ahli majlis wad mereka dan untuk Datuk Bandar.

src: This ward's candidates include Francis Ahinful, Ted Berger, Anthony Caputo, Suzan Hall (incumbent), Andre Lucas, Rosemarie Mulhall, Brian Prevost, and Sonali Verma.
ref: Calon wad ini termasuk Francis Ahinful, Ted Berger, Anthony Caputo, Suzan Hall (penyandang), Andre Lucas, Rosemarie Mulhall, Brian Prevost dan Sonali Verma.

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: Untuk maklumat lanjut mengenai pilihan raya, baca pilihan raya perbandaran Toronto, 2006.

src: Kevin Rudd has been elected as leader of the Labor party by the party's caucus.
ref: Kevin Rudd telah dipilih sebagai pemimpin Parti Buruh dengan kokus parti.

src: His running-mate Julia Gillard was elected unopposed to the deputy leadership.
ref: Rakan sekempen beliau Julia Gillard dipilih sebagai Timbalan kepimpinan dipilih tanpa bertanding.

src: The vote was called on Friday after Kevin Rudd challenged former leader Kim Beazley for the leadership.
ref: Undi dipanggil pada hari Jumaat selepas Kevin Rudd mencabar bekas pemimpin Kim Beazley untuk kepimpinan.

src: Rudd becomes the party's third leader since the 2004 election, where the Howard government won a fourth consecutive term in government.
ref: Rudd menjadi pemimpin ketiga parti itu sejak pilihan raya 2004, di mana kerajaan Howard telah memenangi penggal keempat berturut-turut dalam kerajaan.

src: Long-serving deputy leader Jenny Macklin did not contest the deputy leadership following the defeat of Mr Beazley.
ref: Timbalan ketua yang telah lama berkhidmat Jenny Macklin tidak bertanding untuk Timbalan kepimpinan berikutan kekalahan Encik Beazley.

src: Mrs Macklin has been deputy leader under three leaders since 2001.
ref: Puan Macklin telah menjadi timbalan ketua di bawah tiga pemimpin sejak tahun 2001.

src: The party will elect its shadow ministry in a separate ballot on Thursday.
ref: Parti itu akan memilih kementerian nasihatnya dalam pembuangan undi yang berasingan pada hari Khamis.

src: Premier of Queensland Peter Beattie has said that the leadership change "will herald in a new period of stability for the party."
ref: Ketua Pemimpin Queensland Peter Beattie telah berkata bahawa perubahan kepimpinan "akan menandakan dalam satu tempoh baru kestabilan parti."

src: "It's important that if you have good policy and good government, it's important you also have stability in leadership," said Beattie.
ref: "Adalah penting bahawa sekiranya anda mempunyai polisi yang baik dan kerajaan yang baik, adalah penting anda juga mempunyai kestabilan dalam kepimpinan," kata Beattie.

src: "I'd urge everyone to get behind Kevin - having a Queenslander as the alternative prime minister is good for the state and good for Australia."
ref: "Saya menyeru semua orang untuk menyokong Kevin - dengan adanya orang Queensland sebagai Perdana Menteri alternatif adalah baik untuk negeri dan baik untuk Australia."

src: Labor MP Dick Adams said even though he voted for Beazley to remain as leader, he supports the party's new leadership.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Parti Buruh Dick Adams berkata walaupun dia mengundi Beazley untuk kekal sebagai pemimpin, beliau menyokong kepimpinan baru parti.

src: "There'll be a lot more harmony and a lot more opportunity of ideas," he said.
ref: "Akan ada banyak lagi keharmonian dan lebih banyak peluang untuk idea," katanya.

src: "I think the new ideas need to flow and I think if it's opened up, as some people have said, they want those ideas to come forward, but I think we'll have some interesting policy direction to take to the people."
ref: "Saya rasa idea-idea baru perlu mengalir dan saya fikir jika ia dibuka, sebagaimana beberapa orang telah berkata, mereka mahu idea-idea untuk tampil ke hadapan, tetapi saya fikir kita akan mempunyai beberapa hala tuju dasar yang menarik untuk dimulakan demi rakyat."

src: Sharan Burrow, the president of the ACTU - the peak union body in Australia said Mr Rudd will be a strong leader.
ref: Sharan Burrow, presiden ACTU - puncak badan kesatuan di Australia kata Encik Rudd akan menjadi pemimpin yang kuat.

src: "I have no doubt that Kevin Rudd will say that these laws have to go, that they will be replaced by a policy that reinstates rights," Ms Burrow has told Sky News.
ref: "Saya tidak ragu bahawa Kevin Rudd akan mengatakan bahawa undang-undang ini perlu dilupuskan, bahawa ia akan digantikan dengan dasar yang menghidupkan semula hak-hak," Cik Burrow memberitahu Berita Sky.

src: Government MP, Christopher Pyne said that the new leadership was a poor choice for the party.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Kerajaan, Christopher Pyne berkata kepimpinan baru adalah pilihan yang lemah untuk parti.

src: "The combination of Kevin Rudd and Julia Gillard will have all the hallmarks of the mongoose and the cobra.
ref: "Gabungan Kevin Rudd dan Julia Gillard akan mempunyai semua ciri-ciri cerpelai dan ular tedung."

src: It shows Labor is obsessed about leadership rather than policy and strategy," Mr Pyne said.
ref: "Ia menunjukkan Parti Buruh taksub tentang kepimpinan daripada polisi dan strategi," kata Encik Pyne.

src: In a poll released by Newspoll today, a Rudd-Gillard leadership team had 48 percent support of the public, compared to the outgoing Beazley-Macklin team's 27 percent.
ref: Dalam tinjauan yang dikeluarkan oleh Newspoll hari ini, pasukan kepimpinan Rudd - Gillard mempunyai 48 peratus sokongan daripada orang ramai, berbanding dengan 27 peratus pasukan Beazley - Macklin yang keluar.

src: At 10:30pm on November 23, 2008, near the airport in McGregor, Texas, Space Exploration Technologies Corporation (SpaceX) tested their new Falcon 9 rocket at full thrust for nearly 3 minutes (160 seconds).
ref: Pada pukul 10:30 malam pada 23 November, 2008, berhampiran dengan lapangan terbang di McGregor, Texas, Perbadanan Teknologi Penjelajahan Angkasa (SpaceX) menguji roket baru mereka Falcon 9 pada daya tujahan penuh selama hampir 3 minit (160 saat).

src: The engineers then shut down two of the nine engines — in order to limit potential damage to the launch pad — and continued the test for 18 more seconds before finally shutting the rocket down.
ref: Jurutera-jurutera kemudian menutup dua daripada sembilan enjin - untuk menghadkan kerosakan yang mungkin berlaku pada landasan pelancaran - dan terus menguji selama 18 saat lagi sebelum menutup roket akhirnya.

src: "We ran the engines just like they would run during flight, but instead of being up in the air, they were held down.
ref: "Kami menghidupkan enjin sama seperti mereka akan hidup semasa penerbangan, sebaliknya bukan di udara, mereka diikat.

src: They weren’t moving," said Lauren Dreyer, SpaceX's manager for business development.
ref: Mereka tidak bergerak," kata Lauren Dreyer, pengurus SpaceX untuk pembangunan perniagaan.

src: This was the Falcon 9's first major test firing, and it marks a milestone for the company in its plans to capture a section of the commercial launch market.
ref: Ini adalah pertama kali ujian penembakan utama Falcon 9, dan ia menandakan satu peristiwa penting bagi syarikat itu dalam rancangan untuk menguasai sebahagian daripada pasaran pelancaran komersilnya.

src: The test reportedly shook the windows of houses 5 miles away, causing agitation among residents who felt that they had not received adequate warning.
ref: Ujian ini dilaporkan menggegarkan tingkap rumah yang 5 batu jauhnya, menyebabkan kemarahan di kalangan penduduk yang merasakan bahawa mereka tidak menerima amaran yang mencukupi.

src: "I appreciate the fact that the company notified [the City of] McGregor, but did they not think the test would affect the surrounding communities?" asked commenter Lorena Resident on the website for the Waco Tribune-Herald.
ref: "Saya menghargai hakikat bahawa syarikat itu memberitahu [Bandar] McGregor, tetapi mereka tidak terfikir ujian akan memberi kesan kepada komuniti sekeliling?" bertanya orang yang memberi komen Lorena Resident di laman web Waco Tribune-Herald.

src: The Falcon 9 rocket, and its smaller sibling the Falcon 1, are the first rockets capable of entering Low Earth Orbit (LEO) to have their design be privately funded in its entirety.
ref: Roket Falcon 9, dan adik-beradiknya yang lebih kecil Falcon 1, adalah roket pertama yang mampu memasuki Orbit Rendah Bumi (LEO) supaya reka bentuk mereka boleh dibiayai oleh pihak swasta secara keseluruhan.

src: According to SpaceX the Falcon 9 can generate 4 times the maximum thrust of a Boeing 747 while firing in a vacuum, and will eventually be able to perform interplanetary missions in addition to its initial role as an orbital launch vehicle.
ref: Menurut SpaceX Falcon 9 boleh menjana 4 kali tujahan maksimum Boeing 747 sambil menembak dalam vakum, dan akhirnya akan boleh melaksanakan misi antara planet di samping peranan awalnya sebagai kenderaan pelancaran orbit.

src: SpaceX is also designing a crew and cargo capsule for the Falcon 9, which it has named the "Dragon".
ref: SpaceX juga mereka bentuk anak-anak kapal dan kargo kapsul untuk Falcon 9, yang telah dinamakan "Dragon."

src: SpaceX is a contender for future commercial contracts from various government run space agencies, with NASA expressing particular interest.
ref: SpaceX merupakan pesaing bagi kontrak komersil masa depan dari pelbagai agensi angkasa kerajaan, dengan NASA menyatakan minat tertentu.

src: NASA will be retiring their fleet of Columbia Class Space Shuttles in 2010, but will not have the Shuttles' replacements (the Ares I and Ares V rockets) ready until at least 2014.
ref: NASA akan membiarkan armada mereka Pesawat Angkasa Kelas Columbia bersara pada tahun 2010, tetapi tidak akan ada pengganti Pesawat (roket Ares I dan Ares V) sebagai alternatif sehingga sekurang-kurangnya tahun 2014.

src: NASA hopes to fill some of this gap using commercial launches from companies such as SpaceX.
ref: NASA berharap untuk mengisi beberapa jurang ini menggunakan pelancaran komersil dari syarikat-syarikat seperti SpaceX.

src: SpaceX has already reached an agreement with NASA to conduct three test flights of the Dragon capsule in conjunction with the Falcon 9.
ref: SpaceX telah mencapai persetujuan dengan NASA untuk menjalankan tiga ujian penerbangan kapsul Dragon dengan Falcon 9.

src: Elon Musk, CEO and CTO of SpaceX, said, "The full mission-length test firing clears the highest hurdle for the Falcon 9 first stage before launch.
ref: Elon Musk, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif dan Ketua Pegawai Teknikal SpaceX, berkata, "ujian penembakan penuh mengikut tempoh masa misi telah menghilangkan halangan tertinggi peringkat pertama bagi Falcon 9 sebelum pelancaran.

src: In the next few months, we will have the first Falcon 9 flight vehicle on its launch pad at Cape Canaveral, preparing for lift-off in 2009."
ref: Dalam beberapa bulan akan datang, kita akan mempunyai Falcon 9 kenderaan penerbangan pertama di pad pelancaran di Cape Canaveral, bersedia untuk berlepas pada tahun 2009."

src: An Airbus A320 airliner owned by Air New Zealand crashed into the Mediterranean Sea near Perpignan, killing at least two of a crew of seven, French officials reported on Thursday.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Airbus A320 yang dimiliki oleh Air New Zealand terhempas di Laut Mediterranean berhampiran Perpignan, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya dua daripada tujuh anak kapal, pegawai-pegawai Perancis telah melaporkan pada hari Khamis.

src: The aircraft crashed at about 5 p.m. local time (1600 UTC) during a test flight.
ref: Pesawat itu terhempas pada kira-kira 5:00 petang waktu tempatan (1600 UTC) semasa penerbangan ujian.

src: The twin-engine jet airliner had just undergone maintenance at Perpignan in preparation for its return to Air New Zealand by German airline XL Airways, which had been operating it on lease.
ref: Pesawat jet berenjin kembar baru sahaja menjalani penyelenggaraan di Perpignan sebagai persediaan untuk kembali ke Air New Zealand melalui syarikat penerbangan Jerman XL Airways, yang telah beroperasi pada pajakan.

src: The seven on board included two XL Airways crew, Civil Aviation Authority inspector Jeremy Cook of Wellington, and four Air New Zealand personnel.
ref: Tujuh penumpang termasuk dua anak kapal XL Airways, Pihak Berkuasa Penerbangan Awam inspektor Jeremy Cook dari Wellington, dan empat anggota Air New Zealand.

src: Air New Zealand has identified involved personnel as Captain Brian Horrell and Murray White of Auckland, and Michael Gyles and Noel Marsh of Christchurch.
ref: Air New Zealand telah mengenal pasti kakitangan yang terlibat sebagai Kapten Brian Horrell dan Murray White dari Auckland, dan Michael Gyles dan Noel Marsh dari Christchurch.

src: No additional passengers were on board for the flight, which was part of a maintenance test procedure.
ref: Tiada penumpang tambahan berada di atas kapal terbang itu dalam penerbangan itu, yang merupakan sebahagian daripada prosedur ujian penyelenggaraan.

src: Though rescue efforts persisted into the night, there is no hope of the remaining five crew members being found alive, according to French officials.
ref: Walaupun usaha-usaha penyelamatan berlarutan sehingga malam, tidak ada harapan untuk baki lima anak kapal untuk ditemui hidup, menurut pegawai-pegawai Perancis.

src: The pilots may have attempted an emergency landing on water.
ref: Para juruterbang mungkin telah cuba melakukan pendaratan kecemasan di atas air.

src: French, German, and New Zealand aviation authorities and investigators have been dispatched to the site to investigate the incident.
ref: Pihak berkuasa penerbangan dan penyiasat Perancis, Jerman, dan New Zealand telah dihantar ke tempat kejadian itu untuk menyiasat kejadian itu.

src: Manufacturer Airbus, based in Toulouse, will aid the investigation, Airbus spokespersons stated.
ref: Pengilang Airbus, yang berpangkalan di Toulouse, akan membantu siasatan, jurucakap Airbus menyatakan.

src: A Civil Aviation Authority spokesperson stated that the incident does not cast any doubt on the airworthiness of the A320 design, a popular aircraft which has been involved in only ten fatal accidents since its introduction in 1987.
ref: Jurucakap Pihak Berkuasa Penerbangan Awam menyatakan bahawa kejadian itu tidak menimbulkan keraguan pada kelayakan terbang reka bentuk A320, pesawat popular yang telah terlibat dalam hanya sepuluh kemalangan maut sejak diperkenalkan pada tahun 1987.

src: The Thai Prime Minister, Thaksin Shinawatra, despatched an additional 1,000 troops to the south of the country to help deal with the widespread violence.
ref: Perdana Menteri Thailand, Thaksin Shinawatra, yang menghantar 1,000 angkatan tentera tambahan di selatan negara itu untuk membantu menangani keganasan yang berleluasan.

src: This brings the total number of security forces operating in the three troubled provinces to approximately 30,000.
ref: Ini menjadikan jumlah pasukan keselamatan yang beroperasi di tiga wilayah bermasalah pada kira-kira 30,000.

src: Mr. Shinawatra's recent visit to the region was followed by further shootings.
ref: Lawatan baru-baru Encik Shinawatra ke rantau ini diikuti dengan tembak-menembak yang berterusan.

src: In Narathiwat Province a 40 year old village worker was shot while helping a neighbour repair a fence.
ref: Di Wilayah Narathiwat seorang pekerja kampung berusia 40 tahun telah ditembak semasa membantu jirannya membaiki pagar.

src: Friday saw the shooting of an assistant village head in Yala Province, and an elderly couple were shot in Pattani Province whilst returning from a local market.
ref: Hari Jumaat memperlihatkan tembak-menembak pembantu ketua kampung Wilayah Yala, dan satu pasangan tua telah ditembak di Wilayah Pattani semasa pulang dari pasaran tempatan.

src: The insurgency and campaign for an independent Muslim state in the southern provinces has resulted in an exodus from the area.
ref: Pemberontakan dan kempen untuk menubuhkan sebuah negara Islam yang merdeka di wilayah selatan telah menyebabkan penghijrahan dari kawasan itu.

src: Estimates put the number of Thai Buddhists who have fled the area at 34,000.
ref: Anggaran bahawa jumlah penganut agama Buddha Thai yang melarikan diri dari kawasan itu berangka 34,000.

src: There are also some reports that Muslim inhabitants of the area have been seeking refuge in Malaysia.
ref: Terdapat juga beberapa laporan bahawa penduduk Islam di kawasan itu telah meminta perlindungan di Malaysia.

src: The state of emergency imposed last month has had a mixed reception.
ref: Keadaan darurat yang dilancarkan pada bulan lalu mempunyai sambutan berbeza-beza.

src: Largely favoured by Buddhists in the provinces, this grants additional powers to the Prime Minister and follows on from martial law having been in place since January 2004.
ref: Sebahagian besarnya digemari oleh penganut agama Buddha di wilayah-wilayah, ini memberi kuasa tambahan kepada Perdana Menteri dan menyusul dari pemerintahan tentera yang telah dilaksanakan sejak Januari 2004.

src: Despite these security measures, over 1,000 people have died in the insurgency.
ref: Walaupun langkah-langkah keselamatan telah dilaksanakan, lebih daripada 1,000 orang terbunuh dalam pemberontakan itu.

src: Thousands of Greeks gathered last night in Syntagma square in front of the parliament building in Athens to protest over the political response to the fires.
ref: Beribu-ribu orang-orang Greece berkumpul malam tadi di dataran Syntagma di hadapan bangunan parlimen di Athens untuk membantah tindak balas politik terhadap kebakaran.

src: An estimated 8,000 people attended, after a call for a silent protest had been distributed through e-mail, text messages and eventually the media.
ref: Dianggarkan 8,000 orang hadir, selepas seruan untuk protes senyap telah diedarkan melalui e-mel, mesej teks dan akhirnya media.

src: Although general elections are taking place in two and a half weeks time, the protest was meant to be apolitical.
ref: Walaupun pilihan raya umum akan berlaku dalam dua setengah minggu lagi, bantahan itu tidak mempunyai motif politik.

src: Some protesters taunted riot police, who responded with stun grenades.
ref: Sesetengah penunjuk perasaan mencemuh polis di rusuhan itu, yang membalas dengan bom asap.

src: Wikipedia, one of the top ten websites on the internet, will soon be receiving a face lift.
ref: Wikipedia, salah satu daripada sepuluh laman web yang paling terkenal di internet, tidak lama lagi akan muncul dengan wajah baru.

src: The first part of the change is a new skin called Vector.
ref: Bahagian pertama perubahan itu adalah luaran baru yang dikenali sebagai Vektor.

src: This skin, currently used on Wikinews, will be enabled for Wikipedia on April 5th and provide a more updated look and feel.
ref: Luaran ini, pada masa ini digunakan pada Wikinews, akan diaktifkan untuk Wikipedia pada 5 April dan memberikan pandangan dan tanggapan yang lebih dikemaskini.

src: The second part will change the toolbar when editing, and is intended to ease common tasks.
ref: Bahagian kedua akan mengubah palang semasa mengedit, dan bertujuan untuk meringankan tugas-tugas biasa.

src: Both changes are important to encourage new people to edit and update content.
ref: Kedua-dua perubahan adalah penting untuk menggalakkan orang baru untuk mengedit dan mengemaskini kandungan.

src: The improvements have been tested by more than 500,000 beta-testers.
ref: Penambahbaikan telah diuji oleh lebih daripada 500,000 penguji beta.

src: The wiki code will also be altered; editors will be able to change tables data and other elements with what is intended as an easier form, in addition to editing an article while watching it.
ref: Kod wiki juga akan diubah; editor akan berupaya menukar jadual data dan elemen lain dengan apa yang ditujukan sebagai cara yang lebih mudah, di samping menyunting artikel semasa menontonnya.

src: On the other hand, the staff of Wikimedia requested more editors to add and update articles in their wikis.
ref: Sebaliknya, kakitangan Wikimedia meminta lebih ramai editor untuk menambah dan mengemaskini artikel dalam wiki mereka.

src: Wikipedia is a website maintained by users in unprecedented numbers.
ref: Wikipedia adalah sebuah laman web yang diselenggara oleh pengguna-pengguna dalam jumlah yang belum pernah berlaku dalam sejarah.

src: Maintenance and updating processes are dependent on just one percent of their users.
ref: Proses penyelenggaraan dan pengemaskinian hanya bergantung pada satu peratus pengguna mereka.

src: Based on some statements, fewer than a thousand users do the maintenance and updating work.
ref: Berdasarkan sesetengah kenyataan, kurang daripada satu ribu pengguna melakukan kerja penyelenggaraan dan pengemaskinian.

src: According to family, former United States senator for Texas and former Treasury Secretary, Lloyd Bentsen has died at the age of 85 in his home located in Houston, Texas.
ref: Menurut pihak keluarga, bekas senator Texas Amerika Syarikat dan bekas Setiausaha Perbendaharaan, Lloyd Bentsen telah meninggal dunia pada usia 85 di rumahnya yang terletak di Houston, Texas.

src: Bentsen is most famous for his words during a Vice Presidential debate on October 5, 1988.
ref: Bentsen paling terkenal dengan kata-kata beliau semasa perbahasan Naib Presiden pada 5 Oktober 1988.

src: Indiana Senator Dan Quayle, the Republican candidate for Vice President, compared his congressional experience to that of former President John F. Kennedy when he sought the presidency.
ref: Senator Indiana Dan Quayle, calon Republikan untuk Naib Presiden, membandingkan pengalaman kongresnya dengan bekas Presiden John F. Kennedy ketika beliau berjuang untuk jawatan presiden.

src: The sharp rebuke, however, didn't save Bentsen, as George H.W. Bush and Quayle defeated Michael Dukakis and Bentsen in the 1988 elections.
ref: Teguran tajam itu, bagaimanapun, tidak menyelamatkan Bentsen, kerana George H.W. Bush dan Quayle mengalahkan Michael Dukakis dan Bentsen dalam pilihan raya tahun 1988.

src: In 1998, Bentsen suffered a small stroke, which he said was caused by a 3-month long trip to 15 different nations.
ref: Pada tahun 1998, Bentsen mengalami strok kecil, yang beliau katakan disebab oleh perjalanan panjang selama 3 bulan ke 15 negara yang berbeza.

src: Bentsen was born on February 11, 1921 and represented the state of Texas for 28 years.
ref: Bentsen dilahirkan pada 11 Februari 1921 dan mewakili negeri Texas selama 28 tahun.

src: Veteran striker Pat "Bam Bam" Healy put an end to the undefeated streak of Lyle "Fancy Pants" Beerbohm in a close main event fight that went to the judges' decision at the Strikeforce Challengers 14 event at Cedar Park Center in Cedar Park, Texas on Friday night.
ref: Penyerang veteran Pat "Bam Bam" Healy telah menamatkan kemenangan berterusan Lyle "Fancy Pants" Beerbohm di dalam satu pertarungan acara utama tertutup yang diakhiri dengan keputusan para hakim di acara Strikeforce Challengers 14 di Pusat Cedar Park di Cedar Park, Texas pada malam hari Jumaat.

src: Veteran fighter Carlo "Neo" Prater also prevailed in his Strikeforce debut against Bryan Travers.
ref: Pelawan veteran Carlo "Neo" Prater juga telah berjaya menewaskan Bryan Travers di dalam kemunculan pertama kalinya di dalam Strikeforce.

src: Ryan Couture, son of MMA legend Randy Couture, remained undefeated in his second-ever bout.
ref: Ryan Couture, anak lelaki legenda MMA Randy Couture, kekal tidak ditewaskan di dalam perlawanan keduanya.

src: Lyle Beerbohm came into the main event bout with an undefeated 15-0-0 record, in addition to his 8-0-0 amateur record.
ref: Lyle Beerbohm muncul di acara perlawanan utama dengan rekod tidak pernah ditewaskan 15-0-0, sebagai tambahan kepada rekod amaturnya 8-0-0.

src: "This is going to be a fun, tough, hard fight that I expect will go everywhere," stated Beerbohm in a pre-fight media workout on Wednesday.
ref: "Ini akan menjadi perlawanan yang menarik, sukar dan mencabar yang saya jangka akan ke merata tempat," kata Beerbohm di dalam senaman media sebelum perlawanan pada hari Rabu.

src: "My time has come and I am really looking forward to the fight."
ref: "Masa saya telah tiba dan saya amat menunggu-nunggu perlawanan itu."

src: Beerbohm also stated he wanted to eventually fight for a Strikeforce Lightweight title, but recognized that he first needed to move past his veteran opponent, Pat Healey, who came into the fight with a record of 25-17-0, who was making his return to action since his loss to Josh Thompson via submission in 2010.
ref: Beerbohm turut menyatakan yang dia akhirnya nanti mahu berlawan untuk gelaran Strikeforce Lightweight, tetapi faham yang dia perlu melepasi pesaing veterannya terlebih dahulu, Pat Healey, yang masuk ke perlawanan dengan rekod 25-17-0, dan kembali beraksi setelah kekalahannya kepada Josh Thompson dengan cara pergelutan pada 2010.

src: The bout was very close, going the distance through all three rounds.
ref: Perlawanan tersebut amat dekat, dengan melalui jarak ketiga-tiga pusingan.

src: While Beerbohm pushed a lot of the action, especially with grappling on the ground, Healey was able to land more effective strikes and weathered persistent take-down attempts from Beerbohm.
ref: Walaupun Beerbohm menunjukkan banyak aksi, terutama sekali pergelutan di atas tanah, Healey pula dapat memberi serangan yang efektif dan melemahkan percubaan melempar berulangkali dari Beerbohm.

src: The action was back-and-forth, neither fighter never able to clearly dominate the other.
ref: Aksi tersebut berulang kali berlaku, dan kedua-dua pelawan tidak dapat mengatasi sesama mereka.

src: The last few minutes of the fight proved to be the best for Healey, who wore down Beerbohm's strength and left him gasping for air, allowing Healey to attempt more submissions on the ground.
ref: Minit-minit terakhir perlawanan terbukti yang terbaik bagi Healey, yang telah melemahkan Beerbohm dan membuatnya kepenatan, membolehkan Healey membuat beberapa cubaan pergelutan di atas tanah.

src: The three judges scored the bout 29-28, 29-28, and 29-28 to give Healey the unanimous decision win.
ref: Ketiga-tiga hakim memberi markah perlawanan tersebut 29-28, 29-28, dan 29-28 memberikan Healey keputusan menang secara sebulat suara.

src: After the match, Beerbohm was upbeat, but felt he had won the bout.
ref: Selepas perlawanan itu, Beerbohm dalam kepenatan, tetapi merasakan yang dia telah memenangi perlawanan tersebut.

src: "I thought going into the third we'd each won a round, but I definitely thought I won that last round."
ref: "Saya fikirkan apabila berlawan sehingga pusingan ketiga kami akan menang setiap orang satu pusingan, dan saya amat yakin yang saya telah menang pusingan terakhir."

src: "But that's what happens when you let it go to the hands of the judges."
ref: "Tetapi inilah yang terjadi apabila keputusan dibiarkan dibuat oleh hakim."

src: Healey complimented his opponent, "Beerbohm fought a good fight but I think I outworked and outhustled him."
ref: Healey memuji pesaingnya, "Beerbohm telah berlawan satu perlawanan yang bagus tetapi saya rasa saya telah berjaya mengatasi dan mengalahkannya."

src: Healey also welcomed the idea of a rematch, stating, "He talked a lot of trash, but if he wants a rematch, I'll give him one anytime."
ref: Healey turut menyambut idea perlawanan semula dengan baik dengan menyatakan, "Dia banyak bercakap kosong, tetapi jika dia mahukan perlawanan semula, saya akan berikan kepadanya bila-bila masa."

src: Asked who he wanted to face next, Healey stated he wanted to fight the winner of the Billy "Cyborg" Evangelista and Jorge "Gamebred" Masvidal on March 5, noting that both fighters had previously defeated his brother, Pat Healey.
ref: Apabila ditanya dengan siapa dia mahu berlawan selepas ini, Healey berkata dia mahu berlawan dengan pemenang Billy "Cyborg" Evangelista dan Jorge "Gamebred" Masvidal pada 5 Mac, dan menambah kedua-dua pelawan ini dahulunya telah mengalahkan abangnya, Pat Healey.

src: The co-main event for the show featured Carlo "Neo" Prater, a veteran fighter with a 25-10-1 record making his Strikeforce debut against the 14-3-0 Bryan Travers.
ref: Acara utama bersama bagi pertunjukan ini turut menunjukkan Carlo "Neo" Prater, pelawan veteran dengan rekod 25-10-1 membuat kemunculan pertama kali di Strikeforce dengan mengalahkan Bryan Travers 14-3-0.

src: The bout was over in just 38 seconds as Prater used his superior reach to jab Travers several times before using a trip to take Travers to the ground and submitting him with an Anaconda Choke.
ref: Perlawanan ini berakhir hanya dalam masa 38 saat kerana Prater telah menggunakan jangkauannya yang hebat untuk menumbuk Travers beberapa kali sebelum menjatuhkan Travers ke tanah dan membuatkannya menyerah kalah dengan Anaconda Choke.

src: Prater showed a lot of emotion in his post-fight interview.
ref: Prater menunjukkan banyak emosi di dalam temu bual selepas perlawanannya.

src: "My record shows I'm not a perfect fighter, but when you're down you get up," Prater said.
ref: "Rekod saya tidak menunjukkan yang saya adalah pelawan yang sempurna, tetapi apabila kamu jatuh kamu akan bangun semula," kata Prater.

src: "This was a good win, I'll get better off this fight, but I'll be right back in the gym soon."
ref: "Ini adalah satu kemenangan yang bagus, saya akan lebih baik selepas perlawanan ini, tetapi saya akan kembali ke gim nanti."

src: Ryan Couture, the son of MMA legend Randy "the Nature" Couture, pushed his fight record to 2-0-0 with a victory over 2-0-0 opponent Lee Higgins.
ref: Ryan Couture, anak lelaki legenda MMA Randy "the Nature" Couture, telah menolak rekod perlawannya kepada 2-0-0 dengan kemenangan ke atas pesaing 2-0-0 Lee Higgins.

src: Most of the first round featured very little action until Higgins attempted to take down Couture, and found himself fighting off Guillotine Choke and a D'Arce Choke in the last minute of the round.
ref: Hampir keseluruhan pusingan pertama menunjukkan aksi yang sedikit sehinggalah Higgins membuat percubaan untuk menjatuhkan Couture, dan kemudian bergelut untuk melawan Guillotine Choke dan D'Arce Choke pada minit terakhir pusingan itu.

src: Couture dominated nearly all of the second round with superior stand-up striking and ground control.
ref: Couture menguasai hampir keseluruhan pusingan kedua dengan serangan berdiri dan kawalan tapak yang hebat.

src: Higgins fared little better in the third, as Couture was able to put Higgins against the cage and stop Higgins' take-down attempts, and then eventually control Higgins on the ground before submitting him with a Rear Naked Choke with 20 seconds left in the bout.
ref: Higgins berlawan dengan sedikit bagus di dalam pusingan ketiga, sehinggalah Couture berjaya mengunci Higgins dan menghentikan percubaan Higgins untuk menjatuhkannya, dan akhirnya mengawal Higgins di atas tanah sebelum membuat Higgins menyerah kalah dengan Rear Naked Choke dalam 20 saat akhir perlawanan itu.

src: The main card was broadcast in the United States on premium broadcast network Showtime.
ref: Pusingan utama telah dipancarkan di Amerika Syarikat dengan siaran premium rangkaian Showtime.

src: The Showtime Strikeforce Challengers series highlights mixed martial arts fights between up-and-coming fighters as well as veteran fighters who are looking to move up towards the larger Strikeforce events.
