ref: Siri Showtime Strikeforce Challengers menumpukan perlawanan seni mempertahankan diri bercampur di antara pelawan baru dan juga pelawan veteran yang mencari peluang untuk maju ke acara Strikeforce yang lebih besar.

src: Mauritanians voted in favour of a new Constitution by an overwhelming majority in a referendum held on June 26, according to results announced by Interior Ministry officials today.
ref: Rakyat Mauritania telah mengundi setuju kepada Perlembagaan baru dengan majoriti besar di dalam referendum yang diadakan pada 26 Jun, menurut kepada keputusan yang diumumkan oleh pengawai Menteri Dalaman hari ini.

src: The new Constitution sets limits on the number of presidential terms a leader can serve, in contrast to several sub-Saharan countries, where several leaders have amended their Constitutions to retain power.
ref: Perlembagaan baru itu meletakkan had kepada jumlah tempoh presiden yang dibolehkan bagi seorang pemimpin, berlainan dengan beberapa negara sub-Sahara, di mana beberapa pemimpin telah mengubah Perlembagaan untuk mengekalkan kuasa.

src: The Interior Minister, Mohamed Ahmed Ould Mohamed Lemine said that over 96 percent votes cast were in favour of the new Constitution.
ref: Menteri Dalaman, Mohamed Ahmed Ould Mohamed Lemine berkata bahawa lebih dari 96 peratus undian adalah setuju kepada Perlembagaan baru.

src: The turnout was over 76 percent of the close to One million registered voters, who constitute about a third of the country's population.
ref: Jumlah yang mengundi adalah 76 peratus kepada hampir satu juta pengundi berdaftar, yang mewakili sepertiga jumlah penduduk negara tersebut.

src: The referendum will now lead to municipal and legislative elections to be held in November, followed by elections to the parliamentary upper house and the President's post in 2007.
ref: Referendum itu akan membawa kepada pilihanraya perbandaran dan undangan yang akan diadakan pada November, diikuti oleh pilihanraya peringkat senat Parlimen dan jawatan Presiden pada tahun 2007.

src: The new Constitution provides for a presidential form of government, with the President commanding significant powers, including the appointment of the prime minister.
ref: Perlembagaan baru menyediakan kerajaan berpresiden, dengan Presiden memerintah dengan kuasa terpenting, termasuk dalam melantik perdana menteri.

src: The Parliament though, can vote for no confidence in the government or censure it.
ref: Parlimen bagaimanapun, boleh mengundi untuk tidak yakin terhadap kerajaan atau mencelanya.

src: The Constitution disallows members of the present junta from running for the President's post and requires future leaders to swear on the Qur'an that they will not amend the Constitution to stay in power.
ref: Perlembagaan tidak membenarkan ahli-ahli junta semasa dari bertanding untuk jawatan Presiden dan memerlukan bakal pemimpin untuk bersumpah ke atas Qur'an yang mereka tidak akan mengubah Perlembagaan untuk kekal berkuasa.

src: International observers from the African Union and the Arab League said that the referendum appeared to have gone smoothly, but have yet to make their final reports.
ref: Pemerhati-pemerhati antarabangsa dari Kesatuan Afrika dan Liga Arab berkata bahawa referendum itu kelihatan seperti telah berlangsung dengan lancar, tetapi mereka masih perlu menyediakan laporan terakhir.

src: President Ely Ould Mohamed Vall, who also voted in the referendum said, "This is a great day and a rebirth for Mauritania ..."
ref: Presiden Ely Ould Mohamed Vall, yang turut mengundi di dalam referendum itu berkata, "Ini adalah hari yang baik dan satu kelahiran semula bagi Mauritania..."

src: "I am sure that all Mauritanians feel the same way and that for this reason the Constitution will receive massive support."
ref: "Saya pasti yang semua rakyat Mauritania merasakan perasaan yang sama dan atas sebab itu Perlembagaan akan menerima sokongan kuat."

src: The Constitution has the backing of most civic and political groups, though two small parties called for a boycott of the referendum, saying the proposed Constitution ignores slavery, which is officially banned but still persists according to activists; and issues of "cohabitation between the different national communities" (such as Blacks and Arabs).
ref: Perlembagaan mendapat sokongan kebanyakan kumpulan-kumpulan politik dan sivik, walaupun ada dua parti kecil menyeru untuk memboikot referendum itu, dengan mengatakan Perlembagaan yang dicadangkan itu menghiraukan perhambaan, yang telah secara rasmi diharamkan tetapi masih lagi berterusan menurut aktivis; dan isu-isu "sekedudukan di antara komuniti berlainan nasional" (seperti Kulit gelap dan Arab).

src: An Australian man arrested last December near the Cambodian border in Vietnam, Trinh Huu, has been sentenced to death by a Vietnamese People's Court for smuggling 2kg of heroin.
ref: Seorang lelaki warganegara Australia yang ditahan Disember lalu berdekatan sempadan Kemboja di Vietnam, Trinh Huu, telah dijatuhkan hukuman mati oleh Mahkamah Rakyat Vietnam atas kesalahan menyeludup 2kg heroin.

src: Amnesty International has urged the Australian Federal Government to do everything it can to help the man.
ref: Amnesti Antarabangsa telah menggesa Kerajaan Persekutuan Australia untuk melakukan apa sahaja bagi membantu lelaki tersebut.

src: The Australian Department of Foreign Affairs has said that Trinh was receiving consular assistance, but that it was too early to negotiate for clemency as his case is still subject to appeal.
ref: Jabatan Hal-ehwal Luar Negeri Australia telah berkata bahawa Trinh sedang mendapat bantuan konsul, tetapi masih terlalu awal untuk berunding untuk belas kasihan kerana kesnya masih terbuka untuk rayuan.

src: The government has reiterated its long standing opposition to the death penalty.
ref: Kerajaan telah memperbaharui pendapat jangka panjangnya dalam menentang hukuman mati.

src: The National Socialist Movement is, according to its website, the largest and most active Nazi party in the United States.
ref: Gerakan Nasional Sosialis ialah, menurut laman webnya, parti Nazi terbesar dan teraktif di dalam Amerika Syarikat.

src: Accordingly, it refers to itself as 'America's Nazi Party' and aims to instigate major change in the US.
ref: Oleh yang demikian, ia merujuk dirinya sendiri sebagai 'Parti Nazi Amerika'dan bertujuan untuk memulakan perubahan besar di US.

src: Wikinews was able to conduct an interview with the head of the party, Commander Jeff Schoep.
ref: Wikinews telah berjaya menemubual ketua parti tersebut, Komander Jeff Schoep.

src: Fresh back from a march in Missouri, Commander Schoep told Wikinews his views on Barack Obama, the economy and much more.
ref: Baru kembali dari perbarisan di Missouri, Komander Schoep telah memberitahu Wikinews pandangannya terhadap Barack Obama, ekonomi dan banyak lagi.

src: Swindon, England, has an unusual new twin town: Walt Disney World in Florida.
ref: Swindon, England, mempunyai bandar kembar baru yang luar biasa: Walt Disney World di Florida.

src: The Wiltshire town beat 24 others in a competition to become the first ever to be twinned with the famous resort.
ref: Bandar Wiltshire telah mengalahkan 24 bandar lain di dalam sebuah pertandingan untuk menjadi bandar kembar pertama tempat peranginan terkenal itu.

src: Rebecca Warren, a local building society worker, created a poem and video praising Swindon which won over the judges.
ref: Rebecca Warren, seorang pekerja bangunan masyarakat tempatan, telah menghasilkan satu puisi dan video yang memuji Swindon dan telah memenangi hati para hakim.

src: Among other features she highlighted the town's well-known Magic Roundabout, a complicated junction composed of five interlinked mini-roundabouts, comparing it to Disney World's teacup rides.
ref: Antara keistimewaan yang dia tumpukan adalah Magic Roundabout bandar yang dikenali ramai, satu persimpangan jalan yang rumit yang terdiri daripada lima bulatan mini yang bersambung, membandingkannya dengan permainan cawan teh di Disney World.

src: A sign marking the twinning is planned for the roundabout.
ref: Satu papan tanda menunjukkan kembaran itu dirancangkan bagi bulatan tersebut.

src: Ms. Warren will travel to Florida with her eleven-year-old nephew and five-year-old niece to unveil a similar sign at the resort.
ref: Cik Warren akan pergi ke Florida dengan anak saudara lelaki berusia sebelas tahun dan anak saudara perempuan berusia lima tahun bagi mempamerkan papan tanda yang serupa di tempat peranginan itu.

src: A celebration will be held in Swindon in January, and it will also be the focus of an exhibit at Walt Disney World's Epcot park.
ref: Satu pesta akan diadakan di Swindon pada bulan Januari, dan turut menjadi fokus kepada satu pameran di taman Epcot di Walt Disney World.

src: "Britain clearly has a love for Walt Disney World and long-standing affinity with the parks and their magic, which is probably why the number and quality of entries received was so high," said Disney's Hugh Wood.
ref: "Britain dengan jelas sekali cintakan Walt Disney World dan mempunyai tarikan berpanjangan dengan taman tersebut dan keajaibannnya, yang mungkin sebab mengapa jumlah dan kualiti peserta yang diterima amat tinggi," kata Hugh Wood dari Disney.

src: Other towns shortlisted in the competition included Aberdeen, Blackpool, Milton Keynes, and Cambridge.
ref: Bandar lain di dalam senarai terpilih pertandingan itu termasuk Aberdeen, Blackpool, Milton Keynes, dan Cambridge.

src: The jury in the Isiah Thomas sexual harassment trial revealed a guilty verdict Tuesday, ruling that the current New York Knicks coach subjected former Madison Square Garden executive Anucha Browne Sanders to unwanted sexual advances and verbal insults.
ref: Juri di dalam perbicaraan gangguan seksual Isiah Thomas telah mengeluarkan keputusan bersalah Selasa lalu, memutuskan yang jurulatih semasa New York Knicks telah memaksa bekas eksekutif Madison Square Garden Anucha Browne Sanders untuk kelakuan seksual tidak diingini dan kata-kata cercaan.

src: In a minor victory for Thomas, the ruling also said that Thomas will not have to pay punitive damages.
ref: Di dalam kemenangan kecil untuk Thomas, keputusan itu turut menyatakan yang Thomas tidak perlu membayar ganti rugi punitif.

src: However, Thomas' employer, Madison Square Garden, was also found guilty of harassment and will have to pay millions dollars worth of punitive damages to Browne Sanders.
ref: Bagaimanapun, majikan Thomas, Madison Square Garden, juga didapati bersalah ke atas gangguan dan perlu membayar ganti rugi punitif berjumlah berjuta dolar kepada Browne Sanders.

src: The ugly three-week trial originated with a US$10 million lawsuit filed by Browne Sanders, the former senior vice president of marketing and business operations for the Knicks.
ref: Perbicaraan tiga minggu yang teruk ini bermula dengan tuntutan mahkamah US$10 juta yang difailkan oleh Browne Sanders, bekas timbalan presiden kanan pemasaran dan operasi Knicks.

src: She was fired by the team in December of 2006, and following her dismissal she filed the explosive lawsuit alleging that Madison Square Garden fostered an environment of sexism and inequality, personified by the conduct of Isiah Thomas.
ref: Dia telah dipecat oleh kumpulan itu pada Disember 2006, dan sejurus dari pemecatannya dia memfailkan tuntutan mahkamah yang meletup mendakwa Madison Square Garden menggalakkan persekitaran seksisme dan tidak adil, dipersonafikasikan oleh tindakan Isiah Thomas.

src: She stated that Thomas repeatedly called her a "bitch" and a "ho", and pressured her to kiss him and said that he loved her.
ref: Dia menyatakan yang Thomas berulang kali memanggilnya "betina" dan "perempuan jalang," dan memaksanya untuk cium dan memberitahunya dia mencintainya.

src: She also stated that the firing was the result of her filing a complaint about Thomas.
ref: Dia juga menyatakan pemecatannya itu adalah akibat dari dia memfailkan rungutan mengenai Thomas.

src: Madison Square Garden, and the coach known for his charismatic and emotional demeanor, denied the charges.
ref: Madison Square Garden, dan jurulatihnya dikenali sebagai seorang yang berkarisma dan perilaku emosi, menyangkal tuduhan-tuduhan itu.

src: After the guilty verdict was read, a relieved Browne Sanders hugged her family and friends who were present at the trial.
ref: Selepas keputusan bersalah dibacakan, Browne Sanders yang lega memeluk keluarga dan rakannya yang hadir ke perbicaraan itu.

src: Thomas met with his lawyers, and while leaving the courthouse stated, "I'm innocent, very innocent, and I did not do the things she has accused me in this courtroom of doing."
ref: Thomas berjumpa dengan peguam-peguamnya, dan semasa meninggalkan mahkamah berkata, "Saya tidak bersalah, sangat tidak bersalah, dan saya tidak melakukan apa yang dia tuduh saya di dalam mahkamah."

src: "I'm extremely disappointed that the jury did not see the facts in this case."
ref: "Saya amat kecewa dengan juri yang tidak melihat fakta-fakta di dalam kes ini."

src: "I will appeal this, and I remain confident in the man that I am and what I stand for and the family that I have."
ref: "Saya akan merayu untuk kes ini dan kekal yakin dengan siapa saya dan apa yang saya pegang dan untuk keluarga yang saya ada."

src: Madison Square Garden is also expected to appeal the decision.
ref: Madison Square Garden juga dijangka akan membuat rayuan ke atas keputusan itu.

src: President Bush is lobbying the U.S. House of Representatives to pass the Central America Free Trade Agreement (CAFTA), which is scheduled for a vote Wednesday night.
ref: Presiden Bush sedang melobi Dewan Rakyat Amerika Syarikat untuk meluluskan Perjanjian Perdagangan Bebas Amerika Tengah (CAFTA), yang dijadualkan untuk pembuangan undi malam tadi.

src: Similar to the existing North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) among the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, CAFTA would create a free trade zone putting an end to most trade barriers between the United States and six additional countries, including Costa Rica, El Salvador, Honduras, Guatemala, Nicaragua, and the Dominican Republic.
ref: Sama seperti Perjanjian Perdagangan Bebas Amerika Utara (NAFTA) yang sedia ada antara Amerika Syarikat, Kanada, dan Mexico, CAFTA akan mewujudkan zon perdagangan bebas yang mengakhiri kebanyakan halangan perdagangan di antara Amerika Syarikat dan enam negara tambahan, termasuk Costa Rica, El Salvador, Honduras, Guatemala, Nicaragua, dan Republik Dominican.

src: Many Republicans who represent agricultural Corn Belt or industrial Rust Belt and southern textile states in Congress also have stated opposition to the bill.
ref: Ramai wakil Republikan dalam Kongres yang mewakili pertanian Corn Belt atau perindustrian Rust Belt dan negeri-negeri tekstil di selatan juga telah menyatakan bantahan terhadap rang undang-undang itu.

src: But with a Republican majority in the House large enough to ensure passage of CAFTA, party leaders are trying to shore up enough votes to ensure CAFTA's passage.
ref: Tetapi dengan majoriti wakil Republikan di Dewan Rakyat yang cukup besar untuk memastikan pelulusan CAFTA, pemimpin-pemimpin parti cuba menyokong undi yang cukup untuk memastikan pelulusan CAFTA.

src: This has prompted last minute action by the President to lobby individual members of the House, reminding them that Central American countries have committed troops and other resources to fight the U.S. War on Terror.
ref: Ini telah mendorong tindakan saat-saat terakhir oleh Presiden untuk melobi ahli-ahli individu Dewan Rakyat, mengingatkan mereka bahawa negara-negara Amerika Tengah mempunyai angkatan tentera yang berdedikasi dan sumber-sumber lain yang menyumbang kepada Perang A.S. ke atas Keganasan.

src: Other Republican leaders have been using the party's traditional pro-business message and linking it to homeland security issues.
ref: Pemimpin Republik lain telah menggunakan mesej tradisional parti yang pro-perniagaan dan mengaitkannya dengan isu-isu keselamatan dalam negeri.

src: "Trade creates jobs and lifts people out of poverty and there's nothing like a stable society to fight terrorism and strengthen democracy, freedom and rule of law," Dennis Hastert, Speaker of the House, reportedly said at a news conference Tuesday.
ref: "Perdagangan mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan dan mengangkat orang daripada kemiskinan dan tiada apa yang dapat dibandingkan dengan masyarakat yang stabil untuk memerangi keganasan dan mengukuhkan demokrasi, kebebasan dan kedaulatan undang-undang," Dennis Hastert, Speaker Dewan, dilaporkan berkata pada sidang akhbar hari ini.

src: CAFTA is "a bad deal for Central Americans and also for Latinos in this community... (with CAFTA) the exploitation of workers will continue in Central America," Democrat Representative Hilda Solis of Los Angeles said.
ref: CAFTA adalah "perjanjian yang tidak memanfaatkan rakyat Amerika Tengah dan juga untuk orang Latin di komuniti ini... (dengan CAFTA) eksploitasi pekerja akan berterusan di Amerika Tengah," Wakil Demokrat Los Angeles Hilda Solis berkata.

src: Her views are common among Democrats, who are overwhelmingly against the treaty.
ref: Pandangan beliau adalah biasa di kalangan wakil Demokrat, yang amat sangat membantah perjanjian itu.

src: According to opponents of CAFTA, the current trend of American jobs being sent to foreign countries, particularly in the information technology sector, would greatly expand under the treaty.
ref: Menurut penentang CAFTA, perkembangan semasa adalah pekerjaan Amerika dihantar ke negara-negara asing, terutamanya dalam sektor teknologi maklumat, akan berkembang luas di bawah perjanjian itu.

src: "This will be a vote in the middle of the night."
ref: "Ini adalah pembuangan undi di pertengahan malam."

src: "They'll keep the vote open for several hours, in violation of the rules."
ref: "Mereka akan terus membuka buangan undi untuk beberapa jam, yang mana melanggar peraturan."

src: "If it passes, it will be by fewer than five votes," predicted Rep. Sherrod Brown, a Democrat from Ohio, according to a Washington Post report.
ref: "Jika ia lulus, ia adalah dengan kurang daripada lima undi," Wakil Sherrod Brown meramal, seorang wakil Demokrat dari Ohio, menurut laporan Washington Post.

src: The Canadian House of Commons will re-open the debate on same-sex marriage next Wednesday, December 6th, when it debates a resolution to reconsider the Civil Marriage Act that was passed by the previous Liberal-led parliament in 2005.
ref: Dewan Rakyat Kanada akan membuka semula perdebatan mengenai perkahwinan sama jantina pada hari Rabu, 6 Disember, apabila perbahasan resolusi untuk menimbang semula Akta Perkahwinan Awam yang telah diluluskan oleh parlimen yang diterajui oleh parti Liberal sebelum ini pada tahun 2005.

src: In the intervening election, the victorious Conservatives promised that if they were elected parliament would hold a free vote on whether to amend or repeal the Act.
ref: Pada pilihan raya berselang, Parti Konservatif yang menang berjanji bahawa jika mereka dipilih Parlimen akan mengadakan buangan undi bebas untuk menentukan sama ada akan meminda atau memansuhkan Akta itu.

src: Several surveys have suggested that MPs in the minority parliament will overwhelmingly reaffirm support for same-sex marriage once a vote has held.
ref: Beberapa kajian telah mencadangkan bahawa Ahli Parlimen di Parlimen minoriti itu akan lebih lagi mengesahkan sokongan untuk perkahwinan sama jantina setelah buangan undi diadakan.

src: The pro-same sex marriage group Canadians for Equal Marriage estimates that the motion will be defeated by at least 35 votes.
ref: Kumpulan yang menyokong perkahwinan sama seks Kanada untuk Perkahwinan Sama menganggarkan bahawa usul itu akan dikalahkan dengan sekurang-kurangnya 35 undi.

src: This has prompted supporters of same-sex marriage to urge that a vote be held as soon as possible while opponents of gay marriage have been urging the government to delay the vote until the next election, expected early in 2007, in hopes of the election of a Conservative majority that would repeal the act.
ref: Ini telah mendorong penyokong perkahwinan sama jantina untuk mendesak bahawa satu buangan undi diadakan secepat mungkin sementara penentang perkahwinan lelaki homoseksual telah mendesak kerajaan untuk menangguhkan buangan undi sehingga pilihan raya akan datang, dijangka pada awal tahun 2007, dengan harapan untuk pemilihan parti Konservatif majoriti yang akan memansuhkan akta itu.

src: A number of Conservative MPs and strategists have supported an early vote, however, in the belief that the same-sex issue would hurt the Tories in an election campaign by emphasizing a social conservative agenda that is unpopular in urban areas and Quebec.
ref: Beberapa Ahli Parlimen Konservatif dan perangka strategi telah menyokong undi awal, bagaimanapun, dengan kepercayaan bahawa isu sama jantina itu akan menjejaskan penyokong parti konservatif dalam kempen pilihan raya dengan menekankan agenda konservatif sosial yang tidak popular di kawasan bandar dan Quebec.

src: A Florida man was killed and another man hospitalized after their boat sank off Cape May, New Jersey, US.
ref: Seorang lelaki Florida terbunuh dan seorang lelaki lagi dimasukkan ke hospital selepas bot mereka karam di Cape May, New Jersey, Amerika Syarikat.

src: The Sea Wolf sent a distress signal via emergency satellite beacon at about 1:35 AM on Thursday, seven miles off Cape May.
ref: Sea Wolf menghantar isyarat kecemasan melalui api isyarat kecemasan satelit pada kira-kira 1:35 pagi pada hari Khamis, tujuh batu dari Cape May.

src: A member of the State Police informed the Coast Guard who sent out an MH-65 rescue helicopter and two rescue launches.
ref: Seseorang anggota Polis Negeri memaklumkan Pengawal Pantai yang menghantar satu MH- 65 helikopter penyelamat dan melancarkan dua usaha penyelamatan.

src: The helicopter managed to save Steve Hopkins of the District of Columbia but was unable to do the same for Gregory Arlotta of Florida.
ref: Helikopter itu berjaya menyelamatkan Steve Hopkins dari Daerah Columbia tetapi tidak mampu melakukan perkara yang sama untuk Gregory Arlotta dari Florida.

src: The 62 year old disappeared among the debris in eight-foot waves.
ref: Mangsa yang berusia 62 tahun itu hilang di antara serpihan di dalam ombak berukuran lapan kaki.

src: Arlotta had recently bought the vessel in New York; its previous owner was in his seventies and had decided to sell the ship.
ref: Arlotta membeli kapal itu di New York baru-baru ini; pemilik sebelumnya dalam lingkungan umur tujuh puluhan dan telah membuat keputusan untuk menjual kapal itu.

src: The Sea Wolf had been operating for a couple of decades prior to the sinking, and was described by one local as unfit for the voyage it was undertaking to New Orleans.
ref: Sea Wolf itu telah beroperasi selama beberapa dekad sebelum pembenaman itu, dan digambarkan oleh salah seorang orang tempatan sebagai tidak sesuai untuk pelayaran ke New Orleans.

src: A 1963 Gilligan, it was designed for use within ten miles of shore for fishing.
ref: Sebuah Gilligan yang dibina dalam tahun 1963, ia direka untuk digunakan dalam jarak sepuluh batu dari pantai untuk memancing.

src: Mark Webber set up a third place for Red Bull, while his team-mate Sebastian Vettel was out of the race due to problems with the car's suspension.
ref: Mark Webber mendapat tempat ketiga untuk Red Bull, manakala rakan sepasukannya Sebastian Vettel telah keluar dari perlumbaan itu kerana masalah dengan sistem penggantungan roda kereta.

src: Nico Rosberg drove his Williams up to fourth place, while the second McLaren of Heikki Kovalainen came fifth.
ref: Nico Rosberg memandu Williamsnya sehingga tempat keempat, manakala McLaren yang kedua Heikki Kovalainen mencapai tempat kelima.

src: Championship leader Jenson Button gained two points for Brawn by finishing 7th and is now 18.5 points ahead of Webber, who has moved into second place ahead of Vettel.
ref: Pemimpin juara Jenson Button mendapat dua mata untuk Brawn dengan menduduki tempat ke-7 dan kini 18.5 mata lebih daripada Webber, yang berpindah ke tempat kedua mendahului Vettel.

src: He split the two Toyota cars of Timo Glock and Jarno Trulli, who completed the top eight.
ref: Beliau memotong dua buah kereta Toyota milik Timo Glock dan Jarno Trulli, yang mendapat lapan tempat terbaik.

src: The International Football Association Board (IFAB), the body that decides on the laws of the game, has decided to discontinue all experiments involving technology, and for the first time has also decided on the exact size of a soccer field.
ref: Lembaga Persatuan Bola Sepak Antarabangsa (IFAB), badan yang memutuskan peraturan-peraturan permainan tersebut, telah memutuskan untuk tidak meneruskan semua ujikaji yang melibatkan teknologi, dan buat kali pertama juga telah memutuskan saiz tepat padang bola sepak.

src: Instead of pursuing the idea of using cameras or microchips in the ball to see if it has crossed the goal-line, the International Board wants to see if the introduction of two extra assistant referees can improve the quality of referee's decisions.
ref: Sebalik daripada menggunakan kamera atau mikrocip dalam bola untuk melihat jika ia telah merentasi garisan gol, Lembaga Antarabangsa mahu memperhatikan jika pengenalan dua penolong pengadil tambahan boleh meningkatkan kualiti keputusan pengadil.

src: FIFA general secretary Jerome Valcke declared: "We have decided to freeze for the time being the goal-line technology and all technology experiments."
ref: Setiausaha Agung FIFA, Jerome Valcke mengumum: "Kami telah memutuskan untuk membekukan teknologi garisan gol dan eksperimen teknologi buat masa ini."

src: "We will look on these two additional referees and we avoid considering any goal-line technology during this time."
ref: "Kami akan memperhatikan dua pengadil tambahan dan kami mengelak daripada menimbangkan apa-apa teknologi garisan gol pada masa ini."

src: FIFA President Sepp Blatter said the move was necessary to maintain the universal spirit of the game: "We have 260 million people directly involved in the game."
ref: Presiden FIFA, Sepp Blatter berkata langkah itu adalah perlu untuk mengekalkan semangat sejagat permainan itu: "Kami mempunyai 260 juta orang yang terlibat secara langsung dalam permainan ini."

src: "If we maintain the laws of the game ... it's so easy to understand ..."
ref: "Jika kami mengekalkan peraturan-peraturan permainan itu... ia begitu mudah untuk difahami..."

src: "We have to live with errors, football has to keep its human face."
ref: "Kami harus menerima kesilapan, bola sepak perlu mengekalkan sifat kemanusiaannya."

src: "We have to maintain the laws of the game in their simplicity."
ref: "Kami perlu mengekalkan peraturan-peraturan permainan ini dalam kesederhanaannya."

src: "Do you want technical devices to take decisions? That's why, after three years of tests with no conclusions, I am in favour of putting the whole thing on ice," Blatter explained.
ref: "Adakah anda mahu peranti teknikal untuk membuat keputusan? Itulah sebabnya, selepas tiga tahun ujian tanpa sebarang kesimpulan, saya menyokong penangguhan untuk kata pemutus," terang Blatter.

src: UEFA president Michel Platini agreed: "Football should stay human, but two more officials can help, especially around the goal."
ref: Presiden UEFA Michel Platini bersetuju: "Bola sepak patut terus mengekalkan sifat kemanusiaannya, tetapi dua pegawai tambahan boleh membantu, terutama di dalam perkara gol."

src: Platini made the suggestion to freeze all investigations into technology and to try two additional assistants behind each goal.
ref: Platini membuat cadangan untuk membekukan semua siasatan dalam teknologi dan mencuba dua pembantu tambahan di belakang setiap gol.

src: Blatter said the system using the microchip "was very complicated, needing electrified lines on the field of play and other devices including antennae and when we tested it in Tokyo last year there was one mistake during the seven matches we used as an experiment at the Club World Championship."
ref: Blatter berkata sistem yang menggunakan mikrocip "adalah sangat rumit, memerlukan garis elektrik di padang permainan dan peranti lain termasuk antena dan apabila kami menjalankan ujian di Tokyo tahun lepas ada satu kesilapan dalam tujuh perlawanan yang kami gunakan sebagai eksperimen di Kelab Kejohanan Dunia."

src: With regards to the system using cameras, he pointed to "problems with players obscuring the views of the cameras, or of flares or weather conditions."
ref: Merujuk kepada sistem yang menggunakan kamera, dia menunjukkan "masalah dengan pemain yang mengaburkan pandangan kamera, atau suar atau keadaan cuaca."

src: The system of the extra referees will be tested at an upcoming FIFA or UEFA tournament, and a final ruling is expected at next year's meeting, according to FIFA's Jerome Valcke.
ref: Sistem pengadil tambahan akan diuji dalam kejohanan FIFA atau UEFA akan datang, dan keputusan akhir dijangka dibuat dalam mesyuarat tahun depan, menurut Jerome Valcke dari FIFA.

src: Hawk-Eye, the company that was working on the goal-line technology that is already being used for line calls in tennis, reacted with disappointment: "I'm livid, it is completely out of the blue..."
ref: Hawk -Eye, syarikat yang bekerja dalam teknologi garisan gol yang telah digunakan untuk pemerhatian garisan dalam tenis, membalas dengan kekecewaan: "Saya sangat marah, ia benar-benar berlaku secara tiba-tiba..."

src: "A year ago they met and gave us four criteria to meet and we have met all of them, yet they have kicked it out now..."
ref: "Setahun yang lalu mereka bertemu dan memberikan kami empat kriteria untuk dipenuhi dan kami telah memenuhi semua daripada mereka, namun mereka telah menghumbankannya sekarang..."

src: "We have invested an awful lot of money and now we have no return on that investment," director Paul Hawkins said.
ref: "Kami telah melabur banyak wang dan sekarang kita tidak mendapat apa-apa pulangan daripada pelaburan itu," kata Pengarah Paul Hawkins.

src: He said he was encouraged to continue research on the project only 10 days ago at a private showing for IFAB members at Reading's Madejski Stadium.
ref: Katanya, beliau digalakkan untuk meneruskan penyelidikan dalam projek ini hanya 10 hari lalu di sebuah pertunjukan swasta untuk ahli IFAB di Stadium Madejski di Reading.

src: While the Welsh FA were also against the idea, the English Football Association supported the use of technology and was hoping to start using it by next season.
ref: Walaupun FA Wales juga menentang idea itu, Persatuan Bola Sepak Inggeris menyokong penggunaan teknologi dan berharap untuk mula menggunakannya dari musim depan.

src: The FA clubs and referees supported the use of Hawk-Eye technology, said Mike Foster, general secretary of the English Premier League.
ref: Kelab FA dan pengadil menyokong penggunaan teknologi Hawk-Eye, kata Mike Foster, Setiausaha Agung Liga Perdana Inggeris.

src: A spokesperson of the Premier League said that "A lot of time, money and effort has gone into developing a system that meets all the criteria laid down last year."
ref: Seorang jurucakap Liga Perdana itu berkata bahawa, "Banyak masa, wang dan usaha telah dicurahkan dalam pembangunan sistem yang memenuhi semua kriteria yang ditetapkan tahun lepas."

src: The Scottish and Northern Irish FA also voted in favour of the goal-line technology.
ref: FA Scotland dan Northern Ireland juga mengundi memihak kepada teknologi garisan gol.

src: FA chief executive Brian Barwick expressed his disappointment at the annual meeting of the IFAB in Gleneagles, Scotland: "We were in favour of goal-line technology but there will be no more experiments and it will not be back on the agenda next year, or in the foreseeable future."
ref: Ketua eksekutif FA Brian Barwick melahirkan rasa kecewa pada mesyuarat tahunan IFAB di Gleneagles, Scotland: "Kami suka teknologi garisan gol tetapi tidak akan ada lebih eksperimen dan ia tidak akan kembali dalam agenda tahun depan, atau pada masa hadapan."

src: FIFA President Blatter denied ulterior motives for the decision: "There has been no change of heart."
ref: Presiden FIFA Blatter menafikan motif tersembunyi bagi keputusan itu: "Tiada sebarang perubahan dalam ketetapan."

src: "I have defended goal-line technology but it has become clear that such systems are too complicated and very costly."
ref: "Saya telah mempertahankan teknologi garisan gol tetapi jelas bahawa sistem tersebut adalah terlalu rumit dan sangat mahal."

src: "Nor would they necessarily add anything positive to the game and could harm the authority of the referee."
ref: "Ia tidak semestinya menambah suatu unsur positif dalam permainan itu dan boleh menjejaskan kuasa pengadil."

src: Gidget, the chihuahua featured in the Taco Bell adverts in the United States has died from a stroke.
ref: Gidget, anjing chihuahua yang dipaparkan dalam iklan Taco Bell di Amerika Syarikat telah mati akibat strok.

src: The dog died at the age of 15 on Tuesday night.
ref: Anjing itu mati pada usia 15 pada malam Selasa.

src: Sue Chipperton, the owner and trainer of Gidget commented saying, "She made so many people happy."
ref: Sue Chipperton, pemilik dan jurulatih Gidget memberi komen dengan berkata, "Dia membuat begitu ramai orang gembira."

src: The dog was featured in the 1990s adverts that ran from 1997 to 2000.
ref: Anjing itu telah dipaparkan dalam iklan 1990-an dari tahun 1997 sehingga tahun 2000.

src: Gidget was portrayed as a male dog and is remembered for the dubbed saying "Yo quiero Taco Bell" which is Spanish for "I want Taco Bell."
ref: Gidget digambarkan sebagai anjing jantan dan diingati kerana dialih suara dan berkata "Yo quiero Taco Bell" yang bermaksud "Saya hendak Taco Bell." dalam bahasa Sepanyol.

src: The advert was meant to be shown only once but was turned into a campaign.
ref: Iklan tersebut bertujuan untuk ditayangkan hanya sekali tetapi telah bertukar menjadi kempen.

src: Gidget was also featured in Legally Blonde 2 and adverts for the board game Trivial Pursuit.
ref: Gidget juga dipaparkan dalam Legally Blonde 2 dan iklan untuk permainan Trivial Pursuit.

src: Israeli soldiers are in the process of removing Jewish protesters from synagogues in Neve Dekalim and Kfar Darom in the Gaza Strip as part of an operation to force the evacuation of settlements.
ref: Tentera Israel sedang dalam proses memindahkan penunjuk perasaan Yahudi dari rumah-rumah ibadat di Neve Dekalim dan Kfar Darom di Semenanjung Gaza sebagai sebahagian daripada operasi untuk memaksa pemindahan penempatan.

src: The settlement of Neve Dekalim was founded in 1983 and was home to 500 Orthodox Jewish families.
ref: Penempatan Neve Dekalim ditubuhkan pada tahun 1983 dan merupakan rumah kepada 500 keluarga Ortodoks Yahudi.

src: It also was occupied earlier before back in the 1940s, settled by a couple Jewish families who were able to hold off the Eygptian army.
ref: Ia juga telah diduduki lebih awal sebelum tahun 1940-an, diduduki oleh pasangan keluarga Yahudi yang dapat menolak tentera Mesir.

src: Around 1,500 protesters inside the synagogue refused to leave despite warnings from the soldiers.
ref: Kira-kira 1,500 penunjuk perasaan di dalam rumah ibadat itu enggan pergi walaupun diberi amaran oleh tentera.

src: Many protesters have been retaliating to the soldiers' commands, and have even started shoving and punching a few guards.
ref: Ramai penunjuk perasaan telah bertindak balas terhadap arahan askar, dan telah pun mula menolak dan menumbuk beberapa orang pengawal.

src: The protesters have linked their arms in a chain to attempt to prevent themselves being removed.
ref: Para penunjuk perasaan telah menyambung lengan mereka membentuk rantai untuk cubaan mengelakkan diri mereka diusir.

src: The protesters are mostly not Gaza settlers, but are extremist youths from the West Bank and Israel.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan kebanyakannya bukan penduduk Gaza, tetapi belia pelampau dari Tebing Barat dan Israel.

src: After several hours of unsuccessful negotiations unarmed security forces entered the complex to begin removing people to buses waiting outside.
ref: Selepas beberapa jam rundingan gagal pasukan keselamatan yang tidak bersenjata memasuki bangunan kompleks itu untuk mula memindahkan orang ke bas yang menunggu di luar.

src: Those who did not go as instructed were usually escorted by two or three guards each to the buses.
ref: Mereka yang tidak pergi seperti yang diarahkan biasanya diiringi oleh dua atau tiga pengawal orang masing-masing ke bas.

src: Meanwhile, all male protesters have been removed from the building while the female protesters are still inside the synagogue.
ref: Sementara itu, semua penunjuk perasaan lelaki telah dipindah dari bangunan itu sementara penunjuk perasaan wanita masih berada di dalam rumah ibadat.

src: In another Gaza town, Kfar Darom, protesters are also making their last stand in a synagogue, and thousands of troops have surrounded the buildings.
ref: Di bandar Gaza lain, Kfar Darom, penunjuk perasaan juga bertahan tetap di rumah ibadat, dan beribu-ribu tentera telah mengepung bangunan itu.

src: There, soldiers entered the synagogue as well and are dragging protesters out of the building.
ref: Di sana, tentera memasuki rumah ibadat itu juga dan mengheret penunjuk perasaan keluar dari bangunan itu.

src: They were, however, hampered by protesters on the roof, who, among other things, threw caustic soda at the soldiers.
ref: Mereka, bagaimanapun, dihalang oleh penunjuk perasaan di atas bumbung, yang, antaranya, melemparkan soda kaustik pada askar.

src: Consequently, the rooftop was taken by security forces as well.
ref: Hasilnya, bumbung itu telah diambil oleh pasukan keselamatan juga.

src: Seventy seven people have been injured, two moderately on the roof of the synagogue.
ref: Tujuh puluh tujuh orang tercedera, dua tercedera secara sederhana di atas bumbung rumah ibadat.

src: Nearly 330,000 people in San Diego County, California located in the United States are being ordered to evacuate after massive wildfires started to spread and grow.
ref: Hampir 330,000 orang di Daerah San Diego, California yang terletak di Amerika Syarikat sedang diarahkan untuk berpindah selepas kebakaran hutan besar-besaran mula merebak dan berkembang.

src: As a result, U.S. President George W. Bush has declared a state of emergency in California clearing the way for federal aid assistance.
ref: Oleh itu, Presiden A.S. George W. Bush telah mengisytiharkan darurat di California membuka jalan untuk bantuan persekutuan.

src: "All of us across this nation are concerned for the families who have lost their homes and the many families who have been evacuated from their homes."
ref: "Kami semua di seluruh negara ini bimbang bagi keluarga yang telah kehilangan rumah mereka dan banyak keluarga yang telah dipindahkan dari rumah mereka."

src: "We send the help of the federal government," said Bush in a statement to the press.
ref: "Kami menghantar bantuan kerajaan pusat," kata Bush dalam satu kenyataan kepada media.

src: Almost 1,500 houses have been burned to ashes and fires continue to threaten nearly 60,000 more.
ref: Hampir 1,500 buah rumah telah dibakar menjadi abu dan kebakaran terus mengancam hampir 60,000 lagi.

src: Firefighters now fear that the fires could merge into one giant blaze if the Santa Ana Winds continue sending close to if not over 500,000 people running for safety.
ref: Anggota bomba kini takut bahawa kebakaran itu boleh bergabung menjadi satu kebakaran besar jika Angin Santa Ana masih terus meniup menjadikan jika tidak lebih 500,000 orang melarikan diri untuk menyelamatkan nyawa.

src: One person has died as a result of the fires with 42 injured.
ref: Satu orang telah meninggal dunia akibat kebakaran dengan 42 tercedera.

src: 16 of those are reported to be firefighters who were battling the blazes.
ref: 16 daripada mereka dilaporkan adalah anggota bomba yang bertarung dengan api.

src: "It will not end ... until it reaches the ocean or the winds turn around," said San Diego County Fire Battalion Chief, Bruce Cartelli.
ref: "Ia tidak akan berakhir...sehingga ia sampai ke laut atau angin berpusing balik," kata Ketua Battalion Bomba Daerah San Diego, Bruce Cartelli.

src: At least 13 wildfires have burned more than 356,000 acres (142,400 hectares) in areas stretching from San Diego, near the border with Mexico, to Malibu, near Los Angeles.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 13 kebakaran hutan telah dibakar lebih daripada 356,000 ekar (142,400 hektar) di kawasan berjangkau dari San Diego, berhampiran sempadan dengan Mexico, ke Malibu, berhampiran Los Angeles.

src: Air Station Miramar for the U.S. Air Force is also being evacuated with the base's planes and other military equipment being transported away from the raging fires to Arizona and places far north of the fires in California.
ref: Stesen Udara Miramar untuk Tentera Udara Amerika Syarikat juga sedang dipindahkan bersama dengan pangkalan pesawat dan peralatan ketenteraan lain dipindahkan dari api membara ke Arizona dan tempat-tempat jauh ke utara kebakaran di California.

src: The Speaker of the Bundestag, Wolfgang Thierse, welcomed the decision and urged the parties to conduct fair campaigns.
ref: Yang di-Pertua Bundestag, Wolfgang Thierse, mengalu-alukan keputusan itu dan menggesa pihak-pihak untuk mengadakan kempen yang adil.

src: Chancellor Schröder also paid his respect to Köhler, calling his decision confident and again expressed that he intents to resume the good way on which Germany is heading under his leadership.
ref: Canselor Schröder juga menghormati Köhler, mengatakan keputusannya berkeyakinan dan sekali lagi menyatakan bahawa dia ingin meneruskan ragam baik seperti mana arah Jerman menuju di bawah kepimpinan beliau.

src: The Chair of the conservative Christian Democrats (CDU) and her party's candidate for chancellor, Angela Merkel, welcomed the call for early elections and wants to get Germany on the right track if her party gets to power in September.
ref: Pengerusi konservatif Demokrat Kristian (CDU) dan calon parti untuk Canselor, Angela Merkel, mengalu-alukan seruan untuk pilihan raya awal dan mahu membawa Jerman ke jalan yang betul jika parti itu mendapat kuasa pada bulan September.

src: The dissolving is the result of a long political muddle that began on May 22th when Schröder's Social Democrats (SPD) lost the most populous state of Germany, North Rhine-Westphalia, to the CDU, the biggest opposition party.
ref: Pembubaran itu adalah hasil daripada kekacauan politik yang lama yang bermula pada 22 Mei apabila Parti Demokrat Sosial Schröder ini (SPD) kehilangan negeri yang mempunyai paling ramai penduduk Jerman, North Rhine-Westphalia, kepada CDU, parti pembangkang yang terbesar.

src: Minutes after the early projections were in, SPD chair Franz Müntefering announced that his party would seek re-election in fall of 2005.
ref: Beberapa minit selepas unjuran awal, kerusi SPD Franz Müntefering mengumumkan bahawa parti itu akan bertanding semula pada musim gugur tahun 2005.

src: However, the Basic Law of Germany does not permit the self-dissolving of the Bundestag.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Undang-undang Asas Jerman tidak membenarkan pembubaran sendiri oleh Bundestag.

src: The only way to achieve early elections is when the chancellor loses a motion of confidence.
ref: Satu-satunya cara untuk mencapai pilihan raya awal adalah ketika Canselor kehilangan usul keyakinan.

src: All major parties, including the opposition, support the call for early election.
ref: Semua pihak utama, termasuk pembangkang, menyokong seruan untuk pilihan raya awal.

src: Polls also indicate that 75% of the population support going to the ballots in September.
ref: Undian juga menunjukkan bahawa 75% daripada sokongan penduduk ada pada pembuangan undi pada bulan September.

src: However, some MP's, most notably Werner Schulz of SPD's coalition partner, The Greens, say that the procedure was unconstitutional because the loss of confidence was orchestrated.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, beberapa Ahli Parlimen, terutama rakan kongsi kesatuan SPD Werner Schulz, The Greens, mengatakan bahawa prosedur itu tidak mengikut perlembagaan kerana kehilangan keyakinan telah dirancang.

src: They announced that they will sue against the dissolving before the Constitutional Court of Germany.
ref: Mereka mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan menyaman pembubaran itu di Mahkamah Perlembagaan Jerman.

src: Germany has been struggling with high unemployment for several years and the reforms Schröder introduced were criticized as being neo-liberalistic by unions and also by members of his own party.
ref: Jerman telah bergelut dengan pengangguran yang tinggi untuk beberapa tahun dan pembaharuan yang diperkenalkan oleh Schröder telah dikritik sebagai neo-liberalistik oleh kesatuan dan juga oleh ahli-ahli partinya sendiri.

src: Current polls see the CDU at 44%, while the SPD can only expect 27%.
ref: Undian semasa memperlihatkan CDU pada 44%, manakala SPD hanya boleh mengharapkan 27%.

src: The liberal FDP, CDU's possible coalition partner, can expect 7%, The Greens 8% and the Party of the Left (formerly PDS) 11%.
ref: FDP liberal, yang mungkin menjadi rakan kesatuan komponen CDU, boleh mengharapkan 7%, The Greens 8% dan Parti Kiri (sebelumnya PDS) 11%.

src: The governing SPD-Green coalition is faced with an overwhelming opposition majority in the Bundesrat, the upper chamber, that is able to block most bills.
ref: Kesatuan SPD-Green yang memerintah berhadapan dengan majoriti pembangkang yang amat sangat dalam Bundesrat, dewan atas, yang mampu menyekat kebanyakan rang undang-undang.

src: Schröder claims that the CDU is engaging in a policy of blockade rendering him unable to make laws and implement policy changes while Angela Merkel, says that Schröder's government is simply incapable to take action.
ref: Schröder mendakwa bahawa CDU terlibat dalam dasar sekatan yang menyebabkan dia tidak dapat memrangka undang-undang dan melaksanakan perubahan dasar manakala Angela Merkel, mengatakan bahawa kerajaan Schröder ini tidak mampu mengambil tindakan.

src: The Albuquerque Academy eighth grade basketball team used tough defense to close out the 2005-2006 season with a win, 46-30 over Los Lunas.
ref: Pasukan bola keranjang gred kelapan Akademi Albuquerque menggunakan pertahanan kuat untuk menutup musim 2005-2006 dengan kemenangan, 46-30 melawan Los Lunas.

src: The Chargers spread things evenly in the first quarter; five players scored for the team in the period.
ref: Chargers yang mengagihkan tugas dalam suku pertama; lima pemain menjaringkan gol untuk pasukan itu dalam tempoh tersebut.

src: Both forward Jon Cabarrus and guard Dylan Gordon followed their own shots and scored on putbacks.
ref: Kedua-dua penyerang Jon Cabarrus dan penjaga Dylan Gordon mengambil gerakan mereka sendiri dan menjaringkan gol dalam putbacks.

src: Forwards Xavier Moya and Chris Thompson provided tough inside defense on one possession.
ref: Penyerang Xavier Moya dan Chris Thompson mempersediakan pertahanan dalaman yang sukar dalam posisi mereka.

src: While Los Lunas managed several rebounds, they were unable to get any baskets over the outstretched arms of Moya and Thompson.
ref: Sementara Los Lunas menangani beberapa lantunan, mereka tidak mendapat sebarang jaringan melepasi tangan terentang Moya dan Thompson.

src: Cabarrus scored on another putback for his fourth points of the game late in the quarter, helping Academy to a twelve to eight lead at the end of the first.
ref: Cabarrus menjaringkan gol dalam satu lagi putback untuk mata keempatnya dalam permainan lewat dalam suku permainan itu, membantu Akademi mencapai pendahuluan dua belas lapan pada akhir musim pertama.

src: The second period was a low scoring one for both teams.
ref: Tempoh kedua adalah jaringan mata rendah untuk kedua-dua pasukan.

src: The Chargers scored just nine points, but also held Los Lunas to only three.
ref: Chargers hanya menjaringkan sembilan mata, tetapi bertahan terhadap Los Lunas yang hanya menjaringkan tiga mata.

src: Both offenses were struggling when guard Andrew Matthew stole the ball and made a pass to Gordan, who threw another pass to fellow guard Jordan Fleisher, who took the ball and scored on a layup.
ref: Kedua-dua pertahanan bergelut apabila pengawal Andrew Matthew mencuri bola itu dan membuat hantaran kepada Gordan, yang menghantar bola kepada rakannya pengawal Jordan Fleisher, yang mengambil bola dan menjaringkan gol dalam layup.

src: With a minute in the half, reserve Matt Brown took a pass and drove the length of the court for a layup.
ref: Dengan masa satu minit pada separuh masa, pemain simpanan Matt Brown menerima hantaran bola dan melangkaui gelanggang untuk memasukkan jaringan berdekatan keranjang.

src: Academy ended the second half with a twenty-one to eleven lead.
ref: Akademi mengakhiri separuh masa yang kedua dengan mata pendahuluan dua puluh satu kepada sebelas.

src: Academy again spread the ball around in the second half, with eight Charger players scoring.
ref: Akademi sekali lagi menyebarkan bola di sekitar separuh masa kedua, dengan lapan pemain hargers menjaringkan bola.

src: Leading the way in the second half was Patrick Zacharias, who scored seven points in the half.
ref: Yang mendahului dalam separuh masa kedua adalah Patrick Zacharias, yang menjaringkan tujuh mata pada separuh masa.

src: Gordon connected with Thompson on a play that gave Thompson a layup.
ref: Gordon bergabung dengan Thompson dalam satu permainan yang memberikan Thompson satu jaringan bola berdekatan dengan keranjang.

src: Gordon stole the ball away from Los Lunas and made a pass to Thompson while sandwiched between two Los Lunas defenders.
ref: Gordon mencuri bola daripada Los Lunas dan membuat hantaran kepada Thompson sambil mengapit di antara dua penahan Los Lunas.

src: Thompson received the pass under the basket and scored on a layup.
ref: Thompson menerima hantaran bola di bawah keranjang dan menjaringkan bola berdekatan dengan keranjang.

src: Los Lunas came back with a three pointer by #24 and some layups by other players.
ref: Los Lunas kembali dengan tiga penunjuk oleh #24 dan beberapa jaringan bola berdekatan dengan keranjang oleh pemain lain.

src: The quarter ended with Academy still holding the lead, 33-22.
ref: Suku itu berakhir dengan Akademi masih mendahului, 33-22.

src: AA was again playing tough defense midway through the fourth quarter until #32 hit a three pointer, sparking a small Los Lunas rally, but it was not enough to overcome the offense and defense of the Chargers.
ref: AA sekali lagi bermain pertahanan yang tegar dari pertengahan sehingga suku masa keempat hingga #32 mencecah tiga penunjuk, mencetuskan Los Lunas perhimpunan yang kecil, tetapi ia masih tidak mencukupi untuk mengatasi kesalahan dan pertahanan Chargers.

src: Zacharias scored on a tip in of a Gordon shot that hung on the rim and fell out.
ref: Zacharias menjaringkan bola atas satu peluang daripada jaringan Gordon yang tergantung pada bingkai dan terjatuh keluar.

src: Zacharias was also fouled on the shot and made the free throw to complete the three point play.
ref: Zacharias juga dikasari pada jaringan itu dan membuat lemparan percuma untuk melengkapkan permainan tiga mata.

src: Team manager Lincoln Stanfield also saw action in the game, and even scored his first points of the season at the end of the fourth quarter.
ref: Pengurus pasukan Lincoln Stanfield juga menyaksikan tindakan dalam permainan, dan juga mendapat mata pertama musim itu pada akhir masa suku keempat.

src: With less than fifteen seconds left, Stanfield received a pass underneath the basket.
ref: Dengan kurang daripada baki lima belas saat, Stanfield menerima hantaran bawah jaring.

src: His shot didn't fall, but he was fouled with seven seconds left.
ref: Rembatannya tidak jatuh, tetapi dia dikasari pada masa baki tujuh saat kiri.

src: Stanfield's first free throw bounced up after hitting the rim but didn't fall through.
ref: Lontaran percuma pertama Stanfield ini terlantun selepas terkena bingkai jaring tetapi tidak jatuh.

src: His second shot bounced high in the air two times before falling through the hoop.
ref: Pukulan keduanya melantun tinggi di udara dua kali sebelum jatuh melalui gelung.

src: Stanfield threw his arms up in celebration over his made shot, putting an end to Academy's 14-1 season.
ref: Stanfield melempar lengan dalam sambutan jaringan yang dibuat, mengakhiri musim Akademi 14-1.

src: Arung Samudera, the Indonesian naval tall ship that was recently grounded off Queensland, Australia, has been salvaged from the beach at Inskip Point and is currently being towed to Brisbane for repairs.
ref: Arung Samudera, kapal layar tentera laut Indonesia yang baru-baru ini ditambat di Queensland, Australia, telah diselamatkan dari pantai di Inskip Point dan sedang ditarik ke Brisbane untuk pembaikan.

src: The 35m vessel has been stranded since last Thursday, when she was grounded whilst on her way to the APEC meeting in Sydney.
ref: Kapal berukuran 35m itu telah terkandas sejak Khamis lepas, apabila ia telah ditambat, semasa dalam perjalanan ke mesyuarat APEC di Sydney.

src: The ship is expected to berth in Brisbane near the naval barracks at approximately 11 a.m. (AEST).
ref: Kapal itu dijangka berlabuh di Brisbane berhampiran berek tentera laut pada kira-kira jam 11 pagi (AEST).

src: The tri-masted sailing training vessel, built in New Zealand, is believed to be seaworthy, but has serious damage to her keel and rudder.
ref: Kapal pelayaran latihan yang bertiang tiga, yang dibina di New Zealand, dipercayai menjadi layak layar, tetapi mempunyai kerosakan yang teruk di lunas dan kemudinya.

src: After the completion of repairs, the ship is expected to continue to Sydney, although it will not reach it in time for the APEC meeting.
ref: Selepas selesainya pembaikan, kapal itu dijangka akan terus ke Sydney, walaupun ia tidak akan sampai dalam masa untuk mesyuarat APEC.

src: The ship's 18-man crew are said to be "very happy" with developments.
ref: 18 orang anak-anak kapal dikatakan "sangat gembira" dengan perkembangan itu.

src: According to the Australian Navy's Commander Forbes Peters, Indonesian officials are as pleased as the ships crew, with Peters saying "The naval attache and the first secretary to the ambassador are on site here and they cuddled Lieutenant Commander Larry Cook."
ref: Menurut Komander Tentera Laut Australia Forbes Peters, pegawai Indonesia gembira sebagaimana anak-anak kapal rasa, dengan Peters berkata "Atase tentera laut dan setiausaha pertama kedutaan berada di tapak di sini dan mereka memeluk Leftenan Komander Larry Cook."

src: "They are over the moon and I'm sure the commanding officer is as well, even though he's currently at sea on his ship."
ref: "Mereka sangat gembira dan saya pasti pegawai yang memberi arahan juga rasa begitu, walaupun dia kini berada di laut di atas kapal itu."

src: Palestinian gunmen have reportedly kidnapped two foreign journalists working for Fox News, a news company owned by parent-company News Corp.
ref: Lelaki Palestin yang bersenjata dilaporkan menculik dua wartawan asing yang bekerja untuk Fox News, syarikat berita yang dimiliki oleh syarikat induk News Corp.

src: A Palestinian witness who worked with the journalists, said that American reporter Steve Centanni, and Olaf Wiig, a cameraman from New Zealand were taken against their will.
ref: Seorang saksi Palestin yang bekerja dengan wartawan-wartawan itu, berkata wartawan Amerika Steve Centanni dan Olaf Wiig, seorang jurukamera dari New Zealand telah ditahan tanpa keinginan mereka.

src: New Zealand Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade spokeswoman Helen Tunnah said that the ministry had not received any information on the kidnapping.
ref: Jurucakap wanita Kementerian Hal Ehwal Luar Negeri dan Perdagangan New Zealand Helen Tunnah berkata kementerian belum menerima sebarang maklumat mengenai penculikan.

src: Fox News said that they did not know who captured the journalists but said that "We can confirm that two of our people were taken against their will in Gaza," and that "negotiations were under way to secure their release."
ref: Fox News berkata mereka tidak tahu siapa yang menangkap wartawan itu tetapi berkata bahawa "Kami boleh mengesahkan bahawa dua orang kami telah diambil tanpa kerelaan mereka di Gaza," dan bahawa "rundingan sedang dilakukan untuk mendapatkan pembebasan mereka."

src: The incident began when two vehicles blocked the transmission truck, labelled 'TV', and their bodyguard was forced to the ground at gunpoint by a masked man.
ref: Kejadian itu bermula apabila dua kenderaan menyekat trak penghantaran, yang dilabel 'TV', dan pengawal peribadi mereka dipaksa meniarap atas tanah dengan pistol oleh seorang lelaki bertopeng.

src: Hamas, the Islamic militant group that heads Gaza's government, did not claim responsibility, and condemned the kidnapping.
ref: Hamas, kumpulan militan Islam yang mengetuai kerajaan Gaza, tidak mengaku bertanggungjawab, dan mengutuk penculikan.

src: Fox News Vice President John Moody said in an internal message to Fox News personnel that "The rumors are true: two of our employees have been abducted in Gaza."
ref: Fox News Naib Presiden John Moody berkata dalam mesej dalaman kepada kakitangan Fox News bahawa "Khabar angin adalah benar: Dua pekerja kami telah diculik di Gaza."

src: "Do not comment officially and of course, not on the air, about it."
ref: "Jangan komen secara rasmi dan sudah tentu, tidak di udara, mengenainya."

src: Parties to a lawsuit against Amazon.com agreed September 25 to a proposed settlement resolving claims that Amazon unlawfully deleted content from users' Kindle reading devices.
ref: Pihak yang membuat tuntutan mahkamah terhadap Amazon.com bersetuju pada 25 September terhadap cadangan penyelesaian yang menyelesaikan tuntutan bahawa Amazon menyalahi undang-undang kerana memadam kandungan dari peranti bacaan Kindle pengguna.

src: Justin Gawronski, a Michigan high school senior, and Antoine Bruguier, a California engineer, had sued on July 30, after Amazon deleted George Orwell's Nineteen Eighty-Four from their Kindles.
ref: Justin Gawronski, seorang pelajar senior di sekolah tinggi Michigan, dan Antoine Bruguier, seorang jurutera di California, telah menyaman pada 30 Julai, selepas Amazon memadam George Orwell Nineteen Eighty-Four dari Kindle mereka.

src: Gawronski also said his digital notes lost value because they were no longer associated with the relevant text.
ref: Gawronski juga berkata nota digital miliknya telah hilang nilai kerana mereka tidak lagi berkaitan dengan teks yang berkenaan.

src: The plaintiffs argued that Amazon had breached its terms of service and violated the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act and Washington Consumer Protection Act.
ref: Pihak plaintif mendakwa bahawa Amazon telah melanggar terma dan syarat perkhidmatan dan mencabuli Akta Penipuan Komputer dan Penyalahgunaan dan Akta Perlindungan Pengguna Washington.

src: Amazon had first claimed it was forced to delete the books when it learned it did not have the right to sell them.
ref: Amazon pada mulanya mendakwa pihaknya terpaksa memadamkan buku-buku tersebut apabila sedar mereka tiada hak untuk menjualnya.

src: However, it apologized on July 23 and on September 7 offered affected customers either US$30 or a copy of the deleted book.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, pihaknya meminta maaf pada 23 Julai dan pada 7 September dengan menawarkan pelanggan yang terjejas sama ada US$30 atau sebuah salinan buku yang telah dipadamkan.

src: The proposed settlement includes a commitment that Amazon will only delete e-books remotely under four circumstances: the user consents, the user fails to pay or gets a refund, the government mandates it, or the deletion is necessary to "protect" the consumer, device, or network.
ref: Penyelesaian yang dicadangkan termasuk komitmen bahawa Amazon hanya akan memadam e-buku dari jauh di bawah empat keadaan: atas persetujuan pengguna, pengguna gagal membayar atau mendapat bayaran balik, mandat dari pihak kerajaan, atau pemadaman adalah perlu untuk "melindungi" pengguna, peranti, atau rangkaian.

src: Amazon would also pay KamberEdelson, the plaintiffs' firm, US$150,000 in legal fees, with the proviso that it go to charity.
ref: Amazon juga akan membayar Kamber Edelson, firma pihak plaintif, US$150,000 sebagai bayaran undang-undang, dengan syarat bahawa ia pergi kepada badan amal.

src: Michael Aschenbrener, an attorney at KamberEdelson, described the agreement as a "great settlement" that "provides protection for Kindle users and provides confidence to them that the books, newspapers and magazines they purchase will not be subject to remote deletion by Amazon."
ref: Michael Aschenbrener, seorang peguam di Kamber Edelson, menggambarkan perjanjian itu sebagai "penyelesaian yang besar" yang "menyediakan perlindungan untuk pengguna Kindle dan memberikan keyakinan kepada mereka bahawa buku-buku, akhbar dan majalah yang mereka membeli tidak akan tertakluk kepada pemadaman jarak jauh oleh Amazon.

src: "It sends a message to digital media purveyors of all kinds that sellers really need to respect users' rights to that content."
ref: Ia memberitahu penyebar semua jenis media digital yang penjual benar-benar perlu menghormati hak pengguna atas kandungan tersebut."

src: An 18-year-old UK student suspected of throwing a fire extinguisher from the roof of the headquarters of the Conservative Party ('Tories'), 30 Millbank, London, was arrested on Monday.
ref: Seorang pelajar UK berusia 18 tahun yang disyaki membuang alat pemadam api dari bumbung ibu pejabat Parti Konservatif ('Tories'), 30 Millbank, London, telah ditangkap pada hari Isnin.

src: He was today released on bail after a court appearance.
ref: Dia dibebaskan hari ini dengan jaminan selepas perbicaraan di mahkamah.

src: Edward Woollard, who is studying A-levels in Philosophy, Politics, and Classics, at Brockenhurst College in the New Forest, attended last Wednesday's student protests in London, before following a crowd of around 200 students into the Tory HQ and making it to the building's roof, whilst the rest of the building was vandalised.
ref: Edward Woollard, yang sedang belajar di peringkat A-level dalam Falsafah, Politik, dan Klasik, di Kolej Brockenhurst, New Forest, menghadiri protes pelajar Rabu lalu di London, sebelum mengikuti sekumpulan besar kira-kira 200 orang pelajar ke dalam Tory HQ dan sampai ke bumbung bangunan, manakala seluruh bangunan itu telah dirosakkan.

src: Watched by thousands of students gathered outside, a fire extinguisher was thrown from the roof, giving glancing blows to two police officers on the ground 70 feet (21 metres) below.
ref: Ditonton oleh beribu-ribu pelajar yang berkumpul di luar, alat pemadam api dilempar dari bumbung, memberikan pukulan yang terkena sipi kepada dua pegawai polis yang berada di atas tanah pada jarak 70 kaki (21 meter) ke bawah.

src: Over sixty arrests have been made in conjunction with the protest.
ref: Lebih daripada enam puluh tangkapan dibuat berikutan protes tersebut.

src: The sixth-form student, who was wanted on suspicion of attempted murder earlier this week, handed himself in at his local police station and was taken to Belgravia police station for questioning.
ref: Pelajar tingkatan enam, yang dikehendaki kerana disyaki cuba membunuh awal minggu ini, menyerahkan diri di balai polis tempatan dan telah dibawa ke balai polis Belgravia untuk disoal siasat.

src: Today, he appeared at Westminster Magistrates' Court charged with violent disorder, speaking only to confirm his name age and address.
ref: Hari ini, dia menghadiri Mahkamah Majistret Westminster di atas dakwaan masalah keganasan, bersuara hanya untuk mengesahkan umur namanya dan alamat.

src: His lawyer, Matthew Foot, sought adjournment to examine video evidence, and the trial was adjourned until 24 November.
ref: Peguamnya, Matthew Foot, memohon penangguhan untuk memeriksa bukti video, dan perbicaraan itu telah ditangguhkan sehingga 24 November.

src: Until then, Woollard has been granted bail, on condition that he remains at his current address, and does not enter the City of Westminster.
ref: Sehingga itu, Woollard telah diikat jaminan, dengan syarat dia kekal di alamat sekarang, dan tidak memasuki Bandar Westminster.

src: A series of explosions have hit an Albanian arms depot near Tirana, leaving at least 155 people injured.
ref: Satu siri letupan telah menyerang depot senjata Albania berdekatan Tirana, menyebabkan sekurang-kurangnya 155 orang tercedera.

src: Juela Mecani, spokesperson for Albamian PM Sali Berisha, said to Reuters "We do not know the exact number (of casualties) but we fear the worst for the three teams, each of 21 people, working there at the time."
ref: Juela Mecani, jurucakap PM Albania Sali Berisha, berkata kepada Reuters "Kami tidak tahu angka sebenar (mangsa terkorban) namun kami amat risau akan tiga kumpulan, masing-masing terdiri daripada 21 orang, yang sedang bekerja di sana pada waktu tersebut."

src: The three teams referred to were dismantling obsolete munitions stored there, as part of a programme to remove Stalinist era arms and modernize the military in order to qualify for an invitation to join NATO next month.
ref: Ketiga-tiga kumpulan yang dinyatakan sebenarnya ditugaskan untuk menghapuskan senjata usang yang disimpan di situ, sebagai sebahagian daripada program untuk menghapuskan senjata era Stalinis dan memodenkan tentera untuk melayakkan pelawaan untuk menyertai NATO bulan depan.

src: Injured people have been rushed to hospitals amid ongoing explosions, which Interior Ministry spokesman Avni Neza says have prevented helicopters landing in the area.
ref: Orang yang tercedera telah dikejarkan ke hospital di tengah-tengah letupan yang berlaku, dimana jurucakap Kementerian Dalam Negeri Avni Neza berkata, yang menghalang helikopter untuk mendarat di sekitar kawasan.

src: The wounded are suffering from burns, concussion, broken limbs and shrapnel injuries.
ref: Yang tercedera mengalami lecur, gegaran, patah tangan dan kaki serta kecederaan serpihan bom.

src: Meanwhile, Neza says police and army units are attempting to reach the area in armored cars.
ref: Sementara itu, Neza berkata polis dan unit tentera dalam usaha untuk memasuki kawasan terbabit dengan kereta kebal.

src: Albanian health minister Nard Ndoka said that the 155 known to be hospitalized so far had to make their way to nearby villages as the ongoing explosions had also prevented road ambulances reaching the scene.
ref: Menteri kesihatan Albania Nard Ndoka berkata bahawa 155 orang yang diketahui dimasukkan ke hospital setakat ini terpaksa pergi ke kampung berdekatan berikutan letupan yang masih berterusan yang menghalang ambulans untuk sampai ke tempat kejadian.

src: Tirana Airport spokesman Arlinda Causholli said glass windows and doors at the airport, a few kilometers from the site, were shattered by the initial series of explosions.
ref: Jurucakap Lapangan terbang Tirana Arlinda Causholli berkata tingkap kaca dan pintu lapangan terbang, berjarak beberapa kilometer dari tempat kejadian, berkecai berikutan siri letupan awal.

src: "We evacuated passengers from the affected area and suspended flights for around 30 minutes," he said.
ref: "Kami memindahkan penumpang dari kawasan terlibat dan menangguhkan penerbangan selama 30 minit," katanya.

src: "Terrified people are leaving the area on foot along the highway, women and children…"
ref: "Orang yang takut meninggalkan kawasan tersebut dengan berjalan kaki sepanjang lebuhraya, wanita dan kanak-kanak..."

src: "Cars with broken windows have been abandoned on the highway."
ref: "Kereta yang tingkapnya berkecai ditinggalkan di lebuhraya."

src: Local media reports Tirana residents rushing to donate blood to help with the emergency.
ref: Media tempatan melaporkan penduduk Tirana bergegas untuk menderma darah bagi membantu kecemasan.

src: Explosions were felt in Tirana and in Durres, 20km (12 miles) from the base.
ref: Letupan dirasai di Tirana dan Durres, 20 km (12 batu) daripada pangkalan.

src: In the nearby village of Gerdec, some residents fled to the hills, while others sought shelter in concrete bunkers built by late Stalinist leader Enver Hoxha.
ref: Di kampung berdekatan Gerdec, sebahagian penduduk melarikan diri ke bukit, sebahagian lain mencari perlindungan di kubu konkrit yang dibina oleh bekas pemimpin Stalinis Enver Hoxha.

src: The initial blast was heard 150km away in Macedonia and Serbia
ref: Letupan awal didengari 150km jauh di Macedonia dan Serbia.

src: The City of Brampton in Ontario, Canada, and Marikina in the Philippines have recently been "twinned".
ref: Bandar Brampton di Ontario, Canda, dan Marikina di Filipina baru-baru ini "dikembarkan."

src: Both cities are roughly the same size, both have female mayors, both are near urban destinations (one of Toronto, the other Manila) and feel they can benefit economically with each other.
ref: Kedua-dua bandar secara kasarnya mempunyai saiz yang sama, kedua-duanya mempunyai datuk bandar wanita, dan kedua-duanya berdekatan kawasan bandar (satu di Toronto, dan satu lagi di Manila) dan percaya mereka mampu memperoleh manfaat dari segi ekonomi satu sama lain.

src: Mayor Susan Fennell of Brampton commented "This twinning agreement between Brampton and Marikina City will not only provide new and exciting economic possibilities, but it is an excellent chance to recognize and celebrate the Filipino community in Brampton."
ref: Datuk Bandar Brampton Susan Fennel memberi komen "Persetujuan berkembar antara Bandar Brampton dan Marikina tidak hanya akan menyediakan kemungkinan ekonomi baru dan menarik, tetapi ia merupakan satu peluang yang bagus untuk mengenali dan meraikan komuniti Flipina di Brampton."

src: "As one of Canada's most diverse cities, Brampton is home to more than 8,000 Filipino residents with a distinct culture, and I am pleased to be able to celebrate that culture with this agreement."
ref: "Sebagai salah satu bandar Kanada yang paling berbagai-bagai, Brampton merupakan rumah kepada lebih daripada 8,000 penduduk Filipina yang mempunyai budaya berbeza, dan saya berbangga untuk meraikan budaya tersebut dengan perjanjian ini."

src: The Philippine economy grew by 5.9%, annual rate, during the second quarter of 2012 which is less than the first quarter's figure of more than 6% annual rate, as reported by The Associated Press.
ref: Ekonomi Filipina berkembang sebanyak 5.9%, kadar tahunan, sepanjang suku tahun kedua 2012 iaitu kurang lebih daripada 6% kadar tahunan pada suku tahun pertama, seperi yang dilaporkan oleh The Associated Press.

src: According to Economic Planning Secretary Arsenio Balisacan, strong domestic demand from the services sector and spending from money remitted by expatriate Filipinos helped boost the nation's economy despite the ongoing global economic crisis.
ref: Menurut Setiausaha Perancang Ekonomi Arsenio Balisacan, permintaan domestik yang kuat dalam sektor perkhidmatan dan perbelanjaan wang yang dibayar oleh ekspatriat Filipino membantu meningkatkan ekonomi negara meskipun krisis ekonomi dunia sedang berlaku.

src: In spite of this growth, numerous risks still lurk around the corner, said Balisacan.
ref: Di sebalik perkembangan ini, masih terdapat beberapa risiko tersembunyi yang membimbangkan, kata Balisacan.

src: He said that changes in China and the El Niño remain as the biggest challenges to the economy.
ref: Dia menyatakan bahawa perubahan di China dan El Nino kekal sebagai cabaran terbesar terhadap ekonomi.

src: Balsican also noted that poor infrastructure may also have a negative impact although spending on infrastructure, which may cost nearly $200 million in investment, may contribute to growth.
ref: Balsican juga menyatakan bahawa infrastruktur yang lemah juga mampu membawa kesan negatif walaupun perbelanjaan untuk infratruktur, yang membelanjakan hampir $200 juta dalam pelaburan, yang akan menyumbang kepada perkembangan.

src: The Philippines central bank has cut key interest rates three times already this year in order to continue this economic expansion.
ref: Bank Negara Filipino sudah mengurangkan kadar faedah utama tiga kali tahun ini untuk meneruskan perkembangan ekonomi ini.

src: Analysts, such as economist Eugene Leow of Singapore-based DBS bank, agree that, "There is definitely room to further cut rates if needed," in order to promote further growth.
ref: Penganalisa, seperti pakar ekonomi yang berpangkalan di Bank DBS Singapura Eugene Leow, bersetuju, "Pasti ada ruang untuk meneruskan pengurangan kadar jika perlu," dalam mendorong perkembangan lanjut.

src: The unemployment rate in the Eurozone, or the sixteen countries in which the euro is used, reached ten percent last December, for the first time since the euro was introduced in 1999.
ref: Kadar pengangguran di Eurozone, atau enam belas negara di mana euro digunakan, mencapai sepuluh peratus pada Disember yang lalu, buat pertama kali sejak euro diperkenalkan pada 1999.

src: A ten-percent jobless rate was initially recorded in November, although that was later revised down to 9.9%.
ref: Kadar pengangguran sepuluh peratus pada mulanya direkodkan pada November, walaupun kemudiannya turun ke 9.9%.

src: According to Eurostat, 15.8 million people now are without jobs in the Eurozone.
ref: Menurut Eurostat, 15.8 juta orang di Eurozone kini tidak mempunyai pekerjaan.

src: For all 27 countries in the European Union, 23 million people collectively are unemployed.
ref: Bagi kesemua 27 negara dalam Kesatuan Eropah, seramai 23 juta orang secara kolektif menganggur.

src: Eurostat reports that 87,000 jobs were lost throughout the eurozone in December, the smallest loss since May.
ref: Eurostat melaporkan bahawa 87,000 pekerja hilang pekerjaan di seluruh eurozone pada bulan Disember, pengangguran paling kecil sejak Mei.

src: Latvia had the highest jobless rate for the EU, at 22.8%, whilst Spain has the highest for the eurozone, at 19.5%.
ref: Latvia mempunyai kadar pengangguran tertinggi bagi EU, sebanyak 22.8%, manakala Sepanyol mempunyai kadar tertinggi bagi eurozone, sebanyak 19.5%.

src: The two countries with the lowest unemployment rates were the Netherlands and Austria, with jobless figures of 4% and 5.4%, respectively.
ref: Dua negara yang mempunyai kadar pengangguran terendah adalah Netherlands dan Austria, dengan angka pengangguran sebanyak 4% dan 5.4% masing-masing.

src: An analyst for IHS Global Insight, Howard Archer, commented on the figures.
ref: Seorang penganalisa untuk IHS Global Insight, Howard Archer, memberi komen terhadap angka tersebut.

src: "Although the rise in eurozone unemployment has slowed in recent months, it still seems poised to trend higher during much, if not all, of 2010," he noted.
ref: "Walaupun kadar peningkatan pengangguran di eurozone telah menjadi perlahan dalam kebelakangan bulan, ia masih lagi kelihatan meningkat, jika tidak semua, berbanding tahun 2010," dia menyatakan.

src: Leader of the Japanese opposition Democratic Party of Japan, Yukio Hatoyama, won a majority of votes in the House of Representatives of Japan in the Japanese general election on Sunday.
ref: Pemimpin pihak pembangkang parti Demokratik Jepun, Yukio Hatoyama, telah menang undian majoriti Dewan Rakyat Jepun di pilihan raya umum Jepun pada hari Ahad.

src: He will be named the 93rd Prime Minister of Japan.
ref: Beliau bakal digelar sebagai Perdana Menteri Jepun ke-93.

src: Hatoyama ran against now former Prime Minister of Japan and Liberal Democratic Party leader Taro Aso.
ref: Hatoyama bertanding melawan bekas Perdana Menteri Jepun dan pemimpin Parti Liberal Demokratik Taro Aso.

src: The results of the election were announced today, less that two and a half hours after polling stations closed, and end 54 years of nearly unbroken rule by the LDP.
ref: Keputusan pilihan raya tersebut diumumkan pada hari ini, kurang daripada dua jam setengah selepas pusat mengundi tutup, dan menamatkan permerintahan kebal LDP selama 54 tahun.

src: It has been estimated that roughly 30% of LDP supporters voted for the victorious DPJ, mainly due to the current economic climate.
ref: Dianggarkan secara kasar 30% penyokong LDP mengundi dan menyumbang kepada kemenangan DPJ, sebahagian besarnya disebabkan keadaan ekonomi baru-baru ini.

src: The Liberal Democratic Party was left with just 57 of 480 total seats.
ref: Parti Liberal Demokratik ditinggalkan hanya sebanyak 57 daripada 480 kerusi.

src: Outgoing Prime Minister Taro Aso has promised to resign as party leader, saying, "I believe this is the judgement of the public and we have to accept that and reflect on what we did."
ref: Bekas Perdana Menteri Taro Aso berjanji akan meletak jawatan sebagai ketua parti, katanya, "Saya percaya ini merupakan keputusan yang dibuat oleh rakyat dan kita harus menerima dan fikir tentang apa yang telah kita lakukan."

src: "The people have shown their disappointment with the party and I have to accept that as my destiny."
ref: "Rakyat telah menunjukkan kekecewaan terhadap parti dan saya harus menerimanya sebagai nasib saya."

src: Aso also said that he will stay on as leader until a new one is chosen.
ref: Aso juga berkata bahawa dia akan kekal sebagai ketua sehingga ketua baru dipilih.

src: The Democratic Party has already informally allocated a number of cabinet positions and has set to work drafting improvements to the existing stimulus package.
ref: Parti Demokratik secara tidak rasmi memperuntukkan beberapa jawatan kabinet dan telah membuat draf memperbaiki pakej stimulus yang sedia ada.

src: The newly elected party also pledges to focus spending on households, especially rural families and those with children.
ref: Parti baru yang dipilih juga berikrar untuk fokus terhadap perbelanjaan isi rumah, terutamanya keluarga di luar bandar dan mereka yang mempunyai anak.

src: Tokyo economist Koichi Haji predicts that the hope instilled in the Japanese people by the election result will stimulate the economy, causing stock prices to rise.
ref: Pakar Ekonomi Tokyo Koichi Haji menjangka harapan yang diterapkan atas rakyat Jepun berdasarkan keputusan pilihan raya kali ini mampu merangsang ekonomi, dan menyebabkan harga saham naik.

src: However, questions have been raised about the Democratic Party's stability, due to the wide spectrum of views and ideologies the party encompasses.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, pelbagai soalan telah dibangkitkan mengenai kestabilan Parti Demokratik, berikutan spektrum yang luas dan ideologi yang dirangkumi parti tersebut.

src: The mother of a firefighter who died in his duties fighting the blaze in southern California, has pleaded to the arsonist responsible for the 40,450 acre inferno to give himself up, and that she will not judge him.
ref: Ibu seorang ahli bomba yang meninggal dunia semasa tugasnya melawan kebakaran di selatan California, merayu kepada pembakar yang bertanggungjawah bagi kebakaran dahsyat 40,450 ekar untuk menyerah diri, dan dia tidak akan mengadilinya.

src: Bonnie McKay, mother to 27-year-old Jason McKay, said "I firmly believe you didn't believe that things were going to turn out the way they did, but they did."
ref: Bonnie McKay, ibu Jason McKay yang berumur 27 tahun, berkata "Saya amat percaya kamu tidak percaya sesetengah perkara akan terjadi, tetapi ia terjadi."

src: The fire, which has claimed the lives of four firefighters and caused 95% burns to a fifth, is now 60% contained.
