ref: Kebakaran tersebut, yang meragut nyawa empat ahli bombo dan mengakibatkan 95% luka bakar kepada yang kelima, yang kini 60% terkawal.

src: There is a massive aerial attack on the fire in progress, making use of fire helicopters and planes to dump thousands of gallons of water onto the blaze over the canyons of Riverside County.
ref: Serangan udara sedang dijalankan secara besar-besaran ke atas api, menggunakan helikopter bomba dan kapal terbang untuk menyimbah beribu-ribu gelen air atas api itu yang merentasi gaung Riverside Country.

src: The blaze has now destroyed as many as 27 homes, and has forced the evacuation of 500 more.
ref: Kebakaran tersebut kini telah memusnahkan sebanyak 27 rumah, dan memaksa 500 lagi untuk berpindah.

src: Round 6 of the Hyundai A-League produced an interesting first for the competition in its short existence, and something which has been totally against the grain so far this season.
ref: Pusingan ke 6 Liga Hyundai A telah menghasilkan pertandingan pertama yang menarik dalam kewujudannya yang pendek dan ia adalah sesuatu yang benar-benar bertentangan dengan keadaan biasa musim ini.

src: In the 20 games so far this season, only three home wins had been recorded, but for the first time ever in the league, all four home teams won their respective matches in a single round.
ref: Dalam 20 perlawanan musim ini, hanya tiga kemenangan tuan rumah direkodkan, tetapi buat kali pertama dalam liga, kesemua empat pasukan tuan rumah memenangi perlawanan masing-masing dalam satu pusingan.

src: The Mariners stay four points clear at the top despite losing its first game of the season against Adelaide, while Wellington had their first taste of victory at home, with the Phoenix smashing Perth 4-1.
ref: Pasukan Mariners kekal empat mata di tangga teratas walaupun tewas perlawanan pertama musim ini menentang Adelaide, manakala Wellington mendapat kemenangan di gelanggang sendiri, dan Phoenix menewaskan Perth 4-1.

src: Melbourne and Sydney are set for a blockbuster in Sydney next week, after both had hard fought wins.
ref: Melbourne dan Sydney ditetapkan untuk bertembung di Sydney minggu depan, selepas kedua-duanya mencapai kemenangan selepas bekerja keras.

src: In the morning of 30 October 2005, Romania with other countries from Europe will switch to Official Winter Time.
ref: Pada pagi 30 Oktober 2005, Romania dengan negara-negara lain dari Eropah akan beralih ke Masa Rasmi Musim Sejuk.

src: Thus, 04:00 AM will become 03:00 AM and will be valid until 26 March 2006 when the Official Summer Time will be again used.
ref: Oleh itu, 04:00 akan menjadi 03:00 AM dan akan sah sehingga 26 Mac 2006 apabila Masa Rasmi Musim Panas akan sekali lagi digunakan.

src: Following Romanian Government's Decision nb. 20 from 1997, Romania adopts Winter Time and Summer Time in the same day with the states of European Union and other countries part of this deal.
ref: Berikutan Keputusan Kerajaan Romania nb 20 sejak tahun 1997, Romania mengamalkan Masa Musim Sejuk dan Musim Panas pada hari yang sama dengan negara-negara Kesatuan Eropah dan negara-negara lain sebahagian daripada perjanjian tersebut.

src: Official Winter Time is adopted in the last Sunday of October and the Summer Time in last Sunday of March.
ref: Masa Rasmi Musim Sejuk diguna pakai pada hari Ahad terakhir bulan Oktober dan Masa Musim Panas pada Ahad terakhir bulan Mac.

src: Usually, the official time of a country is Winter Time.
ref: Biasanya, masa rasmi sesebuah negara adalah Masa Musim Sejuk.

src: Summer Time is a legal time adopted by some countries or territories during a part of a year.
ref: Masa Musim Panas adalah masa sah yang diguna pakai oleh sesetengah negara atau wilayah dalam sebahagian masa setahun.

src: Summer Time is usually one hour in front of Standard Official Time.
ref: Masa Musim Panas biasanya satu jam di hadapan Masa Standard Rasmi.

src: During summer months, the time is moved forward in order to use as much sunlight for human activities, as well as to save electric energy used for lighting.
ref: Pada bulan-bulan musim panas, masa digerakkan ke hadapan untuk menjimatkan seberapa banyak cahaya matahari untuk aktiviti manusia, dan juga untuk menjimatkan tenaga elektrik yang digunakan untuk pencahayaan.

src: Until 1939 this worked yearly from the first Sunday of April (in 1932: 22 May) 00:00 AM and the first Sunday of October 01:00 AM (local time).
ref: Sehingga tahun 1939 ini digunakan setiap tahun dari hari Ahad pertama bulan April (pada tahun 1932: 22 Mei) 00:00 AM dan Ahad pertama bulan Oktober 01:00 AM (waktu tempatan).

src: From 1 April 1940 00:00 AM and 2 November 1942 03:00 AM, Summer Time was permanent in Romania.
ref: Dari 1 April 1940 00:00 AM dan 2 November 1942 03:00 AM, Masa Musim Panas adalah tetap di Romania.

src: From 1943 the Summer Time was suspended and Romania used just Official Time (Winter Time).
ref: Dari 1943 Masa Musim Panas digantung dan Romania menggunakan hanya Waktu Rasmi (Masa musim sejuk).

src: A 70 centimeter (27.6 in) zander on Lake Maggiore, Switzerland was killed by police divers after it attacked several swimmers over the weekend.
ref: Seekor zander sepanjang 70 sentimeter (27.6 in) di Tasik Maggiore, Switzerland telah dibunuh oleh polis penyelam selepas ia menyerang beberapa perenang pada hujung minggu.

src: The fish bit six bathers, two of whom required emergency medical treatment for bite wounds up to 10 centimeters (3.9 in) long.
ref: Ikan tersebut menggigit 6 orang yang bermandi, dua daripada mereka memerlukan rawatan perubatan kecemasan untuk luka-luka gigitan sepanjang 10 sentimeter (3.9 in).

src: Fish warden Fabio Croci said, "It is quite unusual for Zanders to bite humans".
ref: Warden ikan Fabio Croci berkata, "Ia agak luar biasa bagi zander menggigit manusia."

src: It is suspected the fish's aggression could have been a result of a hormonal imbalance.
ref: Ia disyaki keagresifan ikan tersebut hasil daripada ketidakseimbangan hormon.

src: After attempts to capture the Zander with a net failed, police divers resorted to harpooning it.
ref: Selepas percubaan untuk menangkap zander dengan jaring yang gagal, polis penyelam terpaksa menembaknya.

src: Meat from the fish was later served to tourists around the lake.
ref: Daging daripada ikan itu kemudiannya disajikan kepada pelancong di sekitar tasik.

src: Pakistani military agreed to help in the rescue mission of Slovenian alpinist Tomaž Humar.
ref: Tentera Pakistan bersetuju untuk membantu dalam misi menyelamat pendaki gunung Slovenia Tomaž Humar.

src: Humar was on his paramount course mission on the 4700 meter high south rock wall of the 8125 meter high Nanga Parbat mountain (the utmost west of the mountain chain) in the Himalaya mountains, being trapped in the ice-hole at an approximate height of 5900 meters for five days.
ref: Humar sedang dalam misi pentingnya di dinding batu selatan setinggi 4700 meter selatan daripada gunung Nanga Parbat yang setinggi 8125 meter (paling barat di rantaian gunung) di pergunungan Himalaya, dia terperangkap dalam lubang ais pada ketinggian lebih kurang 5900 meter selama lima hari.

src: The rescue mission with the military helicopter is planned for Monday morning local time, August 8, 2005.
ref: Misi menyelamat dengan helikopter tentera dirancang akan dijalankan pada pagi Isnin Ogos 8, 2005 waktu tempatan.

src: The rescue team managed to locate Humar on face on Sunday, but said they need a better helicopter for the actual rescue mission.
ref: Pasukan penyelamat berjaya mengesan Humar pada muka pada hari Ahad, tetapi berkata bahawa mereka memerlukan helikopter yang lebih baik untuk misi menyelamat yang sebenar.

src: Swiss Air Zermatt rescue pilots offered their help in the effort.
ref: Juruterbang penyelamat Air Zermatt dari Switzerland menawarkan bantuan mereka dalam usaha penyelamat.

src: A truck carrying 35,500 pounds (16,100 kg) of explosives used in mining and seismic exploration overturned and exploded on a rural mountain section of U.S. Highway 6 in Utah's Spanish Fork Canyon Thursday afternoon.
ref: Sebuah trak yang membawa 35,500 paun (16,100 kg) bahan letupan untuk digunakan dalam perlombongan dan penerokaan seismik terbalik dan meletup di kawasan gunung luar bandar Lebuhraya A.S. 6 di Spanish Fork Canyon Utah petang Khamis lalu.

src: The wreck occurred shortly after 2 pm, as driver Travis Stewart, 30, of Rexburg, Idaho, was leaving Ensign-Bickford Co., a commercial explosives manufacturing plant at the mouth of the canyon.
ref: Kemalangan tersebut berlaku sejurus selepas jam 2 petang, apabila pemandu Travis Stewart, 30, dari Rexburg, Idaho, meninggalkan Ensign-Bickford Co, kilang bahan letupan komersial di muara gaung.

src: Witnesses said Mr. Stewart appeared to lose control of the truck after entering a curve in the road at a high rate of speed.
ref: Saksi berkata, trak yang dipandu Encik Stewart kelihatan hilang kawalan selepas memasuki satu selekoh di jalan raya pada kadar kelajuan yang tinggi.

src: Utah Highway Patrol Lt. Ken Peay said, "speed was a factor" in the wreck of the truck but refused to speculate on how fast the truck was traveling when it wrecked.
ref: Peronda Lebuhraya Utah Lt. Ken Peay berkata, "kelajuan merupakan faktor" dalam kemalangan trak tersebut tetapi enggan membuat spekulasi mengenai kelajuan trak itu bergerak semasa berlakunya kemalangan.

src: Lt. Peay said the posted speed limit on the road is 60 mph, but the advised speed is 40.
ref: Lt. Peay berkata had laju yang ditunjukkan di jalan raya adalah 60 mph, tetapi kelajuan yang dinasihatkan ialah 40.

src: At least 17 people received minor injuries and the explosion left a 35 foot deep crater in the highway.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 17 orang cedera ringan dan letupan tersebut meninggalkan kawah sedalam 35 kaki di lebuh raya.

src: The driver was transported via helicopter to a hospital, where he was listed in fair condition, and was later released.
ref: Pemandu itu dibawa ke hospital dengan menggunakan helikopter, di mana beliau telah disenaraikan dalam keadaan yang stabil, dan kemudiannya dibenarkan pulang.

src: The co-driver Troy Lysfjord, 37, of Blackfoot, Idaho, was helped from the wreck by passers by and listed in fair condition at Utah Valley Regional Hospital in Provo.
ref: Pembantu pemandu Troy Lysfjord, 37, dari Blackfoot, Idaho, dibantu keluar dari tempat kejadian oleh orang awam dan disenaraikan dalam keadaan yang stabil di Hospital Wilayah Utah Valley di Provo.

src: The wreck site occurred on a major thoroughfare between Denver and Salt Lake City - about 60 miles south of Salt Lake City - was already under reconstruction by nightfall, as road crews began installing 10 inches of asphalt on the two lane road.
ref: Kemalangan berlaku di jalan utama antara Denver dan Salt Lake City - kira-kira 60 batu ke selatan Salt Lake City - sudah di bawah pembinaan semula sebelum matahari terbenam, dengan krew jalan mula meletakkan 10 inci asfalt di jalan raya dua lorong itu.

src: Utah Department of Transportation spokesman Tom Hudachko said officials hoped to have the road fully repaired by Friday afternoon, adding that, "When you take a look at that hole that was there 24 hours ago, I think it's amazing the progress that was made."
ref: Jurucakap Jabatan Pengangkutan Utah Tom Hudachko berkata pegawai-pegawai berharap jalan tersebut dapat dibaiki sepenuhnya pada tengah hari Jumaat, sambil menambah: "Apabila kamu lihat pada lubang yang berada di sana 24 jam yang lalu, saya fikir kemajuan yang telah dibuat adalah menakjubkan."

src: As of press time, the mouth of the canyon was reopened to traffic, while traffic at the accident site was impassible, and rerouted nearby.
ref: Semasa sesi akhbar, mulut gaung telah dibuka semula kepada lalu lintas, manakala trafik di tapak kemalangan itu tidak terjejas, dan laluan telah diubah ke kawasan berdekatan.

src: The explosion consumed all but about 60 pounds of explosives, and loosened some boulders on the north side of the highway, damaged railroad tracks and some fiber optic lines buried along the roadway.
ref: Letupan tersebut menggunakan hampir semua kecuali kira-kira 60 paun bahan letupan, dan melonggarkan beberapa batu-batu di sebelah utara lebuh raya, merosakkan landasan kereta api dan beberapa talian gentian optik yang ditanam di sepanjang jalan tersebut.

src: Amtrak and Union Pacific reported delays resulting from the wreck.
ref: Amtrak dan Kesatuan Pasifik melaporkan kelewatan disebabkan oleh kemalangan itu.

src: Uinta National Forest spokesman Loyal Clark said forest firefighters were unable to respond to several small fires nearby that were apparently started by flying debris, and that helicopters dropped water to extinguish them.
ref: Jurucakap Hutan Negara Uinta Loyal Clark berkata anggota bomba hutan tidak dapat mengambil tindakan terhadap beberapa kebakaran kecil berhampiran yang nampaknya bermula dengan serpihan yang berterbangan, dan helikopter telah menjatuhkan air untuk memadamkannya.

src: High humidity and lack of fuel from a previous fire delayed the fire's spread.
ref: Kelembapan yang tinggi dan kekurangan bahan api melambatkan penyebaran api itu.

src: The cost of repairs, while paid immediately by the state, will ultimately be borne by the trucking company's insurance carrier.
ref: Kos pembaikan, walaupun dibayar serta-merta oleh kerajaan, akan ditanggung sendiri oleh syarikut insuran pengangkutan trak itu nanti.

src: The truck is registered to R&R Trucking of Duenweg, Missouri.
ref: Trak tersebut didaftarkan pada R & R Trucking daripada Duenweg, Missouri.

src: UHP Lt. Peay said the investigation findings will be turned over to Utah County Attorney Kay Bryson whom would make any final decision about what charges, if any, would be pressed.
ref: UHP Lt. Peay berkata hasil siasatan akan diserahkan kepada Utah County Attorney Kay Bryson yang akan membuat apa-apa keputusan muktamad mengenai sebarang pertuduhan, jika ada, akan dikenakan.

src: A cork was temporarily used to fix a fuel leak on a British passenger train.
ref: Gabus telah digunakan untuk membaiki kebocoran bahan api kereta api penumpang British buat sementara waktu.

src: The leak was created when the train struck a concrete block that vandals left on the tracks.
ref: Kebocoran ini terjadi apabila kereta api melanggar blok konkrit yang ditinggalkan pelaku musnah di trek.

src: Train service on the Paddington to Exeter line was stopped around Bath.
ref: Perkhidmatan kereta api di Paddington ke Exeter dihentikan di sekitar Bath.

src: This abrupt stop created a hole in the sightglass which helps monitor fuel levels.
ref: Hentian mendadak ini mencipta lubang di gelas memerhati yang membantu mengawasi tahap bahan api.

src: Worried the incident could cause a fuel leak, staff decided to use the cork of a wine bottle found in the buffet car, to block the hole.
ref: Bimbang kejadian itu boleh menyebabkan kebocoran bahan api, kakitangan memutuskan untuk menggunakan gabus botol arak dijumpai di dalam kereta bufet, untuk menyekat lubang.

src: An incident that people worried would cause a delay of hours, was cleared up in around 20 minutes.
ref: Satu peristiwa yang orang ramai bimbang akan menyebabkan kelewatan berjam-jam, telah diselesaikan dalam masa 20 minit.

src: Around 50 people have been arrested ahead of a planned human rights protest in Swaziland.
ref: Lebih kurang 50 orang telah ditahan diatas rancangan mengadakan protes hak asasi manusia di Swaziland.

src: The protest had been planned against the monarchy of Swaziland to call attention to the country's alleged lack of human rights.
ref: Protes tersebut telah dirancang bertentangan dengan monarki Swaziland untuk menarik perhatian terhadap kekurangan hak asasi manusia di negara itu.

src: Many of those arrested have been released but several people remain in custody.
ref: Ramai tahanan telah dilepaskan tetapi beberapa orang masih dalam tahanan.

src: The King of Swaziland, Mswati III, has come under pressure for living in luxury with his thirteen wives while many Swazi people are on the poverty line.
ref: Raja Swaziland, Mswati III, telah mendapat tekanan kerana hidup dalam kemewahan bersama tiga belas isteri-isterinya sedangkan ramai penduduk Swazi berada dalam kemiskinan.

src: He has also faced criticism for having a high number of sexual partners, when 26% of 15 to 49 year olds are HIV positive.
ref: Beliau juga menerima kritikan kerana mempunyai pasangan seks yang ramai, sementara 26% daripada rakyat berusia 15 hingga 49 tahun menghidap HIV positif.

src: Several South African trade unionists were included in the protesters arrested.
ref: Beberapa ahli kesatuan sekerja Afrika Selatan termasuk dalam penunjuk perasaan ditahan.

src: A spokesman for Cosatu, the South African trade union federation, said that two of the unionists had not been released and their current whereabouts are unknown.
ref: Jurucakap Cosatu, kesatuan sekerja Persekutuan Afrika Selatan, berkata dua daripada ahli kesatuan itu masih belum dilepaskan dan keberadaan mereka sekarang tidak diketahui.

src: Human rights group Amnesty International has commented on the events saying that, "The arbitrary arrest of these political activists, lawyers, trade unionists and journalists is nothing short of police harassment and intimidation."
ref: Kumpulan hak asasi manusia Amnesty International telah membuat komen tentang peristiwa tersebut mengatakan bahawa, "Penangkapan sewenang-wenangnya aktivis-aktivis politik, peguam, ahli kesatuan sekerja dan wartawan adalah tidak lain daripada gangguan dan ugutan polis."

src: Swaziland is the last country in Africa to hold an absolute monarchy.
ref: Swaziland merupakan negara terakhir di Afrika yang mengekalkan monarki mutlak.

src: Pakistani Prime Minister Yousaf Raza Gilani announced that the military operation targeting Taliban militants based in the South Waziristan tribal region is now over, after nearly two months.
ref: Perdana Menteri Pakistan Yousaf Raza Gilani mengumumkan yang operasi ketenteraan yang menyasarkan pusat tentera Taliban didaerah tribal Selatan Warizistan kini telah tamat, setelah hampir dua bulan.

src: He commented that the military is now focusing on the nearby Orakzai tribal region, in order to pursue the Pakistani Taliban leadership that is believed to have fled there from South Waziristan.
ref: Dia memberi komen yang tentera kini menumpukan daerah tribal Orakzai berdekatan, dalam meneruskan kepimpinan Taliban Pakistan yang dipercayai telah melarikan diri kesana dari Selatan Waziristan.

src: There recently have been heavy artillery and air strikes in the area.
ref: Kebelakangan ini terdapat lepasan meriam dan serangan udara yang kerap di kawasan tersebut.

src: "Now there are talks about Orakzai," Gilani said earlier today to reporters in a televised speech
ref: "Kini tedapat perbincangan mengenai Orakzai," Gilani berkata awal hari ini kepada wartawan dalam ucapan televisyen.

src: In mid-October, Gilani ordered Pakistan's military to conduct the offensive, known as Operation Rah-e-Nijat or "Road to Deliverance."
ref: Pada pertengahan Oktober, Gilani memerintahkan tentera Pakistan untuk menjalankan serangan tersebut, yang dikenali sebagai Operasi Rah-e-Nijat atau "Jalan kearah Pembebasan."

src: Military officials say more than 600 Taliban members and some 80 soldiers have been killed in the operation near the Afghan border.
ref: Pegwai tentera berkata lebih dari 600 ahli Taliban dan hampir 80 tentera telah terbunuh dalam operasi berhampiran sempadan Afghanistan.

src: These numbers have not been independently verified because, except for a few military-organized trips, the military has largely closed the area to journalists and aid agencies.
ref: Jumlah ini tidak disahkan secara bebas kerana, selain dari beberapa perjalanan dianjurkan tentera, tentera telah menutup secara luas kawasan tersebut kepada wartawan dan agensi bantuan.

src: The United Nations reported that about 40,000 of people have fled the region, and need humanitarian aid.
ref: Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu melaporkan yang lebih kurang 40,000 orang telah meninggalkan daerah tersebut, dan memerlukan bantuan kemanusiaan.

src: Pakistani officials have blamed Mehsud's organization for a series of high profile attacks across the country that has killed more than 500 people since the beginning of October.
ref: Pegawai Pakistan telah menyalahkan pengurusan Mehsud keatas beberapa serangan berprofil tinggi diseluruh negara yang telah membunuh lebih dari 500 orang sejak awal Oktober.

src: Three days after a US Navy helicopter collided with a US Coast Guard airplane off the coast of California, a search and rescue mission is ongoing for the nine crew onboard the two aircraft.
ref: Tiga hari selepas sebuah helikopter Tentera Laut AS berlanggar dengan pesawat Pengawal Perairan AS di Perairan California, misi mencari dan menyelamat berterusan untuk sembilan krew diatas kedua-dua pesawat tersebut.

src: The two on board the AH-1W SuperCobra attack helicopter and seven on the C-130 Hercules transport plane were trained in survival and described as being in good physical condition, meaning rescuers maintain hope of finding them alive.
ref: Dua menaiki helikopter penyerang AH-1W dan tujuh menaiki pesawat pengankut C-130 Hercules dilatih dalam menyelamat diri dan diterangkan sebagai dalam keaddan fizikal yang bagus, bermaksud penyelamat masih berharap menemui mereka hidup.

src: They all had heat-retaining drysuits but it was unknown if they were wearing them at the time.
ref: Mereka semua mempunyai suit kering penyimpan-haba tetapi tidak diketahui samada mereka memakainya pada masa tersebut.

src: The accident occurred at 7:10 p.m. on Thursday in an area of military airspace that is sometimes closed to the public, although its status at the time of the accident was not known.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku pada 7:10 p.m. pada hari Khamis didalam kawasan ruang udara tentera yang kdangkala ditutup kepada awam, walaupun status pada masa kemalangan adalah tidak diketahui.

src: The helicopter had been in formation with two transports and another SuperCobra to practise night flying, while the Coast Guard plane was conducting search and rescue for 50-year-old boater David Jines.
ref: Helikopter tersebut adalah dalam formasi dengan dua lagi pesawat pengangkut dan sebuah lagi SuperCobra untuk latihan penerbangan malam sementara pesawat Pengawal Perairan sedang menjalankan pencarian dan penyelamat untuk kelasi beusia 50 tahun David Jines.

src: The search for Jines ends today whether he is found or not.
ref: Pnecarian untuk Jines tamat pada hari ini samada dia diketemui atau tidak.

src: After searching 644 square miles of ocean with nine aircraft debris has been located from both the aircraft, but no trace has been found of those on board.
ref: Selepas mencari sejauh 644 batu persegi lautan dengan sembilan bangkai pesawat telah ditemui dari kedua-dua pesawat tersebut, tetapi tiada kesan yang telah ditemui mengenai mereka yang diatas kapal.

src: Operations are currently focusing near the military's San Clemente Island, where an area of about 50 miles of floating wreckage is located.
ref: Operasi kini difokus berdekatan dengan kem Pulau San Clemente, dimana kawasan lebih kurang 50 batu dari bangkai terapung ditemui.

src: British murderer Gordon Park was found dead today in his cell at a prison in Lancashire, England.
ref: Pembunuh British Gordon Park ditemui mati hari ini didalam selnya di penjara di Lancashire, England.

src: Park, whose 66th birthday was today, was convicted nearly five years ago of the murder of his wife, Carol, in 1976.
ref: Park, yang hari jadi ke 66 nya hari ini, disabitkan hampir lima tahun lalu keatas pembunuhan isterinya, Carol, pada 1976.

src: Her body was found over twenty years later in Coniston Water, in the Lake District, Northern England, leading to her being dubbed the "Lady in the Lake" by police, after the Raymond Chandler novel.
ref: Mayatnya ditemui lebih dua puluh tahun kemudian di Coniston Water, di Daerah Lake, Utara England, membawa kepada dia digelar "Wanita didalam Tasik" oleh polis, dari novel Raymon Chandler.

src: The Prison Service state Park was found hanging in his cell at Garth Prison, unconscious, at 8am local time.
ref: Perkhidmatan Penjara menyatakan yang Park ditemui tergantung dalam selnya di Perjara Garth, tidak sedarkan diri, pada 8 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: "Staff and paramedics attended but Mr Park was pronounced dead at 9.40am", a spokesman added.
ref: "Pekerja dan paramedik mencuba tetapi Encik Park diumumkan meninggal pada 9.40 pagi," tambah jurucakap.

src: An investigation has been launched by the Prisons and Probation Ombudsman, responsible for investigating deaths in custody; but suicide is suspected.
ref: Penyiasatan telah dilancarkan oleh Ombudsman Penjara dan Percubaan, bertanggungjawab terhadap penyiasaat kematian dalam tahanan; tetapi bunuh diri disyaki.

src: His son, Jeremy, who had been fighting for his father's release, said "[w]e are all completely devastated and still believe his innocence 100%."
ref: Anak lelakinya, Jeremy, yang telah bertarung untuk pembebasan bapanya, berkata "Kami semua tersangat bersedih dan masih percaya dia tidak bersalah 100%."

src: Park was jailed for life in January 2005, with a minimum period of fifteen years, for his wife's murder after a ten-week trial at Manchester Crown Court.
ref: Park dipenjarakan seumur hidup pada January 2005, dengan tempoh minimum selama lima belas tahun, untuk pembunuhan isterinya selepas sepuluh-minggu perbicaraan di Mahkamah Mahkota Manchaster.

src: Carol Park was killed with an ice axe, then her body concealed in Coniston Water.
ref: Carol Park dibunuh dengan kapak ais, kemudian mayatnya disembunyikan di Coniston Water.

src: She was not found until August 1997, when divers found her weighted corpse 70 feet deep.
ref: Dia tidak ditemui hingga Ogos 1997, apabila penyelam menemui mayatnya yang diberatkan sedalam 70 kaki.

src: Park had claimed that his wife had left him for another man.
ref: Park mendakwa yang isterinya telah meninggalkannya untuk lelaki lain.

src: His appeal against conviction was turned down in 2008, with the Court of Appeal saying that the geological evidence he wished to challenge was only one factor of the "strong circumstantial case" proving his guilt.
ref: Rayuannya terhadap sabitan telah ditolak pada 2008, dengan Mahkamah Rayuan menyatakan yang keinginannya menentang bukti geologi hanyalah satu dari faktor "kes mengikut keadaan kukuh" membuktikan dia bersalah.

src: Sri Lanka have beaten Kenya by 172 runs in Group C of the 2007 Twenty20 World Championship at Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg, South Africa.
ref: Sri Lanka telah mengalahkan Kenya dengan 172 larian dalam Kumpulan C pada Kejohanan Dunia Twenty20 2007 di Stadium Wanderer, Johannesburg, Afrika Selatan.

src: Sanath Jayasuriya scored 88 runs off 44 balls as Sri Lanka raced to 260-6 off 20 overs, the highest total made in a Twenty20 international.
ref: Sanath Jayasuriya mencapai 88 larian dari 44 bola apabila Sri Lanka berlawan ke 260-6 keatas 20 over, keseluruhan tertinggi dibuat dalam Twenty20 antarabangsa.

src: Mahela Jayawardene scored 65 runs before falling lbw to Jimmy Kamande, who took 3-48, bowling Kumar Sangakkara for 30 and Tillakaratne Dilshan for just three runs.
ref: Mahela Jayawaredene mencapai 65 larian sebelum jatuh lbw kepada Jimmy Kamande, yang mengambil 3-48, bowl Kumat Sangakkara kepada 30 dan Tillakaratne Dilshan untuk hanya tiga larian.

src: Jehan Mubarak smashed 46 off 13 balls as Sri Lanka set a formidable target for Kenya.
ref: Jehan Mubarak memukul 46 dari 13 bola apabila Sri Lanka menetapkan target menggerunkan untuk Kenya.

src: Chaminda Vaas immediately made a breakthrough, dismissing opening batsman Maurice Ouma for a duck.
ref: Chaminda Vaas dengan segera membuat pelepasan, menolak pemukul pembuka Maurice Ouma untuk duck.

src: Kenya never recovered, and were reduced to just 88 runs in the 20th over as Sri Lanka dismissed their batsmen cheaply.
ref: Kenya tidak pernah pulih, dan dikurangkan kepada hanya 88 larian diatas 20 apabila Sri Lanka menolak pemukul mereka dengan mudah.

src: The win, by 172 runs, is the largest margin of victory in a Twenty20 international.
ref: Kemenangan, dengan 172 larian, dalam jidar kemenangan terbesar dalam Twenty20 antarabangsa.

src: Seven unknown men armed with guns invaded the Terra Prometida camp, in Felisburgo city, Minas Gerais, Brazil, and killed five members of the Brazilian Landless Workers Movement movement (MST).
ref: Tujuh lelaki tidak dikenali dilengkapi dengan senjata menceroboh kem Terra Prometida, dibandar Felisburgo, Minas Gerais, Brazil, dan membunuh lima ahli kepada pergerakan Pergerakan Pekerja Tidak Bertanah Brazil (MST).

src: The Terra Prometida camp had been invaded by the MST in May 2002 and there were about 200 MST families living there at the time of the attack.
ref: Kem Terra Prometida telah diceroboh oleh MST pada Mei 2002 dan terdapat lebih kurang 200 keluarga MST tinggal disana semasa serangan.

src: According to MST camp leaders the gunfighters set fire to MST tents and started shooting.
ref: Menurut ketua kem MST, penyerang bersenjata membakar khmeah-khemah MST dan mula menembak.

src: The Workers Party (PT) has demanded the gunfighters' arrest and punishment.
ref: Parti Pekerja (PT) telah menuntut penangkapan dan hukuman kepada penyerang bersenjata.

src: The MST is an ideologically diverse movement of agricultural workers in Brazil officially founded in 1984.
ref: MST ialah pergerakan berideologi luas pekerja-pekerja pertanian di Brazil ditubuhkan secara rasmi pada 1984.

src: According to MST, in 2003 there were about 632 MST camps in Brazil.
ref: Menurut MST, pada 2003 terdapat 632 kem MST di Brazil.

src: MST is a large organization with many bases throughout Brazilian cities.
ref: MST ialah organisasi besar yang mempunyai banyak pengkalan diseluruh bandar-bandar Brazil.

src: Their most visible tactic has been the occupation of mostly privately-held plantations and landholdings, sometimes armed with carving knifes and scythes.
ref: Tektik mereka yang paling jelas ialah menduduki ladang-ladang dan tanah-tanah hampir milik-persendirian, kadang-kala dilengkapi dengan pisau ukiran dan sabit.

src: Currently, MST receives help from the Brazilian government and donations from international organizations.
ref: Masa ini, MST menerima bantuan dari kerajaan Brazil dan derma dari organisasi antarabangsa.

src: The movement also receives funds by selling videos of their invasions.
ref: Pergerakan itu juga menerima dana dengan menjual video pencerobohan mereka.

src: Overall, a recent report on labor standards in Brazil has shown that conditions for laborers are poor.
ref: Keseluruhannya, laporan terkini mengenai piawaian buruh di Brazil menunjukkan yang situasi buruk.

src: As many as 3,200 mine workers became trapped in the in Elandsrand mine, a gold mine in South Africa about 50 miles (80 km) west of Johannesburg in Carletonville, Gauteng, after an incident on October 3.
ref: Seramai 3, 200 pekerja lombong terperangkap dalam lombong Elandsrand, lombong emas di Afrika Selatan kira-kira 50 batu (80 km) barat Johannesburg dalam Carletonville, Gauteng, selepas kejadian pada 3 Oktober.

src: All miners have been rescued, and none of them were injured.
ref: Semua pelombong telah diselamatkan, dan tiada seorang pun daripada mereka cedera.

src: The mining company says that a lift electrical cable broke on a basket that was carrying miners, trapping thousands at least 2,200 meters (1.3 miles) below the earth's surface.
ref: Syarikat perlombongan mengatakan bahawa lif kabel elektrik pecah ke bakul yang membawa pelombong, memerangkap ribuan sekurang-kurangnya 2, 200 meter (1. 3 batu) di bawah permukaan bumi.

src: Reports from MSNBC and the Guardian Unlimited say that the shaft may have collapsed when a water or air pipe burst.
ref: Laporan dari MSNBC dan Guardian Unlimited mengatakan bahawa aci mungkin runtuh apabila air atau paip udara pecah.

src: The rescue operation went well with no complications, with the rescue taking just under 24 hours to complete.
ref: Operasi menyelamat berjalan dengan lancar tanpa komplikasi, dengan usaha menyelamat mengambil hanya di bawah 24 jam untuk habis.

src: "They were underground when the accident happened and they were not able to surface because an electric feeder cable that is connected to the mine lift was severed," said a spokeswoman for the mining company, Amelia Soares.
ref: "Mereka berada di bawah tanah apabila kemalangan itu berlaku dan mereka tidak dapat naik semula kerana kabel feeder elektrik yang disambungkan ke lif lombong itu telah terputus," kata seorang jurucakap syarikat perlombongan, Amelia Soares.

src: The snap was caused by a "fatigued" air pipe which burst and fell down the shaft damaging the "steelwork and electrical feeder cords," added Soares.
ref: Keputusan kabel itu disebabkan oleh paip udara "uzur" yang pecah dan jatuh ke bawah batang merosakkan "kerja keluli dan tali feeder elektrik," kata Soares.

src: "There have been no injuries or deaths," said CEO of Harmony mining, Graham Briggs who also said that the miners were previously contacted and were given "food and water."
ref: "Tiada sebarang kecederaan atau kematian," kata Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif perlombongan Harmony, Graham Briggs yang juga berkata bahawa pelombong sebelum ini dihubungi dan diberi "makanan dan air."

src: Earlier reports had stated that Lesiba Seshoka, a spokesman with the National Union of Mineworkers, said that the miners have not been heard from for hours and that they could have been enduring temperatures as high as 105 degrees Fahrenheit (40 degrees Celsius).
ref: Laporan sebelum ini telah menyatakan bahawa Lesiba Seshoka, jurucakap dengan Kesatuan Kebangsaan Mineworkers, berkata bahawa tidak mendengar daripada pelombong berjam-jam dan mereka menempuh suhu setinggi 105 darjah Fahrenheit (40 darjah Celsius) berkekalan.

src: "The only exit is blocked, probably by a fall of ground," said Seshoka.
ref: "Satu-satunya jalan keluar disekat, mungkin oleh kejatuhan tanah," kata Seshoka.

src: Rescue workers used a mine shaft that is next to the damaged one in an attempt to reach the trapped miners, and lifted them out, 75 at a time.
ref: Pekerja penyelamat menggunakan aci lombong yang bersebelahan dengan yang rosak dalam usaha untuk sampai ke pelombong terperangkap, dan mengangkat mereka, 75 pada satu masa.

src: There was no emergency exit in the shaft which is reported to have "not been maintained for ages," added Seshoka.
ref: Tidak ada pintu kecemasan dalam aci yang dilaporkan "tiada penyelenggaraan pada sekian lama," tambah Seshoka.

src: "An escape route is the most important thing and they have failed miserably."
ref: "Satu jalan keluar adalah perkara yang paling penting dan mereka telah gagal teruk. "

src: "Our main worry is for more than 3,000 people who are underground," said National Union of Mineworkers for S. Africa chairman, Deon Boqwana.
ref: "Kebimbangan utama kami adalah lebih daripada 3,000 orang yang berada di bawah tanah," kata Kesatuan Kebangsaan Mineworkers untuk S. Afrika pengerusi, Deon Boqwana.

src: Current reports say that "negligence" was the initial cause for the pipe burst and that there has been a history of negligence from the mine.
ref: Laporan semasa mengatakan bahawa "kecuaian" adalah punca awal untuk paip pecah dan terdapat sejarah kecuaian dari lombong.

src: "Because of continuous operations there is no time to make adequate checks," said the President of the Miners union, Senzeni Zokwana to reporters during a news conference.
ref: "Oleh kerana operasi berterusan tidak ada masa untuk membuat pemeriksaan yang mencukupi," kata Presiden Kesatuan Pelombong itu, Senzeni Zokwana kepada pemberita semasa sidang akhbar.

src: The Elandsrand mine is currently under development and has been since February 2001 when Harmony bought the mine.
ref: Lombong Elandsrand kini di bawah pembangunan sejak Februari 2001 apabila Harmony membeli lombong itu.

src: Officials state that the mine will remain closed for a minimum of six weeks, while an investigation is performed, and the mine is deemed safe for miners to continue working in it.
ref: Pegawai menyatakan bahawa lombong akan tetap tertutup untuk sekurang-kurangnya enam minggu, sementara siasatan dilakukan, dan lombong tersebut adalah dianggap selamat untuk pelombong untuk terus bekerja di dalamnya.

src: The mine is located in the Witwatersrand Basin of South Africa, which is said to be the location of the largest area of raw gold on the planet.
ref: Lombong itu terletak di Lembangan Witwatersrand Afrika Selatan, yang dikatakan menjadi lokasi kawasan terbesar emas mentah di planet ini.

src: The results of the appeals in the massive Italian football match-fixing scandal have today been announced by the Italian federal court.
ref: Keputusan rayuan dalam bola sepak Itali dalam skandal mengatur perlawanan pada hari ini telah diumumkan oleh Mahkamah Persekutuan Itali.

src: Juventus originally were relegated to Serie B with a thirty-point deduction.
ref: Juventus asalnya telah diturunkan ke Serie B dengan potongan tiga puluh mata.

src: Their appeal still sees them in Italian football's second division, but with their points deduction almost halved to seventeen.
ref: Rayuan mereka masih melihat mereka berada dalam divisyen dua bola sepak Itali, tetapi dengan potongan mata mereka hampir separuh kepada tujuh belas.

src: They will still have their last two Scudettos stripped off them and the 2005-06 title will not be assigned to anyone.
ref: Dua Scudetto mereka dilucutkan dari mereka dan kejuaraan 2005-06 tidak akan diberikan kepada sesiapa.

src: They will also have to play three games behind closed doors.
ref: Mereka juga akan perlu bermain tiga perlawanan dengan stadium tertutup.

src: AC Milan will remain in Serie A and with their points deduction reduced from fifteen to just eight.
ref: AC Milan akan kekal dalam Serie A dan dengan potongan mata mereka dikurangkan daripada lima belas hingga lapan.

src: However, importantly, they have been reinstated into the Champions League, but will have to play in the third qualifying round.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, yang paling penting, mereka telah masuk semula ke Liga Juara-Juara, tetapi harus bermain dalam pusingan kelayakan ketiga.

src: Fiorentina and Lazio have been reinstated into Serie A, having been demoted into Serie B originally.
ref: Fiorentina dan Lazio telah dimasukkan semula ke Serie A, pada asalnya diturunkan ke dalam Serie B.

src: However, both clubs have had their points deductions increased, in Fiorentina's case the deduction was twelve points and Lazio will start the season with -11 points having originally had a seven-point penalty.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kedua-dua kelab mempunyai potongan mata mereka meningkat, dalam kes Fiorentina potongan adalah dua belas mata dan Lazio akan memulakan musim ini dengan -11 mata asalnya mempunyai penalti tujuh mata.

src: Both clubs will not be allowed to play in European competitions next season and will have stadium bans.
ref: Kedua-dua kelab tidak akan dibenarkan untuk bermain dalam pertandingan Eropah musim depan dan akan mempunyai larangan stadium.

src: Fiorentina must play three games behind closed doors and for Lazio it's two.
ref: Fiorentina mesti bermain tiga perlawanan secara tertutup dan untuk Lazio adalah dua.

src: Carlos Ortega, one of the top opposition leaders in Venezuela, has been sentenced to 15 years in jail for inciting civil unrest during a strike.
ref: Carlos Ortega, salah seorang pemimpin pembangkang utama di Venezuela, telah dijatuhi hukuman 15 tahun penjara kerana menghasut rusuhan awam semasa mogok.

src: Following a military coup d'etat in 2002, the two-month strike battered the country's oil industry in a effort to oust the elected president Hugo Chavez.
ref: Berikutan rampasan kuasa tentera pada tahun 2002, mogok dua bulan mendera industri minyak di negara ini dalam usaha untuk menggulingkan Presiden yang dipilih Hugo Chavez.

src: "From prison, I'll keep working, I'll keep fighting to preserve the freedom, democracy and unity of the people," said Mr Ortega in a telephone interview.
ref: "Daripada penjara, saya akan terus bekerja, saya akan terus berjuang untuk mengekalkan kebebasan, demokrasi dan perpaduan rakyat," kata Encik Ortega dalam satu temu bual telefon.

src: "I'm no conspirator or coup plotter and I didn't betray my country."
ref: "Saya bukan konspirator atau perancang rampasan kuasa dan saya tidak mengkhianati negara saya. "

src: While Ortega had initially fled Venezuela following the issuing of an arrest warrant in 2003, the BBC reports that he had returned to Venuzuela from Costa Rica last August.
ref: Walaupun Ortega pada mulanya melarikan diri dari Venezuela berikutan pengeluaran waran tangkap pada tahun 2003, BBC melaporkan bahawa beliau telah pulang ke Venuzuela dari Costa Rica Ogos lalu.

src: Supporters of Mr Ortega have claimed the verdict is 'politically motivated' according to BBC reports, with an appeal being planned.
ref: Penyokong Mr Ortega telah mendakwa keputusan itu adalah 'bermotifkan politik'menurut laporan BBC, dengan rayuan sedang dirancang.

src: Mr Ortega's opposition to current Venezuelan president Hugo Chavez is well known.
ref: Pembangkang Mr Ortega untuk Presiden Venezuela Hugo Chavez dikenali ramai.

src: Chavez himself attempted (and failed) to carry out a military coup in 1992.
ref: Chavez sendiri cuba (dan gagal) untuk menjalankan satu rampasan kuasa tentera pada 1992.

src: Since then, Chavez was democratically elected president in 1998, 2000, and survived a recall referendum against him in 2004, and the constitutional reform referendum which he supported was supported by over 70% of the population in 1999.
ref: Sejak itu, Chavez telah dipilih secara demokratik menjadi presiden pada tahun 1998, 2000, dan berjaya dalam pengutan suara terhadapnya pada tahun 2004, dan pungutan pembaharuan perlembagaan yang disokongnya disokong oleh lebih 70% daripada penduduk pada tahun 1999.

src: Pakistani militants killed ten soldiers and injured fifteen more during an attack on PNS Mehran, a military base in Karachi, in a revenge strike after the killing of Osama bin Laden.
ref: Militan Pakistan membunuh sepuluh askar dan mencederakan lebih lima belas semasa serangan ke atas PNS Mehran, sebuah pangkalan tentera di Karachi, dalam serangan balas dendam selepas pembunuhan Osama bin Laden.

src: Commandos have cleared the base of militants; three of the attackers were reported also to have been killed.
ref: Komando telah membersihkan pangkal militan; tiga daripada penyerang dilaporkan juga telah dibunuh.

src: The militants reportedly took hostages inside the base but officials said they all had been rescued unharmed.
ref: Militan dilaporkan mengambil tebusan di pangkalan tetapi pegawai berkata, mereka semua telah diselamatkan tanpa kecederaan.

src: Military forces continued to fight off the militants on Monday morning, hours after the attack began the night before when as many as twenty militants stormed hangars at the base and used rocket-propelled grenades to destroy a number of military aircraft, including a P-3C Orion.
ref: Angkatan tentera terus melawan militan pada pagi Isnin, beberapa jam selepas serangan bermula malam sebelumnya apabila sebanyak dua puluh militan menyerbu hangar di pangkalan dan menggunakan bom tangan roket untuk memusnahkan beberapa pesawat tentera, termasuk P-3C Orion.

src: Witnesses reported hearing a number of loud explosions and heavy gunfire as the militants continued to attack the base.
ref: Saksi-saksi melaporkan mendengar beberapa letupan kuat dan tembakan berat apabila kumpulan militan terus menyerang pangkalan.

src: "They were carrying guns, rocket-propelled grenades and hand grenades," a spokesperson for the Pakistan navy said.
ref: "Mereka membawa senjata, bom tangan roket dan bom tangan," kata seorang jurucakap tentera laut Pakistan itu.

src: Yusuf Raza Gilani, the prime minister, said the attack was a "cowardly act of terror".
ref: Yusuf Raza Gilani, Perdana Menteri berkata, serangan itu adalah "tindakan keganasan pengecut."

src: Reports last night indicated hostages may have been taken at the base, but officials have confirmed all foreigners at the base are safe and any hostages taken have been freed.
ref: Laporan semalam menunjukkan tebusan mungkin telah diambil di pangkalan, tetapi pegawai-pegawai telah mengesahkan semua warga asing di pangkalan adalah selamat dan sebarang tebusan diambil telah dibebaskan.

src: Commandos moved in after the attack begun and fighting continued throughout the night, and more loud explosions and gunfire were heard in the base on Monday morning.
ref: Komando bergerak selepas serangan bermula dan pertempuran berterusan sepanjang malam, dan letupan lebih kuat dan tembakan kedengaran di pangkalan pada pagi Isnin.

src: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan has claimed responsibility for the attack; a spokesperson said it was a revenge attack for the killing of Osama bin Laden by U.S. special forces earlier this month.
ref: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan mendakwa bertanggungjawab terhadap serangan itu; jurucakap berkata ia merupakan satu serangan balas dendam atas pembunuhan Osama bin Laden oleh pasukan khas Amerika Syarikat awal bulan ini.

src: "It was the revenge of martyrdom of Osama bin Laden," the spokesperson said.
ref: Ia adalah membalas dendam syahid Osama bin Laden, kata jurucakap itu.

src: "It was the proof that we are still united and powerful."
ref: "Ini adalah bukti bahawa kita masih bersatu dan kuat."

src: The group warned after the death of bin Laden that they would attack Pakistani military targets.
ref: Kumpulan itu memberi amaran selepas kematian bin Laden bahawa mereka akan menyerang sasaran tentera Pakistan.

src: With the actual poll only days away, Thailand's Administrative Court has ruled against a new requirement introduced by the country's Election Commission.
ref: Dengan pengundian sebenar hanya sehari lagi, Mahkamah Pentadbiran Thailand telah memutuskan tidak menyebelahi keperluan baru yang diperkenalkan oleh Suruhanjaya Pilihan Raya di negara ini.

src: Voters will not be forced to complete ballots with a rubber stamp and may instead use a pen.
ref: Pengundi tidak akan dipaksa untuk melengkapkan kertas undi dengan setem getah dan sebaliknya boleh menggunakan pen.

src: Ruling that the change to require the use of a rubber stamp is in contravention of election law, Judge Anuwat Tharasawaeng highlighted that election law does not mandate how a mark must be made on the ballot.
ref: Keputusan mahkamah memerlukan penggunaan setem getah adalah dengan melanggar undang-undang pilihan raya, Hakim Anuwat Tharasawaeng menekankan bahawa undang-undang pilihan raya tidak memberi mandat bagaimana tanda hendaklah dibuat pada kertas undi.

src: A rainy day in Victoria, the provincial capital of British Columbia, failed to dampen the spirits of protesting teachers and their labour union supporters on Monday as thousands turned out to make their voices heard and, incidentally, shut down the city's transportation services.
ref: Hari hujan di Victoria, ibu kota wilayah British Columbia, gagal mematahkan semangat membantah guru dan penyokong kesatuan sekerja mereka pada hari Isnin kerana beribu-ribu membuat suara mereka didengari dan, secara kebetulan, menutup perkhidmatan pengangkutan di bandar ini.

src: The local transit union was not involved in the strike, their offices were picketed by striking Telus workers.
ref: Kesatuan transit tempatan tidak terlibat dalam mogok, pejabat-pejabat mereka berpiket dengan menarik pekerja Telus.

src: Across northern B.C. thousands of Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) members are off the job in solidarity with the teachers.
ref: Di seluruh B.C. utara beribu-ribu ahli Pekerja Awam Kanada Kesatuan (Cupe) berada di luar kerja dalam perpaduan dengan guru.

src: In Prince George a rally is planned to be held in front of the office of Education Minister Shirley Bond.
ref: Di Prince George perhimpunan dirancang akan diadakan di hadapan pejabat Menteri Pelajaran Shirley Bond.

src: "If solutions aren't found, on Wednesday of this week, another massive shutdown in a different area of this province will take place," shouted Jim Sinclair, B.C. Federation of Labour president, to a crowd gathered on the lawn of the Legislature yesterday.
ref: "Jika penyelesaian tidak ditemui, pada hari Rabu minggu ini, satu lagi penutupan besar-besaran di kawasan yang berbeza di wilayah ini akan berlaku," jerit Jim Sinclair, B.C. Presiden Persekutuan Buruh kepada orang ramai yang berkumpul di rumput Badan Perundangan semalam.

src: Inside, the opposition NDP used Question Period to repeatedly probe the ruling Liberal party's decision to not speak with the BC Teacher's Federation (BCTF).
ref: Di dalam, pembangkang NDP gunakan Tempoh Soalan untuk berkali-kali menyiasat keputusan parti Liberal pemerintah untuk tidak bercakap dengan Persekutuan Guru BC (BCTF).

src: Carol James asked Gordon Campbell what the difference was between this strike and that held by the Hospital Union (HU) in 2004 - also an illegal strike.
ref: Carol James meminta Gordon Campbell apa perbezaan adalah antara mogok ini dan yang diadakan oleh Hospital Union (HU) pada tahun 2004 - juga demonstrasi haram.

src: The Premier's response was that he personally did not negotiate with the HU, and the rule of law was supreme: teachers must return to the classroom before negotiations over a bargaining process for next year's contract may begin.
ref: Sambutan Premier adalah bahawa dia secara peribadi tidak berunding dengan HU, dan kedaulatan undang-undang adalah tertinggi: guru perlu kembali ke bilik darjah sebelum rundingan mengenai proses tawar-menawar untuk kontrak tahun depan boleh mula.

src: The strike is back in court again this week, with Supreme Court Judge Brenda Brown saying she will rule Friday on requests the union be slapped with additional fines for refusing to call off the strike after the civil contempt of court ruling last week.
ref: Mogok itu kembali dalam mahkamah sekali lagi minggu ini, dengan Hakim Mahkamah Agung Brenda Brown berkata dia akan memerintah Jumaat kepada permintaan kesatuan dapat dikenakan denda tambahan kerana enggan menamatkan mogok selepas menghina sivil keputusan mahkamah minggu lalu.

src: The union and leaders may also face criminal charges after the government appointed Len Doust as an independent special prosecutor to assess whether criminal contempt charges may be brought.
ref: Kesatuan dan pemimpin juga mungkin menghadapi tuduhan jenayah selepas kerajaan dilantik Len Doust sebagai pendakwa khas bebas untuk menilai sama ada tuduhan menghina mahkamah jenayah boleh bawa.

src: India's former External Affairs Minister Natwar Singh has, for the first time, been directly accused by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) for his involvement in the Iraq oil scam.
ref: Bekas Menteri Hal Ehwal Luar India Natwar Singh, buat kali pertama, dituduh secara langsung oleh Direktorat Penguatkuasaan (ED) kerana terlibat dalam penipuan minyak di Iraq.

src: The ED, which is responsible for enforcing foreign exchange control laws, has alleged that Singh, along with his son Jagat Singh and three others, acquired foreign exchange worth $8.9 lakh illegally.
ref: ED, yang bertanggungjawab untuk menguatkuasakan undang-undang kawalan pertukaran asing, telah mendakwa Singh, bersama-sama dengan anaknya Jagat Singh dan tiga yang lain, yang memperolehi pertukaran asing bernilai $ 8.9 lakh secara haram.

src: The 18-page show-cause notice issued by the ED says the money was acquired by the accused, in violation of U.N regulations, in exchange for two oil contracts awarded to Iraq's State Oil Marketing Organisation (SOMO).
ref: 18 muka surat tunjuk sebab notis yang dikeluarkan oleh ED berkata wang yang telah diperolehi oleh tertuduh, yang melanggar peraturan PBB, sebagai pertukaran untuk dua kontrak minyak diberikan kepada Minyak Negeri Pertubuhan Pemasaran Iraq (Somo).

src: Of the $8,90,000, $7,48,550 was allegedly transferred by them to an account in the Jordan National Bank, the remaining $1,46,247.23, which was the commission for the oil-contracts, was deposited with Barclays Bank, in the Channel Islands.
ref: Daripada $8,90,000, $7,48,550 didakwa dipindahkan oleh mereka untuk akaun dalam sungai Yordan Bank Negara, baki $1,46,247.23, merupakan komisen bagi minyak-kontrak, telah disimpan dengan Barclays Bank, dalam Kepulauan Channel.

src: The money was transferred to an account in the name of Indus Trading Company, which itself is owned by Andaleeb Sehgal, a friend of Mr. Singh.
ref: Wang telah dipindahkan ke akaun atas nama Indus Trading Company, yang itu sendiri dimiliki oleh Andaleeb Sehgal, sahabat Mr Singh.

src: The accused are required to respond to the show-cause notice (issued on the 2nd of September), which Natwar says is an attempt by the ED to "defame" him, within 30 days.
ref: Tertuduh perlu untuk bertindak balas terhadap tunjuk sebab notis (yang dikeluarkan pada 2 September), yang Natwar berkata adalah satu percubaan oleh ED untuk "memfitnah" beliau, dalam masa 30 hari.

src: The independent Pathak Commission's report had stated that there was "no material evidence to show that Natwar Singh derived any financial or other personal benefits from the contracts."
ref: Laporan Suruhanjaya Pathak bebas telah menyatakan bahawa terdapat "tiada bukti bahan untuk menunjukkan bahawa Natwar Singh memperolehi apa-apa faedah kewangan peribadi atau lain-lain daripada kontrak."

src: A new strain of Avian Flu or Bird Flu has been discovered in China and has also infected some humans.
ref: Stren baru selesema burung atau flu burung telah ditemui di China dan juga telah menjangkiti beberapa manusia.

src: The virus also "spreads fast" and has covered a "big geographic region" according to Chinese health officials.
ref: Virus ini juga "merebak cepat" dan telah meliputi satu "kawasan geografi besar" menurut pegawai-pegawai kesihatan Cina.

src: It is not known how dangerous the new virus is and whether it is stronger or deadlier than the current H5N1 virus.
ref: Ia adalah tidak diketahui betapa bahayanya virus baru dan sama ada ia adalah lebih kuat atau lebih membawa maut daripada virus H5N1.

src: Despite being detected in humans, no evidence has turned up to suggest that the virus can be spread easily from human to human.
ref: Walaupun dikesan pada manusia, tiada bukti yang telah hadir untuk mencadangkan bahawa virus ini boleh merebak dengan mudah dari manusia kepada manusia.

src: "The new variant doesn't indicate any increased risk for people other than the fact it seems to be pretty widespread," said World Health Organization's [WHO] Global Influenza Program, which is located in Zurich, Switzerland, Doctor Michael L. Perdue.
ref: "Varian baru tidak menunjukkan apa-apa risiko yang tinggi kepada orang lain daripada fakta ia seolah-olah menjadi agak meluas," kata [WHO] Program Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia Global Influenza, yang terletak di Zurich, Switzerland, Doktor Michael L. Perdue.

src: "This virus seemed to spread very fast over a big geographic region."
ref: "Virus ini seolah-olah untuk merebak dengan pantas di rantau geografi yang besar."

src: "However, we don't have any evidence to show whether this virus is more dangerous or less dangerous than any other H5N1 viruses," said State Key Laboratory of Emerging Infectious Diseases at the University of Hong Kong in China director, Yi Guan.
ref: "Bagaimanapun, kita tidak mempunyai apa-apa bukti untuk menunjukkan sama ada virus ini adalah lebih berbahaya atau kurang berbahaya daripada apa-apa virus H5N1," kata Negeri Makmal Utama Emerging Penyakit Berjangkit di Universiti Hong Kong di pengarah China, Yi Guan.

src: The strain was discovered during April and June of 2006 in China's Fujian Province when Guan's team examined ducks, chickens, geese and other birds at a market in the province.
ref: Stren itu ditemui semasa April dan Jun 2006 di Wilayah Fujian China apabila pasukan Guan diperiksa itik, ayam, angsa dan burung lain di sebuah pasar di wilayah itu.

src: At least 95% of the birds Guan and his team looked at were infected with the new strain and vaccines formulated to fight the H5N1 virus have not worked.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 95% daripada burung Guan dan pasukannya kelihatan di dijangkiti oleh stren baru dan vaksin digubal untuk melawan virus H5N1 tidak bekerja.

src: "This novel variant may have become dominant ... because it was not as easily affected as other strains by the avian vaccine used to prevent H5 infection."
ref: "Varian novel mungkin telah menjadi dominan...kerana ia bukan sebagai mudah terjejas kerana strain lain dengan vaksin burung digunakan untuk mencegah jangkitan H5."

src: The team is continuing surveillance on the area where the strain was discovered and according to Guan the virus "is not causing widespread infection outside of our surveillance area" but the new strain is reported in Thailand, Laos, Hong Kong and Malaysia.
ref: Pasukan itu teruskan pemantauan ke atas kawasan di mana stren itu ditemui dan menurut Guan virus "tidak menyebabkan jangkitan meluas di luar kawasan pengawasan kami" tetapi tekanan yang baru dilaporkan di Thailand, Laos, Hong Kong dan Malaysia.

src: Scientists also say that current vaccines used in birds for the H5N1 virus might have caused the new strain to develop.
ref: Saintis juga mengatakan bahawa vaksin sekarang yang digunakan dalam burung untuk virus H5N1 mungkin telah menyebabkan ketegangan baru untuk berkembang.

src: On October 14, 2008, Canadians will be heading to the polls for the federal election.
ref: Pada 14 Oktober 2008, Kanada akan menuju ke pusat pengundian bagi pilihan raya persekutuan.

src: Christian Heritage Party candidate Steven Elgersma is standing for election in the riding of Haldimand—Norfolk.
ref: Calon Parti Christian Heritage Steven Elgersma menawarkan diri untuk pilihan raya di riding Haldimand-Norfolk.

src: Wikinews contacted Steven Elgersma, to talk about the issues facing Canadians, and what they and their party would do to address them.
ref: Wikinews menghubungi Steven Elgersma, untuk bercakap tentang isu-isu yang dihadapi oleh Kanada, dan apa yang mereka dan parti mereka akan lakukan untuk menanganinya.

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: Wikinews sedang dalam proses untuk menghubungi setiap calon, dalam setiap perjalanan di seluruh negara, tidak kira jalur politik mereka.

src: All interviews are conducted over e-mail, and interviews are published unedited, allowing candidates to impart their full message to our readers, uninterrupted.
ref: Semua wawancara dijalankan dalam e-mel, dan temu bual yang disiarkan tanpa disunting, membolehkan calon untuk menyampaikan mesej penuh kepada pembaca kami, tanpa gangguan.

src: Fiji's national airline Air Pacific has now officially returned to its original name: Fiji Airways.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan negara Fiji Air Pacific kini secara rasmi kembali kepada nama asalnya: Fiji Airways.

src: Fiji Airways adopted the Air Pacific name in 1971, slightly prior to its first international flight on June 3, 1973.
ref: Fiji Airways memakai nama Air Pacific pada tahun 1971, sedikit sebelum penerbangan antarabangsa pertamanya pada 3 Jun 1973.

src: The re-brand was described by interim CEO Aubrey Swift as allowing the airline to align itself "closer with Fiji as a destination".
ref: Penjenamakan semula digambarkan oleh Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif interim Aubrey Swift sebagai membolehkan syarikat penerbangan itu untuk menyelaraskan dirinya "lebih dekat dengan Fiji sebagai destinasi."

src: The name change is designed in part to reduce the confusion which surrounded the name Air Pacific.
ref: Perubahan nama direka sebahagiannya mengurangkan kekeliruan yang dikelilingi nama Air Pacific.

src: Swift noted that "Air Pacific just didn’t resonate with our customers" and said that same people "thought we were an air conditioning company".
ref: Swift berkata "Air Pacific hanya tidak bergema dengan pelanggan-pelanggan kami" dan berkata bahawa orang yang sama "fikir kami sebuah syarikat penghawa dingin."

src: Along with the name change, the airline has redesigned its website, and changed the name of each of its classes of service.
ref: Bersama-sama dengan perubahan nama, syarikat penerbangan itu telah direka bentuk semula laman webnya, dan menukar nama setiap kelas dan syarat perkhidmatan.

src: Pacific Voyager and Tabua Class have been replaced with economy and business class respectively.
ref: Pacific Voyager dan Tabua Kelas telah digantikan dengan kelas ekonomi dan perniagaan masing-masing.

src: The airline has also introduced plans to overhaul its fleet of older Boeing 747s with Airbus A330s.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu juga telah memperkenalkan rancangan untuk membaik pulih armada 747 Boeing lebih tua dengan Airbus A330.

src: It has said that the completion of this overhaul and the re-branding efforts will be completed by the end of the year.
ref: Ia telah berkata bahawa penyiapan baik pulih ini dan usaha penjenamaan semula akan siap pada akhir tahun ini.

src: The airline's new brand-mark and livery features a masi design created by Fijian artist, Makereta Matemosi.
ref: Jenama-tanda baru syarikat penerbangan itu dan livery mempunyai reka bentuk masi dicipta oleh artis Fiji, Makereta Matemosi.

src: The new identity is to "symbolises the airline's new identity and epitomises all that Fiji Airways represents."
ref: Identiti baru adalah untuk "melambangkan identiti baru syarikat penerbangan itu dan melambangkan semua yang Fiji Airways mewakili."

src: "It is authentic, distinctive, and true to the airline's Fijian roots", the airline said.
ref: "Ia adalah sahih, tersendiri, dan selari dengan akar Fiji syarikat penerbangan itu," kata syarikat penerbangan itu.

src: Food deliveries from the RMT were allowed into the Vestas plant in Newport, England yesterday, but were cut off by Vestas management this afternoon.
ref: Penghantaran makanan dari RMT diberi kebenaran untuk masuk ke loji Vestas di Newport, England semalam, tetapi telah dihalang oleh pentadbiran Vestas tengahari tadi.

src: Protesters at the Isle of Wight factory celebrated the delivery of supermarket bags filled with groceries, which entered with a police escort.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan di kilang Pulau Wight menyambut penghantaran beg pasaraya yang diisi barang-barang runcit, yang mana memasuki dengan iringan pihak polis.

src: This morning, the sixteen remaining occupiers were told to prepare a list of items for future deliveries.
ref: Pagi ini, enam belas baki penghuni telah diberitahu supaya menyediakan senarai barang-barang untuk penghantaran akan datang.

src: But, according to "Mark", an occupier in the Vestas plant, this afternoon Vestas management reversed their decision, terming the August 1 food delivery a one-time "goodwill gesture" and saying food would no longer be allowed in.
ref: Tetapi, mengikut kepada "Mark", penghuni di loji Vestas, pihak pentadbiran Vestas menterbalikkan keputusan mereka tengahari tadi, mengatakan penghantaran makanan satu kali pada 1 Ogos "tanda muhibbah" dan mengatakan tiada lagi makanan yang dibenarkan masuk.

src: The food delivery followed a formal complaint by the RMT that denying the occupiers food was a violation of their human rights.
ref: Penghantaran makanan mengikut aduan rasmi daripada RMT yang menafikan pembekalan makanan adalah mencabuli hak-hak kemanusiaan.

src: The people inside the factory have been conducting their occupation since July 20, in protest against the closure of the factory, which produces wind turbine blades for the generation of wind power, and the loss of 625 jobs in the Isle of Wight and nearby areas.
ref: Mereka-mereka yang di dalam kilang mengendalikan kerja mereka sejak 20 Julai, dalam bantahan menentang penutupan syarikat tersebut, yang mana prosedur membina kipas turbin untuk bekalan tenaga angin, dan kehilangan sebanyak 625 pekerjaan di Pulau Wight dan kawasan berhampiran.

src: Mark went on to praise the "brave people" who have circumvented the security ring around the plant in order to get food and other items to the occupiers.
ref: Mark pergi untuk memuji "orang yang berani" yang mana telah mengelakkan pusingan keselamatan di sekitar loji untuk mendapat makanan dan barang-barang lain untuk para penduduk.

src: An electric kettle thrown at the end of a rope up to the occupiers is said to be working well.
ref: Pemanas air elektronik diletakkan di hujung tali yang dihujungnya membawa kepada para penduduk itu dikatakan berjalan dengan baik.

src: Mark also noted that Louise Christian, a prominent British human rights lawyer, is now representing the Vestas occupiers.
ref: Mark juga menekankan bahawa Louise Christian, peguam hak-hak kemanusiaan British yang cukup menonjol, kini sedang mewakili penduduk-penduduk di Vestas.

src: While the number of occupiers at the Vestas plant — originally nearly thirty, now only sixteen — have dwindled, Mark says the ones who remain are "very determined" and furthermore hold no ill will toward their co-workers who have left the occupation.
ref: Sementara bilangan penduduk di loji Vestas - asalnya seramai hampir tiga puluh, kini hanya enam belas - kini semakin berkurangan, Mark berkata mereka yang tinggal adalah "sangat bertekad" dan pada masa yang sama tidak sakit hati terhadap rakan sekerja mereka yang telah meninggalkan perkerjaan itu.

src: In particular, the occupiers offered sympathy for Luke Paxton, who they say left the occupation due to a combination of personal issues and malnutrition brought on by the deprivation of food.
ref: Khususnya, penduduk menawarkan simpati untuk Luke Paxton, yang mana mereka katakan meninggalkan pekerjaan kerana kombinasi masalah peribadi dan malnutrisi akibat kekurangan makanan.

src: Paxton, Mark said, has the remaining occupiers' "full support" and continues to campaign for the Vestas workers.
ref: Mark berkata, Paxton, hanya tinggal penduduk "sokongan penuh" dan meneruskan kempen kepada pekerja di Vestas.

src: In contrast to claims that green socialist group Workers' Climate Action were behind the occupation, Mark presented a more nuanced picture: the Vestas workers' initial contacts were with veterans of the occupation of Visteon's auto parts plants, with the AWL, SWP and Socialist Party becoming involved later with "quite a big involvement" from all groups.
ref: Berbeza dengan dakwaan kumpulan sosialis hijau Tindakan Perubahan Pekerja berada di belakang pekerja, Mark mempersembahkan banyak gambar nuansa: Pekerja Vestas mulanya menghubungi pekerja berpengalaman di loji bahagian auto Visteon, dengan AWL, SWP dan Parti Sosialis yang kemudiannya terlibat "penglibatan yang agak besar" dari semua kumpulan.

src: Members of Workers' Climate Action attended Vestas workers' meetings and gave their opinions, but, Mark says, a committee organised by the workers and composed of workers was making all the decisions.
ref: Ahli Tindakan Perubahan Pekerja menghadiri mesyuarat pekerja Vestas dan memberi pendapat mereka, tetapi, Mark berkata, jawatankuasa diatur oleh para pekerja dan semua keputsan dibuat oleh para pekerja.

src: Mark also strongly rejected the support of Solidarity, a "nationalist trade union" closely associated with the BNP.
ref: Mark juga menolak keras sokongan Perpaduan, "kesatuan sekerja kebangsaan" yang berhubungan rapat dengan BNP.

src: In a July 24 statement, Solidarity backed the Vestas workers, with union executive member David Kerr saying "We are behind the Vestas workers 100 per cent.
ref: Dalam kenyataan pada 24 Julai, Perpaduan menyokong pekerja-pekerja Vestas, dengan ahli eksekutif kesatuan David Kerr berkata "Kami di belakang pekerja-pekerja Vestas 100 peratus.

src: Mark, in reply, told Wikinews: "We do not want their support...they go against a lot of the things people believe in here.
ref: Mark, untuk menjawab, memberitahu Wikinews: "Kami tidak mahu sokongan mereka...mereka mahu menentang banyak benda yang dipercayai orang di sini.

src: Most of the Vestas occupiers remain independent of trade unions, with only three of the sixteen people inside being members of any union.
ref: Kebanyakan penduduk Vestas kekal bebas dari kesatuan kebangsaan, dengan hanya tiga daripada enam belas orang di dalam menjadi ahli kepada mana-mana kesatuan.

src: Mark closed with a message of solidarity with the occupiers of two Thomas Cook branches in Dublin, Ireland, whose employees began a sit-in at their offices on Friday after the announcement of surprise closures.
ref: Mark menutup mesej perpaduan dengan penduduk dari dua cawangan Thomas Cook di Dublin, Ireland, di mana perkerjanya mula duduk di pejabat mereka pada Jumaat selepas pengumuman mengejut penutupan.

src: "Don't back down...do not be pushed around, do not be intimidated".
ref: "Jangan berundur...jangan jadi yang dipermainkan, jangan jadi yang diancam."

src: The Vestas occupiers have also exchanged messages of solidarity with SsangYong Motor Company in South Korea.
ref: Penduduk Vestas juga telah bertukar-tukar mesej perpaduan dengan Syarikat Motor SsangYong di Korea Selatan.

src: Workers at SsangYong have been occupying their factory since May 22 in protest against a 36% cut in employees there.
ref: Pekerja di SsangYong telah pun memenuhi kilang mereka sejak 22 Mei dalam membantah ke atas 36% pengurangan pekerja di situ.

src: The occupation continues accompanied by a warning of increased union unrest in Britain.
ref: Kerja berterusan diikuti dengan amaran peningkatan pergolakan kesatuan di Britain.

src: Neil O'Brien of centre-right think tank Policy Exchange told The Daily Telegraph that, while labour unrest had increased, the current state of affairs is "nothing compared to what is going to happen once the brakes are slammed on public spending."
ref: Pertukaran Polisi pusat-kanan tangki berfikir Neil O'Brien memberitahu Telegraf Harian bahawa, di ketika pergolakan pekerja meningkat, keadaan semasa perhubungan adalah "tiada apa-apa berbanding dengan apa yang akan berlaku apabila tahanan dihempaskan ke atas penggunaan umum."

src: The Ministry of Defence has announced that a British soldier has been killed in an explosion in the Helmand Province of Afghanistan.
ref: Menteri Pertahanan telah mengumumkan bahawa seorang tentera British telah terbunuh dalam letupan di Wilayah Helmand di Afghanistan.

src: With this announcement, the total number of military personnel that has been killed in Afghanistan has now increased to 231.
ref: Dengan pemgumuman itu, jumlah anggota tentera yang telah terbunuh di Afghanistan kini meningkat kepada 231.

src: The man was killed on Saturday afternoon after an explosion near the town of Sangin.
ref: Lelaki itu terbunuh pada hari Sabtu tengahari selepas letupan berhampiran bandar Sangin.

src: He came from 2nd Battalion, The Rifles, and was serving with 4th Battalion, The Rifles.
ref: Beliau merupakan dari Batalion ke-2, The Rifles, dan berkhidmat untuk Batalion ke-4, The Rifles.

src: The soldier's family have now been informed of the death, the Ministry said.
ref: Keluarga tentera tersebut kini telah dimaklumkan mengenai kematian itu, kata Menteri.

src: Lieutenant Colonel David Wakefield is the spokesperson for Task Force Helmand.
ref: Leftenan Kolonel David Wakefield merupakan jurucakap bagi Pasukan Petugas Helmand.

src: "He died a soldier, doing his duty and among his fellow soldiers," he said.
ref: "Beliau mati sebagai seorang tentera, menjalankan tanggungjawabnya dan di antara rakan-rakan tenteranya," katanya.

src: A UCLA team, headed by Brian Naranjo, has observed the nuclear fusion of deuterium nuclei in a tabletop device.
ref: Pasukan UCLA, diketuai oleh Brian Naranjo, telah memerhatikan pelakuran nuklear untuk nukleus deuterium dalam peranti di atas meja.

src: The device uses a lithium tantalate (LiTaO3) pyroelectric crystal to ionize deuterium atoms and accelerate the ions towards a stationary erbium deuteride (ErD) target.
ref: Peranti itu menggunakan litium tantalate (LiTaO3) kristal pyroelektrik untuk mengionkan zarah deuterium dan mempercepatkan ion itu kearah matlamat erbium deutride pegun (ErD).

src: Fusion of two deuterium nuclei results in the emission of helium nuclei (alpha particles), neutrons and gamma rays.
ref: Pelakuran antara dua nuclei deuterium terhasilnya pencaran nuclei helium (partikel alpha), neutron dan sinaran gamma.

src: The team anticipates applications of the device as a tabletop neutron generator, or in "microthrusters" for space propulsion.
ref: Pasukan itu mengharapkan penggunaan peranti itu sebagai meja penjana neutron, atau dalam "microthrusters" untuk pendorong angkasa.

src: It is possible that there may be applications related to nuclear weapons, although this possibility is not discussed in the research paper.
ref: Tidak mustahil terdapat aplikasi yang berkaitan dengna senjata nuklear, walaupon kebarangkalian itu tidak dibincangkan di kertas penyelidikan.

src: This development is not related to earlier claims of tabletop fusion or "cold fusion" having been observed during sonoluminescence.
ref: Pembangunan ini tidak berkaitan dengan tuntutan awal di meja pelakuran atau "pelakuran sejuk" yang telah ditelilti semasa sonoluminescence.

src: In fact, the leader of the team behind this development was one of the main critics of earlier low-temperature fusion claims.
ref: Sebenarnya, ketua kepada kumpulan yang membangunkan itu merupakan seorang daripada pengkritik utama terhadap pelakuran suhu-rendah.

src: This device is not the first reliable tabletop fusion device; the Farnsworth-Hirsch fusor, developed in the early 1960s in the laboratory of Philo T. Farnsworth who was instrumental in developing television, is sold commercially as a neutron source.
ref: Peranti itu bukan yang peranti pelakuran meja pertama yang dipercayai; pelakur Farnsworth-Hirsch, diciptakan pada awal tahun 1960an dalam makmal Philio T. Farnsworth yang memainkan peranan penting dalam pembangunan televisyen, dijual secara komersial sebagai sumber neutron.

src: Research by Dr. Todd Rider of MIT suggests that the kind of non-equilibrium fusion produced in these sources will never be usable as an energy source (see his PhD thesis).
ref: Penyelidikan oleh Dr. Todd Rider dari MIT mencadangkan bahawa pelakuran tidak seimbang itu dihasilkan oleh sumber-sumber yang tidak boleh digunakan sebagai sumber tenaga (lihat tesis PhD beliau).

src: Irish airline Ryanair took a 12% slump in this morning’s trade, further intensifying concern about poor market conditions amid recessionary fears.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan Ireland Ryanair mengalami kemerosotan sebanyak 12% dalam perdagangan pagi ni, seterusnya mempergiatkan kebimbangan mengenai keadaan pasaran yang lemah di tengah-tengah kebimbangan kemelesetan.

src: Today, Ryanair announced a 27% drop in pre-tax profits in its third quarter net profits.
ref: Hari ini, Ryanair mengumumkan penurunan sebanyak 27% dalam keuntungan sebelum cukai bagi keuntungan bersih suku ketiga.

src: Further falls are predicted for the company in its next fiscal year.
ref: Penurunan seturusnya diramalkan bagi syarikat itu dalam tahun fiskal akan datang.

src: "With oil prices at $90 a barrel and fear of recession in the UK and many other European economies, the current outlook for the coming fiscal year is poor."
ref: "Dengan harga minyak pada $90 setong dan kebimbangan kemelesetan di UK dan ekonomi negara-negara Eropah yang lain, pandangan semasa bagi tahun fiskal yang akan datang adalah teruk."

src: "While it is impossible to accurately forecast full year fuel prices and yields this far in advance, there is now a significant chance that profits may decline next year," Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary cautioned.
ref: "Walaupun ianya mustahil untuk meramal dengan tepat harga bahan api tahun penuh dan hasil ini jauh lebih awal, kini terdapat satu kemungkinan besar bahawa keuntungan mungkin menurun tahun depan," CEO Ryanair Michael O'Leary memberi amaran.

src: Ryanair said that it is not hedged against oil price increases for the next fiscal year.
ref: Ryanair berkata bahawa ia tidak dilindungi terhadap kenaikan harga minyak untuk tahun fiskal akan datang.

src: However, Ryanair is not the only airline to suffer from the economic downturn.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Ryanair bukan satu-satunya syarikat penerbangan yang menderita daripada kemelesetan ekonomi.

src: However shrewd, Mr. O’Leary has plans to spend up to 200 million purchasing back shares in the company, which equates to 3% of the company share capital.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Encik O'Leary yang licik mempunyai rancangan untuk membelanjakan sehingga 200 juta membeli balik saham-saham dalam syarikat itu, yang bersamaan dengan 3% daripada modal saham syarikat.

src: The Free State Cheetahs and the Blue Bulls will meet next week in the 2006 Currie Cup final, South Africa's domestic club rugby competition.
ref: Free State Cheetahs dan Blue Bulls akan bertemu pada minggu ini di pusingan akhir Piala Currie 2006, pertandingan kelab ragbi tempatan Afrika Selatan.

src: The Bulls were the first to go through, winning the first semi final against rivals Western Province, and the Cheetahs won their semi against the Sharks.
ref: Pasukan Bull yang pertama dapat pergi, dengan memenangi separuh akhir pertama menentang Wilayah Barat, dah Cheetahs menang separuh akhir menetang Sharks.

src: The Blue Bulls hosted WP at home, at Loftus Versfeld in Pretoria.
ref: Bulls Biru menjadi tuan rumah terhadap WP, di Loftus Versfeld di Pretoria.

src: The Blue Bulls led WP 20 to nine at half time.
ref: Bulls Biru mengatasi WP 20 kepada sembilan pada separuh masa pertama.

src: The gap was closed to 23-16 in the second half, but the home team eventually ran away with the game, in the end, winning 45 points to 23.
ref: Jurang mata yang dekat kepada 23-16 padah separuh kedua, tetapi pasukan tuan rumah dengan sengaja melarikan diri dengan permainan tersebut, akhirnya, menang 45 mata kepada 23.

src: At the second semi-final at Bloemfontein, the Cheetahs hosted the Sharks at the Free State Stadium.
ref: Pada separuh akhir di Bloemfontein, Cheetahs menjadi tuan rumah kepada Sharks di Stadium Free State.

src: The Free State were up 17 to nil during the first half.
ref: Free State berjaya mengumpul sebanyak 17 berbanding dengan kosong pada separuh masa pertama.

src: The score was furthered to 24 points, but the Sharks' JP Pietersen scored minutes before the half finished to give the Sharks their first points, and the game went onto halftime, Cheetahs leading 24-7.
ref: Mata itu kemudian ditambah kepada 24 mata, tetapi JP Pietersen dari Sharks menjaringkan beberapa minit sebelum separuh masa tamat untuk memberikan Sharks mata pertama mereka, dan permainan diteruskan kepada separuh masa, Cheetahs mendahului dengan 24-7.

src: The Cheetahs will host the final next week, being the highest place finalist (first, the Blue Bulls were second).
ref: Cheetah akan menjadi tuan rumah untuk peringkat akhir minggu hadapan, menjadikan kedudukan paling tinggi peringkat akhir (pertama, Blue Bulls yang kedua).

src: The final will be the third Blue Bulls/Cheetahs affair in a row, and the fifth Blue Bulls appearance in a row.
ref: Peringkat akhir akan menjadi yang hubungan ketiga buat Blue Bulls/Cheetah dalam barisan, dan kelima buat Blue Bulls untuk penampilan di barisan.

src: Kenya's livestock minister, Mohammed Kuti, said today that cattle rustlers have killed eleven people near the central town of Isiolo.
