ref: Menteri penternakan Kenya, Mohammed Kuti, hari ini berkata bahawa pencuri lembu telah membunuh sebelas orang berhampiran bandar utama Isiolo.

src: Kuti, who is also the member of parliament for Isiolo, said the rustlers raided in a village in the area early in the day.
ref: Kuti, juga salah seorang ahli parlimen Isiolo, berkata bahawa pencuri itu membuat serbuan di kawasan kampung itu awal hari ini.

src: "The eleven people were killed when rustlers stormed a village in Kisima area early this morning," he commented.
ref: "Sebelas orang dibunuh semasa pencuri menyerbu kampung di daerah Kisima awal pagi ini," beliau menyambung.

src: The state-owned Kenya Broadcasting Corporation puts the number of attackers at 300, and stated that they stole an unknown number of livestock.
ref: Perbadanan Penyiaran milik Kenya meletakkan jumlah penyerang sebanyak 300, dan menyatakan bahawa mereka mencuri ternakan yang jumlahnya masih tidak diketahui.

src: Cattle rustling is common in Kenya, and the extended drought has heightened competition for scarce sources of food.
ref: Mencuri lembu merupakan kebiasaan di Kenya, dan kemarau panjang mengakibatkan persaingan tinggi untuk sumber makanan yang sukar didapati.

src: In mid-September, 30 people were killed in a shootout as rustlers from the Pokot tribe attacked the Samburu tribe and made off with hundreds of cattle.
ref: Pada pertengahan September, 30 orang terbunuh dalam penembakan apabila pencuri dari puak Pokot menyerang puak Samburu dan melarikan beratus ekor lembu.

src: Sri Lankan government troops are claiming their first significant victory since the peace accord went into effect four years ago, capturing the rebel-held enclave of Sempur in the country's embattled east.
ref: Askar kerajaan Sri Lanka menuntut kemenangan besar pertama meraka sejak perjanjian damai telah berkuat kuasa empat tahun yang lalu, mengambil semula wilayah yang dikuasai pemberontak Sempur di wilayah timur negara ini.

src: "We captured the main Sampur artillery position of the Tigers, We suspect they dismantled the guns or pulled them back.
ref: "Kami menangkap kedudukan utama meriam Sampur Tiger, kami mengesyaki mereka menghapuskan senjata api atau menarik mereka balik.

src: Rambukwella noted that the government's troops received little or no resistance as they took the 10-km swath of land.
ref: Rambukwella menyatakan bahawa askar kerajaan menerima sedikit atau langsung tidak ada rintangan sepanjang mengambil 10-km petak tanah.

src: Overnight shelling and mortar attacks from the Tamil Tigers, the main rebel group involved in the fighting, killed one government soldier and injured several others.
ref: Serangan semalaman dan serangan mortar dari Tamil Tigers, kumpulan pemberontak utama yang terlibat dalam pergaduhan, membunuh seorang askar kerajaan dan mencederakan beberapa yang lain.

src: The objective of the incursion, said Rambukwella, was to neutralize the use of three Tamil Tiger guns aimed on government troops to the south.
ref: Objektif pencerobohan ini, kata Rambukwella, adalah untuk menuetralkan penggunaan tiga pistol Tamil tigers yang ditujukan kepada askar kerajaan di selatan.

src: Tamil Tigers are claiming that they have not fled the area, and are continuing to engage government troops.
ref: Tamil tigers menuntut bahawa mereka tidak pergi ke kawasan berkenaan, dan akan terus menyambung melibatkan diri dalam askar kerajaan.

src: On a CNN Wolf Blitzer Late Edition broadcast Sunday, U.S. Senators George Allen (R-VA) and Barbara Boxer (D-CA) both told Blitzer that in the furore created by the protest they believe President Bush should personally meet with Cindy Sheehan.
ref: Pada Edisi Lewat CNN Wolf Blitzer siaran Ahad, Senator U.S. George Allen (R-VA) dan Barbara Boxer (D-CA) keduanya memberitahu Blitzer bahawa dalam kekecohan yang dibuat oleh pemberontak yang mereka percaya Presiden Bush seharusnya berjumpa dengan Cindy Sheehan secara peribadi.

src: She is the mother of a soldier son killed in Iraq in April 2004, and leader of a protest march now camped near the presidential ranch in Crawford, Texas.
ref: Beliau ialah ibu kepada askar lelaki yang terbunuh di Iraq pada April 2004, dan ketua kepada perbarisan pemberontak sekarang bertumpu berdekatan dengan ladang presiden di Crawford, Texas.

src: After returning from commercial break, Blitzer told his guests that CNN had just received a news bulletin from the White House.
ref: Selepas pulang dari rehat iklan, Blitzer memberitahu tetamunya bahawa CNN baru menerima buletin berita dari Rumah Putih.

src: The bulletin said that Bush had met previously with Sheehan in the summer of 2004.
ref: Buletin itu berkata bahawa Bush telah berjumpa dengan Sheehan sebelum ini pada musim panas 2004.

src: Both Senators and Blitzer withheld further comment on the matter during the remaining segment of the show.
ref: Kedua-dua Senator dan Blitzer menahan komen pada perkara tersebut semasa segmen seterusnya acara itu.

src: Later that day, Cindy Sheehan herself appeared on CNN Sunday with Blitzer and said she did meet with Bush in Seattle with fifteen or sixteen other families.
ref: Selepas hari itu, Cindy Sheehan menunjukkan diri sendiri di CNN Ahad bersama Blitzer dan berkata beliau ada bertemu dengan Bush di Seattle bersama lima belas atau enam belas keluarga yang lain.

src: She defended her current protest by saying, "The whole meeting was simply bizarre and disgusting."
ref: Beliau mempertahankan bantahan terkini beliau dengan berkata" Keseluruhan pertemuan sangat pelik dan menjijikkan."

src: Sheehan said that Bush entered the meeting chamber with an insensitive comment to those present, "Who we'all honorin' today?"
ref: Sheehan berkata bahawa Bush masuk ke bilik perbincangan dengan komen yang tidak sensitif kepada yang hadir, "Siapa yang kita raikan hari ini?"

src: She added, "His mouth kept moving, but there was nothing in his eyes or anything else about him that showed me he really cared or had any real compassion at all."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Mulut beliau sentiasa bergerak, tetapi tiada apa di bawah mata atau apa-apa sahaja tentang beliau yang menunjukkan kepada saya beliau betul-betul kisah atau rasa belas kasihan langsung."

src: "This is a human being totally disconnected from humanity and reality."
ref: "Ini ialah manusia yang tidak ada langsung dari sifat kemanusiaan dan realiti."

src: The angry mother of the fallen U.S. soldier on Saturday led a protest march of nearly 50 on the Bush ranch.
ref: Ibu yang marah terhadap askar A.S. yang gugur pada Sabtu itu mengetuai himpuanan bantahan terhadap hampir 50 orang di ladang Bush.

src: Cindy Sheehan of Vacaville, California demanded, but was denied, the chance to speak with Bush and personally ask him, "'Why did you kill my son? "
ref: Cindy Sheehan dari Vacaville, California menuntut, tetapi telah ditolak, untuk peluang bercakap dengan Bush dan secara peribadi menanyakan, "Kenapa awak membunuh anak saya?"

src: "What did my son die for?"
ref: "Anak saya mati untuk apa?"

src: Sheehan was met outside the ranch, after progress of the march was stopped by Texas troopers and the Secret Service, by national security adviser Steve Hadley and deputy White House chief of staff Joe Hagin.
ref: Sheehan bertemu luar ladang, selepas kemajuan perarakan telah dihentikan oleh askar Texas dan Servis Sulit, oleh penasihat keselamatan kebangsaan Steve Hadley dan timbalan ketua staf Rumah Putih Joe Hagin.

src: Sheehan, unsatisfied with the meeting, vowed to remain camped outside the ranch until she is granted a personal interview with Bush.
ref: Sheehan, tidak berpuas hati dengan perjumpaan, berjanji akan berkhemah diluar ladang sehingga beliau diberikan temuduga peribadi bersama Bush.

src: Meanwhile, Bush arrived in Albuqerque, New Mexico Monday where he signed into law the new energy bill.
ref: Sementara itu, Bush tiba di Albuqerque, New Mexico Isnin tadi dimana beliau menandatangani undang-undang tentang tenaga baru.

src: He will travel back to his Texas ranch this week to meet with his defense and economic advisers, then later, he will travel to Illinois to sign a highway bill.
ref: Beliau akan terbang balik ke ladang Texas minggu ini untuk berjumpa dengan pensihat pertahanan dan ekonomi, kemudian beliau akan pergi ke Illinois untuk menandatangani rang lebuh raya.

src: Cindy Sheehan said Sunday that she plans to hold the roadside peace protest near Bush's ranch until he talks to her again.
ref: Cindy Sheehan berkata Ahad ini beliau bercadang untuk mengadakan bantahan aman tepi jalan berdekatan ladang Bush sehingga beliau bercakap dengannya lagi.

src: Cindy's current comments are a drastic change from her comments in a 2004 interview with THE REPORTER of Vacaville, CA.
ref: Komen terkini Cindy terlalu drastik untuk mengubah dari komennya pada temuduga 2004 dengan THE REPORTER di Vacaville, CA.

src: "I now know he's sincere about wanting freedom for the Iraqis," Cindy said after their meeting.
ref: "Saya tahu beliau ikhlas tentang mahukan kebebasan dari Iraq," Cindy berkata selepas pertemuan.

src: "I know he's sorry and feels some pain for our loss."
ref: "Saya tahu beliau rasa bersalah dan rasa sakit atas kehilangan kita."

src: Xtra, owned by New Zealand telecommunication monopoly company Telecom, has created a joint venture between themselves and Yahoo!7, creating Yahoo Xtra.
ref: Xtra, yang dimiliki oleh syarikat New Zealand yang monopoli telekomunikasi Telecom, telah mewujudkan satu usaha sama antara mereka dan Yahoo!7, mewujudkan Yahoo Xtra.

src: Yahoo!7 is the joint venture between Yahoo! and Australian network, Seven.
ref: Yahoo!7 adalah usaha sama antara Yahoo! dan rangkaian Australia, Seven.

src: The joint venture replaces the current and long-lasting partnership between Microsoft and Xtra, called XtraMSN.
ref: Usaha sama menggantikan kerjasama semasa dan berkekalan lama antara Microsoft dan Xtra, yang dipanggil XtraMSN.

src: The current partnership's contract will expire at the end of this year.
ref: Kontrak perkongsian semasa akan tamat pada akhir tahun ini.

src: Telecom chose to change the partnership because Yahoo! has worked together with BT Group, Verizon and Rogers Communications.
ref: Telecom memilih untuk menukar perkongsian itu kerana Yahoo! telah bekerjasama dengan BT Group, Verizon dan Rogers Communications.

src: The new site, along with new online content will go online on around March 1, 2007.
ref: Laman web baru, bersama-sama dengan kandungan dalam talian baru akan dipaparkan dalam talian pada sekitar 1 Mac 2007.

src: The partnership will result in Yahoo!7 taking 51% control of the partnership and Xtra taking the remaining 49%.
ref: Perkongsian itu akan menyebabkan Yahoo!7 mengambil kawalan 51% daripada perkongsian dan Xtra mengambil baki 49%.

src: Kevin Kenrick, chief operating officer of Telecom, said that they will now be able to target the underdeveloped online advertising community.
ref: Kevin Kenrick, Ketua Pegawai Operasi Telekom, berkata mereka kini akan boleh mensasarkan komuniti pengiklanan dalam talian yang kurang maju.

src: "We see there is a fantastic opportunity to grow online advertising and the share of the online market."
ref: "Kami melihat terdapat peluang yang hebat untuk memperkembangkan pengiklanan dalam talian dan bahagian pasaran dalam talian."

src: "Online advertising in New Zealand is getting to a tipping point of growth where there is a critical mass of online connections, broadband connections and an increase in the amount of time people are spending online."
ref: "Pengiklanan dalam talian di New Zealand sedang berkembang ke arah titik pertumbuhan di mana terdapat lebih ramai sambungan talian, sambungan jalur lebar dan peningkatan dalam jumlah masa orang menghabiskan dalam talian."

src: When the new site is launched, it will include a range of news, sport, weather, enhanced e-mail spam and virus protection, photo sharing, and internet radio.
ref: Apabila laman baru dilancarkan, ia akan termasuk pelbagai berita, sukan, cuaca, spam e-mel dipertingkatkan dan perlindungan virus, perkongsian gambar, dan radio internet.

src: Theresa Gattung, chief executive of Telecom, said: "The Yahoo Xtra joint venture will provide New Zealanders with access to the world's best online services in a localised way."
ref: Theresa Gattung, Ketua Eksekutif Telekom, berkata: "Yahoo Xtra bersama ini menyediakan orang New Zealand dengan akses ke atas perkhidmatan dalam talian yang terbaik di dunia dengan cara tempatan."

src: Ian Smith, chief executive of Yahoo!7, said: "The company was achieving market growth of online advertising of between 50 and 60 per cent a year in Australia and believed it could do the same in New Zealand."
ref: Ian Smith, Ketua Eksekutif Yahoo!7, berkata: "Syarikat ini telah mencapai pertumbuhan pasaran pengiklanan dalam talian di antara 50 dan 60 peratus setahun di Australia dan percaya ia boleh melakukan perkara yang sama di New Zealand."

src: He said that the partnership will give them a great opportunity to showcase its tools, technology and platforms in New Zealand.
ref: Dia berkata, kerjasama itu akan memberikan mereka peluang yang baik untuk mempamerkan alat-alat, teknologi dan platform di New Zealand.

src: Mr Kenrick said that the reason they had gotten a partnership with Yahoo!7 was that it is very difficult for a small player to develop its services in a New Zealand size market.
ref: Mr Kenrick berkata sebab mereka mendapat kerjasama dengan Yahoo!7 adalah bahawa adalah amat sukar untuk pemain kecil untuk membangunkan perkhidmatan dalam pasaran yang bersaiz New Zealand.

src: One other online company Xtra had considered for the partnership was Google, among others.
ref: Salah satu syarikat dalam talian yang lain Xtra telah dipertimbangkan untuk kerjasama itu adalah Google, antara yang lain.

src: The reason they chose Yahoo!7 over other companies was because Yahoo!7 has the top position in big fields such as TV and video.
ref: Sebabnya mereka memilih Yahoo!7 daripada syarikat lain adalah kerana Yahoo!7 mempunyai kedudukan tertinggi dalam bidang besar seperti TV dan video.

src: Mr Kenrick said: "The whole area of content management is one we thought would benefit from others with greater expertise and more scope."
ref: Mr Kenrick berkata: "Keseluruhan kawasan pengurusan kandungan adalah kami berfikir ia akan mendapat manfaat daripada orang lain yang mempunyai kepakaran yang lebih besar dan lebih banyak ruang."

src: Protests have continued after Manchester United defeated Lille in the Champions League round of 16.
ref: Protes telah berterusan selepas Manchester United menewaskan Lille di pusingan Liga Juara-Juara 16.

src: A free kick by Ryan Giggs in the second half of the game caused great controversy, as Lille was setting up their wall as the ball went into the back of the net.
ref: Satu sepakan percuma oleh Ryan Giggs pada separuh masa kedua permainan menimbulkan kontroversi yang hebat, kerana Lille telah menubuhkan pertahanan mereka semasa bola masuk ke dalam jaring.

src: Lille players nearly walked off the pitch at the time, but they were goaded back onto the field, and the game ended 1 - 0 for Manchester United.
ref: Pemain-pemain Lille hampir berjalan keluar padang pada masa itu, tetapi mereka telah dirangsang kembali ke padang, dan permainan berakhir 1-0 untuk Manchester United.

src: Lille made one protest to UEFA, asking for a replay of the match, but the appeal was turned down, and the decision of referee Eric Braamhaar stood for the time.
ref: Lille membuat satu bantahan kepada UEFA, meminta ulangan perlawanan, tetapi rayuan itu telah ditolak, dan keputusan pengadil Eric Braamhaar kekal begitu.

src: Lille has made a second protest, claiming a technical error on the referee's part, as the kick was taken without the whistle being blown.
ref: Lille telah membuat bantahan kedua, dengan mendakwa kesilapan teknikal di pihak pengadil, kerana sepakan itu diambil tanpa wisel ditiup.

src: UEFA has rejected their appeal again, saying no proof of a technical error has been presented.
ref: UEFA telah menolak rayuan mereka sekali lagi, mengatakan ada bukti kesilapan teknikal telah dibentangkan.

src: Lille will have 3 days after receiving notice from UEFA to lodge another appeal to the Court of Arbitration for Sport, or the claim will be dismissed in full.
ref: Lille akan mempunyai 3 hari selepas menerima notis daripada UEFA untuk membuat satu lagi rayuan kepada Mahkamah Timbangtara Sukan, atau tuntutan akan ditolak sepenuhnya.

src: The second leg game between United and Lille will take place next Wednesday at Old Trafford.
ref: Permainan kedua antara United dan Lille akan berlangsung hari Rabu depan di Old Trafford.

src: South Auckland Tyndale Park Christian School have been asking parents of the pupils for permission to administer corporal punishment.
ref: Sekolah Kristian South Auckland Tyndale Park meminta ibu bapa murid-murid untuk kebenaran untuk hukuman fizikal.

src: The parents are informed that corporal punishment is illegal in New Zealand schools but it quotes the Bible "we ought to serve God rather than men".
ref: Ibu bapa diberitahu bahawa hukuman fizikal adalah haram di sekolah New Zealand tetapi ia memetik Bible "kita harus beribadah kepada Tuhan dan bukan kepada manusia."

src: Today the New Zealand Herald reported that they had obtained documents that outline the school's "corporal correction" policy.
ref: Hari ini New Zealand Herald melaporkan bahawa mereka telah mendapat dokumen yang menggariskan dasar "pembetulan hukuman fizikal" sekolah itu.

src: The policy states that the strap must be given on the hand after consultation with another staff member and while that staff member is present.
ref: Dasar ini menyatakan bahawa tali mesti diberi pada tangan selepas berunding dengan seorang kakitangan lain semasa kakitangan itu hadir.

src: The child will then either be spoken to, prayed with or both.
ref: Kanak-kanak itu akan kemudian sama ada dibincang bersama, berdoa bersama atau kedua-duanya.

src: Bradford said: "A full investigation was needed to ascertain whether any students at the school had been assaulted."
ref: Bradford berkata: "Satu siasatan penuh diperlukan untuk menentukan sama ada mana-mana pelajar di sekolah itu telah dikecam."

src: Tyndale Park Christian School is a private Christian school that caters for students ranging from Year 1 to Year 13.
ref: Sekolah Kristian Tyndale Park ialah sebuah sekolah swasta Kristian yang menampung pelajar yang terdiri daripada Tahun 1 hingga Tahun 13.

src: Jan Brinkham, school manager, said: "Our enrollment policy is between the parents who enroll children here and ourselves."
ref: Jan Brinkham, pengurus sekolah, berkata: "Dasar pendaftaran kami adalah di antara ibu bapa yang mendaftarkan anak-anak di sini dan diri kita sendiri."

src: "We are not a state school; we are not bound by a particular enrollment policy."
ref: "Kita bukan sebuah sekolah negeri; kita tidak terikat dengan dasar pendaftaran masuk tertentu."

src: "This is between the parents that enrol their children at our school and that is where the buck stops."
ref: "Ini adalah antara ibu bapa yang menghantar anak-anak ke sekolah kami dan itu adalah setakat tanggungjawab itu."

src: "It's got nothing to do with anyone else except our parents," he added.
ref: "Ia tidak berkaitan dengan orang lain kecuali ibu bapa kita," katanya.

src: The Education Review Office (ERO) and the Ministry of Education said that they were unaware of the policy and that private schools are not legally obliged to produce documents to government bodies.
ref: Pendidikan Kajian Office (ERO) dan Kementerian Pelajaran berkata bahawa mereka tidak mengetahui dasar dan sekolah swasta tidak bertanggungjawab di sisi undang-undang untuk mengemukakan dokumen kepada badan-badan kerajaan.

src: ERO last year said in a report: "The school manager should ensure that parents are clearly informed that the school administers no corporal punishment."
ref: ERO pada tahun lepas berkata dalam laporan: "Pengurus sekolah perlu memastikan bahawa ibu bapa dimaklumkan dengan jelas bahawa sekolah tiada hukuman fizikal."

src: Charlene Scotti, ERO area manger of review services said: "Some schools had policies to call parents in for cases where corporal punishment was required, but were careful not to include staff in punishing students."
ref: Charlene Scotti, pengurus kawasan ERO perkhidmatan kajian berkata: "Sesetengah sekolah mempunyai dasar untuk memanggil ibu bapa dalam kes-kes di mana hukuman fizikal diperlukan, tetapi berhati-hati untuk tidak melibatkan kakitangan dalam menghukum pelajar."

src: Bruce Adin, Ministry of Education northern regional manager, said: "The legality of the Tyndale Park document was unclear, but if school staff strapped a student it would be illegal."
ref: Bruce Adin, pengurus wilayah utara Kementerian Pendidikan, berkata: "Kesahihan dokumen Tyndale Park adalah tidak jelas, tetapi jika kakitangan sekolah mengikat pelajar ia akan menjadi haram di sisi undang-undang."

src: "Corporal punishment in schools was made illegal years ago because it was considered to be brutal and unnecessary," Bradford said.
ref: "Hukuman fizikal di sekolah telah dijadikan haram di sisi-sisi undang-undang tahun lalu kerana ia dianggap kejam dan tidak perlu," kata Bradford.

src: Apple sued HTC, a Taiwanese manufacturer of mobile phones, on Tuesday, in a lawsuit claiming 20 different patent infringements, largely relating to the user interface of the iPhone, which is manufactured by Apple.
ref: Apple menyaman HTC, pengeluar telefon bimbit Taiwan, pada Selasa, dalam tuntutan mahkamah mendakwa 20 pelanggaran paten berlainan, kebanyakannya berkaitan interface pengguna iPhone, yang dikeluarkan oleh Apple.

src: According to the lawsuit, filed with both the United States District Court in Delaware and the United States International Trade Commission, HTC violated Apple patents pertaining to both multi-touch gestures, which allow users to interact with a device's touchscreen using multiple fingers, as well as patents involving more general touch features.
ref: Menurut tuntutan mahkamah tersebut, difailkan dengan kedua-dua Mahkamah Daerah Amerika Syarikat di Delware dan Suruhanjaya Perdagangan Antarabangsa Amerika Syarikat, HTC melanggar paten Apple berkaitan kedua-dua isyarat pelbagai-sentuh, yang membenarkan pengguna untuk berinteraksi dengan alat tersebut menggunakan pelbagai jari, dan juga paten berkaitan ciri sentuhan yang lebih umum.

src: Devices mentioned in the suit are all phones manufactured by HTC that use Google's Android software.
ref: Peralatan yang disebut didalam tuntutan tersebut adalah semua telefon yang dikeluarkan oleh HTC yang menggunakan perisian Android Google.

src: The lawsuit says that HTC, in selling the phones, knowingly induced those using the mentioned products to violate patents owned by Apple, some of which were filed in the mid-1990s.
ref: Tuntutan mahkamah tersebut menyatakan yang HTC, dalam menjual telefon-telefon tersebut, dengan pengetahuan mendorong mereka yang menggunakan produk dinamakan untuk melanggar paten dimiliki oleh Apple, yang mana sebahagiannya difailkan pada pertengahan 1990-an.

src: Although the lawsuit named only HTC as a defendant, many viewed the action as an indirect challenge to Google, as the lawsuit only covered HTC devices running Google's Android software.
ref: Walaupun tuntutan mahkamah tersebut hanya menamakan HTC sebagai tertuduh, ramai melihat tindakan tersebut sebagai secara tidak langsung mencabar kepada Google, dimana tuntutan mahkamah tersebut hanya meliputi peralatan HTC menggunakan perisian Android Google.

src: The operating system has seen increasing popularity in the last year, and has increasingly included multi-touch input of the type mentioned in the lawsuit.
ref: Sistem operasi tersebut telah dilihat meningkat popular pada tahun lepas, dan telah meningkat menyertakan input pelbagai-sentuhan dari jenis yang dinyatakan didalam tuntutan mahkamah tersebut.

src: One analyst, from Kaufman Brothers, said, "I think this is kind of an indirect lawsuit against Google."
ref: Seorang penganalisis, dari Kaufman Brothers, berkata, "Saya fikir ini adalah sejenis tuntutan mahkamah tidak langsung terhadap Google."

src: Others said that Apple was suing HTC instead of Google because the phone manufacturer was an easier target than Google.
ref: Yang lain berkata bahawa Apple menyaman HTC daripada Google kerana pengeluar telefon tersebut ialah sasaran lebih mudah berbanding Google.

src: Another analyst from MKM Partners said that "HTC is an optimal target for Apple-it's a relatively small vendor with a weak brand."
ref: Analisis lain dari MKM Partner berkata yang "HTC ialah sasaran optimum untuk Apple - ia adalah pembekal kecil dengan jenama yang lemah."

src: In the documents, Apple said that their goal was to permanently block HTC from importing and selling devices that had the offending qualities, as well a significant cash payment in damages.
ref: Didalam dokumen tersebut, Apple berkata yang gol mereka adalah untuk menyekat selamanya HTC dari mengimport dan menjual peralatan yang mempunyai qualiti bersalah, dan juga sejumlah besar tunai bayaran dalam kerosakan.

src: An ATM in Virginia Beach, Virginia was cracked so it would give out 4 times as much money as it was supposed to; and this was done just by entering numbers into the keypad.
ref: Sebuah ATM di Virginia Beach, Virginia telah digodam supay ia akan mengeluarkan 4 kali jumlah wang yang sepatutnya; dan ini dilakukan hanya dengan memasukkan jumlah kedalam papan kekunci.

src: A man bought a pre-paid card and used it in the ATM.
ref: Seorang lelaki membeli kad pra-bayar dan menggunakannya di ATM tersebut.

src: The attack consisted of a magic number which was entered in the PIN keypad, which caused the machine to disburse $20 bills when it recorded giving out $5 dollar bills.
ref: Serangan itu terdiri dari nombor majik yang dimasukkan kedalam PIN papan kekunci, yang mengakibatkan mesin mengembalikan wang $20 apabila dicatatkan untuk mengeluarkan wang $5.

src: No one in authority noticed for nine days, until an honest ATM user reported the machine was giving out too much money.
ref: Tiada penguatkuasa yang menyedarinya untuk sembilan hari, sehingga pengguna ATM yang jujur melaporkan yang mesin tersebut memberikan wang yang terlalu banyak.

src: News agency AAP reported last Thursday that George H. W. Bush would be attending the Forbes Global CEO Conference, which starts this Tuesday.
ref: Agensi berita AAP melaporkan Khamis lalu bahawa George H. W. Bush akan menghadiri Persidangan CEO Forbes Global, yang bermula Selasa ini.

src: These reports have now been revealed to be a hoax.
ref: Laporan-laporan ini kini telah didedahkan sebagai satu penipuan.

src: They were based on a media release and associated website, and reported in Wikinews, as well as a number of print publications in Australia.
ref: Mereka adalah berdasarkan kepada kenyataan media dan laman web berkaitan, dan dilaporkan dalam Wikinews, serta beberapa penerbitan cetak di Australia.

src: The president and publisher of Forbes Asia, William Adamopoulos, has confirmed that Mr Bush will not be attending.
ref: Presiden dan penerbit Forbes Asia, William Adamopoulos, telah mengesahkan bahawa Bush tidak akan hadir.

src: "Mr Bush, Sr. is definitely not attending the conference," he said.
ref: "Encik Bush, Sr. pasti tidak menghadiri persidangan itu," katanya.

src: Mr Adamopoulos said that he is considering pursuing legal action against the originators of the hoax.
ref: Mr Adamopoulos berkata, beliau sedang mempertimbangkan mengambil tindakan undang-undang terhadap pemula penipuan itu.

src: According to reports, the media release and website used the Forbes name.
ref: Menurut laporan, kenyataan media dan laman web menggunakan nama Forbes.

src: "While we would not wish to oppose free speech in any way - for free speech is one of the things that unites both Australia and the United States - we are investigating what legal action could be open to us," he said.
ref: "Walaupun kita tidak akan mahu untuk menentang kebebasan bersuara dalam apa jua cara - untuk kebebasan bersuara adalah salah satu perkara yang menyatukan kedua-dua Australia dan Amerika Syarikat - kami sedang menyiasat apa tindakan undang-undang ada," katanya.

src: Two Australian broadsheets fell for the hoax put out by the 30A protest network.
ref: Dua broadsheets Australia jatuh dalam penipuan yang didatangkan oleh rangkaian 30A protes.

src: The network sent out a press release purporting to be from the organisers of the Annual Forbes Conference, claiming that former US President George H. W. Bush was to attend the conference.
ref: Rangkaian ini mengeluarkan satu kenyataan akhbar yang berupa sebagai daripada penganjur Persidangan Forbes Tahunan, dengan mendakwa bahawa bekas Presiden Amerika George H. W. Bush akan menghadiri persidangan itu.

src: Bruce Knobloch of the 30A network indicated that the purpose of the hoax was to show how shallow the media coverage of the conference and the protest is.
ref: Bruce Knobloch dari rangkaian 30A yang nyatakan bahawa tujuan penipuan ini adalah untuk menunjukkan betapa cetek liputan media persidangan itu dan bantahan itu.

src: The hoax was originally reported by AAP, who checked the claim with a telephone number provided on the press release before publishing it.
ref: Penipuan ini pada asalnya dilaporkan oleh AAP, yang memeriksa tuntutan dengan nombor telefon yang diberikan pada siaran akhbar sebelum menyiarkannya.

src: The hoax was then picked up by several internet news sites, including this one.
ref: Penipuan itu kemudiannya diambil oleh beberapa laman berita internet, termasuk yang ini.

src: AAP quickly published a retraction, however that didn't stop the hoax making its way into the paper versions of two of Australia's most respected broadsheets, The Sydney Morning Herald, and The Australian.
ref: AAP dengan cepat menerbitkan penarikan balik, namun itu tidak menghalang penipuan membuat jalan ke versi kertas dua daripada broadsheets Australia yang paling dihormati, The Sydney Morning Herald dan The Australian.

src: The Forbes conference will take place at the Sydney Opera House, and will be attended by hundreds of CEOs from around the world, as well as Australian Prime Minister John Howard, former New York Mayor Rudolph Giuliani, and Steve Forbes himself.
ref: Persidangan Forbes akan berlangsung di Sydney Opera House, dan akan dihadiri oleh beratus-ratus CEO dari seluruh dunia, dan juga Perdana Menteri Australia, John Howard, Datuk Bandar bekas New York Rudolph Giuliani, dan Steve Forbes sendiri.

src: There is a protest planned to coincide with the conference.
ref: Terdapat bantahan dirancang serentak dengan persidangan itu.

src: Protest organisers have called for people to assemble at Customs Square at Circular Quay at 5pm on Tuesday 30 August.
ref: Penganjur protes telah memanggil rakyat untuk berhimpun di Customs Square di Circular Quay pada pukul 5 petang pada hari Selasa 30 Ogos.

src: The protest was originally planned for the Opera House forecourt, however police have declared this area to be an exclusion zone.
ref: Bantahan itu pada asalnya dirancang untuk perkarangan Opera House, bagaimanapun polis telah mengisytiharkan kawasan ini sebagai suatu zon pengecualian.

src: A man has been charged with the murder of a 64-year old British woman in Hong Kong.
ref: Seorang lelaki telah didakwa membunuh seorang wanita British berusia 64 tahun di Hong Kong.

src: Janet Gilson's body was found dead in a flat on Lamma Island on Saturday.
ref: Badan Janet Gilson ditemui mati di sebuah flat di Pulau Lamma, Sabtu lalu.

src: She had been in Hong Kong since March 6th and was staying with her niece.
ref: Beliau telah berada di Hong Kong sejak 6 Mac dan tinggal bersama anak saudara beliau.

src: It is believed the man who has been charged with her murder was the estranged husband of her niece.
ref: Adalah dipercayai orang yang telah dituduh membunuh beliau adalah suami yang telah berpisah daripada anak saudara beliau.

src: Police in Hong Kong would not confirm the identity of the suspect but have said that he was an "expatriate".
ref: Polis di Hong Kong tidak akan mengesahkan identiti suspek tetapi telah mengatakan bahawa beliau adalah seorang warga "asing."

src: Gilson's niece Julia Fareed told the South China Morning Post that the man police are questioning is her estranged husband who is originally from the Maldives.
ref: Anak saudara Gilson Julia Fareed kepada South China Morning Post bahawa lelaki yang polis sedang mempersoalkan adalah suaminya yang terpisah yang berasal dari Maldives.

src: An official cause of death has not been released but it has been reported that Gilson did receive head injuries.
ref: Punca rasmi kematian belum dikeluarkan tetapi ia telah melaporkan bahawa Gilson menerima kecederaan di kepala.

src: Regional director for the Salvation Army Major Carol Bailey paid tribute to Gilson, saying, "She was a deeply spiritual woman and was highly respected and loved by all those with whom she came into contact."
ref: Pengarah Serantau bagi Salvation Army Major Carol Bailey memberi penghormatan kepada Gilson, katanya: "Dia adalah seorang wanita yang mendalami rohani dan sangat dihormati dan disayangi oleh semua orang-orang dengan siapa yang dia kenal."

src: As the National Disaster Coordinating Agency continues to evaluate the reports coming from regions all over the Philippines, bodies of those who drowned or perished while at sea have started to float into the shores of islands in Central Philippines.
ref: Agensi Penyelarasan Bencana Negara terus menilai laporan yang datang dari kawasan-kawasan di seluruh Filipina, badan orang-orang yang mati lemas atau terbunuh manakala di laut telah mula terapung ke pantai pulau-pulau di Central Filipina.

src: On Thursday, the Philippines Coast Guard reported that villagers recovered 124 bodies whose identities are still uncertain.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, Pengawal Pantai Filipina melaporkan bahawa penduduk kampung mendapati 124 badan-badan yang identiti tidak begitu jelas.

src: Advanced decomposition has made identification difficult for authorities and, fearing a health epidemic, all of the bodies were immediately buried in makeshift graves.
ref: Penguraian maju telah membuat pengenalan sukar bagi pihak berkuasa dan, takut wabak kesihatan, semua mayat-mayat itu segera dikebumikan di kubur sementara.

src: The identification of the victims has caused a stir among relatives looking for their missing family members, as forensic investigators were rendered helpless in proceeding to the scattered locations where bodies have been washing ashore.
ref: Pengenalpastian mangsa telah menyebabkan kekecohan di kalangan saudara-mara mencari ahli keluarga mereka yang hilang, kerana penyiasat forensik telah diberikan tidak berdaya dalam meneruskan perjalanan ke lokasi yang bertaburan di mana mayat telah dicuci ke darat.

src: Over 100 divers from the combined Philippines and United States naval forces have been working overtime to retrieve the bodies of passengers trapped inside the capsized MV Princess of the Stars.
ref: Lebih 100 penyelam dari gabungan tentera laut Filipina dan Amerika Syarikat telah bekerja lebih masa untuk mendapatkan semula mayat penumpang terperangkap di dalam kapal yang karam MV Princess of the Stars.

src: Disaster management officials in the country announced that the dead from the weekend battering from Typhoon Fengshen could reach to a high of 1,300 people nation-wide.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai pengurusan bencana di negara ini mengumumkan bahawa yang mati dari taufan hujung minggu dari Taufan Fengshen boleh mencecah ke paras tertinggi 1,300 orang di seluruh negara.

src: State officials reported that some 2.4 million Filipinos were affected by the disaster, putting property damage at a conservative estimate of $125 million.
ref: Pegawai kerajaan negeri melaporkan bahawa 2.4 juta rakyat Filipina terjejas akibat bencana itu, meletakkan kerosakan harta benda di suatu anggaran konservatif $125 juta.

src: Relatives of missing passengers were finally brought near the site where the ferry capsized.
ref: Saudara-mara penumpang hilang akhirnya dibawa ke tapak di mana feri karam.

src: On board a tug boat, relatives became severely emotional after a Roman Catholic mass was celebrated to commemorate the memory of those lost at sea.
ref: Di atas sebuah kapal tunda, saudara-mara menjadi sangat emosi selepas massa Roman Katolik dirayakan untuk memperingati ingatan mereka hilang di laut.

src: The Government of the United Kingdom has assumed direct rule over the Turks and Caicos Islands in the Caribbean, after an enquiry discovered what it alleges to be corruption and "serious dishonesty" at the highest levels.
ref: Kerajaan United Kingdom telah mengambil alih pemerintahan langsung ke atas orang-orang Turki dan Caicos di Caribbean, selepas siasatan mendapati apa yang ia mendakwa terhadap gejala rasuah dan "kecurangan serius" di peringkat tertinggi.

src: The islands' administration and Premier have been suspended for up to two years and their powers transferred to the UK-appointed Governor.
ref: Pentadbiran dan Premier pulau-pulau yang telah digantung selama dua tahun dan kuasa mereka dipindahkan kepada Gabenor UK.

src: The British Government has taken the unusual step because it alleges that former Premier Michael Misick and members of his cabinet have enriched themselves through the selling of crown land and other corrupt practices, and that the limits to suffrage in the islands make it impossible to form a jury immune to the influence of the accused.
ref: Kerajaan British telah mengambil langkah luar biasa kerana ia mendakwa bahawa bekas Perdana Menteri Michael Misick dan anggota kabinetnya telah memperkayakan diri mereka melalui penjualan tanah mahkota dan amalan rasuah yang lain, dan bahawa had kepada hak mengundi di pulau-pulau menjadikannya mustahil untuk membentuk juri kebal terhadap pengaruh tertuduh.

src: "This is a serious constitutional step which the UK government has not taken lightly, but these measures are essential in order to restore good governance and sound financial management", said the Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs Chris Bryant.
ref: "Ini adalah satu langkah perlembagaan serius yang kerajaan UK tidak pandang ringan, tetapi langkah-langkah ini adalah penting untuk memulihkan tadbir urus yang baik dan pengurusan kewangan," kata Parlimen Setiausaha Negara bagi Hal Ehwal Luar Chris Bryant.

src: However the reaction by the local government have been hostile, with the action being described as a "coup" by deposed Premier Galmo Williams.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun tindak balas oleh kerajaan tempatan adalah bertentangan, dengan tindakan itu disifatkan sebagai "rampasan kuasa" oleh Perdana Galmo Williams yang digulingkan.

src: He told the BBC, "A coup is anything that has been done without the will of the people and being a colony anything the British government wants to do to us they can do to us."
ref: Dia berkata kepada BBC, "rampasan kuasa adalah apa-apa yang telah dilakukan tanpa kehendak rakyat dan menjadi apa-apa tanah jajahan kerajaan British mahu lakukan kepada kami mereka boleh lakukan untuk kita."

src: The Turks and Caicos Islands have been British overseas territories since 1799, and since achieving self-governance in 1976 have significantly developed offshore banking and tourism industries.
ref: Orang Turki dan Caicos telah berada di wilayah luar negara British sejak 1799, dan sejak mencapai pemerintahan sendiri pada tahun 1976 telah berkembang dengan ketara dalam industri perbankan dan pelancongan luar pesisir.

src: The U.S. economy and its currency as an instrument of world trade has suffered a series of major setbacks in recent months.
ref: Ekonomi dan mata wang Amerika Syarikat sebagai alat perdagangan dunia telah mengalami beberapa masalah utama dalam beberapa bulan kebelakangan ini.

src: Some analysts say that the Federal Reserve's September 18th dramatic rate cut to 4.75% from 5.25% may be a case of "too little, too late", or that it was excessive and dooms the dollar.
ref: Beberapa penganalisis mengatakan bahawa kadar dramatik Rizab Persekutuan pada 18 September dipotong kepada 4.75% daripada 5.25% boleh menjadi kes "terlalu sedikit, terlalu lewat," atau bahawa ia adalah berlebihan dan satu malapetaka buat dolar.

src: Today, Saudi officials declined to cut interest rates in lockstep with the US Federal Reserve for the first time in decades.
ref: Hari ini, pegawai-pegawai Arab enggan untuk mengurangkan kadar faedah dalam langkah kunci dengan Rizab Persekutuan Amerika Syarikat buat kali pertama dalam beberapa dekad.

src: According to Ambrose Evans-Pritchard, International Business Editor for The Daily Telegraph, "it's a signal that the oil-rich Gulf kingdom is preparing to break the dollar currency peg in a move that risks setting off a stampede out of the dollar across the Middle East."
ref: Menurut Ambrose Evans-Pritchard, Editor Perniagaan Antarabangsa The Daily Telegraph, "ia adalah satu isyarat bahawa Teluk kerajaan yang kaya dengan minyak itu sedang bersedia untuk memecahkan tambatan mata wang dolar dalam usaha yang berisiko berangkat rempuhan daripada dolar di seluruh Tengah Timur."

src: Hans Redeker, the Currency Chief at BNP Paribas, also stated today that Saudi Arabia's move to not adjust their own interest rates in sync with the Fed's cuts is a very dangerous situation for the US dollar.
ref: Hans Redeker, ketua mata wang di BNP Paribas, juga menyatakan hari ini bahawa langkah Arab Saudi untuk tidak menyesuaikan kadar faedah mereka sendiri selari dengan potongan Fed adalah satu keadaan yang sangat bahaya kepada dolar Amerika Syarikat.

src: Redeker points out that "Saudi Arabia has $800bn (£400bn) in their future generation fund, and the entire region has $3,500bn under management.
ref: Redeker menunjukkan bahawa "Arab Saudi mempunyai $800bn (£400bn) dalam dana generasi masa depan mereka, dan seluruh rantau ini mempunyai $3,500bn dibawah pengurusan.

src: They face an inflationary threat and do not want to import an interest rate policy set for the recessionary conditions in the United States."
ref: Mereka menghadapi ancaman inflasi dan tidak mahu mengimport dasar kadar faedah yang ditetapkan untuk keadaan kemelesetan di Amerika Syarikat."

src: Saudi central bank officials said that "appropriate measures" would be taken to stop the large capital inflows into the country.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai bank pusat Saudi itu berkata bahawa "langkah yang sewajarnya" akan diambil untuk menghentikan aliran masuk modal yang besar ke negara ini.

src: The Federal Reserve's half-point rate cut has already caused a plunge in the world dollar index to a fifteen-year low, reaching the weakest level ever against the Euro at just under $1.40.
ref: Kadar separuh titik potong Rizab Persekutuan telah menyebabkan keturunan dalam indeks dolar dunia untuk lima belas tahun rendah, mencapai tahap yang paling lemah dalam pertarungan dengan Euro pada hanya di bawah $ 1.40.

src: The Fed hopes that by making it cheaper to borrow, people will start spending and investing more.
ref: Persekutuan berharap dengan menjadikannya lebih murah untuk meminjam, orang akan mula berbelanja dan melabur lebih banyak.

src: However, some analysts fear the cut will worsen inflation, making it harder to get personal loans, and further decrease confidence in the dollar around the world.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, sesetengah penganalisis takut memotong akan memburukkan lagi inflasi, menjadikannya lebih sukar untuk mendapatkan pinjaman peribadi, dan mengurangkan lagi keyakinan dalam dolar di seluruh dunia.

src: There are already signs that global investors have started rejecting U.S. Treasury securities, and recent U.S. government data on foreign holdings show a decline in purchases of US securities from $97bn to just $19bn in July.
ref: Sudah ada tanda-tanda bahawa pelabur-pelabur global telah mula menolak sekuriti Perbendaharaan Amerika Syarikat, dan data kerajaan Amerika Syarikat baru-baru ini ke atas pegangan asing menunjukkan penurunan dalam pembelian sekuriti Amerika Syarikat dari $97bn kepada hanya $19bn pada bulan Julai.

src: In response to Ben Bernanke's statements today about a potential mortgage and housing market crisis, CNN anchor Wolf Blitzer said, "If adjustable mortgage rates go up, people may not be able to afford their mortgage payments."
ref: Sebagai tindak balas kepada kenyataan Ben Bernanke hari ini mengenai gadai janji dan perumahan krisis pasaran yang berpotensi, CNN sauh Wolf Blitzer berkata, "Jika kadar gadai janji boleh laras naik, orang mungkin tidak mampu membayar bayaran gadai janji mereka."

src: Former Federal Reserve chief Alan Greenspan said earlier this week that housing prices may fall by "double digits" as the subprime crisis bites harder, prompting households to cut back sharply on spending.
ref: Bekas Ketua Rizab Persekutuan Alan Greenspan berkata awal minggu ini bahawa harga perumahan boleh jatuh kepada "dua digit" sebagai krisis subprima lebih teruk, menyebabkan isi rumah untuk mengurangkan perbelanjaan dengan ketara.

src: Jim Rogers, the economic commentator and former partner of George Soros, stated, "If Ben Bernanke starts running those printing presses even faster than he's already doing, we are going to have a serious recession.
ref: Jim Rogers, pengulas dan bekas rakan kongsi George Soros ekonomi, menyatakan, "Jika Ben Bernanke menjadi semakin mereka menekan mencetak lebih cepat daripada dia sudah lakukan, kita akan mempunyai kemelesetan serius.

src: The dollar's going to collapse, the bond market's going to collapse.
ref: Dolar akan runtuh, pasaran bon akan runtuh.

src: In recent months, the U.S. dollar has taken several other significant hits including Kuwait's decision in May to also break its dollar peg, and threats by China to interfere with the U.S. economy, calling it their nation's "nuclear option".
ref: Dalam beberapa bulan kebelakangan ini, dolar Amerika Syarikat telah mengambil beberapa masalah penting lain termasuk keputusan Kuwait pada bulan Mei untuk juga memecahkan tambatan dolar, dan ancaman oleh China untuk mengganggu ekonomi Amerika Syarikat, memanggil "pilihan nuklear" negara mereka.

src: According to public sources, the Chinese government has begun a concerted campaign of economic threats against the United States, hinting that it may liquidate its vast holding of US treasuries if Washington imposes trade sanctions that seek to force a Yuan revaluation.
ref: Menurut sumber-sumber awam, kerajaan China telah mula kempen bersepadu daripada ancaman ekonomi terhadap Amerika Syarikat, membayangkan bahawa ia boleh mencairkan pegangan luas perbendaharaan Amerika Syarikat jika Washington mengenakan sekatan perdagangan yang bertujuan untuk memaksa penilaian semula Yuan.

src: NASA has successfully launched Space Shuttle Discovery after over a month of delays.
ref: NASA telah berjaya melancarkan Space Shuttle Discovery selepas lebih sebulan kelewatan.

src: Discovery lifted off at 7:43 p.m. (EDT) from Cape Canaveral Air Force Station in Florida in the United States after NASA declared the weather to be "100% go for launch".
ref: Discovery diangkat dari pada 07:43 p.m. (EDT) dari Stesen Tentera Udara Cape Canaveral di Florida di Amerika Syarikat selepas NASA diisytiharkan cuaca menjadi "100% pergi untuk pelancaran."

src: "The clouds broke up and that's why we were go for launch," stated mission control on NASA TV.
ref: "Awan berpecah dan itulah sebabnya kami telah pergi untuk dilancarkan," kawalan misi dinyatakan di TV NASA.

src: A crystal clear blue sky could be seen in Discovery's background about 40 minutes before launch.
ref: Langit kristal yang biru boleh dilihat di latar belakang Discovery kira-kira 40 minit sebelum pelancaran.

src: NASA earlier had made jokes about a small black bat attached to the rear of the external fuel tank delaying launch, but NASA assured it would not be a problem for launch.
ref: NASA sebelum ini telah dibuat jenaka tentang kelawar hitam kecil melekat pada bahagian belakang tangki minyak melambatkan pelancaran luar, tetapi NASA memberi jaminan ia tidak akan menjadi masalah untuk dilancarkan.

src: NASA also said that there was a bat on STS-72 which managed to fly away just before the shuttle launched.
ref: NASA juga berkata terdapat kelawar pada STS-72 yang berjaya terbang sebelum pengangkutan ulang-alik dilancarkan.

src: The current scheduled mission, STS-119, is set to fly the Integrated Truss Structure segment ("S" for starboard, the right side of the station, and "6" for its place at the very end of the starboard truss) and install the final set of power-generating solar arrays to the International Space Station.
ref: Misi yang dijadualkan sekarang, STS-119, dijangka mengibarkan Segmen Truss Bersepadu Struktur ("S" untuk sisi kanan, sebelah kanan stesen, dan "6" untuk tempatnya pada akhir sangat kekuda sisi kanan) dan memasang set terakhir kuasa penjanaan array solar ke Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa.

src: The arrays consist of two 115-foot-long arrays, for a total wing span of 240 feet, including the equipment that connects the two halves and allows them to twist as they track the sun.
ref: Tatasusunan terdiri daripada dua tatasusunan 115-kaki-panjang, untuk sejumlah rentang sayap 240 kaki, termasuk peralatan yang menghubungkan kedua-dua bahagian dan membolehkan mereka untuk pusing kerana mereka mengesan matahari.

src: Altogether, the four sets of arrays can generate 84 to 120 kilowatts of electricity – enough to provide power for more than 40 average homes.
ref: Semua sekali, empat set tatasusunan boleh menjana 84-120 kilowatt tenaga elektrik - cukup untuk memberikan kuasa selama lebih daripada 40 rumah purata.

src: Commander Lee Archambault will lead Discovery's crew of seven, along with Pilot Tony Antonelli, and Mission Specialists Joseph Acaba, John Phillips, Steve Swanson, Richard Arnold, and Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency astronaut Koichi Wakata.
ref: Komander Lee Archambault akan membawa tujuh anak-anak kapal Discovery, bersama-sama dengan Pilot Tony Antonelli dan Misi Pakar Joseph Acaba, John Phillips, Steve Swanson, Richard Arnold, dan angkasawan Agensi Penjelajahan Aeroangkasa Jepun Koichi Wakata.

src: The next change scheduled the liftoff date for February 12, 2009.
ref: Perubahan datang yang dijadualkan tarikh berlepas pada 12 Februari 2009.

src: It was then delayed until February 27, but was then delayed indefinitely on February 20 after NASA discovered an issue with the hydrogen control valves.
ref: Ia kemudiannya ditangguhkan sehingga 27 Februari, tetapi kemudiannya ditangguhkan selama-lamanya pada 20 Februari selepas NASA menemui isu dengan injap kawalan hidrogen.

src: A power outage in Indonesia that left about 100 million people without electricity has caused a political crisis.
ref: Satu gangguan kuasa di Indonesia yang menyebabkan kira-kira 100 juta orang tanpa elektrik telah menyebabkan krisis politik.

src: The country's state-owned energy monopoly, PLN, has not determined the immediate cause, and the country's president has ordered the national intelligence agency and police to investigate.
ref: Monopoli tenaga negara milik negara, PLN, tidak menentukan punca serta-merta, dan presiden negara itu telah mengarahkan agensi perisikan negara dan polis untuk menyiasat.

src: The blackout appears related to deficiencies in Indonesia's power generation capacity.
ref: Gangguan kuasa ini nampaknya berkaitan dengan kekurangan dalam kapasiti penjanaan kuasa di Indonesia.

src: The power failure follows attempts to deal with the country's growing energy crisis, including conservation and trying to allow private companies to provide energy, which was ruled unconstitutional in 2004.
ref: Kegagalan kuasa berikut percubaan untuk menangani krisis tenaga yang semakin meningkat di negara ini, termasuk pemuliharaan dan cuba untuk membenarkan syarikat-syarikat swasta untuk menyediakan tenaga, yang diperintah mengikut perlembagaan pada tahun 2004.

src: In January, the Indonesian government held a special energy summit to attract investment in their energy infrastructure.
ref: Pada bulan Januari, kerajaan Indonesia telah mengadakan sidang kemuncak tenaga khas untuk menarik pelaburan dalam infrastruktur tenaga mereka.

src: At the summit they set the goal of adding 22,000 megawatts to Indonesia's present capacity of 23,000 megawatts, in order to support the country's growth.
ref: Pada sidang kemuncak itu mereka menetapkan matlamat untuk menambah 22,000 megawatt kapasiti hadir Indonesia 23,000 megawatt, untuk menyokong pertumbuhan negara.

src: The World Bank and others have warned that without more investment in the country's energy infrastructure an energy deficit will result.
ref: Bank Dunia dan lain-lain telah memberi amaran bahawa tanpa lebih banyak pelaburan dalam infrastruktur tenaga negara defisit tenaga akan berlaku.

src: "The power outage has resulted in worries over an energy crisis which could hurt the nation's industrial sector," said a trader on Indonesia's stock market.
ref: "Gangguan kuasa telah menyebabkan kebimbangan mengenai krisis tenaga yang boleh menjejaskan sektor industri di negara ini," kata seorang peniaga di pasaran saham Indonesia.

src: The outage began at 10:23 a.m. local time, August 18, 2005, when power failed along the electrical system that connects Java, Bali, and Madura, causing outages in Java and Bali.
ref: Gangguan itu bermula pada 10:23 waktu tempatan, 18 Ogos 2005, apabila kuasa gagal bersama-sama sistem elektrik yang menghubungkan Jawa, Bali dan Madura, menyebabkan gangguan di Jawa dan Bali.

src: Almost half of the country depends on the electrical grid that experienced failures.
ref: Hampir separuh daripada negara bergantung kepada grid elektrik yang mengalami kegagalan.

src: The blackout caused traffic jams in Jakarta, forced cancellation of several international and domestic flights at Jakarta's Soekarno-Hatta International Airport, shut down Jakarta's electric train service, and disrupted hospital operations.
ref: Gangguan kuasa itu menyebabkan kesesakan lalu lintas di Jakarta, pembatalan memaksa beberapa penerbangan antarabangsa dan domestik di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Soekarno-Hatta, menutup perkhidmatan kereta api elektrik di Jakarta, dan operasi hospital terganggu.

src: Some larger hospitals were forced to delay surgeries while many smaller hospitals could not receive patients.
ref: Sesetengah hospital yang lebih besar terpaksa melambatkan pembedahan manakala banyak hospital yang lebih kecil tidak dapat menerima pesakit.

src: About 1,800 officers were called into action by Jakarta's metropolitan police to deal with short-term problems caused by the power failure.
ref: Kira-kira 1,800 pegawai telah dipanggil ke dalam tindakan oleh pihak polis metropolitan Jakarta untuk menangani masalah jangka pendek yang disebabkan oleh kegagalan kuasa.

src: Candles used in place of electric lighting started six fires in Jakarta alone.
ref: Lilin digunakan untuk menggantikan lampu elektrik bermula enam kebakaran di Jakarta sahaja.

src: Mulyo Aji, a PLN official, said more power failures are likely in the future as energy demand increases, without any corresponding new supplies of electricity scheduled to come online soon.
ref: Mulyo Aji, seorang pegawai PLN berkata kegagalan kuasa yang lebih mungkin pada masa akan datang kerana permintaan tenaga bertambah, tanpa apa-apa bekalan baru elektrik dijadual datang dalam talian tidak lama lagi.

src: Voting polls opened in Kosovo at 7am (0600 UTC); the first time since declaring independence from Serbia last year.
ref: Pengundian pilihan raya dibuka di Kosovo pada jam 7 pagi (0600 UTC); kali pertama sejak mengisytiharkan kemerdekaan daripada Serbia pada tahun lepas.

src: Both ethnic Albanians and the minority Serb population may vote for local mayors and councillors, a move seen as testing the government's capacity to organise its own democratic elections.
ref: Kedua-dua etnik Albania dan penduduk minoriti Serb boleh mengundi untuk datuk bandar dan majlis tempatan, satu langkah yang dilihat sebagai ujian keupayaan kerajaan untuk menganjurkan pilihan raya sendiri secara demokratik.

src: The territory was run by the United Nations mission before its split from Serbia in February 2008.
ref: Wilayah ini telah dijalankan oleh misi United Nations sebelum pecahan daripada Serbia pada Februari 2008.

src: The Kosovo police have tightened security, and the 13,000 Kosovo Force troops — a NATO-led peacekeeping force — are on standby, according to its commander, General Markus Bentler.
ref: Polis Kosovo telah mengetatkan keselamatan, dan 13,000 tentera Kosovo Force - pasukan pengaman NATO - sentiasa bersiap sedia, menurut komander, Jeneral Markus Bentler.

src: The main concern is the number of citizens who will vote, as only a 40% turnout level is expected.
ref: Kebimbangan utama adalah bilangan rakyat yang akan mengundi, kerana tahap keluar mengundi hanya dijangka 40%.

src: According to the BBC, most of the 120,000 Serbs oppose Kosovo's independence.
ref: Menurut BBC, kebanyakan 120,000 orang Serbia menentang kemerdekaan Kosovo.

src: The government in Belgrade and the Serbian Orthodox Church have called for a boycott.
ref: Kerajaan di Belgrade dan Gereja Ortodoks Serbia telah dipanggil untuk memboikot.

src: Polling stations are due to close at 7pm (1800 UTC); the first unofficial results are expected late Sunday evening.
ref: Tempat mengundi akan ditutup pada 07:00 (1800 UTC); keputusan tidak rasmi pertama dijangka petang Ahad.

src: At least three people are dead after two small planes collided in a remote area of Wyoming in the United States.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tiga orang mati selepas dua pesawat kecil bertembung di kawasan terpencil di Wyoming di Amerika Syarikat.

src: The collision occurred between a Cirrus SR22 and a Cessna 172 near Rock Springs just before 12:30 p.m. on Sunday afternoon.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku antara Cirrus SR22 dan Cessna 172 berhampiran Rock Springs sebelum jam 12:30 tengahari pada petang Ahad.

src: The Cirrus was carrying two people, both of whom died, and was traveling from Polson, Montana to Rock Springs.
ref: Cirrus membawa dua orang, kedua-duanya meninggal dunia, dan sedang dalam perjalanan dari Polson, Montana ke Rock Springs.

src: The Cessna had one person on board who also died, but its destination is not yet known.
ref: Cessna mempunyai satu orang di atas kapal yang turut meninggal dunia, tetapi destinasinya masih belum diketahui.

src: One deployed parachute is reported to have been seen near the wreckage, but reports state it does not appear to have been deployed by a survivor.
ref: Satu payung terjun dikerahkan dilaporkan telah dilihat berhampiran bangkai, tetapi laporan menyatakan ia tidak dibuka oleh mereka yang masih hidup.

src: FOX News quotes KSL in Salt Lake City, Utah as saying that debris from the collision was scattered over five acres in an area that made it difficult for emergency officials to get to.
ref: FOX News memetik KSL di Salt Lake City, Utah sebagai berkata bahawa serpihan dari perlanggaran itu bertaburan di lima ekar di kawasan yang menyukarkan pegawai kecemasan untuk sampai.

src: The names of the deceased have not been released, pending the notification of family members.
ref: Nama-nama si mati belum dikeluarkan, sementara menunggu pemberitahuan ahli keluarga.

src: An inquest was held this week after a 10-year-old boy died after being shot with an air rifle in Swansea, Wales.
ref: Inkues diadakan minggu ini selepas seorang budak lelaki berusia 10 tahun meninggal dunia selepas ditembak dengan senapang angin di Swansea, Wales.

src: On September 27, 2009, Rhys Johnson and his friend, aged 12, took, without permission, an air gun which belonged to Rhys' father.
ref: Pada 27 September 2009, Rhys Johnson dan rakannya, berusia 12 tahun, mengambil, tanpa kebenaran, pistol udara yang dipunyai oleh bapa Rhys.

src: The two boys played with it near to the location of the Johnson house in the district of Llansamlet.
ref: Kedua-dua kanak-kanak lelaki bermain dengannya berhampiran dengan lokasi rumah Johnson di daerah Llansamlet.

src: They were unsupervised when they were shooting the gun at a bucket that was hanging in a tree and a tin can that was placed on a box.
ref: Mereka tidak diawasi apabila mereka menembak pistol di sebuah baldi yang tergantung di pokok dan tin yang telah diletakkan di atas kotak.

src: The friend, who has remained anonymous, shot Rhys Johnson in the heart with the .22 caliber Webley Vulcan air gun at close range.
ref: Kawannya, yang tidak diketahui, ditembak Rhys Johnson di hati dengan .22 kaliber Webley Vulcan pistol udara pada jarak dekat.

src: Johnson died in a hospital at 0211 BST the next day from said wound.
ref: Johnson meninggal dunia di hospital pada 0211 BST pada hari berikutnya dari luka itu.

src: Philip Rogers, a coroner from Swansea, recorded the verdict as an accidental death.
ref: Philip Rogers, seorang koroner dari Swansea, mencatatkan keputusan itu sebagai kematian akibat kemalangan.

src: He was told that the friend had no intention of shooting Johnson.
ref: Dia diberitahu bahawa rakannya tidak mempunyai niat untuk menembak Johnson.

src: Therefore, no legal action has been taken against Johnson's friend accordingly.
ref: Oleh itu, tiada tindakan undang-undang yang diambil terhadap rakan Johnson sewajarnya.

src: The boy held the rifle at the butt in his right arm with his finger on the trigger.
ref: Budak lelaki itu memegang senapang di punggung itu di lengan kanannya dengan jarinya pada picu.

src: As he turned he felt the gun to be heavy.
ref: Sambil berpaling ia merasa senjata itu menjadi berat.

src: As it fell away he pulled it towards him and accidentally fired the trigger.
ref: Kerana ia jatuh jauh dia ditarik ke arahnya dan secara tidak sengaja melepaskan picu.

src: Rhys was holding himself to the chest—he thought he was joking then he thought he's shot Rhys in the hand.
ref: Rhys memegang dadanya-dia fikir dia bergurau kemudian dia fikir dia tembak Rhys di tangan.

src: He saw no blood and Rhys ran to the house."
ref: Dia melihat ada darah dan Rhys berlari ke rumah."

src: The detective stated that the friend "was crying and apologizing for what happened."
ref: Detektif itu menyatakan bahawa rakan "telah menangis dan meminta maaf atas apa yang berlaku."

src: Rhys Johnson's father, David, age 36, an engineer in a workshop and the owner of the air rifle testified, "I would allow him to use it if he was with me when I was up the garden or we were spending time together.
ref: Bapa Rhys Johnson, David, umur 36, seorang jurutera di bengkel dan pemilik senapang udara memberi keterangan, "Saya akan membenarkan dia untuk menggunakannya jika beliau dengan saya apabila saya naik taman atau kami menghabiskan masa bersama-sama.

src: Rhys would have shown interest in it from when he was about eight-years-old."
ref: Rhys akan menunjukkan minat daripada apabila dia adalah kira-kira lapan tahun."

src: The coroner urged "anyone with children to try and ensure that such weapons are not used without parental supervision," going on to say that he was "sure Mr. and Mrs. Johnson were not aware the children were using the weapon unsupervised."
ref: Koroner menggesa "sesiapa yang mempunyai kanak-kanak untuk mencuba dan memastikan bahawa senjata itu tidak digunakan tanpa pengawasan ibu bapa," berlaku untuk mengatakan bahawa beliau "yakin Encik dan Puan Johnson tidak menyedari kanak-kanak itu menggunakan senjata tanpa pengawasan."

src: The Seattle Post-Intelligencer (P-I), the 146-year-old Seattle newspaper, will make its final print edition on today, before becoming an online-only news agency.
ref: Akhbar Seattle yang berusia 146 tahun, The Seattle Post-Intelligencer (P-I), akan membuat edisi cetakan terakhirnya pada hari ini, sebelum menjadi agensi berita dalam laman web sahaja.

src: However, the online version is to be for local news only.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, versi dalam laman web adalah untuk berita tempatan sahaja.

src: The editorial staff would consist of twenty people, less than one-seventh of the 150 staff that were employed before the closure.
ref: Kakitangan editorial akan terdiri daripada dua puluh orang, kurang daripada satu per tujuh kakitangan daripada 150 orang yang diambil bekerja sebelum penutupan itu.

src: With this closure, the Seattle Times is now Seattle's only major daily newspaper.
ref: Dengan penutupan ini, Seattle Times kini merupakan akhbar harian utama sulung di Seattle.

src: "We don't feel like we have to cover everything ourselves.
ref: "Kami tidak berasa bahawa kami perlu meliputi segala-galanya.

src: We'll partner for some content; we won't duplicate what the wire is reporting unless we have something unique to offer; we'll continue to showcase the great content from our 150 or so reader bloggers and we'll link to content partners and competitors to create the best mix of news on our front page," said Michelle Nicolosi, who is to be the executive producer of the online paper.
ref: Kami akan berkongsi untuk beberapa kandungan; kami tidak akan membuat apa-apa salinan dari apa yang dilaporkan oleh mereka melainkan kita mempunyai sesuatu yang unik untuk ditawarkan; kami akan terus mempamerkan kandungan yang sehebat kepada pembaca blog kami yang seramai lebih kurang 150 dan kami akan menyambung dengan rakan kongsi dan pesaing kami untuk mencipta kandungan berita yang terbaik di laman utama kami," kata Michelle Nicolosi, yang akan menjadi penerbit eksekutif dalam laman web.

src: The Hearst Corporation, the owner of the P-I, was not able to find a buyer for the newspaper when it was put up for sale back in January.
ref: Pemilik P-I, Syarikat Hearst, tidak dapat mencari pembeli untuk akhbar itu apabila ia telah dijual pada bulan Januari.

src: The newspaper industry in the country has been suffering as revenue from advertising plunges.
ref: Industri akhbar di negara ini telah mengalami kesusahan diakibatkan oleh hasil dari pengiklanan menurun.

src: Other newspapers in the United States have also shut down recently: Denver's Rocky Mountain News shut down earlier this year, whilst the Tucson Citizen of Arizona will print its final edition on Saturday.
ref: Akhbar lain di Amerika Syarikat juga telah ditutup baru-baru ini: Denver Rocky Mountain News telah ditutup pada awal tahun ini, manakala Tucson Citizen of Arizona akan mencetak edisi terakhir pada hari Sabtu.

src: Thursday was the second day of play in the third test between Australia and India at the WACA, Perth, Australia.
ref: Hari Khamis adalah hari kedua permainan dalam ujian ketiga antara Australia dan India di WACA, Perth, Australia.

src: Australia took the remaining four wickets before the lunch break.
ref: Australia mengambil baki empat wickets sebelum rehat tengah hari.

src: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (19) and Irfan Pathan (28) both fell lbw in successive overs.
ref: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (19) dan Irfan Pathan (28) kedua-dua mendapat lbw dari pengambilalihan berturut-turut.

src: India reached 330 all out with the loss of Anil Kumble for one run and R. P. Singh for a duck.
ref: India mencapai 330 semua keluar dengan kehilangan Anil Kumble untuk satu larian dan RP Singh untuk satu duck.

src: Australia struggled early on as Irfan Pathan dismissed both Australian openers for less than ten runs each and Michael Hussey was caught behind without scoring.
ref: Australia bergelut awal disebabkan oleh Irfan Pathan menolak kedua-dua pembuka Australia untuk kurang daripada sepuluh larian setiap orang dan Michael Hussey telah ditangkap di belakang tanpa jaringan.

src: The next session, Australia played well, despite losing Ricky Ponting (20) and Michael Clarke (23), coming to the tea break with a score of 5/148.
ref: Sesi akan datang, Australia bermain dengan baik, walaupun kehilangan Ricky Ponting (20) dan Michael Clarke (23), datang ke minum petang dengan skor 5/148.

src: However, in the last session of the day India took five wickets, sending Australia all out with a score of 212 after fifty overs.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, dalam sesi terakhir hari tersebut India mengambil lima wickets, menghantar Australia semua keluar dengan skor 212 selepas lima puluh pengambilalihan.

src: Andrew Symonds was Australia's top scorer with 66 runs, while Adam Gilchrist made 55.
ref: Andrew Symonds merupakan penjaring terbanyak Australia dengan 66 larian, manakala Adam Gilchrist dengan 55.

src: In reply, India are 1/52 at stumps having lost Wasim Jaffer for 11 runs just before the close of play.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas, India dengan 1/52 di tunggul setelah kehilangan Wasim Jaffer untuk 11 larian sebelum penutupan bermain.

src: Jack Palance, best known for his role as Curly in the 1991 film, "City Slickers", died of natural causes on Friday, November 10, at the age of 87.
ref: Jack Palance, dikenali ramai melalui wataknya sebagai Curly dalam filem pada tahun 1991, "City Slickers," meninggal dunia disebabkan oleh sebab semulajadi pada hari Jumaat, 10 November, pada usia 87 tahun.

src: He died in Montecito, California, surrounded by family, according to spokesman Dick Guttman.
ref: Beliau meninggal dunia di Montecito, California, dikelilingi keluarganya, menurut jurucakap Dick Guttman.

src: Palance is survived by his second wife, Elaine Rogers Palance; his daughter, Holly; another daughter, Brook Palance Wilding; grandchildren Lily and Spencer Spottiswoode and Tarquin Wilding; his brother, John Palance, and sister Anne Despiva.
ref: Palance meninggalkan isteri keduanya, Elaine Rogers Palance, anak perempuannya, Holly; anak perempuannya yang lain, Brook Palance Wilding, cucu Lily dan Spencer Spottiswoode dan Tarquin Wilding; abangnya, John Palance, dan kakak Anne Despiva.

src: A memorial service for him is planned for December 16.
ref: Upacara peringatan untuk beliau dirancangkan pada 16 Disember.

src: He also played the role of the Oscar- nominated Jack Wilson in "Shane".
ref: Beliau juga pernah memainkan watak untuk Oscar- dicalonkan Jack Wilson dalam "Shane."

src: Oscar Peterson, a Canadian jazz pianist who earned many honours during his decades-long career, died Sunday in Mississauga, Ontario aged 82.
ref: Oscar Peterson, pemain piano kumpulan jazz Canadian yang menerima banyak penghargaan di sepanjang kareer panjang berdekad, meninggal dunia pada hari Ahad di Mississauga, Ontario pada usia 82 tahun.

src: The Montreal-born Peterson learned to play piano in childhood and by the 1940s was actively performing in Canadian big bands such as the Johnny Holmes Orchestra.
ref: Peterson kelahiran Montreal belajar bermain piano sejak kecil dan pada 1940-an aktif dalam membuat persembahan di kumpulan-kumpulan besar Canadian seperti Orkestra Johnny Holmes.

src: A groundbreaking performance at New York's Carnegie Hall in 1949 brought Peterson's career to an international level.
ref: Prestasi pecah tanah di Dewan Carnegie, New York pada 1949 membawa kerjaya Peterson ke tahap internasional.

src: Among many honours, he was appointed a Companion of the Order of Canada, the nation's highest civilian honour, in 1984.
ref: Dalam kebanyakan penghargaan, beliau dilantik sebagai Teman Perintah Kanada, penghormatan orang awam tertinggi negara, pada tahun 1984.

src: He also received seven Grammy Awards and in 1978 was inducted into the Canadian Music Hall of Fame.
ref: Beliau juga menerima tujuh Anugerah Grammy dan pada tahun 1978 beliau telah diinduksi ke dalam Kemasyuran Dewan Muzik Kanada.

src: Colombian authorities rescued a 2-month-old baby, who was kidnapped by a woman on Monday in Bogotá, in Armenia on Thursday night, September 14.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Colombia menyelamatkan bayi berusia 2 bulan yang telah diculik oleh seorang wanita pada hari Isnin di Bogota di Armenia pada Khamis malam, 14 September.

src: The baby girl, Maribel Muñoz, was taken by a woman who told her parents, Zenaida Muñoz and Henry López Romero that she belonged to an NGO and could get medical care for the girl inside Hotel Tequendama.
ref: Bayi perempuan, Maribel Munoz, telah diambil oleh wanita yang memberitahu ibu bapanya, Zenaida Munoz dan Henry Lopez Romero bahawa dia merupakan NGO dan cuba mendapatkan penjagaan kesihatan untuk kanak-kanak perempuan di dalam Hotel Tequendama.

src: The parents, who are displaced people, went to Caracol TV network in order to report the kidnapping.
ref: Ibu bapa, yang telah dilarikan pergi ke siaran TV Caracol untuk melaporkan tentang penculikan itu.

src: Surveillance recordings from the hotel and the city's bus terminal helped with the search.
ref: Rakaman pengawasan dari hotel dan terminal bas bandar membantu dalam siasatan.

src: The woman, described as in her late twenties, of height 1.65 m, and having black hair and almond-shaped eyes, left the hotel with two men and went to the local bus terminal.
ref: Wanita, dijelaskan berusia lewat dua puluhan, dengan ketinggian 1.65 m, dan berambut hitam dan mata berbentuk badam, meninggalkan hotel dengan dua lelaki dan pergi ke terminal bas tempatan.

src: On Thursday, a taxi driver told the media that the day before, he had driven a woman with those features to Cedritos, a neighbourhood in northeast Bogotá.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, pemandu teksi memberitahu media bahawa sehari sebelum itu, dia memandu wanita dengan ciri-ciri berkenaan ke Cedritos, kejiranan di timur laut Bogota.

src: Finally, on Thursday night, the kidnapper, Esmeralda Echeverri Castaño, was taken into custody in Cali.
ref: Akhirnya, pada hari Khamis malam, penculik, Esmeralda Echeverri Castano, telah ditangkap di Cali.

src: She confessed that she had abandoned the baby in a hotel in Armenia, where Maribel was finally found and moved to a hospital.
ref: Dia mengaku telah meninggalkan bayi itu di hotel di Armenia, di mana Maribel akhirnya dijumpai dan dibawa ke hospital.

src: The doctors found the baby to be in good health.
ref: Doktor mendapati bahawa bayi dalam keadaan baik.

src: Maribel's parents, who live in a modest house in Usme, south Bogotá, recognized the baby on Friday early morning, thanks to a digital picture sent from Armenia to the police in Bogotá.
ref: Ibu bapa Maribel, yang tinggal di rumah kos sederhana di Usme, selatan Bogota, mengecam bayi itu pada awal Jumaat pagi, terima kasih kepada gambar digital yang dihantar dari Armenia ke polis di Bogota.

src: The child was returned to her parents at 11:30 a.m. (16:30 UTC) on Friday.
ref: Bayi itu dipulangkan kepada ibu bapanya pada 11:30 a.m. (16:30 UTC) pada hari Jumaat.

src: US president Barack Obama declared a swine flu emergency in the country on Saturday, according to a statement released by the White House.
ref: Presiden US Barack Obama mengisytiharkan kecemasan selsema babi di negara itu pada Sabtu, menurut kepada kenyataan yang dibuat oleh White House.

src: Obama signed a declaration late on Friday, authorising health secretary Kathleen Sebelius to bypass some federal rules, in order to let health officials respond more efficiently to the outbreak of the H1N1 virus.
ref: Obama menandatangani pengisytiharan itu pada lewat Jumaat, setiausaha kesihatan yang bertanggungjawab Kathleen Sebelius untuk memintas beberapa undang-undang persekutuan, untuk membenarkan pegawai-pegawai kesihatan untuk bertindak dengan lebih efisien terhadap wabak virus H1N1.

src: The move is aimed at making it less difficult for people affected by the virus to seek treatment, and allow medical providers to give it immediately, bypassing potential hurdles such as health privacy regulations.
ref: Tindakan itu bertujuan untuk mengurangkan kesusahan orang yang telah dijangkiti virus untuk mendapatkan rawatan, dan membenarkan pembekal kesihatan untuk memberi dengan pantas, memintas halangan-halangan yang berpotensi seperti peraturan-peraturan privasi kesihatan.

src: "As a nation, we have prepared at all levels of government, and as individuals and communities, taking unprecedented steps to counter the emerging pandemic," the president wrote in the declaration.
ref: "Sebagai sebuah negara, kami di semua peringkat kerajaan telah bersedia, dan sebagai individu dan sebuah masyarakat, mengambil langkah-langkah yang belum pernah diambil untuk menangani wak baru ini," tulis presiden dalam deklerasinya.

src: Swine flu has now been circulated in 46 of the 50 US states, and has resulted in at least 411 confirmed deaths since the end of August.
ref: Selsema babi telah merebak di 46 daripada 50 negeri di Us, dan mengakibatkan sekurang-kurangnya 411 terbunuh sejak akhir bulan Ogos.

src: Production of antiviral vaccines has been slower than initially predicted, and it is likely that the US government's targets for delivery won't be met by drug makers, according to Thomas Frieden, the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
ref: Produksi vaksin antiviral telah mula perlahan dari jangkaan awal, dan dilihat bahawa matlamat penghantaran kerajaan US oleh pembuat ubat tidak dapat dicapai, mengikut kepada Thomas Frieden, pengarah Pusat Kawalan dan Pecegahan Penyakit.

src: Windsor Castle, one of Queen Elizabeth II of the United Kingdom's official residences, is to get a hydro-electric power scheme.
ref: Istana Widsor, satu daripada kediaman rasmi Queen Elizabeth United Kingdom, akan mendapat skim tenaga hidro-elektrik.

src: The £1 million project will consist of a series of under-water turbines to be installed at Romney Weir in the nearby River Thames.
ref: Projek L1 milion akan melibatkan siri-siri pemasangan turbin di bawah air di Romney Weir di berhampiran Sungai Thames.

src: The system will generate 200kW, enough to meet approximately one third of the castle's electricity needs.
ref: Sistem akan membekalkan 200kW tenaga, cukup untuk memenuhi hampir satu daripada tiga keperluan elektrik di istana.

src: The electricity from the four turbines will not be sold into the local electricity grid, but will instead be directly connected to Windsor Castle's electrical system.
ref: Elektrik dari empat turbin tidak akan dijual kepada grid elektrik tempatan, tetapi sebaliknya akan disambung terus ke sistem elektrik Istana Windsor.

src: It will save 600 tonnes of carbon dioxide from being released into the atmosphere every year.
ref: Ia akan menjimatkan 600 tan karbon dioksida daripada dibebaskan ke atmosfera setiap tahun.

src: The scheme was announced after it gained planning permission from the local council, the plans having been submitted in February of last year.
ref: Skim itu diumumkan selepas mendapat plan kebenaran daripada majlis tempatan, plan tersebut telah dihantar pada Februari tahun lepas.

src: A feasibility study will now be conducted, with construction scheduled to start next year.
ref: Penyelidakan perlaksanaan kini sedang dijalankan, dengan proses pembinaan dijadualkan bermula tahun hadapan.

src: The Windsor Castle is not the only environmentally-friendly Royal scheme.
ref: Istana Widsor bukanlah satu-satunya skim Diraja yang mesra alam.

src: A borehole beneath Buckingham Palace provides cold water for air-conditioning and the Duke of Edinburgh's taxi runs on liquid petroleum gas.
ref: Lubang gerudi di bawah Istana Buckingham membekalkan air sejuk untuk penyaman udara dan teksi Duke of Edinburgh bergerak menggunakan cecair petroleum gas.

src: The New Zealand government has announced that it will be reviewing funding for medical and dentistry students at Otago and Auckland Universities to certify the institutions' standards and help staff retention.
