ref: Kerajaan New Zealand telah mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan mengkaji semula pembiayaan bagi pelajar jurusan perubatan dan pergigian di Universiti Otago dan Auckland untuk mengesahkan taraf institusi berkenaan dan membantu pengekalan kakitangan.

src: The dean of Auckland University's Faculty of Medical and Health Sciences, Professor Iain Martin says the review “can’t come soon enough”.
ref: Dekan Fakulti Perubatan dan Sains Kesihatan Universiti Auckland, Profesor Iain Martin berkata kajian semula itu "akan ada tidak lama lagi."

src: It says that it has been worried about student debt for years "High debt encourages too many graduates overseas, or into high paying areas of practice at the expense of areas like general practice"
ref: Ia mengatakan bahawa ia telah bimbang mengenai hutang pelajar bertahun lamanya "Hutang yang tinggi menggalakkan graduan ramai di luar negara, atau amalan ke kawasan yang membayar tinggi dengan kehilangan kawasan amalan umum."

src: The investigation into the plane crash that killed Polish President Lech Kaczyński has revealed that passengers were in the cockpit of the crashed plane.
ref: Siasatan ke atas nahas kapal terbang yang meragut nyawa Presiden Poland Lech Kaczyński mendapati bahawa penumpang di dalam kokpit pesawat yang terhempas.

src: According to the head of the technical commission involved with investigating the crash, Alexei Morozov, the crew of the aircraft had been warned of limited visibility, although it has not been determined whether or not the crew's decision to land had been influenced by the passengers on board.
ref: Menurut ketua suruhanjaya teknikal yang terlibat dalam siasatan nahas, Alexei Morozov, anak-anak kapal pesawat telah diberi amaran penglihatan terhad, walaupun ia belum ditentukan sama ada ya atau tidak keputusan anak-anak kapal untuk mendarat telah dipengaruhi oleh penumpang kapal.

src: The cause of the crash has not been identified, although the possibility of an explosion or terrorist attack on board the aircraft has been ruled out.
ref: Punca nahas itu masih belum dikenal pasti, walaupun kemungkinan letupan atau serangan pengganas di dalam pesawat telah ditolak.

src: Morozov also said that the crew on board the plane had not been properly trained for the flight, and had been assembled only a few days before the flight.
ref: Morozov juga berkata bahawa anak-anak kapal dalam pesawat itu tidak dilatih dengan elok untuk penerbangan, dan dihimpun beberapa hari sebelum penerbangan.

src: He said that the crew "did not undergo regular simulated training, including the practice of co-ordination and emergency situations during flights."
ref: Dia berkata bahawa anak-anak kapal "tidak menjalani latihan simulasi yang kerap, termasuk amalan koordinasi dan situasi kecemasan semasa penerbangan."

src: The overall leader of the investigation, Tatyana Anodina, confirmed that unauthorized people had been in the cockpit near the end of the flight, saying that "in the cockpit there were individuals who were not members of the crew."
ref: Ketua keseluruhan siasatan, Tatyana Anodina, mengesahkan bahawa orang yang tidak dibenarkan telah berada di kokpit di akhir penerbangan, berkata bahawa "di dalam kokpit terdapat individu yang bukan ahli daripada anak-anak kapal."

src: One person had been identified, although their name has not been released.
ref: Seorang telah dikenal pasti, walaupun nama mereka belum dikeluarkan.

src: The investigation also found that the aircraft involved had been in normal operating condition; Anodina said that "[t]he engines were working up till the moment the plane collided with the ground."
ref: Siasatan juga mendapati bahawa pesawat yang terlibat berada dalam keadaan operasi normal; Anodina berkata bahawa "enjin [itu] berfungsi sehingga pesawat berlanggar dengan tanah."

src: Two 11-year-old twin brothers were found stabbed in their home in Penn Hills, Pennsylvania on Tuesday.
ref: Dua adik-beradik kembar berusia 11 tahun didapati ditikam di rumah mereka di Penn Hills, Pennsylvania pada hari Selasa.

src: Their older brother is being charged with the stabbings, one of which was fatal.
ref: Abang mereka disabitkan kesalahan menikam, satu daripadanya membawa maut.

src: Grandfather Lovett Williams said Tyrel was found upon his dead brother, Tyron.
ref: Datuk Lovett Williams berkata Tyrel dijumpai semasa Tyron, adiknya telah mati.

src: While Tyron was pronounced dead at the scene, Tyrel underwent hours of surgery at Children's Hospital in Pittsburgh and is expected to survive.
ref: Walaupun Tyron disahkan meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian, Tyrel menjalani pembedahan berjam-jam di Hospital Kanak-Kanak di Pittsburgh dan dijangka untuk terus hidup.

src: Williams allegedly told police that Tyrel said his 18-year-old brother, Troy Lavalle Hill, was their killer.
ref: Williams mendakwa memberitahu polis bahawa Tyrel berkata abangnya yang berusia 18 tahun, Troy Lavalle Hill, ialah pembunuh mereka.

src: The boys have a 3-year-old sister who was not home at the time of the stabbing.
ref: Kanak-kanak lelaki itu mempunyai seorang adik perempuan berusia 3 tahun yang tiada di rumah semasa mereka ditikam.

src: Search parties worked throughout the night on Tuesday looking for Hill but he did not turn up until a neighbor spotted the suspect on Loretta Drive in Penn Hills.
ref: Pihak pencarian bekerja sepanjang malam pada hari Selasa mencari Hill tetapi dia tidak menonjolkan diri sehingga seorang jiran ternampak suspek di Loretta Drive di Penn Hills.

src: Troy Lavalle Hill reportedly has a history of emotional problems.
ref: Troy Lavalle Hill dilaporkan mempunyai sejarah masalah emosi.

src: "They were great athletes, straight-A students, just good, little boys...It's tough," said neighbor Don Taylor.
ref: "Mereka atlet yang hebat, pelajar yang mendapat semua A, hanya baik, kanak-kanak lelaki...Ianya sukar," kata jiran Don Taylor.

src: Another neighbor added, "Wonderful neighbors, just the sweetest kids I've ever known."
ref: Seorang jiran lagi menambah, "Jiran-jiran yang indah, hanya kanak-kanak manis yang saya pernah tahu."

src: Grief counselors were on duty at the childrens' middle school, Linton Middle School.
ref: Kaunselor yang sedih bertugas di sekolah menengah kanak-kanak itu, Sekolah Menengah Linton.

src: There is no word on a motive in the case.
ref: Tidak ada kata pada motif dalam kes itu.

src: Grandfather Williams said, "I don't know how I'm going to make it...I moved here so I could be with my grandsons.
ref: Datuk Williams berkata, "Saya tidak tahu bagaimana saya akan menempuhnya...saya berpindah ke sini supaya saya dapat bersama cucu saya.

src: As long as [Tyrel] makes it, I might make it, too."
ref: Selagi [Tyrel] menempuhnya, saya mungkin menempuhnya, juga."

src: Vail, Colorado, United States — Yesterday, Wikinews sat down with Australian blind Paralympic skier Melissa Perrine who was participating in a national team training camp in Vail, Colorado.
ref: Vail, colorado, Amerika syarikat - Semalam, Wikinews duduk bersama pemain ski buta Paralimpk Australia Melissa Perrine yang telah mengambil bahagian dalam kem latihan pasukan kebangsaan di Vail, Colorado.

src: And are you like Jess Gallagher and just here training and not competing?
ref: Dan adakah anda suka kepada Jess Gallagher dan hanya berada disini untuk latihan dan bukan bertanding?

src: I want to let you get back to changing.
ref: Saya mahu biarkan anda balik untuk menyalin pakaian.

src: An Asiana Airlines Boeing 777 airplane crashed upon landing at San Francisco International Airport around 11:30 AM local time today.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Asiana Airlines Boeing 777 telah terhempas semasa pendaratan di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa San Francisco sekitar jam 11:30 AM waktu tempatan hari ini.

src: Flight #214, coming from Seoul, carrying 291 passengers — including one infant, and 16 crew members — crashed on runway 28L.
ref: Pesawat #214 datang dari Seoul, membawa 291 penumpang- termasuk seorang bayi, dan 16 akan kapal - terhempas di landasan 28L.

src: Two deaths are reported and 10 passengers were taken to San Francisco General Hospital critically injured.
ref: Dua kematian dilaporkan dan 10 penumpang telah dihantar ke Hospital Awam San Francisco dilaporkan cedera parah.

src: In total, officials report 181 people were hospitalized and one person remains unaccounted for.
ref: Secara keseluruhan, laporan rasmi 181 orang dimasukkan ke hospital dan seorang lagi masih tidak dikira.

src: It is reported that when the airplane took off from Seoul, smoke was coming from the airplane.
ref: Dilaporkan bahawa semasa pesawat itu berlepas dari Seoul, asap kelihatan keluar dari pesawat terbabit.

src: The weather was good as the plane was landing in San Francisco.
ref: Cuaca amat baik semasa pesawat melakukan pendaratan di San Francisco.

src: According to David Eun, a passenger on the airplane and the executive vice president of Samsung, the tail came off of the plane upon landing.
ref: Menurut David Eun, seorang penumpang dalam pesawat terbabit dan Naib presiden Eksekutif Samsung, ekor pesawat terbabit terkeluar semasa pesawat mendarat.

src: A non-passenger witness, Anthony Castorani, has reported that a fireball formed upon the plane landing and that the plane flipped over.
ref: Seorang saksi bukan penumpang, Anthony Castorani, telah dilaporkan percikan api terhasil semasa pesawat mendarat dan pesawat itu terbalik.

src: A large portion of the passenger area of the plane was on fire and has burned out.
ref: Sebahagian besar bahagian penumpang dalam pesawat itu telah terbakar.

src: Passengers were seen using emergency slides to escape the wreckage.
ref: Penunmpang dilihat menggunakan gelongsor kecemasan untuk keluar dari bangkai pesawat.

src: There have been no reports stating that the airplane pilot made distress calls before the accident.
ref: Tiada laporan yang menyatakan bahawa juruterbang pesawat melakukan penggilan kecemasan sebelum kemalangan.

src: Law enforcement does not believe the accident was the result of terrorism or criminal activity.
ref: Penguatkuasaan undang-undang tidak percaya kemalangan adalah hasil dari pengganas atau aktiviti penjenayah.

src: The National Transportation Safety Board will be investigating the crash.
ref: Lembaga Keselamatan Pengangkutan akan menyiasat nahas terbabit.

src: The airport was closed to all incoming and outgoing air and vehicle traffic until 3:30 PM local time, when it opened 2 runways.
ref: Lapangan terbang telah ditutup kepada semua pesawat masuk dan keluar dan laluan trafik sehingga 3:30PM waktu tempatan, semasa ia membuka 2 landasan.

src: More than 70 flights headed to San Francisco were not allowed to land at the airport and were sent to other cities.
ref: Lebih 70 penerbangan menghala ke San Francisco tidak dibenarkan mendarat di lapangan terbang dan diubah ke bandar lain.

src: Some flights have been diverted to Sacramento International Airport and Delta Air Lines has canceled 10 flights to and from San Francisco.
ref: Sesetengah pesawat telah diubah haluan ke Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Sacramento dan Delta Airlines telah menbatalkan 10 penerbangan kepada dan dari San Francisco.

src: United Airlines and Virgin America offered passengers the opportunity to change the flights at no extra cost until Monday.
ref: United Airlines dan Virgin America menawarkan peluang kepada penumpang untuk menukar penerbangan sehingga Isnin dengan tidak dikenakan sebarang caj.

src: Sheryl Sandberg, Facebook Chief Operating Officer, was supposed to travel on the Asiana flight.
ref: Sherly Sandberg, Ketua Pegawai Operasi Facebook, sepatutnya terbang bersama pesawat Asiana.

src: She rescheduled, along with colleagues, her flight to fly on United Airlines instead.
ref: Beliau menjadualkan semula, bersama rakan-rakna beliau, penerbangannya untuk terbang menggunakan United Airlines.

src: A Boeing 777 can hold as many as 300 passengers.
ref: Pesawat boeing 777 mampu membawa sebanyak 300 orang penumpang.

src: The National Hockey League (NHL) has handed down a season-long suspension, including the playoffs, to Chris Simon of the New York Islanders.
ref: Liga Hoki nasional (NHL) telah menjatuhkan penggantungan musim panjang, termasuk pertandingan kepada Chris Simon dari New York Islanders.

src: The suspension, for a minimum of 25 games, is a ruling for a hit Simon laid on Ryan Hollweg of the New York Rangers during a March 8 game at Nassau Veterans' Memorial Coliseum.
ref: Penggantungan itu, minimum 25 permainan, akibat pukulan Simon terkena pada pemain New York Rangers Ryan Hollweg semasa permainan pada 8 Mac di Colleseum Peringatan Veteren Nassau.

src: In a press release earlier today, the NHL indicated that they considered Simon's hit on Hollweg, with a stick to the face, to be a deliberate intent to injure.
ref: Dalam kenyataan akhbar awal hari ini, NHL menetapkan bahawa pukulan Simon ke atas Hollweg, dengan tepat ke muka, dianggap dengan niat untuk mencederakan.

src: "The National Hockey League will not accept the use of a stick in the manner and fashion in which Mr. Simon used his Thursday night," said Colin Campbell, NHL Senior Executive Vice President and Director of Hockey Operations.
ref: "Liga Hoki Nasional tidak akan menerima kegunaan kayu dalam apa keadaan dan fesyen seperti mana yang digunakan oleh Encik Simon malam Khamis," kata Colin Campbell, Naib Presiden Pegawai Atasan NHL dan Pengarah Operasi Hoki.

src: After receiving a hard check from Hollweg, Simon swung his stick and delivered a two-handed blow to Hollweg's upper body, causing a cut on Hollweg's chin.
ref: Selepas menerima penghinaan dari Hollweg, Simon menghayunkan kayu nya dan mengenai dua bengkak di bahagian atas badan Hollweg, mengakibatkan luka pada dagu Hollweg.

src: Based on his $1-million contract, which expires at the conclusion of the 2006-07 season, Simon forfeits a minimum of $80,213.90.
ref: Berdasarkan kontrak $1 juta, yang akan tamat pada konklusi musim 2006-07, Simon kehilangan minimun $80,213.90.

src: The suspension could carry over into the 2007-2008 hockey season, depending on how far the Islanders advance into the playoffs.
ref: Penggantungan ini mukin membawa kepada musim hoki 2007-2008, bergantung kepada sejauh mana Islander mara ke pusingan penentuan.

src: According to the NHL press release, if the Islanders do not qualify for the 2007 playoffs, or play fewer than 10 playoff games in the 2007 playoffs, Simon would serve additional games at the start of the 2007-08 regular season to satisfy the minimum term of the suspension.
ref: Menurut kenyataan akhbar NHL, jika Islander tidak ada kualiti untuk permainan 2007, atau main kurang dari 10 permainan dalam musim 2007, Simon akan berkhidmat untuk permainan tambahan pada awal musim biasa 2007-08 untuk melengkapkan syarat minimum penggantungan.

src: Garth Snow, General Manager of the Islanders, indicated his support for Simon in a brief press release.
ref: Garth Snow, Pengurus Besar Islander, menyatakan sokongan kepada Simon dalam kenyataan akhbar.

src: "I spoke with Colin Campbell this morning and he informed me of his decision.
ref: "Saya telah bercakap dengan Colin Campbell pagi tadi dan beliau memberi tahu saya tentang keputusannya.

src: Chris Simon has played a major role in our success this season and we will miss his presence in our lineup.
ref: Chris Simon telah memainkan peranan penting dalam kejayaan kita musim ini dan kita akan rindu akan kehadirannya dalam barisan kita.

src: His regret is clearly evident in the statement he released last night.
ref: Beliau menyesal dengan tindakan beliau dalam kenyataan yang dikeluarkan tahun lepas.

src: Our entire organization supports Chris every step of the way."
ref: Semua organisasi kita akan menyokong Chris dalam setiap tindakan."

src: In a statement March 10, prior to the verdict, Simon expressed regret for his actions.
ref: Dalam kenyataan 10 Mac, Sebelum keputusan dibuat, Simon menyatakan penyesalan terhadap perbuatannya.

src: "After watching the tape the morning after Thursday's game, I was disgusted.
ref: "Selepas melihat rakaman pada pagi Khamis, saya rasa menyampah.

src: There is absolutely no place in hockey for what I did.
ref: Tiada tempat dalam hoki sperti yang dia lakukan.

src: I was grateful to learn that Ryan is okay and that he returned to the game.
ref: Saya bersyukur untuk belajar bahawa Ryan okey dan beliau kembali ke permainan.

src: My hope is to reach out to him in the near future."
ref: Harapan saya untuk mendekati beliau pada masa hadapan."

src: Simon explains that his behavior may have been influenced by a hit he received less than a minute before his stick swinging incident.
ref: Simon menjelaskan bahawa sikap itu mungkin didorong oleh pukulan yang diterima kurang seminit sebelum kayunya menghayunkan inseiden itu.

src: When I saw the tape on Friday morning, it explained a lot to me when I saw the look on my face after being hit into the boards.
ref: Semasa saya melihat rakaman itu Jumaat pagi, ia banyak menjelaskan semasa melihat muka saya selepas dipukul oleh kayu.

src: Simon didn't appear to let it excuse his hit on Hollweg.
ref: Simon tidak muncul untuk menyatakan sebab untuk memukul Hollweg.

src: "I need to make clear that this is not justification for the danger I put Ryan Hollweg in and the damage I have caused the game.
ref: "Saya perlukan penjelasan yang jelas bahawa ini bukan justifikasi untuk meletakkan Ryan Hollweg dalam bahaya dan menyebabkan masalah.

src: The Associated Press indicated that criminal charges against Simon are being considered.
ref: Associated Press menyatakan pendakwaan jenayah terhadap Simon akan dipertimbangkan.

src: According to a spokesperson for Nassau County District Attorney Kathleen Rice, "no decision has been reached" on bringing charges, but that "prosecutors would review the tape."
ref: Menurut jurucakap untuk Mahkamah Daerah Negara Nassau Kathleen Rice, "tiada keputusan yang telah dicapai" terhadap denda, tetapi "pendakwa raya akan meneliti rakaman tersebut."

src: Raouf Amin el-Araby, a 52-year-old Egyptian doctor who has been serving the Saudi Royal family for 20 years, was convicted of malpractice.
ref: Raouf Amin el_Araby, seorang doktor Mesir berusia 52 tahun yang berkhidmat keluarga diraja Saudi selama 20 tahun, disabitkan dengan penyelewengan.

src: Egyptian newspapers reported that he was accused of driving a Saudi princess "to addiction", reportedly after treating a Saudi princess with painkillers.
ref: Akhbar Mesir melaporkan bahawa dia dituduh menyebabkan puteri Saudi "ketagihan," dilaporkan setelah merawat puteri Saudi dengan ubat tahan sakit.

src: Initially sentenced to 7 years and 700 lashes, he has been sentenced to 15 years and 1500 lashes, 70 a week, after making an appeal.
ref: Asalnya dihukum selama 7 tahun dan 700 sebatan, dia telah dihukum kepada 15 tahun dan 1500 sebatan, 70 seminggu, selepas membuat rayuan.

src: Family members, friends and colleagues gathered in outrage and grief outside the headquarters of Egypt's doctors union, calling upon King Abdullah to pardon Raouf.
ref: Ahli keluarga, rakan dan rakan sekerja berkumpul dalam kemarahan dan kesedihan di luar ibu pejabat kesatuan doktor Mesir, menyeru Raja Abdullah untuk mengampuni Raouf.

src: "1,500 lashes is unprecedented in the history of Islam," read one banner carried by protesters.
ref: "1,500 sebatan tidak pernah berlaku dalam sejarah Islam," menurut satu kain rentang yang dibawa oleh penentang.

src: "Who is responsible for the humiliation of our doctors abroad?" read another.
ref: "Siapakah yang bertanggungjawab kepada kehinaan doktor kita di luar negara?" kata yang lain.

src: The Egyptian Organization for Human Rights (EOHR) and the foreign minister are working hard to find a way to return Raouf home quickly.
ref: Badan Hak Asasi Manusia Mesir (EOHR) dan Menteri Luar bekerja keras untuk mencari jalan membawa Raouf pulang ke rumah secepatnya.

src: Hafez Abu Saeda, the director of EOHR, stated that the princess was prescribed the same medication that she was receiving in the United States, "so it is obvious that the doctor was not at fault for her addiction."
ref: Hafez Abu Saeda, pengarah EOHR, menyatakan bahawa puteri tersebut diberikan ubat yang sama yang baginda terima di Amerika Syarikat, "ia amat jelas bahawa doktor tersebut bukanlah sebab ketagihan baginda."

src: Protests in Egypt have driven the Egyptian foreign ministry to seek a solution, partly out of concern that negative repercussions may damage relations between Cairo and Riyadh.
ref: Protes di Mesir telah mendorong menteri luar Mesir untuk mencari penyelesaian, sebahagian besar berikutan risau reaksi negatif mampu merosakkan hubungan antara Kaherah dan Riyadh.

src: A human rights lawyer said that he was given the first 70 lashes last week and he will get 70 more this week.
ref: Seorang peguam hak asasi manusia berkata bahawa dia telah disebat sebanyak 70 kali mingu lepas dan akan disebat 70 lagi minggu ini.

src: There are two things one can expect on a trip to see Michael Musto at the offices of the Village Voice: a 20-minute round-trip wait for the elevator and rapid fire answers from one of the most recognizable gossip columnists in the United States.
ref: Terdapat dua perkara seseorang boleh berharap dalam perjalanan melihat Michael Musto di pejabat Village Voice: 20 minit menunggu lif pergi balik dan jawapan bertubi-tubi daripada salah seorang penulis gosip yang dikenali di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Musto, in addition to his appearances on Countdown with Keith Olbermann and the E! network, has been writing his column for the Voice since 1984.
ref: Musto, sebagai tambahan kepada kemunculannya di Countdown bersama Keith Olbermann dan rangkaian E!, telah menulis kolum beliau untuk Voice sejak 1984.

src: He has recently compiled the best of them in a book released this year titled, La Dolce Musto: Writings by the World's Most Outrageous Columnist.
ref: Beliau baru-baru ini mengompilasikan kolum yang terbaik dalam satu buku yang dilancarkan tahun ini berjudul, La Bolce Musto: Writings by the World's Most Outrageous Columnist.

src: He was Carrie Bradshaw, replete with a prodigious use of puns, before Sex and the City was a thought.
ref: Beliau merupakan Carrie Bradshaw, penuh dengan jenaka luar biasa, sebelum Sex and the City difikirkan.

src: His column is a romp through his life, spats and opinions on socio-political issues.
ref: Ruangan beliau merupakan pergelutan dalam kehidupannya, pertingkaian dan pendapat mengenai isu sosio politik.

src: As David Thigpen of the Chicago Tribune wrote, Musto is "a funny and caustic satirist who masquerades as a gossip and nightlife columnist."
ref: David Thignen daripada Chicago Tribune menulis, Musto adalah "seorang yang lawak dan penyidir tajam yang menggunakan samaran sebagai penulis gosip dan hiburan malam."

src: Musto, a Columbia University graduate, is a rarity in today's celebrity world: he is accessible.
ref: Musto, seorang graduan Universiti Columbia, jarang ditemui dalam dunia selebriti hari ini: mudah didampingi.

src: He often corresponds with his readers and his public functions are a mix of parties, nightclubs, academic lectures, university panels and film premieres.
ref: Beliau sering berkomunikasi dengan pembaca beliau dan majlis keramaian beliau adalah campuran parti, kelab malam, kuliah akademik, panel universiti dan tayangan perdana filem.

src: He is friendly and frank, and he welcomes people to join him in his world ("I just got a message that Michael Lucas died!" he says staring wide-eyed at his phone; the message turned out to be false).
ref: Beliau seorang yang peramah dan jujur, dan mengalu-alukan orang ramai untuk menyertai beliau dalam dunianya ("Saya baru sahaja menerima mesej bahawa Michael Lucas meninggal!" beliau berkata sambil merenung luas telefonnya; mesej tersebut sebenarnya adalah palsu).

src: Wikinews reporter David Shankbone spoke with Musto about his life and his relationship to the world of celebrity journalism.
ref: Wartawan Wikinews David Shankbone berbicara dengan Musto mengenai kehidupan beliau dan hubungan dengan dunia journalism selebriti.

src: An extensive vaccination campaign across 19 West and Central African countries is to begin today in an attempt to stem a year-long polio epidemic in the region.
ref: Kempen vaksinasi besar-besaran seluruh 19 negara Barat dan Afrika Tengah bermula hari ini dalam satu cubaan untuk menangkis wabak polio sejak setahun lama dalam wilayah tersebut.

src: The United Nations and international aid agencies plan to immunize 85 million children under five.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan agensi bantuan antarabangsa bercadang untuk memberi imunisasi 85 juta kanak-kanak bawah lima tahun.

src: More than 400, 000 volunteers and health workers will take part in the campaign, visiting children in their homes.
ref: Lebih 400,000 sukarelawan dan pekerja kesihatan akan menyertai kempen tersebut, melawat kanak-kanak di rumah mereka.

src: The current polio epidemic has been going on for a year and there have been outbreaks in the last six months in Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Chad, Guinea, Liberia, Mali, Mauritania, Senegal and Sierra Leone.
ref: Wabak polio ini telah berjalan selama setahun dan terdapat penularan dalam tempoh enam bulan lepas di Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Chad, Guinea, Liberia, Mali, Mauritania, Ssenegal dan Sierra Leone.

src: These countries will be the focus of the campaign, along with Benin, Cape Verde, Central African Republic, Côte d'Ivoire, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea-Bissau, Niger, Nigeria and Togo.
ref: Negara-negara ini akan menjadi fokus kempen, disertai dengan Benin, Cape Verde, Republik Afrika Tengah, Cote d'Ivoire, Gambia, Ghana, Guniea-Bissau, Niger, Nigeria dan Togo.

src: Efforts last year failed to halt the disease because not enough children were vaccinated.
ref: Usaha tahun lepas gagal untuk menghentikan penyakit kerana kanak-kanak yang divaksinasikan masih tidak cukup.

src: The program failed in part because local religious leaders told parents that the vaccines would sterilize their children, or cause AIDS.
ref: Program tersebut kerana pemimpin agama tempatan menyatakan kepada ibu bapa bahawa vaksin mensterilkan anak-anak mereka, atau menyebabkan AIDS.

src: As well as targeting more children, today's campaign features better training for volunteers.
ref: Di samping menyasarkan lebih ramai kanak-kanak, kempen hari ini menawarkan latihan yang lebih baik kepada sukarelawan.

src: Vaccinations will be repeated on 26 March in the six key countries, and again on 24 April for all 19 countries involved.
ref: Vaksinasi akan diulang pada 26 Mac di 6 negara utama, dan lagi pada 24 April bagi semua 19 negara terlibat.

src: The campaign is funded by Rotary International who have provided $30 million.
ref: Kempen ini dibiayai oleh Rotary International yang memberi sebanyak $30 juta.

src: In 2009 the World Health Organization reported that approximately 1,600 children were paralysed by the virus worldwide.
ref: Pada 2009 Organisasi Kesihatan Dunia melaporkan bahawa sekitar 1,600 kanak-kanak lumpuh berikutan virus tersebut sedunia.

src: Doctors performing a Caesarian delivery in a Darwin, Australia hospital were stunned to discover a rare ovarian ectopic pregnancy.
ref: Doktor yang menjalankan bedah sesar di sebuah hospital di Darwin Australia terkejut dengan penemuan kandungan luar rahim yang jarang berlaku.

src: According to Robin Cahill, general manager of the Darwin Private Hospital, ovarian pregnancies occur in only 1 in every 40,000 fertilisations.
ref: Menurut Robin Cahill, pengurus besar Hospital Swasta Darwin, kanduangan luar rahim berlaku hanya 1 dalam setiap 40,000 persenyawaan.

src: An ectopic pregnancy occurs when a fertilised egg implants in a woman's body in a location other than the uterus.
ref: Kandungan luar rahim berlaku apabila telur yang disenyawakan diimplan dalam badan wanita di satu lokasi selain daripada uterus.

src: The most common place for an ectopic pregnancy to occur is the Fallopian tubes, accounting for roughly 95% of all ectopic pregnancies.
ref: Tempat yang paling biasa bagi kandungan luar rahim untuk berlaku adalah di tiub Fallopian, menyumbang kira-kira 95% daripada kesemua kandungan luar rahim.

src: Ectopic pregnancies are generally discovered early, especially as they tend to cause bleeding in the mother, and tend to miscarry or be terminated due to the health risks they pose.
ref: Kandunga luar rahim biasanya dijumpai lebih awal, terutamanya ia cenderung untuk mengakibatkan pendarahan kepada ibu, dan cenderung untuk mengakibatkan keguguran atau dihentikan atas sebab risiko kesihatan yang ditimbulkan.

src: The mother, Meera Thangarajah, however, suffered no complications during her pregnancy, and an ultrasound performed mid-way through the pregnancy did not discover the complication.
ref: Ibu, Meera Thangarajah, bagaimanapun, tidak mengalami sebarang komplikasi sepanjang kehamilannya, dan ultrabunyi yang dijalankan semasa pertengahan kehamilannya tidak menemui komplikasi tersebut.

src: The hospital's obstetrician Andrew Miller says that having an ovarian pregnancy survive to full-term is "unheard of".
ref: Pakar obstetrik hospital tersebut Andrew Miller berkata bahawa kandungan luar rahim yang bertahan jangka penuh adalah "tidak pernah didengari."

src: The British Royal College of Obstetricians and Gynaecologists agrees, with a representative saying the odds of a successful ovarian pregnancy are "no more than one in a million", taking into account both the difficulty of bringing such a pregnancy to term and the tendency for the pregnancy to be terminated when it is discovered early.
ref: Obstetrik dan pakar sakit puan Kolej Diraja British bersetuju, seorang jurucakap yang berkata bahawa kemungkinan kejayaan kandungan luar rahim adalah "tidak lebih daripada satu dalam sejuta," mengambil kira kedua-dua kesukaran untuk membawa kandungan tersebut memenuhi tempoh dan kecenderungan untuk kehamilan dihentikan apabila ia ditemui di peringkat awal.

src: The baby, a girl, was named Durga, a Hindu name meaning "goddess", and weighed 6 pounds 3 ounces (2.8 kg).
ref: Bayi tersebut, perempuan, dinamakan Durga, nama Hindu yang bermaksud "dewi," dan beratnya 6 paun dan 3 aun (2.8 kg).

src: The father, Ravi Thangarajah, says that doctors told him he was "one of the luckiest men in the world".
ref: Bapa, Ravi Thangarajah, menyatakan bahawa doktor memberitahunya yang dia adalah "salah satu lelaki yang paling bertuah di dunia."

src: People came across Canada to Ottawa to celebrate Canada's 139th birthday.
ref: Orang ramai datang merentasi Kanada ke Ottawa untuk menyambut ulang tahun ke 139 Kanada.

src: About 25,000 people including Prime Minister Stephen Harper, his wife and their two children were there.
ref: Sekitar 25,000 orang termasuk Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper, isteri beliau dan dua anak mereka berada di sana.

src: Military veterans, medal-winning Olympic athletes and some of Canada's biggest names in music were there.
ref: Tentera veteran, pemenang pingat atlet Olimpik dan sebahagian nama-nama besar dalam muzik juga berada di sana.

src: Canadian artists like Colin James and Annie Villeneuve performed in front of the Peace Tower.
ref: Artis Kanada seperti Colin James dan Annie Villeneuve membuat persembahan di hadapan Menara Keamanan.

src: Since Canada has two official languages (English and French) some artists were from Quebec and sung in French.
ref: Sejak Kanada mempunyai dua bahasa rasmi (Bahasa Inggeris dan Bahasa Perancis) sebahagian artis dari Quebec dan menyanyi dalam Bahasa Perancis.

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper urged Canadians to pay tribute to the soldiers and aid workers in Afghanistan.
ref: Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper meminta rakyat Kanada untuk memberi penghormatan kepada tentera dan pekerja bantuan keselamatan di Afghanistan.

src: "Let's show our appreciation, today and every day, to those who do it best for us in Afghanistan and around the world," Harper said.
ref: "Marilah kita menunjukkan penghargaan, hari ini dan setiap hari, kepada mereka yang melakukan yang terbaik bagi kita di Afghanistan dan seluruh dunia," kata Harper.

src: "Our diplomats, our development workers and brave men and women of the Canadian Forces."
ref: "Diplomat kita, pegawai pembangunan kita dan Angkatan Tentera Kanada lelaki dan wanita yang berani."

src: Michaëlle Jean noted Canada's prosperity, including in her remarks a thank you to the people who toil to provide the country with a safe and plentiful food supply.
ref: Michaelle Jean menyatakan kemakmuran Kanada, memasukkan dalam kenyataan beliau satu ucapan terima kasih kepada mereka yang bekerja keras untuk menyediakan bekalan makanan negara yang selamat dan banyak.

src: Bill Graham released a statement describing Canada as being like no other country, "made up of individuals, representing all ethnicities and all religions, bound together by our shared values of family, community, tolerance and freedom."
ref: Bill Graham mengeluarkan satu kenyataan menggambarkan Kanada sebagai sebuah negara tidak seperti yang lain, "terdiri daripada individu, mewakili semua kumpulan etnik dan agama, terikat bersama oleh nilai kekeluargaan, komuniti, toleransi dan kebebasan yang sama."

src: Musicians performed in front of the Peace Tower, and fireworks ended the show.
ref: Ahli Muzik melakukan persembahan di hadapan Menara Keamanan, dan bunga api menamatkan acara tersebut.

src: George W. Bush, the president of the United States has visited Tennessee, which was hit by over 25 tornadoes which caused over 33 deaths.
ref: George W. Bush, presiden Amerika Syarikat telah melawat Tennessee, yang dilanda lebih 25 tornado menyebabkan lebih 33 kematian.

src: In the visit Mr.Bush said that "the government has got a role to play" in repairing the damage from the tornado and that anyone who has been affected should call 1-800-621-3362 to "find out the help that is available."
ref: Dalam lawatan tersebut Encik Bush berkata, "kerajaan perlu memainkan peranan" dalam membaiki kerosakan daripada tornado dan sesiapa yang terjejas hendaklah menghubungi 1-800-621-3362 untuk "mencari pertolongan yang disediakan."

src: Later in the speech Mr.Bush said that he's "sorry you're going through what you're going through," to the residents of Macon County, which he was visiting.
ref: Kemudian dalam ucapan tersebut Encik Bush berkata "maaf kerana kamu melalui apa yang sedang kamu lalui," kepada penduduk Daerah Macon, yang dilawati beliau.

src: He continued by saying that "life sometimes is unfair and you don't get to play the hand that you wanted to play," and that he believes "the question is when you get dealt the hand, how do you play it?"
ref: Beliau meneruskan dengan berkata bahawa "hidup kadang kala adalah tidak adil dan kamu tidak dapat membuat pilihan seperti yang kamu pilih," dan beliau percaya "persoalannya adalah apabila kamu dipilih, bagaimana kamu menguruskannya?"

src: He continued by saying that the community of Macon County "is going to be as strong as ever."
ref: Beliau meneruskan lagi dengan berkata bahawa komuniti Daerah Macon "akan menjadi kuat seperti dahulu."

src: Andry Rajoelina, who ousted Madagascan ex-president President Marc Ravalomanana earlier this week, officially became the leader of the country, after being sworn in on Saturday.
ref: Andry Rajoelina, yang menyingkirkan bekas presiden Madagascar Presiden Marc Ravalomanana awal minggu ini, secara rasmi menjadi pemimpin negara, selepas mengangkat sumpah Sabtu lalu.

src: National television broadcasted the inauguration, which occurred at a soccer field in Antananarivo, the capital of Madagascar.
ref: Televisyen kebangsaan menyiarkan pelantikan tersebut, yang diadakan di padang bola sepak di Antananarivo, ibu negara Madagascar.

src: Tens of thousands of people attended the event, although approximately 2,000 supporters of Ravalomanana held protests in the capital's Democracy Square.
ref: Berpuluh-puluh ribu orang menghadiri majlis tersebut, walaupun sekitar 2,000 penyokong Ravalomanana mengadakan protes di Democracy Square ibu negara.

src: "We proclaim today the end of the dictatorship," said the new president, promising to tackle corruption that was rife under Ravalomanana.
ref: "Kami mengishtiharkan hari ini sebagai tamatnya pemerintahan diktator," kata presiden baru, berjanji untuk menangani rasuah yang berleluasa di bawah Ravalomanana.

src: Earlier this week, then-president Ravalomanana gave up his power to military forces, which subsequently gave Rajoelina control over the government.
ref: Awal minggu ini, mantan presiden Ravalomanana menyerahkan kuasa kepada angkatan tentera, yang akhirnya memberi Rajoelina menguasai kerajaan.

src: Many foreign powers, among them the United States and France, have denounced the change in leadership as a coup.
ref: Kebanyakan kuasa asing, antara mereka adalah Amerika Syarikat dan Perancis, telah mengutuk perubahan dalam kepimpinan secara kudeta.

src: Norway and the US have both frozen all non-humanitarian aid to Madagascar, whilst the African Union suspended Madagascar's membership.
ref: Norway dan AS kedua-duanya menghentikan kesemua bantuan bukan kemanusiaan ke Madagascar, sementara Kesatuan Afrika menggantung keahliah Madagascar.

src: The South African Development Community (SADC) stated that it "completely rejected the legitimacy" of the new president.
ref: Komuniti Pembangunan Selatan Afrika (SADC) menyatakan bahawa ia "menentang sepenuhnya kesahihan" presiden baru tersebut.

src: American celebutante and businesswoman Paris Hilton has bashed a recent presidential campaign ad by 2008 U.S. presidential hopeful John McCain in which he compared his rival Barack Obama to celebrities such as Hilton and Britney Spears.
ref: Celebutante Amerika dan ahli perniagaan Paris Hilton telah menghentam iklan kempen presiden baru-baru ini pada tahun oleh John McCain yang menaruh harapan untuk menjadi presiden Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2008 di mana beliau membandingkan lawannya Barack Obama dengan selebriti seperti Hilton dan Britney Spears.

src: In McCain's TV ad, it was stated that Obama was "the biggest celebrity in the world."
ref: Dalam iklan TV McCain, dinyatakan bahawa Obama adalah "selebriti terbesar di dunia."

src: Hilton recorded and uploaded a video to comedy website Funny or Die, in which she mocked McCain by calling him a "wrinkly white-haired guy."
ref: Hilton merekod dan memuat naikkan sebuah video ke laman web Funny or Die, di mana dia mengejek McCain dengan memanggil dia "lelaki berkedut dan berambut putih."

src: "I am Paris Hilton, and I am a celebrity too," she states at the beginning of the video, but not before images of the Star Wars character Yoda and the cast of The Golden Girls are paraded across the screen apparently comparing the characters to McCain.
ref: "Saya Paris Hilton, dan saya seorang selebriti juga," dia menyatakan pada awal video, tetapi bukan sebelum imej watak Star Wars Yoda dan pelakon The Golden Girls diarakkan di skrin dengan jelasnya membandingkan aksara itu dengan McCain.

src: "Only I am not from the olden days, and I am not promising change like 'that other guy'."
ref: "Cuma saya bukan dari zaman dahulu, dan saya tidak menjanjikan perubahan seperti 'lelaki seorang lagi."

src: "I'm just hot," remarked Hilton, adding, "I guess I am running for president," since McCain's TV ad showed her.
ref: "Saya cuma seksi," kata Hilton, sambil menambah, "saya rasa saya sedang bertanding untuk presiden," kerana iklan TV McCain menunjukkannya.

src: McCain's advertisement, released early this week, states, "Is the biggest celebrity in the world ready to help your family?"
ref: Iklan McCain, yang dikeluarkan awal minggu ini, menyatakan, "Adakah selebriti terbesar di dunia bersedia untuk membantu keluarga anda?"

src: According to the Boston Globe and video displayed on its website, the narrator then points out that "the real Obama promises higher taxes, more government spending."
ref: Menurut Boston Globe dan video yang dipaparkan di laman webnya, pengulas itu kemudian menunjukkan bahawa "Obama menjanjikan cukai yang lebih tinggi, lebih banyak perbelanjaan kerajaan."

src: Bill Burton, a spokesman for Obama, responded to the ad:
ref: Bill Burton, jurucakap Obama, memberi respons kepada iklan:

src: "Is the biggest proponent of George Bush’s tired, failed policies ready to bring about change?"
ref: "Adakah penyokong terbesar polisi George Bush basi dan usang, polisi yang gagal bersedia untuk membawa perubahan?"

src: "Another day brings another dishonest attack from John McCain."
ref: "Sehari lagi membawa satu lagi serangan yang tidak jujur ​​dari John McCain."

src: "While Senator McCain knows that Senator Obama has proposed cutting taxes for 95% of American families, what he’s not telling us is that he wants to give $4 billion in tax breaks to the oil companies, continue giving tax breaks to corporations that ship our job overseas, and provide no direct tax relief for more than 100 million middle-class families."
ref: "Walaupun Senator McCain tahu bahawa Senator Obama telah mencadangkan pemotongan cukai sebanyak 95% daripada keluarga Amerika, apa yang dia tidak memberitahu kita ialah beliau mahu memberi $4 bilion pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat minyak, terus memberi pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat yang menghantar pekerjaan di luar negara, dan tidak memberikan pelepasan cukai secara langsung untuk lebih daripada 100 juta keluarga kelas pertengahan."

src: Hilton appears in good spirits in her video and even thanks McCain for endorsing her.
ref: Hilton muncul dalam semangat yang baik dalam videonya malahan berterima kasih kepada McCain untuk menyokongnya.

src: "And I want America to know, that I am like totally ready to lead."
ref: "Dan saya mahu Amerika untuk tahu, bahawa saya rasanya benar-benar bersedia untuk memimpin."

src: Alexandre Vinokourov of Kazakhstan has won stage 15 of the 2007 Tour de France in a time of 5h 34' 28".
ref: Alexandre Vinokourov dari Kazakhstan telah memenangi peringkat ke-15 Tour de France 2007 dalam masa 5j 34'28."

src: Michael Rasmussen of Denmark kept his overall lead by 2' 23' over Alberto Contador of Spain.
ref: Manakala Michael Rasmussen dari Denmark mengekalkan pendahuluannya dengan 2'23'mengatasi Alberto Contador dari Sepanyol.

src: The two extend their lead on Cadel Evans of Australia by 1' 37", and more on the rest of the contenders.
ref: Kedua-duanya mengukuhkan pendahuluan mereka keatas Cadel Evans dari Australia dengan 1'37", dan banyak lagi keatas pesaing lain yang bertanding.

src: The United States Department of the Treasury's Bureau of Engraving and Printing unveiled a new United States one hundred-dollar bill Wednesday morning.
ref: Jabatan Biro Perbendaharaan Ukiran dan Percetakan Amerika Syarikat melancarkan satu wang kertas seratus dolar baru Amerika Syarikat pada pagi Rabu.

src: This is the first time that the one hundred dollar note has been redesigned since 1996.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama seratus dolar telah direka semula sejak tahun 1996.

src: Until now the one hundred dollar note, along with the one and two dollar notes, was not part of the newest batch of dollar note redesigns.
ref: Sehingga kini seratus dolar, bersama-sama dengan wang kertas satu dan dua dolar, bukan sebahagian daripada kumpulan terbaru rekaan semula wang kertas dolar.

src: The Bureau of Engraving and Printing redesigned the series 2006 5, 10, 20, and 50 dollar notes previously.
ref: Biro Ukiran dan Percetakan mereka semula siri 2006 wang kertas 5, 10, 20, dan 50 dolar nota sebelum ini.

src: The new one hundred dollar note will contain new security and design features.
ref: Wang kertas baru seratus dolar akan mengandungi ciri-ciri keselamatan dan reka bentuk baru.

src: Along with a new stylized portrait of Benjamin Franklin, the note also features a quill pen and inkwell on the obverse.
ref: Bersama-sama dengan potret Benjamin Franklin yang digayakan baru, nota ini juga mempunyai sebuah pena bulu ayam dan tempat tinta pada muka depan wang itu.

src: On the reverse it has a new larger printed '100' in gold lettering.
ref: Dibahagian belakang ia mempunyai cetakan '100'baru yang lebih besar dalam huruf emas.

src: The new security features include a EURion constellation, a new more secure watermark, and a new feature called 'motion' which uses 650,000 micro lenses to create a moving image.
ref: Ciri-ciri keselamatan baru termasuk buruj EURion, tera air yang lebih selamat dan baru, dan ciri baru yang dikenali sebagai 'gerakan'yang menggunakan 650,000 kanta mikro untuk mewujudkan imej bergerak.

src: The note was originally slated for release in 2008 although budget constraints pushed the release date back to late 2009 or early to mid 2010.
ref: Wang kertas itu pada asalnya dijadualkan akan dikeluarkan pada tahun 2008 walaupun kekangan bajet menunda tarikh keluaran ke akhir tahun 2009 atau awal hingga pertengahan 2010.

src: The note will go into general circulation by early 2011.
ref: Wang kertas itu akan masuk ke dalam peredaran umum pada awal 2011.

src: In a recent study released by the World Bank and the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development (OECD), economic opportunities for women are still lagging behind opportunities for men in the developing world.
ref: Dalam satu kajian baru-baru ini yang dikeluarkan oleh Bank Dunia dan Pertubuhan Kerjasama Ekonomi dan Pembangunan (OECD), peluang-peluang ekonomi untuk wanita masih ketinggalan berbanding peluang untuk lelaki dalam negara membangun.

src: Improvements have been made in women health and education, according to the study.
ref: Penambahbaikan telah dibuat dalam kesihatan dan pendidikan wanita, menurut kajian itu.

src: The study calls for investments totaling over US$13 billion a year to achieve gender equality and women empowerment.
ref: Kajian ini meyeru pelaburan berjumlah lebih US$13 bilion setahun untuk mencapai kesaksamaan jantina dan pemerkasaan wanita.

src: Danny Leipziger, World Bank Vice President for Poverty Reduction and Economic Management, said, "gender equality is key for poverty reduction and growth."
ref: Danny Leipziger, Naib Presiden Bank Dunia bagi Pengurangan Kemiskinan dan Pengurusan Ekonomi, berkata, "kesaksamaan jantina adalah kunci untuk mengurangkan kemiskinan dan pertumbuhan."

src: "Progress on women’s education is essential but not enough if we don’t improve women’s access to good jobs and credit lines, to land ownership and to income-generating activities."
ref: "Kemajuan pendidikan wanita adalah penting tetapi tidak cukup jika kita tidak meningkatkan akses wanita ke atas pekerjaan yang baik dan barisan kredit, pemilikan tanah dan aktiviti menjana pendapatan."

src: The study Equality for Women: Where Do We Stand on Millennium Development Goal 3? looks at the achievements made by the developing world as laid out by the Millennium Development Goals (MD).
ref: Kajian Kesaksamaan untuk Wanita: Di manakah kita berdiri di Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium 3? melihat kepada pencapaian yang dibuat oleh negara-negara membangun seperti yang dinyatakan oleh Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium (MD).

src: These goals are eight international development goals that 189 United Nations member states and at least 23 international organizations have agreed to achieve by the year 2015.
ref: Matlamat-matlamat ini adalah lapan matlamat pembangunan antarabangsa di mana 189 negara anggota Persatuan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu dan sekurang-kurangnya 23 organisasi antarabangsa bersetuju untuk mencapai menjelang tahun 2015.

src: They include halving extreme poverty, reducing child mortality rates, fighting disease epidemics such as AIDS, and developing a global partnership for development.
ref: Ia termasuk mengurangkan kemiskinan ekstrem kepada separuh, mengurangkan kadar kematian kanak-kanak, memerangi wabak penyakit seperti AIDS, dan membangunkan perkongsian global untuk pembangunan.

src: Education has improved in 82 countries out of 122 and are on track to meet their MD goals.
ref: Pendidikan telah bertambah baik di 82 negara daripada 122 dan mengikuti jadual yang dirancang untuk mencapai matlamat MD mereka.

src: However, 19 countries, 13 of which are in Sub- Saharan Africa, are seriously off track to meet their target.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, 19 buah negara, 13 daripadanya adalah di Sub-Sahara Afrika, adalah jauh di bawah jadual terancang untuk mencapai sasaran mereka.

src: The United Nations will hold a conference on Thursday at the annual session of the UN in New York to discuss the Millennium Development Goals.
ref: Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu akan mengadakan persidangan pada hari Khamis pada sesi tahunan UN di New York untuk membincangkan Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium.

src: Maher said he was asked by CBS News to appear on the segment.
ref: Maher berkata dia telah diminta oleh CBS News untuk muncul di segmen itu.

src: But when he asked if he could talk about religion, "that was a dealbreaker from the start".
ref: Tetapi apabila dia ditanya sama ada dia boleh bercakap tentang agama, "itu merupakan pencetus pemisahan perjanjian dari awal."

src: Instead, he said they would send over a list of "acceptable topics".
ref: Sebaliknya, dia berkata mereka akan menghantar satu senarai "topik yang boleh diterima."

src: CBS News executive producer Rome Hartman has since responded in an e-mail to TVNewser saying that, "Bill Maher was never told that he couldn't discuss religion in a Free Speech segment," and added, "In fact, Free Speech has already addressed religion and we expect others will in the future."
ref: Penerbit eksekutif CBS News Rome Hartman telah membalas dalam e -mel kepada TVNewser mengatakan bahawa, "Bill Maher tidak pernah diberitahu bahawa dia tidak boleh membincangkan agama dalam segmen Ucapan Percuma," dan menambah, "Sebenarnya, Ucapan Percuma telah pun membincangkan agama dan kita berharap orang lain akan berbuat demikian pada masa akan datang."

src: No response from Bill Maher on this statement as of yet.
ref: Tiada jawapan daripada Bill Maher atas kenyataan ini lagi.

src: A Virginia man who allegedly clubbed to death an alligator he hooked while fishing, is under consideration by the U.S. Attorney’s Office in Richmond for destroying a "threatened species".
ref: Seorang lelaki dari Virginia yang didakwa telah memukul sehingga mati seekor buaya yang ditangkapnya ketika sedang memancing, sedang berada di dalam pertimbangan di Pejabat Peguam U.S. di Richmond kerana telah memusnahkan seekor "spesis terancam."

src: But according to the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service web page of delisted species on the Endangered Species Act, the American alligator was removed from the list in 1987.
ref: Tetapi menurut senarai Akta Spesis Terancam di muka surat laman web Servis Ikan dan Hidupan Liar U.S., buaya Amerika telah dikeluarkan dari senarai itu pada 1987.

src: The reason cited for its removal was the species had recovered.
ref: Sebab pengeluaran haiwan itu ditulis kerana spesis tersebut telah pulih.

src: Fisherman Max Belle reportedly used an oar to bring into submission the 44-inch-long, 9 pound creature when he brought it to the boat.
ref: Nelayan Max Belle dilaporkan telah menggunakan satu dayung untuk melemahkan makhluk sepanjang 44 inci, 9 paun apabila dia membawanya ke bot.

src: Belle was fishing on the Chesterfield County Falling Creek Reservoir, where the alligator was first sighted in May.
ref: Belle sedang memancing di Simpanan Crik Falling Chesterfield County, apabila buaya itu dilihat pertama kali pada bulan Mei.

src: An alligator is not a native species in the mid-Atlantic region of the USA, and it is thought that it was released by someone who once kept it as a pet.
ref: Seekor buaya bukan spesis asal di rantau tengah Atlantik di USA, dan ia difikirkan telah dilepaskan oleh seseorang yang pernah membelanya.

src: U.S.Department of Agriculture (USDA) employee attempts to capture and relocate it were unsuccessful.
ref: Pekerja Jabatan Pertanian U.S. (USDA) mencuba untuk menangkap dan menempatkannya semula tetapi gagal.

src: The native habitat of the alligator is in regions of the Southeast, starting from the Carolinas and moving southwards to Texas.
ref: Habitat asal buaya tersebut adalah di Tenggara rantau itu, bermula dari Carolinas dan menuju ke selatan menghala Texas.

src: The fisherman’s attorney, David P. Baugh, said area residents surrounding the reservoir are happy the alligator is gone.
ref: Peguam nelayan itu, David P. Baugh, berkata penduduk kawasan di sekeliling simpanan itu gembira dengan kematian buaya itu.

src: Referring to the support for Mr. Belle of reservoir neighbors, he said, "... next time they [USDA] will ask to hire Mr. Belle to come catch the alligator."
ref: Merujuk kepada penyokong untuk En. Belle dari tetangga simpanan itu, dia berkata, "...lain kali mereka [USDA] akan meminta En. Belle datang ke sini untuk menangkap buaya tersebut."

src: His client received a court summons Thursday and is prepared to pay a $300 fine and $50 court costs if he is found guilty of the federal misdemeanor crime.
ref: Pelanggannya menerima panggilan mahkamah hari Khamis dan sedang bersedia untuk membayar denda $300 dan kos mahkamah $50 jika dia ditemui bersalah atas jenayah kesalahan kecil persekutuan.

src: It took investigators two weeks to positively identify the toothy crocodile as an American alligator, (Alligator mississippiensis).
ref: Para penyiasat telah mengambil masa dua minggu untuk mengenal pasti secara positif buaya bergigi itu sebagai buaya Amerika, (Alligator mississippiensis).

src: United States and Iraqi forces have captured the al-Qaeda in Iraq's second in command, Hamad Jama al-Saedi.
ref: Tentera Amerika Syarikat dan Iraq telah menangkap pemerintah kedua al-Qaeda di Iraq, Hamad Jama al-Saedi.

src: He is also known as Al-Suaidi, Abu Rana and Abu Humam.
ref: Dia turut dikenali sebagai Al-Suaidi, Abu Rana dan Abu Humam.

src: Officials say that the arrest "dealt a severe blow" to al-Qaeda in Iraq.
ref: Para pengawai berkata yang penangkapan itu "telah memberi tamparan hebat" kepada al-Qaeda di Iraq.

src: According to officials, Saedi masterminded the al-Askari shrine bombing which occurred in February.
ref: Menurut kepada pengawai tersebut, Saedi merupakan perancang di dalam pengeboman kuil al-Askari yang berlaku pada Februari.

src: "Deliberate intelligence work both by Iraqi forces and as well as multinational forces have dealt a very severe blow to al Qaeda organization in Iraq," said Barham Salih, the Planning Minister for Iraq.
ref: "Kerja perisik terancang oleh kedua-dua tentera Iraq dan juga tentera pelbagai negara telah memberi tamparan hebat kepada organisasi al Qaeda di Iraq," kata Barham Salih, Menteri Perancangan untuk Iraq.

src: The arrest was made north of Baquba when forces found Rana hiding inside a building.
ref: Penangkapan itu telah dibuat di utara Baquba apabila tentera mendapati Rana sedang bersembunyi di dalam sebuah bangunan.

src: According to Rubaie, the building was currently in use by some families.
ref: Menurut Rubaie, bangunan itu sedang digunakan oleh beberapa keluarga.

src: Forces found information on the location of Saedi when a U.S. airstrike in June killed former leader of al-Qaeda in Iraq, Abu Musab al-Zarqawi.
ref: Tentera telah mengetahui maklumat lokasi Saedi apabila tentera udara U.S. telah membunuh bekas pemimpin al-Qaeda di Iraq pada Jun, Abu Musab al-Zarqawi.

src: By a majority of 378 to 262, Members of the European Parliament have voted to abolish the right of European Union countries to opt out of Working Time Directive.
ref: Dengan majoriti 378 ke 262, Ahli Parlimen Eropah telah mengundi untuk memansuhkan hak negara-negara Kesatuan Eropah bagi tidak melibatkan diri dalam Arahan Waktu Kerja.

src: If the Council of Ministers agrees, the right to opt out of the directive will be phased out over a period of three years.
ref: Jika Badan Menteri bersetuju, hak untuk tidak melibatkan diri dalam arahan tersebut akan dimansuhkan dengan berperingkat dalam tempoh tiga tahun.

src: Under the "derogation" provision of the directive, individual workers can waive the right to work no more than 48 hours per week.
ref: Di bawah "pengurangan" peruntukan bagi arahan itu, pekerja individu boleh mengetepikan hak untuk bekerja tidak lebih dari 48 jam seminggu.

src: Among the member states, only the United Kingdom uses this provision.
ref: Di antara negara ahli, hanya United Kingdom yang menggunakan peruntukan ini.

src: 12 firefighters in Buffalo, New York, United States have been taken to the hospital where they are being treated for smoke and chemical inhalation after a massive fire broke out at a warehouse on Buffalo's west side, early Monday morning.
ref: 12 orang ahli bomba di Buffalo, New York, Amerika Syarikat telah dibawa ke hospital di mana mereka dirawat kerana penyedutan asap dan bahan kimia selepas satu kebakaran besar berlaku di sebuah gudang di barat Buffalo, awal pagi Isnin.

src: At least three fire companies started battling the blaze, which engulfed the entire warehouse, sending a plume of smoke into the air which could be seen for several miles, at one point darkening the sky.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tiga buah syarikat bomba mula melawan api kebakaran, yang memakan keseluruhan gudang, dan mengeluarkan asap tebal ke udara yang dapat dilihat sehingga beberapa batu, sehingga pada satu ketika telah menggelapkan langit.

src: All 12 firefighters are being treated at Erie County Medical Center, but their conditions are not known.
ref: Kesemua 12 orang ahli bomba sedang dirawat di Pusat Rawatan Erie County, tetapi keadaan mereka masih belum diketahui.

src: At least 80 firefighters were reported to be on scene along with a total of nine of the 19 fire companies in Buffalo.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 80 orang ahli bomba telah dilaporkan berada di tempat kejadian bersama-sama dengan sejumlah sembilan dari 19 buah syarikat bomba di Buffalo.

src: Firefighters were still on scene as of 9:15 a.m. EDT (UTC-4) today, nearly 24 hours after the fire started.
ref: Ahli-ahli bomba masih berada di tempat kejadian pada 9:15 a.m. EDT (UTC-4) hari ini, hampir 24 jam selepas kebakaran bermula.

src: The fire started at the Leisure Living Pool Supplies warehouse at 1130 Niagara street between West Ferry and Albany streets behind the Rich Products building at around 10:30 a.m. Monday and was not brought under control until 6:30 a.m. today.
ref: Kebakaran bermula di gudang Leisure Living Pool Supplies di jalan 1130 Niagara di antara West Ferry dan jalan Albany di belakang bangunan Rich Products di sekitar jam 10:30 a.m. hari Isnin dan tidak berada di dalam kawalan sehinggalah jam 6:30 a.m. hari ini.

src: Firefighters had the fire under control just before 12:00 p.m. Monday, but wind off Lake Erie reignited the fire at around 3:00 p.m.
ref: Ahli bomba telah berjaya mengawal api hanya sebelum 12:00 p.m. hari Isnin, tetapi angin dari Tasik Erie menyalakan semula api di sekitar jam 3:00 p.m.

src: At around 7:00 p.m., most of the blaze was under control, but smoke could still be seen coming from the building.
ref: Pada sekitar jam 7:00 p.m., kebanyakan api kebakaran telah di dalam kawalan, tetapi asap masih dapat dilihat keluar dari bangunan itu.

src: All employees from both Rich's and the chemical company have been sent home for the day and made it out safely.
ref: Kesemua pekerja dari kedua-dua Rich dan syarikat kimia telah dihantar pulang untuk hari itu dan berjaya keluar dengan selamat.

src: The building is owned by PoolSupplies.com which is a division of Leisure Living, selling supplies, recreation and chemicals for swimming pools.
ref: Bangunan itu dimiliki PoolSupplies.com yang merupakan sebahagian dari Leisure Living, dan menjual bekalan, rekreasi dan bahan kimia untuk kolam renang.

src: At 9:00 p.m., firefighters reported that most of the fire was contained under the collapsed portions of the building, but around 10:00 p.m. firefighters reported that more thick black smoke started to rise from the building.
ref: Pada jam 9:00 p.m., bomba telah melaporkan yang kebanyakan api telah dibendung di bawah runtuhan bangunan, tetapi sekitar jam 10:00 p.m. bomba melaporkan yang semakin banyak asap hitam tebal mula keluar dari bangunan itu.

src: Black smoke usually indicates burning, whereas white smoke often indicates water putting out a fire.
ref: Asap hitam selalunya menunjukkan kebakaran, manakala asap putih selalunya menunjukkan air sedang menghapuskan kebakaran.

src: Firefighters are using a helicopter, courtesy of the Erie County Sheriff's Department, that is equipped with infrared cameras in order to see the areas of the building which still contain a significant amount of heat or fire.
ref: Bomba sedang menggunakan sebuah helikopter, atas budi Jabatan Sherif Wilayah Erie, yang dilengkapi dengan kamera inframerah bagi memerhati kawasan bangunan yang masih mempunyai jumlah haba atau api yang nyata.

src: After having fought the fire for over 24 hours, fire officials stated that the fire was mostly extinguished and ordered fire companies to start shutting down the hoses and pack up their equipment.
ref: Selepas berlawan dengan api untuk lebih 24 jam, pegawai bomba berkata yang kebanyakan api telah dipadamkan dan mereka telah mengarah semua syarikat bomba untuk menutup paip dan mengemas peralatan mereka.

src: Just before 1:00 p.m. the fire command post stated that fire investigators were on scene and that "they can call us (firefighters) back if they need anything."
ref: Sebelum jam 1:00 p.m. pos perintah bomba telah menyatakan bahawa penyiasat kebakaran telah berada di tempat kejadian dan "mereka akan menghubungi kami (bomba) lagi sekiranya mereka memerlukan apa-apa."

src: Officials have urged all residents near the blaze to stay indoors and to shut all windows and doors due to the smoke which has been blowing close to the ground.
ref: Para pengawai telah menyeru semua penduduk berdekatan kebakaran itu supaya berada di dalam bangunan dan agar menutup semua tingkap dan pintu kerana asap yang ditiup dekat dengan tanah.

src: At least one civilian who was inside a park at the foot of Ferry was also taken to the hospital for smoke and chemical inhalation.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya seorang orang awam yang berada di taman di hujung Ferry telah dibawa ke hospital kerana penyedutan asap dan bahan kimia.

src: Officials were able to evacuate the park and no other injuries were reported.
ref: Para pegawai telah berjaya mengosongkan taman tersebut dan tiada kecederaan lain telah dilaporkan.

src: At one point, the sun was blocked by the black smoke rising from the building.
ref: Pada satu ketika, matahari dihalang oleh asap hitam yang keluar naik dari bangunan itu.

src: It appears it reignited due to the earlier collapse of the roof and the winds off the lake.
ref: Ia dilihat dinyalakan semula dari runtuhan bumbung sebelum itu dan juga angin dari tasik.

src: "Right now, one thing fire officials would like to get out and stress is anyone in and around the Niagara and Ferry area, if you could please go indoors, and shut your doors," stated Michael DeGeorge, a spokesman for the Buffalo Police Department, to reporters.
ref: "Sekarang ini, satu perkara yang pengawai kebakaran mahu keluarkan dan tekankan adalah supaya semua orang di dalam dan sekitar kawasan Niagara dan Ferry, untuk masuk ke dalam bangunan dan menutup semua pintu," kata Michael DeGeorge, seorang jurucakap bagi Jabatan Polis Buffalo, kepada wartawan.

src: The northbound lane of the I-190 expressway, which lies just to the west of the warehouse, was closed at the Porter Street exit at the Peace Bridge to the exit leading to the 198 expressway for several hours.
ref: Laluan lebuhraya I-190 ke arah utara yang terletak hanya di barat gudang, telah ditutup di laluan keluar Porter Street di Peace Bridge ke laluan keluar menghala ke lebuhraya 198 selama beberapa jam.

src: At 11:15 p.m., firefighters stated they would begin to reopen the lane.
ref: Pada jam 11:15 p.m., para ahli bomba menyatakan yang mereka akan mula membuka semula laluan itu.

src: Niagara street from Albany to West Ferry reopened to normal traffic in the late morning hours of Tuesday.
ref: Jalan Niagara dari Albany ke West Ferry mula dibuka ke trafik normal pada lewat waktu pagi hari Selasa.

src: Throughout Monday afternoon and early evening, employees of Marco's Restaurant on Niagara and Albany were providing ice and beverages to firefighters and police officers who were on scene.
ref: Sepanjang tengahari Isnin dan awal petang, pekerja restauran Marco di Niagara dan Albany telah menyediakan ais dan minuman kepada ahli bomba dan pengawai polis yang berada di tempat kejadian.

src: Temperatures were quite warm, in the upper 70's (F), with winds gusting to nearly 15-20 MPH, coming out of the southwest.
ref: Suhu agak panas, di atas 70's(F), dengan angin bertiup menghampiri 15-20 MPH, dari arah barat daya.

src: Although the wind assisted in reigniting the fire, it also assisted firefighters by quickly clearing the area of smoke.
ref: Walaupun angin itu telah membantu dalam menyalakan semula api, namun ia turut membantu ahli bomba dengan membersihkan kawasan asap dengan pantas.

src: The warehouse is a storage and distribution facility for pool chemicals, especially chlorine.
ref: Gudang tersebut adalah kemudahan menyimpan dan pengagihan bagi bahan kimia kolam renang, terutama sekali klorin.

src: Chemical drops could be felt flying through the air, which also had the smell of bleach.
ref: Titisan bahan kimia mungkin dapat dirasai terbang melalui udara, dan juga mempunyai bau peluntur.

src: According to a source who spoke to Wikinews on condition of anonymity, the warehouse contained over US$8 million in supplies and chemicals.
ref: Menurut satu sumber yang bercakap dengan Wikinews dengan syarat dikekalkan tanpa nama, gedung itu mengandungi bekalan dan bahan kimia berjumlah US$8 juta.

src: Earlier tests performed on the air by firefighters and Haz-mat officials had shown that the smoke and fumes rising from the fire are not dangerous or toxic.
ref: Ujian awal udara yang dilaksanakan oleh ahli bomba dan pengawai Haz-mat telah menunjukkan yang asap dan wasap yang naik dari api tidak berbahaya atau toksik.

src: Further tests were performed, but those results are not yet known and officials don't believe there was any danger to the air.
ref: Ujian susulan telah dilaksanakan, tetapi keputusannya masih belum diketahui dan para pengawai tidak merasakan yang ada sebarang bahaya di dalam udara.

src: Officials will testing the water runoff from fire hoses to make sure that it is not contaminated as it is emptying into the Niagara River.
ref: Para pengawai akan menguji air dari paip kebakaran bagi memastikan yang ia tidak dicemari kerana ia sedang dialirkan ke dalam Sungai Niagara.

src: The warehouse is located just down stream from a drinking water pumping station with several more scattered along the River from Buffalo to Niagara Falls.
ref: Gudang tersebut terletak hanya di hujung sungai dari stesen mengepam air minuman dengan beberapa buah lagi ada terletak di sepanjang Sungai itu dari Buffalo ke Niagara Falls.

src: The cause of the fire is not known and is under investigation.
ref: Punca kebakaran itu masih belum diketahui dan sedang di dalam penyiasatan.

src: Last year, on May 14, 2007, at least five buildings that were part of a warehouse complex about 1/3 of a mile from Leisure caught fire, and required nearly 130 firefighters to battle the blaze.
ref: Tahun lepas, pada 14 Mei, 2007, sekurang-kurangnya lima buah bangunan yang merupakan sebahagian dari kompleks gudang kira-kira 1/3 batu dari Leisure terbakar, dan memerlukan hampir 130 orang ahli bomba untuk berlawan dengan api kebakaran itu.

src: Smoke from that fire was seen over 40 miles away.
ref: Asap dari kebakaran itu dapat dilihat dari lebih 40 batu.

src: Instead of returning to practise from a fractured finger today as scheduled, flamboyant Dallas Cowboys receiver Terrell Owens is instead recovering at Baylor Medical Center this morning from an apparent suicide attempt last night.
ref: Daripada kembali ke latihan selepas kepatahan jari hari ini seperti yang telah dijadualkan, penerima cemerlang Dallas Cowboys Terrell Owens sebaliknya sedang pulih di Baylor Medical Center pagi ini dari satu percubaan ketara membunuh diri malam semalam.

src: A female friend who was with Owens last night observed him taking several prescription pain killers and behaving erratically.
ref: Seorang kawan perempuan yang bersama Owens malam semalam telah melihatnya mengambil beberapa preskripsi tahan sakit dan bersikap luar biasa.

src: She called 911 and Owens was rushed to the hospital.
ref: Dia menelefon 911 dan Owens disegerakan ke hospital.

src: Original reports stated that Owens was suffering from an adverse reaction to the pain medication, which he was taking for a fractured hand.
ref: Laporan awal melaporkan yang Owens sedang menderita dari tindak balas ubat tahan sakit yang diambil untuk tangannya yang patah.

src: But this morning, Dallas police have reported that Owens took an unknown large amount of the pills, and when asked by police this morning if he had been attempting to hurt himself, Owens replied, "Yes."
ref: Tetapi pada pagi ini, polis Dallas melaporkan yang Owens telah menelan sejumlah besar pil yang tidak diketahui jumlahnya, dan apabila ditanya polis pagi ini jika dia ada berniat mahu mencederakan dirinya, Owens menjawab, "Ya."

src: Paramedics have only confirmed that they called police to report that they were bringing Owens to hospital.
ref: Paramedik telah mengesahkan yang mereka hanya menelefon polis bagi melaporkan yang mereka sedang membawa Owens ke hospital.

src: Owens has since said that he was not attempting suicide.
ref: Owens sejak dari itu berkata yang dia tidak mencuba untuk membunuh diri.

src: Rabies is a disease that has no cure and nearly everyone it infects is dead just two weeks after the symptoms show.
ref: Penyakit anjing gila ialah satu penyakit yang tiada ubat dan hampir semua orang yang menghidapinya maut hanya dalam masa dua minggu selepas semua gejala hadir.

src: And yet, last week a teenage girl named Jeanna Giese was released from a hospital having been successfuly treated.
ref: Walaupun begitu, pada minggu lepas seorang remaja perempuan bernama Jeanna Giese telah dikeluarkan dari sebuah hospital kerana telah berjaya dirawat.

src: She became the first known person to recover from the disease without vaccination.
ref: Dia menjadi orang pertama diketahui untuk pulih dari penyakit itu tanpa vaksin.

src: On September 12, 2004, Jeanna — a 15 year old from Fond du Lac, Wisconsin— was bitten by a bat while attending church.
ref: Pada 12 September, 2004, Jeanna - yang berumur 15 tahun dari Fond du Lac, Wisconsion - telah digigit seekor kelawar ketika menghadiri gereja.

src: By the time she saw a doctor about fatigue and numbness, it was October 18, and the bat incident was not brought up until several days later.
ref: Apabila dia berjumpa dengan doktor kerana keletihan dan rasa kebas, adalah pada 18 Oktober, dan insiden kelawar tidak diceritakan sehinggalah beberapa hari kemudian.

src: Usually when there is a possibility of rabies, doctors will vaccinate patients: the vaccine has a chance to act before the symptoms appear.
ref: Selalunya jika ada kemungkinan penyakit anjing gila, para doktor akan memvaksin pesakit: vaksin mempunyai peluang bertindak sebelum gejala-gejala timbul.

src: In Jeanna's case it was too late to try to vaccinate, and her doctors at the Children's Hospital of Wisconsin devised a new treatment.
ref: Di dalam kes Jeanna sudah terlalu lambat untuk mencuba pemvaksinan, dan doktornya di Hospital Kanak-kanak Wisconsin telah memikirkan satu rawatan baru.

src: Jeanna was put into a drug-induced coma for a week, and doctors began an intensive treatment to prop up her nervous system until her natural immunity recovered enough to fight the disease.
ref: Jeanna diletakkan di dalam koma di bawah pengaruh dadah untuk seminggu, dan semua doktor memulakan rawatan intensif bagi membantu menampung sistem saraf sehingga imuniti semulajadinya cukup sembuh bagi melawan penyakit itu.

src: By surviving and recovering, Jeanna became the only person known in medicine to overcome rabies without a vaccine.
ref: Dengan terselamat dan dalam proses pemulihan, Jeanna telah menjadi satu-satunya orang yang diketahui di dalam perubatan untuk sembuh dari penyakit anjing gila tanpa vaksin.

src: She is not yet fully recovered: the effects of the coma are still apparent, and she has difficulty with movement.
ref: Dia masih belum sembuh sepenuhnya: kesan dari koma masih jelas kelihatan, dan dia masih mempunyai kesusahan untuk bergerak.

src: Yet the doctors believe that she is getting well much faster than they expected, and feel that Jeanna will be able to return to her high school studies, needing only physical and occupational therapy.
ref: Namun begitu, para doktor percaya yang dia sembuh pada kadar lebih cepat dari yang mereka jangkakan, dan merasakan yang Jeanna akan dapat kembali hadir ke sekolah tingginya, dan hanya memerlukan terapi fizikal dan cara kerja.

src: The novel treatment is hailed by doctors as promising, but needs analysis and verification on another human.
ref: Rawatan yang aneh itu disambut oleh para doktor sebagai satu harapan, tetapi memerlukan analisis dan pengesahan ke atas manusia lain.

src: Jeanna's is the sixth case of human recovery from a rabies infection, but the other five people were vaccinated against rabies either before infection, or before the symptoms appeared.
ref: Jeanna adalah kes pemulihan manusia yang keenam dari jangkitan penyakit anjing gila, tetapi lima orang yang lain telah diberi vaksin melawan penyakit itu samaada sebelum jangkitan atau sebelum gejala-gejala timbul.

src: Stan Berenstain, co-creator of the popular Berenstain Bears children's books, has died due to complications from cancer at age 82.
ref: Stan Berenstain, penulis bersama buku kanak-kanak popular Berenstain Bears, telah meninggal dunia kerana komplikasi dari kanser di umur 82 tahun.

src: Along with his wife, Jan Berenstain, Stan and Jan Berenstain published over 200 books aimed at teaching children to read and helping them with lessons such as sharing, new siblings.
ref: Bersama-sama dengan isterinya, Jan Berenstain, Stan dan Jan Berenstain menerbitkan lebih 200 buah buku bertujuan untuk mengajar kanak-kanak membaca dan membantu mereka dengan pengajaran seperti berkongsi, adik-beradik baru.

src: The first Berenstain Bears book was published in 1962 and titled "The Big Honey Hunt".
ref: Buku Berenstain Bears yang pertama telah diterbitkan pada tahun 1962 dan bertajuk "The Big Honey Hunt."

src: With the help of head of children's publishing at Random House, author Theodor Geisel, better known as Dr. Seuss, the Berenstains created a franchise that drew millions of young readers.
ref: Dengan pertolongan ketua penerbitan kanak-kanak di Random House, penulis Theodor Geisel, yang lebih dikenali sebagai Dr. Seuss, Berenstains telah mencipta satu francais yang menarik jutaan pembaca muda.

src: Until 1997, when they hired an employee to run the company's computer, Mr. Berenstain and his family managed the entire ursine enterprise, which has branched out into two television series, videos, stage musicals, toys, cereal and other products.
ref: Sehingga tahun 1997, apabila mereka mengupah seorang pekerja untuk menguruskan komputer syarikat, En. Berenstain dan keluarganya menguruskan keseluruhan perusahaan ursine, yang telah bercabang kepada dua siri televisyen, video, pentas musikal, alat permainan, bijirin sarapan dan produk lain.

src: According to an interview of the Berenstain Bears official website, Papa Bear is based on Stan, Mama on Jan; Stan clarifies that he's "not as stupid" as Papa.
ref: Menurut satu temubual di laman web rasmi Berenstain Bears, Papa Bear ialah berdasarkan Stan, Mama ialah Jan; Stan menerangkan yang dia "tidaklah sebodoh" Papa.

src: Stan fed his interest in drawing as a child, by drawing on paper bags and cardboard.
ref: Stan memuaskan minatnya di dalam melukis semasa kecil, dengan melukis di atas beg kertas dan kadbod.

src: The trial against internet file-sharing network Kazaa in Sydney, Australia, is coming to an end, as closing arguments began today.
ref: Perbicaraan menentang rangkaian pengkongsian fail internet Kazaa di Sydney, Australia, sedang menghampiri penghujungnya, dengan perdebatan penutup bermula pada hari ini.

src: Kazaa pleaded it could not be held responsible for the copyright infringements perpetrated by its users, as it cannot control how the software is used.
ref: Kazaa merayu supaya ia tidak dipertanggungjawabkan ke atas pelanggaran hak cipta yang dilakukan oleh penggunanya, kerana ia tidak dapat mengawal bagaimana perisian itu digunakan.

src: The peer-to-peer distribution software and its owner, Sharman Networks Ltd. and its directors were sued by a group of Australian record labels for copyright infringements by the network's estimated 100 million members worldwide.
ref: Perisian pengedaran teman ke teman dan pemiliknya, Sharman Networks Ltd. dan semua direktornya disaman sekumpulan label rekod Australia atas pelanggaran hak cipta oleh rangkaian itu yang dianggarkan mempunyai 100 juta ahli di seluruh dunia.

src: Members of the software share music files with each other, and download up to three billion songs and music files monthly.
ref: Ahli perisian itu berkongsi fail muzik dengan satu sama lain, dan memuat turun sehingga tiga bilion buah lagu dan fail muzik setiap bulan.

src: The music industry claims it has lost millions of dollars in unpaid royalties as a result.
ref: Industri muzik mendakwa kesannya ia telah kehilangan berjuta-juta dolar daripada royalti yang tidak dibayar.

src: Lawyer Tony Meagher argued that Sharman is no more responsible for the uses of its software than the designers of the photocopiers and video recorders were responsible for the illegal copying of materials on those machines.
ref: Peguam Tony Meagher mempertikaikan bahawa Sharman tidak bertanggungjawab untuk penggunaan perisiannya lebih daripada pencipta fotokopi dan perakam video yang bertanggungjawab untuk penyalinan bahan secara haram dengan menggunakan mesin-mesin tersebut.

src: The remaining question is whether Kazaa authorises its users to download files illegally.
ref: Soalan yang tertinggal adalah samaada Kazaa membenarkan penggunanya memuat turun secara haram.

src: "We tell these users in our Web site and we tell them in our license that they cannot use this (software) for infringing copyright," Meagher told Judge Murray Wilcox.
ref: "Kami memberitahu pengguna di Laman web kami dan kami memberitahu mereka di dalam lesen kami bahawa mereka tidak boleh menggunakannya (perisian) untuk melanggar hak cipta," Meagher memberitahu Hakim Murray Wilcox.

src: By consenting to this license by users, Kazaa is exempted from responsibility.
ref: Apabila pengguna bersetuju dengan lesen ini, Kazaa telah dikecualikan dari tanggungjawab.

src: The record industry claims Kazaa not only enables but encourages copyright infringement.
ref: Industri rekod mendakwa Kazaa bukan sahaja membolehkan malah menggalakkan pelanggaran hak cipta.

src: Record industry lawyer Tony Bannon argued that as Kazaa collected information from its users through spyware and sold it to advertisers, the company's claim that it had no control over the software was "completely mind boggling."
