ref: Peguam industri rekod Tony Bannon mempertikaikan dengan oleh kerana Kazaa mengumpul maklumat dari penggunanya melalui perisian intip dan menjualnya kepada pengiklan, dakwaan syarikat bahawa ia tidak mempunyai kawalan ke atas perisian adalah "sangat tidak dapat dibayangkan."

src: This is not the first trial against Kazaa, and other programs of its kind.
ref: Ini bukanlah perbicaraan pertama menentang Kazaa, dan program serupa dengannya.

src: In August last year, Judge Stephen Wilson ruled that the distribution by Grokster and Morpheus of peer-to-peer software does not violate U.S. copyright law.
ref: Pada Ogos tahun lepas, Hakim Stephen Wilson memutuskan yang pengedaran oleh Grokster Morpheus dengan perisian teman-ke-teman tidak mencabul undang-undang hak cipta U.S.

src: Rod Dorman, lead trial council for Sharman Networks in the U.S., said, "As a result of this decision, Sharman Networks will be filing a motion for summary judgement, nearly identical to the successful motions filed by Grokster and Morpheus, and we are confident that Judge Wilson will find that our product, Kazaa, is a lawful product as well."
ref: Rod Dorman, ketua badan perbicaraan untuk Sharman Networks di U.S., berkata, "Hasil dari keputusan ini, Sharman Networks akan memfailkan satu gerakan untuk ringkasan keputusan mahkamah, yang hampir sama dengan gerakan berjaya yang difailkan oleh Grokster dan Morpheus, dan kami yakin yang Hakim Wilson akan melihat yang produk kami, Kazaa, adalah satu produk yang sah di sisi undang-undang."

src: However, the ruling held no precedential effect in the Australian trial, as the principles differed.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, keputusan itu tidak mempunyai kesan utama di dalam perbicaraan Australia, kerana prinsipnya berbeza.

src: Kazaa and the FastTrack protocol are the brainchild of the Scandinavians Niklas Zennström and Janus Friis, and were introduced in March 2001 by their Dutch company Consumer Empowerment.
ref: Kazaa dan protokol FastTrack dilahirkan oleh warganegara Scandinavia Niklas Zennstrom dan Janus Friis, dan telah diperkenalkan pada Mac 2001 oleh syarikat Belanda Consumer Empowerment.

src: It appeared during the end of the first generation of P2P networks.
ref: Ia muncul di penghujung generasi pertama rangkaian P2P.

src: In July 2004, Romania will revalue its currency, the leu, so that 10,000 old lei will equal 1 new leu, with 1 euro being equal to approximately 3.6 new lei.
ref: Pada Julai 2004, Romania telah menilai semula mata wangnya, leu, menjadi 10,000 leu lama akan bersamaan 1 leu baru, dengan 1 euro bersamaan lebih kurang 3.6 leu baru.

src: Dual pricing, in both the old leu and the new leu, has already been introduced from March 2005.
ref: Penentuan harga dual, di kedua-dua leu lama dan leu baru, telah diperkenalkan sejak Mac 2005.

src: The transition to the new leu is expected to stabilise the Romanian currency and prepare the country for euro adoption.
ref: Peralihan kepada leu baru dijangka akan menstabilkan matawang Romania dan menyediakan negara itu untuk penerimaan euro.

src: In Romania's case, the adoption will take place 5-7 years after accession in 2007.
ref: Di dalam kes Romania, penerimaan itu akan mengambil tempat 5-7 tahun selepas pertambahan pada 2007.

src: Fans of quirky numbers everywhere celebrated recently as the clock struck 01:02:03, 04/05/06 (using the DD/MM/YY date convention).
ref: Para peminat nombor aneh di serata tempat telah menyambut baru-baru ini apabila jam menandakan waktu 01:02:03, 04/05/06 (menggunakan tarikh konvensyen DD/MM/YY).

src: This once-in-a-century event was highlighted in advance by webloggers and websites such as Boing Boing.
ref: Acara sekali dalam satu abad ini telah ditekankan dari awal oleh para penulis laman blog dan laman web seperti Boing Boing.

src: For countries where the MM/DD/YY convention is more common, the event happened a month ago on 5th April.
ref: Untuk beberapa abad di mana konvensyen MM/DD/YY ini lebih biasa, acara ini diadakan sebulan lalu pada 5 April.

src: The date attracted numerous comments when posted to the news website Digg, and the special date has been mentioned by hundreds of thousands of websites, according to a Google search.
ref: Tarikh itu menarik perhatian banyak komen apabila ia diletakkan di laman web berita Digg, dan tarikh istimewa itu telah disebut ratusan orang di dalam ribuan laman web, menurut kepada satu pencarian Google.

src: Whilst 01:02:03, 04/05/06 won't happen again for another hundred years, those who missed out might want to celebrate 06:06:06, 06/06/06 in just over a month's time, unless you're a hexakosioihexekontahexaphobic.
ref: Walaupun 01:02:03, 04/05/06 tidak akan berlaku untuk seratus tahun lagi, bagi mereka yang terlepas mungkin mahu menyambut 06:06:06, 06/06/06 yang akan datang dalam masa sebulan, melainkan anda ada fobia takutkan nombor 666.

src: The Greek ministries of Public Order and Economy announced that they offer the amount of 800,000 euros to those who will submit information that could help authorities in the fight against local terrorism.
ref: Menteri-menteri Ketenteraman Awam dan Ekonomi Greek telah mengumumkan yang mereka menawarkan sejumlah 800,000 euros kepada sesiapa yang memberi maklumat yang dapat membantu pihak berkuasa melawan pengganas tempatan.

src: More specifically, as Greek police stated, everybody who has information about the Revolutionary Struggle (ELA) terrorist far-left organization, can call (within Greece) the police numbers, 170 and 1014.
ref: Lebih tepat, seperti yang dikatakan polis Greek, semua orang yang mempunyai maklumat tentang Perjuangan Revolusi (ELA) pengganas organisasi paling-kiri, boleh menghubungi (di dalam Greece) nombor polis, 170 dan 1014.

src: This effort by the Greek government has been fully supported by the Embassy of the United States in Athens which, in a statement, announced that offers up to $1 million to those who will significantly help towards the capture of terrorists.
ref: Usaha kerajaan Greek ini mendapat sokongan penuh oleh Kedutaan Amerika Syarikat di Athens yang mana, di dalam satu kenyataan, telah mengumumkan akan tawaran itu sehingga ke $1 juta kepada mereka yang banyak menolong bagi penangkapan pengganas - pengganas itu.

src: As the Embassy stated, "you can help bring terrorists to justice and save lives by providing valuable information to resolve past acts of terrorism or prevent future ones".
ref: Sepertimana yang telah dinyatakan oleh Kedutaan itu, "kamu dapat membantu membawa pengganas ke pengadilan dan menyelamatkan banyak nyawa dengan memberi maklumat berharga untuk menyelesaikan tindakan pengganasan yang terdahulu atau pencegahan di masa hadapan."

src: The Revolutionary Struggle is regarded as a spinoff of the notorious terrorist group November 17th; the members of which were captured in 2003.
ref: Perjuangan Revolusi itu dianggap sebagai satu sampingan dari kumpulan pengganas terkenal 17 November;yang mana ahli-ahlinya telah ditangkap pada tahun 2003.

src: ELA took responsibility for a rocket attack against the US Embassy in Athens, on January 12, 2007.
ref: ELA telah mengaku bertanggungjawab ke atas serangan roket ke Kedutaan US di Athens, pada 12 Januari, 2007.

src: The Entertainment Software Association president Douglas Lowenstein confirmed speculations that his group is planning to file a lawsuit against the state of Oklahoma because of a new law, HB3004.
ref: Presiden Persatuan Perisian Hiburan Douglas Lowenstein mengesahkan spekulasi yang kumpulannya bercadang untuk menfailkan tindakan undang-undang terhadap negeri Oklahoma kerana undang-undang baru, HB3004.

src: Under this law, games that have "inappropriate violence" are added to a list of materials that are considered harmful to minors.
ref: Dibawah undang-undang ini, permainan yang mempunyai "keganasan tidak bersesuaian" adalah ditambah kedalam senarai barangan yang dianggap merosakkan kanak-kanak.

src: Lowenstein said that the ESA believes "HB3004 will restrict the First Amendment rights of Oklahoma's citizens and intend to file suit in Oklahoma federal district court shortly, asking that the state's new video game law be overturned."
ref: Lowenstein berkata yang ESA percaya "HB3004 akan menyekat hak Pindaan Pertama rakyat Oklahoma dan berhasrat untuk menyaman mahkamah persekutuan Oklahoma segera, meminta supaya undang-undang baru permainan video negeri tersebut dibatalkan."

src: Similar laws have been found unconstitutional in St. Louis, Indianapolis, Washington, Illinois, and Michigan.
ref: Undang-undang serupa telah ditemui tidak diperlembagaankan di St. Louis, Indianapolis, Washington, Illinois, dan Michigan.

src: A California video game law is currently being reviewed in federal court.
ref: Satu undang-undang permainan video California kini sedang dikaji semula dimahkamah persekutuan.

src: Last week, a Minnesota law was passed fining minors $25 for purchasing games rated "mature" or "adults only".
ref: Minggu lalu, satu undang-undang Minnesota diluluskan untuk menyaman kanak-kanak $25 jika membeli permainan dilabel "matang" atau "dewasa sahaja."

src: The annual Living Planet Report compiled by the Zoological Society of London and the Global Footprint Network, published this week by WWF International, assessed "the health of the planet's ecosystems" and measured the demands people make on the planet's resources.
ref: Laporan Living Planet tahunan yang disusun oleh Zoological Society dan Global Footprint Network, diterbitkan minggu ini oleh WWF Antarabangsa, menilai "kesihatan ekosistem planet" dan mengukur permintaan yang manusia buat keatas sumber planet.

src: The Living Planet Index is based on population trends between 1970 and 2003 of over 3 600 populations of more than 1 300 vertebrate species from around the world.
ref: Indeks Hidup Planet adalah berdasarkan tren populasi diantara 1970 dan 2003 yang lebih 3600 populasi lebih dari 1300 spesis veterbrata dari seluruh dunia.

src: There has been an overall decline of around 30 per cent over the 33-year period.
ref: Terdapat pengurangan keseluruhan lebih kurang 30 peratus dalam tempoh 33 tahun.

src: Tropical species populations declined by around 55 per cent on average from 1970 to 2003, while temperate species populations, have shown little overall change.
ref: Populasi spesis tropika menurun lebih kurang 55 peratus pada purata dari 1970 ke 2003, sementara populasi spesis iklim sederhana, telah menunjukkan sedikit perubahan keseluruhan.

src: The Ecological Footprint measures the area of biologically productive land and sea required to sustian humanity.
ref: Jejak Ekologi mengukur kawasan darat dan laut produktif biologikal diperlukan untuk mengekalkan manusia.

src: In 2003 this was 14.1 billion global hectares, or 2.2 global hectares per person (a global hectare is a hectare with world-average ability to produce resources and absorb wastes).
ref: Pada 2003 ini adalah 14.1 bilion hektar global, atau 2.2 hektar global setiap orang (hektar global adalah hektar dengan kebolehan purata dunia untuk menghasilkan sumber dan menyerap buangan).

src: The total supply of productive area, or biocapacity, in 2003 was 11.2 global hectares, or 1.8 global hectares per person.
ref: Bekalan keseluruhan kawasan produktif, atau biokapasiti, pada 2003 adalah 11.2 hektar global, atau 1.8 hektar global setiap orang.

src: Demand overshot supply first in the 1980s and has been increasing every year since.
ref: Permintaan melebihi bekalan pertama kali pada 1980an dan telah meningkat setiap tahun sejak itu.

src: By 2003 the overshoot was about 25 per cent.
ref: Pada 2003 lebihan itu adalah lebih kurang 25 peratus.

src: Thus, it took approximately a year and three months for the Earth to produce the ecological resources humanity used in that year.
ref: Oleh itu, ia mengambil lebih kurang satu tahun tiga bulan untuk Bumi menghasilkan sumber ekologikal yang manusia gunakan pada tahun itu.

src: The Living Planet Index and the Ecological Footprint, along with other measures, have been adopted as indicators for the 2010 targets of the Convention on Biological Diversity.
ref: Indeks Hidup Planet dan Jejak Ekologi, beserta ukuran lain, telah digunakan sebagai penunjuk untuk target 2010 dalam Konvensyen untuk Kepelbagaian Biologi.

src: The report concludes with a description of the roles of the various disciplines required to "shift humanity's current trajectory on to a path that will remain within the biological capacity of the planet".
ref: Laporan itu menyimpulkan dengan penerangan tentang peranan pelbagai bidang diperlukan untuk "mengubah trajektori kini manusia kepada laluan yang akan kekal didalam kapasiti biologi planet."

src: James P. Leape, the Director General of WWF International summarises:
ref: James P. Leape, Ketua Pengarah WWF Antarabangsa menyimpulkan:

src: "The message of these two indices is clear and urgent:"
ref: "Mesej dari dua indeks ini jelas dan penting:"

src: "we have been exceeding the Earth's ability to support our lifestyles for the past 20 years, and we need to stop."
ref: "Kita telah melebihi kebolehan Bumi untuk menyokong gaya hidup kita selama 20 tahun, dan kita perlu berhenti."

src: "We must balance our consumption with the natural world's capacity to regenerate and absorb our wastes."
ref: "Kita mesti seimbangkan penggunaan kita dengan kapasiti dunia semulajadi untuk menghasilkan semula dan menyerap buangan kita."

src: ABC News anchorman Bob Woodruff and his camera operator Doug Vogt have been seriously injured in an explosion.
ref: Pembaca berita ABC News Bob Woodruff dan pengedali kameranya Doug Vogt telah cedera parah dalam sebuah letupan.

src: Early reports indicate that both men sustained head injuries in the blast.
ref: Laporan awal menunjukkan yang kedua-dua mereka mengalami kecederaan dikepala dalam letupan tersebut.

src: Woodruff was evacuated to the Balad Airbase, 68 kilometers north of Baghdad and is currently undergoing surgery.
ref: Woodruff dipindahkan ke Pangkalan Udara Balad, 68 kilometer utara Baghdad dan kini sedang menjalani pembedahan.

src: "Bob and Doug are in serious condition and are being treated at a U.S. military hospital in Iraq," ABC said in a statement.
ref: "Bob dan Doug dalam keadaan serius dan sedang dirawat dihospital tentera U.S. di Iraq," kata ABC dalam kenyataannya.

src: Reports say Woodruff was taping a report inside an Iraqi mechanized military vehicle near Taji, Iraq when the vehicle ran over and detonated an improvised explosive device.
ref: Laporan mengatakan Woodruff sedang merakam laporan didalam kenderaan jentera tentera Iraq berhampiran Taji, Iraq apabila kenderaan tersbut melanggar dan meletupkan peralatan letupan yang ditambah baik.

src: ABC also reports that exchanges of small arms fire took place shortly after the explosion.
ref: ABC turut melaporkan yang pertukaran tembakan tangan kecil berlaku sebaik selepas letupan.

src: MSNBC reports that Woodruff and Vogt were wearing body armor and helmets when the explosion occurred, measures that may turn out to have saved their lives.
ref: MSNBC melaporkan yang Woodruff dan Vogt memakai perisai badan dan helmet semasa letupan berlaku, langkah yang mungkin menjadi telah menyelamatkan nyawa mereka.

src: The Associated Press is reporting that the two men were standing in the hatch of the vehicle at the time of the explosion, and that no other people were injured.
ref: Associated Press melaporkan yang kedua-dua lelaki tersebut sedang berdiri didalam lubang kenderaan tersebut semasa letupan, dan tiada orang lain yang cedera.

src: Woodruff and Vogt had been embedded with the 4th Infantry Division that was accompanying an Iraqi Army unit.
ref: Woodruff dan Vogt telah dibenam dengan Bahagian Infantri ke-4 yang mengiringi satu unit Tentera Iraq.

src: ABC also said that both Woodruff and Vogt were wearing body armor and helmets.
ref: ABC juga berkata yang kedua-dua Woodruff dan Vogh memakai perisai badan dan helmet.

src: The U.S. military headquarters in Baghdad has confirmed the attack took place.
ref: Ibu pejabat tentera U.S. di Baghdad telah mengesahkan yang serangan tersebut berlaku.

src: Vogt, a 46-year-old Canadian based in France, is an Emmy-award winning cameraman for ABC News with 25 years of experience.
ref: Vogt, rakyat Kanada yang berpusat di Perancis berusia 46 tahun, ialah jurukamera penerima anugerah Emmy untuk ABC News dengan pengalaman 25 tahun.

src: According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, 61 journalists have been killed in the line of duty in Iraq since the U.S.-led invasion in 2003.
ref: Menurut Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan, 61 wartawan telah terbunuh semasa bertugas di Iraq sejak pencerobohan diketuai U.S. pada 2003.

src: Woodruff became the permanent co-anchor of ABC's World News Tonight, with Elizabeth Vargas on January 3, 2006, replacing the late Peter Jennings.
ref: Woodruff menjadi pembaca berita tetap bersama untuk ABC Berita Dunia Malam Ini, dengan Elizabeth Vargas pada 3 Januari, 2006, menggantikan mendiang Peter Jennings.

src: The New York Mets baseball team has agreed to a 20-year sponsorship deal with financial house Citigroup for the team's new ballpark, now called CitiField.
ref: Pasukan besbol New York Mets telah bersetuju untuk perjanjian penajaan 20 tahun dengan rumah kewangan Citigroup untuk padang bola baru pasukan tersebut, yang kini dipanggil CitiField.

src: The deal, which includes stadium naming rights, is worth more than $20 million annually, according to a baseball official.
ref: Perjanjian tersebut, yang termasuk hak menamakan stadium, bernilai lebih dari $20 juta tahunan, menurut pegawai besbol.

src: This tops the approximately ten million annually the NFL's Houston Texans receive from Reliant Energy to call their home Reliant Stadium.
ref: Ini melebihi lebih kurang sepuluh juta tahunan yang diterima NFL Houston Texas dari Reliant Energy untuk memanggil rumah mereka Stadium Reliant.

src: The agreement between the Mets and the financial services company includes options for both the team and Citigroup that could extend the deal to up to 35-years.
ref: Perjanjian diantara Mets dan syarikat servis kewangan itu termasuk pilihan untuk kedua-dua pasukan tersebut dan Citigroup untuk melanjutkan perjanjian itu sehingga 35 tahun.

src: Other commercial arrangements are part of the contract, the official said.
ref: Perjanjian komersial lain adalah sebahagian dari kontrak tersebut, kata pegawai tersebut.

src: Construction on the ballpark, next to the current stadium in Queens, New York, began last summer and is scheduled to be ready for the 2009 season.
ref: Pembinaan padang bola tersebut, bersebelahan stadium kini di Queens, New York, bermula musim panas lepas dan dijadualkan akan siap untuk musim 2009.

src: The Mets have played at Shea Stadium since 1964, the team's third year in the league.
ref: Mets telah bermain di Stadium Shea sejak 1964, tahun ketiga pasukan tersebut didalam liga.

src: The ballpark is named for William A. Shea, a lawyer who helped bring National League baseball back to New York.
ref: Padang bola tersebut dinamakan untuk William A. Shea, peguam yang membantu membawa Liga Kebangsaan besbol kembali ke New York.

src: The announcement will be made Monday at a special ceremony that will be attended by New York Govener, George Pataki and New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg.
ref: Pengumuman tersebut akan dibuat pada Isnin di upacara istimewa yang akan dihadiri oleh Gabenor New York, George Pataki dan Datuk Bandar Bandar New York Michael Bloomberg.

src: Citigroup is one of the world's largest full-service banks, with two hundred million customers in more than 100 countries.
ref: Citigroup adalah salah satu bank servis penuh terbesar dunia, dengan dua ratus juta pelanggan di lebih dari 100 negara.

src: In the Six Nations Cup, Ireland beat England 28 points to 24, to win The Triple Crown.
ref: Dalam Kejohanan Enam Negara, Ireland mengalahkan England 28 mata kepada 24, untuk memenangi Mahkota Tiga.

src: Ireland have now beaten England on the last three occasions that these sides have met.
ref: Ireland kini telah mengalahkan England dalam tiga acara akhir pertemuan mereka.

src: In the biggest ever narcotics haul in India's capital, the New Delhi police have seized over 4,400 kg of Mandrax and Rs. 20 crore from a dealer in the city.
ref: Dalam rampasan narkotik terbesar di ibu negara India, polis New Delhi telah menyita lebih 4,400 kg Mandrax dan Rs. 20 juta dari pembekal di dalam bandar tersebut.

src: The consignment, meant for a customer in the U.S, was seized from a godown in Badarpur, near the Delhi-Haryana border.
ref: Penghantaran tersebut, bertujuan untuk pelanggan di U.S, telah disita dari gudang di Badarpur, berhampiran sempadan Delhi-Haryana.

src: The alleged trafficker, identified as Vinod Sharma, claimed that the contraband was not his and that he had nothing to do with the matter.
ref: Pengedar yang disyaki, dikenali sebagai Vinod Sharma, menyatakan yang barang kontraban itu bukan miliknya dan dia tiada sebarang kaitan dengan perkara tersebut.

src: Sharma started his career as a scrap-dealer in Delhi, and police suspect that with the help of some contacts he used container depots for drug-trafficking, whilst successfully dodging both the police and the Customs Department.
ref: Sharma memulakan kerjayanya sebagai penjual barang sekerap di Delhi, dan polis mensyaki yang dengan bantuan beberapa kenalan dia telah menggunakan kontena untuk mengedar-dadah, yang berjaya menghindari kedua-dua polis dan Jabatan Kastam.

src: On Sunday the Delhi Police arrested him at his Kalkaji residence.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, Polis Delhi telah menahannya di kediamannya di Kalkaji.

src: The Deputy Commissioner of Police for South District, Delhi Police, Anil Shukla said, "Sharma befriended container drivers and once they had driven past customs, he and his men would meet them at a distance and pilfer the containers."
ref: Timbalan Pesuruhjaya Polis Daerah Selatan, Polis Delhi, Anil Shukla berkata, "Sharma berbaik-baik dengan pemandu kontena dan selepas mereka memandu melepasi kastam, dia dan orang-orangnya akan menemui mereka ketika ia jauh dari situ dan mencuri kontena tersebut."

src: The Council of Europe is pressing member governments to provide information concerning CIA prisons operating secretly in Europe.
ref: Majlis Eropah menekan ahli-ahli kerajaan untuk memberikan maklumat mengenai penjara CIA yang beroperasi secara rahsia di Eropah.

src: In an interim report by the human rights council rapporteur, Swiss senator Dick Marty made public the 42-member nation's preliminary conclusions regarding CIA activity on European Union soil.
ref: Dalam sebuah laporan interim oleh majlis pelapor hak asasi manusia, senator Swiss Dick Marty mengumumkan kesimpulan awal 42-ahli negara berkenaan aktiviti CIA di tanah Kesatuan Eropah.

src: Marty reported, "Individuals have been abducted, deprived of their liberty and transported to different destinations in Europe, to be handed over to countries in which they have suffered degrading treatment and torture."
ref: Marty melaporkan "Individu telah diculik, dilucutkan kebebasan mereka dan dihantar ke destinasi yang berbeza di Eropah, untuk diserahkan kepada negara-negara di mana mereka telah dihina dan diseksa."

src: The report estimates the rendition of "more than a hundred persons."
ref: Laporan itu menganggarkan soal siasat "lebih daripada seratus orang."

src: But when it comes right down to it, no irrefutable evidence exists to confirm allegations that the CIA operated secret detention centers in Europe.
ref: Tetapi apabila disiasat lebih dalam, tidak ada bukti yang wujud untuk mengesahkan dakwaan bahawa CIA mengendalikan pusat tahanan rahsia di Eropah.

src: "There is a great deal of coherent, convergent evidence pointing to the existence of a system of 'relocation' or 'outsourcing of torture'," the report stated while further noting that, "It is highly unlikely that European governments, or at least their intelligence services, were unaware."
ref: "Ada banyak yang bukti yang koheren, menumpu yang menunjukkan kewujudan satu sistem 'penempatan semula'atau 'penyeksaan dari luar," kata laporan itu manakala selanjutnya menyatakan bahawa, "Ia adalah sangat mustahil yang kerajaan Eropah, atau sekurang-kurangnya perkhidmatan perisikan mereka, tidak menyedarinya."

src: "Our aim is to find out the truth that is being hidden from us today", he said.
ref: "Matlamat kami adalah untuk mencari kebenaran yang sedang disembunyikan daripada kita," katanya.

src: He adds that he is afraid of "the pressure put on the media in the United States not to report on this affair."
ref: Beliau menambah bahawa beliau risau "tekanan yang diberikan kepada media di Amerika Syarikat supaya tidak melaporkan tentang kegiatan ini."

src: A researcher for Human Rights Watch, John Swift, said; "Cooperation is going to be needed if this investigation is going to succeed."
ref: Seorang penyelidik daripada Human Rights Watch, John Swift, berkata; "Kerjasama diperlukan jika mahu penyiasatan ini berjaya."

src: "They can decide to cooperate with this investigation and uphold European traditions of human rights, or they can continue their romance with the CIA."
ref: "Mereka boleh membuat keputusan untuk bekerjasama dengan penyiasatan ini dan menegakkan tradisi hak asasi manusia Eropah, atau mereka boleh terus bersama CIA."

src: The report has also been criticized for appearing to lack new content and to be incomplete.
ref: Laporan itu juga telah dikritik kerana kelihatan kurang memberi isi baru dan tidak lengkap.

src: Former minister for Europe and British member of parliament Denis MacShane has said that Marty's report "has more holes than a Swiss cheese."
ref: Bekas menteri Eropah dan ahli Parlimen British Denis MacShane berkata bahawa laporan Marty ini "mempunyai lebih banyak lubang berbanding lubang keju Switzerland."

src: US State Department spokesman Sean McCormack has rejected the report and stated that it was an example of the "same old reports wrapped up in some new rhetoric."
ref: Jurucakap Jabatan Negara US Sean McCormack telah menolak laporan itu dan menyatakan bahawa ia adalah satu contoh "laporan lama yang sama dan dibungkus dalam beberapa retorik baru."

src: US Department of Homeland Security secretary Michael Chertoff has stated regarding the US government that "the government acts in accordance with the law and with respect to the sovereignty of host countries in which it operates," and further stated that "The authorities are free to investigate what they want to investigate but we should not allow ourselves to be distracted from the need to identify, prevent and protect against terrorist acts of violence."
ref: Setiausaha Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri US Michael Chertoff telah berkata mengenai kerajaan US bahawa "kerajaan bertindak mengikut undang-undang dan menghormati kedaulatan negara tuan rumah di mana ia beroperasi," dan juga menyatakan bahawa "Pihak berkuasa bebas untuk menyiasat apa yang mereka mahu siasat tetapi kami tidak harus membiarkan diri kami terganggu daripada mengenal pasti, mencegah dan melindungi daripada tindakan keganasan pengganas."

src: The group Amnesty International USA is calling for the US Congress to create a commission to investigate detention and interrogation practices.
ref: Kumpulan Amnesti Antarabangsa USA menggesa Kongres US untuk mewujudkan sebuah suruhanjaya bagi menyiasat aktiviti penahanan dan soal siasat.

src: The United States neither confirms nor denies the existence of secret detention centers.
ref: Amerika Syarikat tidak mengesahkan atau menafikan kewujudan pusat-pusat tahanan rahsia tersebut.

src: The Co-operative Group (Co-op) and Bristol-based Somerfield today agreed on a deal worth £1.565 billion which results in Somerfield being acquired by Co-op.
ref: Co-operative Group (Co-op) dan Somerfield yang berpusat di Bristol hari ini bersetuju dengan perjanjian bernilai £1.565 bilion yang menyebabkan Somerfield diambil alih oleh Co-op.

src: Co-op has said that the acquisition took place on a "cash-free debt-free basis."
ref: Co-op telah berkata bahawa pengambilalihan itu dilakukan di atas "asas bebas hutang bebas tunai."

src: Peter Marks, chief executive of The Co-operative Group, claimed that "this is good news for consumers and for competition in the grocery market, where we will create a stronger fifth player in food and a convenience store chain with unrivalled geographic reach."
ref: Peter Marks, Ketua Eksekutif Co-operative Group, mendakwa bahawa "ini adalah berita baik untuk pengguna dan persaingan dalam pasaran runcit, di mana kita akan mewujudkan pemain kelima yang lebih kukuh dalam makanan dan rangkaian kedai serbaneka dengan jangkauan geografi yang tiada tandingan."

src: He then said that "for The Co-operative Group this is a transformational deal – cementing our position as the UK’s premier community retailer and helping us significantly as we lead a renaissance of The Co-operative brand."
ref: Beliau kemudian berkata, "bagi Co-operative Group ini adalah satu tawaran transformasi - mengukuhkan kedudukan kita sebagai komuniti peruncit utama di UK dan banyak membantu kami ketika kami memimpin kebangkitan jenama Koperasi."

src: Paul Mason, chair of privately-held Somerfield, also commented on the takeover.
ref: Paul Mason, pengerusi persendirian Somerfield, juga mengulas mengenai pengambilalihan itu.

src: "The Co-operative Group and Somerfield have a similar focus in terms of customers, store types, product ranges and business vision."
ref: "Co-operative Group dan Somerfield mempunyai fokus yang sama dari segi pelanggan, jenis kedai, rangkaian produk dan visi perniagaan."

src: "Our shared vision of providing a high-quality and affordable convenience offer to local communities means that together we will be twice as strong, and therefore twice as able to deliver the local grocery shops British customers demand," he said.
ref: "Visi kami yang sama untuk menyediakan tawaran kemudahan yang berkualiti tinggi dan berpatutan kepada masyarakat tempatan bermakna bahawa bersama-sama kami akan menjadi dua kali lebih kuat, dan dua kali lebih mampu untuk menunaikan permintaan pelanggan kedai-kedai runcit tempatan British," katanya.

src: With 4.4% share of the market, the Co-op is the fifth largest grocery chain in the UK.
ref: Dengan 4.4% bahagian daripada pasaran, Co-op adalah rantaian runcit kelima terbesar di UK.

src: The owners of Somerfield made their wish to sell the company clear in January of this year.
ref: Pemilik Somerfield membuat hasrat mereka untuk menjual syarikat itu jelas pada bulan Januari tahun ini.

src: Co-op first expressed an interest in the purchase in April.
ref: Co-op menyatakan minat pembelian mereka buat pertama kali pada bulan April.

src: BBC News Online reported that the Competition Commission may force Co-op to sell some stores due to its increased presence.
ref: BBC News Online melaporkan bahawa Suruhanjaya Persaingan boleh memaksa Co-op untuk menjual beberapa kedai kerana kewujudannya yang semakin meningkat.

src: The president of Niger, Tandja Mamadou, has been captured and imprisoned by a group of Nigerien soldiers under the name of "Supreme Council for the Restoration of Democracy" after an attack on the presidential palace late Thursday.
ref: Presiden Niger, Tandja Mamadou, telah ditangkap dan dipenjarakan oleh satu kumpulan tentera Nigerien di bawah nama "Majlis Tertinggi Pemulihan Demokrasi" selepas serangan ke atas istana presiden lewat Khamis.

src: The Nigerien embassy in London has issued a statement saying that both the president and ministers in his company were "safe and well," although officials said that the company was most likely imprisoned in military barracks outside of Niamy.
ref: Kedutaan Nigerien di London telah mengeluarkan kenyataan yang mengatakan bahawa kedua-dua presiden dan menteri-menteri dalam syarikatnya adalah "selamat dan baik," walaupun kata pegawai syarikat itu kemungkinan besar dipenjarakan di berek tentera di luar Niamy.

src: According to an announcement by the representative of the group responsible for the coup, a Nigerien Army colonel, the country's constitution has been suspended and all government institutions have been dissolved.
ref: Menurut satu pengumuman oleh wakil kumpulan yang bertanggungjawab ke atas rampasan kuasa, seorang kolonel Tentera Darat Nigerien, perlembagaan negara telah digantung dan semua institusi kerajaan telah dibubarkan.

src: It is not clear who the leader of the coup is, although several military sources said that Major Adamou Harouna of the Nigerien Army was responsible.
ref: Masih tidak jelas siapakah pemimpin rampasan kuasa tersebut, walaupun beberapa sumber tentera berkata Mejar Adamou Harouna dari Tentera Nigerien yang bertanggungjawab.

src: The coup apparently took place during a cabinet meeting in the capitol building, and was preceded by a several-hour long gun battle in the capital, Niamy.
ref: Rampasan kuasa itu nampaknya berlaku semasa mesyuarat kabinet di dalam bangunan ibu pejabat, dan telah didahului dengan beberapa jam pertempuran senjata di ibu negara, Niamy.

src: The battle began at about 13:00 local time (12:00 UTC), ending about four hours later, with both foot soldiers and tanks involved, although no significant deployment of the military was reported.
ref: Pertempuran itu bermula kira-kira jam 13:00 waktu tempatan (12:00 UTC), yang berakhir kira-kira empat jam kemudian, dengan kedua-dua pasukan berjalan kaki dan kereta kebal terlibat, walaupun tidak ada kerahan besar tentera telah dilaporkan.

src: The morning after the battle, the streets were relatively quiet, and the only significant military presence is heavy artillery around the presidential palace.
ref: Pagi selepas pertempuran itu, jalan-jalan agak tenang, dan hanya meriam berat di sekitar istana presiden menunjukkan kehadiran tentera.

src: The battle led to at least ten deaths, four of which were soldiers.
ref: Pertempuran tersebut telah membawa kepada sekurang-kurangnya sepuluh kematian, empat daripadanya adalah tentera.

src: Additionally, a curfew has been imposed, and the military has closed Niger's borders.
ref: Selain itu, perintah berkurung telah dikenakan, dan tentera telah menutup sempadan Niger.

src: Despite the crisis, the government has yet to release an official statement as to its status.
ref: Walaupun dengan krisis itu, kerajaan masih belum mengeluarkan kenyataan rasmi mengenai statusnya.

src: The actions of the military prompted condemnations of the coup from both the African Union and the nation of France, both of which called for negotiations to resolve the situation.
ref: Tindakan tentera mendorong kecaman rampasan kuasa daripada kedua-dua Kesatuan Afrika dan negara Perancis, kedua-duanya yang dipanggil untuk rundingan bagi menyelesaikan keadaan.

src: The West African group of countries Ecowas has already dispatched a delegation to talk to the group responsible for the coup.
ref: Kumpulan Afrika Barat negara-negara Ecowas telah menghantar satu delegasi untuk berbincang dengan kumpulan yang bertanggungjawab atas rampasan kuasa itu.

src: The coup came after an extended political crisis in which President Tandja has dissolved both the National Assembly and Niger's High Court, as well as extending his presidential term by three years, and removing all further limits on his term.
ref: Rampasan kuasa itu dibuat selepas satu krisis politik lanjutan di mana Presiden Tandja telah membubarkan kedua-dua Dewan Negara dan Mahkamah Tinggi Niger, serta memanjangkan tempohnya menjadi presiden selama tiga tahun, dan menghapuskan semua had lanjut mengenai tempohnya.

src: These actions have led to increasing pressure against him and the government, culminating with a thousands-strong demonstration against the government last week.
ref: Tindakan ini telah membawa kepada peningkatan tekanan menentang beliau dan kerajaan, dan memuncak dengan beribu demonstrasi kuat menentang kerajaan pada minggu lepas.

src: James Hipwell, a former financial reporter for the Daily Mirror tabloid, told the Leveson Inquiry today he believed hacking into voicemails of celebrities and others was a "bog-standard tool" for entertainment journalists at the Mirror.
ref: James Hipwell, seorang bekas wartawan kewangan tabloid Daily Mirror, memberitahu Leveson Inquiry hari ini beliau percaya bahawa menggodam mel suara selebriti dan lain-lain adalah "alat bog-standard" untuk wartawan hiburan di Mirror.

src: Hipwell was fired from the paper in 2000 and then convicted and sent to prison in February 2006 for using his "City Slicker" column in the newspaper to write about companies he had a financial stake in, which netted him approximately £40,000.
ref: Hipwell telah dipecat dari akhbar tersebut pada tahun 2000 dan kemudian didapati bersalah dan dihantar ke penjara pada bulan Februari 2006 kerana menggunakan ruangan "City Slicker" nya di dalam akhbar itu untuk menulis tentang syarikat-syarikat yang mempunyai risiko kewangan, yang bernilai kira-kira £40,000.

src: Trinity Mirror newspapers, which publishes the Mirror, also publishes another tabloid The People which is also alleged to have used phone hacking to get stories.
ref: Surat khabar Trinity Mirror, yang menerbitkan Mirror, juga menerbitkan satu lagi tabloid The People yang juga didakwa telah menggunakan penggodam telefon untuk mendapatkan cerita.

src: Hipwell told the inquiry he believed that voicemail hacking was "genuinely accepted", "happened every day" and "was entirely accepted by the senior editors on the newspaper" and that "it was seen as a slightly underhand thing to do but not illegal."
ref: Hipwell memberitahu penyiasatan itu yang beliau percaya menggodam mel suara adalah "benar-benar diterima", "yang berlaku setiap hari" dan "telah diterima sepenuhnya oleh editor kanan di akhbar" dan bahawa "ia dilihat sebagai satu perkara yang sedikit salah tetapi tidak menyalahi undang-undang."

src: Hipwell's testimony contradicts claims by the former editor of the Mirror, Piers Morgan, who now hosts a talk show on CNN.
ref: Testimoni Hipwell bercanggah dengan dakwaan bekas editor Mirror, Piers Morgan, yang kini menjadi pengacara rancangan bual bicara di CNN.

src: Morgan claims that under his editorship, he was unaware of any hacking, but Hipwell claims it is unlikely Morgan did not know about hacking going on at the paper.
ref: Morgan mendakwa bahawa di bawah tanggungjawabnya sebagai editor, beliau tidak tahu mengenai sebarang penggodaman, tetapi Hipwell mendakwa tidak mungkin Morgan tidak tahu tentang penggodaman yang berlaku di akhbar.

src: The Leveson Inquiry was set up by the British Prime Minister David Cameron following the scandal which engulfed the News of the World after widespread allegations they hacked into voicemails of crime victims and their families including the murdered schoolgirl Milly Dowler, and has so far interviewed numerous representatives of the media industry, and alleged victims of press intrusion and phone hacking.
ref: Leveson Inquiry telah ditubuhkan oleh Perdana Menteri Britain David Cameron berikutan skandal yang melanda News of the World selepas dakwaan tersebar luas yang mereka menggodam mel suara mangsa jenayah dan keluarga mereka termasuk murid yang dibunuh Milly Dowler, dan setakat ini telah menemuramah ramai wakil-wakil industri media, dan mangsa dakwaan pencerobohan akhbar dan penggodaman telefon.

src: The United States and Russia yesterday agreed to the swap of prisoners held by both nations after eleven Russian spies were arrested late last month.
ref: Amerika Syarikat dan Rusia semalam bersetuju dengan pertukaran tahanan yang ditahan oleh kedua-dua negara selepas sebelas orang perisik Rusia ditahan akhir bulan lalu.

src: The swap will include the ten Russian spies arrested on US soil (the eleventh was arrested in Cyprus and subsequently escaped) and four spies being held in Russia on charges of espionage.
ref: Pertukaran ini termasuk sepuluh orang perisik Rusia yang ditahan di tanah US (orang yang kesebelas ditahan di Cyprus dan kemudiannya telah melarikan diri) dan empat orang pengintip yang ditahan di Rusia atas tuduhan pengintipan.

src: The spies arrested by the US all pled guilty to charges of "conspiracy to act as an unregistered agent of a foreign country."
ref: Pengintip yang ditahan oleh US semuanya mengaku bersalah atas tuduhan "konspirasi untuk bertindak sebagai ejen tidak berdaftar di suatu negara asing."

src: Below are the Russian spies who were convicted (cover names are in quotes, while real names are unquoted):*"Richard and Cynthia Murphy" *Vicky Paleaz *"Juan Lazaro" *Anna Chapman *Mikhail Zemenko *"Michael Zottoli" and "Patricia Mills" *"Donald Howard Heathfield" and "Tracy Lee Ann Foley"
ref: Di bawah adalah pengintip Rusia yang disabitkan kesalahan (nama samaran dalam tanda petik, manakala nama-nama sebenar tidak bertanda petik): *"Richard dan Cynthia Murphy" *Vicky Paleaz* "Juan Lazaro" *Anna Chapman *Mikhail Zemenko *"Michael Zottoli" dan "Patricia Mills" *"Donald Howard Heathfield" dan "Tracy Lee Ann Foley"

src: The swap reportedly began late yesterday, with Russia beginning the process of releasing at least one of the prisoners they held, Igor Sutyagin, almost immediately.
ref: Pertukaran itu dilaporkan bermula lewat semalam, dengan Rusia memulakan proses pelepasan sekurang-kurangnya salah satu daripada tahanan yang mereka tahan, Igor Sutyagin, dengan hampir serta-merta.

src: Russian media reported that he had already arrived in Vienna, Austria, although his father said that it was so far unconfirmed.
ref: Media Rusia melaporkan bahawa dia telah tiba di Vienna, Austria, walaupun bapanya berkata bahawa perkara itu setakat ini belum dapat disahkan.

src: Russia has so far not confirmed the identities of other prisoners to be released, although several names have been speculated, including Alexander Zaporozhsky, Sergei Skripal, and Alexander Sypachev, all accused of transferring information to foreign governments.
ref: Rusia setakat ini tidak mengesahkan identiti tahanan lain yang akan dilepaskan, walaupun beberapa nama telah diagak, termasuk Alexander Zaporozhsky, Sergei Skripal, dan Alexander Sypachev, semua dituduh atas pemindahan maklumat kepada kerajaan asing.

src: The US arrested the ten spies that are to be returned to Russia as part of its breakup of a long-term spy ring that had operated for years, and involved the spies living as American civilians, some as couples.
ref: US telah menangkap sepuluh orang pengintip yang perlu kembali ke Rusia sebagai sebahagian daripada perpecahan rangkaian perisikan jangka panjang yang telah beroperasi selama bertahun-tahun, dan melibatkan pengintip yang tinggal sebagai orang awam Amerika, sesetengahnya sebagai pasangan.

src: Prosecutors say that they had been commanded by Russia's Foreign Intelligence Service, with the mission of collecting information about American policy.
ref: Para pendakwaraya mengatakan bahawa mereka telah diperintahkan oleh Perkhidmatan Perisikan Asing Rusia, dengan misi untuk mengumpul maklumat mengenai dasar Amerika.

src: Kabul Afghanistan saw the worst violence on Monday since the fall of the Taliban, after a large U.S. Military cargo truck crashed into about a dozen vehicles at an intersection in Kabul killing at least 7 civilians and injuring about 40.
ref: Kabul Afghanistan telah menyaksikan keganasan yang paling teruk pada hari Isnin sejak kejatuhan Taliban, selepas trak kargo tentera Amerika yang besar merempuh kira-kira sedozen kenderaan di persimpangan di Kabul membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 7 orang awam dan mencederakan kira-kira 40 orang.

src: "There was a traffic jam and all the vehicles were stopped," said one witness, 21-year old shopkeeper Mohammad Wali.
ref: "Terdapat kesesakan lalu lintas dan semua kenderaan sedang berhenti," kata seorang saksi, pekedai, 21-tahun, Mohammad Wali.

src: "The American convoy hit all the vehicles which were on the way."
ref: "Konvoi Amerika itu melanggar semua kenderaan yang berada di laluannya."

src: A U.S. military spokesman, Lieutenant Colonel Paul Fitzpatrick, said no U.S. troops had been hurt, and that an investigation has begun into the incident.
ref: Jurucakap tentera U.S., Leftenan Kolonel Paul Fitzpatrick, berkata tiada tentera U.S. telah tercedera, dan satu siasatan telah bermula untuk kejadian itu.

src: The U.S. military also said the crash was caused by brake failure but Afghans often complain about aggressive driving tactics of the U.S. military.
ref: Tentera U.S. juga berkata yang kemalangan itu berpunca daripada kegagalan brek tetapi rakyat Afghanistan sering mengadu tentang sikap memandu agresif tentera U.S.

src: Convoys often pass through crowded areas at high speed and occasionally disregard road rules.
ref: Konvoi sering melalui kawasan sesak pada kelajuan tinggi dan kadang-kadang tidak mengambil kira peraturan jalan raya.

src: U.S. military says such driving is necessary to protect the troops from attack.
ref: Tentera U.S. berkata cara memandu itu adalah perlu bagi melindungi tentera daripada serangan.

src: Afghan rioters also claimed U.S. troops had shot and killed civilians at the scene of the accident.
ref: Perusuh Afghan juga mendakwa tentera U.S. telah menembak dan membunuh orang awam di tempat kejadian kemalangan.

src: Chanting "Death to America," rioters stoned the U.S. convoy involved in the accident Monday before heading to the center of Kabul where they ransacked offices of international aid groups and searched for foreigners.
ref: Dengan melaungkan "Kematian untuk Amerika," perusuh membaling batu kepada konvoi U.S. yang terlibat dalam kemalangan hari Isnin sebelum menuju ke pusat Kabul di mana mereka menggeledah pejabat kumpulan bantuan antarabangsa dan mencari warga asing.

src: Smoke billowed from burning buildings along the path of destruction.
ref: Asap berkepul-kepul keluar daripada bangunan yang terbakar di sepanjang jalan yang telah musnah.

src: New South Wales Police have broadened investigations into Australia's oldest Catholic boarding school, St Stanislaus College in Bathurst, New South Wales, following claims that at least 13 men were sexually abused while children at the school in the 1970s and 1980s.
ref: Polis New South Wales telah meluaskan siasatan ke sekolah asrama Katolik tertua di Australia, St Stanislaus College di Bathurst, New South Wales, berikutan dakwaan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 13 orang lelaki telah didera secara seksual semasa mereka adalah kanak-kanak di sekolah itu pada tahun 1970-an dan 1980-an.

src: The claims have surfaced following police being alerted in August last year.
ref: Tuntutan itu telah muncul berikutan polis telah dimaklumkan pada bulan Ogos tahun lepas.

src: Police have appealed for victims to come forward, but acknowledged it may be difficult for some.
ref: Polis merayu kepada semua mangsa untuk tampil ke hadapan, tetapi mengakui ia mungkin sukar bagi sesetengah orang.

src: "I would imagine it would be very hard for anyone subject to these sort of things to come forward," Detective Superintendent Michael Goodwin said.
ref: "Saya dapat membayangkan yang ia akan menjadi sangat sukar untuk sesiapa sahaja yang mempunyai pengalaman ini untuk tampil ke hadapan," kata Penguasa Detektif Michael Goodwin.

src: "All I can say is that NSW police force will be providing every form of support we possibly can to make the process for them as trouble-free as possible."
ref: "Apa yang saya boleh katakan ialah pasukan polis NSW akan menyediakan segala bentuk sokongan yang kami boleh lakukan supaya proses itu bebas dari masalah untuk mereka."

src: Superintendent Goodwin reassured the community that the allegations date back two decades and there is "absolutely no suggestion whatsoever that the college involved is/has been looking to anything in the current day."
ref: Penguasa Goodwin memberi jaminan kepada komuniti bahawa dakwaan itu bertarikh dua dekad lalu dan tidak ada "sama sekali saranan yang mengatakan apa-apa yang sedang berlaku di kolej itu sedang/telah lama ada pada masa kini."

src: "The college involved has been cooperating with the police completely with this inquiry," Goodwin added.
ref: "Kolej terbabit sentiasa bekerjasama dengan polis sepenuhnya dalam penyiasatan ini sejak dahulu," tambah Goodwin.

src: The police would not release how many suspects were being investigated but said their inquiries had not led them to any other locations where former staff may have been employed.
ref: Pihak polis tidak akan menyatakan berapa ramai suspek yang sedang disiasat tetapi berkata siasatan mereka tidak membawa mereka ke mana-mana lokasi lain di mana bekas kakitangan mungkin telah bekerja.

src: Superintendent Goodwin said Police were exploring all lines of enquiry and that "no loose ends [are] being let go at this stage."
ref: Penguasa Goodwin berkata Polis meneliti semua baris penyiasatan dan bahawa "tiada sebarang perkara [akan] dilepaskan pada peringkat ini."

src: The school's principal, John Edwards, said the police had served him with a search warrant last month which listed the names of three former staff members.
ref: Pengetua sekolah itu, John Edwards, berkata polis telah memberinya satu waran geledah bulan lepas yang menyenaraikan nama tiga orang bekas kakitangan.

src: "There were three former staff member who were listed on the search warrant that was served on me in early July, and we facilitated the gathering of material for police," Mr Edwards told Fairfax Radio Network.
ref: "Terdapat tiga orang bekas kakitangan yang telah disenaraikan dalam waran geledah yang telah diberikan kepada saya pada awal Julai, dan kami memudahkan pengumpulan bahan untuk polis," Encik Edwards memberitahu Fairfax Radio Network.

src: Mr Edwards called for the matter to be transparent and described the complaints as "gravely concerning" and he hopes they are properly dealt with by the courts.
ref: Encik Edwards menggesa supaya perkara itu supaya telus dan menyifatkan dakwaan itu sebagai "amat membimbangkan" dan dia berharap mereka akan diuruskan mahkamah dengan cara yang betul.

src: "It is absolutely a requirement for this matter to be open, for this matter to be addressed and this matter to be resolved," he said.
ref: "Ia sememangnya satu keperluan supaya perkara ini menjadi terbuka, supaya perkara ini boleh ditangani dan perkara ini boleh diselesaikan," katanya.

src: "This school is very concerned to ensure that children are treated well and that their interests are protected."
ref: "Sekolah ini amat mengambil berat untuk memastikan bahawa kanak-kanak dilayan dengan baik dan bahawa kepentingan mereka dilindungi."

src: A former priest, Brian Joseph Spillane, aged 65 was arrested over the case in May.
ref: Seorang bekas paderi, Brian Joseph Spillane, berusia 65 tahun telah ditahan atas kes itu pada bulan Mei.

src: He faced Bathurst Local Court in July, facing 33 separate charges including six counts of sexual intercourse with pupils aged 10 and 18.
ref: Dia dibicarakan di Mahkamah Tempatan Bathurst pada bulan Julai, menghadapi 33 tuduhan berasingan termasuk enam tuduhan melakukan hubungan seks dengan murid-murid yang berumur 10 dan 18 tahun.

src: Spillane's lawyer, Greg Walsh, says media reports alerted him to the new claims.
ref: Peguam Spillane, Greg Walsh, berkata laporan media memaklumkan dia atas tuntutan baru.

src: "I don't know anything about eight alleged other victims, I've not been served with any witness statements so I really can't comment about it," said Walsh.
ref: "Saya tidak tahu apa-apa mengenai lapan dakwaan mangsa lain, saya belum lagi menerima apa-apa kenyataan saksi jadi saya benar-benar tidak boleh komen mengenainya," kata Walsh.

src: One former student described the alleged abuse as "an orgy", claiming that boys were herded into a prayer room by a priest chanting "hypnotic" spells in tongues.
ref: Seorang bekas pelajar menerangkan deraan yang didakwa sebagai "pesta liar," dengan mendakwa bahawa kanak-kanak lelaki telah dikumpulkan ke dalam sebuah bilik sembahyang oleh seorang paderi yang membaca sihir "hipnosis."

src: It is alleged that boys were subject to sexual abuse or forced to assault each other once in the prayer room.
ref: Dikatakan bahawa kanak-kanak lelaki diarah kepada penderaan seksual atau dipaksa menyakiti satu sama lain sebaik sahaja mereka berada dalam bilik sembahyang itu.

src: A former border told The Daily Telegraph that priests "got a group between eight and 12 of us together and they'd just start chanting and I would wake up during these sessions and see what was going on."
ref: Seorang bekas pengawal memberitahu The Daily Telegraph bahawa paderi "mengumpulkan satu kumpulan antara lapan dan 12 antara kami dan mereka hanya akan mula membaca dan saya akan bangun semasa sesi itu dan lihat apa yang berlaku."

src: The allegations came to light after one of the alleged victims made a visit to Bathurst last year to hand out fliers documenting the abuse and providing a link to his website address.
ref: Dakwaan-dakwaan tersebut diketahui selepas seorang daripada mangsa membuat lawatan ke Bathurst tahun lepas untuk menyerahkan risalah yang mendokumenkan deraan tersebut dan menyediakan pautan ke alamat laman webnya.

src: The school called in police, who the victim claims contacted him and asked him to make a complaint.
ref: Sekolah telah memanggil polis, yang mangsa mendakwa telah menghubungi dan memintanya untuk membuat aduan.

src: The game does not affect Group D as both Germany and the Czech Republic have already qualified for next summer's tournament.
ref: Perlawanan ini tidak memberi kesan kepada Kumpulan D kerana kedua-dua Jerman dan Republik Czech telah layak untuk kejohanan musim panas tahun depan.

src: The victory for Germany keeps them tied in first position in Group D.
ref: Kemenangan untuk Jerman terus meletakkan mereka kekal di kedudukan pertama dalam Kumpulan D.

src: Germany finishes off its Euro 2008 qualification games against Wales on Wednesday.
ref: Jerman menyelesaikan perlawanan kelayakan Euro 2008 menentang Wales pada hari Rabu.

src: A new study by Duke University in the US suggests depressed adolescents who respond to treatment within twelve weeks are at a reduced risk of drug abuse later in their lives.
ref: Satu kajian baru oleh Universiti Duke di US menunjukkan remaja tertekan yang bertindak balas terhadap rawatan dalam tempoh dua belas minggu mempunyai kurang risiko penyalahgunaan dadah di dalam kehidupan mereka di masa hadapan.

src: The research followed about half of a pool of 439 adolescents who had received treatment for major depression and volunteered for Duke University research.
ref: Kajian ini telah melibatkan separuh daripada sekumpulan 439 orang remaja yang telah menerima rawatan untuk kemurungan teruk dan menawarkan diri untuk kajian Universiti Duke.

src: At the five-year study's conclusion the participants were aged 17–23.
ref: Pada kesimpulan kajian lima tahun ini para peserta adalah berumur 17-23 tahun.

src: Of those who had experienced a reduction in depressive symptoms within twelve weeks of treatment, ten percent went on to have drug abuse problems.
ref: Daripada mereka yang telah mengalami pengurangan gejala kemurungan dalam masa dua belas minggu rawatan, sepuluh peratus terus mempunyai masalah penyalahgunaan dadah.

src: Alcohol use problems, however, were equally prevalent regardless of treatment outcome.
ref: Masalah penggunaan alkohol, bagaimanapun, turut tersebar luas dengan sama tanpa mengira kesan rawatan.

src: The study was run by Dr. John Curry, a professor of neuroscience and psychology.
ref: Kajian ini telah dijalankan oleh Dr. John Curry, seorang profesor neurosains dan psikologi.

src: Curry noted that the results for those treated successfully held true "whatever they responded to — cognitive-behavioral therapy, Prozac, both treatments, or a placebo".
ref: Curry berkata bahawa keputusan untuk mereka yang dirawat berjaya disahkan benar "apa sahaja yang mereka telah bertindakbalas - terapi kognitif tingkah laku, Prozac, kedua-dua rawatan, atau plasebo."

src: The study has called for treatments to take possible alcohol and drug use into account.
ref: Kajian ini telah mengambil berat tentang rawatan terhadap kemungkinan pengambilan alkohol dan penggunaan dadah.

src: Said Curry, "When the teenagers got over the depression, about half of them stayed well for the whole five-year period, but almost half of them had a second episode of depression... what we found out was that, for those who had both alcohol disorder and another depression, the alcohol disorder almost always came first".
ref: Kata Curry, "Apabila remaja telah mengatasi kemurungan, kira-kira separuh daripada mereka tinggal dengan baik untuk tempoh lima tahun sepenuhnya, tetapi hampir separuh daripada mereka mempunyai satu episod kedua kemurungan...apa yang kita dapati adalah bahawa, bagi mereka yang mempunyai kedua-dua gangguan alkohol dan kemurungan lain, gangguan alkohol hampir selalunya datang dahulu."

src: He also said the study had "a take-home message" in "that alcohol use disorders are very prevalent during that particular age period and there’s a need for a lot of prevention and education for college students to avoid getting into heavy drinking and then the beginnings of an alcohol disorder".
ref: Beliau juga berkata kajian itu mempunyai "satu mesej untuk dibawa pulang" iaitu "gangguan penyalahgunaan alkohol adalah sangat berleluasa dalam tempoh usia yang tersebut dan perlu ada banyak pencegahan dan pendidikan untuk pelajar kolej bagi mengelakkan diri mereka terjerumus ke dalam pengambilan arak yang banyak dan seterusnya permulaan kepada penyalahgunaan alkohol."

src: Curry, alongside Dr. Susan Silva, a co-author, want more research using larger groups.
ref: Curry, bersama Dr. Susan Silva, pengarang bersama, mahu lebih banyak kajian dengan menggunakan kumpulan yang lebih besar.

src: They also say work towards a comparison with non-depressed individuals is needed.
ref: Mereka juga berkata kerja-kerja ke arah perbandingan dengan individu tidak tertekan adalah diperlukan.

src: Safia Ahmed-jan, the director of the Afghan Ministry of Women's Affairs for the Khandahar province and an advocate of women's rights and a strong critic of the Taliban's repression of those rights, was shot dead by unidentified gunmen outside her home in Khandahar city in southern Afghanistan on Monday.
ref: Safia Ahmed-jan, pengarah Kementerian Hal Ehwal Wanita Afghan untuk wilayah Khandahar dan seorang peguam bela hak-hak wanita dan pengkritik yang kuat mengenai penindasan Taliban terhadap hak-hak tersebut, telah ditembak mati oleh lelaki bersenjata yang tidak dikenali di luar rumahnya di bandar Khandahar di selatan Afghanistan pada hari Isnin.

src: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, the president of Brazil, said on Wednesday that not continuing to use biofuels would be a "crime against humanity."
ref: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, Presiden Brazil, berkata pada hari Rabu bahawa tindakan tidak meneruskan penggunaan biofuel akan menjadi "jenayah terhadap kemanusiaan."

src: "Don't tell me, for the love of God, that food is expensive because of biodiesel," said Lula, when talking to reporters.
ref: "Jangan beritahu saya, demi tuhan, bahawa makanan adalah mahal disebabkan oleh biodiesel," kata Lula, apabila bercakap dengan pemberita.

src: Lula also stated that he was ready for a debate on biofuels.
ref: Lula juga menyatakan bahawa beliau bersedia untuk berdebat mengenai biofuel.

src: "I and my government are ready to travel around the world," he said.
ref: "Saya dan kerajaan saya bersedia untuk mengelilingi dunia," katanya.

src: This move comes soon after a press release was made available by the European Parliament saying that "in the last year scientific evidence, though disputed, has indicated that biofuels may not be as good for the environment as was once thought."
ref: Gerakan ini terjadi tidak lama selepas kenyataan akhbar yang telah dikeluarkan oleh Parlimen Eropah berkata bahawa "dalam bukti saintifik tahun lepas, walaupun dipertikaikan, telah menyatakan bahawa biofuel mungkin tidak baik untuk alam sekitar seperti yang pernah difikirkan."

src: A Washington, D.C. student of Georgetown University has been arrested on suspicion of a hate crime, in which he allegedly beat up another man because the victim was gay.
ref: Seorang pelajar Universiti Georgetown di Washington, D.C. telah ditangkap kerana disyaki atas jenayah kebencian, di mana dia didakwa telah memukul seorang lelaki lain kerana mangsa tersebut adalah seorang homoseksual.

src: News reports confirm that the victim - who also goes to the same school - recognized the alleged assailant, because of his profile and photos on Facebook.
ref: Laporan berita mengesahkan bahawa mangsa - yang turut pergi ke sekolah yang sama - mengenali penyerangnya, kerana profil dan gambar beliau di Facebook.

src: Washington DC Metropolitan Police Chief Cathy Lanier announced yesterday that Philip Cooney had been arrested after a warrant was issued for the September 9 attack, which occurred in the 1400 block of 36th Street NW (Between O and P Streets, NW).
ref: Ketua Polis Metropolitan Washington DC Cathy Lanier mengumumkan semalam bahawa Philip Cooney telah ditangkap selepas satu waran telah dikeluarkan untuk serangan 9 September yang berlaku di blok 1400 di Jalan 36 NW (di antara Jalan O dan P, NW).

src: The victim was allegedly attacked by a group of males yelling homophobic slurs.
ref: Mangsa dikatakan diserang sekumpulan lelaki yang menjerit celaan yang berunsur homofobik.

src: "He made it a point to etch the suspect's face in his mind and remember him," Police Lt. Alberto Jova said.
ref: "Sampai pada satu ketika, dia mengukir wajah susupek ke dalam mindanya dan mengingatinya," kata polis Lt. Alberto Jova.

src: "Because of that he was able to give a very positive identification."
ref: "Sebab itu dia mampu memberi pengenalpastian yang sangat positif."

src: The victim in this case suffered a broken thumb and cuts and bruises to his face.
ref: Mangsa dalam kes ini mengalami kecederaan satu ibu jari patah dan luka serta lebam di mukanya.

src: The victim suspected his attacker was also a student at Georgetown, and did extensive examination of information available on Facebook, a popular web site used by students to socialize online.
ref: Mangsa mensyaki penyerangnya juga adalah seorang pelajar di Georgetown, dan melakukan pemeriksaan maklumat menyeluruh di Facebook, sebuah laman web popular yang digunakan oleh pelajar untuk bersosial di dalam talian.

src: Cooney could not be reached for comment, and will be arraigned in D.C.
ref: Cooney tidak dapat dihubungi untuk mendapatkan komen, dan akan dihadapkan di D.C.

src: A friend of the alleged assailant was shocked at the allegations and said he is "one of the nicest and most gentle people that we know at this school."
ref: Seorang rakan penyerang yang didakwa itu terkejut dengan dakwaan itu dan berkata dia adalah "salah seorang yang paling baik dan paling bersikap lembut yang kami kenal di sekolah ini."

src: The attack is considered unrelated to two other hate crimes which occurred this month in the Northwest quadrant of the city.
ref: Serangan itu dianggap tidak mempunyai kaitan dengan dua jenayah kebencian yang lain yang berlaku pada bulan ini di kuadran Barat Laut bandar.

src: The UN has certified that the Delhi Metro has aided in the reduction of greenhouse gases, earning 'carbon credits'.
ref: UN telah memperakui bahawa Delhi Metro telah membantu dalam pengurangan gas rumah hijau, menghasilkan 'kredit karbon'.

src: This makes the Delhi Metro the first of its kind in the world to do so.
ref: Ini menjadikan Delhi Metro yang pertama seumpamanya di dunia untuk berbuat demikian.

src: This comes under the Clean Development Mechanism (CDM) of the UN under the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: Ini adalah di bawah Mekanisme Pembangunan Bersih (CDM) oleh UN di bawah Protokol Kyoto.

src: The UN said the rail based system has helped to save 630,000 tonnes of pollution a year.
ref: UN berkata yang sistem berasaskan kereta api itu telah membantu mengurangkan 630,000 tonnes pencemaran dalam setahun.

src: The credits to the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) are worth $9.5 million for each of the next seven years.
ref: Kredit kepada Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) bernilai $9.5 juta untuk setiap satu daripada tujuh tahun akan datang.

src: More credits would be given for more passengers on the system.
ref: Lebih kredit akan diberikan untuk lebih penumpang dalam sistem tersebut.

src: The credits are designed as a financial incentive for developing countries to reduce greenhouse emissions.
ref: Kredit tersebut telah direka sebagai insentif kewangan bagi negara-negara membangun untuk mengurangkan penghasilan rumah hijau.

src: According to the DMRC, it has reduced road traffic by more than 91,000 vehicles per day.
ref: Menurut DMRC, ia telah mengurangkan penggunaan jalan raya sebanyak lebih daripada 91,000 buah kenderaan setiap hari.

src: Erosion in Nigeria has lead to increasing concern on climate policy for the entire country.
ref: Hakisan di Nigeria telah membawa kepada peningkatan kebimbangan mengenai dasar iklim untuk seluruh negara tersebut.

src: Areas in Nigeria have been subject to damages caused by increasing erosion for over 50 years.
ref: Kawasan-kawasan di Nigeria telah menerima kerosakan yang disebabkan oleh peningkatan hakisan selama lebih 50 tahun.

src: This issue has grown over the past years, and responsibility has been pointed at a lack of national policy.
ref: Isu ini telah berkembang sejak beberapa tahun yang lalu, dan tanggungjawab telah ditujukan kepada kekurangan dasar negara.

src: However, locals recognize that they too contribute to the problem.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, penduduk tempatan menyedari bahawa mereka juga menyumbang kepada masalah ini.

src: "Some of the problem of erosion is created by our people, by our attitude to waste disposal."
ref: "Sebahagian daripada masalah hakisan dicipta oleh orang-orang kita, dengan sikap kita terhadap sisa buangan."

src: "When we dump garbage in the drains that are built by the government we simply aggravate the problem of erosion," said state environmental commissioner Michael Egbebike.
ref: "Apabila kita membuang sampah di dalam longkang yang dibina oleh kerajaan kita hanya memburukkan lagi masalah hakisan," kata Pesuruhjaya alam sekitar negeri Michael Egbebike.

src: "And this waste combined with the force of the flood and trying to erode the soil and sometimes they actually block the channel that has been created for flood dispersion and the floods come back and actually destroy their homes, and at that point they call on government," he added.
ref: "Dan sisa ini bercampur dengan rempuhan banjir dan cuba untuk menghakis tanah dan kadang-kadang ia menyekat saluran yang telah dicipta untuk penyerakan air banjir dan banjir kembali kemudian memusnahkan rumah-rumah mereka, dan hanya ketika itu mereka memanggil kerajaan," katanya.

src: Geological studies of the area affected most by erosion, Anambra, have concluded that the cost of implementing a project which could effectively slow erosion are estimated at US$2 billion.
ref: Kajian geologi kawasan yang paling terjejas dengan hakisan, Anambra, telah membuat kesimpulan bahawa kos pelaksanaan projek yangdengan efektif dalam memperlahankan hakisan dianggarkan sebanyak US$ 2 bilion.

src: Officials are looking for answers and help in funding a project at the Copenhagen environmental conference in December.
ref: Para pegawai sedang mencari jawapan dan membantu dalam membiayai projek di persidangan alam sekitar Copenhagen pada bulan Disember.

src: "The state is struggling because the monies spent on this erosion problem are huge sums of money."
ref: "Negeri ini sedang mengalami kesusahan kerana wang yang dibelanjakan untuk masalah hakisan ini adalah jumlah wang yang besar."

src: "So we will of course need a lot of help from the international community and the federal government."
ref: "Oleh itu, kami sudah tentu memerlukan banyak bantuan daripada masyarakat antarabangsa dan kerajaan persekutuan."

src: "Alone it would be a Herculean task for Anambra state," commented Egbebike.
ref: "Secara sendirian ini akan menjadi satu tugas yang amat berat bagi negeri Anambra," komen Egbebike.

src: Benjamin Mullany, the British man who was shot along with his wife while on holiday in Antigua has died.
ref: Benjamin Mullany, lelaki British yang ditembak bersama-sama dengan isterinya semasa bercuti di Antigua telah meninggal dunia.

src: He and his wife, Catherine had been on the last day of their honeymoon when both were shot during what seems to be a botched robbery on July 29.
ref: Dia dan isterinya, Catherine berada di hari terakhir bulan madu mereka apabila kedua-dua mereka ditembak semasa apa yang dilihat seperti kegagalan rompakan pada 29 Julai.

src: Doctors were unaware if he knew that his wife did not survive the attack.
ref: Doktor tidak tahu jika dia telah mengetahui yang isterinya tidak terselamat dari serangan itu.

src: Ben was flown back to Britain on August 2 after a 22 hour operation to try and save his life.
ref: Ben telah diterbangkan semula ke Britain pada 2 Ogos selepas menjalani pembedahan 22 jam untuk percubaan menyelamatkan nyawanya.

src: He died at Morriston Hospital, in Swansea, Wales where he remained unresponsive.
ref: Beliau meninggal dunia di Hospital Morriston, di Swansea, Wales di mana beliau kekal tidak responsif.

src: The couple married on July 12 and later flew out to the holiday island.
ref: Pasangan itu berkahwin pada 12 Julai dan kemudiannya terbang ke pulau percutian itu.

src: With the death of both Catherine and Ben the murder figures for Antigua have been placed into double figures.
ref: Dengan kematian kedua-dua Catherine dan Ben angka pembunuhan untuk Antigua telah diletakkan kepada dua digit.

src: Prime minister Baldwin Spencer has asked for Britain's help during the investigation.
ref: Perdana Menteri Baldwin Spencer telah meminta bantuan Britain semasa penyiasatan.

src: Germany's minister of defence, Franz-Josef Jung (CDU), has proposed to shoot down planes hijacked by terrorists.
ref: Menteri Pertahanan Jerman, Franz-Josef Jung (CDU), telah mencadangkan untuk menembak jatuh pesawat yang dirampas oleh pengganas.

src: Although the Federal Constitutional Court of Germany decided in February 2006 that shooting down a hijacked plane would only be lawful if there were no innocent passengers on the plane, Jung announced in public that he would give the order to attack if the basic principles of the constitution were in danger or if the plane posed a tremendous threat to the people.
ref: Walaupun Mahkamah Perlembagaan Persekutuan Jerman memutuskan pada Februari 2006 bahawa menembak jatuh kapal terbang yang dirampas hanya akan dibolehkan jika tiada penumpang-penumpang yang tidak bersalah di dalam pesawat, Jung mengumumkan di khalayak awam bahawa beliau akan memberi perintah untuk menyerang jika prinsip-prinsip asas perlembagaan berada dalam bahaya atau jika pesawat itu merupakan satu ancaman besar kepada rakyat.

src: Representatives of the grand coalition differed in their views regarding this question.
ref: Wakil-wakil dari kerajaan campuran itu berbeza dalam pandangan mereka mengenai persoalan ini.

src: A member of the Social Democrat Party disagreed with Jung and advised him against contradicting the court's judgment.
ref: Seorang ahli Parti Demokrat Sosial tidak bersetuju dengan Jung dan menasihati beliau mengenai bercanggah terhadap penghakiman mahkamah.

src: The opposition in parliament even called Jung an "enemy of the constitution" and called for him to resign.
ref: Sehinggakan pembangkang di Parlimen memanggil Jung "musuh perlembagaan" dan menggesa beliau meletakkan jawatan.

src: Jung was supported by members of his own party which underlined the necessity of shooting down a hijacked plane in order to save thousands of lives.
ref: Jung disokong oleh ahli-ahli partinya sendiri yang menggariskan keperluan untuk menembak jatuh kapal terbang dirampas untuk menyelamatkan beribu-ribu nyawa.

src: The dispute between the two coalition partners concerning new laws to ensure the security of Germany remains unresolved.
ref: Pertikaian di antara kedua-dua ahli kerajaan campuran mengenai undang-undang baru untuk memastikan keselamatan Jerman masih tidak dapat diselesaikan.

src: The pilots of the German airforce have made it clear that they won't bring down a hijacked plane due to fundamental legal and moral doubts.
ref: Para juruterbang daripada tentera udara Jerman telah menyatakan dengan jelas bahawa mereka tidak akan menjatuhkan kapal terbang yang dirampas kerana asas undang-undang dan keraguan moral.

src: In the United States and other European countries such as France, Great Britain or the Czech Republic laws were passed which give the government permission to shoot down a passenger plane under the control of terrorists.
ref: Undang-undang di Amerika Syarikat dan negara-negara Eropah yang lain seperti Perancis, Great Britain atau Republik Czech telah meluluskan yang mana memberi kebenaran kerajaan untuk menembak jatuh pesawat penumpang di bawah kawalan pengganas.

src: Belgian authorities have confirmed that at least eighteen people died in a head-on collision between two passenger trains in the suburbs of Brussels.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Belgian telah mengesahkan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya lapan belas orang mati dalam perlanggaran antara dua kereta api penumpang di pinggir bandar Brussels.

src: Other reports suggest that the death toll could be as high as 25.
ref: Laporan lain menyatakah bahawa kematian mungkin setinggi 25 orang.

src: More than 125 passengers are reported injured, 11 of them "very seriously".
ref: Lebih 125 penumpang dilaporkan cedera, 11 daripadanya "sangat serius."

src: Rescuers were still trying to free bodies from the wreckage of the trains more than eight hours after the crash, which occurred in snowy conditions at 08:28 local time (0728 UTC) near the station of Buizingen in the municipality of Halle, about 15 kilometres southwest of the Belgian capital.
ref: Pasukan penyelamat masih cuba untuk mengeluarkan mayat dari bangkai kereta api lebih dari lapan jam selepas nahas, yang berlaku semasa keadaan bersalji pada jam 08:28 waktu tempatan (UTC 0728) berdekatan stesen Buizigen di ibu negeri Halle, lebih kurang 15 kilometer barat daya dari bandar Belgian.

src: The collision saw the first two carriages of one train being forced upwards into the air over the first carriage of the second train.
ref: Perlanggaran melihatkan dua gerabak pertama oleh salah satu kereta api yang ditolak keatas keudara oleh gerabak pertama kereta api satu lagi.

src: Eyewitnesses described the collision as "brutal", with passengers being thrown "violently" around the carriages.
ref: Saksi menggambarkan perlanggaran itu sebagai "brutal," dengan penumpang dilemparkan ke sekeliling dengan "ganas."

src: Television footage showed the two smashed locomotives forced up in the air, with passenger cars strewn over a wide area and dazed survivors wandering at the crash site.
ref: Rakaman televisyen menunjukkan dua perlanggaran lokomotif yang ditolak ke udara, dengan penumpang gerabak tercampak di kawasan yang luas dan mangsa yang selamat berkeliaran di kawasan nahas.

src: Train speed at the time of the crash was not immediately known.
ref: Kelajuan kereta api pada masa pelanggaran masih belum diketahui.

src: There are reports that one of the trains ran a stop signal.
ref: Terdapat laporan bahawa salah satu kereta api bergerak di isyarat berhenti.

src: Initial reports suggest that the Leuven–Braine-le-Comte train was on the wrong line.
ref: Laporan awal mencadangkan bahawa kereta api Leuven-Braine-le-Comte berada di landasan yang salah.

src: It is not known if the train went through a red signal or if there was a problem with the signalling.
ref: Masih belum diketahui sama ada kereta api melanggar lampu merah atau terdapat masalah dengan isyarat lampu.

src: A "well informed source" quoted by French-language daily Le Soir suggested that there might have been an electrical failure in the signalling system.
ref: Satu "sumber yang tepat" yang disebut akhbar harian bahasa Perancis, Le Soir mencadangkan bahawa mungkin terdapat kegagalan elektrik dalam sistem isyarat.

src: The collision occurred on one of the main access lines to Brussels-South station, about 14 kilometres (9 miles) from the Belgian capital.
ref: Perlanggaran itu berlaku di salah satu laluan utama stesen Selatan-Brussels, lebih kurang 14 kilometer (9 batu) dari bandar Belgian.

src: It caused "major damage" to overhead power cables, especially on the Brussels–Mons and Brussels–Tournai lines, and high speed rail services between Brussels and France and the UK have been suspended.
ref: Ianya menyebabkan "kemusnahan besar" kepada kabel kuasa, terutamanya pada laluan Brussels-Mons dan Brussels-Tournai, dan laluan kereta api laju antara Brussels dan Perancis dan UK mungkin akan ditangguhkan.

src: Thalys services were temporarily halted due to the accident, with four of its trains in the region being diverted to alternative stations.
ref: Servis Thalys akan dihentikan sementara kerana kemalangan ini, dengan empat kereta api mereka kawasan itu akan di hantar ke stesen sementara.

src: Thalys services between Brussels and Cologne have now resumed, but services to Amsterdam and Paris are still suspended.
ref: Servis Thalys antara Brussels dan Colonge telah beroperasi semula, tetapi servis ke Amsterdam dan Paris masih lagi ditangguhkan.

src: One passenger on board, Christian Wampach, described conditions on board the train, "It was a nightmare."
ref: Seorang penumpang diatas kereta api, Christian Wampach, menggambarkan keadaan dalam kereta api itu "macam mimpi buruk."

src: "There were a number of people injured in my car but I think all the dead were in the first car."
ref: "Terdapat beberapa orang di dalam gerabak saya cedera tetapi saya rasa semua orang mati di gerabak pertama."

src: Another passenger, Patricia Lallemand, said, "When we came out we saw dead bodies lying next to the tracks, some mutilated."
ref: Seorang lagi penumpang, Patricia Lallemans, berkata, "Semasa kami keluar kami nampak mayat terbaring di sebelah trek, sebahagiannya cacat."

src: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.
ref: Peguam terkenal Greek, Sakis Kechagioglou dan George Nikolakkopoulus telah dipenjarakan di penjara Athen di Korydallus, selepas didapati bersalah kerana suapan dan rasuah.

src: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.
ref: Sebagai jawapan kepada ini, skandal besar dalam undang-undang masyarakat Greek telah dinaikkan melalui hakim yang menyalahi undang-undang bahawa hakim, peguam, peguam cara dan pendakwa raya telah ada semasa tahun lepas.

src: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.
ref: Beberapa minggu lalu, selepas informasi yang disiarkan oleh penulis Makis Triantafylopouslos dalam rancangan televisyen terkenal "Zoungla" dalam Alpha TV, seorang ahli Parlimen dan peguam, Petron Mantouvalous telah dikeluarkan kerana ahli pejabatnya kerana terlibat dalam suapan haram dan rasuah.
