src: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.
ref: Tambahan lagi, hakim utama Evangelos Kalousis dipenjarakan kerana didapati bersalah terhadap rasuah dan tingkah laku merosot.

src: Except from journalists' research about scandals in the legal Community of Greece, accusations from well-known lawyers and attorneys such as the famous Athens' lawyer Alexis Kougias, against colleagues have as a result a greater dialogue and discussion in the country upon this important issue.
ref: Kecuali dari penyelidikan penulis tentang skandal dalam undang-undang masyarakat Greece, terhadap tuduhan dari peguam terkenal dan peguam seperti peguam terkenal Athen Alexis Kougias, terhadap rakan sekerja sebagai keputusan kepada dialog hebat dan perbincangan dalam negara terhadap isu penting ini.

src: The plane reportedly skidded off the wet runway, crossed a busy thoroughfare before careening into a fuel depot and warehouse ultimately bursting into flames.
ref: Pesawat itu dilaporkan tergelincir di landasan yang basah, merentasi jalan sebelum melanggar gudang depot bahan api yang menyebabkan kebakaran.

src: "The plane accelerated when it reached the end of the runway and tried to take off again to avoid the road, but it crashed into the building and exploded," Junior Matos told AFP.
ref: "Kapal terbang itu mempercepat laju semasa mendarat di hujung landasan dan cuba untuk berlepas semula untuk mengelak dari jalan, tetapi berlanggar dengan bangunan dan meletup," kata Junior Matos kepada AFP.

src: Authorities believe that all 180 people onboard the plane have died, and a further 15 people on the ground are feared dead as well.
ref: Pihak berkuasa percaya bahawa 180 orang yang menaiki pesawat itu telah mati, dan 15 orang yang di sekitar juga dikuatiri mati.

src: Low clouds and heavy rain were reported at the time of the crash.
ref: Awan mendung dan hujan lebat dilaporkan pada masa nahas itu.

src: Additionally, the runway has had a history of problems with standing water.
ref: Tambahan pula, landasan itu mempunyai sejarah masalah dengan air betakung.

src: Neither of these factors have been linked to the cause of the crash at this point.
ref: Kedua sebab ini telah dikaitkan sebagai punca kemalangan ini.

src: Rodrigo Pinho, state attorney, said the authorities will thoroughly investigate "to determine the cause and to identify who was responsible".
ref: Rodrigo Phino, peguam negeri, berkata pihak berkuasa akan menyiasat keseluruhan "untuk mengetahui sebab dan mengenalpasti siapa yang bertanggungjawab."

src: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has stated that the cholera outbreak that has struck the African country of Zimbabwe seems to have passed its peak.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia (WHO) telah menyatakan bahawa wabak taun yang telah melanda negara Afrika Zimbabwe seolah-olah telah melalui kemuncaknya.

src: The WHO said that "while data collection and verification remain a challenge throughout the country with the effect that weekly statistics are not always accurate or complete, the overall trend over the last 2 months is of a decreasing number of cases and deaths."
ref: WHO berkata bahawa "sementara pengumpulan data dan pengesahan terus menjadi cabaran di seluruh negara dengan kesan bahawa statistik mingguan tidak selalunya tepat atau lengkap, perkembangan keseluruhan sejak 2 bulan lepas adalah pengurangan beberapa kes dan kematian."

src: "The overall trend over the last two months is of a decreasing number of cases and deaths," the WHO said.
ref: "Perkembangan keseluruhan dalam tempoh dua bulan lepas adalah beberapa pengurangan kes dan kematian," kata WHO.

src: The number of new cholera cases in the week ending March 14 was 2,076, almost half of the 3,812 infections reported the week before, and 8,000 per week in the beginning of February.
ref: Jumlah kes taun baru dalam minggu berakhir 14 Mac adalah 2076, hampir separuh daripada 3,812 jangkitan yang dilaporkan pada minggu sebelumnya, dan 8,000 seminggu di awal Februari.

src: The WHO stated that the fatality rate per week dropped from a peak of 6% in January to 2.3% this month.
ref: WHO menyatakan bahawa kadar kematian setiap minggu menurun daripada paras tertinggi 6% pada bulan Januari kepada 2.3% pada bulan ini.

src: 91,164 total cases were reported as of March 17 since the epidemic started in August of last year, with a total of 4,307 deaths.
ref: Sebanyak kes berjumlah 91,164 dilaporkan pada 17 Mac sejak wabak itu bermula pada bulan Ogos tahun lepas, dengan sejumlah 4,307 kematian.

src: The cholera epidemic is the deadliest in Africa for a decade and a half.
ref: Wabak taun adalah yang paling dahsyat di Afrika selama sedekad setengah.

src: US Attorney General Alberto Gonzales, after several months of controversy, today announced his resignation after 13 years of public service.
ref: Peguam Negara AS Alberto Gonzales, selepas kontroversi beberapa bulan, mengumumkan peletakan jawatannya hari ini selepas 13 tahun dalam perkhidmatan awam.

src: While he did not elaborate on the circumstances of his departure, he referred to his tenure as a "remarkable journey" and said he had "lived the American dream."
ref: Walaupun dia tidak mengulas secara lanjut mengenai keadaan pemergiannya, dia merujuk kepada tempoh perkhidmatannya sebagai "perjalanan yang luar biasa" dan berkata dia telah "hidup dalam impian Amerika."

src: Critics of the embattled Attorney General have called for his ousting for several months, largely over his conflicts with the US Congress over the Bush Administration's warrant-less wiretapping program, and his firing of nine US attorneys.
ref: Pengkritik Peguam Negara yang dilandai masalah telah meminta penyingkirannya selama beberapa bulan, sebahagian besarnya mengenai konflik dengan Kongres AS ke atas rancangan pengintipan dengar melalui talian telefon tanpa waran di bawah Pentadbiran Bush, dan dia memecat sembilan peguam AS.

src: Observers have expressed surprise at the sudden announcement, as Gonzales had said as recently as the weekend of the 18th of August that he had planned to stay through the end of President Bush's second term.
ref: Pemerhati telah melahirkan rasa terkejut dengan pengumuman mendadak itu, kerana Gonzales pernah berkata baru-baru ini pada hujung minggu 18hb Ogos bahawa dia telah merancang untuk bertahan sehingga akhir penggal kedua Presiden Bush.

src: Critics of the Attorney General, most notably Harry Reid, majority leader for the US Senate, have welcomed the announcement, as Gonzales had been one of the most controversial members of the Bush Administration.
ref: Pengkritik Peguam Negara, terutamanya Harry Reid, pemimpin majoriti untuk Senat AS, telah menyambut baik pengumuman itu, kerana Gonzales adalah salah satu daripada ahli-ahli yang paling berkontroversi di bawah Pentadbiran Bush.

src: President Bush spoke on his "close friend's" resignation saying that he has reluctantly accepted the resignation, but noted that Gonzales' name had been "dragged through the mud for political reasons."
ref: Presiden Bush bercakap mengenai peletakan jawatan "kawan rapat" beliau dengan mengatakan bahawa beliau telah menerima peletakan jawatan itu dengan berat hati, tetapi menyatakan bahawa nama Gonzales telah "berlumuran lumpur atas sebab-sebab politik."

src: Throughout the recent controversy Bush has stood next to Gonzales.
ref: Sepanjang kontroversi baru-baru ini Bush bersatu hati dengan Gonzales selama ini.

src: Paul Clement, the current Solicitor General, will serve as the acting Attorney General until a replacement has been confirmed by the Senate.
ref: Paul Clement, Peguam Cara Negara semasa, akan berkhidmat sebagai Peguam Negara yang menanggung sehingga seorang pengganti disahkan oleh Senat.

src: The Peel P50, a single door, three wheel microcar went on display at New York's Ripley's Believe It or Not! Museum on Monday.
ref: P50 Peel, pintu tunggal, kereta mikro beroda tiga dipamerkan di Muzium Ripley Believe It or Not! New York pada hari Isnin.

src: The Peel Engineering Company manufactured 50 to 100 of the one-seater vehicles which weighed 130 lb (59 kg), and are 52.8 in (134 cm) in length, 47 in (120 cm) in height and 39 in (99 cm) in width.
ref: Syarikat Kejuruteraan Peel menghasilkan 50 hingga 100 kenderaan satu tempat duduk yang beratnya 130 paun (59 kg), dan 52.8 in (134 cm) panjang, 47 dalam (120 cm) tinggi dan 39 in (99 cm) lebar.

src: The little car can travel as fast as 38 mph (61 kph), and comes equipped with a handle on the car so the driver can pull the car to back up.
ref: Kereta kecil itu boleh berjalan secepat 38 mph (61 kpj), dan dilengkapi dengan pemegang pada kereta supaya pemandu boleh menarik kereta untuk bantuan simpanan.

src: Only twenty of the vehicles have survived since 1963, and the original price of £199 has soared to approximately £40,000 (US$ 65,000) today.
ref: Hanya dua puluh kenderaan itu yang masih kekal berfungsi sejak tahun 1963, dan harga asal £199 telah meningkat ke kira-kira £40,000 ( AS$65,000) hari ini.

src: Prince Laurent of Belgium, the youngest son of King Albert II of Belgium, has been questioned last night by the federal police and is attending today's court session in Hasselt in a marine fraud case that has gripped Belgian media since last December.
ref: Putera Laurent Belgium, anak bongsu Raja Albert II dari Belgium, telah dipersoalkan malam tadi oleh polis persekutuan dan menghadiri sesi mahkamah hari ini di Hasselt dalam kes penipuan marin yang telah menarik perhatian media Belgium sejak Disember lalu.

src: He arrived in a Smart car and was accompanied by his lawyer and former politician Fred Erdman.
ref: Baginda tiba di dalam kereta Smart dan diiringi oleh peguamnya dan bekas ahli politik Fred Erdman.

src: The case turns around funds of the Belgian Navy that have been used to beautify the Prince's villa in Tervuren.
ref: Kes itu berpusing diantara dana Tentera Laut Belgium yang pernah digunakan untuk mencantikkan vila Raja di dalam Tervuren.

src: In total, € 2.2 million was supposedly diverted from the marine's purchasing services using false invoices.
ref: Secara keseluruhan, €2.2 juta sepatutnya dialihkan daripada perkhidmatan pembelian marin dengan menggunakan invois palsu.

src: Roughly € 185 000 was allegedly used to paint the Prince's villa, install lights in the garden, for the purchase of carpet and furniture, and for his secretariat and for animal clinics the Prince supports via his Foundation.
ref: Kira-kira €185,000 telah didakwa digunakan untuk cat Villa Putera, memasang lampu di taman, untuk membeli permaidani dan perabot, dan sekretariatnya dan untuk klinik haiwan yang Putera sokong melalui Yayasan baginda.

src: Twelve marine officers and contractors are being accused of document fraud, collusion, bribery, embezzlement of government money etc. and could face 10 years in prison.
ref: Dua belas pegawai marin dan kontraktor sedang dituduh atas penipuan dokumen, pakatan sulit, rasuah, penyelewengan wang kerajaan dan lain-lain dan boleh dijatuhkan hukuman 10 tahun di penjara.

src: The money was part of the budget that wasn't spent at the end of the year, and which would flow back to the government if the army didn't spend it.
ref: Wang itu adalah sebahagian daripada bajet yang tidak dibelanjakan pada akhir tahun itu, dan yang akan mengalir semula kepada kerajaan, sekiranya rakyat tidak membelanjakannya.

src: The Prince, who is also an officer in the navy, is being treated only as a witness in this case, there have been no charges against him.
ref: Putera itu, yang juga seorang pegawai dalam tentera laut, sedang dilayani sebagai saksi dalam kes ini, tidak ada sebarang tuduhan terhadapnya.

src: The Attorney General in Hasselt Marc Rubens has said that there are no elements in the investigation that point to the fact that Laurent was aware of the affair, however several accused have contested this in the press.
ref: Peguam Negara di Hasselt Marc Rubens telah berkata bahawa tiada unsur-unsur dalam penyiasatan yang menunjukkan fakta bahawa Laurent sedar tentang tuduhan itu, bagaimanapun beberapa tertuduh telah menentang perkara ini dalam akhbar.

src: Technically, the villa is not the property of the Prince himself, but of the Royal Gift, which manages the real property of the Royal Family.
ref: Secara teknikal, vila itu bukan harta Putera dirinya sendiri, tetapi sebagai Hadiah Diraja, yang menguruskan hartanah Keluarga Diraja.

src: During his interview by the police last night, Prince Laurent stated that he needed funds to renovate his villa, and that Noël Vaessen, his adviser, told him the Navy could help him.
ref: Dalam temu bual baginda oleh pihak polis malam tadi, Putera Laurent menyatakan bahawa baginda memerlukan dana untuk mengubah suai villa, dan bahawa Noël Vaessen, penasihat baginda, memberitahu baginda Tentera Laut boleh membantu dia.

src: The Prince stated that he thought it was legal, and that he had no reason to doubt his adviser.
ref: Putera itu menyatakan bahawa baginda fikir ia adalah sah di sisi undang-undang, dan bahawa dia tidak mempunyai sebab untuk meragui penasihat baginda.

src: Vaessen has declared in the media during the last month that the Prince actively participated in the fraud, and that he fears a cover-up.
ref: Vaessen telah mengisytiharkan di media pada bulan lalu bahawa Putera secara aktif mengambil bahagian dalam penipuan, dan bahawa dia takut akan penipuan.

src: He said that the Prince was a demanding party in the operation, and that "he knew that we were arranging things to make his life and his work as comfortable as possible."
ref: Katanya, Putera adalah satu pihak yang mendesak dalam operasi itu, dan bahawa "dia tahu bahawa kita sedang mengatur perkara untuk menjadikan hidupnya dan kerja-kerjanya di tahap seberapa selesa yang mungkin."

src: According to Vaessen, the Prince was in need of money to support a royal lifestyle, and "didn't even have enough money to buy food."
ref: Menurut Vaessen, Putera memerlukan wang untuk menyokong gaya hidup dirajanya, dan "tidak mempunyai wang yang cukup untuk membeli makanan."

src: In 2001, Vaessen was discharged with honour from the army "for medical reasons", but Defence Minister André Flahaut is investigating if there was no agreement to give him his pension in exchange for the fact that he wouldn't incriminate the Prince.
ref: Pada tahun 2001, Vaessen dibenarkan keluar dengan penghormatan daripada tentera "atas sebab-sebab perubatan," tetapi Menteri Pertahanan André Flahaut sedang menyiasat sama ada tiada perjanjian untuk memberi pencen kepada baginda sebagai pertukaran atas fakta bahawa dia tidak akan menunjukkan bahawa Putera itu bersalah.

src: Vaessen also accused the Prince of other things, such as racing against the high-speed train TGV on a French highway.
ref: Vaessen juga menuduh Putera atas perkara lain, seperti mengejar kereta api TGV berkelajuan tinggi di lebuh raya Perancis.

src: Captain Johan Claeys, one of the accused, studied with the Prince and worked at the facturation services of the Navy in 1998 and 1999.
ref: Kapten Johan Claeys, salah seorang tertuduh, belajar dengan Putera dan bekerja di perkhidmatan peninvoisan Tentera Laut pada tahun 1998 dan 1999.

src: One of the accused contractors, Marc Luypaerts, has told the press that the judge responsible for the investigation in Hasselt had forbidden him to speak about Prince Laurent.
ref: Salah satu kontraktor tertuduh, Marc Luypaerts, telah memberitahu media bahawa hakim yang bertanggungjawab atas penyiasatan di Hasselt telah melarangnya daripada bercakap tentang Putera Laurent.

src: Laurent's status as a Prince has several judicial consequences for the trial.
ref: Status Laurent sebagai Putera mempunyai beberapa kesan kehakiman atas perbicaraan itu.

src: In Belgium, it's against the law to incriminate the Royal Family during a trial.
ref: Di Belgium, adalah menyalahi undang-undang menunjukkan keluarga diraja bersalah semasa perbicaraan.

src: Also, the Prince is protected from judicial pursuit because he is also a Senator by law.
ref: Selain itu, Putera dilindungi daripada usaha kehakiman kerana baginda juga merupakan Senator oleh undang-undang.

src: Justice Minister Laurette Onkelinx has issued a Royal Decrete, which the King has signed while on holiday in Napels, which would make it possible for Princes to testify in a trial.
ref: Menteri Kehakiman Laurette Onkelinx telah mengeluarkan Dekri Diraja, yang Raja telah menandatangani semasa bercuti di Napels, yang akan membolehkan Putera untuk memberi keterangan dalam perbicaraan.

src: However, Public Prosecutor Erwin Steyls has chosen to have Laurent interrogated by the police last night in Hasselt.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Pendakwa Raya Erwin Steyls memilih supaya Laurent disoal siasat oleh pihak polis malam tadi di Hasselt.

src: This was the first time during the last six years of the inquiry that the Prince was questioned.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama dalam siasatan itu dalam tempoh enam tahun lalu bahawa Putera telah dipersoalkan.

src: Today in the court, the Prosecutor defended the act of having him questioned outside the trial, saying that there were several procedural issues.
ref: Hari ini di mahkamah, Pendakwaraya mempertahankan tindakan untuk mempersoalkan baginda di luar perbicaraan itu dengan berkata terdapat beberapa isu prosedur.

src: First, the subpoena for the Prince wasn't issued in time to be legal.
ref: Pertama, sepina untuk Prince tidak dikeluarkan dalam masa sebelum terlewat untuk sah di sisi undang-undang.

src: Second, the details of the protocol to hear the Prince in court were not explained in the recent Royal Decrete, making it worthless -something Minister Onkelickx denied.
ref: Keduanya, butiran protokol untuk Putera hadir di mahkamah tidak dijelaskan dalam Dekri Diraja baru-baru ini, menjadikannya tidak bernilai -sesuatu yang Menteri Onkelickx menafikan.

src: Thirdly, nobody can be forced to testify against himself, and if the Prince were to make false statements under oath, he could only be sued for perjury.
ref: Ketiga, tiada siapa yang boleh dipaksa untuk memberi keterangan terhadap dirinya sendiri, dan jika Putera hendak membuat kenyataan palsu di bawah sumpah, dia hanya boleh disaman kerana sumpah palsu.

src: However, the court has decided to let him testify anyway this afternoon.
ref: Bagaimanapun, mahkamah telah memutuskan untuk membiarkan dia memberi keterangan petang ini walau bagaimanapun.

src: During the last month, the case has caused a several spin-off discussions in Belgium.
ref: Pada bulan lepas, kes itu telah menyebabkan beberapa perbincangan sampingan di Belgium.

src: One of the surprises during this period was the King's Christmas Message, in which he referred to the case.
ref: Salah satu kejutan dalam tempoh ini adalah mesej Krismas Raja, di mana baginda merujuk kepada kes itu.

src: The regional governments are now investigating and discussing their donations to the IRGT/KINT, an environmental organisation supported by Prince Laurent.
ref: Kerajaan-kerajaan serantau kini sedang menyiasat dan membincangkan sumbangan mereka kepada IRGT / Kint, sebuah organisasi alam sekitar yang disokong oleh Putera Laurent.

src: But there is also an ongoing debate over the position of the Monarchy in Belgium.
ref: Tetapi ada juga perbahasan yang berterusan ke atas kedudukan Monarki di Belgium.

src: Some politicians are suggesting to limit the role of the Monarchy, and other think that only the King and Queen, the Crown Prince or Princess and the widow(er) of the King or Queen should receive state funding.
ref: Beberapa ahli politik mencadangkan untuk mengehadkan peranan Raja-Raja, dan pihak lain berpendapat bahawa hanya Raja dan Ratu, Putera Mahkota atau Puteri dan janda(duda) Raja atau Ratu harus menerima dana negeri.

src: Controversy was sparked by his choice of conservative Italian Rocco Buttiglione for the Justice Commissioner position, who made several statements regarding homosexuality and women that members of the European Parliament objected to.
ref: Kontroversi tercetus oleh pilihannya iaitu orang Itali yang berpandangan konservatif Rocco Buttiglione untuk jawatan Jaksa Pesuruhjaya, yang membuat beberapa kenyataan mengenai homoseksual dan wanita yang dibantah oleh ahli-ahli Parlimen Eropah.

src: The European Parliament voted in favour the Commissioners on November 18th, giving Barroso and his staff the green light to start their official five-year term starting on Monday.
ref: Parlimen Eropah mengundi menyokong Pesuruhjaya itu pada 18 November, memberi kelulusan kepada Barroso dan kakitangannya untuk memulakan tempoh rasmi lima tahun mereka bermula pada hari Isnin.

src: While the Greens, Eurosceptics and the Communist Party voted against, the Commission secured the approval of the Parliament's biggest parties - the Socialists, the Liberals and the European People's Party.
ref: Walaupun Greens, Eurosceptics dan Parti Komunis mengundi menentang, Suruhanjaya mendapat kelulusan pihak terbesar di Parlimen - Sosialis, Liberal dan Parti Rakyat Eropah.

src: The vote ended with 449 in favour, 149 against and 82 abstentions, CNN reports.
ref: Undi berakhir dengan 449 memihak, 149 menentang dan 82 berkecuali, CNN melaporkan.

src: That was said by some, especially from nationalistic and populist parties, such as Peace and Justice, and Self-Defense and League of Polish Families, candidates in the last elections (both parliamentary and presidential), who had been promising people a strengthening of the position of Polish president.
ref: Ia telah diberitahu oleh sesetengah pihak, terutamanya dari parti-parti nasionalistik dan populis, seperti Keamanan dan Keadilan, dan Pertahanan-Diri dan Kesatuan Keluarga Poland, calon-calon dalam pilihanraya yang lalu (parlimen dan presiden), yang mana telah menjajikan untuk menguatkan jawatan presiden Poland.

src: He was unable to stand for re-election again as the Constitution of Poland states that the Polish president can only be re-elected once.
ref: Beliau tidak dapat bertanding untuk pemilihan semula kerana menurut Perlembagaan negeri Poland bahawa presiden Poland hanya boleh dipilih semula sekali.

src: The head of the Israel Defense Forces, Lt. Gen. Dan Halutz, resigned on Tuesday January 16, 2007 after an internal review criticized his military's leadership during the war in Lebanon last summer.
ref: Ketua Anggota Pertahanan Israel, lt. Gen. Dan Halutz, meletak jawatan pada Selasa 16 Januari, 2007 selepas pengulas dalaman mengkritik kepimpinan ketenteraannya semasa perang di Lebanon pada musim panas yang lalu.

src: Halutz sent his resignation letter to Prime Minister Ehud Olmert, which according to Israeli Army Radio said, "For me, the concept of responsibility is everything."
ref: Halutz menghantar surat perletakan jawatannya kepada Perdana Menteri Ehud Olmert, yang mana menurut Radio Tentera Israel berkata, "Bagi saya, konsep tanggungjawab adalah segalanya."

src: Halutz has also been facing criticism after it was disclosed that he sold a portion of his stock portfolio hours after the Lebanon fighting began on July 12, 2006.
ref: Halutz juga telah berhadapan dengan kritikan selepas bahawa dia telah menjual bahagian daripada saham potfolionya telah terbongkar selepas perperangan Lebanon bermula pada 12 July 2006.

src: A recently published nationwide survey of US teenagers indicates boys tend to masturbate more — and start younger — than girls.
ref: Kajian mengenai remaja AS yang diterbitkan di seluruh negara baru-baru ini menunjukkan lelaki cenderung untuk melakukan onani lebih - dan lebih awal - daripada perempuan.

src: It also finds boys who masturbate are more likely to engage in safe sex than boys who don't.
ref: Ia juga mendapati bahawa lelaki yang melakukan onani biasanya akan melibatkan diri dengan sex secara sihat berbanding dengan lelaki yang tidak.

src: Dr. Cynthia L. Robbins, the study's lead author from Indiana University in Indianapolis, spoke of the need for the academic community to focus more on masturbation.
ref: Dr. Cynthia L. Robbins, ketua penulis kajian dari Universiti Indiana di Indianapolis, berkata akan keperluan untuk komuniti pendidik untuk memberi fokus lebih kepada perlakuan onani.

src: "Many adolescent boys and girls masturbate, and among sexually active teens masturbation is associated with other sexual behaviors and condom use."
ref: "Ramai remaja lelaki dan perempuan melakukan onani, dan kebanyakan daripada remaja yang aktif melakukan onani berkait dengan perlakuan seksual yang lain dan penggunaan kondom."

src: "It is important to recognize that masturbation is an important and normal component of adolescent sexual development."
ref: "Ia adalah penting untuk mengenal pasti bahawa perbuatan onani adalah penting dan komponen normal kepada perkembangan seksual remaja."

src: The survey, named the National Survey of Sexual Health and Behavior (NSSHB), was supported by Church & Dwight, which makes Trojan condoms.
ref: Kajian, yang bernama Kajian Kesihatan dan Perlakuan Seksual Nasional (NSSHB), disokong oleh Church & Dwight, pembuat kondom Trojan.

src: A representative nationwide sample of 820 teens 14–17 years old participated in the study with parental permission.
ref: Sampel wakil seluruh negara daripada 820 orang remaja berusia 14 hingga 17 tahun menyertai kajian itu dengan kebenaran dari ibu bapa penjaga.

src: The findings were published Monday in the Archives of Pediatrics and Adolescent Medicine.
ref: Penemuan itu diterbitkan pada Isnin di Arkib Pediatrik dan Perubatan Remaja.

src: Male and female respondents were asked to note how frequently they masturbated in the past three months, the past year, and throughout their lifetime.
ref: Responden lelaki dan perempuan diminta untuk mengambil nota mengenai berapa kali mereka melakukan onani dalam tempoh tiga bulan yang lepas, tahun lepas, dan sepanjang kehidupan mereka.

src: They were also asked to recall whether they masturbated alone or with a partner, and also how often they used condoms.
ref: Mereka juga diminta untuk mengingat kembali samada mereka melakukan onani seorang diri atau bersama pasangan, dan juga berapa kerap mereka menggunakan kondom.

src: Nearly three-fourths of boys reported having masturbated, compared to only less than half of girls.
ref: Hampir tiga daripada empat lelaku melaporkan mereka melakukan onani, berbanding dengan hanya separuh remaja perempuan.

src: About half of boys reported masturbating twice or more per week, also higher than the 23 percent of girls.
ref: Hampir separuh remaja lelaki melaporkan mereka melakukan onani dua kali atau lebih seminggu, juga 23 peratus lebih tinggi daripada remaja perempuan.

src: Masturbation rates for both genders increased along with age, though only boys were more likely to report having "recently" engaged in the activity as they grew older.
ref: Kadar onani bagi kedua-dua jantina meningkat bersama usia, walaupun hanya remaja lelaki biasanya lebih melaporkan "kini" terlibat dalam aktiviti seksual apabila meningkat usia.

src: Among adolescents who engage in oral or vaginal sex, boys who masturbate were eight times more likely to use a condom than boys who don't.
ref: Di kalangan remaja yang terlibat dengan seks oral atau vaginal, remaja lelaki yang melakukan onani adalah lapan kali lebih biasa memakai kondom berbanding dengan mereka yang tidak beronani.

src: The researchers who conducted the study urge more open and educational discussion of this highly stigmatized topic.
ref: Pengkaji yang menjalankan kajian ini digesa untuk membuka lebih dan berbincang dari sudut pembelajaran mengenai topik yang banyak didiskriminasikan ini.

src: "The findings of this study together with existing publications on masturbation should be used by health care providers to inform, educate and reassure adolescents about masturbation to provide competent and comprehensive sexuality education in the clinical setting".
ref: "Penemuan terhadap kajian ini bersama dengan kewujudan penerbitan mengenai perlakuan onani perlu digunakan oleh pembekal penjagaan kesihatan untuk memberitahu, mengajar dan memastikan remaja-remaja mengenai perlakuan onani untuk membekalkan pembelajaran seksual yang cekap dan menyeluruh di persekitaran klinikal."

src: May 27, 2005 Mount Qomolangma, known in the west as Mount Everest, may be taller than ever, and a group of 24 Chinese researchers have scaled the peak and made observations they hope will document its current height.
ref: 27 May, 2005 Gunung Qomolangma, terkenal di barat sebagai Gunung Everest, mungkin lebih tinggi berbanding sebelum ini, dan sekumpulan 24 orang pengkaji China telah mengukur puncak dan membuat pemerhatian mengharapkan mereka dapat membuat dokumen mengenai ketinggian puncak itu sekarang.

src: In 1975 the peak was surveyed at a height of 8 848 metres, in line with previous calculations, but a U.S. survey team in 1999 measured it at 8 850m.
ref: Pada tahun 1975 puncak itu dikaji mempunyai ketinggian 8,848 meter, sama dengan pengiraan-pengiraan sebelum ini, tetapi kumpulan pengkaji A.S. pada tahun 1999 mengukurnya dengan ketinggian 8,850m.

src: The growth to some extent fits current theories regarding the geology of the region, a region with crustal upthrust.
ref: Perkembangan hingga ke suatu peringkat bertepatan dengan teori-teori berkenaan geologi kawasan itu, kawasan daya apungan crustal.

src: The growth may also be due in part to rapid glacier retreat on the peak's slopes, and the mountain springing back as the weight of snow melts and runs off.
ref: Pertumbuhan ini juga mungkin sebahagiannya disebabkan oleh pengunduran glasier pesat di lereng puncak, dan gunung muncul kembali apabila kebanyakan salji cair dan mengalir.

src: At the same time, recent theories suggest the mountain is also shrinking.
ref: Dalam masa yang pertama, teori sekarang mencadangkna gunung itu juga mengecil.

src: The peak may be getting smaller from subsidence as it reaches extreme heights, and again the glaciers and snow help to stabilize and expand the mountain itself.
ref: Puncak mungkin menjadi lebih kecil akibat penenggelaman semasa ia mencapai tahap ketinggian tertinggi, dan sekali lagi glasier dan salji membantu menstabilkan dan mengembangkan gunung itu sendiri.

src: There is some disagreement regarding the methods of measurement used previously, so the researchers spent an hour at the summit taking measurements using radar, satellite, and other methods on 6 points.
ref: Tidak ada penyangkalan berkenaan dengan cara pengukuran yang digunakan sebelum ini, maka para pengkaji meluangkan masa satu jam di puncak mengambil ukuran menggunakan radar, satelit, dan cara lain pada 6 titik.

src: The average of the measurements will be used to make the official Chinese measurement, which remains at 8 848.
ref: Purata kiraan akan digunakan untuk membuat ukuran rasmi China, yang mana kekal pada 8,848.

src: Results of the expedition are expected to be available in August.
ref: Keputusan ekspedisi itu dijangkakan akan dapat diketahui pada Ogos.

src: A previous measurement team from Italy also used the radar methodology in 2004, but their results have not yet been published.
ref: Kumpulan pengukur sebelumnya dari Itali juga menggunakan metodologi radar pada tahun 2004, tetapi keputusan mereka masih lagi belum diterbitkan.

src: The mountain straddles the border between Tibet and Nepal, and is known by several names.
ref: Gunung yang merentang sempadan antara Tibet dan Nepal, dan juga dikenali dengan beberapa nama.

src: In Chinese, 珠穆朗瑪峰 (pinyin: Zhūmùlǎngmǎ Fēng); Tibetan Qomolangma ("Mother of the Universe"); in Nepal Sagarmatha ("Forehead of the Sky"); and in English named after Sir George Everest.
ref: Dalam bahasa Cina, (pinyin: Zhumul a ngma a Feng); Tibetan Qomolangma ("Mother of the Universe"); dalam Nepal Sagarmatha ("Forehead of the Sky"); dan dalam English dinamakan sempena Sir George Everest.

src: In a conscience vote last night, Wednesday, parliament decided that the alcohol purchasing for New Zealanders will not be raised to 20 but instead will stay at the current age of 18.
ref: Dalam undian suara hati malam semalam, pada Rabu, parlimen menetapkan bahawa pembelian alkohol bagi warga baru New Zealand tidak akan dinaikkan kepada 20 tahun tetapi akan kekal pada usia sekarang iaitu 18 tahun.

src: The vote was 72-49 with the noes as the majority, a conscience vote is where the individual Member of Parliament (MP) votes instead of the party and their policies.
ref: Undian adalah sebanyak 72-49 dengan tidak sebagai majoriti, undian suara hati di mana Ahli Parlimen (MP) secara individu mengundi tanpa mengira parti dan polisi mereka.

src: The bill was brought before Parliament with the intent of placing the drinking age back at 20 following its lowering to 18 in 1999.
ref: Undang-undang tersebut telah dibawa ke Parlimen dengan niat untuk meletakkan umur peminum kembali kepada 20 tahun yang kemudian diikuti penurunan kepada 18 tahun pada tahun 1999.

src: It was first drafted by Matt Robson of the NZ Progressive Party, and was then taken on by Martin Gallagher from the New Zealand Labour Party.
ref: Ia pertama kali dicadangkan oleh Matt Robson bagi Parti Progresif NZ, dan kemudiannya diambil oleh Martin Gallagher dari Parti Buruh New Zealand.

src: However, the Labour-led government is being attacked for interfering with the liquor purchase age bill.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kerajaan Buruh yang meneraju telah diserang kerana mencampuri undang-undang umur pembelian minuman keras.

src: Before the debate on the bill, two ministers who are against raising the age, justice minister Mark Burton and associate health minister, Damien O'Conner both announced that they would fully review the sale/supply of liquor to people below the age of 18, regardless of whether the bill were passed or not.
ref: Sebelum perdebatan ke atas undang-undang, dua menteri yang mana menentang kenaikan had umur, menteri keamanan, Mark Burton dan timbalan menteri kesihatan, Damien O'Conner, kedua-duanya mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan mengkaji sepenuhnya penjualan/pembekalan minuman keras kepada mereka yang berusia 18 tahun, tanpa mengambil kira samada undang-undang itu diluluskan atau tidak.

src: The review will most likely look at how many off-licence outlets there are and increased law enforcement of the drink age.
ref: Kajian semula akan berkemungkinan besar melihat kepada berapa banyak outlet tanpa lesen yang ada dan meningkatkan penguatkuasaan undang-undang usia peminum.

src: Mr Burton said that he did not pre-empt the bill voting, he said: "It was important to ensure all options were on the table before the vote."
ref: Mr Burton berkata bahawa beliau tidak cuba menggagalkan pengundian rang undang-undang, kata beliau: "Ia adalah sangat penting untuk memastikan semua pilihan berada di atas meja sebelum undi."

src: "What we are saying is you can have confidence that if the bill doesn't proceed there will be an alternative vehicle for addressing the issues immediately thereafter."
ref: "Apa yang kami beritahu ialah anda boleh yakin bahawa jika undang-undang tersebut tidak diteruskan masih akan ada kenderaan alternatif untuk menjelaskan isu-isu ini dengan segera selepas ini."

src: Many MPs said that it was unorthodox to intrude in such a manner in the voting process.
ref: Ramai MP berkata bahawa ia adalah di luar kelaziman untuk masuk campur dengan cara yang sebegitu dalam proses pengundian.

src: Leader of Jim Anderton's Progressive coalition and supporter of the bill, Jim Anderton, said: "Making a last-minute plea to MPs is not to be fooled by the promise of the unnecessary review."
ref: Ketua kepada gabungan Progresif Jim Anderton dan penyokong kepada undang-undang tersebut, Jim Anderton, berkata: "Membuat pengakuan di saat akhir kepada MP bukanlah untuk diperbodohkan oleh janji kepada ulasan yang tidak diperlukan."

src: "This is the review you have when you want to give parliamentarians a soft option."
ref: "Ini merupakan ulasan yang kamu peroleh apabila anda mahu memberi ahli-ahli parlimen pilihan yang lembut."

src: "And I hear that sigh of relief in many places, 'oh gosh you've got a review so we don't have to make a hard decision'."
ref: "Dan saya mendengar keluhan kelegaan di banyak tempat, 'oh tuhan kamu telah menerima ulasan jadi kami tidak perlu untuk membuat keputusan yang sukar'."

src: "Well this is the place for hard decisions and this is where the buck stops."
ref: "Ini adalah tempat untuk suatu keputusan yang sukar dan ini adalah di mana tanggungjawab terhenti."

src: Christopher Bishop, a spokesman for the Keep it 18 campaign, said: "We welcome the Government's moves to review the supply of alcohol to minors in the likely event that the Sale of Liquor Amendment Bill is defeated today."
ref: Christopher Bishop, jurucakap kepada kempen Keep it 18, berkata: "Kami mengalukan kedatangan gerakan Kerajaan untuk membuat kajian pembekalan alkohol kepada minor dalam acara yang mana Pindaan Undang-Undang Jualan Minuman Keras itu dikalahkan hari ini."

src: "Raising the drinking age is never going to work as a way of dealing with New Zealand's drinking culture."
ref: "Menaikkan had usia meminum tidak akan berjaya hingga bila-bila dengan cara pengendalian budaya minum warga New Zealand."

src: "It is a simplistic and knee-jerk solution – a legislative sledgehammer."
ref: "Ini merupakan penyelesaian yang simplistik dan spontan - perundangan sledgehammer."

src: Chester Burrows, National MP, said: "My experience is I've seen too many pissed young people, raped young people, assaulted young people."
ref: Chester Burrows, MP Nasional, berkata: "Pengalaman saya melihat terlalu ramai orang muda yang mabuk, merogol yang muda, menyerang orang muda."

src: Gordon Copeland, United Future MP, who also preferred the split age, said he had "no doubt the move would influence the way people voted."
ref: Gordon Copeland, MP Kesatuan Masa Hadapan, yang juga memilih untuk jarak usia, berkata beliau "tidak mempunyai kesangsian terhadap pergerakan yang akan mempengaruhi cara mereka mengundi."

src: Ron Mark, New Zealand First MP, said: "Are we going to do something, or are we going to do nothing?" asked New Zealand First list MP Ron Mark.
ref: Ron Mark, MP Pertama New Zealand, berkata: "Adakah kita akan melakukan sesuatu, atau kita tidak akan melakukan apa-apa?" kata senarai MP Pertama New Zealand, Ron Mark.

src: "We can at least let this bill go through to the next stage."
ref: "Kita akan sekurang-kurangnya melepaskan undang-undang ini untuk melalui peringkat yang akan datang."

src: Ross Bell, spokesman for the Drug Foundation, said: "Not only is such a review too narrow, it also seemed to pre-empt the outcome of Wednesday's debate."
ref: Ross Bell, jurucakap kepada Yayasan Dadah, berkata: "Bukan hanya kajian itu yang terlalu sempit, ia juga kelihatan seperti keputusan kegagalan awal kepada perdebatan pada hari Rabu."

src: "A cynical person might think the announcement gave MPs an excuse not to support the bill."
ref: "Orang yang sinis mungkin berfikir bahawa pengumuman tersebut memberi MP alasan untuk menyokong undang-undang tersebut."

src: "That review has already been looked at by the Law and Order Select Committee, and what is needed is a review of price and availability of alcohol."
ref: "Kajian itu telah dilihat oleh Komiti Pilihan Undang-Undang dan Turutan, dan apa yang diperlukan ialah kajian semula harga dan keberadaan alkohol."

src: However it has been suggested by the select committee previously researching the drinking problem in New Zealand that there is little hard evidence 18 & 19 year olds are buying alcohol for minors, with the largest problem instead being the purchasing of alcohol by parents for their children.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, ia telah dicadangkan oleh komiti terpilih yang sebelum ini menjalankan kajian semula tentang masalah minuman keras di New Zealand dan terdapat sedikit bukti kasar di mana 18 & 19 tahun membeli alkohol untuk minor, dengan masalah terbesar selain itu adalah pembelian alkohol oleh ibu bapa kepada anak-anak.

src: Wednesday morning, the Frankfurt Book Fair opened its gates to the first of an estimated 280,000 visitors this year in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
ref: Pagi Rabu, Pameran Buku Frankfurt membuka pintu-pintunya untuk pelawat pertama daripada kira-kira 280,000 pelawat tahun ini di Frankfurt am Main, Jerman.

src: The Frankfurt Book Fair is the biggest book fair in the world.
ref: Pameran Buku Frankfurt adalah pameran buku terbesar di dunia.

src: It also organises the participation of German publishers at more than 25 international book fairs and is the co-founder of the Cape Town Book Fair in South Africa.
ref: Ia juga menganjurkan penyertaan penerbit Jerman di lebih daripada 25 pameran buku antarabangsa dan merupakan pengasas bersama Pameran Buku Cape Town di Afrika Selatan.

src: It maintains the most visited website worldwide for the publishing industry.
ref: Ia menyenggara laman web yang paling kerap dilawati di seluruh dunia untuk industri penerbitan.

src: The German Publishers & Booksellers Association, which runs the Frankfurt Book Fair, says that the book market is thriving.
ref: Persatuan Penerbit & Penjual Buku Jerman, yang menganjur Pameran Buku Frankfurt, mengatakan bahawa pasaran buku berkembang maju.

src: It declared on Tuesday that the high number of exhibitors and the record numbers of 7,448 exhibitors from over 100 countries, showing 391,652 books, including 121,267 new books of this year, proves that the book market is thriving.
ref: Ia mengisytiharkan pada hari Selasa bahawa bilangan tinggi peserta pameran dan nombor rekod 7448 peserta pameran dari lebih 100 buah negara, mempamerkan 391,652 buku, termasuk 121,267 buku-buku baru tahun ini, membuktikan bahawa pasaran buku memang berkembang maju.

src: TV and merchandising rights have long played a role, but have become more and more important for larger projects.
ref: TV dan hak perniagaan telah lama memainkan peranan, tetapi menjadi makin dan makin penting untuk projek-projek yang lebih besar.

src: Two other media forms have also become more standard elements of the value chain.
ref: Dua bentuk media yang lain juga telah menjadi elemen piawaian dalam rantaian pertambahan nilai.

src: E-books and audiobooks are both big topics of this year's Book Fair.
ref: E-buku dan buku audio adalah dua topik besar Pameran Buku tahun ini.

src: In an effort to ease complaints by the U.S. and Europe about a heavy influx of low priced Chinese goods, China will raise export tariffs on 74 categories of textile products in June.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk mengurangkan aduan oleh A.S. dan Eropah tentang banyak kemasukan barangan China yang berharga rendah, China akan menaikkan tarif eksport ke atas 74 kategori produk tekstil pada bulan Jun.

src: This follows plans from the U.S. to impose quotas on Chinese textiles and clothing.
ref: Ini berikutan rancangan dari A.S. untuk mengenakan kuota ke atas tekstil Cina dan pakaian.

src: Products likely to see an increase from the Chinese move include synthetic fiber shirts, trousers, knit shirts and blouses, cotton shirts, and combined cotton yarn.
ref: Produk dijangka meningkat akibat langkah Cina termasuk baju serat sintetik, seluar, baju dikait dan blaus, kemeja kain kapas dan benang kapas gabung.

src: Last week, similar restrictions were imposed by the U.S. on cotton trousers, knit shirts, and underwear.
ref: Minggu lalu, sekatan hampir sama telah dikenakan oleh A.S. pada seluar kapas, baju kait, dan seluar dalam.

src: Currently, a 2.5 cent charge per item is imposed; the new tariff will raise this to the equivalent of 12 cents per piece now.
ref: Pada masa ini, caj 2.5 sen setiap benda dikenakan; tarif baru akan meningkatkan jumlah ini sehingga bersamaan dengan 12 sen setiap satu sekarang.

src: While this is a fourfold increase, it is not expected to affect consumer prices.
ref: Walaupun ini adalah peningkatan empat kali ganda, ia tidak dijangka mempengaruhi harga pengguna.

src: Because of this, some doubt the tariff will have any effect on correcting the trade imbalance.
ref: Oleh kerana itu, sesetengah orang meragui tarif itu akan memberi kesan ke atas pembetulan ketidakseimbangan perdagangan.

src: This move is in response to U.S. trade quotas imposed due to concerns that increased Chinese goods would put U.S. textile manufacturers out of business.
ref: Langkah ini adalah sebagai tindak balas ke atas kuota perdagangan A.S. yang dikenakan disebabkan oleh kebimbangan bahawa peningkatan barangan China akan menyebabkan pengeluar tekstil A.S. kehilangan perniagaan.

src: According to Auggie Tantillo, executive director of the American Manufacturing Trade Action Coalition, a textile industry group in the U.S., the move will preserve 10,000 U.S. jobs.
ref: Menurut Auggie Tantillo, pengarah eksekutif Kesatuan Tindakan Perdagangan Pembuatan Amerika, kumpulan industri tekstil di A.S., langkah itu akan memelihara 10,000 pekerjaan A.S.

src: The new U.S. trade quota will limit the growth of Chinese textile imports to 7.5 percent compared with shipments over the past year.
ref: Kuota perdagangan A.S. baru akan mengehadkan pertumbuhan import tekstil China ke 7.5 peratus berbanding dengan penghantaran sepanjang tahun lalu.

src: Prior to January 1, a global quota system helped regulate the trade.
ref: Sebelum 1 Januari, sistem kuota sejagat membantu mengawal selia perdagangan itu.

src: With the quota system gone, fears have arisen that a flood of Chinese goods could undercut U.S. competitiveness in the market.
ref: Dengan penghapusan sistem kuota itu, kebimbangan telah timbul bahawa kebanjiran barangan China boleh melemahkan daya saing A.S. di pasaran.

src: China is able to market its goods cheaply due to an artificially weak yuan.
ref: China mampu memasarkan barangannya dengan murah disebabkan oleh pemalsuan yuan yang lemah.

src: The U.S. Treasury criticized the China yuan policy as "highly distortionary", posing a major risk to China's economy itself and to global economic growth.
ref: Perbendaharaan A.S. mengkritik dasar yuan China sebagai "sangat menyimpang," menimbulkan risiko besar ke atas ekonomi China sendiri dan ke atas pertumbuhan ekonomi global.

src: They challenged China to revalue its currency to bring it to a level they believe will allow fairer competition between global manufacturers.
ref: Mereka mencabar China untuk menilai semula mata wangnya untuk membawanya ke satu tahap yang mereka percaya akan membolehkan persaingan yang lebih sihat di kalangan pengeluar global.

src: Chinese Commerce Minister Bo Xilai said, "I believe they are not reasonable".
ref: Menteri Perdagangan China Bo Xilai berkata, "Saya rasa mereka tidak munasabah."

src: Laura Jones, a representative of large retailers, also criticized the move, saying "These restrictions on imports from China will do absolutely nothing to help the U.S. textile industry -- and the government knows it."
ref: Laura Jones, seorang wakil peruncit besar, juga mengkritik langkah itu, berkata "Sekatan ini ke atas import dari China sama sekali tidak akan membantu industri tekstil A.S. - dan kerajaan mengetahuinya."

src: A main belt asteroid, No. 274301, has been named after Wikipedia, a free encyclopedia.
ref: Satu jaluran asteroid utama, No. 274301, telah dinamakan Wikipedia, sebuah ensiklopedia percuma.

src: The information became available on the Minor Planet Center's website yesterday.
ref: Maklumat itu didapati di laman web Pusat Planet Kecil semalam.

src: The decision of the Committee for Small Body Nomenclature to assign the name "Wikipedia" to the asteroid was published in the Minor Planet Circular of January 27, published online yesterday, page 82403.
ref: Keputusan Jawatankuasa Tatanama Jasad Kecil untuk memberikan nama "Wikipedia" kepada asteroid telah diterbitkan dalam Pekeliling Planet Kecil pada January 27, diterbitkan dalam talian hari ini, halaman 82403.

src: It was submitted to the Committee by the head of the Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory in Ukraine, Yuri Ivashchenko.
ref: Ia telah diserahkan kepada Jawatankuasa itu oleh ketua Balai Cerap Astronomi Andrushivka di Ukraine, Yuri Ivashchenko.

src: The asteroid 274301 Wikipedia was discovered by the team of astronomers of Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory.
ref: Asteroid 274301 Wikipedia telah ditemui oleh sepasukan ahli astronomi dari Balai Cerap Astronomi Andrushivka.

src: At first it was observed by that team on August 25, 2008 at 22:47 (UTC).
ref: Pada mulanya ia diperhati oleh pasukan itu pada 25 Ogos 2008 pada pukul 22:47 (UTC).

src: It was also observed on the next night and two weeks later on September 6.
ref: Ia juga diperhatikan pada malam berikutnya dan dua minggu kemudiannya pada 6 September.

src: Accurate calculation of its orbit showed asteroid 2008 QH24 is the same as 1997 RO4 and 2007 FK34.
ref: Pengiraan tepat orbitnya menunjukkan asteroid 2008 QH24 adalah sama seperti 1997 RO4 dan 2007 FK34.

src: The asteroid had been previously spotted by observatories including Caussols-ODAS in France, and Mt. Lemmon Survey and Steward Observatory in Arizona, US.
ref: Asteroid itu telah sebelum ini ditemui oleh balai cerap termasuk Caussols-Odas di Perancis, dan Mt. Lemmon Ukur dan Steward Observatory di Arizona, Amerika Syarikat.

src: On April 18, 2011 the minor planet received the number 274301.
ref: Pada April 18, 2011 planet kecil ini menerima nombor 274301.

src: Al-Jazeera reported a few days earlier that the Iraqi militants would kill the journalists unless the Romanian government withdraws its troops from the country within four days.
ref: Al-Jazeera melaporkan beberapa hari sebelum ini bahawa militan Iraq akan membunuh wartawan-wartawan itu melainkan jika kerajaan Romania mengundurkan tenteranya dari negara itu dalam tempoh empat hari.

src: With 850 troops, Romania has one of the largest contingents in Iraq.
ref: Dengan 850 anggota tentera, Romania mempunyai salah satu kontinjen terbesar di Iraq.

src: In January this year, after President Băsescu was elected, he pledged to send more peacekeeping troops in Iraq.
ref: Pada bulan Januari tahun ini, selepas Presiden Basescu dipilih, beliau berjanji untuk menghantar lebih ramai tentera pengaman di Iraq.

src: On Friday evening, the colleagues and relatives of the journalists gathered in front of the Cotroceni Palace, Băsescu's residence, to call for their release.
ref: Pada petang Jumaat, rakan-rakan dan saudara-mara wartawan berkumpul di hadapan Istana Cotroceni, kediaman Basescu, untuk meminta pembebasan mereka.

src: After learning of the released tape, Băsescu returned from the GUUAM summit in Chişinău, Republic of Moldova, where he was an observer, to Bucharest, where he called for a meeting with the relevant departments to discuss the issue.
ref: Selepas mengetahui bahawa pita video itu dipaparkan, Basescu kembali dari sidang kemuncak GUUAM di Chisinau, Republik Moldova, di mana beliau adalah pemerhati, pergi ke Bucharest, di mana beliau menganjurkan satu mesyuarat dengan jabatan tertentu untuk membincangkan isu itu.

src: Reporter Marie-Jeanne Ion, from Prima TV, and cameraman Sorin Dumitru Miscoci and reporter Ovidiu Ohanesian, from newspaper România Liberă, were kidnapped in Baghdad on March 28, one day after President Băsescu made an unexpected visit to Iraq to announce a supplement of troops.
ref: Wartawan Marie-Jeanne Ion, dari Prima TV, dan jurukamera Sorin Dumitru Miscoci dan wartawan Ovidiu Ohanesian, dari akhbar România Libera, diculik di Baghdad pada 28 Mac, sehari selepas Presiden Basescu membuat lawatan mengejut ke Iraq untuk mengumumkan tambahan tentera.

src: Bloc Quebecois Member of Parliament Benoit Sauvageau was killed in an automobile accident on Monday morning after his vehicle hit a tow truck at the side of a road in his Montreal constituency.
ref: Bloc Quebec Ahli Parlimen Benoit Sauvageau terbunuh dalam kemalangan kereta pada pagi Isnin selepas kenderaannya melanggar trak tunda ditepi jalan di kawasan pilihanraya Montrealnya.

src: Sauvageau, 42, had been an MP since 1993 and represented the riding of Repentigny at the time of his death.
ref: Sauvageau, 42, pernah menjadi Ahli Parlimen sejak tahun 1993 dan mewakili kawasan pilihanraya Repentigny pada masa kematiannya.

src: "I think he was a very good member of Parliament, a very good sovereigntist," added Duceppe.
ref: "Saya rasa dia adalah seorang ahli Parlimen yang sangat baik, seorang yang menyokong kemerdekaan Quebec yang sangat baik," tambah Duceppe.

src: Visibly shaken by the news, Duceppe said: "It's awful, at 42 with four children (daughters) between the ages of five and 15, it's not right."
ref: Terkejut dengan berita itu, Duceppe berkata: "Adalah teruk, pada usia 42 dengan empat anak (anak perempuan) yang berumur antara lima dan 15, itu tidak betul."

src: Former Quebec Premier Lucien Bouchard, who led the BQ when Sauvageau was first elected, told Radio Canada: "It's a tragedy."
ref: Bekas Perdana Quebec Lucien Bouchard, yang mengetuai BQ apabila Sauvageau dipilih buat kali pertama, memberitahu Radio Kanada: "Ia adalah satu tragedi."

src: "He is a man who was engaged in political fights but he did it correctly, with nobility and idealism and a lot of respect for others, even his adversaries," said Bouchard.
ref: "Dia seorang lelaki yang terlibat dalam perjuangan politik tetapi dia melakukannya dengan betul, dengan kemuliaan dan idealisme dan banyak menghormati orang lain, termasuk lawannya," kata Bouchard.

src: As an MP he was the Bloc's spokesperson on public accounts and the treasury board and was also the party's critic responsible for the Official Languages Act and the rights of Francophones outside of Quebec.
ref: Sebagai Ahli Parlimen beliau adalah jurucakap Bloc pada masa awam dan jawatankuasa perbendaharaan dan juga pengkritik parti itu yang bertanggungjawab ke atas Akta Bahasa Rasmi dan hak-hak Francophones luar Quebec.

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper said the prayers and thoughts of all Parliamentarians are with Sauvageau's loved ones at this difficult time.
ref: Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper berkata, doa dan ingatan semua Ahli-ahli Parlimen adalah bersama dengan orang yang Sauvageau cinta pada masa yang sukar ini.

src: A car containing an large explosive device has been defused in the Haymarket, London.
ref: Sebuah kereta yang mengandungi bahan letupan besar telah diberhentikan di Haymarket, London.

src: A second device was later found in a car park in Park Lane.
ref: Peranti kedua kemudiannya dijumpai di tempat letak kereta di Park Lane.

src: A car, a light metallic green Mercedes-Benz E Class saloon (produced 1984-1995), parked near the nightclub 'TigerTiger', contained petrol, gas cylinders and nails.
ref: Sebuah kereta salun, Mercedes- Benz E Class berwarna lampu hijau logam (yang dihasilkan dalam tahun 1984-1995), yang diletakkan berhampiran kelab malam 'TigerTiger', yang mempunyai petrol, silinder gas dan paku.

src: Police carried out a controlled explosion at 2:00 a.m. BST and the car has been taken to a forensic explosives laboratory for further investigation.
ref: Polis menjalankan letupan terkawal pada 2:00 pagi BST dan kereta itu telah dibawa ke makmal bahan letupan forensik untuk siasatan lanjut.

src: Eyewitnesses saw the car driving "erratically" and colliding with bins before being abandoned.
ref: Saksi-saksi melihat kereta dipandu "tidak tentu arah" dan berlanggar dengan tong-tong sebelum ditinggalkan.

src: An ambulance crew in the area alerted police after seeing smoke inside the car.
ref: Anggota ambulans di kawasan itu menghubungi polis selepas melihat asap di dalam kereta.

src: Deputy Assistant Police Commissioner Peter Clarke said there could have been "significant injury or loss of life".
ref: Timbalan Penolong Pesuruhjaya Polis Peter Clarke berkata mungkin terdapat "kecederaan atau kehilangan nyawa yang serius."

src: A meeting of COBRA, chaired by new Home Secretary Jacqui Smith was held about the incident.
ref: Sebuah mesyuarat COBRA, yang dipengerusikan oleh Setiausaha Dalam Negeri baru Jacqui Smith telah diadakan membincangkan kejadian itu.

src: Police say it is too early to tell who is behind the threat.
ref: Polis berkata, masih terlalu awal untuk memberitahu siapa yang mendalangi ancaman itu.

src: Prime Minister Gordon Brown said the country faces a "serious and continued security threat" and urged people to "be vigilant at all times".
ref: Perdana Menteri Gordon Brown berkata negara itu menghadapi "ancaman keselamatan yang serius dan berterusan" dan menggesa orang ramai untuk "berwaspada pada setiap masa."

src: Disruption has been caused to transport in the area with roads closed and bus routes diverted.
ref: Gangguan telah dicetuskan untuk bergerak di kawasan itu dengan jalan ditutup dan laluan bas dialihkan.

src: Piccadilly Circus tube station has reopened after an earlier closure
ref: Stesen tiub Sarkas Piccadilly telah dibuka semula selepas penutupan yang lebih awal.

src: Police are reviewing major events to be held in London over the weekend.
ref: Polis sedang mengkaji peristiwa-peristiwa besar yang akan berlangsung di London pada hujung minggu.

src: CBS News has reported that a message appeared on the widely used jihadist Internet forum Al-Hesbah at 8:09 a.m. June 28, saying: "Today I say: Rejoice, by Allah, London shall be bombed."
ref: CBS News melaporkan satu mesej muncul di forum Internet jihad Al-Hesbah yang digunakan secara meluas pada 8:09 pagi 28 Jun, mengatakan: "Hari ini saya berkata: Bergembiralah, demi Allah, London akan dibom."

src: The message went on to mention the recently announced knighthood of Satanic Verses author Salman Rushdie.
ref: Maklumat tersebut seterusnya menyebut kesatriaan Ayat-ayat Satan penulis Salman Rushdie yang diumumkan baru-baru ini.

src: Following an incident at Glasgow airport, Home Secretary Jacqui Smith announced the elevation of the UK's national threat level from "Severe" to "Critical", indicating that an attack could be expected "imminently".
ref: Berikutan kejadian di lapangan terbang Glasgow, Setiausaha Dalam Negeri Jacqui Smith mengumumkan peningkatan tahap ancaman negara di UK daripada "teruk" ke "kritikal," menunjukkan bahawa serangan dijangkakan "tidak lama lagi."

src: Two people have been arrested in Cheshire in connection with the Glasgow International Airport attack and attempted London car bombings.
ref: Dua orang telah ditahan di Cheshire berkaitan dengan serangan Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Glasgow dan cubaan pengeboman kereta London.

src: A new report by the International Federation of Journalists (IFJ) documents 129 cases where media workers have been killed because of their work during 2004.
ref: Satu laporan baru oleh Persekutuan Wartawan Antarabangsa (IFJ) mendokumenkan 129 kes di mana pekerja media terbunuh disebabkan kerja mereka pada tahun 2004.

src: They expect the number to increase as more information reaches them.
ref: Mereka menjangka jumlah itu akan meningkat apabila lebih banyak maklumat sampai kepada mereka.

src: 49 casualties (close to 40%) occurred in Iraq, making it by far the deadliest country for journalists.
ref: 49 kematian (hampir 40%) berlaku di Iraq, menjadikannya setakat ini negara yang paling membawa maut untuk wartawan.

src: At least 20 of those appeared to be cases where journalists were directly targeted because of their profession.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 20 daripada mereka muncul sebagai kes di mana wartawan secara langsung menjadi sasaran disebabkan pekerjaan mereka.

src: Another country that deserved special attention was the Philippines, where 13 journalists appear to have been assassinated in separate incidents because of their reporting.
ref: Satu lagi negara yang layak mendapat perhatian khusus adalah Filipina, di mana 13 wartawan nampaknya telah dibunuh dalam kejadian berasingan kerana laporan mereka.

src: None of the murderers have been apprehended by the police.
ref: Tiada seorang pun daripada pembunuh itu telah ditahan oleh pihak polis.

src: In Nepal, two journalists were killed by security forces and one by the rebels.
ref: Di Nepal, dua wartawan telah dibunuh oleh pasukan keselamatan dan satu oleh pemberontak.

src: In an effort to reduce the effect of the ongoing financial crisis, six central banks worldwide have reduced their interest rates by 0.5% in an unexpected move which took place today.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk mengurangkan kesan krisis kewangan yang sedang berlangsung, enam bank pusat di seluruh dunia telah mengurangkan kadar faedah sebanyak 0.5% dalam satu langkah yang tidak dijangka yang berlaku hari ini.

src: The banks involved in the deal are the Bank of Canada, the Bank of England, the European Central Bank, the Federal Reserve, Sveriges Riksbank, and the Swiss National Bank.
ref: Bank-bank yang terlibat dalam perjanjian itu adalah Bank of Canada, Bank of England, Bank Pusat Eropah, Rizab Persekutuan, Sveriges Riksbank, dan Bank Negara Swiss.

src: "Throughout the current financial crisis, central banks have engaged in continuous close consultation and have cooperated in unprecedented joint actions such as the provision of liquidity to reduce strains in financial markets," said the banks in a joint statement.
ref: "Sepanjang krisis kewangan kini, bank-bank pusat telah terlibat dalam rundingan terperinci secara berterusan dan bekerjasama dalam tindakan bersama yang tidak pernah berlaku sebelum ini seperti penyediaan kecairan untuk mengurangkan tekanan dalam pasaran kewangan," kata bank dalam kenyataan bersama.

src: "Inflationary pressures have started to moderate in a number of countries, partly reflecting a marked decline in energy and other commodity prices."
ref: "Tekanan inflasi telah mula mereda dalam beberapa negara, sebahagiannya mencerminkan penurunan yang ketara dalam tenaga dan harga komoditi yang lain."

src: "Inflation expectations are diminishing and remain anchored to price stability."
ref: "Jangkaan inflasi akan berkurangan dan terus dipacu ke atas kestabilan harga."

src: "The recent intensification of the financial crisis has augmented the downside risks to growth and thus has diminished further the upside risks to price stability."
ref: "Peningkatan krisis kewangan baru-baru ini telah menambahkan risiko ke bawah ke atas pertumbuhan dan dengan itu telah mengurangkan lagi risiko kenaikan kestabilan harga."

src: "Accordingly, the Bank of Canada, the Bank of England, the European Central Bank, the Federal Reserve, Sveriges Riksbank, and the Swiss National Bank are today announcing reductions in policy interest rates."
ref: "Oleh itu, Bank of Canada, Bank of England, Pusat Bank Eropah, Rizab Persekutuan, Sveriges Riksbank, dan Bank Negara Swiss hari ini mengumumkan pengurangan dalam kadar faedah polisi."

src: "The Bank of Japan expresses its strong support of these policy actions."
ref: "Bank of Japan menyuarakan sokongan kuat terhadap tindakan polisi itu."

src: Japan expressed support for the move, although it did not cut its own interest rate by 0.5% as that would mean bringing its interest rate down to 0% from 0.5%.
ref: Jepun menyatakan sokongan terhadap langkah itu, walaupun ia tidak mengurangkan kadar faedah sendiri sebanyak 0.5% kerana ia akan menurunkan kadar faedah kepada 0% daripada 0.5%.

src: The US interest rate was lowered to 1.5% as part of the move, while the UK rate was lowered to 4.5%.
ref: Kadar faedah AS telah diturunkan kepada 1.5% sebagai sebahagian daripada langkah itu, manakala kadar UK diturunkan kepada 4.5%.

src: The new rate of the Swiss National Bank is 2.5%, while Sveriges Riksbank, the Swedish central bank, lowered its rate to 4.25%.
ref: Kadar baru Bank Negara Swiss adalah 2.5%, manakala Sveriges Riksbank, bank pusat Sweden, menurunkan kadar kepada 4.25%.

src: Pramod Mahajan, the general secretary of India's main opposition party, the Bharatiya Janata Party, was shot in Mumbai earlier today.
ref: Pramod Mahajan, setiausaha agung parti pembangkang utama India, Parti Bharatiya Janata, ditembak di Mumbai awal hari ini.

src: The attack occurred at Mahajan's residence at around 6:30 a.m. IST (0100 UTC).
ref: Serangan itu berlaku di kediaman Mahajan pada kira-kira 6:30 IST (0100 UTC).

src: There are few details available at this time, however sources say Mahajan was shot three times at close range by his brother Praveen Mahajan, allegedly over a property dispute.
ref: Terdapat sedikit sahaja maklumat pada masa ini, namun sumber mengatakan Mahajan ditembak tiga kali dari jarak dekat oleh adiknya Praveen Mahajan, didakwa berhubung pertikaian harta.

src: His lawyer Nandkumar Rajukar claimed that he was depressed and suffering from some mental trauma.
ref: Peguamnya Nandkumar Rajukar mendakwa beliau tertekan dan mengalami beberapa trauma mental.

src: Pramod Mahajan was rushed to the nearby Hinduja Hospital, where he is currently being operated upon for a serious injury to his liver.
ref: Pramod Mahajan dikejarkan ke Hospital Hinduja berdekatan, di mana beliau kini sedang dibedah kerana kecederaan serius di hatinya.

src: A senior surgeon at the hospital stated that Mr. Mahajan was still in critical condition and that the next 72 hours would be "crucial".
ref: Seorang pakar bedah kanan di hospital menyatakan bahawa Encik Mahajan masih dalam keadaan kritikal dan bahawa 72 jam seterusnya adalah "penting."

src: Three bullets are still lodged in his body and doctors are finding it difficult to extract them.
ref: Tiga butir peluru masih melekat pada tubuhnya dan doktor mendapati ianya sukar untuk dikeluarkan.

src: There is talk of using the help of doctors from the armed forces, who have better experience in treating bullet injuries.
ref: Terdapat perbincangan untuk menggunakan bantuan doktor dari angkatan tentera, yang mempunyai pengalaman yang lebih baik dalam merawat kecederaan yang disebabkan oleh peluru.

src: Mr. Mahajan's liver was severely injured in the incident, leading to massive blood loss.
ref: Hati Encik Mahajan cedera teruk dalam kejadian itu, yang membawa kepada kehilangan darah yang amat banyak.

src: Doctors say that he is currently on a ventilator and that the bullets cannot be removed for fear of causing even more bleeding.
ref: Doktor mengatakan bahawa beliau kini dibawah alat pernafasan dan peluru tidak boleh dikeluarkan kerana ianya ditakuti akan menyebabkan pendarahan yang lebih banyak.

src: Praveen Mahajan has been booked under Section 307 of the Indian Penal Code that deals with attempt to murder.
ref: Praveen Mahajan telah ditahan mengikut Seksyen 307 Kanun Keseksaan India yang berurusan dengan percubaan untuk membunuh.

src: He underwent a psychological examination, which indicated that he was mentally stable.
ref: Beliau menjalani pemeriksaan psikologi, yang menunjukkan bahawa dia stabil dari segi mental.

src: Senior politicians from across India are arriving in Mumbai to offer their support to the popular leader.
ref: Ahli politik kanan dari seluruh India tiba di Mumbai untuk memberi sokongan kepada pemimpin popular itu.

src: The Prime Minister of India Manmohan Singh, speaker of the Indian parliament Somnath Chatterjee and the President of India A P J Abdul Kalam have expressed shock over the attack.
ref: Perdana Menteri India Manmohan Singh, Speaker Parlimen India Somnath Chatterjee dan Presiden India APJ Abdul Kalam menzahirkan rasa terkejut dengan serangan itu.

src: Legislators in the Massachusetts General Court, their name for the state legislature, approved legislation on Tuesday, April 4, that would make it the first state in the United States to require all residents to have health insurance and impose penalties for non-compliance.
ref: Penggubal undang-undang di Mahamah Am Massachusetts, yang nama mereka untuk badan perundangan negeri, meluluskan undang-undang pada hari Selasa, 4 April, menjadikan ia negeri pertama di Amerika Syarikat yang memerlukan semua penduduk untuk mempunyai insurans kesihatan dan mengenakan penalti jika tidak mematuhi undang-undang.

src: Massachusetts Governor Mitt Romney, a Republican who is expected to run for U.S. President in 2008, is expected to sign the bill.
ref: Gabenor Massachusetts Mitt Romney, seorang Republikan yang dijangka untuk bertanding Presiden Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2008, dijangka akan menandatangani rang undang-undang itu.

src: The bill passed the lower house, the Massachusetts House of Representatives by a vote of 155-2, and unanimously by the state senate.
ref: Rang undang-undang diluluskan dewan rakyat Massachusetts dengan undi 155-2, dan sebulat suara oleh Senat negeri ini.

src: The Democratic Party holds supermajorities in both houses of the legislature.
ref: Parti Demokratik memegang majoriti yang amat besar di kedua-dua badan perundangan.

src: At least one other state (Hawaii) requires employers to provide employee health insurance, but no other state holds individuals accountable for coverage.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya satu negeri yang lain (Hawaii) memerlukan majikan menyediakan insurans kesihatan pekerja, tetapi tidak ada negeri lain yang memegang sesorang individu bertanggungjawab untuk perlindungan.

src: Google has translated its email service, Gmail, into 12 languages, and it has put up a form that allows the public to volunteer to translate the Gmail interface into 144 more languages.
ref: Google telah menterjemahkan perkhidmatan e-melnya, Gmail, ke dalam 12 bahasa, dan ia telah meletakkan satu bentuk yang membolehkan orang ramai untuk menjadi sukarelawan untuk menterjemahkan muka hadapan Gmail ke dalam lebih 144 bahasa.

src: While most of the languages listed in the volunteering form are old, three are relatively new: Borkborkbork, Klingon, and Esperanto.
ref: Sementara sebahagian besar bahasa yang disenaraikan dalam borang sukarelawan adalah lama, terdapat tiga jenis yang baru: Borkborkbork, Klingon, dan Esperanto.

src: Additionally, the form lists Pig Latin, which is a method of rearranging words to obscure a language, rather than a language in itself.
ref: Selain itu, bentuk yang menyenaraikan Pig Latin, yang merupakan satu kaedah untuk menyusun semula kata-kata untuk mengaburi bahasa, dan bukannya bahasa itu sendiri.

src: Google has also recently introduced a feature known as "My Search History," which allows users to record their searches.
ref: Google juga telah memperkenalkan ciri-ciri yang dikenali sebagai "Sejarah Carian Saya," yang membolehkan pengguna untuk merekod carian mereka.

src: Use of the search history requires that the user have and log in to a Google or Gmail account.
ref: Penggunaan sejarah carian memerlukan pengguna mempunyai dan log masuk ke akaun Google atau Gmail.

src: Commander Leroy Chiao and Flight Engineer Salizhan Sharipov have just completed their mission's first space walk aboard the International Space Station.
ref: Komander Leroy Chiao dan Jurutera Penerbangan Salizhan Sharipov baru menamatkan misi pertama mereka berjalan kaki di ruang angkasa lepas di Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa.

src: The mission lasted 5 hours, 28 minutes, ending at 1311 UTC.
ref: Misi ini berlangsung selama 5 jam, 28 minit, berakhir di 1311 UTC.

src: The two astronauts, working in Russian space suits, performed a variety of tasks.
ref: Kedua-dua angkasawan, bekerja dalam bidang pakaian angkasa lepas Russia, melakukan pelbagai tugas.

src: Chiao and Sharipov installed a work platform, called the Universal Work Platform, along with its base and associated wiring.
ref: Chiao dan Sharipov memasang platform kerja, yang dikenali sebagai Platform Kerja Universal, bersama-sama dengan asas dan pendawaian yang berkaitan.

src: They also installed a commercial robotics experiment and a biological experiment on the exterior of the Zvezda Service Module.
ref: Mereka juga memasang eksperimen robotik percubaan komersial dan eksperimen biologi di bahagian luar Modul Perkhidmatan Zvezda.

src: In addition, they checked vents on systems that help control the Station's atmosphere and relocated a Japanese physical science experiment.
ref: Di samping itu, mereka memeriksa lubang pada sistem yang membantu mengawal suasana Stesen ini dan dipindahkan ke eksperimen sains fizikal Jepun.

src: Residue accumulation around the vents of the Elektron oxygen generator was noted and photographed by Sharipov.
ref: Pengumpulan sisa di sekitar bolong penjana oksigen Elektron telah diberi perhatian dan digambar oleh Sharipov.

src: Technicians on the ground will analyze the information to determine if this residue has been contributing to the problematic operation of the Elektron.
ref: Juruteknik bertugas akan menganalisis maklumat tersebut untuk menentukan sama ada sisa ini telah menyumbang kepada permasalahan dalam operasi Elektron.

src: During this spacewalk, the station again encountered the mysterious forces that have been saturating the Control Moment Gyros during previous spacewalks.
ref: Dalam perjalanan angkasa lepas ini, stesen sekali lagi bertemu dengan daya misteri yang telah menepukan Momen Kawalan Giro ketika perjalanan angkasa lepas sebelumnya.

src: The walk marks Chiao's fifth for 31 hours, 34 minutes, accumulated time and Shapirov's first.
ref: Perjalanan itu menandakan perjalanan kelima Chiao untuk 31 jam, 34 minit, masa terkumpul dan ini merupakan perjalanan Shapirov buat kali pertama.

src: This was the 57th space walk conducted at the Station and the 32nd to be based out of the orbital outpost.
ref: Ini adalah perjalanan di angkasa lepas yang ke-57 dijalankan di Stesen dan yang ke-32 yang akan berpusat di outpos orbit.

src: Expedition 10 is scheduled to conduct its second spacewalk in March.
ref: Ekspedisi 10 dijadual melakukan perjalanan angkasa lepas kedua pada bulan Mac.

src: The 2006 QANTAS New Zealand Television Awards were announced tonight (NZDT).
ref: Anugerah Televisyen Qantas New Zealand 2006 diumumkan malam ini (NZDT).

src: The best observational reality (non format) show out of Snotties, The Zoo and Tough Act was Snotties.
ref: Rancangan realiti pemerhatian terbaik (tidak berformat) memaparkan Snotties, The Zoo dan Tough Act adalah Snotties.

src: Best reality (format) show finalists were Downsize Me!, Sensing Murder and Shock Treatment.
ref: Finalis rancangan Realiti terbaik (berformat) itu ialah Downsize Me!, Sensing Murder dan Shock Treatment.

src: Best current affairs report finalist were Alex Teka, Detox Diary, Not Fit to Practise and Turning the Tide.
ref: Finalis laporan hal ehwal semasa ialah Alex Teka, Detox Diary, Not Fit to Practise dan Turning the Tide.

src: Best news or current affairs presenter of the year finalists were Shane Taurima, Willie Jackson, John Campbell and Susan Wood.
ref: Finalis penyampai berita atau hal ehwal semasa terbaik tahun ini ialah Shane Taurima, Willie Jackson, John Campbell dan Susan Wood.

src: Winner was John Campbell, the prize was awarded to him by his producer, Carol Hirschfield.
ref: Pemenang ialah John Campbell, hadiah telah dianugerahkan kepadanya oleh penerbit beliau, Carol Hirschfield.

src: No finalist was for the award of TV journalist so the winner was Mike McRoberts and the first thing he said when he arrived on stage was: "Crikey dick."
ref: Tiada finalis penganugerahan wartawan TV jadi pemenangnya ialah Mike McRoberts dan perkara pertama beliau katakan ketika beliau tiba di atas pentas adalah: "Crikey dick."

src: The best news or current affairs editor was Shahir Daud.
ref: Editor terbaik berita atau hal ehwal semasa ialah Shahir Daud.

src: Lifestyle and information programme finalists were House Trap, Target and The Living Room.
ref: Finalis gaya hidup dan program maklumat ialah House Trap, Target dan The Living Room.

src: The best popular documentary section finalists were Give My Children Back, Earthquake and Million Dollar Tumour (all of which aired on TV3).
ref: Finalis bahagian dokumentari popular ialah Give My Children Back, Earthquake and Million Dollar Tumour (semua yang disiarkan di TV3).

src: Geoff Husson got the award for the best non-drama director.
ref: Geoff Husson mendapat anugerah pengarah terbaik bukan drama.

src: The winner of favourite female, as voted by the public "by a country mile", was Hillary Barry.
ref: Pemenang pelakon wanita pilihan, seperti yang diundi oleh orang ramai "oleh satu negara," ialah Hillary Barry.

src: Public voted favourite male was Simon Dallow taking the award, who was "lost for words...truly shocked..."
ref: Orang ramai mengundi pelakon lelaki pilihan Simon Dallow mengambil anugerah itu, yang telah "kehilangan kata-kata...benar-benar terkejut..."

src: The favourite programme nominees were Shortland Street, Outrageous Fortune, NZ Idol, Sensing Murder, Downsize Me!, Dancing With The Stars, Target and bro'Town.
ref: Calon-calon program kegemaran ialah Shortland Street, Outrageous Fortune, NZ Idol, Sensing Murder, Dowwnsize Me!, Dancing With the Stars, Target dan bro'Town.

src: The winner was, as voted by the public, Shortland Street.
ref: Pemenang adalah, seperti yang diundi oleh orang ramai, Shortland Street.

src: Grey's Anatomy won the best international programme as voted by the public.
ref: Grey's Anatomy memenangi program antarabangsa yang terbaik seperti yang diundi oleh orang ramai.

src: Best sports or event coverage out of Na Ratou Mo Tatou, V8 Supercars Pukekohe or 3 News election night was Na Ratou Mo Tatou (ANZAC day coverage).
ref: Sukan atau liputan terbaik ialah acara daripada Na Ratou Mo Tatou, V8 Supercars Pukekohe atau 3 News malam pilihan raya adalah Na Ratou Mo Tatou (liputan hari ANZAC).

src: Best entertainment nominees were What Now; the Gunge and Run Awards, Dave Dobbyn; One Night in Matata and Snatch out Booty and the winner was Dave Dobbyn; One Night in Matata.
ref: Calon hiburan terbaik ialah What Now; the Gunge dan Run Awards, Dave Dobbyn; One Night in Matata dan Snatch out Booty dan pemenangnya ialah Dave Dobbyn; One Night in Matata.

src: The best non factual script writer went to David Brechin-Smith.
ref: Penulis skrip bukan fakta terbaik jatuh kepada David Brechin-Smith.

src: Fred Renata, best camera non factual, and best editing for non-factual went to Bryan Shaw.
ref: Fred Renata, kamera terbaik bukan fakta, dan penyuntingan terbaik bukan fakta jatuh kepada Bryan Shaw.

src: Finalists were for best news report team are, "David-Benson Pope" on 3 News, "Robert Hewitt" on One News and "Gaza" on 3 News.
ref: Finalis untuk pasukan laporan berita terbaik ialah, "David-Benson Pope" dalam 3 News, "Robert Hewitt" dalam One News dan "Gaza" dalam 3 News.

src: Best current affairs show finalists were Fair Go, Sunday, Campbell Live.
ref: Finalis rancangan hal ehwal semasa terbaik ialah Fair Go, Sunday, Campbell Live.

src: Winner was Campbell Live, when on stage Mr Campbell said: "Bloody Stoked."
ref: Pemenang ialah Campbell Live, apabila berada di atas pentas Encik Campbell berkata: "Bloody Stoked."

src: Best news finalists were 3 News and One News and the winner was One News.
ref: Finalis berita terbaik ialah 3 News dan One News dan pemenangnya ialah One News.

src: Best actress finalists were Kate Atkinson, Robyn Malcolm and Kate Elliot.
ref: Finalis pelakon terbaik ialah Kate Atkinson, Robyn Malcolm dan Kate Elliot.

src: Best actor finalists were Antony Starr, Ryan O'Kane and Scott Wills and the winner was Ryan O'Kane.
ref: Finalis pelakon terbaik ialah Antony Starr, Ryan O'Kane dan Scott Wills dan pemenangnya adalah Ryan O'Kane.

src: The last award, best drama, the finalists were The Insiders Guide to Love, Doves of War, Outrageous Fortune.
ref: Anugerah lepas, drama terbaik, finalisnya ialah The Insiders Guide to Love, Doves of War, Outrageous Fortune.

src: The winner of best drama was The Insiders Guide to Love.
ref: Pemenang drama terbaik ialah The Insiders Guide to Love.
