src: In a unrelated incident, a civilian helicopter crashed near the Danziger Bridge.
ref: Dalam kejadian berasingan, sebuah helikopter awam terhempas berhampiran Jambatan Danziger.

src: The two passengers on board escaped with only minor cuts and scrapes.
ref: Kedua-dua penumpang terselamat dengan hanya luka kecil dan calar.

src: The Danziger Bridge spans a canal which connects Lake Pontchartrain and the Mississippi River.
ref: Jambatan Danziger menjangkau satu terusan yang menghubungkan Tasik Pontchartrain dan Sungai Mississippi.

src: Peter Dunne's proposition as the leader of the New Zealand political party, United Future, to have Waitangi Day changed back to New Zealand Day failed.
ref: Cadangan Peter Dunne sebagai pemimpin parti politik New Zealand, Masa Depan Bersatu, supaya Hari Waitangi ditukar kembali ke Hari New Zealand gagal.

src: The New Zealand Day bill would have created disharmony within the society according to parliamentary select committee, the Justice and Electoral Committee.
ref: Rang undang-undang Hari New Zealand akan mewujudkan ketidakharmonian dalam masyarakat menurut jawatankuasa terpilih parlimen, iaitu Jawatankuasa Keadilan dan Pilihan Raya.

src: But they do say that it could be a good idea for a completely new holiday to be created called New Zealand Day.
ref: Tetapi mereka mengatakan bahawa ia mungkin adalah idea yang baik supaya cuti yang benar-benar baru diwujudkan dan dipanggil Hari New Zealand.

src: "I welcome the advice from the committee that many of the submitters were in favour of retaining Waitangi Day and having another day set aside for a national day that will celebrate everything that's good about New Zealand and being a New Zealander," said Mr Dunne.
ref: "Saya mengalu-alukan nasihat daripada jawatankuasa itu bahawa kebanyakan daripada penyumbang idea memihak untuk mengekalkan Hari Waitangi dan mempunyai satu lagi hari diperuntukkan sebagai hari kebangsaan yang akan meraikan segala-gala yang baik tentang New Zealand dan menjadi warga New Zealand," kata Encik Dunne.

src: Mr Dunne said the reason for his proposed change was because since New Zealand is multi-cultural, then New Zealand's national day should be one about everybody and not one about grievance.
ref: Encik Dunne berkata sebab perubahan yang dicadangkan itu adalah kerana New Zealand mempunyai pelbagai budaya, maka hari kebangsaan New Zealand haruslah mengenai semua orang dan bukanlah satu sungutan.

src: Mr Dunne says that he is still backing New Zealand Day in some form despite the rejection, as he is now considering many options, including changing the Queen's Official Birthday holiday to New Zealand Day, and starting Dominion Day back up.
ref: Encik Dunne berkata bahawa dia masih menyokong Hari New Zealand dalam bentuk tertentu meskipun penolakan tersebut, kerana dia kini memperhitungkan banyak pilihan, termasuk menukar cuti Hari Lahir Rasmi Ratu ke Hari New Zealand, dan memulakan semula Hari Dominion.

src: He says that he is now considering writing up a new bill to submit it to the New Zealand Parliament.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia kini mempertimbangkan untuk menulis rang undang-undang baru untuk diserahkan kepada Parlimen New Zealand.

src: Waitangi day is on February 6, each year and celebrates the Waitangi signing of New Zealand's founding document, the Treaty of Waitangi (Te Tiriti o Waitangi).
ref: Hari Waitangi adalah pada 6 Februari setiap tahun dan meraikan tandatangan Waitangi dalam perlembagaan New Zealand, Perjanjian Waitangi (Te Tiriti o Waitangi).

src: At the United Nations Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen, after four days of negotiations, Africa countries have made the first draft version of future possible treaty, to replace the 1997 Kyoto protocol.
ref: Di Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu di Copenhagen, selepas rundingan selama empat hari, negara-negara Afrika telah membuat draf perjanjian masa depan versi pertama, bagi menggantikan protokol Kyoto 1997.

src: Africa leaders demand 5% of GDP of developed world citizens to be given as a finance to developing countries for struggle with global warming.
ref: Pemimpin Afrika menuntut 5% daripada GDP rakyat dunia maju untuk diberikan sebagai kewangan kepada negara-negara membangun yang mengalami kesusahan dengan pemanasan global.

src: Along with this, developing countries expect rich countries to increase their emissions cuts goals.
ref: Seiring dengan ini, negara-negara membangun mengharapkan negara-negara kaya untuk meningkatkan sasaran pengurangan pengeluaran mereka.

src: Funding for developed countries was previously expected to be 130 billion US dollars.
ref: Dana untuk negara-negara maju sebelum ini dijangka sebanyak 130 bilion dolar US.

src: The new proposal is about 11 times larger, according to 2008 GDP estimates.
ref: Cadangan baru ini adalah kira-kira 11 kali lebih besar, menurut anggaran GDP 2008.

src: In an interview in Copenhagen, China’s representative Su Wei commented, "The developed countries need to speed up the process and come forward with more ambitious targets by 2020."
ref: Dalam satu temu bual di Copenhagen, wakil China Su Wei berkata, "Negara-negara maju perlu mempercepatkan proses itu dan tampil ke hadapan dengan sasaran yang lebih tinggi pada tahun 2020."

src: Many nations offered emissions cuts pledges, which vary from 4% to 17% cuts by 2020, compared with 1990 levels.
ref: Banyak negara yang menawarkan jaminan pengurangan pengeluaran, potongan berbeza dari 4% ke 17% pada tahun 2020, berbanding dengan peringkat pada tahun 1990.

src: The Africa's draft proposes a goal of 65% cut for every developed country.
ref: Draf Afrika mencadangkan satu sasaran potongan sebanyak 65% untuk setiap negara maju.

src: Though the new goals are harder, Anders Turesson, European Union representative at UNCCC, doubted in the ability of them to prevent 2-degree warming.
ref: Walaupun matlamat baru adalah lebih sukar dicapai, Anders Turesson, wakil Kesatuan Eropah di UNCCC, meragui keupayaan mereka untuk mengelakkan pemanasan setinggi 2- degree.

src: In an interview in Copenhagen, he said, "We are concerned about the environmental integrity of these texts and we do not see how they will deliver the 2-degree target."
ref: Dalam satu temu bual di Copenhagen, dia berkata, "Kami bimbang tentang integriti alam sekitar dalam petikan-petikan ini dan kami tidak yakin bagaimana mereka boleh mencapai sasaran 2-degree."

src: "Hopefully we will be able to step up our ambitions as we move forward in the negotiations."
ref: "Mudah-mudahan kami akan dapat meningkatkan cita-cita kami dalam melangkah ke hadapan dalam rundingan itu."

src: British Energy and Climate Change Secretary Ed Miliband criticised the draft text for absence of a certain temperature raise threshold, said that the new texts "are shorter texts than we’ve had before, which we can negotiate around because the imperative here is to get on with it and get to an ambitious solution".
ref: Setiausaha Tenaga dan Perubahan Iklim British Ed Miliband mengkritik draf teks itu kerana ketiadaan ambang kenaikan suhu tertentu, berkata bahawa teks baru "adalah teks yang lebih pendek daripada yang kami ada sebelum ini, yang kita boleh berunding tentangnya kerana apa yang penting sekarang adalah untuk terus menjalankannya dan mencapai satu penyelesaian yang bercita-cita tinggi."

src: Bloomberg news company interviewed several people from New York environmental group Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC).
ref: Syarikat berita Bloomberg menemuramah beberapa orang dari kumpulan alam sekitar New York Majlis Pertahanan Sumber Asli (NRDC).

src: Its policy director David Doniger expects most difficulties to come at the end of the UNCCC, when Barack Obama and Wen Jiabao arrive at the summit: "It’s really come down to a set of difficult "
ref: Pengarah dasar itu David Doniger menjangka kebanyakan kesukaran itu akan berlaku pada akhir UNCCC, apabila Barack Obama dan Wen Jiabao tiba di sidang kemuncak itu: "Ia benar-benar satu perkara yang sukar."

src: "It’s a lot easier for lower-level negotiators to come to an impasse and go home."
ref: "Lebih mudah bagi perundingan di peringkat rendah untuk menemui jalan buntu dan pulang ke rumah."

src: "It’s not easy for senior officials and definitely not easy for heads of government."
ref: "Bukan mudah untuk pegawai kanan dan sudah pasti tidak mudah untuk ketua-ketua kerajaan."

src: As international climate policy director of NRDC Jake Schmidt commented similarly, "It’s going to be a tense negotiation over emissions cuts for developed countries."
ref: Sebagai pengarah dasar iklim antarabangsa NRDC Jake Schmidt memberi komen yang serupa, "Ia akan menjadi sesi rundingan yang tegang mengenai pengurangan pengeluaran untuk negara-negara maju."

src: According to Forbes annual World's Billionaire list released yesterday, Mexican tycoon Carlos Slim is the world's richest person for the second year in a row, with a net worth of US$74 billion.
ref: Menurut senarai tahunan Jutawan Dunia Forbes yang dikeluarkan semalam, hartawan Mexico Carlos Slim adalah orang terkaya di dunia untuk dua tahun berturut-turut, dengan hasilnya bernilai US$74 bilion.

src: American Bill Gates, co-founder of Microsoft Corp, is again listed in second place with US$56 billion while investor Warren Buffett of Berkshire Hathaway is third.
ref: Bill Gates dari Amerika, pengasas bersama Microsoft Corp, disenaraikan sekali lagi di tempat kedua dengan US$56 bilion sementara pelabur Warren Buffett dari Berkshire Hathaway di tempat ketiga.

src: China added the most new billionaires to the list with 54 while Russia added 31.
ref: China menambah paling ramai jutawan baru ke senarai itu dengan 54 sementara Rusia menambah 31.

src: The US came in third, with 23 new billionaires; American Mark Zuckerberg, chairman of Facebook, more than tripled his net worth to US$13.5 billion, placing him in Forbes' 52nd spot.
ref: US berada di tempat ketiga, dengan 23 jutawan baru; Mark Zuckerberg dari Amerika, pengerusi Facebook, hasilnya bertambah tiga kali ganda bernilai US$13.5 bilion, meletakkannya di tempat ke-52 di Forbes.

src: Although the US is home to 413 billionaires, more than any other country, the changing distribution of global finances is evident.
ref: Walaupun US mempunyai 413 orang jutawan, lebih ramai dari negara-negara lain, perubahan pengagihan kewangan dunia adalah nyata.

src: Today, due to the increasing wealth of emerging nations, just one in every three billionaires is American, a decline from ten years ago when Americans numbered one in every two.
ref: Hari ini, hasil dari peningkatan kemewahan negara-negara membangun, hanya satu dari tiga jutawan adalah warga Amerika, satu kemerosotan dari sepuluh tahun lepas ketika warga Amerika adalah satu dari setiap dua orang.

src: Brazil, Russia, India and China together accounted for more than 108 new billionaires.
ref: Brazil, Rusia, India dan China bersama-sama mempunyai lebih dari 108 orang jutawan baru.

src: Last year, New York was home to more billionaires than any other city in the world, while this year Moscow is home to 79, which beats New York's current number of 58.
ref: Tahun lepas, New York adalah bandaraya yang menempatkan jutawan dengan paling ramai di dunia, sementara itu tahun ini Moscow adalah tempat penetapan untuk 79, yang mengalahkan angka New York kini iaitu 58.

src: Forbes lists a world total of 1,210 billionaires whose combined wealth is US$4.5 trillion, an increase from last year's total of US$3.6 trillion.
ref: Forbes menyenaraikan 1,210 jutawan dunia di mana jumlah keseluruhan kemewahan adalah US$4.5 trilion, peningkatan dari jumlah tahun lepas iaitu US$3.6 trilion.

src: Former Thai Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra arrived today in Cambodia where he will take up a post as the government's economic advisor.
ref: Bekas Perdana Menteri Thailand Thaksin Shinawatra tiba hari ini di Kemboja di mana beliau akan menerima jawatan sebagai penasihat ekonomi kerajaan tersebut.

src: The appointment has caused a diplomatic incident between the two countries, as Shinawatra was condemned to two years in jail in absentia for corruption.
ref: Perlantikan itu telah menimbulkan insiden diplomatik di antara kedua-dua negara itu, kerana Shinawatra telah dihukum penjara selama dua tahun tanpa kehadiran kerana rasuah.

src: Tension is already mounting, with the Thai government expressing both anger and embarrassment over the appointment.
ref: Ketegangan semakin genting, dengan kerajaan Thailand menyatakan kedua-dua kemarahan dan rasa malu terhadap perlantikan tersebut.

src: They have withdrawn their ambassador and have decided to cancel plans with the Cambodian government for trade and oil exploration.
ref: Mereka telah menarik keluar duta mereka dan telah memutuskan untuk membatalkan rancangan dengan kerajaan Kemboja tentang perdagangan dan cari gali minyak.

src: This comes amidst disputes over the Preah Vihear temple complex which spans both countries.
ref: Kejadian ini timbul di tengah-tengah pertelingkahan ke atas kompleks kuil Preah Vihear yang merentangi kedua-dua negara.

src: Thailand has further threatened to close borders with its neighbour.
ref: Thailand juga telah mengugut untuk menutup sempadan dengan jirannya itu.

src: Thaksin will address 300 Cambodian economics experts on Thursday in Phnom Penh and is expected to remain "two or three days" according to Cambodian cabinet spokesman Phay Siphan.
ref: Thaksin akan bercakap kepada 300 orang pakar ekonomi Kemboja pada hari Khamis di Phnom Penh dan dijangka akan berada di situ "dua atau tiga hari" menurut jurucakap kabinet Kemboja Phay Siphan.

src: "It is an honour for Cambodia's economic sector and we hope that Cambodians nationwide welcome him warmly," he announced.
ref: "Sektor ekonomi Kemboja amat berbesar hati dan kami berharap rakyat Kemboja seluruh negara akan memberikan sambutan yang mesra kepadanya," beliau mengumumkan.

src: "We are looking forward to learning from Thaksin's great economic experience and we are convinced that his experience will contribute to our country's economic development," he said.
ref: "Kami tidak sabar untuk mempelajari sesuatu dari pengalaman ekonomi Thaksin yang hebat dan kami yakin pengalamannya akan memberi sumbangan kepada pembangunan ekonomi negara kami," katanya.

src: A coup in 2006 ousted Thaksin after members of parliament defected during military rule.
ref: Sebuah kudeta pada tahun 2006 telah menyingkirkan Thaksin selepas ahli-ahli parlimen berpaling tadah semasa pemerintahan tentera.

src: Since then he has been in exile, mostly living in Dubai.
ref: Sejak itu beliau dibuang negeri, kebanyakan masanya menetap di Dubai.

src: He is still influential in Thailand, using protests by the Red Shirts, and the Thai government fears that Thaksin will use Cambodia as base to campaign.
ref: Beliau masih berpengaruh di Thailand, menggunakan mogok oleh Kemeja Merah, dan kerajaan Thailand risau Thaksin akan menggunakan Kemboja sebagai pusat untuk berkempen.

src: However, Thaksin published a letter on his website on Monday indicating that he did not intend to "go to Cambodia to help Cambodia fight with Thailand [...]"
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Thaksin mengeluarkan satu surat di laman webnya pada hari Isnin menyatakan dia tidak berniat untuk "pergi ke Kemboja bagi membantu Kemboja melawan Thailand [...]"

src: "As I travel to Cambodia to discuss poverty and the world economic situation, I will try to preserve Thai interests with our friends in Phnom Penh, despite the Thai government still hounding me wherever I go," he stated.
ref: "Oleh kerana saya pergi ke Kemboja untuk membincangkan kemiskinan dan situasi ekonomi dunia, saya akan cuba untuk mengekalkan kepentingan Thailand dengan rakan-rakan kami di Phnom Penh, walaupun kerajaan Thailand masih memburu saya ke mana pun saya pergi," katanya.

src: Dark Floors, a horror film under production in Northern Finland and starring the hard rock band Lordi (who are famed for their monster costumes and lyrical themes), has received €300,000 (£200,000) funding from the Finnish government.
ref: Dark Floors, sebuah filem hantu di bawah penerbitan di Utara Finland dan dilakonkan oleh kumpulan hard rock Lordi (yang terkenal dengan kostum raksasa dan lirik tema ), telah menerima pendanaan sebanyak €300,000 (£200,000) dari kerajaan Finland.

src: Lordi are also famed for their record-breaking 292 point victory in the Eurovision Song Contest 2006 with their song Hard Rock Hallelujah.
ref: Lordi juga terkenal dengan kemenangan di Pertandingan Lagu Eurovision 2006 dengan 292 mata yang memecahkan rekod dengan lagu Hard Rock Hallelujah.

src: It was also the first time a hard rock song had won the contest, and Finland's first ever victory.
ref: Ia juga yang pertama kali sebuah lagu hard rock telah memenangi pertandingan itu, dan kemenangan Finland yang pertama.

src: The film is being shot in English, with a largely Finnish cast, and has a production cost of €4.2 million (£2.84 million).
ref: Filem itu dibuat di dalam bahasa Inggeris, dengan kebanyakannya terdiri dari pelakon Finland, dan mempunyai kos penerbitan sebanyak €4.2 juta (£2.84 juta).

src: The plot features a "monster attack" on the world, with a young Autistic girl being the only person in a position to save it.
ref: Jalan ceritanya bertumpu kepada satu "serangan raksasa" di dunia ini, dengan gadis Autistik yang menjadi hanya satu-satu manusia yang boleh menyelamatkannya.

src: Lead singer Mr Lordi said that as their masks and costumes were derived from horror films it was "kind of natural" that they should make their own.
ref: Penyanyi utama Encik Lordi berkata topeng dan kostum mereka diperoleh dari filem hantu dan ia adalah "agak natural" yang mereka harus membuat filem sendiri.

src: According to a French journalist and the imam of the local mosque, around 400 people have been killed in the riots that erupted due to a dispute in the result of the local elections.
ref: Menurut seorang wartawan Perancis dan imam sebuah masjid tempatan, seramai 400 orang telah terbunuh di dalam rusuhan yang meletus disebabkan pertikaian tentang keputusan pilihanraya tempatan.

src: The riots are taking place in the Nigerian city of Jos, which is located between the Christian and Muslim areas of Nigeria.
ref: Rusuhan berlaku di Jos, sebuah bandar Nigeria, yang terletak di antara kawasan orang Kristian dan Muslim.

src: The elections which sparked the violence, did, according to a rumor spread around the city, result in the predominantly Christian People's Democratic Party beating the All Nigerian Peoples Party, a predominantly Muslim party.
ref: Pilihanraya yang mencetuskan keganasan itu, menurut khabar angin yang tersebar di seluruh bandar, berakhir dengan Parti Demokratik yang kebanyakannya orang Kristian mengalahkan Parti Rakyat Nigeria yang secara umumnya parti Muslim.

src: Khaled Abubakar, the imam of the city's central mosque, made an estimate of the death toll.
ref: Khaled Abubakar, imam masjid pusat bandar itu, telah membuat anggaran jumlah kematian.

src: "So far about 400 bodies have been brought to the mosque following the outbreak of violence," he stated.
ref: "Sehingga kini kira-kira 400 mayat telah dibawa ke masjid berikutan pencetusan keganasan itu," katanya.

src: "Families are coming to identify and claim the bodies, while those that cannot be identified or are not claimed by anybody will be interred by the mosque."
ref: "Para keluarga akan datang untuk mengenalpasti dan menuntut mayat, sementara mereka yang tidak dikenalpasti atau dituntut akan dikebumikan oleh masjid."

src: A French journalist confirmed the reports of Abubakar, despite the fact that early reports showed only twenty deaths.
ref: Seorang wartawan Perancis mengesahkan laporan oleh Abubakar, walaupun laporan awal menunjukkan hanya dua puluh kematian.

src: Yakumu Pam, a Christian clergyman in Jos, also commented on the chaos.
ref: Yakumu Pam, seorang paderi Kristian di Jos, juga memberi komen tentang kekacauan tersbut.

src: "Hundreds of people have been killed in the last two days since the riots started," he stated.
ref: "Beratus orang telah terbunuh di dalam dua hari yang lepas sejak rusuhan bermula," katanya.

src: "Remains of burned bodies litter some parts of the town."
ref: "Abu mayat yang terbakar berselerak di beberapa bahagian bandar."

src: In an effort to stop the fighting, the army has been ordered to open fire on people, and to create a buffer zone between the Christians and the Muslims.
ref: Di dalam usaha untuk menghentikan pergaduhan, para tentera telah diarahkan untuk menembak orang ramai, dan mewujudkan zon penampan di antara orang Kristian dan Muslim.

src: Umaru Yar'Adua, the President of Nigeria, has stated that he is "very sad" about the ongoing violence.
ref: Umaru Yar'Adua, Presiden Nigeria, telah menyatakan yang beliau "sangat sedih" tentang keganasan yang berterusan itu.

src: Pakistani officials have said that a suicide bomber struck a crowded market today in northwest Pakistan, killing an anti-Taliban mayor.
ref: Pihak kerajaan Pakistan berkata seorang pengebom bunuh diri telah meletupkan dirinya di pasar yang penuh sesak hari ini di barat laut Pakistan, membunuh seorang datuk bandar anti-Taliban.

src: At least eleven other people were killed in the blast, and dozens were wounded.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya sebelas orang lain terbunuh di dalam letupan itu, dan berpuluh tercedera.

src: Initially, Mayor Abdul Malik was reported to have survived the attack in the Matni area on the outskirts of the city of Peshawar.
ref: Pada mulanya, Datuk Bandar Abdul Malik dilaporkan terselamat dari serangan tersebut di kawasan Matni di pinggir bandar Peshawar.

src: The market was crowded with shoppers ahead of the Muslim festival of Eid.
ref: Pasar itu penuh sesak dengan pelanggan sebelum perayaan Eid Muslim.

src: Officials said that Malik, a former Taliban supporter, had switched sides and raised a militia to fight the Taliban.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata Malik, bekas penyokong Taliban, telah bertukar pihak dan memulakan tentera awam militia untuk melawan Taliban.

src: He had survived several attempts on his life since shifting his allegiance.
ref: Dia telah terselamat dari beberapa percubaan untuk membunuhnya sejak menukar kesetiaannya.

src: "Malik had survived several attacks on his life in the recent past, since he turned against the militants," said the top Peshawar official, Sahibzada Anis.
ref: "Malik telah terselamat dari beberapa percubaan untuk membunuhnya pada masa yang lalu, sejak dia berpaling menentang militan," kata pegawai Peshawar tertinggi, Sahibzada Anis.

src: Vodafone McLaren Mercedes driver Heikki Kovalainen won the FIA Formula One 2008 ING Magyar Nagydíj at the Hungaroring, Budapest, Hungary on Sunday.
ref: Pemandu Vodafone McLaren Mercedes Heikki Kovalainen memenangi Formula Satu FIA 2008 ING Magyar Nagydij di Hungaororing, Budapest, Hungary pada hari Ahad.

src: It was the first Grand Prix win of Kovalainen's driving career and he became the 100th winner in Formula One history.
ref: Ia adalah Grand Prix pertama yang dimenangi oleh Kovalainen di dalam kerjaya pemanduannya dan dia menjadi pemenang ke-100 di dalam sejarah Formula Satu.

src: Ferrari driver Felipe Massa had dominated the race since the start when he overtook both McLaren front line sitters - first Kovalainen and then Lewis Hamilton.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari Felipe Massa telah menguasai perlumbaan sejak permulaan apabila dia memotong kedua-dua McLaren yang berada di barisan hadapan - pertama Kovalainen dan kemudian Lewis Hamilton.

src: During the first part of the race, Hamilton punctured his front tyre and lost more positions as well as his hopes of winning.
ref: Semasa bahagian pertama perlumbaan itu, tayar hadapan Hamilton telah pancit dan kehilangan lebih banyak tempat dan juga harapan untuk menang.

src: It seemed that Ferrari had the race in the pocket, but on the dying laps, Massa's engine was consumed by fire and he stopped on the main straight.
ref: Ferrari kelihatan seperti akan memenangi perlumbaan tetapi di dalam pusingan akhir, enjin Massa telah terbakar dan dia terhenti di bahagian lurus utama.

src: Kovalainen took the opportunity to rush to the finish line.
ref: Kovalainen mengambil kesempatan itu untuk memecut ke penamat.

src: Timo Glock did a brilliant job for his Toyota team, taking the second place.
ref: Timo Glock telah menunjukkan keputusan yang baik untuk pasukan Toyotanya, dengan mendapat tempat kedua.

src: He qualified in fifth place and was in third until Massa went out.
ref: Dia layak dengan tempat kelima dan di tempat ketiga sehingga Massa terkeluar.

src: The race became the first podium finish for Timo Glock, too.
ref: Timo Glock juga telah menaiki podium untuk kali pertama di perlumbaan itu.

src: Still, his position was in danger from Kimi Räikkönen, who was racing close to Timo, but slowed down to secure his third place.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kedudukannya diancam Kimi Raikkonen, yang berlumba rapat dengan Timo, tetapi mengurangkan kelajuan untuk menjamin tempat ketiganya.

src: Renault drivers Fernando Alonso and Nelsinho Piquet finished fourth and sixth, respectively.
ref: Pemandu-pemandu Renault Fernando Alonso dan Nelsinho Piquet masing-masing tamat di tempat keempat dan keenam.

src: They improved from their starting positions of seventh and tenth respectively.
ref: Mereka bertambah baik dari kedudukan permulaan masing-masing di kedudukan ketujuh dan kesepuluh.

src: The top eight was rounded out by pole Robert Kubica from BMW Sauber.
ref: Lapan pelumba terbaik telah ditamatkan oleh pelumba petak pertama Robert Kubica dari BMW Sauber.

src: Two other Renault-engined cars of Mark Webber and David Coulthard (Red Bull team) — split by Nick Heidfeld (BMW Sauber) — were the last cars to finish on the lead lap.
ref: Dua lagi kereta berenjin Renault kepunyaan Mark Webber dan David Coulthard (pasukan Red Bull) - dipecahkan oleh Nick Heidfeld (BMW Sauber) - adalah kereta-kereta terakhir yang tamat di pusingan pendahulu.

src: TheHonda and Williams teams, as well as Giancarlo Fisichella from Force India were all lapped.
ref: Pasukan-pasukan Honda dan Williams, dan juga Giancarlo Fisichella dari Force India telah dipotong.

src: Two men were hanged Iran on Thursday, following their conviction for playing a role in the bombing of a Shiraz mosque, which killed thirteen people, last April.
ref: Dua lelaki telah digantung di Iran pada hari Khamis, berikutan sabitan mereka yang memainkan peranan di dalam letupan bom di sebuah masjid Shiraz, di mana tiga belas orang terbunuh, April lepas.

src: After the June election, which was widely disputed, there were several weeks of demonstrations and protests, which saw 4,000 people arrested by the authorities in a crackdown, among them journalists and reformist politicians.
ref: Selepas pilihan raya di bulan Jun, yang dipertikaikan umum, tunjuk perasaan dan mogok berlaku beberapa minggu, di mana 4,000 orang telah ditangkap oleh pihak berkuasa dengan tindakan keras, di antaranya wartawan dan ahli politik reformis.

src: Opposition groups asserted that the elections were rigged to favour president Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, but the government denied it, saying it was a foreign-backed attempt to discredit the Iranian government system.
ref: Kumpulan penentang menegaskan pilihan raya itu dimanipulasi untuk menyokong presiden Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, tetapi kerajaan tersebut menafikannya, mengatakan ia adalah percubaan yang disokong pihak asing untuk mencemarkan nama baik sistem kerajaan Iran.

src: Libyan leader Muammar al-Gaddafi has said that Nigeria should be divided into two separate nations to avoid further violence between Muslims and Christians.
ref: Pemimpin Libya Muammar al-Gaddafi telah berkata Nigeria patut dibahagikan kepada dua negara berlainan untuk mengelakkan rusuhan berterusan di antara orang Muslim dan Kristian.

src: He was quoted as saying that the spilt "would stop the bloodshed and burning of places of worship."
ref: Beliau dipetik berkata pembahagian itu "akan menghentikan pertumpahan darah dan pembakaran rumah-rumah ibadat."

src: During his speech to students, Gaddafi spoke about the partition of India.
ref: Semasa ucapannya kepada para pelajar, Gaddafi bercakap tentang pemecahan India.

src: He called that division a "historic, radical solution" which saved the lives of "millions of Hindus and Muslims," despite reports that one million people were killed.
ref: Beliau memanggil pembahagian itu sebagai satu"penyelesaian bersejarah dan radikal" yang telah menyelamatkan nyawa "berjuta-juta orang Hindu dan Muslim," walaupun laporan mengatakan satu juta orang telah terbunuh.

src: He also called the recent violence in Jos a "deep conflict of a religious nature," and put the blame on the British stating that the federal state was imposed by Britain.
ref: Beliau juga memanggil rusuhan ganas baru-baru ini di Jos sebagai satu "percanggahan agama yang mendalam," dan menuduh pihak Britain dengan menyatakan negara persekutuan itu telah dikawal oleh Britain.

src: Around 100 people have died already this year in violence near the city of Jos.
ref: Kira-kira 100 orang awam telah mati tahun ini di dalam keganasan berdekatan bandar Jos.

src: A senior Nigerian diplomat responded to Gaddafi's comments saying that he "did not take the suggestion seriously."
ref: Seorang diplomat kanan Nigeria menjawab kepada komen Gaddafi dengan mengatakan bahawa beliau "tidak mengambil cadangan itu secara serius."

src: Patsy Calton from Bramhall, Cheshire, England, a Liberal Democrat MP for the Cheadle constituency died at age 56 from cancer on Sunday May 29.
ref: Patsy Calton dari Brahmall, Cheshire, England, seorang MP Demokrat Liberal untuk kawasan pengundian Cheadle meninggal dunia pada umur 56 tahun disebabkan barah pada hari Ahad 29 Mei.

src: The Liberal Democrat party leader Charles Kennedy described her as a "spirited and courageous" politician.
ref: Pemimpin parti Demokrat Liberal Charles Kennedy menggambarkannya sebagai seorang ahli politik yang "bersemangat dan berani."

src: She was first elected to the Cheadle constituency by the slim margin of 33 votes in the 2001 election.
ref: Beliau pertama kali terpilih untuk kawasan pengundian Cheadle dengan kelebihan tipis 33 undi di dalam pilihan raya 2001 itu.

src: She was then re-elected just 24 days before her death with a greatly increased majority of 4020, in spite of not campaigning herself due to the illness.
ref: Beliau kemudian dipilih sekali lagi 24 hari sebelum kematiannya dengan undian majoriti 4020, pertambahan yang besar, walaupun beliau sendiri tidak berkempen disebabkan penyakitnya.

src: She was a staunch supporter of a ban on smoking in enclosed public spaces.
ref: Beliau adalah penyokong kuat terhadap larangan merokok di tempat awam yang tertutup.

src: Acting as the party's health spokesman, she supported the Bath Liberal Democrats anti-smoking initiatives in the 2004 spring conference.
ref: Bertugas sebagai jurucakap kesihatan parti itu, beliau menyokong usaha anti-merokok Demokrat Liberal Bath di persidangan musim bunga 2004.

src: She is survived by her husband Clive Calton, who worked as her researcher at the House of Commons, and her son and two daughters.
ref: Beliau meninggalkan suami Clive Calton, yang bertugas sebagai penyelidiknya di Dewan Rakyat, dan seorang anak lelaki dan dua anak perempuan.

src: Talks between the European Union Trade Commissioner Peter Mandelson and Chinese Commerce Minister Bo Xilai, held today in Beijing, brought no compromise on unblocking 80 milion pieces of Chinese textiles impounded in the EU.
ref: Perbincangan di antara Pesuruhjaya Perdagangan Kesatuan Eropah Peter Mandelson dan Menteri Perdagangan China Bo Xilai, telah diadakan hari ini di Beijing, membawa tiada kompromi dalam melepaskan sekatan 80 juta helai tekstil China yang ditahan di EU.

src: The clothing is held in European warehouses due to overshoot of the China-to-the-EU export quotas.
ref: Pakaian tersebut ditahan di gudang Eropah disebabkan kuota eksport China ke EU yang melampaui kuota.

src: In June, the EU member states agreed to raise the limit by approximately 10%, but EU importers and Chinese producers continue to push for a greater amount of trade.
ref: Pada bulan Jun, negara-negara EU bersetuju untuk menaikkan hadnya dengan lebih kurang 10%, tetapi pengimport EU dan pengeluar China terus menekan untuk jumlah perdagangan yang lebih besar.

src: Concerns on textiles imported from Asia have split the EU countries: those with strong retail sector support increasing the quotas, while others, which have large clothing industries (Spain, Portugal, Italy) want to keep, or even reduce, limits in the future.
ref: Kebimbangan tentang tekstil yang diimport dari Asia telah memecahkan negara-negara EU: mereka dengan sektor jualan runcit yang kuat menyokong penambahan kuota, sementara yang lain, yang mempunya industri pakaian yang besar (Spain, Portugal, Italy) hendak menjaga, ataupun mengurangkan, had pada masa hadapan.

src: A similar dispute exists between China and the United States.
ref: Perbalahan yang serupa wujud di antara China dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: On Friday, George W. Bush's administration announced new quotas on imports of Chinese bras and synthetic fabric, after negotiations between both countries broke down.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, pentadbiran George W. Bush mengumumkan kuota baru terhadap pengimportan coli dan kain sintetik China, selepas perundingan diadakan di antara kedua-dua negara.

src: Bill Gwatney, chairman of the Democratic Party of Arkansas, died this afternoon at 3:59 pm CDT (UTC-5) after having been shot earlier this morning.
ref: Bill Gwatney, pengerusi Parti Demokratik dari Arkansas, telah meninggal dunia petang ini pada pukul 3:59 pm CDT (UTC-5) selepas ditembak awal pagi ini.

src: The suspect is Tim Johnson, a white male, described by Gwatney's secretary as wearing "khaki pants, white shirt, silver-gray hair, late 40s."
ref: Suspek adalah Tim Johnson, seorang lelaki kulit putih, digambarkan oleh setiausaha Gwatney sebagai memakai "seluar khaki, kemeja putih, rambut putih, berumur lewat 40-an."

src: He reportedly walked into the party headquarters facilities in Little Rock, Arkansas, conversed with the Chairman's secretary, refused her offer of bumper stickers, and then walked past her saying he had to see the Chairman.
ref: Dia dilaporkan berjalan masuk ke dalam ibu pejabat parti itu di Little Rock, Arkansas, berbual dengan setiausaha Pengerusi itu, menolak tawaran pelekat bampar, dan kemudian berjalan melewatinya dan berkata dia harus berjumpa Pengerusi tersebut.

src: After the shooting, Johnson got into his blue Chevrolet pickup truck and led police on a 25-mile chase.
ref: Selepas tembakan itu, Johnson menaiki lori pikap Chevrolet birunya dan dikejar polis sejauh 25 mile.

src: The end result was the shooting of the suspect, who was airlifted to a hospital and eventually died of his wounds.
ref: Akhirnya, suspek ditembak, dan diterbangkan ke hospital dan mati disebabkan kecederaannya.

src: According to The New York Times, Bill Clinton and Hillary Clinton issued a joint statement saying, "We are stunned and shaken by today's shooting at the Arkansas Democratic Party where our good friend and fellow Democrat Bill Gwatney was critically wounded ...
ref: Menurut The New York Times, Bill Clinton dan Hillary Clinton membuat kenyataan bersama dan berkata, "Kami terkejut dan tergamam dengan tembakan hari ini di Parti Demokratik Arkansas di mana rakan baik kami dan ahli Demokrat Bill Gwatney telah cedera parah...

src: Bill is not only a strong chairman of Arkansas' Democratic Party, but he is also a cherished friend and confidante."
ref: Bill bukan sahaja seorang pengerusi Parti Demokratik Arkansas'yang kuat, beliau juga rakan dan tempat mengadu yang disayangi."

src: Gwatney was also a car dealership owner and former state senator.
ref: Gwatney juga adalah pemilik perniagaan kereta dan bekas ahli senat negeri.

src: David Hempleman-Adams left St. John's at approximately 9:30 p.m. local time on July 2, 2007 from St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador in a small helium filed balloon in an attempt to make the Trans-Atlantic crossing in the smallest balloon ever to make such a crossing.
ref: David Hempleman-Adams meninggalkan St. John's pada lebih kurang pukul 9:30 malam waktu tempatan pada 2 Julai, 2007 dari St. John's, Newfoundland dan Labrador di dalam belon kecil yang berisi helium di dalam satu percubaan merentas-Atlantik di dalam belon terkecil yang akan membuat rentasan tersebut.

src: The final destination of the landing is not known and will be determined as the flight nears its end.
ref: Destinasi terakhir untuk mendarat masih belum diketahui dan akan diputuskan apabila penerbangan hampir berakhir.

src: The craft is made of light weight material with just enough space for necessary equipment and cooking implements.
ref: Pesawat itu dibuat dari bahan-bahan ringan dengan ruang yang cukup untuk kelengkapan yang penting dan alat-alat memasak.

src: The basket is small and has openings in the side for Hempleman-Adams to extend his legs as he sleeps.
ref: Bakulnya kecil dan mempunyai lubang-lubang di tepi untuk Hempleman-Adams meluruskan kakinya semasa dia tidur.

src: Hempleman-Adams is hoping to make the crossing in three to four days and reach Europe by July 5 or 6th.
ref: Hempleman-Adams berharap untuk membuat rentasan itu dalam masa tiga ke empat hari dan sampai ke Eropah sebelum 5 atau 6 Julai.

src: Russian president Dmitriy Medvedev met with the Khaled Meshaal, leader of the Hamas group, earlier this week in Syria, prompting criticism from Israel.
ref: Presiden Rusia Dmitriy Medvedev bertemu dengan Khaled Meshaal, pemimpin kumpulan Hamas, awal minggu ini di Syria, yang membawa kritikan daripada Israel.

src: Medvedev, during the meeting, had encouraged Hamas to reconciliate with rival Fatah; a spokeswoman quoted him as saying that "no one" should be left out of the peace process.
ref: Medvedev, semasa mesyuarat itu, telah menggalakkan Hamas untuk berdamai dengan musuhnya Fatah; seorang jurucakap memetik beliau sebagai berkata bahawa "tiada siapa" harus ketinggalan dalam proses pendamaian ini.

src: He also requested that an Israeli soldier captured by Hamas in 2006, Gilad Shalit, be released, although this was refused by Hamas, who says that Shalit wouldn't be released unless there was an "honourable" prisoner exchange with Israel.
ref: Beliau juga meminta agar seorang askar Israel yang ditawan oleh Hamas pada tahun 2006, Gilad Shalit, dibebaskan, walaupun ini telah ditolak oleh Hamas, yang mengatakan bahawa Shalit tidak akan dibebaskan kecuali terdapat satu pertukaran tahanan "mulia" dengan Israel.

src: Shortly before his conversation with Meshaal, Medvedev also held a meeting with Syrian president Bashar al-Assad.
ref: Tidak lama sebelum perbualannya dengan Meshaal, Medvedev turut mengadakan pertemuan dengan presiden Syria Bashar al-Assad.

src: A statement by the Israeli foreign ministry read: "Hamas is a terror organization whose declared goal is the destruction of the state of Israel.
ref: Menurut kenyataan Kementerian Luar Israel membaca: "Hamas adalah sebuah pertubuhan pengganas yang mengisytiharkan matlamatnya adalah kemusnahan negara Israel."

src: Hamas is responsible for the murder of hundreds of innocent civilians, among them immigrants from the Soviet Union and also Russian citizens.
ref: Hamas bertanggungjawab kerana membunuh ratusan orang awam yang tidak berdosa, di antara mereka pendatang dari Kesatuan Soviet dan juga rakyat Rusia.

src: "Israel has always stood by Russia in its struggle against the Chechnyan terrorism.
ref: "Israel sentiasa berada di sisi Rusia dalam perjuangannya menentang keganasan Chechnya.

src: We expect the same attitude when we are talking about the Hamas terrorism against Israel."
ref: Kami menjangkakan sikap yang sama apabila kita bercakap mengenai keganasan Hamas menentang Israel."

src: Ha'aretz, an Israeli newspaper, described the meeting as being "a surprise" for the country.
ref: Ha'aretz, sebuah akhbar Israel, menyifatkan pertemuan itu sebagai "satu kejutan" untuk negara itu.

src: Andrei Nesterenko, a spokesman for the Russian foreign ministry, responded to Israel's comments, saying: "Hamas is not an artificial structure.
ref: Andrei Nesterenko, jurucakap Kementerian Luar Rusia, memberi maklum balas kepada komen Israel, berkata: "Hamas bukanlah struktur buatan.

src: It is a movement that draws on the trust and sympathy of a large number of Palestinians.
ref: Ia adalah sebuah gerakan yang ditubuhkan daripada kepercayaan dan simpati sebilangan besar rakyat Palestin.

src: "It is known that all other participants of the Middle East quartet are also in some sort of contact with Hamas leadership, although for some unknown reason they are shy to publicly admit it."
ref: "Telah diketahui bahawa semua peserta lain di kuartet Timur Tengah juga berada dalam beberapa jenis hubungan dengan pemimpin Hamas, walaupun atas sebab-sebab tertentu yang tidak diketahui mereka malu untuk mengakuinya secara terbuka."

src: Only a few countries in Europe, including Russia, maintain ties with Hamas; the European Union and the United States regard it as a terrorist organisation.
ref: Hanya beberapa negara di Eropah, termasuk Rusia, mengekalkan hubungan dengan Hamas; Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat menganggapnya sebagai sebuah organisasi pengganas.

src: Saturday evening, at approximately 7:00 p.m. PST on Mt. Washington in Los Angeles, California, a brush fire broke out on the southwestern side of the hill.
ref: Petang Sabtu, pada kira-kira 7:00 p.m. PST dekat Mt. Washington di Los Angeles, California, api belukar meletus di sebelah barat daya bukit.

src: Firefighters were on the scene by 8:30 p.m. with fire trucks, paramedic units, surveillance helicopters, and water-equipped helicopters.
ref: Anggota bomba berada di tempat kejadian pada 8:30 p.m. dengan trak bomba, unit paramedik, helikopter pengawasan, dan helikopter yang dilengkapi air.

src: Two fire trucks blasted water at the blaze from higher up on the mountain, while every minute or so, a water-equipped helicopter would swoop down over the flames and release its payload.
ref: Dua trak bomba memancurkan air pada api dari kawasan lebih tinggi di atas gunung, manakala setiap lebih kurang seminit, helikopter dilengkapi air akan menyambar atas api dan melepaskan muatannya.

src: At the top of the hill, there were five fire trucks and one paramedic unit; the three main entrances to the mountain were barricaded off by fire trucks.
ref: Di puncak bukit, terdapat lima trak bomba dan satu unit paramedik; tiga pintu masuk utama ke gunung itu telah dikurung oleh trak bomba.

src: By approximately 9:15 p.m., the flame was entirely extinguished, thanks mainly to the water-equipped helicopters.
ref: Pada kira-kira 9:15 p.m., api telah dipadamkan sepenuhnya, terima kasih terutamanya kepada helikopter yang dilengkapi air.

src: Firefighters were offering bystanders bottles of water and Gatorade to help combat the effects of standing near an open flame.
ref: Anggota bomba telah menawarkan penonton botol air dan Gatorade untuk membantu menangani kesan berdiri berhampiran nyalaan api.

src: Three are dead after a tornado hit Cincinnati, a small town in Arkansas, about three miles from Oklahoma’s border.
ref: Tiga mati selepas puting beliung melanda Cincinnati, sebuah bandar kecil di Arkansas, kira-kira tiga batu dari sempadan Oklahoma.

src: Around 6:00 local time, on Friday, the system, fed by warm winter air, caused several injuries, damaging the power grid.
ref: Kira-kira pukul 6:00 waktu tempatan, pada hari Jumaat, sistem tersebut, disokong oleh udara suam musim sejuk, telah menyebabkan beberapa kecederaan, merosakkan grid kuasa.

src: Josh Howerton, the county’s sheriff’s dispatcher, stated that the storm touched down near the town’s center.
ref: Josh Howerton, penghantar kepada sherif daerah tersebut, menyatakan bahawa ribut mendarat berhampiran dengan pusat bandar.

src: A tornado warning for Cincinnati and nearby towns was issued by the Tulsa weather center nine minutes before the storm struck.
ref: Sebuah amaran puting beliung untuk Cincinnati dan bandar-bandar berdekatan telah dikeluarkan oleh pusat cuaca Tulsa sembilan minit sebelum ribut melanda.

src: "Any time you have a significant change in air mass there is going to be unsettled weather marking the two different air masses," said Joe Sellers, a meteorologist from the National Weather Service in Oklahoma.
ref: "Bila-bila masa anda mengalami perubahan yang ketara dalam jisim udara dimana akan dapat ketidaktenteraman cuaca menandakan dua jisim udara yang berbeza," kata Joe Penjual, seorang ahli meteorologi dari Perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan di Oklahoma.

src: Alain Corneau, a French film director, has died at the age of 67.
ref: Alain Corneau, seorang pengarah filem Perancis, telah meninggal dunia pada usia 67.

src: Born on August 7, 1943, Corneau's first interest was music.
ref: Dilahirkan pada 7 Ogos 1943, minat pertama Corneau adalah muzik.

src: Before the success of his first film, Corneau attempted to make a documentary about New York and an adaptation of a novel.
ref: Sebelum kejayaan filem pertamanya, Corneau cuba untuk membuat dokumentari mengenai New York dan sebuah adaptasi daripada novel.

src: After working as assistant director on L'Aveu with Costa Gavras he directed his first film in 1973, France, Inc.
ref: Selepas bekerja sebagai Penolong Pengarah untuk L'Aveu bersama Costa Gavras dia mengarahkan filem pertamanya pada tahun 1973, France, Inc.

src: Corneau's other films include La Menace, Fort Saganne, and the highly successful Tous les matins du monde.
ref: Filem-filem lain Corneau termasuk La Menace, Fort Saganne, dan yang sangat berjaya Tous les matins du monde.

src: Tous les matins du monde received 11 César Award nominations and won seven of them.
ref: Tous les matins du monde menerima 11 pencalonan Anugerah César dan memenangi tujuh daripadanya.

src: The awards included Best Film, Best Director, and Best Music.
ref: Anugerah itu termasuk Filem Terbaik, Pengarah Terbaik dan Muzik Terbaik.

src: Corneau said in a 1992 interview in the New York Times that "Many people got emotional about this film, and that made it possible for it to escape cult status."
ref: Corneau berkata pada satu temubual pada tahun 1992 dalam New York Times bahawa "Ramai orang menjadi emosi tentang filem ini, dan itu yang membolehkannya untuk melarikan diri dari status pujaan."

src: French President Nicolas Sarkozy commented on the death of Corneau.
ref: Presiden Perancis Nicolas Sarkozy mengulas mengenai kematian Corneau.

src: He said "Corneau was a courageous man and a great director."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Corneau adalah seorang yang berani dan seorang pengarah yang hebat."

src: Corneau was set to appear at the Toronto Film Festival in September.
ref: Corneau telah ditetapkan untuk muncul di Festival Filem Toronto pada bulan September.

src: Caloundra lead Glasshouse by 153 runs at stumps on day two of the 2010 Sunshine Coast, Australia division one cricket grand final.
ref: Caloundra mengatasi Glasshouse dengan 153 larian pada wiket di hari kedua divisyen satu pusingan akhir kriket 2010 Sunshine Coast, Australia.

src: "I think the nerves of a grand final gets to you too.
ref: "Saya rasa gementar pusingan akhir mempengaruhi awak juga.

src: You try and put it in the back of your mind but it’s still there,” Glasshouse captain Brett Milini said.
ref: Awak cuba meletakkannya di belakang kepala awak tetapi ia masih di situ," kata kapten Glasshouse Brett Milini.

src: Caloundra were all out in their first inning for 193.
ref: Caloundra berhempas-pulas di dalam babak pertama mereka untuk 193.

src: I thought 250 was a par score and I thought we were in with a big chance,” Milini said.
ref: Saya fikir 250 adalah nilai par dan saya fikir kami masuk dengan peluang besar," kata Milini.

src: "If we were good enough, we should have got that pretty easy but we didn’t bat well today."
ref: "Kalau kita cukup bagus, kita sepatutnya menang dengan cukup mudah tetapi kita tidak memukul dengan baik hari ini."

src: Caloundra rounded out day two at six out for fifty seven, leaving Glasshouse an outside chance of snatching the championship.
ref: Caloundra menamatkan hari kedua pada enam keluar untuk lima puluh tujuh, meninggalkan Glasshouse di luar peluang untuk merampas kejohanan itu.

src: “We’ve given ourselves another chance but if we bat like we did in the first innings, we’re already gone,” he said.
ref: "Kami telah memberi diri sendiri peluang sekali lagi tetapi jika kita memukul seperti yang kami lakukan dalam babak pertama, kami sudah kalah," katanya.

src: “It should be a real good game, it’s interesting cricket.”
ref: "Ia sepatutnya perlawanan sebenar yang bagus, ia adalah kriket yang menarik."

src: Results for the second division, third B division, southern fourth division and fifth division traditional grand finals have not been accessible to Wikinews as of this report
ref: Keputusan untuk divisyen kedua, divisyen ketiga B, divisyen keempat selatan dan divisyen kelima pusingan akhir tradisional belum boleh dicapai oleh Wikinews semasa laporan ini.

src: A minimum of 85 Hindu pilgrims have been killed in India and 64 injured after their lorry and trailer plunged 24m (80ft) into a river gorge late last night.
ref: Terdapat sekurang-kurangnya 85 orang penganut Hindu telah terbunuh di India dan 64 tercedera selepas lori dan treler yang dinaiki mereka terjunam 24m (80 kaki) ke dalam gaung sungai lewat malam tadi.

src: Approximately 150 people were on board when the driver lost control on a sharp bend near the village of Nagbavji, Rajasthan, smashing through a concrete crash barrier and continuing down into the valley, coming to rest inverted.
ref: Kira-kira 150 orang penumpang didalamya semasa pemandu hilang kawalan di selekoh tajam berhampiran perkampungan Nagbavji, Rajasthan, menghentam sebuah halangan kemalangan konkrit dan terus jatuh ke lembah, menjadikannya berkeadaan terbalik.

src: An overnight rescue operation was initiated, removing both survivors and bodies of the dead from the wreck, with the aid of cranes and spotlights.
ref: Operasi menyelamat dimulakan serta merta, mengeluarkan kedua-dua mangsa dan mayat yang mati dari bangkai kenderaan, dengan bantuan kren dan lampu sorot.

src: Ambulances and medical teams rushed to the scene from surrounding areas.
ref: Ambulans dan pasukan perubatan bergegas ke tempat kejadian dari kawasan sekitar.

src: Of the 64 who were hospitalised, three are reported to be in critical condition.
ref: Daripada 64 yang dimasukkan ke hospital, tiga dilaporkan berada dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: The Press Trust of India reported that as many as 130 were injured, and Al Jazeera reported that there may have been 200 people on board.
ref: Press Trust of India melaporkan bahawa sebanyak 130 cedera, dan Al Jazeera melaporkan bahawa mungkin terdapat 200 orang penumpang didalamnya.

src: It is believed the death toll could rise still further, as many people remain trapped beneath the trailer.
ref: Adalah dipercayai angka kematian masih lagi boleh meningkat, kerana ramai orang yang terperangkap di bawah treler.

src: The truck was a 12-wheeled model designed for hauling shipping containers, and was carrying pilgrims from three nearby villages Shiwal, Madri and Bhawa.
ref: Truk adalah model 12 roda direka untuk mengangkut kontena penghantaran, dan membawa jemaah dari tiga buah kampung berdekatan Shiwal, Madri dan Bhawa.

src: The driver had offered to take them to their destination for free, a practise common in India, despite the fact that such trucks are not safe for passenger transport, being designed primarily as freight transporters.
ref: Pemandu itu telah menawarkan untuk membawa mereka ke destinasi mereka secara percuma, perkara yang biasa di India, walaupun pada hakikatnya bahawa lori itu tidak selamat untuk pengangkutan penumpang, yang direka terutamanya sebagai pengangkut barang.

src: The vehicle had been destined for the temple of Ramdev, a site considered by both Hindus and Muslims as being of high spiritual significance.
ref: Kenderaan itu telah ditujukan untuk ke kuil Ramdev, sebuah tapak yang dianggap oleh Hindu dan Muslim sebagai mempunyai maksud spiritual yang tinggi.

src: The temple is the subject of an annual ten-day pilgrimage every September, which begins on September 13, although most of the 250,000 pilgrims who flock to the site arrive several days in advance of the festival.
ref: Kuil ini merupakan tumpuan bagi jemaah sepuluh hari pada setiap bulan September setiap tahun, yang bermula pada 13 September, walau bagaimanapun kebanyakan daripada 250,000 jemaah yang berduyun-duyun ke tapak ini tiba beberapa hari sebelum perayaan itu.

src: The Chief Minister of Rajasthan Vasundhara Raje visited the three villages in which the victims resided.
ref: Ketua Menteri Rajasthan Vasundhara Raje melawat tiga buah kampung di mana mangsa ditempatkan.

src: The local government has initiated a full inquiry into the disaster.
ref: Kerajaan tempatan telah memulakan siasatan penuh bencana tersebut.

src: The ringleaders of the so-called Bali Nine were today sentenced to death by a Denpasar court.
ref: Ketua-ketua geng yang diberi nama Bali Nine hari ini dijatuhi hukuman mati oleh mahkamah Denpasar.

src: Andrew Chan received the news via translators at about 3:45 p.m. AEDT, and Myuran Sukumaran was sentenced at about 4:50 p.m. AEDT.
ref: Andrew Chan menerima berita itu melalui penterjemah pada kira-kira 3:45 p.m. AEDT, dan Myuran Sukumaran dijatuhi hukuman pada kira-kira 4:50 p.m. AEDT.

src: The two were charged with attempting to smuggle 8.3 kg of heroin from Bali to Australia.
ref: Kedua-dua mereka didakwa cuba menyeludup 8.3 kg heroin dari Bali ke Australia.

src: The Australian Federal Police have been criticised for allowing the Bali Nine to travel to Indonesia, where it was known they could face the death penalty.
ref: Polis Persekutuan Australia telah dikritik kerana membenarkan Bali Nine bergerak ke Indonesia, di mana ia diketahui mereka boleh dikenakan hukuman mati.

src: Yesterday two other drug mules, Renae Lawrence and Scott Rush, were sentenced to life imprisonment.
ref: Semalam dua pembawa dadah lain, Renae Lawrence dan Scott Rush, dijatuhi hukuman penjara seumur hidup.

src: Chan was alleged to be the mastermind of the operation, and Myuran was alleged to be an enforcer.
ref: Chan didakwa menjadi dalang operasi, dan Myuran didakwa sebagai penguatkuasa.

src: Chan, who claimed to have rediscovered his Christian faith, prayed for divine intervention prior to the sentence being handed down.
ref: Chan, yang mendakwa telah menjumpai semula iman Kristiannya, berdoa untuk campur tangan kuasa tuhan sebelum hukuman itu sedang dijatuhkan.

src: Chan fell over after jostling with a media scrum, and Sukumaran threw a bottle of water at the media.
ref: Chan rebah selepas bersesakan dengan segerombolan pihak media, manakala Sukumaran melemparkan botol air ke arah pihak media.

src: Donald Rothwell, a Professor of International Law at the University of Sydney, has said that, unlike countries such as Singapore, it may not be long before the two are executed.
ref: Donald Rothwell, Profesor Undang-undang Antarabangsa di Universiti Sydney, telah berkata bahawa, tidak seperti negara-negara seperti Singapura, ia mungkin tidak mengabil masa yang lama sebelum kedua-duanya dilaksanakan hukuman.

src: "The Indonesian judicial system is one in which death sentences are often carried out very quickly," he said.
ref: "Sistem kehakiman Indonesia adalah salah satu di mana hukuman mati sering dijalankan dengan sangat cepat," katanya.

src: "So unlike the situation of Van Nguyen in Singapore, where an appeal process and a clemency process played out over quite some time, this may not be the situation in Bali."
ref: "Jadi tidak seperti keadaan Van Nguyen di Singapura, di mana proses rayuan dan proses pengampunan dijalankan agak lebih lama, ini mungkin bukan keadaan di Bali."

src: Foreign Affairs Minister Alexander Downer told parliament today that he had made a direct request to the Indonesian government that the death penalty not be imposed.
ref: Menteri Luar Alexander Downer memberitahu Parlimen hari ini bahawa dia telah membuat permintaan langsung kepada kerajaan Indonesia supaya hukuman mati tidak dikenakan.

src: "On the 18th of December last year, I wrote to the Indonesian Attorney-General reminding him that the Australian Government was opposed to the death sentence and we didn't want to see, in the context of the Bali nine, any of the Australians sentenced to death," he said.
ref: "Pada 18 Disember tahun lepas, saya telah menulis kepada Peguam Negara Indonesia mengingatkan beliau bahawa kerajaan Australia telah menentang hukuman mati dan kami tidak mahu melihat, dalam konteks Bali Nine, sesiapa daripada warga Australia dihukum mati," katanya.

src: In Bali the death sentence is carried out by firing squad.
ref: Di Bali hukuman mati dijalankan oleh skuad penembak.

src: Australia's Allan Davis won the 2009 Tour Down Under professional road cycling race.
ref: Warganegara Australia Allan Davis telah memenangi perlumbaan berbasikal lebuh raya profesional Jelajah Down Under 2009.

src: Sprint specialist Davis completed Sunday's final stage in the main pack to maintain the lead he had built up in time bonuses from sprint wins earlier in the race.
ref: Pakar pecut Davis menamatkan peringkat hari Ahad ini dalam kumpulan utama untuk mengekalkan kelebihan yang dia telah kumpulkan dalam bonus masa daripada pecutan yang dimenanginya dalam perlumbaan yang terdahulu.

src: 122 cyclists completed the six day race around a circuit starting and ending at Adelaide, South Australia.
ref: 122 pelumba menamatkan perlumbaan enam hari di seluruh litar yang bermula dan berakhir di Adelaide, South Australia.

src: American cyclist Lance Armstrong also participated in the race, his first professional bike race since the 2005 Tour de France.
ref: Pelumba Amerika Lance Armstrong juga telah mengambil bahagian dalam perlumbaan, perlumbaan basikal profesional pertama baginya sejak Tour de France 2005.

src: It is not clear if the seven-time Tour de France winner intended to compete for the general classification, but he did make an unsuccessful breakaway on Sunday in pursuit of a stage victory.
ref: Ianya tidak jelas jika pemenang tujuh kali Tour de France berhasrat untuk bersaing bagi klasifikasi umum, tetapi dia membuat pergerakan kehadapan yang tidak berjaya pada hari Ahad dalam mengejar kemenangan peringkat.

src: Despite several attacks over the week, Armstrong placed 29th in the general classification.
ref: Walaupun beberapa serangan sepanjang minggu, Armstrong di tempat ke-29 dalam klasifikasi umum.

src: The Philippine military said today that gunmen have seized at least 75 people, most of them schoolchildren, after a raid on a remote elementary school in the southern Philippines.
ref: Askar Filipina hari ini berkata lelaki bersenjata telah merampas sekurang-kurangnya 75 orang, kebanyakannya budak sekolah, selepas satu serbuan di sekolah kebangsaan terpencil di selatan Filipina.

src: Military officials said that about fifteen gunmen from the Manobo tribe abducted some of the residents of a village on the Mindanao island on Thursday.
ref: Askar rasmi berkata bahawa lebih kurang lima belas orang lelaki bersenjata dari puak Manobo menculik sebahgian dari penduduk kampung di pulau Mindanao pada hari Khamis.

src: The group, reportedly armed with M-14 and M-16 rifles, captured four teachers and the school principal of the New Maasim Elementary School, and an unknown number of students.
ref: Kumpulan itu, dilaporkan memiliki senapang M-14 dan M-16, menangkap empat guru sekolah dan guru besar di Sekolanh Kebangsaan New Maasim, dan jumlah pelajar yang tidak diketahui.

src: The seizure occurred shortly after the flag ceremony, when they were due to start classes.
ref: Serbuan itu berlaku sejurus selepas acara bendera, semasa meraka mahu memulakan kelas.

src: Two foresters for the Department of Environment and Natural Resources were also taken hostage.
ref: Dua pengawas hutan untuk Bahagian Alam Sekitar dan Sumber Asli juga diambil sebagai tebusan.

src: Negotiations are being made to release the captives, according to a local police chief.
ref: Perundingan telah dibuat untuk melepaskan tawanan, menurut ketua polis tempatan.

src: We are trying to find out how the others can be released," said Lino Calingasan to the Reuters news agency.
ref: Kami cuba mencari cara untuk orang lain dilepaskan," kata Lino Calingasan kepada agensi baru Reuters.

src: Local police have filed charges against the suspected kidnappers, however, they reported that the gunmen didn't seem to want to hurt or kill the hostages.
ref: Polis tempatan telah mengeluarkan waran kepada penculik yang dikehendaki, bagaimanapun, mereka melaporkan bahawa lelaki bersenjata itu tidak kelihatan untuk mencederakan atau membunuh tebusan.

src: Officials said that the gunmen appear to be using them as human shields to escape.
ref: Pejabat rasmi berkata bahawa lelaki bersenjata itu nampak untuk menggunakan mereka sebagai perisai manusi untuk melepaskan diri.

src: The southern Philippines suffers from frequent banditry, loosely supervised government-armed militias, and Muslim and communist insurgents.
ref: Selatan Filipina menderita dari kumpulan penjahat, kurang kawalan dari askar pertahanan kerajaan, dan muslim dan penjenayah komunis.

src: Last month, 57 people in an election convoy were massacred in the southern part of the Maguindanao province, which has since been placed under martial law.
ref: Bulan lepas, 57 orang di konvoi pilihan raya beramai-ramai di bahagian selatan daerah Maguidanao, yang telah diletakkan dibawah undang-undang negara.

src: On Tuesday, the United States Senate Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs's Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations held a hearing titled "Credit Card Practices: Unfair Interest Rate Increases."
ref: Pada Selasa lalu, Ahli Komuniti Senat Amerika Syarikat dalam Sub-Komunti Tetap Hal Ehwal Kerajaan dan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri dalam penyiasatan yang mendengarkan tajuk "Praktik Kad Kredit: Kadar Faedah Kenaikan ynag Tidak Adil."

src: The hearing examined the circumstances under which credit card issuers may increase the interest rates of cardholders who are in compliance with the terms of their credit cards.
ref: Perbicaraan itu menyiasat keadaan dimana pengeluar kad kredit mungkin akan menaikkan kadar faedah kepada pemegang kad yang tertakluk kepada terma kad kredit mereka.

src: Subcommittee Chairman Carl Levin said in his opening statement: "Today's focus is on credit card issuers who hike the interest rates of cardholders who play by the rules — meaning those folks who pay on time, pay at least the minimum amount due, and wake up one day to find their interest rate has gone through the roof — again, not because they paid late or exceeded the credit limit, but because their credit card issuer decided they should be 'repriced'."
ref: Pengerusi Sub-Komuniti Carl Levin berkata dalam kenyataan pembukaannya: "Fokus hari ini terhadap pengeluar kad kredit yang menikkan kadar faedah kepada pemegang kad yang bermain dengan syarat-- bermaksud seseiapa yang bayar pada masanya, bayar pada kadar minimum, dan bangun keesokan harinya dengan kadar faedah yang sudah hilang -- lagi sekali, bukan kerana mereka bayar lewat atau lebih limit, tetapi pengeluar kad kredit memutuskan mereka patut 'diberi harga semua'."

src: Present to testify on behalf of credit card issuers were Roger C. Hochschild of Discover Financial Services, Bruce L. Hammonds of Bank of America Corporation, and Ryan Schneider of Capital One Financial Corporation.
ref: Menyampaikan penyataan bagi pihak pengeluar kad kredit adalah Roger C. Hochschild dari Bahagian Khidmat Kewangan, Bruce L. Hammods dari Kesatuan Bank Amerika, dan Ryan Schneider dari Kesatuan Kewangan Capital One.

src: Much of the 90 minute hearing focused on specific cases where interest rates were raised, allegedly because credit scores of the debtor dropped, and not because they were delinquent or otherwise behind on payments.
ref: Sebanyak dari 90 minit pendengaran itu memfokuskan terhadap kes yang spesifik itu dimana kadar faedah dinaikkan, kerana skor kredit oleh penghutang menurun, dan bukan kerana mereka ingkar dan enggan membayar.

src: According to Levin, this practice made it so that almost all payments went towards finance charges with almost none toward repaying the principal.
ref: Menurut Levin, latihan ini dibuat supaya pembayaran akan dikenakan kadar cas dengan hampir tiada pembayaran lagi sekali.

src: This, he felt, is an unfair practice, as the credit card companies were negligent in informing their customers of the rate hikes and the reason for such hikes.
ref: Beliau merasakan ini kurang adil untuk latihan, kerana syarikat kad kredit dikecualikan dalam memberitahu pelanggan terhadap kenaikkan kadardan sebab kenaikkan.

src: The collective credit card debt of Americans totals an estimated US$900 billion.
ref: Hutang yang dikutip kad kredit Amerika dinaggarkan berjumlah US$900 billion.

src: Issuers have come under pressure to disclose their policies in regards to setting fees and interest rates.
ref: Pengeluar telah diletakkan dibawah tekanan untuk menutupkan polisi merka berkaitan menetapkan bayaran dan kadar kenaikan.

src: The US Truth in Lending Act requires that terms of a loan be set forth up front.
ref: Kejujuran US dalam Akta Pinjaman memerlukan bahawa terma untuk pinjaman perlu di tetapkan dihadapan.

src: Fluctuating interest rates on credit cards would, on the surface, appear to violate this act.
ref: Kadar faedah yang turun naik pada kad kredit mungkin, pada dasarnya, kelihatan melanggar akta ini.

src: Roger C. Hochschild disagreed, arguing that "every card transaction is a new extension of credit ...
ref: Roger C. Hochschild tidak setuju, berkeras bahawa "setiap transaksi kad kredit adalah tambahan kredit baru...

src: This makes it difficult — and risky — to underwrite, and price, the loan based solely on the borrower's credit-worthiness at the time of application [for the card]."
ref: Ini bertambah sukar - dan berisiko - untuk menulis dan harga, pinjaman berdasarkan semata-mata saksi kad lredit pada masa permohonan [untuk kad]."

src: Ryan Schneider, agreed: "The ability to modify the terms of a credit card agreement to accommodate changes over time to the economy or the credit-worthiness of consumers must be preserved."
ref: Ryan Schineider, setuju: "Keupayaan untuk menukar terma perjanjian kad kredit kepada penukaran tertentu kepada ekonomi atau pengguna kad kredit perlu di jaga."

src: "Attempts to interfere with the market here ... will inevitably result in less credit being offered," warned Bruce Hammonds.
ref: "Cubaan untuk menggangu dengan pasaran disini...akan mengelakan keputusan dalam kurang kredit yang ditawarkan," amaran dari Bruce Hammods.

src: All three credit card executives also mentioned an ongoing Federal Reserve System review of credit card rules that already proposes a 45-day notification ahead of any rate changes.
ref: Semua tiga kad kredit eksekutif itu juga disebut dalam Sistem Pembalikan Kesatuan untuk menilai semula peraturan kad kredit bahawa telah mencadangkan 45 hari peringatan kehadapan terhadap sebarang kadar tukaran.

src: Included in the criticism was the practice of mailing checks to card-holders, failing to notify applicants that obtaining additional cards could lower their credit score and raise their rates, and "ambushing" card-holders with raised rates.
ref: Termasuk kritikan dalam mempraktik untuk menyemak emel kepada pemegang kad, gagal untuk memberitahu pemohon bahawa menganbil kad tambahan mungkin mengurangkan skor kredit mereka dan menaikkan kadar, dan "menyerang" pemegang kad dengan menaikkan kadar.

src: Ranking minority member of the subcommittee, Norm Coleman said, "families find themselves ensnared in a seemingly inescapable web of credit card debt.
ref: Tahap minoriti ahli dalam sub-komuniti, Norm Coleman berkata, "keluarga mencari diri mereka terjerat dalama hutang kad kredit yang tidak dapat melarikan diri.

src: They particularly report being saddled with interest rates that skyrocketed on them seemingly out of the blue."
ref: Mereka dilaporkan kelihatan sedih dengan kadar faedah yang menjuman keatas meraka yang nampak seperti tidak masuk akal."

src: A peaceful protest in Sarajevo, lasting for several weeks so far, was ignited by a post on an online discussion board, Sarajevo-X.
ref: Satu protes aman di Sarajevo, berlanjutan selama beberapa minggu setakat ini, telah dinyalakan oleh satu paparan di papan perbincangan dalam talian, Sarajevo-X.

src: In a post named "Patriotism" one user, with nickname Stolac92, expressed his dissatisfaction with Bosnia today, writing among other things on December 22: "My heart hurts.
ref: Dalam paparan yang dinamakan "Patriotisme" seorang pengguna, dengan nama panggilan Stolac92, melahirkan rasa tidak puas hati dengan Bosnia hari ini, menulis pada 22 Disember salah satu ayat yang berbunyi: "Hati saya sakit.

src: But what hurts the most is that we are quiet, we are tolerating, forgiving instead of doing something about it."
ref: Tetapi apa yang paling menyakitkan adalah bahawa kita tenang, kita bertolak ansur disebalik melakukan sesuatu mengenainya."

src: After receiving support from other forum members, the user proposed gathering in front of the Assembly building every day, starting from 5pm.
ref: Selepas menerima sokongan daripada ahli-ahli forum yang lain, pengguna mencadangkan perhimpunan di hadapan bangunan Dewan Undangan setiap hari, bermula dari pukul 5 petang.

src: The protests started the same weekend, and had been lasting since, with couple to several dozen people attending.
ref: Protes itu bermula hujung minggu yang sama, dan telah berkekalan sejak itu, dengan beberapa orang sehingga beberapa dozen orang yang hadir.

src: Forum members decided they will not support any particular political party, but to work for Bosnia and Herzegovina without political ethnic entities and to support policies which are fair to all citizens and punish criminals.
ref: Ahli-ahli forum memutuskan mereka tidak akan menyokong mana-mana parti politik, tetapi bekerja untuk Bosnia dan Herzegovina tanpa entiti etnik politik dan untuk menyokong dasar-dasar yang adil kepada semua rakyat dan menghukum penjenayah.

src: They decided to use an open palm with a Bosnian map on it for their symbol, with word Dosta (Enough) as their slogan.
ref: Mereka memutuskan untuk menggunakan satu tapak tangan terbuka dengan peta Bosnia di atasnya sebagai simbol mereka, dengan perkataan Dosta (Cukuplah) sebagai slogan mereka.

src: Bosnia and Herzegovina has been divided in two ethnic entities since the end of the war, the Serbian Republic and Federation of Bosniaks and Croats.
ref: Bosnia dan Herzegovina telah dibahagikan dengan dua entiti etnik sejak perang berakhir, Republik Serbia dan Persekutuan Bosnia dan Croatia.

src: Economic progress has been slow and created disparity between people.
ref: Kemajuan ekonomi telah menjadi perlahan dan membentuk jurang di kalangan penduduk.

src: A bomb explosion on a bus in Myanmar (alternatively Burma) has killed a 55-year-old man and left another man wounded.
ref: Satu letupan bom di dalam bas di Myanmar (ataupun Burma) telah membunuh seorang lelaki berusia 55 tahun dan menyebabkan seorang lagi lelaki cedera.

src: The explosion occurred yesterday at 8:50 am local time (0220 GMT) as the bus traveled to Yangon, but state media has only posted news of the attack today.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku semalam pada pukul 8:50 pagi waktu tempatan (0220 GMT) semasa bas itu menuju ke Yangon, tetapi media kerajaan hanya menyiarkan berita serangan itu hari ini.

src: The deceased was identified only as Khant by the New Light of Myanmar, the Burmese government-owned daily newspaper.
ref: Mangsa itu hanya dikenali sebagai Khant oleh New Light of Myanmar, akhbar harian milik kerajaan Burma.

src: The article said that the injured man was 46-year-old Pa Pa and that he received a stomach injury.
ref: Artikel itu berkata lelaki tercedera itu berusia 46 tahun Pa Pa dan bahawa dia mengalami kecederaan perut.

src: The bus had 35 passengers traveling from Kyaukkyi, and was near Daik Oo, some 85 miles from its destination.
ref: Bas itu mempunyai 35 penumpang dalam perjalanan dari Kyaukkyi, dan berhampiran Daik Oo, kira-kira 85 batu dari destinasinya.

src: The bombing was blamed on insurgents, but it is unclear which group is responsible.
ref: Pengeboman itu telah disalahkan ke atas pemberontak, tetapi adalah tidak jelas kumpulan mana yang bertanggungjawab.

src: The ruling military junta is subject to attacks from a number of extremist groups opposed to its rule.
ref: Kumpulan tentera yang memerintah menghadapi serangan dari beberapa kumpulan pelampau yang menentang pemerintahannya.

src: A British High Court judge has ruled that Pringles are not a potato snack and therefore not subject to a 17.5% tax.
ref: Seorang hakim Mahkamah Tinggi Britain telah memutuskan bahawa Pringles bukan snek kentang dan oleh itu tidak tertakluk kepada cukai 17.5%.

src: The judge, Justice Nicholas Warren, overruled a Value Added Tax (VAT) Tribunal decision that imposed the 17.5% tax which is also applied on other potato products.
ref: Hakim itu, Hakim Nicholas Warren, menolak keputusan Cukai Nilai Tambah (VAT) yang mengenakan cukai 17.5% yang juga dikenakan atas produk kentang lain.

src: Pringles' owner Procter & Gamble had claimed at a ruling in May that Pringles do not feel, look, or taste like a crisp.
ref: Pemilik Pringles Procter & Gamble menuntut dalam satu keputusan pada bulan Mei yang Pringles tidak rasa, kelihatan, atau terasa seperti kerepek kentang.

src: Justice Warren ruled that since Pringles are only 42% potato, it is exempt from VAT.
ref: Hakim Warren memutuskan bahawa kerana Pringles hanya mengandungi 42% kentang, dikecualikan daripada VAT.

src: A deadly hotel bombing in Mogadishu, the capital of Somalia, has killed at least fifteen people, including three Somali Cabinet ministers, earlier today.
ref: Satu pengeboman maut hotel di Mogadishu, ibu negara Somalia, telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya lima belas orang, termasuk tiga menteri Kabinet Somalia, awal hari ini.

src: The blast targeted a university graduation ceremony being attended by a number of government officials.
ref: Letupan itu mensasarkan majlis graduasi universiti yang dihadiri oleh beberapa pegawai kerajaan.

src: The Shamo Hotel was hosting a graduation ceremony for Benadir University.
ref: Shamo Hotel telah menganjurkan istiadat majils graduasi untuk Universiti Benadir.

src: Eyewitnesses reported that a suicide bomber gained access to the venue dressed as a woman, donning a full abaya and a veil.
ref: Para saksi melaporkan bahawa seorang pengebom berani mati dapat masuk ke tempat itu dengan berpakaian seperti seorang wanita, memakai abaya dan tudung yang lengkap.

src: The attacker was wearing an explosive strapped to his torso, but was not patted down by security.
ref: Penyerang memakai bahan letupan yang diikat pada badannya, tetapi tidak ditepuk-tepuk oleh pengawal keselamatan.

src: The director of Median Hospital, Ali Yusuf, commented that "forty people with shrapnel wounds, including students and medical doctors, have been hospitalized today.
ref: Pengarah Hospital Median, Ali Yusuf, mengulas bahawa "empat puluh orang luka terkena serpihan termasuk pelajar dan doktor perubatan, telah dimasukkan ke hospital hari ini.

src: Former Islamic Courts Union members at the scene identified the bomber, whose head and face had been completely shaven, as a member of al-Shabab, the ultra-conservative Islamist group believed to have links to al-Qaeda.
ref: Bekas ahli Kesatuan Mahkamah Islam di tempat kejadian dikenal pasti sebagai pengebom, yang kepala dan mukanya dicukur sepenuhnya, sebagai ahli al- Shabab, kumpulan Islam ultra-konservatif itu dipercayai mempunyai kaitan dengan al- Qaeda.

src: Somali Health Minister Qamar Aden Ali, Education Minister Ahmed Abdullahi Waayeel, and Higher Education Minister Ibrahim Hassan Adow were killed in the attack on Hotel.
ref: Menteri Kesihatan Qamar Aden Ali, Menteri Pendidikan Ahmed Abdullahi Waayeel, dan Menteri Pengajian Tinggi Somalia, Ibrahim Hassan Adow terbunuh dalam serangan ke atas Hotel.

src: Abdulkadir Mohamed Osman, the Somali presidency's director of information, commented on the incident.
ref: Abdulkadir Mohamed Osman, Presiden Pengarah maklumat Somalia, mengulas mengenai kejadian itu.

src: The blast rocked inside the hotel, killing three ministers and wounding another one."
ref: Letupan itu menggegarkan dalaman hotel, membunuh tiga orang menteri dan mencederakan seorang lagi."

src: Adow served as the foreign secretary of the insurgent Islamic Courts Union when it took power in 2006.
ref: Adow berkhidmat sebagai setiausaha asing untuk pemberontak Kesatuan Mahkamah Islam apabila ia mengambil alih kuasa pada tahun 2006.

src: The Somali minister for sports is also reported to be hospitalized and in critical condition.
ref: Menteri sukan Somalia juga dilaporkan dimasukkan ke hospital dan dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: Mohamed Mohamoud, an attending graduate of the ceremony, said that he personally saw the remains of the health minister on the ground, as well as the corpses of other government officials.
ref: Mohamed Mohamoud, graduan yang menghadiri majlis itu, berkata bahawa dia sendiri melihat mayat menteri kesihatan itu di atas lantai, di samping mayat pegawai-pegawai kerajaan yang lain.

src: They have been studying in such a horrific environment, and today they passed away without benefiting from their education.
ref: Mereka telah belajar di persekitaran yang begitu dasyat, dan hari ini mereka meninggal dunia tanpa bermanfaat daripada pendidikan mereka.

src: Two journalists, a reporter for Radio Shabelle and a cameraman with al-Arabia TV, were also found dead from the explosion.
ref: Dua wartawan, seorang wartawan Radio Shabelle dan jurukamera TV al- Arabia, juga didapati mati akibat letupan.

src: The National Union of Somali Journalists has issued a statement condemning the attack and expressing outrage at the loss of their colleagues.
ref: Kesatuan Kebangsaan Wartawan Somalia telah mengeluarkan kenyataan mengutuk serangan itu dan menyatakan kemarahan atas kehilangan rakan-rakan mereka.

src: Somalia is one of the world's most dangerous places for journalists to work.
ref: Somalia merupakan salah satu tempat paling berbahaya di dunia untuk pekerjaan wartawan.

src: Eight have been killed in Somalia since the beginning of 2009.
ref: Lapan terbunuh di Somalia sejak awal 2009.

src: Hotel Shamo is often chosen by government officials to host events and at one time was a popular lodging option for foreign journalists.
ref: Hotel Shamo sering dipilih oleh pegawai-pegawai kerajaan untuk menjadi tuan rumah majlis dan pada satu masa adalah pilihan penginapan popular untuk wartawan asing.

src: Recently-released Canadian journalist Amanda Lindhout and Australian photojournalist Nigel Brennan were staying at the hotel before their capture last year.
ref: Wartawan Kanada Amanda Lindhout dan wartawan foto Australia Nigel Brennan yang dilepaskan baru-baru ini menginap di hotel itu sebelum penawanan mereka tahun lepas.
