src: The hotel security staff say that they were kicked out of the room prior to the ceremony, as government security officials wanted sole handling of the event.
ref: Pihak keselamatan hotel mengatakan bahawa mereka telah diusir dari bilik itu sebelum majlis bermula, pegawai-pegawai keselamatan kerajaan mahu pengendalian tunggal upacara itu.

src: The government officials were attending the graduation of 43 students from the local Banadir University.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai kerajaan telah menghadiri istiadat graduasi 43 pelajar dari universiti tempatan Universiti Banadir.

src: The official death toll from the blast is expected to continue to rise, with some reports indicating that more than 60 people have been found dead.
ref: Angka kematian rasmi akibat letupan itu dijangka terus meningkat, dengan beberapa laporan menunjukkan bahawa lebih daripada 60 orang telah ditemui mati.

src: The attack is the latest in a string of incidents linking al-Shabab to common insurgent tactics used by Islamist terrorist groups in other parts of the world.
ref: Serangan itu adalah yang terbaru dalam rentetan kejadian yang menghubungkan al-Shabab kepada taktik pemberontak yang biasa digunakan oleh kumpulan-kumpulan pengganas Islam di bahagian lain dunia.

src: Until recently, suicide bombings were an unusual practice in Somalia.
ref: Sehingga kebelankangan ini, pengeboman berani mati adalah satu amalan luar biasa di Somalia.

src: In September, al-Shabab claimed responsibility for a bold attack on a meeting between government officials and the African Union peacekeeping mission in Somalia, known as AMISOM, which killed 17 peacekeepers, including the top Burundian commander.
ref: Pada bulan September, al-Shabab mengaku bertanggungjawab untuk serangan berani atas mesyuarat antara pegawai-pegawai kerajaan dan misi pengaman Kesatuan Afrika di Somalia, yang dikenali sebagai AMISOM, yang mengorbankan 17 anggota pasukan pengaman, termasuk ketua komander Burundian.

src: Two vehicles containing explosives were given entry to the AMISOM base and subsequently blew up.
ref: Dua kenderaan yang mengandungi bahan letupan dengan dibenarkan masuk ke pangkalan AMISOM dan seterusnya meletup.

src: The rebel group is battling for control of the war-ravaged nation against the Western-backed Transitional Federal Government, led by former Islamic insurgent Sheikh Sharif Sheikh Ahmed.
ref: Kumpulan pemberontak yang berjuang untuk kawalan negara yang dilanda peperangan terhadap Kerajaan Persekutuan Peralihan yang disokong Barat, yang diketuai oleh bekas pemberontak Islam Sheikh Sharif Sheikh Ahmed.

src: Rebel groups control much of southern and central Somalia, as well as significant portions of Mogadishu.
ref: Kumpulan pemberontak menguasai sebahagian besar Somalia selatan dan tengah, serta sejumlah besar kawasan Mogadishu.

src: The government is being bolstered by the continuing presence of the peacekeeping force composed of Ugandans and Burundians.
ref: Kerajaan sedang disokong oleh kehadiran berterusan pasukan pengaman yang terdiri daripada orang Uganda dan Burundi.

src: The AMISOM forces are mandated with the protection of key city sites such as the airport, seaport, and presidential palace.
ref: Kuasa-kuasa AMISOM diberi mandat dengan perlindungan tapak utama bandar seperti lapangan terbang, pelabuhan, dan istana presiden.

src: Pakistani officials have said that five attacks on government sites across the country have killed at least forty people.
ref: Pegawai Pakistan telah berkata lima serangan ke atas kawasan kerajaan di seluruh negara telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya empat puluh orang.

src: The latest attack occurred late on Thursday at a government residential area in Peshawar.
ref: Serangan terbaru berlaku lewat pada hari Khamis di kawasan perumahan kerajaan di Peshawar.

src: Officials said they suspect Taliban militants for being responsible for the attacks.
ref: Pegawai berkata, mereka mengesyaki militan Taliban bertanggungjawab terhadap serangan itu.

src: Authorities said that the situation in the eastern city of Lahore was under control, following separate attacks on the country's Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) and two police training centers.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata bahawa keadaan di bandar timur Lahore adalah terkawal, berikutan serangan berasingan di Agensi Siasatan Persekutuan (FIA) dan dua pusat latihan polis.

src: Gunmen with at least one suicide jacket stormed the FIA building at mid-morning.
ref: Lelaki bersenjata dengan sekurang-kurangnya satu jaket bunuh diri menyerbu bangunan FIA pada tengah pagi.

src: The FIA is an agency responsible for investigating matters relating to terrorism and immigration.
ref: FIA merupakan agensi yang bertanggungjawab untuk menyiasat perkara berkaitan dengan keganasan dan imigresen.

src: Early last year, the building was the target of a suicide truck bomb that killed more than 20 people.
ref: Awal tahun lepas, bangunan itu adalah sasaran bom trak berani mati yang membunuh lebih daripada 20 orang.

src: "Reportedly, four men attacked the FIA building and initial reports are that two of them have been killed," said the provincial interior secretary, Nadeem Hassan Asif Punjab.
ref: "Khabarnya, empat lelaki menyerang bangunan FIA dan laporan awal adalah bahawa kedua-dua mereka telah dibunuh," kata setiausaha dalam wilayah, Nadeem Hassan Asif Punjab.

src: Soon after the assault on the FIA began, gunmen targeted two police training centers on the outskirts of Lahore.
ref: Tidak lama selepas serangan ke atas FIA bermula, lelaki bersenjata mensasarkan dua pusat latihan polis di pinggir Lahore.

src: In the suburb of Manawa, gunmen targeted a center that militants attacked earlier this year.
ref: Di luar bandar Manawa, lelaki bersenjata mensasarkan pusat yang diserang militan awal tahun ini.

src: In the other incident, attackers with suicide jackets in Bedian climbed over a wall to gain access to the Elite Force Training Center.
ref: Dalam kejadian lain, penyerang dengan jaket berani mati di Bedian memanjat dinding untuk masuk ke dalam Pusat Latihan Elite Force.

src: It took several hours before security forces were able to gain control of all the sites.
ref: Ia mengambil masa beberapa jam sebelum pasukan keselamatan dapat mengawal semua kawasan itu.

src: The attacks in Pakistan's east took place hours after a suicide car bomber targeted a police station at a garrison town about an hour's drive from the northwestern city of Peshawar.
ref: Serangan di timur Pakistan yang berlaku beberapa jam selepas kereta pengebom berani mati mensasarkan sebuah balai polis di sebuah bandar garrison kira-kira sejam perjalanan dari bandar barat laut Peshawar.

src: Speaking to local media, Pakistani Interior Minister Rehman Malik said intelligence agencies had expected attacks on security sites in the country and that authorities will remain on high-alert.
ref: Bercakap kepada media tempatan, Menteri Dalam Negeri Pakistan Rehman Malik berkata agensi perisikan menjangkakan serangan ke atas kawasan keselamatan di negara ini dan pihak berkuasa akan sentiasa berwaspada.

src: He said the recent violence shows the militants want to bring the frontlines from Pakistan's violent northwest to Punjab province.
ref: Dia berkata keganasan baru-baru ini menunjukkan militan mahu membawa barisan hadapan dari barat laut ganas Pakistan ke wilayah Punjab.

src: On Saturday, militants with ties to Punjab, as well as the South Waziristan tribal region, assaulted the Pakistani army's headquarters in Rawalpindi.
ref: Pada hari Sabtu, militan yang berkaitan dengan Punjab serta kawasan puak Waziristan Selatan, menyerang ibu pejabat tentera Pakistan di Rawalpindi.

src: Pakistani intelligence officials believe the attacks are a reaction to the military's raids on South Waziristan.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai perisikan Pakistan percaya bahawa serangan itu adalah reaksi terhadap serbuan tentera di Selatan Waziristan.

src: The military is expected to launch a full-scale assault on Taliban militants in the region bordering Afghanistan.
ref: Tentera dijangka melancarkan serangan besar-besaran ke atas militan Taliban di kawasan bersempadan dengan Afghanistan.

src: England beat Kenya by 7 wickets (with 60 balls remaining) in the final Group C game in the World Cup at Beausejour Stadium, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia.
ref: England menewaskan Kenya dengan 7 wickets (dengan 60 bola berbaki) dalam perlawanan terakhir Kumpulan C di Piala Dunia di Stadium Beausejour, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia.

src: England will now advance through to the Super 8 stage.
ref: England kini akan mara ke peringkat Super 8.

src: Rain delayed the start of the match by some two hours, and therefore the match was only a 43 over game.
ref: Hujan menangguhkan permulaan perlawanan itu selama kira-kira dua jam, dan oleh itu perlawanan itu hanya mencapai mata 43 dalam keseluruhan permainan.

src: Sales of smartphones running the Android operating system have tripled since the beginning of 2010, according to figures released yesterday.
ref: Jualan telefon pintar yang menggunakan sistem operasi Android telah meningkat tiga kali ganda sejak awal tahun 2010, menurut angka yang dikeluarkan semalam.

src: Market analysts GfK said that "around one in every eight handsets sold in the UK between April and June 2010 on a contract is Android-powered, compared to one in 33 on average between January and March."
ref: Penganalisis pasaran GfK berkata bahawa "lebih kurang satu daripada setiap lapan telefon bimbit yang dijual di UK antara April dan Jun 2010 dengan kontrak dikendali Android, berbanding dengan satu dalam 33 secara purata antara Januari dan Mac."

src: Last week, Samsung stepped up the marketing for its latest Android-powered device, the Galaxy S.
ref: Minggu lepas, Samsung meningkatkan pemasaran untuk peranti terbaru dikendali Android, Galaxy S.

src: Other Android-powered devices include the Sony Ericsson X10 and the HTC Desire.
ref: Lain-lain peranti yang dikendali Android termasuk Sony Ericsson X10 dan HTC Desire.

src: GfK analyst Megan Baldock said to The Guardian: "The figures suggest an increasing number of consumers are now asking for Android handsets by name."
ref: Juruanalisis GfK Megan Baldock berkata kepada The Guardian: "Angka menunjukkan peningkatan jumlah pengguna kini meminta telefon bimbit Android berdasarkan nama."

src: Kuwait might finance a great number of public works in East Timor, in an investment worth 500 million to 600 million dollars, the East Timorese Prime Minister said today.
ref: Kuwait mungkin membiayai sejumlah besar kerja-kerja awam di Timor Timur, dalam pelaburan bernilai 500 hingga 600 juta dolar, Perdana Menteri Timur Timor berkata hari ini.

src: José Ramos Horta leaves today for an official visit to Kuwait.
ref: José Ramos Horta tinggal hari ini untuk lawatan rasmi ke Kuwait.

src: "I want to start right now the negotiations process with the Development Fund of Kuwait for the construction of great projects for East Timor's roads, bridges, harbors and airports", Ramos Horta, East Timor's Prime Minister, said.
ref: "Saya mahu memulakan proses rundingan sekarang juga dengan Dana Pembangunan Kuwait bagi pembinaan projek-projek besar untuk jalan raya, jambatan, pelabuhan dan lapangan terbang Timor Timur," Ramos Horta, Perdana Menteri Timur Timor, berkata.

src: "For a project of this magnitude, to carry throughout several years, the amount of money to be spent is about 500 million to 600 million dollars or more.
ref: "Bagi projek sebesar ini, yang dijalankan sepanjang beberapa tahun, jumlah wang yang akan dibelanjakan adalah sekitar 500 juta kepada 600 juta dolar atau lebih.

src: We are now waiting a preliminary study made by an Indian company, paid by Kuwait", Ramos Horta added.
ref: Kita sedang tunggu kajian awal yang dilakukan oleh sebuah syarikat India, yang dibayar oleh Kuwait," kata Ramos Horta.

src: The East Timorese delegation is composed by the Minister of public works, Odete Victor, and the Minister of energy & mineral resources, José Teixeira.
ref: Delegasi Timor Timur terdiri daripada Menteri Kerja Raya, Odete Victor, dan Menteri sumber tenaga & mineral, José Teixeira.

src: The visit is part of an invitation by Kuwait's Prime Minister Nasser Al-Mohammed Al-Ahmed Al-Sabah, and includes meetings with the Emir Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, the crown prince Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, the Minister of Foreign Affairs Mohammed Sabah Al Salem Al Sabah and representatives of the Development Fund of Kuwait.
ref: Lawatan itu adalah sebahagian daripada jemputan oleh Perdana Menteri Kuwait Nasser Al-Mohammed Al-Ahmed Al-Sabah, dan termasuk mesyuarat dengan Emir Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, putera mahkota Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al -Sabah, Menteri Luar Negeri Sabah Mohammed Al Salem Al Sabah dan wakil-wakil daripada Dana Pembangunan Kuwait.

src: This is the second visit to Kuwait in two years by Ramos Horta, an country with who the East Timorese Prime Minister maintains relations with several members of the royal family and of the government.
ref: Ini merupakan lawatan kedua ke Kuwait dalam dua tahun oleh Ramos Horta, sebuah negara yang Perdana Menteri Timur Timor mengekalkan hubungan dengan beberapa ahli keluarga diraja dan kerajaan.

src: A group of 19 people, including local aborigines and Roads and Traffic Authority (RTA) staff, were sprayed by a crop duster in rural Australia today.
ref: Sekumpulan terdiri daripada 19 orang, termasuk orang asli tempatan dan kakitangan Pihak Berkuasa Jalan dan Trafik (RTA), telah disembur pesawat pendebu tanaman di luar bandar Australia hari ini.

src: They were walking the proposed route of a freeway bypass, looking for sites that may have significance to Aboriginal people.
ref: Mereka berjalan mengikuti laluan yang dicadangkan bagi jalan pintas lebuh raya, mencari kawasan yang mungkin berkepentingan kepada orang-orang Asli.

src: The freeway bypass will be part of the Hume Highway, near Coolac in south-west New South Wales.
ref: Pintasan lebuh akan menjadi sebahagian daripada Lebuhraya Hume, dekat Coolac di barat daya New South Wales.

src: Police are yet to rule out that the dusting was deliberate.
ref: Polis masih belum mengetepikan anggapan bahawa pendebuan itu adalah disengajakan.

src: "We don't know whether they knew the people were there or not so we're appealing for anyone who might have witnessed the incident or knows anything about a low-flying crop-duster in the area to contact police," she said.
ref: "Kami tidak tahu sama ada mereka tahu orang di sana atau tidak jadi kami merayu supaya sesiapa sahaja yang mungkin telah menyaksikan kejadian itu atau mengetahui apa-apa mengenai pesawat pendebu tanaman yang terbang rendah di kawasan itu supaya menghubungi polis," katanya.

src: News available via the web does not (as of this writing) detail the effects of the spraying.
ref: Berita tersedia melalui laman web tidak (seperti tulisan ini) memperincikan kesan penyemburan itu.

src: ABC Online reports that the pilot of the plane may face charges.
ref: ABC Online melaporkan bahawa juruterbang pesawat itu mungkin menghadapi dakwaan.

src: Moldovan wine producers took three silver medals at the third annual international contest of wine tasting and judging of strong alcoholic beverages, the "Concours Mondial de Bruxelles 2008".
ref: Pengeluar wain Moldovan mendapat masa tiga pingat perak pada pertandingan merasa wain dan penilaian minuman keras yang kuat antarabangsa tahunan ketiga, "Concours Mondial de Bruxelles 2008."

src: Previously, the event was held in Portugal and in Maastricht in 2007 and will held in Spain next year.
ref: Sebelum ini, acara itu diadakan di Portugal dan di Maastricht pada tahun 2007 dan akan diadakan di Sepanyol tahun depan.

src: The medals went to the wines produced by the stock company Acorex Wine Holding, Amaro de la Valea Perjei 2003, Pinot Grigio/ Aligote/ Sauvignon Blanc 2005 and Pinot Noir 2005, with the last two being from the Private reserve series.
ref: Pingat itu diperolehi oleh wain yang dihasilkan oleh syarikat saham Acorex Wain Holding, Amaro de la Valea Perjei 2003, Pinot Grigio/ Aligote/ Sauvignon Blanc 2005 dan Pinot Noir 2005, dengan dua terakhir daripada siri rizab Persendirian.

src: Last year's fourteenth edition of the contest, held in the Netherlands in 2007, Moldovan wines won three gold medals and three silver ones.
ref: Edisi keempat belas pertandingan tahun lepas, diadakan di Belanda pada tahun 2007, wain Moldovan memenangi tiga pingat emas dan tiga perak.

src: A Southern Sudan Air Connection aircraft has crashed today in Southern Sudan, killing over a dozen people, including the area's defence minister.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Hubungan Udara Sudan Selatan terhempas hari ini di Sudan Selatan, membunuh lebih daripada sedozen orang, termasuk menteri pertahanan di kawasan ini.

src: There are conflicting reports on how many people were on board and how many died in the Bahr Gazal crash, but at least twenty people were on board.
ref: Terdapat laporan bercanggah tentang berapa ramai orang yang berada di atas pesawat itu dan berapa ramai yang mati dalam kemalangan di Bahr Gazal, tetapi sekurang-kurangnya dua puluh orang berada di atas pesawat itu.

src: Some sources suggest nineteen fatalities and two survivors, and others say there were 26 deaths and no survivors; it should be noted that if either of these were correct then there were more than twenty on board.
ref: Sesetengah sumber mencadangkan sembilan belas kematian dan dua terselamat, dan yang lain mengatakan terdapat 26 kematian dan tiada mangsa terselamat; harus diambil perhatian bahawa jika salah seorang daripada ini adalah betul, maka terdapat lebih daripada dua puluh orang di atas pesawat.

src: Lieutenant General Dominic Dim Deng, the area's defence minister, is confirmed to be dead and it is thought at least 19 military officials are now deceased.
ref: Leftenan Jeneral Dominic Dim Deng, menteri pertahanan kawasan itu, disahkan telah meninggal dan dikatakan sekurang-kurangnya 19 pegawai tentera telah mati.

src: "The plane had been rented from a charter company and was carrying a delegation of leaders from the (former rebel) Sudan People's Liberation Movement from Wau to the capital Juba," said Luka Mariak, spokesman for the Souther Sudan president Salva Kiir.
ref: "Pesawat itu telah disewa dari syarikat berkanun dan membawa delegasi pemimpin daripada (bekas pemberontak) Pergerakan Pembebasan Rakyat Sudan dari Wau ke Juba ibu negaranya," kata Luka Mariak, jurucakap presiden Sudan Selatan Salva Kiir.

src: This makes the journey around 450 kilometres (290 miles), with the plane crashing in a flat region 375 kilometres (around 220 miles) from Juba.
ref: Ini menjadikan perjalanan itu sepanjang kira-kira 450 kilometer (290 batu), dengan pesawat terhempas di kawasan rata berjarak 375 kilometer (sekitar 220 batu) dari Juba.

src: The United Nations said that the United Nations Mission in Sudan (UNMIS) had dispatched a helicopter to assist the emergency response effort.
ref: Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu berkata, Misi Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu di Sudan (UNMIS) telah menghantar sebuah helikopter untuk membantu usaha tindak balas kecemasan.

src: The UN also said that the aircraft was a Beechcraft 1900 and that they would fly in government officials and aviation experts to conduct an investigation.
ref: PBB juga berkata, pesawat itu merupakan Beechcraft 1900 dan bahawa mereka akan melibatkan pegawai kerajaan dan pakar penerbangan untuk menjalankan satu siasatan.

src: Ashraf Jehangir Qazi, UNMIS's Secretary-General's Special Representative, offered his condolences to the government on behalf of both UNMIS and th UN as a whole.
ref: Ashraf Jehangir Qazi, Setiausaha Agung Perwakilan Khas UNMIS, mengucapkan takziah kepada kerajaan bagi pihak kedua-dua UNMIS dan PBB secara keseluruhan.

src: Kiir said in a press conference "Twenty-one passengers were killed and either two or three crew members."
ref: Kiir berkata dalam satu sidang akhbar "Dua puluh satu penumpang terbunuh dan sama ada dua atau tiga anak kapal."

src: "Two engines failed and there was nothing the pilot could do."
ref: "Dua enjin gagal berfungsi dan tiada apa-apa juruterbang itu boleh lakukan."

src: Justin Yak and his wife are also confirmed to be dead.
ref: Justin Yak dan isterinya juga disahkan mati.

src: Yak was the minister for cabinet affairs until a 2007 reshuffle left him removed from office.
ref: Yak adalah menteri hal ehwal kabinet sehingga rombakan pada tahun 2007 menggulingkannya.

src: He was an adviser to the president at the time of his death.
ref: Beliau merupakan penasihat kepada presiden pada masa kematiannya.

src: Bodies were flown into Juba Airport were relatives waited for hours for news.
ref: Mayat-mayat diterbangkan ke Lapangan Terbang Juba di mana saudara-mara menunggu berjam-jam untuk mendapatkan berita.

src: UNMIS is expected to fly the bodies on to their nearby airfield, to which there is no public access.
ref: UNMIS dijangka menerbangkan mayat ke lapangan terbang berdekatan mereka, yang tidak ada capaian awam.

src: The disaster is thought to be an accident caused by mechanical trouble.
ref: Bencana tersebut dianggap sebagai suatu kemalangan yang disebabkan oleh masalah mekanikal.

src: The pilot had contacted Air Traffic Control (ATC) to report engine problems and requested permission to conduct an emergency landing at nearby Rumbek.
ref: Juruterbang telah menghubungi Kawalan Trafik Udara (ATC) melaporkan masalah enjin dan meminta kebenaran untuk menlakukan pendaratan cemas di Rumbek yang berdekatan.

src: The Global Polio Eradication Initiative has announced its goal to eradicate Polio from Asia in 2005.
ref: Inisiatif Pembasmian Polio Global telah mengumumkan matlamat untuk membasmi polio di Asia pada tahun 2005.

src: The 16 year old private-public project aims to add Poliomyelitis to the list of childhood diseases which have been eliminated.
ref: Projek swasta-awam yang berusia 16 tahun bertujuan untuk menambahkan Poliomyelitis ke atas senarai penyakit kanak-kanak yang telah dihapuskan.

src: The World Health Organization, Rotary International, the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and UNICEF are leading the Initiative and coordinating a series of overlapping immunization campaigns in the region.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia, Rotary International, Pusat Kawalan dan Pencegahan Penyakit A.S. dan UNICEF memimpin Inisiatif itu dan menyelaraskan satu siri kempen imunisasi bertindih di rantau ini.

src: In 2004 Afghanistan, India, and Pakistan cut their number of Polio cases by 45%.
ref: Pada tahun 2004 Afghanistan, India dan Pakistan mengurangkan bilangan kes Polio sebanyak 45%.

src: In 2005 the goal is to cut the number of cases by 100%.
ref: Pada tahun 2005 matlamatnya adalah untuk mengurangkan jumlah kes dengan sebanyak 100%.

src: The three countries are the last in Asia to have endemic polio, and the disease is confined to a small number of regions within the country.
ref: Ketiga-tiga negara adalah yang terakhir di Asia yang mempunyai endemik polio, dan penyakit ini terhad kepada sebilangan kecil kawasan-kawasan di negara itu.

src: Only 186 cases were reported in 2004, down from 336 the previous year.
ref: Hanya 186 kes dilaporkan pada tahun 2004, turun daripada 336 pada tahun sebelumnya.

src: The Indonesian province of Aceh was struck by a 7.5 magnitude earthquake at 3:08 PM local time (8:08 AM GMT).
ref: Wilayah Indonesia Aceh dilanda gempa bumi magnitud 7.5 pada 3:08 petang waktu tempatan (08:08 GMT).

src: The epicentre was 319 km (198 miles) off the coast of Sumatra, close to the island of Simeulue.
ref: Pusat gempa ialah 319 km (198 batu) di luar pantai Sumatera, berhampiran dengan Pulau Simeulue.

src: At least three people have been killed and several buildings have been damaged.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tiga orang terbunuh dan beberapa bangunan rosak.

src: The same region was hit by an earthquake in 2004, that triggered a tsunami.
ref: Rantau yang sama telah dilanda gempa bumi pada tahun 2004, yang mencetuskan tsunami.

src: According to local citizens the quake lasted about one minute and was felt in Banda Aceh, the province capital, approximately 300 km (185 mls) away, also in Meulaboh and Gunung Sitoli on Nias island.
ref: Menurut penduduk tempatan gempa bumi itu berlangsung kira-kira satu minit dan dirasai di Banda Aceh, ibu kota wilayah itu, kira-kira 300 km (185 batu) jauhnya, juga di Meulaboh dan Gunung Sitoli di pulau Nias.

src: The U.S. Geological Survey, that reported the earthquake, says that no local tsunami warning has been issued.
ref: Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat, yang melaporkan gempa bumi itu, berkata bahawa tiada amaran tsunami pernah dikeluarkan.

src: Minutes after the quake hit, the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center issued a warning that parts of the Sumatran coast were at risk of a possible tsunami but was later cancelled.
ref: Beberapa minit selepas gempa bumi itu melanda, Pusat Amaran Tsunami Pasifik mengeluarkan amaran bahawa sebahagian pantai Sumatera mungkin berisiko mengalami tsunami tetapi kemudian amaran itudibatalkan.

src: Japan's meteorological agency said India's Andaman and Nicobar island chain was also at risk.
ref: Agensi meteorologi Jepun berkata rantaian pulau Andaman dan Nicobar di India juga berisiko.

src: Indonesia's meteorology and geophysics agency recorded at least two aftershocks about 20 minutes after the first tremors, one measuring 5.5 and the other 5.3 on the Richter scale.
ref: Agensi meteorologi dan geofizik Indonesia mencatatkan sekurang-kurangnya dua gempa susulan kira-kira 20 minit selepas gegaran pertama, satu berukuran 5.5 dan 5.3 lain pada skala Richter.

src: Budi Waluyo, an official at the National Meteorology and Geophysics Agency said the quake occurred about 30 kilometres beneath the ground.
ref: Budi Waluyo, seorang pegawai di Agensi Meteorologi dan Geofizik Kebangsaan berkata gempa bumi itu berlaku kira-kira 30 kilometer di bawah tanah.

src: The US Geological Survey measured the quake at 7.6 on the Richter scale.
ref: Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat mengukur gempa pada magnitud 7.6 dengan skala Richter.

src: "The quake has no tsunami potential because it's happening under the ground, not the sea," Waluyo said.
ref: "Gempa bumi itu tidak berpotensi menyebabkan tsunami kerana ia berlaku di bawah tanah, bukan laut," kata Waluyo.

src: The South African government has reported that former President Nelson Mandela has been discharged from a hospital in Pretoria, where he was hospitalised December 8.
ref: Kerajaan Afrika Selatan telah melaporkan bahawa bekas Presiden Nelson Mandela dibenarkan keluar dari sebuah hospital di Pretoria, di mana beliau dimasukkan ke hospital pada 8 Disember.

src: Mandela received hospital treatment for gallstones and a lung infection.
ref: Mandela menerima rawatan hospital untuk merawati penyakit batu karang dan jangkitan paru-paru.

src: Presidential spokesperson Mac Maharaj said Mandela "will undergo home-based high care at his Houghton home until he recovers fully".
ref: Jurucakap presiden Mac Maharaj berkata Mandela "akan menjalani rawatan rapi di rumahnya di Houghton sehingga dia pulih sepenuhnya."

src: Mandela was hospitalised for eighteen days, his longest hospitalisation since 1990, when he was released from prison after 27 years.
ref: Mandela dimasukkan ke hospital selama lapan belas hari, kemasukan ke hospital yang paling lama sejak tahun 1990, apabila beliau dibebaskan dari penjara selepas 27 tahun.

src: Current president Jacob Zuma visited Mandela in hospital this past weekend.
ref: Presiden sekarang Jacob Zuma melawat Mandela di hospital hujung minggu yang lepas.

src: Zuma visited Mandela again on Christmas, as did Graca Machel, Mandela's wife.
ref: Zuma melawat Mandela sekali lagi pada hari Krismas, begitu juga Graca Machel, isteri Mandela.

src: Mandela has been hospitalised three times since the start of last year.
ref: Mandela telah dimasukkan ke hospital tiga kali sejak awal tahun lalu.

src: In January 2011, Mandela received hospital treatment for an acute respiratory infection.
ref: Pada bulan Januari 2011, Mandela menerima rawatan hospital untuk jangkitan pernafasan akut.

src: Work at a Robben Island limestone quarry, where he was imprisoned for sixteen years during South Africa's Apartheid, damaged his eyes and lungs.
ref: Bekerja di sebuah kuari batu kapur Pulau Robben, di mana beliau dipenjarakan selama enam belas tahun semasa Aparteid di Afrika Selatan, merosakkan mata dan paru-parunya.

src: During the 1980s, while still a prisoner on Robben Island, he developed .
ref: Dalam tahun 1980-an, ketika beliau masih seorang tahanan di Pulau Robben, beliau medapat penyakit tersebut.

src: Maharaj, once a political prisoner alongside Mandela during Apartheid, expressed thanks for public and media support and allowing Mandela privacy.
ref: Maharaj, yang pernah merupakan tahanan politik bersama Mandela semasa Aparteid, menyatakan terima kasih atas sokongan orang ramai dan media dan memberi privasi kepada Mandela.

src: On behalf of the government, Maharaj also asked for a "continuation of the privacy in order to allow for the best possible conditions for full recovery".
ref: Bagi pihak kerajaan, Maharaj juga meminta "lanjutan privasi bagi membolehkan keadaan terbaik untuk pemulihan penuh."

src: The aftershock reached a magnitude of 5.9 with the epicenter located nineteen kilometers west of Pichilemu, according to the University of Chile Geological Survey (UCGS).
ref: Gempa susulan mencapai magnitud 5.9 dengan pusat gempa terletak sembilan belas kilometer barat Pichilemu, menurut Kajian Geologikal Universiti Chile (UCGS).

src: However, the United States Geological Survey (USGS) reported that it reached a magnitude of 5.8; had a depth of 8,5 kilometers; and that the epicenter was located 65 kilometers at the southwest of San Antonio, Valparaíso; 100 kilometers at the west of Rancagua, O'Higgins 105 kilometers at the northwest of Curicó, Maule and; 135 kilometers at the southwest of Santiago, Metropolitan Region.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat (USGS) melaporkan bahawa ia telah mencapai magnitud 5.8; mempunyai kedalaman 8.5 kilometer; dan bahawa pusat gempa terletak 65 kilometer di barat daya San Antonio, Valparaiso; 100 kilometer di barat Rancagua, O'Higgins 105 kilometer di barat laut Curicó, Maule dan; 135 kilometer di barat daya Santiago, Wilayah Metropolitan.

src: United States glam metal band Poison is suing Capitol Records and EMI Music Marketing over an alleged breach of contract.
ref: Kumpulan metal terkenal dari Amerika Syarikat, Poison akan menyaman Capitol Records dan EMI Music Marketing atas pemungkiran kontrak.

src: Poison claim the two companies have underpaid them royalties for years.
ref: Poison mendakwa kedua-dua syarikat itu telah membayar mereka kurang royalti untuk bertahun.

src: The band claims Capitol miscategorized various record sales and miscalculated every possible expense since the 1980s.
ref: Kumpulan ini mendakwa Capitol salah mengkategorikan pelbagai rekod jualan dan salah mengira setiap perbelanjaan sejak 1980-an.

src: They say when attempting to check company records they received no co-operation and are now asking a judge to order the firms to reveal their records so the band can determine how much they are owed.
ref: Mereka mengatakan apabila cuba untuk memeriksa rekod syarikat mereka tidak mendapat kerjasama dan kini meminta hakim untuk memerintahkan syarikat untuk mendedahkan rekod mereka supaya kumpulan ini boleh menentukan berapa banyak yang mereka terhutang.

src: Thai-Japanese Bangkok Youth Center, Bangkok — Wikinews interviewed Georgia Inglis, of the Australia women's national wheelchair basketball team, known as the Gliders.
ref: Pusat Belia Thai-Jepun Bangkok, Bangkok - Wikinews menemuramah Georgia Inglis, dari pasukan bola keranjang kerusi roda wanita kebangsaan Australia, yang dikenali sebagai Gliders.

src: The Gliders are in Bangkok, Thailand, for the Asia-Oceania Zone Wheelchair Basketball Championships, which are being held at the Thai-Japanese Bangkok Youth Center.
ref: The Gliders berada di Bangkok, Thailand, bagi Kejohanan Bola Keranjang kerusi roda Asia-Oceania, yang sedang berlangsung di Pusat Belia Thai-Jepun Bangkok.

src: They are hoping to qualify for the World Championships, which are being held in Toronto, Canada, in June next year.
ref: Mereka berharap untuk layak ke Kejohanan Dunia, yang sedang diadakan di Toronto, Kanada, pada bulan Jun tahun depan.

src: Inglis is one of two new players in the team.
ref: Inglis adalah satu daripada dua pemain baru dalam pasukan.

src: Wikinews caught up with her before the Gliders' match against China.
ref: Wikinews bertemu dengan beliau sebelum perlawanan Gliders menentang China.

src: The United States 2008 federal deficit has reached a record high, US$454.8 billion—more than double last year's deficit.
ref: Defisit persekutuan 2008 Amerika Syarikat telah mencecah rekod, US$454.8 bilion - lebih daripada defisit dua tahun lepas.

src: Financial experts believe that next year, the deficit will reach over $700 billion, while the National Debt Clock has recently run out of digits to record over $10 trillion in national debt.
ref: Pakar-pakar kewangan percaya bahawa tahun depan, defisit akan mencapai lebih $700 bilion, manakala Jam Hutang Negara baru-baru ini kehabisan digit mencatatkan lebih daripada $10 trilion dalam hutang negara.

src: The deficit is now equivalent to 3.2% of the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the United States, with the government's total income being 17.8% of GDP, and total outlays being equivalent to 21% of GDP.
ref: Defisit ini kini bersamaan dengan 3.2% daripada Keluaran Dalam Negara Kasar (GDP) di Amerika Syarikat, dengan jumlah pendapatan kerajaan yang 17.8% daripada GDP, dan jumlah perbelanjaan yang bersamaan dengan 21% daripada GDP.

src: Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson blamed the deficit on the housing market, related markets, and slow growth.
ref: Setiausaha Perbendaharaan Henry Paulson menyalahkan defisit pada pasaran perumahan, pasaran yang berkaitan, dan pertumbuhan perlahan.

src: He said the news would "reinforce the need to not only address short-term challenges, but pursue policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, and address entitlement reform".
ref: Beliau berkata, berita itu akan "mengukuhkan keperluan untuk bukan sahaja menangani cabaran jangka pendek, tetapi meneruskan dasar-dasar yang menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi dan tanggungjawab fiskal, dan alamat kelayakan reformasi."

src: Democrats like Senator Kent Conrad, however, placed the blame on "President Bush's failed policies".
ref: Demokrat seperti Senator Kent Conrad, bagaimanapun, meletakkan kesalahan ke atas "Dasar gagal Presiden Bush."

src: "The reality is that the next president will be inheriting a fiscal and economic mess of historic proportions," said Conrad, adding that "it will take years to dig our way out".
ref: "Realitinya adalah bahawa presiden akan datang akan mewarisi keadaan kucar-kacir fiskal dan ekonomi perkadaran bersejarah," kata Conrad, sambil menambah bahawa "ia akan mengambil masa untuk menggali jalan keluar."

src: Another Democrat, House Budget Committee Chairman John Spratt, also blamed the Bush administration.
ref: Satu lagi Demokrat, Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Belanjawan Dewan John Spratt, juga menyalahkan pentadbiran Bush.

src: "The eight years of this administration will include the five biggest budget deficits in history," he said.
ref: "Lapan tahun pentadbiran ini akan termasuk lima defisit bajet terbesar dalam sejarah," katanya.

src: "The resulting debt will be passed to our children and grandchildren."
ref: "Hutang yang terhasil akan diserahkan kepada anak-anak dan cucu kita."

src: Jim Nussle, director of the Office of Management and Budget said that he believes that the deficit will start to decline.
ref: Jim Nussle, Pengarah Pejabat Pengurusan dan Anggaran berkata beliau percaya bahawa defisit akan mula merosot.

src: "The bipartisan stimulus bill and the slow economy are the primary reasons for the increase in deficit as reflected in this year's budget results."
ref: "Rang undang-undang rangsangan kedua-dua parti dan ekonomi yang perlahan adalah sebab-sebab utama bagi peningkatan dalam defisit seperti yang ditunjukkan dalam hasil bajet tahun ini."

src: "This increase reinforces the need to adopt and maintain policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, including entitlement reform and pro-growth tax policies."
ref: "Peningkatan ini memperkukuhkan lagi keperluan untuk mengamalkan dan mengekalkan dasar-dasar yang menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi dan tanggungjawab fiskal, termasuk pembaharuan kelayakan dan dasar cukai pro-pertumbuhan."

src: "I am confident the economy can return to stronger growth with a declining deficit—after working through current challenges if Congress limits wasteful and excessive spending."
ref: "Saya yakin ekonomi boleh kembali ke pertumbuhan yang lebih kukuh dengan penurunan defisit selepas bekerja melalui cabaran semasa jika Kongres menghadkan perbelanjaan membazir dan berlebihan."

src: ETA (Euskadi Ta Askatasuna), a separatist group based out of the Basque region of northern Spain, announced in a recorded and written message that it would end its armed campaign for independence, instead focusing on political means for achieving its goals.
ref: ETA (Euskadi Ta Askatasuna), sebuah kumpulan pemisah berpusat di rantau ini Basque di utara Sepanyol, mengumumkan dalam mesej yang direkodkan dan bertulis bahawa ia akan mengakhiri kempen bersenjata untuk kemerdekaan, dan bukannya memberi tumpuan kepada cara politik untuk mencapai matlamatnya.

src: In the video sent to the BBC, ETA stated that, while the autonomy framework enshrined in the Spanish constitution is "not the way to satisfy the wishes of the Basque people", the organisation was committed to finding a democratic solution to the conflict.
ref: Dalam video yang dihantar kepada BBC, ETA menyatakan bahawa, manakala rangka kerja autonomi yang termaktub dalam perlembagaan Sepanyol adalah "bukan cara untuk memenuhi kehendak rakyat Basque," organisasi itu telah dilakukan untuk mencari penyelesaian demokratik kepada konflik.

src: Several analysts have suggested that this most recent ceasefire is based on ETA's tactics causing their support in the Basque region to plummet.
ref: Beberapa penganalisis telah mencadangkan bahawa gencatan senjata baru-baru ini adalah berdasarkan kepada taktik ETA ini menyebabkan sokongan mereka di rantau ini Basque menjunam.

src: Author Paddy Woodworth found in a recent trip to the region that the group's actions had made former supporters of the movement believe ETA was politically finished.
ref: Pengarang Paddy Woodworth menjumpai di dalam perjalanan baru-baru ke rantau ini bahawa tindakan kumpulan itu telah membuat bekas penyokong gerakan percaya ETA telah selesai politik.

src: The BBC's Sarah Rainsford said that ETA is at the weakest point in its 51-year history and that the ceasefire may just be a ploy to disguise that weakness.
ref: BBC Sarah Rainsford berkata ETA adalah pada ketika yang paling lemah dalam sejarah 51 tahun dan bahawa gencatan senjata itu hanya boleh menjadi satu helah untuk menyembunyikan kelemahan itu.

src: The group, which is listed as a terrorist organization by the European Union and the United States, have declared ceasefires several times before, which have all ended in a resumption of violence.
ref: Kumpulan itu, yang disenaraikan sebagai pertubuhan pengganas oleh Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat, telah mengisytiharkan gencatan senjata beberapa kali sebelum ini, yang mempunyai semua berakhir dengan semula keganasan.

src: The most recent ceasefire, in 2006, led to peace talks between the group and the Spanish government, but they were interrupted by a car-bombing at Madrid's Barajas Airport.
ref: Gencatan senjata yang baru-baru ini, pada tahun 2006, membawa kepada rundingan damai antara kumpulan dan kerajaan Sepanyol, tetapi mereka telah diganggu oleh pengeboman kereta di Lapangan Terbang Barajas di Madrid.

src: The bombing was frowned upon by all involved in the peace process, including other Basque separatist parties in the region.
ref: Pengeboman itu dikecam oleh semua pihak yang terlibat dalam proses damai, termasuk pihak pemisah Basque lain di rantau ini.

src: Australia will press on with plans to withdraw its troops from Iraq in June this year, although promises were made by the nation's foreign minister that relations with the United States will not be affected by the move.
ref: Australia akan bergerak maju dengan rancangan untuk menarik balik tenteranya dari Iraq pada Jun tahun ini, walaupun janji-janji telah dibuat oleh menteri luar negeri bahawa hubungan dengan Amerika Syarikat tidak akan terjejas oleh langkah itu.

src: Foreign minister Stephen Smith said that the withdrawal will be conducted in an orderly fashion to minimise inconvenience to other nations in Iraq.
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Stephen Smith berkata penarikan balik itu akan dijalankan dalam cara yang teratur untuk meminimumkan kesulitan kepada negara-negara lain di Iraq.

src: Speaking in New York as part of his first US visit since the election he said "We want to do that in a way which sees minimal disruption, which causes the least inconvenience to our allies there, both the United States and the United Kingdom."
ref: Bercakap di New York sebagai sebahagian daripada lawatan Amerika Syarikat yang pertama sejak pilihan raya beliau berkata, "Kami mahu berbuat demikian dengan cara yang melihat gangguan yang minimum, yang menyebabkan kesulitan-kurangnya kepada sekutu kami di sana, kedua-dua Amerika Syarikat dan United Kingdom."

src: On Monday Smith will meet with Condoleezza Rice and others to discuss Afghanistan, where Australia also has troops stationed.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, Smith akan bertemu dengan Condoleezza Rice dan lain-lain untuk membincangkan Afghanistan, di mana Australia juga mempunyai tentera yang ditempatkan.

src: It is currently the intention for this to remain the case.
ref: Ia kini niat untuk ini mengekalkan kes itu.

src: Smith said of the effect on relations with the US - which have been strong since World War II - "It's not something which I believe will disturb what to date has been a very good working relationship between the new government and the (U.S.) administration."
ref: Smith berkata kesan ke atas hubungan dengan Amerika Syarikat - yang telah kukuh sejak Perang Dunia II - "Ia bukan sesuatu yang saya percaya akan mengganggu apa setakat ini adalah hubungan kerja yang sangat baik antara kerajaan baru dan pentadbiran (Amerika Syarikat)."

src: "It's a very strong alliance - an alliance which transcends changes in governments."
ref: "Ia adalah satu pakatan yang sangat kuat - satu pakatan yang melampaui perubahan dalam kerajaan."

src: "Administrations come and go, governments come and go, but the alliance is a long-term, enduring fundamental relationship between our two nations."
ref: "Pentadbiran datang dan pergi, kerajaan datang dan pergi, tetapi perikatan adalah jangka panjang, berkekalan hubungan asas antara kedua-dua negara."

src: The confirmation is important as Australia saw a new government elected in November.
ref: Pengesahan itu penting kerana Australia menyaksikan kerajaan baru dipilih pada bulan November.

src: Prime Minister Kevin Rudd (Labour) defeated Conservative head and former PM John Howard.
ref: Perdana Menteri Kevin Rudd (Buruh) mengalahkan ketua Konservatif dan bekas PM John Howard.

src: Howard is a supporter of US President George W. Bush and his government.
ref: Howard adalah penyokong Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush dan kerajaannya.

src: Germany beat Argentina 4-2 on penalties to book a place in the Fifa World Cup semi-finals in Berlin, Friday.
ref: Jerman menewaskan Argentina 4-2 menerusi penentuan sepakan penalti untuk menempah tempat dalam Piala Dunia Fifa separuh akhir di Berlin, Jumaat.

src: The match had drawn 1-1 without many clear chances for either side due to defensive play on both sides.
ref: Perlawanan itu telah seri 1-1 tanpa banyak peluang jelas untuk mana-mana pihak kerana permainan pertahanan di kedua-dua belah pihak.

src: First it was Germany who were unable to be positive as Argentina dominated play with 65 per cent of ball possession.
ref: Pertama, ia adalah Jerman yang tidak dapat menjadi positif kerana Argentina menguasai perlawanan dengan 65 peratus penguasaan bola.

src: Four minutes after half-time Roberto Ayala got across Miroslav Klose to meet Juan Riquelme's corner which he powered between Jens Lehmann and his near post guard, Philipp Lahm.
ref: Empat minit selepas separuh masa Roberto Ayala memotong Miroslav Klose untuk bertemu Juan Riquelme di sudut yang dipunyai olehnya di antara Jens Lehmann dan pos kawalan berhampirannya, Philipp Lahm.

src: The goal early in the second period made for a more exciting match which had been mostly uneventful in a first half during which neither side could muster more than a single shot.
ref: Gol awal pada babak kedua membuat perlawanan yang lebih menarik yang selama ini kebanyakannya kurang memberangsangkan pada separuh masa pertama di mana tidak ada pihak boleh mengumpul lebih daripada satu tendangan.

src: Juergen Klinsmann may be credited with a substitution change that partially helped Germany get an equalising goal.
ref: Juergen Klinsmann boleh dikreditkan dengan perubahan penggantian yang sebahagiannya membantu Jerman mendapatkan gol penyamaan.

src: The fast David Odonkor troubled Juan Sorin and the Argentine left flank and allowed Germany to press forward nearer to the opposition penalty area.
ref: David Odonkor yang cepat adalah bermasalah untuk Juan Sorin dan sayap kiri Argentina dan membenarkan Jerman maju lebih dekat ke kawasan penalti pembangkang.

src: Argentine manager may also have made a tactical mistake and suffered form a moment of bad fortune.
ref: Pengurus Argentina juga mungkin telah membuat satu kesilapan taktikal dan mengalami masa yang bernasib buruk.

src: In the minutes before Germany equalised from Ballack's wonderful left field cross his goalkeeper had to be stretchered off with a muscle injury.
ref: Dalam minit sebelum Jerman menyamakan kedudukan dari penyeberangan padang kiri Ballack yang hebat penjaga gol terpaksa diusung keluar akibat kecederaan otot.

src: Jose Pekerman followed his keeper's substitutions with two defensive ones; taking off creative midfield playmaker Riquelme and forward Hernan Crespo.
ref: Jose Pekerman diikuti penggantian penjaga gol itu dengan dua pertahanan; pemain tengah perancang kreatif Riquelme dan ke hadapan Hernan Crespo berlepas.

src: The gifts of Lionel Messi and Javier Saviola were left on the bench while Julio Cruz, a long ball-holding forward, was brought on to partner Carlos Tevez.
ref: Lionel Messi dan Javier Saviola yang tinggal di bangku simpanan manakala Julio Cruz, bola-pegangan yang panjang ke depan, telah dibawa ke rakan Carlos Tevez.

src: The bad luck and changes seemed to put Germany in charge of the tactical game for the first time in the match.
ref: Nasib buruk dan perubahan seolah-olah meletakkan Jerman yang bertanggungjawab bagi permainan taktikal buat kali pertama dalam perlawanan itu.

src: A minute after Cruz arrived Pekerman might have regretted his decision.
ref: Satu minit selepas Cruz tiba Pekerman mungkin telah menyesal keputusannya.

src: Klose's fifth World Cup goal ten minutes from time put him at the top of the Fifa Golden Boot leader board as the tournament's highest goalscorer.
ref: Gol kelima Piala Dunia Klose sepuluh minit dari semasa meletakkan dia di atas papan pemimpin Fifa Kasut Emas sebagai penjaring gol tertinggi kejohanan.

src: He beat his marker to dip and head beyond Leonardo Franco after Tim Borowski, a substitution on 74 minutes, had flicked on a Ballack cross.
ref: Dia menewaskan penanda untuk menanduk kepala di luar Leonardo Franco selepas Tim Borowski, penggantian 74 minit, telah menguis di atas tendangan seberang Ballack.

src: The game finished 1-1 and the two halves of extra time mirrored the match; first half uneventful, the second half more attacking.
ref: Permainan selesai 1-1 dan kedua-dua bahagian masa tambahan mencerminkan perlawanan; separuh pertama lancar, separuh kedua lebih menyerang.

src: Fabricio Coloccini came closest to breaking the deadlock when he hit the crossbar from 45 yards trying to catch Lehmann off his goal line.
ref: Fabricio Coloccini hampir memecah kebuntuan apabila terkena palang gol dari 45 ela ketika cuba untuk menangkap Lehmann dari garisan gol.

src: Neither Germany or Argentina had lost in a World Cup penalty contest; both sides had won three.
ref: Baik Jerman atau Argentina tidak pernah tewas pada pertandingan penalti Piala Dunia; kedua-dua pihak telah memenangi tiga.

src: All the penalties hit the target and were well struck, except Ayala's who hit a soft effort which Lehmann saved to his left.
ref: Semua tendangan penalti mencapai sasaran dan ditendang dengan baik, kecuali Ayala yang menendang dengan usaha lembut yang Lehmann selamatkan ke kirinya.

src: Cambiasso's effort to Lehmann's left was better struck but the keeper had guessed the right side to dive to break Argentine hearts.
ref: Usaha Cambiasso ke kiri Lehmann telah melanda lebih baik tetapi penjaga gol telah meneka sebelah kanan untuk menyelam untuk memecahkan hati Argentina.

src: FIFA launched an investigation into an on-field melee which began after the penalties had been decided in Germany's favour.
ref: FIFA melancarkan siasatan ke dalam huru-hara di padang yang bermula selepas hukuman yang diputuskan memihak kepada Jerman.

src: Unused Argentine substitute Leandro Cufre assaulted German Per Mertesacker and was presented the red card by Lubos Michel.
ref: Pengganti Argentina yang tidak digunakan Leandro Cufre diserang Jerman Per Mertesacker dan telah dibentangkan kad merah oleh Lubos Michel.

src: According to the German captain Michael Ballack the conflict originated when Argentine players shouted at the German team during the shootout.
ref: Menurut ketua pasukan Jerman, Michael Ballack konflik bermula apabila pemain Argentina menjerit kepada pasukan Jerman semasa penentuan.

src: When Tim Borowski got Germany's fourth penalty he made a sign to the Argentine players to be quiet.
ref: Apabila Tim Borowski mendapat penalti keempat Jerman dia membuat tanda kepada pemain Argentina untuk menjadi tenang.

src: After the penalty kicks Argentine players approached Borowski and a scuffle of mostly pushing began that involved dozens of players, referees, coaches and substitutes.
ref: Selepas penalti tendangan pemain Argentina mendekati Borowski dan pergelutan kebanyakannya menolak mula dengan berpuluh-puluh pemain, pengadil, jurulatih dan pemain simpanan terlibat.

src: FIFA said television pictures would be looked at and fines or sanctions would be considered if appropriate.
ref: FIFA berkata gambar televisyen akan melihat dan denda atau sekatan akan dipertimbangkan sekiranya sesuai.

src: Vladimir Putin has relieved from power Admiral Vladimir Kuroyedov, the head of the Russian navy.
ref: Vladimir Putin telah dilepaskan daripada kuasa Laksamana Vladimir Kuroyedov, ketua tentera laut Rusia.

src: This comes a month after an incident where 7 Russian sailors became trapped in a submarine, and had to be rescued with help from abroad.
ref: Ini berlaku sebulan selepas satu kejadian di mana 7 pelayar Rusia terperangkap dalam kapal selam, dan terpaksa diselamatkan dengan bantuan dari luar negara.

src: No reason was given for Kuroyedov's dismissal, although Admiral Eduard Baltin speculated on Moscow Radio that it may be because of the navy chief's poor health.
ref: Tiada sebab diberikan bagi pemecatan Kuroyedov, walaupun Laksamana Eduard Baltin menspekulasikan di Radio Moscow bahawa ia mungkin kerana kesihatan ketua tentera laut itu terganggu.

src: Admiral Kuroyedov was in charge of the navy during the Kursk disaster of 2000, in which 118 sailors died when their submarine sank.
ref: Laksamana Kuroyedov bertanggungjawab ke atas tentera laut semasa bencana Kursk pada tahun 2000, di mana 118 kelasi meninggal dunia ketika kapal selam mereka tenggelam.

src: Kuroyedov is being replaced by Vladimir Masorin, who was previously serving as the Chief of staff for the Russian Navy.
ref: Kuroyedov digantikan oleh Vladimir Masorin, yang sebelum ini berkhidmat sebagai Ketua Turus untuk Tentera Laut Rusia.

src: In remarks Putin made about this leadership change and referring to Masorin, he said "The recent exercises, including those I have attended, show that the navy is developing and that is certainly your merit to a large extent."
ref: Dalam ucapan Putin tentang perubahan kepimpinan tersebut dan merujuk kepada Masorin, beliau berkata "Latihan kebelakangan ini, termasuk yang saya telah menghadiri, menunjukkan bahawa tentera laut sedang membangun dan sebahagian besarnya adalah merit untuk anda."

src: Putin also added "at the same time, there were difficult events, tragedies, but I would like to underline once again that with all these problems, all these tragedies, the main thing is that the Navy is undergoing a revival."
ref: Putin juga menambah "pada masa yang sama, terdapat peristiwa-peristiwa yang sukar, tragedi, tetapi saya ingin menekankan sekali lagi bahawa semua masalah ini, semua peristiwa itu, perkara utama adalah bahawa Tentera Laut sedang di dalam proses pembangunan semula."

src: Masorin added while in a hall at the Admiralty, "One thing is clear — to continue in the condition which we are in and do nothing is simply not possible."
ref: Masorin menambah semasa di dalam dewan di Admiralty, "Satu perkara yang jelas - ia adalah tidak mungkin untuk terus berada dalam keadaan kita sekarang dalam dan tidak membuat apa-apa."

src: "I have been given the task of stopping the navy shaking public opinion."
ref: "Saya telah diberi tugas untuk menghentikan tentera laut dari menjejaskan pendapat orang ramai."

src: "I am not experiencing euphoria at being appointed head of the navy."
ref: "Saya tidak mengalami keghairahan kerana dilantik sebagai ketua tentera laut."

src: A conflict erupted between Greek Orthodox monks and Arab Christians in Jerusalem on Good Friday, as the Arab Christians protested the monks' sale of church land to Jewish residents.
ref: Konflik meletus antara sami Ortodoks Greek dan Kristian Arab di Jerusalem pada hari Good Friday, kerana orang-orang Kristian Arab membantah penjualan tanah gereja oleh sami-sami kepada penduduk Yahudi.

src: Israeli police broke up the protest near the Church of the Holy Sepulchre.
ref: Polis Israel memecahkan protes berhampiran dengan Gereja Holy Sepulchre.

src: Omar Harani, a 25-year-old leading the protesters, told the Telegraph, "We gave the land 2,000 years ago to the Church to look after," and continued, "So it is not their land to sell."
ref: Omar Harani, yang berusia 25 tahun mengetuai penunjuk perasaan, memberitahu Telegraph, "Kami telah memberikan tanah 2,000 tahun yang lalu kepada Gereja untuk menjaga," dan lagi, "Jadi ia bukan tanah mereka untuk dijual."

src: "For hundreds of years we Christians, who used to be 15 per cent of the population, have been persecuted and driven out of the Holy Land and now we are a tiny minority."
ref: "Selama beratus-ratus tahun kita orang Kristian, yang pernah menjadi 15 peratus daripada penduduk, telah dianiaya dan dihalau keluar dari Tanah Suci dan kini kita minoriti kecil."

src: "But we will make our voice heard to stop this sale."
ref: "Tetapi kita akan membuat suara kita didengari untuk menghentikan penjualan ini."

src: After having a meeting in Bari, Italy, on the 13th of March, the President of Russia, Vladimir Putin, and the Prime Minister of Italy, Romano Prodi, gave a press-conference, summarizing the results of their conversations.
ref: Selepas mesyuarat di Bari, Itali, pada 13 Mac, Presiden Rusia, Vladimir Putin, dan Perdana Menteri Itali, Romano Prodi, memberikan persidangan akhbar, merumuskan hasil perbualan mereka.

src: The main point the two leaders agreed on was that only diplomatic means should be used in solving such international conflicts as in Afghanistan, Iraq and, especially, Iran with its nuclear program issue.
ref: Perkara paling penting yang kedua-dua pemimpin bersetuju adalah bahawa hanya cara diplomatik boleh digunakan dalam menyelesaikan konflik antarabangsa seperti di Afghanistan, Iraq dan, terutamanya, Iran dengan isu program nuklearnya.

src: Mr. Putin confirmed once again his views on any use of armed forces in resolving such international conflicts.
ref: Encik Putin mengesahkan sekali lagi pandangan beliau mengenai apa-apa penggunaan angkatan tentera dalam menyelesaikan konflik antarabangsa itu.

src: Mr. Prodi agreed with the Russian President on this point and also stated that such conflicts should be solved using a multi-lateral approach, where several nations would take part in discussions.
ref: Encik Prodi bersetuju dengan Presiden Rusia pada ketika ini dan juga menyatakan bahawa konflik itu perlu diselesaikan dengan menggunakan pendekatan pelbagai hala, di mana beberapa negara akan mengambil bahagian dalam perbincangan.

src: In addition to this the potential of the UN authority should be used, added Mr. Prodi.
ref: Di samping itu potensi kuasa UN harus digunakan, tambah Encik Prodi.

src: The Prime Minister said that Italy is looking forward to a closer cooperation with Russia in the UN Security Council, as well as in the energy sector.
ref: Perdana Menteri berkata bahawa Itali tidak sabar untuk bekerjasama yang lebih rapat dengan Rusia dalam Majlis Keselamatan UN, dan juga dalam sektor tenaga.

src: All of this could be reached only through thoroughly developed partnership agreements, he added.
ref: Semua ini dapat dicapai hanya melalui perjanjian perkongsian yang dibina dengan teliti, katanya.

src: Rock band Rage Against The Machine have beaten Joe McElderry to become the UK's official Christmas number one, following one of the biggest battles in the history of the UK Singles Chart.
ref: Kumpulan rock Rage Against The Machine menewaskan Joe McElderry untuk menjadi nombor satu carta Krismas rasmi di UK, berikutan salah satu pertempuran yang paling besar dalam sejarah Carta Rekod Single UK.

src: Their song Killing in the Name pushed the X Factor winner's new single The Climb into second place.
ref: Lagu mereka Killing in the Name menolak rekod single baru pemenang X Factor The Climb ke tempat kedua.

src: A Facebook campaign backing the American band aimed to stop an X Factor winner reaching the Christmas number one spot once again.
ref: Satu kempen Facebook yang menyokong kumpulan Amerika itu bertujuan untuk menghentikan seorang pemenang X Factor daripada mencapai tempat nombor satu carta Krismas sekali lagi.

src: Artists from the TV talent show, owned by music mogul Simon Cowell, have taken the festive top spot for four years in a row.
ref: Artis dari rancangan bakat TV itu, yang dimiliki oleh Simon Cowell seorang yang berpengaruh di dalam bidang muzik, telah mengambil tempat teratas carta perayaan itu selama empat tahun berturut-turut.

src: The group attracted over 900,000 members and widespread press attention, after it was started by Jon and Tracy Morter.
ref: Kumpulan itu menarik lebih 900,000 ahli dan perhatian media yang meluas, selepas ia telah dimulakan oleh Jon dan Tracy Morter.

src: "Are you getting fed up about the possibility of ANOTHER X-Factor Christmas No.1? ...us too...so we're going to do something about it!," they said on the group's Facebook page.
ref: "Adakah anda berasa bosan tentang kemungkinan nombor 1 carta Krismas X-Factor SEKALI LAGI? ... kami juga... jadi kami akan melakukan sesuatu mengenainya!," kata mereka di laman Facebook kumpulan itu.

src: They decided to back "Killing In The Name", first released in 1992.
ref: Mereka memutuskan untuk menyokong "Killing In The Name", pertama kali dikeluarkan pada tahun 1992.

src: Cowell had previously branded the campaign "cynical", but on Saturday contacted the Morters to congratulate them on making a "very exciting race for the Christmas number one".
ref: Cowell sebelum ini mengecap kempen ini "sinis", tetapi pada hari Sabtu menghubungi Morters untuk mengucapkan tahniah kepada mereka kerana membuat satu "perlumbaan yang sangat menarik untuk nombor satu di carta Krismas."

src: The campaign has also raised over £69,000 for homeless charity Shelter.
ref: Kempen ini juga telah mengumpulkan lebih dari £69,000 untuk kebajikan bagi mereka yang tidak mempunyai tempat tinggal, Shelter.

src: Rage Against The Machine guitarist Tom Morello had backed the campaign on Twitter.
ref: Pemain gitar Rage Against The Machine Tom Morello telah menyokong kempen itu di Twitter.

src: He announced that the band would play a free victory gig in the UK if they reached number one.
ref: Beliau mengumumkan bahawa kumpulan ini akan membuat persembahan kemenangan percuma di UK jika mereka mencapai nombor satu.

src: The result was announced on BBC Radio 1's chart show this evening by Scott Mills.
ref: Keputusan itu diumumkan pada carta rancangan BBC Radio 1 petang ini oleh Scott Mills.

src: McElderry had been due to appear on the show, but did not arrive.
ref: McElderry telah dijangka muncul di acara itu, tetapi tidak hadir.

src: The latest advertisement for United States Republican presidential candidate John McCain is questioning Democrat Barack Obama's benefit to families.
ref: Iklan terkini untuk calon presiden Amerika Syarikat Republikan John McCain mempersoalkan manfaat ahli Demokrat Barack Obama untuk keluarga-keluarga.

src: Last week the BBC reported that the McCain campaign had released an advertisement comparing Obama to American celebrities Britney Spears and Paris Hilton, calling him "the biggest celebrity in the world."
ref: Minggu lepas BBC melaporkan bahawa kempen McCain telah mengeluarkan iklan membandingkan Obama dengan selebriti Amerika Britney Spears dan Paris Hilton, memanggilnya "selebriti terbesar di dunia."

src: McCain's newest advertisement, released early this week, continues along those same lines.
ref: Iklan terbaru McCain, yang dikeluarkan awal minggu ini, bersambung dengan ayat-ayat yang sama.

src: "Is the biggest celebrity in the world ready to help your family?" the narrator asks, according to The Boston Globe and a video of the ad displayed on its website.
ref: "Apakah selebriti terbesar di dunia bersedia untuk membantu keluarga anda?" seorang pengisah bertanya, menurut The Boston Globe dan video iklan yang dipaparkan di laman webnya.

src: With images of wind turbines in the background, the narrator says, "Renewable energy to transform our economy, create jobs and energy independence, that's John McCain."
ref: Dengan imej turbin angin di latar belakang, pengisah itu berkata, "Tenaga boleh diperbaharui untuk mengubah ekonomi negara, mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan dan kebebasan tenaga, itulah John McCain."

src: The Boston Globe reports that McCain's latest ad does not acknowledge that Obama's economic policy, especially the proposed rollback of current president George W. Bush's capital gains tax cuts, would largely affect the wealthiest of America, not the middle class.
ref: The Boston Globe melaporkan bahawa iklan terkini McCain tidak mengakui bahawa dasar ekonomi Obama, terutama sekali cadangan pemotongan cukai keuntungan modal presiden semasa George W. Bush, sebahagian besarnya akan menjejaskan orang-orang terkaya of America, bukan kelas pertengahan.

src: Obama, the BBC reports, is quoted as calling McCain "cynical," "desperate" and "in the pocket of Big Oil."
ref: Obama, BBC melaporkan, dipetik sebagai memanggil McCain "sinis," "terdesak" dan "dalam poket Minyak Besar."

src: The latest Obama video, shown on the USA Today website, touts McCain as "just more of the same" politics employed by George W. Bush.
ref: Video Obama terkini, ditunjukkan di laman web USA Today, menggambarkan McCain sebagai politik "hanya lebih yang sama" yang digunakan oleh George W. Bush.

src: The ad cites a May 22, 2003 Fox News Channel interview where McCain says "the President and I agree on most issues."
ref: Iklan itu memetik 22 Mei 2003 Fox News Channel temu bual di mana McCain berkata "Presiden dan saya bersetuju tentang kebanyakan isu."

src: "There was a recent study that showed I voted with the President over 90 percent of the time."
ref: "Terdapat satu kajian baru-baru ini yang menunjukkan saya mengundi bersama Presiden lebih 90 peratus daripada masa."

src: The ad then criticizes McCain's policies on tax cuts, money for oil companies, and "tax breaks for companies that ship jobs overseas."
ref: Iklan itu kemudian mengkritik dasar McCain pada pemotongan cukai, wang untuk syarikat-syarikat minyak, dan "pengecualian cukai bagi syarikat-syarikat yang menghantar pekerjaan ke luar negara."

src: McCain is set to appear at an Ohio furniture plant Wednesday to reinforce the messages in his latest advertisement.
ref: McCain ditetapkan untuk muncul di sebuah kilang perabot Ohio pada hari Rabu untuk mengukuhkan mesej dalam iklan terbarunya.

src: "America has the second highest business tax rate in the entire world," he plans to say, according to prepared remarks issued by his campaign, and released by The Boston Globe.
ref: "Amerika mempunyai kadar cukai perniagaan kedua tertinggi di seluruh dunia," dia merancang untuk berkata sesuai dengan kenyataan bersedia dikeluarkan oleh kempennya, dan dikeluarkan oleh The Boston Globe.

src: "Is it any wonder that jobs are moving overseas when we are taxing them out of the country? "
ref: "Tidak hairanlah bahawa pekerjaan yang bergerak di luar negara apabila kita mengenakan cukai ke atas mereka keluar dari negara ini?"

src: "Unfortunately Senator Obama's plans would raise taxes on businesses even more.”
ref: "Malangnya rancangan Senator Obama akan menaikkan cukai ke atas perniagaan yang lebih banyak."

src: "He has promised tax increases on income, tax increases on investment, tax increases on small businesses."
ref: "Dia telah berjanji kenaikan cukai ke atas pendapatan, kenaikan cukai ke atas pelaburan, peningkatan cukai ke atas perniagaan kecil."

src: "Raising taxes in a bad economy is about the worst thing you could do because it will kill even more jobs when what we need are policies that create jobs."
ref: "Meningkatkan cukai dalam ekonomi yang tidak baik adalah perkara yang paling teruk anda boleh lakukan kerana ia akan menamatkan lebih banyak pekerjaan apabila apa yang kita perlu adalah dasar-dasar yang mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan."

src: "Is the biggest proponent of George Bush’s tired, failed policies ready to bring about change? "
ref: "Adakah penyokong terbesar George Bush letih, polisi gagal bersedia untuk membawa perubahan?"

src: "Another day brings another dishonest attack from John McCain."
ref: "Satu lagi hari membawa satu lagi serangan yang tidak jujur dari John McCain."

src: "While Senator McCain knows that Senator Obama has proposed cutting taxes for 95% of American families, what he’s not telling us is that he wants to give $4 billion in tax breaks to the oil companies, continue giving tax breaks to corporations that ship our job overseas, and provide no direct tax relief for more than 100 million middle-class families."
ref: "Walaupun Senator McCain tahu bahawa Senator Obama telah mencadangkan pemotongan cukai untuk 95% keluarga-keluarga Amerika, apa yang dia tidak memberitahu kita ialah beliau mahu memberi $4 bilion dalam pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat minyak, terus memberi pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat yang membawa pekerjaan ke luar negara, dan tidak memberikan pelepasan cukai langsung untuk lebih 100 juta keluarga kelas pertengahan."

src: "It’s time to retire these old policies and bring new energy to America."
ref: "Sudah sampai masanya untuk menyarakan dasar-dasar lama dan membawa tenaga baru ke Amerika."

src: Iraqi President Jalal Talabani in a press conference to reporters Wednesday was quoted saying: He promises more details in the coming days.
ref: Presiden Iraq Jalal Talabani dalam satu sidang media kepada pemberita pada hari Rabu telah disebutkan sebagai berkata: Dia menjanjikan maklumat lanjut pada hari-hari akan datang.

src: The presidential news conference was in response to events unfolding by reports from Shi'ite officials.
ref: Persidangan akhbar presiden itu adalah sebagai balasan kepada peristiwaperistiwa yang berlaku dengan laporan daripada pegawai-pegawai Syiah.

src: They said Saturday that as many as 100 Shi’ites were taken hostage by Sunni fighters, and were threatened with death in the town of al-Madain, near Baghdad.
ref: Mereka berkata pada hari Sabtu bahawa sebanyak 100 Syiah telah dijadikan tebusan oleh pejuang Sunni, dan diancam dengan kematian di bandar al-Madain, dekat Baghdad.

src: An Iraqi security force on Monday raided the town of about 1,000 families, but found no evidence of a hostage situation.
ref: Satu pasukan keselamatan Iraq pada hari Isnin menyerbu bandar kira-kira 1,000 keluarga, tetapi mendapati tiada bukti tentang orang tebusan.

src: The Shi’ite officials later said the bodies — believed to be the hostages — were found in the Tigris River.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai Syiah kemudian berkata, mayat - dipercayai tebusan - ditemui di Sungai Tigris.

src: In a separate incident 200km north of Baghdad in Haditha, after hearing shots reporters and residents found the bodies of 19 men executed in a soccer stadium on Wednesday.
ref: Dalam kejadian berasingan 200km utara dari Baghdad di Haditha, selepas mendengar tembakan wartawan dan penduduk menemui mayat 19 lelaki dibunuh di sebuah stadium bola sepak pada hari Rabu.

src: It is believed those shot were Iraqi soldiers executed by anti-government fighters, according to an Interior Ministry official, although the victims were not dressed in military garb.
ref: Mereka yang telah ditembak adalah dipercayai tentera Iraq yang dilakukan oleh pejuang anti-kerajaan, menurut seorang pegawai Kementerian Dalam Negeri, walaupun mangsa-mangsa tidak memakai pakaian tentera.

src: They were thought to have been heading home for a holiday marking the birthday of the prophet Muhammad when abducted by insurgents.
ref: Mereka dianggap telah pulang untuk bercuti menandakan hari lahir Nabi Muhammad apabila diculik oleh pemberontak.

src: A police officer has been killed in County Armagh, Northern Ireland by Continuity IRA gunmen a mere 48 hours after two soldiers were killed.
ref: Seorang pegawai polis telah dibunuh di County Armagh, Utara Ireland oleh pihak bersenjata Continuity IRA hanya 48 jam selepas dua askar terbunuh.

src: In what is presumed to be an attempt by dissident Republicans to derail the peace process, Pc Stephen Carroll was shot in the head just before 10:00 p.m. on March 9.
ref: Dalam apa yang dianggap sebagai satu percubaan oleh penentang Republikan untuk menggagalkan proses damai, Pc Stephen Carroll telah ditembak di kepala sebelum 10:00 malam pada 9 Mac.

src: The officer, described as an experienced veteran with 23 years of service, was responding to a call for help in the Lismore Manor estate in Craigavon when he was shot.
ref: Pegawai tersebut, yang digambarkan sebagai veteran yang berpengalaman dengan 23 tahun perkhidmatan, berkata demikian ketika menjawab panggilan bantuan di estet Lismore Manor di Craigavon apabila beliau telah ditembak.

src: In what is described as a genuine incident, a female member of the public had called for help saying a street gang had broken a window.
ref: Dalam apa yang digambarkan sebagai kejadian yang bukan dibuat-buat, seorang wanita dari orang ramai telah memanggil untuk bantuan mengatakan geng jalanan telah memecahkan tingkap.

src: A two vehicle patrol was sent to the incident given previous trouble in the area.
ref: Dua kenderaan peronda telah dihantar ke tempat kejadian disebabkan masalah di kawasan itu sebelumnya.

src: After standing off for a reasonable period to ensure that there was no ambush, the members of one vehicle got out to deal with the incident, whilst those in the second vehicle provided cover, while providing cover in the second vehicle that Pc Carrol was attacked.
ref: Selepas menunggu selama tempoh yang tertentu untuk memastikan bahawa tidak ada serangan hendap, ahli-ahli dari satu kenderaan keluar untuk menangani kejadian itu, manakala orang-orang di kenderaan kedua memberikan perlindungan, dan semasa memberikan perlindungan di dalam kenderaan kedua yang Pc Carrol telah diserang.

src: The PSNI, believe that the officer was hit by one of two shots fired by a gunman secreted in scrubland on the estate.
ref: PSNI, percaya bahawa pegawai itu telah terkena salah satu daripada dua das tembakan yang dilepaskan oleh seorang lelaki bersenjata yang bersembunyi di dalam kawasan belukar di estet.

src: There are unconfirmed reports that a second officer has also been injured.
ref: Terdapat laporan yang tidak disahkan bahawa seorang pegawai kedua juga telah cedera.

src: Responsibility for the shooting has been claimed on behalf of the North Armagh Battalion of the Continuity IRA in a coded message to Belfast media.
ref: Tanggungjawab untuk tembakan itu telah dituntut bagi pihak Batalion Armagh Utara di Continuity IRA dalam mesej berkod ke media Belfast.

src: The shooting has led to a call for unity and calm from a broad spectrum of the community ranging from spokesmen for the Ulster Volunteer Force, who called for the gunmen to be dealt with through the courts, to Sinn Féin were quick to condemn the gunmen and to offer their condolences to the family of the dead officer.
ref: Tembakan ini telah membawa kepada panggilan untuk perpaduan dan ketenangan dari seluruh masyarakat yang terdiri daripada jurucakap bagi Pasukan Sukarelawan Ulster, yang memanggil untuk lelaki bersenjata untuk diuruskan melalui mahkamah, bagi Sinn Féin adalah pantas untuk mengutuk lelaki bersenjata dan untuk mengucapkan takziah kepada keluarga pegawai yang mati.

src: This is the first death of a police officer to sectarian violence in over a decade, and comes after a nine month period in which intelligence indicated that dissidents were aiming to kill a policeman.
ref: Itulah kematian yang pertama seorang pegawai polis kepada keganasan sektarian di dalam lebih satu dekad, dan datang selepas tempoh sembilan bulan di mana perisikan menunjukkan bahawa pihak penentang telah merancang untuk membunuh seorang anggota polis.

src: Medha Patkar, Narmada Bachao Andolan activist in the ninth day of a hunger strike protesting the Sardar Sarovar Project, is forcibly moved to hospital in New Delhi by police.
ref: Medha Patkar, aktivis Narmada Bachao Andolan pada hari yang kesembilan mogok lapar membantah Projek Sardar Sarovar, secara paksa dipindahkan ke hospital di New Delhi oleh polis.

src: On the ninth day of the hunger strike she and two other activists had undertaken to protest the Indian government's decision to raise the height of the Sardar Sarovar dam across the Narmada river and the lack of progress in rehabilitating people displaced by the dam project.
ref: Pada hari kesembilan mogok lapar dia dan dua aktivis lain telah diambil untuk membantah keputusan kerajaan India untuk meningkatkan ketinggian empangan Sardar Sarovar seberang sungai Narmada dan kurangnya kemajuan dalam memulihkan orang pelarian oleh projek empangan.

src: Patkar was taken to the All India Institute of Medical Sciences where she was placed under intensive care.
ref: Patkar dibawa ke Institut Sains Perubatan All India di mana dia telah diletakkan di bawah rawatan rapi.

src: Doctors have said that she is conscious and her condition is stable.
ref: Doktor telah berkata bahawa dia sedar dan keadaannya stabil.

src: Police sources say that Patkar has not been arrested as of now, but an First Information Report has been lodged against her for attempting to commit suicide.
ref: Sumber polis mengatakan bahawa Patkar tidak ditahan pada masa ini, tetapi Laporan Maklumat Pertama telah dibuat terhadap beliau kerana cuba membunuh diri.

src: Activists of the Narmada Bachao Andolan tried to prevent the police from moving Patkar and some were arrested on rioting charges.
ref: Aktivis daripada Narmada Bachao Andolan cuba menghalang polis daripada menggerakkan Patkar dan ada yang ditangkap atas tuduhan merusuh.

src: Over 100 Australian Jews, including two authors and a federal minister, have condemned Israel's invasion of the Gaza Strip.
ref: Lebih 100 Australia Yahudi, termasuk dua pengarang dan seorang menteri persekutuan, telah mengutuk pencerobohan Israel di Semenanjung Gaza.

src: The 113 signatories are members of a group known as Independent Australian Jewish Voices (IAJV).
ref: 113 penandatangan adalah ahli-ahli kumpulan yang dikenali sebagai Suara Bebas Yahudi Australia (IAJV).

src: Antony Loewenstein, the groups founder, told The Age that he expected outrage from the loudest Jewish voices.
ref: Antony Loewenstein, pengasas kumpulan itu, memberitahu The Age bahawa beliau menjangka kemarahan dari suara-suara Yahudi yang paling kuat.

src: But the IAJV had found a sizeable minority of Australian Jews who valued an independent perspective as opposed to the blindly pro-Israel position.
ref: Tetapi IAJV telah menemui sebilangan besar daripada minoriti Australia Yahudi yang mementingkan perspektif bebas yang bertentangan dengan kedudukan pro-Israel yang membuta tuli.

src: "However, since Palestinians have no means of self-defence against the most powerful military force in the Middle East."
ref: "Walau bagaimanapun, kerana rakyat Palestin tidak mempunyai cara untuk mempertahankan diri daripada kuasa yang paling berkuasa tentera di Timur Tengah."

src: "We particularly call on Israel to end its brutal assault on the vulnerable Palestinian people of Gaza and to reconsider its rejection of the United Nations Security Council's call for a ceasefire," the statement said.
ref: "Kami amat menyeru Israel menghentikan serangan kejam terhadap rakyat Palestin terdedah Gaza dan menimbang semula penolakan panggilan Majlis Keselamatan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu untuk gencatan senjata," kata kenyataan itu.

src: "History has demonstrated that military punishment has never broken the spirit of a people or produced peace," added the statement.
ref: "Sejarah telah menunjukkan bahawa hukuman tentera tidak pernah mematahkan semangat orang-orang atau menghasilkan keamanan," kata kenyataan itu.

src: "It would only inflame hatred of Jews and of Israel, while doing nothing to protect the lives of Israelis."
ref: "Ia hanya akan membakar kebencian terhadap Yahudi dan Israel, sambil tidak melakukan apa-apa untuk melindungi nyawa rakyat Israel."

src: "Above all, it would undermine attempts to work with peace-seeking Palestinians for a lasting, just solution."
ref: "Paling penting, ia akan menjejaskan usaha untuk bekerjasama dengan rakyat Palestin yang mahukan keamanan untuk penyelesaian yang adil dan berkekalan."

src: Colin Rubenstein, executive director of the Australia/Israel and Jewish Affairs Council, said the statement was up to Mr Loewenstein's "usual form — totally wrong on every fact, totally unbalanced, and totally insensitive to Israeli suffering".
ref: Colin Rubenstein, pengarah eksekutif Majlis Hal-ehwal Australia/Israel dan Yahudi, berkata kenyataan itu terpulang kepada "bentuk biasa Encik Loewenstein - salah sama sekali pada setiap fakta, sama sekali tidak seimbang, dan benar-benar tidak sensitif kepada penderitaan Israel."
